title: MAGNIFIED: RL Fine-tuning of Multimodal Large Language Models for Motion Planning
summary: Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in semantic understanding and common sense reasoning, making them promising candidates for solving planning problems in autonomous driving. However, the next-token text prediction objectives traditionally used in pre-training and supervised fine-tuning (SFT) of MLLMs may fall short of fulfilling the planning objectives for autonomous vehicles. The next-token prediction objective merely encourages per-token imitation in text, often irrespective of multi-step consequences and the alignment with crucial planning considerations such as giving space to other road actors. To overcome these limitations, we propose a reinforcement learning fine-tuning (RLFT) approach, MAGNIFIED, that aligns the MLLM-based driving agent with planning objectives by learning from token-level rewards. By mapping a sequence of predicted tokens to corresponding vehicle trajectories and learning from planning rewards, MAGNIFIED optimizes for the true planning objectives rather than focusing solely on token prediction accuracy, enabling the model to refine its understanding of the planning task beyond simple imitation. We validate our approach on the Waymo Open Motion Dataset with a novel setup incorporating rasterized birds-eye views and tokenized trajectories as inputs and planning-oriented outputs. An initial SFT phase establishes a strong baseline in outputting plan trajectories as sequences of X-Y coordinates in text, while subsequent RL fine-tuning substantially enhances planning performance relative to the SFT baseline (demonstrating over a 10.5% reduction in overlap rate and a 38.9% reduction in off-road rate), underscoring the potential of RLFT on MLLMs to achieve vehicle planning that is better aligned with compliant, comfortable, and efficient driving.

AI.tldr: MAGNIFIED提出了一种基于多模态大语言模型的强化学习微调方法，用于自动驾驶规划任务，通过将预测的token序列映射到车辆轨迹并学习规划奖励，显著提升了规划性能。
AI.motivation: 传统多模态大语言模型使用下一个token预测目标进行预训练和微调，但这种方法可能无法充分满足自动驾驶规划的需求，因为它只关注token级别的模仿，而忽略了多步后果以及与关键规划考虑因素（如给其他道路参与者让出空间）的对齐。
AI.method: 提出MAGNIFIED方法，采用强化学习微调（RLFT）来对齐基于MLLM的驾驶代理与规划目标。通过将预测的token序列映射到相应的车辆轨迹，并从规划奖励中学习，优化真正的规划目标，而不仅仅是token预测准确性。在Waymo Open Motion Dataset上进行验证，使用栅格化的鸟瞰图和token化的轨迹作为输入，规划导向的输出。
AI.result: 与监督微调基线相比，强化学习微调显著提升了规划性能：重叠率降低了10.5%以上，离道率降低了38.9%，表明RLFT在MLLMs上能够实现更符合合规、舒适和高效驾驶的车辆规划。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习微调方法能够使多模态大语言模型更好地适应自动驾驶规划任务，超越简单的token模仿，实现与真实规划目标的对齐，为自动驾驶规划提供了有前景的方向。

title: TACT-ful: Multi-Channel Terrain Affordance and Compliance Training for Payload-Robust Perceptive Humanoid Locomotion
summary: Foothold selection on structured terrain requires explicit reasoning about contact planarity, surface steepness, and kinematic reachability, properties not captured by a single height-based terrain signal. We propose a multi-channel terrain cost combining flatness, steepness, and velocity-aware height feasibility, plus a forward climb reward, that simultaneously drives a GPU-parallel divergent component of motion (DCM) foothold planner and shapes a dense per-step affordance reward for an asymmetric actor-critic policy trained with proximal policy optimization (PPO) from depth images. A Bézier swing trajectory with adaptive apex bias extends foothold tracking to joint position-and-orientation, using the arc tangent to guide sole orientation through riser crossings and tread landings. To support payload tasks, we introduce a lower-body compliance training procedure in which a virtual wrench is injected at a sampled load attachment point, generating physically consistent force and moment; wrench-aware compliance targets replace rigid pose penalties, and the policy learns to yield to load-induced perturbations without force sensing. The full system trains end-to-end with standard PPO, no distillation, and no teacher-student staging, and is deployed on a humanoid directly from simulation with configuration changes only. In simulation, the policy reaches $1.0~\mathrm{m/s}$ on stairs with risers up to $0.20~\mathrm{m}$ and improves payload robustness up to ${\sim}15~\mathrm{kg}$ centered load and for moment-dominated wrist loads without fine-tuning. We also provide a qualitative hardware demonstration on structured terrain. Project website: https://fai-rl-tech.github.io/tact-locomotion.github.io/

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合地形成本计算、DCM落脚点规划、强化学习策略和适应性摆动轨迹的完整人形机器人运动系统，能够在结构化地形上自主行走并支持有效载荷任务。
AI.motivation: 结构化地形上的落脚点选择需要考虑接触平面性、表面陡峭度和运动学可达性等复杂特性，这些特性无法通过单一的高度地形信号捕获，需要更全面的地形表示和规划方法。
AI.method: 使用多通道地形成本（平坦度、陡峭度、速度感知高度可行性）和前进爬升奖励，驱动GPU并行的DCM落脚点规划器；采用非对称actor-critic策略从深度图像训练；使用贝塞尔摆动轨迹和自适应顶点偏置实现落脚点跟踪；引入虚拟力矩注入的下肢柔顺训练程序。
AI.result: 在仿真中，策略在高达0.20米台阶的楼梯上达到1.0 m/s速度，支持约15公斤中心载荷和力矩主导的手腕载荷，无需微调即可部署到真实人形机器人。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种端到端的强化学习人形机器人运动系统，能够在结构化地形上实现稳健行走并处理有效载荷，无需蒸馏或师生训练阶段，可直接从仿真部署到硬件。

title: Tessellated Biomes: Distributed Robotic Assemblies for Architectural Resilience
summary: This paper presents Tessellated Biomes, a cyber-physical framework for the adaptive robotic construction and reconfiguration of modular multi-material assemblies. It challenges the linear lifecycle of standard construction by fusing (1) local microfactory fabrication, (2) discrete multi-material optimization, and (3) distributed robotic assembly into a unified circular process of spatial adaptation. The research details methods for the digital fabrication of self-aligning modular primitives in multiple materials (PLA, timber, and concrete) produced in local microfactories; the aggregation and optimization of these primitives into compression-based discrete structures; and the deployment of custom quadrupedal robots that collaboratively relocate material into realized physical aggregations. The framework is validated through the fabrication, optimization, and robotic assembly of discrete structures. Together, these results position Tessellated Biomes as a model for resilient, reconfigurable architecture.

AI.tldr: Tessellated Biomes 是一个用于模块化多材料组件的自适应机器人建造与重构的赛博物理框架，通过融合本地微工厂制造、离散多材料优化和分布式机器人装配，实现空间适应的循环过程。
AI.motivation: 挑战传统建筑的线性生命周期，通过循环过程实现建筑结构的自适应重构，提高建筑系统的韧性和可重构性。
AI.method: 开发了三种关键技术：1) 在本地微工厂中制造多种材料（PLA、木材、混凝土）的自对齐模块化基元；2) 将这些基元聚合并优化为基于压缩的离散结构；3) 部署定制四足机器人协作搬运材料实现物理聚合。
AI.result: 通过离散结构的制造、优化和机器人装配验证了该框架的有效性，展示了其作为韧性、可重构建筑模型的潜力。
AI.conclusion: Tessellated Biomes 为建筑领域提供了一种新的自适应建造范式，能够实现建筑结构的循环利用和动态重构，为未来建筑系统的发展提供了重要方向。

title: Learning Control as Enabling Layer for Embodied Intelligence Research explored with Soft Robotic Swimming in diverse Flow Speeds
comment: 15 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables. Data and code availability statements included
summary: Soft robots are valuable robophysical platforms for studying body-caudal undulatory locomotion, but their compliant bodies are difficult to control precisely under changing hydrodynamic loading. Conventional proportional-integral-derivative (PID) feedback stabilizes periodic undulation in static water, but can accumulate flow-dependent tracking delay and increasing inter-trial variability when environmental flow becomes non-trivial. Here, we evaluate whether augmenting PID control with a Linear Repetitive Learning Estimation Scheme (PID-LRLES) recovers tracking accuracy and repeatability under dynamic flow. The LRLES generalizes classical integral action from constant to periodic, non-constant references, while using a stable transfer-function realization whose poles have negative real parts to avoid the long-term instability issues of classical repetitive control. Closed-loop experiments were carried out in a recirculating flow tank at five bulk flow speeds spanning 0 to 32.6 cm s^-1, using an embedded soft capacitive bending sensor at a 1 kHz control-loop rate. With controller gains tuned once in static water and then held fixed across all conditions, PID-LRLES tracked the periodic bending-envelope reference more closely than the PID baseline and significantly reduced the inter-trial spread of the per-trial RMSE (paired Wilcoxon signed-rank test, p = 1.8 x 10^-4, n = 25). Embedded soft proprioception and cycle-to-cycle learning act as complementary contributors to robustness: the sensor exposes the periodic hydrodynamic bias in body deformation, while the learning term absorbs it over recent oscillation cycles. By reducing flow-dependent control-induced variability, the approach provides an enabling layer for future robophysical studies seeking to isolate the effects of morphology, sensing, and environmental flow on aquatic locomotion.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了PID-LRLES控制方法，结合线性重复学习估计方案来增强软体机器人在动态水流中的跟踪精度和重复性。
AI.motivation: 软体机器人是研究身体-尾部波动运动的宝贵平台，但其柔性身体在变化的流体载荷下难以精确控制。传统的PID控制在静态水中能稳定周期性波动，但在非平凡环境流中会累积与流相关的跟踪延迟并增加试验间变异性。
AI.method: 提出PID-LRLES控制方法，将线性重复学习估计方案(LRLES)与PID控制结合。LRLES将经典积分作用从常数参考推广到周期性非常数参考，使用具有负实部极点的稳定传递函数实现，避免经典重复控制的长期不稳定问题。在循环流槽中进行闭环实验，使用嵌入式软电容弯曲传感器，控制频率为1kHz。
AI.result: 在0到32.6 cm/s的五种流速条件下，PID-LRLES比PID基线更紧密地跟踪周期性弯曲包络参考，并显著降低了每次试验RMSE的试验间变异性（配对Wilcoxon符号秩检验，p=1.8×10^-4，n=25）。
AI.conclusion: 嵌入式软体本体感知和周期到周期学习是鲁棒性的互补贡献者：传感器暴露身体变形中的周期性流体偏差，而学习项在最近的振荡周期中吸收这些偏差。该方法通过减少与流相关的控制诱导变异性，为未来研究形态、感知和环境流对水生运动影响的机器人物理研究提供了赋能层。

title: A Viscosity Semigroup Framework for Stable Image Reconstruction
summary: Starting from the axiomatic formulation of scale-space theory, we develop a viscosity-solution framework for multiscale image representations arising from degenerate elliptic-parabolic partial differential equations. Rather than introducing a new semigroup theory, we work within the standard viscosity-solution setting, using comparison principles to obtain well-posedness, uniqueness, and contraction in the supremum norm. This perspective is used to motivate a hybrid reconstruction operator in which a learned inverse map is followed by a nonlinear diffusion evolution. At the continuous level, the diffusion operator satisfies non-expansiveness, which provides stability for the reconstruction process; this framework is then evaluated on a CT-based mesothelioma classification task, where it attains an AUC of 0.875 with negligible variation across epochs, while the baseline model acquires AUC values from 0.49 to 0.80 without a clear convergence pattern. These observations are consistent with the stabilizing role suggested by the discussed viscosity theory.

AI.tldr: 基于尺度空间理论的公理化表述，建立粘性解框架处理退化椭圆-抛物偏微分方程的多尺度图像表示，利用比较原理获得适定性、唯一性和收缩性，并设计混合重建算子（学习逆映射+非线性扩散演化），在CT间皮瘤分类任务中取得稳定性能。
AI.motivation: 从尺度空间理论的公理化表述出发，为退化椭圆-抛物偏微分方程产生的多尺度图像表示建立粘性解框架，避免引入新的半群理论，利用标准粘性解设置和比较原理来获得适定性、唯一性和收缩性，为混合重建算子提供理论支撑。
AI.method: 采用标准粘性解框架，利用比较原理证明适定性、唯一性和上确界范数下的收缩性；提出混合重建算子：先使用学习得到的逆映射，再经过非线性扩散演化；在连续层面，扩散算子满足非扩张性，为重建过程提供稳定性。
AI.result: 在CT间皮瘤分类任务中，该方法达到AUC 0.875，且各epoch间变化可忽略；相比之下，基线模型的AUC在0.49到0.80之间波动，没有清晰的收敛模式。这些结果与粘性理论所预测的稳定作用一致。
AI.conclusion: 基于粘性解的尺度空间理论为多尺度图像表示提供了严格的数学框架，所提出的混合重建算子结合了学习逆映射和非线性扩散演化，在医学图像分类任务中表现出优异的稳定性和性能，验证了理论框架的有效性。

title: Towards CSI-Native Foundation Models: A Channel-Adaptive Roadmap for 6G
comment: 7 pages, 5 figures, submmited to IEEE WCM
summary: Wireless foundation models offer a path toward reusable channel state information (CSI) intelligence for sixth-generation (6G) systems. However, existing generic-backbone adaptation and CSI pretraining methods often treat CSI as task tensors rather than propagation-conditioned channel responses, thereby failing to capture the intrinsic time-frequency-spatial geometry of wireless environments. This paper presents a channel-adaptive roadmap toward CSI-native foundation models, proposing a unified framework that aligns pretraining, positional modeling, and attention control with three channel requirements: scale-aware heterogeneous exposure, physical time-frequency-antenna coordinates, and correlation-bounded token interaction. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of the proposed framework across three dimensions: zero-shot generalization, reducing NMSE by more than 4 dB across spatial-temporal-frequency tasks; scale extrapolation, yielding up to a 5.4 dB gain under 8 times unseen antenna scaling; and inference efficiency, accelerating mobility-aware processing by up to 18.8%. A system-level evaluation with Sionna SYS further shows that the proposed framework uses only 7.01% of dense-pilot overhead, reaches -18.64 dB average NMSE, and improves average net spectral efficiency by 36.6% over dense LMMSE and 15.5% over WiFo, indicating that CSI-native representation learning can support pilot-efficient radio access.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种面向CSI原生基础模型的信道自适应路线图，通过统一框架将预训练、位置建模和注意力控制与信道需求对齐，显著提升了零样本泛化、尺度外推和推理效率，在系统级评估中实现了高能效的无线接入。
AI.motivation: 现有通用骨干网络适应和CSI预训练方法将CSI视为任务张量而非传播条件信道响应，未能捕捉无线环境固有的时-频-空几何特性，因此需要开发能够真正理解信道物理特性的CSI原生基础模型。
AI.method: 提出统一框架，将预训练、位置建模和注意力控制与三个信道需求对齐：尺度感知异构暴露、物理时频天线坐标、相关有界令牌交互，构建CSI原生基础模型。
AI.result: 在三个维度上表现出优越性：零样本泛化（NMSE降低超过4dB）、尺度外推（8倍未知天线缩放下获得5.4dB增益）、推理效率（移动感知处理加速18.8%）。系统级评估显示仅需7.01%密集导频开销，达到-18.64dB平均NMSE，平均净谱效率比密集LMMSE提升36.6%，比WiFo提升15.5%。
AI.conclusion: CSI原生表示学习能够支持导频高效的无线接入，为6G系统提供可重用的信道状态信息智能。

title: MemoryVAM: Integrating Memory into Video Action Model for Robot Manipulation
summary: Video-world-model policies learn action-relevant representations by predicting future observations. However, they condition on only a short observation window, which renders long-horizon manipulation non-Markovian when the correct action depends on earlier events that are no longer visible. We present MemoryVAM, an episodic memory mechanism for video-world-model policies. We employ a Recap-Cue (RC) module, in which a Perceiver-based Recap Compressor maps per-frame CLIP embeddings into compact memory tokens, and a lightweight Cue Gate estimates task completion from memory and language. These tokens are injected into both the video backbone and the action decoder, aligning policy imagination with episode progress and conditioning actions on history. Our model trains the memory module with video prediction, a delta-reconstruction auxiliary loss, and episode-boundary supervision, requiring no per-frame progress labels. The same mechanism applies to UNet and Diffusion Transformer (DiT) backbones by changing only the cross-attention injection interface. On LIBERO-Mem, our model improves average success from 5% to 42.5%. On real robots, it achieves 78.3% success on counting tasks, 80.0% on spatial recall, and 75.0% on sequential tracking. Project page: https://MemoryVAM.github.io/

AI.tldr: MemoryVAM为视频世界模型策略添加了情景记忆机制，通过Recap-Cue模块将历史观察压缩为记忆token，解决了长时程操作中的非马尔可夫性问题，显著提升了在LIBERO-Mem和真实机器人任务上的成功率。
AI.motivation: 当前视频世界模型策略仅基于短期观察窗口进行预测，导致在长时程操作任务中，当正确动作依赖于早期已不可见的事件时，问题变得非马尔可夫。需要一种机制让策略能够访问历史信息。
AI.method: 提出MemoryVAM框架，包含Recap-Cue模块：Recap Compressor使用Perceiver将每帧CLIP嵌入映射为紧凑记忆token，Cue Gate从记忆和语言中估计任务完成度。这些token被注入视频骨干网络和动作解码器。通过视频预测、delta重建辅助损失和情节边界监督训练记忆模块，无需逐帧进度标签。该机制可适配UNet和DiT骨干网络。
AI.result: 在LIBERO-Mem基准测试中，平均成功率从5%提升至42.5%。真实机器人实验中，在计数任务上达到78.3%成功率，空间回忆任务80.0%，顺序跟踪任务75.0%成功率。
AI.conclusion: MemoryVAM通过情景记忆机制有效解决了长时程操作中的非马尔可夫问题，显著提升了视频世界模型在需要历史信息的复杂任务上的性能，且机制通用，可适配不同骨干网络。

title: A Projection-Based Surrogate Gradient Interpretation for Neural Codec Wrappers
summary: Neural wrappers are learned pre-and postprocessing networks designed to enhance the performance of conventional video codecs. Although these approaches can significantly improve compression efficiency, training them remains challenging due to the non-differentiability of video codecs, which arises from the multiple discrete decisions involved in the encoding process. Surrogate gradients have recently emerged as an effective solution for enabling end-to-end learning with conventional codecs. They offer two main advantages: they avoid training an additional network to mimic the codec, and they can improve compression performance. In particular, the recently proposed SCALED method, which leverages the true compression error, has shown strong results for training neural pre-processors such as downscalers. However, this SCALED gradient was originally introduced as a reparameterization trick, which limits its interpretability. In this paper, we show that this surrogate gradient can be interpreted as a first-order local approximation of the video codec, providing insight into its effectiveness. We further demonstrate that it is effective not only for learning downscaling operations, but also for the more challenging task of full neural wrapping with pre-and post-processing networks. Finally, we show that the approach generalizes well across different video codecs, quality factors, and tasks, including multiple downscaling ratios, yielding BD-Rate (PSNR) reductions of up to -23.59% on x264 and -20.07% on VVenC relative to standard resampling baselines.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新的视角来解释SCALED梯度方法，将其视为视频编解码器的一阶局部近似，并展示了该方法不仅适用于下采样操作，还能用于完整的神经包装网络训练，在不同编解码器、质量因子和任务中均表现良好。
AI.motivation: 传统视频编解码器在编码过程中涉及多个离散决策，导致其不可微分，这使得训练神经包装网络（预处理和后处理网络）变得困难。虽然SCALED方法已被证明能有效训练神经预处理器，但该方法最初是作为重参数化技巧提出的，缺乏可解释性。
AI.method: 论文将SCALED梯度解释为视频编解码器的一阶局部近似，从而提供了理论解释。进一步将这种方法扩展到完整的神经包装网络训练，包括预处理和后处理网络，并验证了其在多种视频编解码器、质量因子和任务中的泛化能力。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多种配置下均有效：在x264编解码器上实现高达-23.59%的BD-Rate（PSNR）降低，在VVenC编解码器上实现-20.07%的降低，相比标准重采样基线有显著提升。该方法还能处理多种下采样比例。
AI.conclusion: SCALED梯度可以解释为视频编解码器的一阶局部近似，这为其有效性提供了理论依据。该方法不仅适用于下采样操作，还能成功训练完整的神经包装网络，在不同编解码器、质量因子和任务中表现出良好的泛化能力。

title: NeuroShield: A Device-Agnostic Foundation Model for EEG Authentication
summary: A central challenge in EEG authentication is that models are typically tied to the acquisition settings in which they are trained. In particular, variations in headset hardware, channel layout, and signal duration create heterogeneous recordings that existing models are not designed to handle, causing each new headset or dataset to be treated as a separate model-development problem. This fragmentation limits multi-dataset learning, hinders knowledge transfer, and reduces model reusability. To address this limitation, we present NeuroShield, a reusable foundation model for EEG authentication that learns identity-discriminative embeddings from variable-channel and variable-length EEG recordings through a dual-stage transformer architecture. We pretrain NeuroShield on three public EEG datasets comprising 15{,}762 subjects and 28{,}116 sessions, and evaluate transfer on two unseen downstream datasets. Our evaluations show that, after fine-tuning, NeuroShield reduces equal error rate by 0.44--8.06 percentage points relative to the state of the art. NeuroShield further generalizes to segments longer than those seen during training and operates across channel layouts not encountered during pretraining. These results establish NeuroShield as a reusable and adaptable EEG identity encoder across heterogeneous recording settings. We release NeuroShield as open source to support reproducibility and community adoption.

AI.tldr: NeuroShield是一个用于EEG身份认证的可重用基础模型，通过双阶段transformer架构处理可变通道和可变长度的EEG记录，解决了EEG模型对采集设置的依赖问题。
AI.motivation: EEG身份认证模型通常与训练时的采集设置紧密绑定，不同头戴设备、通道布局和信号时长的变化导致异质记录，现有模型无法处理这种多样性，使得每个新设备或数据集都需要单独开发模型，限制了多数据集学习、知识迁移和模型可重用性。
AI.method: 提出NeuroShield，一个可重用的EEG基础模型，采用双阶段transformer架构，能够从可变通道和可变长度的EEG记录中学习身份区分性嵌入。在包含15,762个受试者和28,116个会话的三个公开EEG数据集上进行预训练。
AI.result: 在未见过的下游数据集上评估，经过微调后，NeuroShield将等错误率相对最先进方法降低了0.44-8.06个百分点。模型能够泛化到比训练时更长的信号段，并在预训练未遇到的通道布局上工作。
AI.conclusion: NeuroShield作为一个可重用和可适应的EEG身份编码器，能够在异质记录设置中工作，解决了EEG身份认证中的模型碎片化问题。模型已开源以支持可重复性和社区采用。

title: JPPD: Joint Prediction_Planning Diffusion with Differentiable Safety Guidance for Dynamic Obstacle Avoidance in Intelligent Transportation Systems
summary: Shared-space transportation operation requires low-speed autonomous platforms to navigate safely and efficiently among pedestrians, service robots, micromobility users, carts, and other road users. Most existing systems decompose this problem into trajectory prediction followed by motion planning, which creates one-way information flow: predicted participant futures influence the robot plan, but the selected robot plan cannot influence the predicted multi-agent evolution. This paper presents a joint prediction-planning diffusion framework that treats participant prediction and robot planning as a single conditional trajectory generation problem, where the model samples the future robot trajectory and all participant trajectories from one coupled distribution using a causal Transformer with cross-trajectory attention. To replace heuristic repulsive post-processing, the framework introduces differentiable safety potential guidance, a time-varying occupancy-probability potential whose gradient directly guides the joint sampler, and conditional flow matching is used to reduce inference steps while preserving multimodal trajectory diversity. The evaluation emphasizes shared-space operational effects, including near misses, blockage time, induced participant deviation, hard-braking events, and embedded latency, rather than treating average displacement error and final displacement error as the main result. Experiments in scenario-grounded simulation, naturalistic pedestrian replay, Isaac Sim validation, and ROS/Orin deployment show that joint sampling improves tail safety and runtime efficiency over a separated prediction-then-planning baseline.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个联合预测-规划扩散框架，将参与者预测和机器人规划视为单一条件轨迹生成问题，通过因果Transformer和交叉轨迹注意力从耦合分布中采样未来轨迹，并引入可微分安全势能引导来替代启发式排斥后处理，在共享空间交通场景中提升了尾部安全和运行时效率。
AI.motivation: 现有系统将共享空间交通操作分解为轨迹预测和运动规划两个独立步骤，形成单向信息流：预测的参与者未来影响机器人规划，但选定的机器人规划无法影响多智能体演化。这种分离方法限制了系统在动态交互环境中的安全性和效率。
AI.method: 提出联合预测-规划扩散框架，将参与者预测和机器人规划作为单一条件轨迹生成问题处理。使用具有交叉轨迹注意力的因果Transformer从耦合分布中采样未来机器人轨迹和所有参与者轨迹。引入可微分安全势能引导，这是一个时间变化的占用概率势能，其梯度直接指导联合采样器。采用条件流匹配来减少推理步骤同时保持多模态轨迹多样性。
AI.result: 在场景基础模拟、自然行人回放、Isaac Sim验证和ROS/Orin部署中的实验表明，联合采样相比分离的"先预测后规划"基线，在尾部安全和运行时效率方面都有提升。评估重点包括近距避让、阻塞时间、诱导参与者偏差、急刹车事件和嵌入式延迟等共享空间操作效果，而非仅关注平均位移误差和最终位移误差。
AI.conclusion: 联合预测-规划扩散框架通过将多智能体预测和机器人规划整合到单一生成模型中，解决了传统分离方法中的单向信息流问题，在共享空间交通场景中实现了更好的安全性和效率，特别是在尾部安全事件和实时性能方面表现优异。

title: Jury Duty: Calibration and Orientation Failures in MLLM-as-a-Judge Under Cultural Ambiguity
summary: MLLM-as-a-Judge is conventionally validated by agreement with human annotations, but this metric is undefined when the human pool is culturally heterogeneous. We introduce VOIR DIRE, a multimodal benchmark of 626 culturally paired image--prompt artifacts spanning U.S. and mainland Chinese contexts across food, fashion, and architecture, with annotator pools that are within-pool reliable (a = 0.86/0.74) but cross-pool divergent on evaluation (Q1 r = -0.12). Across six MLLMs, the bias decomposes into two failures: a positivity-floor calibration failure (compressed scale use) and an orientation failure (default to one cultural norm). On this corpus, where contested items are sampled to split the two pools, the floor mechanically validates the more-permissive Chinese reading; persona prompting partially recovers calibration, but the orientation residual survives, evidence the tilt is not reducible to scale compression. Reference-pool in-context demonstrations deepen the orientation residual and inflate the high end rather than restoring use of the low end. Model origin adds a small additive tilt (~0.10 MAE) that is approximately invariant under demonstration. We recommend reporting alignment against each reference pool separately and treating cross-pool divergence as a judge property.

AI.tldr: MLLM-as-a-Judge评估方法在文化异质的人类标注者群体中存在缺陷，VOIR DIRE基准通过626个跨美中文化场景的图文对，揭示了MLLM存在两种偏见：积极性下限校准失败和文化取向失败。
AI.motivation: 传统MLLM-as-a-Judge评估依赖于与人类标注的一致性，但当人类标注群体存在文化异质性时，这一指标变得不明确。需要新的基准来评估MLLM在跨文化评估中的表现。
AI.method: 构建VOIR DIRE多模态基准，包含626个美国和中国文化背景的图文对，涵盖食物、时尚和建筑领域。使用两个文化群体（美国和中国）的标注者，确保组内可靠性但组间评估存在分歧。测试六个MLLM模型，分析其偏见类型。
AI.result: 发现MLLM存在两种偏见：1）积极性下限校准失败（压缩评分尺度使用），2）文化取向失败（默认偏向某一文化规范）。在争议项目上，下限校准会机械地验证更宽松的中国解读。角色提示能部分恢复校准，但取向偏差仍然存在。参考池的上下文演示会加深取向偏差并抬高高分端而非恢复低分端使用。模型来源添加了约0.10 MAE的附加偏差，在演示下基本不变。
AI.conclusion: 建议分别报告与每个参考池的对齐情况，并将跨池分歧视为评判者属性。MLLM的文化偏见不仅来自尺度压缩，还包含不可约减的取向偏差。

title: Massive Activations Are Architecturally Robust: A Controlled Scratch/Commitment Residual Stream Test
summary: Trained transformers reliably develop massive activations, a small number of hidden dimensions whose magnitude is far above the median and which concentrate on the sequence-start token. Whether these outliers are a removable artifact of the residual stream's overloaded read and write role, or instead a functional necessity, is actively debated. We test the artifact hypothesis directly, with an architectural intervention. Our architecture, Ledger Residuals, splits the residual stream into a mutable scratch stream (Deliberation) that intermediate computation may freely overwrite and a protected, decode-only accumulator (Commitment) that holds the representation the model reads out. If massive activations exist only because one stream is forced to be both scratchpad and answer, then a dedicated answer channel should remove the need for them. We find that it does not. In matched-loss language models at the 160M and 290M scales, the model rebuilds the canonical fixed-dimension, start-token outlier inside the protected channel. The rebuilt feature is smaller in magnitude than in a standard transformer but more sharply concentrated on the start token, and a stronger sparsity penalty makes it more persistent and more concentrated still, rather than removing it. Massive activations therefore look architecturally robust: they re-emerge in whichever representation the model decodes from, which is what we would expect if they are functional rather than incidental. We release our architecture and measurement code.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出Ledger Residuals架构，将残差流分为可变的"草稿流"和受保护的"承诺流"，测试大激活值是否是残差流双重角色的产物。实验发现即使有专门的"答案通道"，模型仍会重建大激活值特征，表明大激活值具有功能性而非偶然性。
AI.motivation: 研究transformer中"大激活值"（少数隐藏维度幅度远高于中位数，集中在序列起始标记）的本质：是残差流读写角色过载的可移除伪影，还是功能性必需？通过架构干预直接测试"伪影假说"。
AI.method: 提出Ledger Residuals架构，将残差流分为：可变的"Deliberation"流（中间计算可自由覆盖）和受保护的"Commitment"流（仅解码的累加器，保存模型读取的表示）。在160M和290M规模的语言模型上进行匹配损失实验。
AI.result: 即使有专门的"答案通道"，模型仍在受保护通道内重建典型的大激活值特征（固定维度、起始标记异常值）。重建的特征幅度小于标准transformer但更集中于起始标记，更强的稀疏惩罚使其更持久、更集中而非消除。
AI.conclusion: 大激活值具有架构鲁棒性：无论模型从哪种表示解码，它们都会重新出现。这表明大激活值是功能性的而非偶然的，不是残差流双重角色的可移除伪影。

title: SafeDojo: Safe Reinforcement Learning for VLA via Interactive World Model
summary: Safe control is a prerequisite for real-world embodied intelligence, for which safe reinforcement learning has emerged as a promising paradigm. However, existing safe reinforcement learning methods either require costly real-world exploration or depend on hand-crafted safety functions. Neither scales to vision-language-action models deployed in open-world physical environments. We propose SafeDojo, the first model-based safe reinforcement learning framework for vision-language-action policies designed to learn safe actions through world model-based imagination. Specifically, SafeDojo performs online reinforcement learning on top of an interactive video world model. The world model generates action-conditioned future predictions, from which a tailored ResNet success classifier estimates per-step task progress from imagined frames and a lightweight safety head predicts per-step safety costs from latent context together with the proposed action chunk, enabling simultaneous assessment of task execution and trajectory safety. The decoupled task-reward and safety-cost signals are balanced through a Lagrangian-based constrained GRPO objective, enabling coordinated improvement of task success and safety under explicit constraints. On SafeLIBERO, SafeDojo achieves the best aggregate task success, safe success, and execution efficiency among inference-time safety, model-free RL, and model-based RL baselines, with the best average safe-success rate on both levels and an 8.25 percentage-point improvement over the strongest baseline on Level I. Real-world Franka deployment further shows the best average task and safe-success rates across five tasks. Our results position world model-based safe reinforcement learning as a scalable and generalizable path toward safe embodied intelligence.

AI.tldr: SafeDojo：首个基于世界模型的视觉语言动作策略安全强化学习框架，通过世界模型想象学习安全动作，在SafeLIBERO基准上实现最佳任务成功率、安全成功率和执行效率。
AI.motivation: 现有安全强化学习方法要么需要昂贵的真实世界探索，要么依赖手工设计的安全函数，无法扩展到开放世界物理环境中部署的视觉语言动作模型。
AI.method: 1. 在交互式视频世界模型上进行在线强化学习；2. 世界模型生成动作条件未来预测；3. 定制ResNet成功分类器从想象帧估计每步任务进度；4. 轻量级安全头从潜在上下文和动作块预测每步安全成本；5. 通过拉格朗日约束GRPO目标平衡解耦的任务奖励和安全成本信号。
AI.result: 在SafeLIBERO基准上，SafeDojo在推理时安全、无模型RL和基于模型RL基线中实现最佳综合任务成功率、安全成功率和执行效率，Level I上比最强基线提升8.25个百分点；真实世界Franka部署在五个任务上实现最佳平均任务和安全成功率。
AI.conclusion: 基于世界模型的安全强化学习是通向安全具身智能的可扩展和泛化路径，SafeDojo框架为开放世界物理环境中的视觉语言动作策略提供了有效的安全控制解决方案。

title: Beyond ROC-AUC: Operating-Point Performance Reporting for Biometric Verification
summary: A biometric verifier is often deployed with a strict false match budget, so only a narrow, low false match rate (FMR) slice of the score range is used. A reporting standard for this setting already exists. ISO/IEC 19795-1 asks for error rates at stated operating points, for the detection error tradeoff (DET) curve as the view of the trade-off between FMR and the false non-match rate (FNMR), and for an interval of uncertainty on every value. In practice, a single area under the receiver operating characteristic curve (ROC-AUC), the equal error rate (EER), or a verification accuracy is still reported as the resolution, which is a threshold-independent summary that the standard does not endorse. The full ROC-AUC averages the true match rate (TMR) with equal weight over the whole FMR range from 0 to 1, so almost all of its weight is placed where the system is never operated; low-FMR behavior can then be hidden, and the order of two systems can even be reversed. The guideline is revisited in this paper and tested against seven pretrained matchers across four modalities, face, voice, iris, and fingerprint, each reported with bootstrap confidence intervals and paired bootstrap tests. A system that looks stronger on full ROC-AUC is shown to be significantly worse at FMR = 10^-3. For face, a higher full AUC was obtained by FaceNet, whereas a higher TMR at FMR = 10^-3 was obtained by ArcFace, and both gaps were significant with non-overlapping intervals. Hence, the DET curve and the FNMR at a fixed FMR are re-iterated in this paper as the primary report, with ROC-AUC and EER retained as supplementary context.

AI.tldr: 该论文批评了在生物特征验证系统中仅报告ROC-AUC、EER等阈值独立指标的做法，指出这些指标无法反映系统在低误识率(FMR)下的实际性能。通过实验证明，在FMR=10^-3时性能更好的系统可能在整体ROC-AUC上表现更差，强调了应按照ISO/IEC 19795-1标准，以DET曲线和特定FMR下的FNMR作为主要报告指标。
AI.motivation: 生物特征验证系统通常在实际部署中采用严格的误识率(FMR)预算，只在很窄的低FMR范围内工作。然而当前研究仍普遍报告ROC-AUC、EER等阈值独立指标，这些指标无法反映系统在低FMR下的实际性能，甚至可能导致系统性能排序的错误判断。
AI.method: 重新审视ISO/IEC 19795-1标准指南，对7个预训练匹配器在四种生物特征模态（人脸、语音、虹膜、指纹）上进行测试。使用bootstrap置信区间和配对bootstrap测试，比较系统在完整ROC-AUC和特定FMR=10^-3下的性能差异。
AI.result: 实验显示，在完整ROC-AUC上表现更好的系统，在FMR=10^-3时可能显著更差。以人脸识别为例，FaceNet获得更高的完整ROC-AUC，但ArcFace在FMR=10^-3时获得更高的真匹配率(TMR)，且两个差距都具有显著性（置信区间不重叠）。
AI.conclusion: 应遵循ISO/IEC 19795-1标准，将DET曲线和特定FMR下的FNMR作为主要性能报告指标，而将ROC-AUC和EER保留为补充背景信息，以确保评估结果与实际部署需求一致。

title: CIExplainer++: Generating Causal and Interpretable Explanations for Graph Neural Networks
summary:
Explainable Artificial Intelligence aims to make black-box models more trustworthy by presenting, in a human-understandable manner, the elements that lead to the model's output. This involves both (i) identifying components and connections with genuine causal influence on outputs and (ii) translating such structures into an interpretable representation. For the former, we introduce CIExplainer, a novel perturbation-based method grounded in causal inference for explaining Graph Neural Networks (GNNs). CIExplainer identifies the subgraph with the highest causal effects on GNN predictions using the Potential Outcome Framework. We evaluate and compare CIExplainer on various GNN architectures (GCN, GraphSAGE, GAT, GIN) and datasets.
  To bridge subgraph explanations with human interpretability, we further propose G2TeXplainer, a method that transforms causal subgraphs into natural language explanations that capture both feature-level and relational information.

AI.tldr: CIExplainer是一种基于因果推断的扰动方法，用于解释图神经网络(GNN)的预测，通过识别对预测具有最高因果效应的子图；G2TeXplainer则将因果子图转化为自然语言解释，提高可解释性。
AI.motivation: 可解释人工智能旨在使黑盒模型更可信，通过以人类可理解的方式呈现影响模型输出的因素。这包括：(i)识别对输出有真正因果影响的组件和连接，(ii)将这些结构转化为可解释的表示。
AI.method: 提出CIExplainer，一种基于因果推断的扰动方法，使用潜在结果框架识别对GNN预测具有最高因果效应的子图。进一步提出G2TeXplainer，将因果子图转化为自然语言解释，捕捉特征级和关系信息。
AI.result: 在多种GNN架构（GCN、GraphSAGE、GAT、GIN）和数据集上评估和比较了CIExplainer。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提出了一种结合因果推断和自然语言生成的方法，为图神经网络提供更可信和可解释的解释，既识别因果相关的子图结构，又将其转化为人类可理解的语言描述。

title: Real-World Deployment of Massively Parallel Sampling-Based MPC for Contact-Rich Manipulation
comment: Presented at ICRA Workshop on Frontiers of Optimization for Robotics, 2nd Edition (OpenReview, 2026) OpenReview: https://openreview.net/forum?id=0KFJunxC8I&noteId=go6pmKSpzr
summary: Sampling-based Model Predictive Control (SMPC) is a promising strategy for contact-rich robotic manipulation, combining gradient-free optimization with massively parallel GPU simulation. Yet, most prior work relies on simplified dynamics or remains confined to simulation. We present an MPC framework that leverages JAX for large-scale parallelization and efficient computation, coupled with the high-fidelity MuJoCo MJX simulator, and deploy it on a Franka Research 3 executing the Push-T manipulation task through a complete real-to-sim-to-real pipeline. The MTP variant with structured global sampling outperforms unimodal baselines such as CEM, MPPI, and PS across tasks that require mode switching, both in simulation and on hardware. Furthermore, we evaluate online domain randomization within the MPC sample budget, showing that contact-initiation parameters yield interpretable adaptation signals, whereas global physics parameters provide feedback that is too weak for reliable exploitation at typical replanning frequencies. These findings highlight key challenges for sampling-based MPC in contact-rich manipulation-contact sensitivity, tight compute budgets, and the difficulty of obtaining informative domain-randomization signals in real time.

AI.tldr: 提出一个基于JAX并行化和MuJoCo MJX高保真仿真的SMPC框架，用于接触丰富的机器人操作任务，通过真实-仿真-真实管道在Franka Research 3上部署，在需要模式切换的任务中表现优于传统方法，并探索了在线域随机化的效果
AI.motivation: 现有的采样模型预测控制(SMPC)方法在接触丰富的机器人操作中存在局限性：要么依赖简化动力学模型，要么仅限于仿真环境。需要开发能够在真实硬件上部署的高性能SMPC框架
AI.method: 提出基于JAX的大规模并行化和高效计算框架，结合高保真MuJoCo MJX仿真器，通过真实-仿真-真实管道在Franka Research 3机器人上部署Push-T操作任务。采用结构化全局采样的MTP变体，并评估在线域随机化在MPC采样预算内的效果
AI.result: MTP变体在需要模式切换的任务中优于CEM、MPPI和PS等单模态基线方法（仿真和硬件均验证）。在线域随机化中，接触初始化参数产生可解释的适应信号，而全局物理参数反馈太弱，无法在典型重规划频率下可靠利用
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了基于采样的MPC在接触丰富操作中的关键挑战：接触敏感性、严格计算预算限制，以及实时获取信息丰富的域随机化信号的困难。提出的框架为真实世界机器人操作提供了可行的解决方案

title: A UAV-Based Multi-Modal Vision System for Automated Sideslope Deformation Monitoring and Hazard Detection
summary: Slope hazards constitute a major safety threat to expressway infrastructure, and their evolution is typically manifested as slow surface deformation. Conventional manual inspection suffers from low efficiency and inadequate operational safety, especially on severely deteriorated slopes. Accordingly, there is an urgent need for an automated, high-precision solution capable of large-area slope observation and analysis. This study aims to develop a highly automated workflow for slope hazard detection using Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV)-borne Light Detection and Ranging (LiDAR). The proposed workflow consists of a shared data-acquisition and ground-surface extraction stage, a single-observation hazard-screening branch based on RandLA-Net, and a multi-epoch deformation-monitoring branch based on grid-wise elevation differencing. To validate the effectiveness of the proposed system, we conducted multiple UAV-borne LiDAR data-acquisition flights in real expressway slope environments. The results show that the workflow can extract usable ground-surface point clouds under vegetation cover, identify potential hazard zones from single-observation point clouds, and quantify centimeter-level elevation changes using multi-epoch grid differencing. This study establishes an end-to-end UAV-borne LiDAR-based workflow for slope inspection and demonstrates its feasibility through controlled experiments, field tests, and simulation-based validation, thereby providing an implementable solution for automated slope-hazard monitoring and intelligent early warning.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种基于无人机激光雷达的自动化边坡灾害检测工作流，通过共享数据采集与地表提取、基于RandLA-Net的单次观测灾害筛查和基于网格高程差分的多时期变形监测，实现了高效、精确的边坡监测
AI.motivation: 边坡灾害对高速公路基础设施构成严重安全威胁，其演变通常表现为缓慢的地表变形。传统人工巡检效率低下且操作安全性不足，特别是在严重退化边坡上。因此，迫切需要一种能够进行大面积边坡观测和分析的自动化、高精度解决方案
AI.method: 提出了一种高度自动化的工作流，包括：1)共享数据采集与地表提取阶段；2)基于RandLA-Net的单次观测灾害筛查分支；3)基于网格高程差分的多时期变形监测分支。在真实高速公路边坡环境中进行了多次无人机激光雷达数据采集飞行验证
AI.result: 工作流能够在植被覆盖下提取可用的地表点云，从单次观测点云中识别潜在灾害区域，并通过多时期网格差分量化厘米级高程变化。通过控制实验、现场测试和基于仿真的验证证明了该方法的可行性
AI.conclusion: 本研究建立了一个端到端的基于无人机激光雷达的边坡检测工作流，为自动化边坡灾害监测和智能预警提供了可实施的解决方案，展示了其在真实环境中的应用潜力

title: Evidential Fusion Network for Multimodal Survival Prediction under Missing Modalities
summary: Recent multimodal survival prediction models have demonstrated strong predictive performance by leveraging complementary information across modalities. However, such models generally assume data completeness and exhibit limited robustness toward missing modalities, which are frequently encountered in real-world clinical settings. We propose the Evidential Missing Modality Survival Fusion (EMMS) model for multimodal survival prediction under missing modalities. EMMS offers a straightforward, computationally effective approach to survival analysis without requiring a generative phase for missing data. By employing Dempster-Shafer theory and Gaussian Random Fuzzy Numbers for multimodal decision fusion, it considers both aleatoric and epistemic uncertainty alongside modality reliability for fusion. Moreover, the model treats missing modalities as vacuous evidence, preventing interference with available inputs and naturally reflecting increased uncertainty and calibrated predictions. Extensive experiments on four cancer datasets demonstrate state-of-the-art performance while providing calibrated and interpretable uncertainty estimates under incomplete multimodal observations, without introducing additional computational overhead.

AI.tldr: 提出EMMS模型用于处理多模态生存预测中的模态缺失问题，通过证据理论融合多模态决策，无需生成缺失数据，能处理不确定性和模态可靠性
AI.motivation: 现有多模态生存预测模型通常假设数据完整，对实际临床中常见的模态缺失情况鲁棒性有限
AI.method: 使用Dempster-Shafer理论和Gaussian Random Fuzzy Numbers进行多模态决策融合，将缺失模态视为空证据，考虑偶然和认知不确定性及模态可靠性
AI.result: 在四个癌症数据集上实现最先进性能，提供校准和可解释的不确定性估计，且不增加额外计算开销
AI.conclusion: EMMS为多模态生存预测提供了一种简单、计算高效且能处理模态缺失的方法，具有校准的不确定性估计和良好的鲁棒性

title: Coupled Routing and Configuration Optimization for Multi-Viewpoint Robotic Inspection
summary: We present a unified framework that turns a set of 6-DoF inspection viewpoints into a time-optimal, collision-free route for a 9-DoF robotic system. Unlike modular pipelines that fix a single inverse-kinematics (IK) configuration per viewpoint, build an all-pairs travel-time map, and then route, our method jointly optimizes the visiting order and the per-viewpoint configuration in a single global search. The three-dimensional self-motion manifold of each viewpoint is parameterized in closed form so that the pose constraint holds by construction, the rest-to-rest travel time is approximated by a closed-form admissible double-integrator surrogate, and the tour is encoded by random keys. A derivative-free optimizer (CMA-ES) minimizes a cheap penalized objective over order and configuration, after which direct-collocation trajectory optimization is applied only to the edges of the selected route to certify dynamic feasibility and torque limits, and to return exact timings. This reduces the trajectory solves from quadratic to linear in the number of viewpoints and removes the decoupling that prevents modular pipelines from being globally time-optimal. Simulations and real-robot experiments on a KUKA LBR iiwa with a 2-DoF linear stage validate feasibility, smooth execution, and reduced end-to-end inspection time relative to modular and naive distance-based baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出统一框架，将6自由度检测视点转换为9自由度机器人系统的时间最优、无碰撞路径，通过联合优化访问顺序和每个视点的配置来减少检测时间。
AI.motivation: 传统模块化流水线方法存在局限性：它们为每个视点固定单一逆运动学配置，构建全对旅行时间图然后规划路径，这种解耦方法无法实现全局时间最优。
AI.method: 1) 将每个视点的三维自运动流形参数化为闭式表示；2) 使用闭式可容许双积分器替代函数近似静止到静止的旅行时间；3) 用随机键编码路径；4) 使用无导数优化器(CMA-ES)联合优化访问顺序和配置；5) 对选定路径的边进行直接配点轨迹优化以确保动态可行性和扭矩限制。
AI.result: 在KUKA LBR iiwa机器人加装2自由度线性平台的仿真和真实实验中验证了方法的可行性、平滑执行性，相比模块化和基于距离的基线方法减少了端到端检测时间。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过联合优化访问顺序和每个视点的配置，将轨迹求解从视点数量的二次复杂度降低到线性复杂度，消除了模块化流水线的解耦问题，实现了全局时间最优的检测路径规划。

title: Open Annotations and Synthetic Data for Field Localisation in Indian Bank Cheques
summary:
Automated cheque processing requires localising key fields (date, legal amount, IFSC code, account number, signature, and payee name)
  before any recognition step. The IDRBT Cheque Image Dataset is, to our knowledge, the only public collection of Indian bank cheques, but it
  ships without field annotations and with no stated licence, so its redistribution terms are unclear. We address both limitations. First,
  we release six-field bounding-box annotations for all 112 cheques in the dataset, distributed annotations-only and keyed to the original
  filenames so that the IDRBT redistribution terms are respected. Second, we release 295 fully redistributable synthetic cheque images
  produced by a cut-paste pipeline that composites annotated field regions from real cheques onto content-erased, bank-specific canvas
  templates; because patches are pasted at their source coordinates, annotations carry forward unchanged. Third, we provide a ResNet-50
  direct-regression baseline that predicts all six fields in a single forward pass, and use it for a controlled test of the synthetic data.
  The test is sobering: because cheque layouts are rigid, a no-learning baseline that simply predicts each field's mean training box already
  reaches 0.691 mean IoU and 80% accuracy at IoU >= 0.5, and once seed variance and training compute are accounted for, the cut-paste
  synthetic data yields no measurable improvement over real data alone (an equal-compute real-only model matches or beats the
  synthetic-augmented model on every aggregate metric). We report this negative result in full, since it cautions against assuming
  appearance-only augmentation helps fixed-layout documents and points instead to layout-varying synthesis. The annotations and synthetic
  images are released as reusable resources on the Hugging Face Hub under permissive licences.

AI.tldr: 该研究为印度银行支票数据集提供字段标注，并生成合成支票图像进行测试，发现对于固定布局的文档，仅基于外观的合成数据增强没有明显改善检测效果。
AI.motivation: 解决IDRBT支票数据集缺乏字段标注和明确许可的问题，同时探索合成数据在固定布局文档检测任务中的有效性。
AI.method: 1) 为所有112张支票提供6个关键字段的边界框标注；2) 通过剪切-粘贴管道生成295张合成支票图像，将标注字段区域粘贴到银行特定模板上；3) 使用ResNet-50直接回归基线模型进行测试。
AI.result: 无学习基线（预测训练集的平均边界框）已达到0.691平均IoU和80%的IoU≥0.5准确率。合成数据增强相比仅使用真实数据没有带来可测量的改进，真实数据模型在所有指标上匹配或优于合成增强模型。
AI.conclusion: 对于固定布局的文档，仅基于外观的数据增强可能无效，需要布局变化的合成方法。研究发布了可重复使用的标注和合成图像资源。

title: ELADO: Elliptic PDE Assessment Datasets for Operator Learning
summary: We introduce ELADO (Elliptic PDE Assessment Datasets for Operator Learning), a systematic benchmark suite constructed to show and quantify failure modes of neural operator architectures when learning solution operators of elliptic PDEs. While the benchmarks of existing datasets focus on average case performance, the ELADO datasets are constructed to highlight challenges that arise naturally in elliptic PDE problems. In particular, we construct several datasets built around Poisson's equation and the Helmholtz equation, each with non-constant coefficients. We define a controllable data-generating process to create datasets, that are designed to isolate a distinct source of difficulty. Specifically, these are (1) heavy-tailed solution distributions arising from light-tailed coefficient field distributions, (2) spectral distribution shift of the input data, (3) heavy-tailed distributions in the frequency domain of solutions, arising from light-tailed coefficient field distributions, (4) input sensitivity of learned operators, quantified by an empirical local Lipschitz analysis, and (5) the effect of input signal complexity on prediction accuracy under controlled amplitude normalization. We evaluate several neural operator architectures across all datasets and show that heavy-tailed targets, spectral shift, and input sensitivity each cause substantial degradation of the prediction accuracy that standard datasets and metrics (e.g., the mean relative $L^2$ error) may obscure.

AI.tldr: ELADO是一个针对神经算子架构的椭圆PDE评估基准套件，专门设计来揭示和量化神经算子在求解椭圆PDE算子时的失败模式，通过可控数据生成过程创建具有特定挑战性的数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有基准主要关注平均性能，而椭圆PDE问题中自然出现的挑战（如重尾解分布、谱分布偏移等）可能被标准指标掩盖，需要专门的数据集来系统评估神经算子的局限性。
AI.method: 构建基于泊松方程和亥姆霍兹方程的数据集，使用可控数据生成过程创建专门针对特定困难源的数据集，包括：重尾解分布、谱分布偏移、频域重尾分布、输入敏感性分析、输入信号复杂度影响。
AI.result: 评估多个神经算子架构发现，重尾目标、谱偏移和输入敏感性都会显著降低预测精度，这些失败模式在标准数据集和平均相对L2误差指标下可能被掩盖。
AI.conclusion: ELADO基准套件能有效揭示神经算子在椭圆PDE问题中的特定失败模式，为更全面的算子学习评估提供了系统工具，有助于理解模型在实际应用中的局限性。

title: A Digital Twin Framework for Traffic-Aware UAV Pavement Monitoring without Lane Closure
comment: Accepted for publication in the proceedings of the 6th Annual IEEE International Conference on Digital Twins and Parallel Intelligence (DTPI 2026)
summary: UAV-based pavement inspection can reduce the cost and risk of road-surface monitoring, but real-world deployment remains difficult when traffic, pedestrians, and temporary occlusions affect the visibility of defects. This paper presents a Unity-based digital twin framework for traffic-aware UAV pavement monitoring without lane closure. The proposed environment integrates procedurally generated road defects, dynamic vehicles and pedestrians, autonomous UAV navigation, and an embedded road-damage perception pipeline. The perception module uses a two-stage approach: a lightweight YOLOv8n detector first localises road defects, pedestrians, and vehicles, while a second classifier distinguishes among potholes, single cracks, and crocodile cracks. On the simulator test set, the full pipeline achieved 99.26% overall accuracy across five classes. The digital twin was then used to evaluate three recovery strategies for occluded road segments: hover-and-recheck, micro-repositioning, and skip-and-revisit. Experiments were conducted across different traffic densities and flight altitudes using coverage, mission time, energy consumption, and revisit ratio as operational metrics. Results show that flight altitude has a strong influence on inspection coverage and that adaptive recovery improves performance under occlusion. In particular, hover-and-recheck achieved the most consistent coverage under medium and high traffic conditions, reaching up to 97.03% coverage, while skip-and-revisit was most effective in low-traffic scenarios, reaching 97.95\% coverage at medium altitude. These results demonstrate that digital twins can support the development and evaluation of traffic-aware UAV inspection strategies before real-world deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Unity的数字孪生框架，用于交通感知的无人机路面监测，无需封闭车道。该框架通过两阶段感知管道检测路面缺陷，并评估三种遮挡恢复策略在不同交通密度下的性能。
AI.motivation: 基于无人机的路面检查可以降低道路监测成本和风险，但在实际部署中，交通、行人和临时遮挡会影响缺陷可见性，使得真实世界部署困难。
AI.method: 提出Unity数字孪生框架，集成程序生成的道路缺陷、动态车辆行人、自主无人机导航和嵌入式道路损伤感知管道。感知模块采用两阶段方法：轻量级YOLOv8n检测器定位缺陷、行人和车辆，第二分类器区分坑洞、单裂缝和鳄鱼裂缝。评估了三种遮挡恢复策略：悬停重查、微重定位和跳过重访。
AI.result: 完整管道在模拟器测试集上实现99.26%的总体准确率。实验表明飞行高度对检查覆盖率有显著影响，自适应恢复策略在遮挡下改善性能。悬停重查在中高交通条件下实现最一致的覆盖（最高97.03%），跳过重访在低交通场景中最有效（中高度下97.95%覆盖率）。
AI.conclusion: 数字孪生可以在真实世界部署前支持交通感知无人机检查策略的开发和评估，为实际应用提供重要指导。

title: Shear-Free Viewport Magnification for 360-Degree via Spherical Mobius Boosts
summary: Viewport-adaptive 360-degree imaging seeks to allocate a fixed sampling budget to the region a viewer is likely to observe. Existing view-biased projections increase viewport resolution through non-conformal warps, which can introduce anisotropic stretching and shear. We formulate spherical Mobius boosts as exact conformal maps for fixed-budget viewport magnification. The continuous spherical warp has quasiconformal dilatation K = 1, reallocating samples toward a target direction while preserving local angles. On a SUN360 saliency audit with 72 panoramas and 216 paired viewport targets, C1 Mobius boosting improves viewport PSNR over optimized offset cubemap on all paired cases, with case-level median gain +3.26 dB, image-level median gain +3.23 dB, and panorama-level bootstrap 95% CI [+3.15, +3.33] dB. Pareto analysis shows that this is not a free global-quality improvement: C1 trades full-sphere WS-PSNR for shear-free viewport fidelity. Prediction-error and filtering studies identify the operating envelope: strong boosts are useful for accurately targeted viewports, while large target uncertainty calls for weaker boosts or fallback. These results position Mobius boosting as a geometric primitive for prediction-conditioned foveated 360-degree resampling rather than a universal encode-once layout.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了使用球面Mobius变换作为固定采样预算下视口放大的精确共形映射方法，相比传统非共形扭曲方法，能显著提升视口PSNR质量。
AI.motivation: 现有视口自适应360度成像方法通过非共形扭曲来增加视口分辨率，但会引入各向异性拉伸和剪切变形。需要一种能够保持局部角度不变性的精确共形映射方法。
AI.method: 提出球面Mobius变换作为固定预算视口放大的精确共形映射，具有准共形扩张K=1，能够将采样重新分配到目标方向同时保持局部角度。
AI.result: 在SUN360显著性评估中，C1 Mobius变换相比优化的偏移立方体贴图，在所有配对案例中均提升了视口PSNR，案例级中位数增益+3.26 dB，图像级中位数增益+3.23 dB，全景级95%置信区间为[+3.15, +3.33] dB。
AI.conclusion: Mobius变换不是免费的全局质量提升，而是以全球面WS-PSNR为代价换取无剪切的视口保真度。该方法适用于预测条件化的360度注视点重采样，而非通用的一次编码布局。

title: B[FM]$^2$: Brain Foundation Model via Flow Matching with SplitUNet
summary: EEG foundation models can learn generalizable representations from large-scale EEG corpora to enable single-backbone transfer across diverse clinical and brain-computer interface tasks. Existing models typically discretize the continuous multi-channel EEG waveform into patches or codebook tokens and train a transformer with masked self-supervision. Recognizing that this discretization fragments continuous brain rhythms and obscures fine-grained temporal dynamics, we present B[FM]$^2$(Brain Foundation Model via Flow Matching), whose inductive bias aligns with the data by pretraining directly on the raw signal using continuous-time flow matching without patches, tokenization, or masking. However, multi-channel EEG signals pose an architectural challenge for flow matching: time is densely sampled and highly autocorrelated (thousands of timepoints), while the electrode axis is short (tens of channels) at distinct scalp positions. To address this time-electrode asymmetry, we introduce SplitUNet, a velocity network that factorizes each block into separate 1D temporal and 1D electrode convolutions and downsamples only along time, preserving electrode topology throughout the hierarchy. B[FM]$^2$ sets a new state of the art on 7 of 9 standard downstream EEG classification tasks, using a pretraining budget of only 36,895 segments ($\approx$ 307h), 1-2 orders of magnitude ($\approx$ 30x) less than required by existing EEG foundation models. Further, it generates synthetic EEGs that two board-certified neurologists cannot distinguish from brain data (Cohen's $κ=$ -0.096). https://jd730.github.io/projects/BFM2

AI.tldr: B[FM]²是一个直接在原始EEG信号上使用连续时间流匹配预训练的脑基础模型，无需离散化或补丁化，通过SplitUNet架构处理时间-电极轴不对称性，在少量数据上实现SOTA性能并生成逼真的合成EEG
AI.motivation: 现有EEG基础模型通常将连续多通道EEG波形离散化为补丁或码本标记，然后使用掩码自监督训练transformer。这种离散化会破坏连续的脑节律并模糊细粒度的时间动态。因此需要一种与数据归纳偏置对齐的方法，直接在原始信号上进行预训练
AI.method: 提出B[FM]²（Brain Foundation Model via Flow Matching），使用连续时间流匹配直接在原始EEG信号上进行预训练，无需补丁、标记化或掩码。针对多通道EEG信号的时间-电极轴不对称性（时间轴密集采样且高度自相关，电极轴短且位置不同），引入SplitUNet架构，将每个模块分解为独立的1D时间卷积和1D电极卷积，仅沿时间轴下采样，在整个层次结构中保持电极拓扑结构
AI.result: 在9个标准下游EEG分类任务中的7个上达到新的SOTA性能，仅使用36,895个片段（约307小时）的预训练预算，比现有EEG基础模型少1-2个数量级（约30倍）。生成的合成EEG信号，两位委员会认证的神经科医生无法将其与真实脑数据区分开（Cohen's κ = -0.096）
AI.conclusion: B[FM]²通过直接在原始EEG信号上使用连续时间流匹配预训练，结合SplitUNet处理时间-电极轴不对称性，实现了在少量数据上的高效学习和高质量合成，为EEG基础模型提供了新的方向

title: Toward Machine Risk Perception: Integrating Trust Calibration and Precursor-Based Risk Estimation for Humanoid
summary: Humanoid robots are emerging as co-workers in smart manufacturing, yet their dynamic, human-like movements introduce safety risks that differ fundamentally from those of fixed or wheeled robots. Conventional safety paradigms based on reactive force or distance limits fail to capture the sequential, uncertain nature of humanoid failures. This study proposes a precursor-driven, trust-calibrated framework to enable proactive humanoid risk perception. Accident evolution is modeled through sequential precursor cues using a Logistic-Exponential (LE) formulation that couples logistic escalation from diverse precursors with exponential decay for temporal dissipation. Trust is defined as the inverse of the estimated accident probability, allowing humanoids to adapt behavior in real time, reducing aggressiveness when risk intensifies, and restoring confidence as stability returns. A multi-source dataset of 126 documented events and 241 precursors revealed twelve dominant accident modes, most evolving through overlapping cues within one second. A simulated case study ("fall-onto-human") demonstrated how the LE-Trust coupling can trigger early intervention and prevent collapse. The results advance humanoid safety from static thresholds toward dynamic, evidence-based inference, establishing a foundation for risk-aware and trustworthy human-robot collaboration in Industry 5.0 environments.

AI.tldr: 提出基于前兆驱动和信任校准的框架，用于人形机器人主动风险感知，通过Logistic-Exponential模型耦合前兆序列与时间衰减，实现动态风险评估和行为调整。
AI.motivation: 人形机器人在智能制造中作为协作伙伴出现，但其动态、类人的运动带来了与传统固定或轮式机器人不同的安全风险。传统的基于反应力或距离限制的安全范式无法捕捉人形机器人故障的顺序性和不确定性特征。
AI.method: 提出前兆驱动、信任校准的主动风险感知框架。使用Logistic-Exponential（LE）公式对事故演化建模，将来自多种前兆的逻辑增长与时间衰减的指数耗散耦合。将信任定义为事故概率估计的倒数，使机器人能实时调整行为。基于126个事件和241个前兆的多源数据集识别了12种主要事故模式。
AI.result: 研究发现大多数事故在1秒内通过重叠的前兆信号演化。模拟案例研究（"人形机器人摔倒到人身上"）展示了LE-信任耦合如何触发早期干预并防止事故。数据集分析揭示了人形机器人事故的独特特征。
AI.conclusion: 该研究将人形机器人安全从静态阈值推向动态、基于证据的推理，为工业5.0环境中风险感知和可信的人机协作建立了基础。提出的框架能够实现主动风险管理和行为适应。

title: ARGUSTRACK: A Multi-View Annotation System for Multi-Object Tracking
summary: Multi-Camera Multi-Target (MCMT) tracking has emerged as a critical capability for applications ranging from autonomous driving to animal behavior monitoring. While recent advances have yielded sophisticated tracking algorithms, the availability of annotated multi-view data remains a significant bottleneck. Existing annotation tools predominantly support single-camera workflows or rely on LiDAR sensors, making cross-view labeling tedious and impractical for camera-only setups. We present ARGUS-TRACK, a multi-camera annotation system that addresses these limitations by enabling annotators to work directly on a bird's-eye-view (BEV) plane. Given calibrated camera parameters, a single ground-plane annotation is automatically projected into 2D bounding boxes across all relevant views, inherently ensuring identity consistency without manual cross-view alignment. To further accelerate the labeling process, ARGUSTRACK incorporates two complementary mechanisms: a Temporal Aware module that propagates annotations from preceding frames to initialize new ones, requiring only minor positional adjustments; and a Multi-camera Semi-annotation module that leverages off-the-shelf 2D detectors combined with foot-point estimation to automatically generate candidate BEV positions for annotator verification. We evaluate ARGUSTRACK through a pilot study on multi-camera broiler tracking and demonstrate that it substantially reduces annotation time compared to conventional single-camera labeling workflows.

AI.tldr: ARGUS-TRACK是一个多相机标注系统，通过在BEV平面直接标注，自动投影到所有相关视角，减少多视角标注时间并确保身份一致性。
AI.motivation: 多相机多目标跟踪应用广泛，但现有标注工具主要支持单相机工作流或依赖LiDAR传感器，使得跨视角标注繁琐且不适用于纯相机设置。
AI.method: 系统基于校准的相机参数，在鸟瞰图平面进行标注，自动投影到所有相关视角的2D边界框。包含时间感知模块传播前一帧标注，以及多相机半标注模块利用现成2D检测器和脚点估计自动生成候选BEV位置。
AI.result: 在多相机肉鸡跟踪的试点研究中，ARGUS-TRACK相比传统单相机标注流程显著减少了标注时间。
AI.conclusion: ARGUS-TRACK通过BEV平面标注和自动化机制，有效解决了多相机标注的瓶颈问题，提高了标注效率。

title: CELEUS: Certifiable and Efficient LLM Evaluation via E-Processes
summary: Can we trust evaluation scores to capture an LLM's true real-world performance? Certifiable evaluation answers this question by providing guarantee for LLM evaluation. In particular, existing methods sequentially curate evaluation samples and keep updating confidence intervals (CIs) that cover the true performance with high probability (e.g., 95%) until some conditions are satisfied, e.g., the CI width reaches a target precision. However, existing methods are not generally anytime-valid: the claimed coverage (e.g., 95%) may fail when CIs are repeatedly updated and used to decide when to stop, leaving a gap between theoretical rigor and practice. This paper bridges this gap by proposing Celeus, a Certifiable framework for Efficient LLM evaluation, which leverages E-processes to build anytime-valid CIs. Concretely, we propose signals that combine two ingredients: (i) Uncertainty-guided sampling to select informative samples for evaluation, and (ii) Surrogate-assisted approximations for unevaluated samples. We prove that such signals remain unbiased for the evaluation score conditional on the past, enabling statistically-grounded and anytime-valid $e$-process CIs. More importantly, the two ingredients reduce estimation variance and help reach the target precision with fewer evaluated samples. We also prove that CIs obtained by Celeus can shrink at a near-parametric rate up to logarithmic factors and analyze the oracle variance-optimal sampling rule that motivates the empirical uncertainty-guided one. Experiments show that Celeus reaches the target precision using 54-62% fewer evaluated samples than baselines, while preserving anytime-valid coverage.

AI.tldr: Celeus是一个用于大语言模型评估的认证框架，通过E-process构建任意时间有效的置信区间，使用不确定性引导采样和代理辅助近似来减少评估样本需求，同时保持统计严谨性。
AI.motivation: 现有的大语言模型评估方法在重复更新置信区间并决定何时停止时，可能无法保持声称的覆盖率（如95%），存在理论严谨性与实践之间的差距。需要一种任意时间有效的评估方法来确保统计保证始终成立。
AI.method: 提出Celeus框架，利用E-process构建任意时间有效的置信区间。包含两个核心组件：1）不确定性引导采样，选择信息量大的评估样本；2）代理辅助近似，处理未评估样本。证明这些信号在给定历史条件下对评估分数保持无偏性，从而支持统计严谨的任意时间有效置信区间。
AI.result: Celeus在达到目标精度时比基线方法少用54-62%的评估样本，同时保持任意时间有效的覆盖率。理论证明Celeus获得的置信区间可以以接近参数速率（最多对数因子）收缩，并分析了启发不确定性引导采样的最优方差采样规则。
AI.conclusion: Celeus填补了大语言模型评估中理论严谨性与实践之间的差距，通过任意时间有效的置信区间和高效的采样策略，显著减少了评估成本，同时保持了统计保证。

title: Perturbation-Based Uncertainty for Failure Detection in Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have shown strong performance in robotic manipulation, but reliable uncertainty quantification remains challenging, particularly under distribution shift. Unlike autoregressive policies, many modern VLA models generate continuous actions through regression or flow-based generation, where explicit predictive probabilities are unavailable. Moreover, existing approaches often rely on stochastic action sampling or supervised failure labels, limiting their applicability across diverse pretrained VLA models. In this work, we propose a label-free and model-agnostic framework for inference-time uncertainty estimation through hidden activation perturbations, motivated by Bayesian perspectives on local model variations. Specifically, we inject Gaussian perturbations into transformer hidden activations and estimate epistemic signals from disagreement across perturbed action predictions. Experiments on LIBERO and LIBERO-PRO show that perturbation-based uncertainty consistently improves failure detection under distribution shift compared to sampling-based uncertainty, providing a practical uncertainty signal for VLA models.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于隐藏激活扰动的无标签、模型无关的推理时不确定性估计框架，用于视觉-语言-动作模型，通过扰动Transformer隐藏激活并分析预测动作的不一致性来量化不确定性。
AI.motivation: 当前VLA模型在机器人操作中表现出色，但在分布偏移下的可靠不确定性量化仍然困难。现有方法通常依赖随机动作采样或监督失败标签，限制了其在各种预训练VLA模型中的适用性。
AI.method: 提出标签无关且模型无关的框架，通过隐藏激活扰动进行推理时不确定性估计。具体方法：向Transformer隐藏激活注入高斯扰动，通过分析扰动后动作预测之间的不一致性来估计认知不确定性信号。
AI.result: 在LIBERO和LIBERO-PRO数据集上的实验表明，基于扰动的不确定性在分布偏移下的失败检测方面持续优于基于采样的不确定性，为VLA模型提供了实用的不确定性信号。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为VLA模型提供了一种有效的不确定性量化方法，特别适用于分布偏移场景，且不依赖于特定模型架构或监督标签，具有较好的通用性。

title: NeoJaundice-AI: Smartphone-Based Neonatal Jaundice Detection Using Dual-Input Deep Learning and Synthetic Augmentation
comment: 7 pages, 10 figures, 8 tables. IEEE conference format
summary:
Neonatal jaundice (hyperbilirubinemia) is one of the most common conditions affecting newborns worldwide, with India alone recording roughly 15 million cases per year. Early detection is critical, yet standard diagnosis requires blood tests that are often impractical in rural clinics where laboratory facilities are limited. This paper presents NeoJaundice-AI, a smartphone-based screening system that uses photographs of a baby's skin and sclera (eye white) to estimate jaundice severity and predict serum bilirubin levels in under three seconds without requiring internet connectivity.
  The proposed system is built on a dual-branch EfficientNet-B0 architecture that independently processes skin and sclera images. Deep features are fused with handcrafted YCbCr color statistics to jointly perform four-class severity classification and continuous bilirubin regression. A key contribution is a synthetic jaundice generation method that simulates bilirubin-induced yellowing through controlled YCbCr channel modifications on normal neonatal skin images. This approach addresses data scarcity, particularly for severe jaundice cases and darker Indian skin tones (Fitzpatrick Types IV to VI). In addition, a skin-tone normalization module improves prediction consistency across diverse neonatal complexions.
  Experimental results demonstrate an overall classification accuracy of 91.8 percent, a clinical sensitivity of 93.5 percent, and a bilirubin mean absolute error of 1.4 mg/dL. After INT8 quantization and ONNX conversion, the model size is reduced to 8.3 MB while maintaining inference times below three seconds on standard Android devices. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first India-focused neonatal jaundice AI system that combines multimodal image fusion, skin-tone adaptation, synthetic data augmentation, and fully offline mobile deployment within a single framework.

AI.tldr: NeoJaundice-AI：基于智能手机的新生儿黄疸筛查系统，通过拍摄皮肤和巩膜照片，在3秒内无网络连接下评估黄疸严重程度和预测血清胆红素水平。
AI.motivation: 新生儿黄疸是全球常见病症，印度每年约1500万例。早期检测至关重要，但标准诊断需要血液检测，在农村诊所实验室设施有限的情况下往往不切实际。
AI.method: 采用双分支EfficientNet-B0架构独立处理皮肤和巩膜图像，融合深度特征与手工YCbCr颜色统计，进行四类严重程度分类和连续胆红素回归。关键贡献是合成黄疸生成方法，通过对正常新生儿皮肤图像进行受控YCbCr通道修改来模拟胆红素引起的黄染，解决数据稀缺问题，特别是针对严重黄疸病例和较深印度肤色（Fitzpatrick IV-VI型）。此外，肤色归一化模块提高了不同新生儿肤色的预测一致性。
AI.result: 整体分类准确率91.8%，临床灵敏度93.5%，胆红素平均绝对误差1.4 mg/dL。经过INT8量化和ONNX转换后，模型大小缩减至8.3 MB，在标准Android设备上推理时间保持在3秒以下。
AI.conclusion: 这是首个针对印度的新生儿黄疸AI系统，将多模态图像融合、肤色适应、合成数据增强和完全离线移动部署集成在单一框架中，为资源有限地区提供了实用的黄疸筛查解决方案。

title: Evolutionary Discovery of Developmental Reward Schedules in Deep Reinforcement Learning
comment: Accepted at the 2026 IEEE International Conference on Development and Learning (ICDL)
summary: The temporal structure of reward composition in reinforcement learning (RL) is typically hand-designed and held fixed throughout training, leaving the progression of motivational priorities largely unexplored. In this work, we propose an evolutionary framework for discovering developmental reward schedules, in which three distinct biologically inspired motivational components -- agency, novelty, and reactivity -- are combined through time-varying weights that dynamically shift over the course of training. Evaluated on two sparse-reward MiniGrid tasks: DoorKey-6x6 and KeyCorridorS3R1, our framework compares the generalizability of four evolutionary algorithms: CMA-ES, xNES, DE, and L-SHADE against an extrinsically motivated baseline (our main comparison point), and three additional hand-designed methods. On DoorKey-6x6, all evolved methods outperform the non-evolved baselines, with L-SHADE achieving the best performance -- an approximate relative mean improvement of 11.4% over the extrinsic only baseline. On KeyCorridorS3R1, CMA-ES achieves the best overall performance, with the remaining evolved methods showing weaker and less reliable generalization capability compared to the extrinsic only baseline. Interestingly, the discovered schedules diverge from our defined developmental ordering, with novelty consistently emerging as the dominant early signal during training, across both tasks. Collectively, our results position evolutionary optimization as a promising approach for developmental reward schedule discovery in deep reinforcement learning, and suggest that what evolution finds to be optimal in computational settings may differ from what it finds to be optimal in biology. The code for this project can be found at: https://github.com/alannadels/Evolutionary_RL.git.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一个进化框架来发现深度强化学习中的发展性奖励调度，通过进化算法动态调整动机组件的时间权重，在稀疏奖励任务中展示了性能提升。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习中的奖励结构通常是手动设计并固定不变的，这限制了动机优先级随时间发展的探索。研究者希望开发一个框架来自动发现随时间变化的奖励调度策略。
AI.method: 提出了一个进化框架，将三种生物启发的动机组件（自主性、新颖性、反应性）通过随时间变化的权重组合。评估了四种进化算法（CMA-ES、xNES、DE、L-SHADE），并与外在动机基线及三种手动设计方法进行比较，使用MiniGrid的稀疏奖励任务进行测试。
AI.result: 在DoorKey-6x6任务中，所有进化方法都优于非进化基线，L-SHADE表现最佳，相对外在动机基线有约11.4%的平均改进。在KeyCorridorS3R1任务中，CMA-ES表现最好，其他进化方法的泛化能力较弱且不稳定。有趣的是，发现的调度策略与预定义的发展顺序不同，新颖性始终成为训练早期的主导信号。
AI.conclusion: 进化优化是深度强化学习中发展性奖励调度发现的有前景方法。计算环境中进化找到的最优策略可能与生物学中的最优策略不同，为自适应奖励设计提供了新思路。

title: UNSEEN: Uncertainty-aware Navigation via Sparse Estimation in Unknown Environments
summary: Visual navigation in unknown environments remains a core challenge in mobile robotics, especially for resource-constrained platforms. Most existing approaches rely on loosely coupled modular pipelines and strong assumptions on perception quality or environmental structure, often resorting to multi-modal sensor suites that increase system complexity and deployment cost. Vision-only navigation offers a lightweight alternative, but its performance degrades severely under motion blur, low texture, and illumination changes, largely because they neglect the tight coupling between commanded motion and perception. While perception-aware methods partially address this issue, they typically optimize individual modules and fail to propagate uncertainty consistently across the navigation stack. In this paper, we present UNSEEN, a unified uncertainty- and perception-aware navigation framework that explicitly couples localization, mapping, and planning using only a front-mounted camera. UNSEEN estimates sparse maps and robot poses with associated uncertainties at 6Hz, and leverages them to plan trajectories that jointly optimize task progress and estimation accuracy in receding-horizon. Simulations and extensive real-world experiments in unknown environments demonstrate the robustness of the proposed approach, with UNSEEN-SLAM reducing absolute translational error by 9.8% and UNSEEN-Plan improving estimation accuracy by up to 45% compared to state-of-the-art methods, while achieving a 100% task success rate.

AI.tldr: UNSEEN是一个统一的、感知感知的导航框架，仅使用前置摄像头，通过耦合定位、建图和规划，在未知环境中实现鲁棒的视觉导航。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉导航方法存在以下问题：1）依赖松散耦合的模块化流程和强感知假设；2）多模态传感器增加复杂性和成本；3）纯视觉方法在运动模糊、低纹理和光照变化下性能严重下降；4）感知感知方法仅优化单个模块，未能传播不确定性。
AI.method: UNSEEN框架将定位、建图和规划紧密耦合，仅使用前置摄像头。它以6Hz频率估计稀疏地图和机器人位姿及其不确定性，并利用这些信息在滚动时域内规划轨迹，联合优化任务进度和估计精度。
AI.result: 在未知环境的仿真和大量真实世界实验中，UNSEEN-SLAM将绝对平移误差降低了9.8%，UNSEEN-Plan将估计精度提高了45%，同时实现了100%的任务成功率。
AI.conclusion: UNSEEN通过统一的不确定性和感知感知框架，在仅使用单目摄像头的情况下，实现了在未知环境中的鲁棒视觉导航，显著提升了定位精度和任务成功率。

title: Spatio-Temporal Wildfire Spread Prediction in Canada using a Video Swin-Hybrid-U-Net and Satellite Imagery
comment: 15 pages, 4 figures. Preprint submitted to the International Journal of Wildland Fire
summary: Background: Wildfires in Canada present increasing threats to ecosystems, communities, and infrastructure, demanding accurate forecasting tools to aid mitigation efforts. Existing models often lack scalability or fail to capture temporal dynamics effectively. Aims: This study aims to develop a deep learning framework tailored to Canadian wildfire spread prediction that captures spatio-temporal patterns in environmental data. Methods: We propose a U-Net architecture integrating a Video Swin Transformer encoder with a convolutional decoder to model three-day sequences of meteorological and environmental variables. Data are exclusively sourced from public repositories via Google Earth Engine, ensuring transparency and scalability. The model is trained and tested on a curated dataset of major Canadian wildfire events from 2014 to 2023. Key results: Our approach achieves strong predictive performance by effectively leveraging spatio-temporal attention to forecast next-day fire incidence maps. Conclusions: The model successfully captures complex wildfire dynamics unique to Canada's landscape and temporal variability. Implications: This framework paves the way for advanced spatio-temporal wildfire forecasting research and operational applications using publicly accessible datasets.

AI.tldr: 开发了一个结合U-Net和Video Swin Transformer的深度学习框架，用于预测加拿大野火蔓延，利用公开的Google Earth Engine数据进行训练和测试。
AI.motivation: 加拿大野火对生态系统、社区和基础设施的威胁日益增加，现有模型缺乏可扩展性或无法有效捕捉时间动态，需要更准确的预测工具来支持减灾工作。
AI.method: 提出U-Net架构，集成Video Swin Transformer编码器和卷积解码器，建模气象和环境变量的三天序列数据，数据完全来自Google Earth Engine的公共存储库。
AI.result: 该方法通过有效利用时空注意力机制，在预测次日火灾发生图方面取得了强大的预测性能。
AI.conclusion: 该模型成功捕捉了加拿大景观和时间变化所特有的复杂野火动态，为使用公开可访问数据集进行高级时空野火预测研究和业务应用铺平了道路。

title: Machine Learning Classification of Cryopathy Syndromes: A Comprehensive Comparative Study
summary: Cryopathy syndromes are difficult to classify because laboratory patterns often overlap across diagnostic categories, while some diagnoses are rare. This makes routine interpretation of cryoglobulin-related tests challenging and increases dependence on expert judgment. The aim of this study was to develop and compare machine learning approaches for automated classification of cryopathy syndromes from laboratory data and to identify a practical strategy for clinical decision support. Methods: We analysed laboratory records from 2,686 patients assigned to 14 diagnostic categories. The dataset included demographic variables, cryoglobulin measurements, precipitation tests, and hemagglutinin and hemolysin titers. Data preprocessing included cleaning, encoding, imputation, normalization, and construction of clinically informed interaction features. We evaluated 12 modelling strategies, including Random Forest, Gradient Boosted Trees, Multi-Layer Perceptron, soft-voting ensembles, class balancing with Synthetic Minority Over-sampling Technique, hierarchical classification, period-aware models, targeted binary classifiers, and probability calibration. Performance was assessed using stratified train-test evaluation and stratified 5-fold cross-validation. The main metrics were macro-averaged F1 score, accuracy, Top-3 accuracy, and expected calibration error. The overall task proved difficult because of marked class imbalance and clinical overlap between diagnoses. The best multiclass performance was achieved by a soft-voting ensemble of Random Forest and Gradient Boosted Trees. Cross-validation confirmed stable performance for the balanced Random Forest model. Tree-based methods consistently outperformed the neural network model. Feature engineering improved discrimination, and the most informative predictors were derived cryoglobulin-based interaction features.

AI.tldr: 开发并比较机器学习方法，用于从实验室数据自动分类冷球蛋白病综合征，寻找临床决策支持的实用策略。
AI.motivation: 冷球蛋白病综合征难以分类，实验室模式在不同诊断类别间常重叠，部分诊断罕见，常规解读困难且过度依赖专家判断。
AI.method: 分析2686名患者的实验室记录，涵盖14个诊断类别。数据包括人口统计学变量、冷球蛋白测量、沉淀试验、血凝素和溶血素滴度。预处理包括清洗、编码、插补、归一化和构建临床交互特征。评估12种建模策略，包括随机森林、梯度提升树、多层感知机、软投票集成、SMOTE类平衡、分层分类、周期感知模型、目标二元分类器和概率校准。
AI.result: 由于明显的类别不平衡和诊断间的临床重叠，整体任务困难。最佳多类性能由随机森林和梯度提升树的软投票集成实现。交叉验证确认平衡随机森林模型性能稳定。基于树的方法始终优于神经网络模型。特征工程提高了区分度，最具信息量的预测因子来自冷球蛋白的交互特征。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习方法可用于冷球蛋白病综合征的自动分类，基于树的集成方法在类别不平衡和临床重叠的挑战下表现最佳，为临床决策支持提供了实用策略。

title: Mind the Privileged-to-Camera Gap: Actor-Centric Sidecar Supervision for Camera-First Open-Loop Waypoint Prediction
summary: Camera-first autonomous-driving models predict future ego waypoints from images, ego-state features, and route commands, but waypoint supervision alone does not explicitly supervise actor-level representations of nearby road users. We study this as supervised representation learning for open-loop waypoint prediction. The deployable model uses multi-view RGB, ego state, and route command at inference. During training, simulator-derived sidecar labels supervise actor grounding, privileged hindsight actor relevance relative to the logged ego trajectory, and selected-actor short-horizon motion; these labels are never inference inputs. We evaluate route-disjoint splits with matched architecture, optimizer, validation criterion, checkpoint selection, and three seeds. A plain waypoint-only RGB baseline obtains 1.815$\pm$0.02 m final displacement error (FDE), and the matched no-teacher non-sidecar RGB control obtains 1.716$\pm$0.02 m. Road-user sidecar supervision (RU-sidecar) reduces FDE to 1.223$\pm$0.01 m, a 32.6% reduction over the plain baseline and 28.7% over the matched no-teacher non-sidecar RGB control. It improves over the plain baseline on 1445/1494 routes and over the matched no-teacher non-sidecar RGB control on 1417/1494 routes. Actor-conditioned slices show gains in all nonempty subsets, including 29.1% reduction for samples with at least four valid sidecar actors and 30.0% when a vulnerable road user is present. Optional simulator-state teacher alignment reaches 1.186$\pm$0.15 m FDE, but higher seed variability makes it secondary. Non-deployable simulator-state diagnostics remain stronger, indicating a privileged-to-camera gap. The evidence is limited to open-loop simulation diagnostics.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过引入道路使用者侧监督（RU-sidecar）来改进仅基于路点监督的自动驾驶模型，在训练时使用模拟器生成的侧标签监督演员级表示，显著降低了最终位移误差。
AI.motivation: 当前基于摄像头优先的自动驾驶模型仅通过路点监督来预测未来自车路径，但这种方式没有显式监督附近道路使用者（演员）的表示。作者认为这是监督表示学习问题，需要改进演员级表示。
AI.method: 在训练阶段，使用模拟器生成的侧标签监督演员定位、特权后见之明的演员相关性（相对于记录的自车轨迹）以及选定演员的短时程运动。这些标签在推理时从不使用。模型使用多视角RGB、自车状态和路线命令作为输入。
AI.result: RU-sidecar监督将最终位移误差（FDE）从1.815±0.02米降低到1.223±0.01米，相比纯路点基线减少32.6%，相比匹配的无教师非侧监督RGB控制减少28.7%。在1494条路线中，分别优于基线和控制模型1445条和1417条。
AI.conclusion: 通过侧监督改进演员级表示能显著提升自动驾驶模型的路径预测性能。虽然可选的特权状态对齐能进一步降低误差，但存在较高的随机种子变异性。研究仅限于开环模拟诊断，特权到摄像头的差距仍然存在。

title: AEF-Econ: Toward Plug-and-Play Socioeconomic Foundation Embeddings from AlphaEarth for Urban Remote Sensing
summary: AlphaEarth Foundations (AEF) unify global remote sensing foundation embeddings through multimodal self-supervised learning, but their pretraining focuses on physical land-surface signals, limiting plug-and-play use in socioeconomic tasks. We integrate seven heterogeneous data streams across 36 Chinese cities over eight years - AEF embeddings, population, nighttime lights, remote sensing indices, points of interest (POIs), urban morphology, and cross-lingual text - and construct CHN-Econ, a socioeconomic benchmark with 16 labels in three categories. We conduct 31 controlled experiments along five axes: fusion architecture, self-supervised objective, text integration, embedding dimensionality, and normalization. Used alone as a linear probe, AEF achieves R2 values of only 0.301 for cross-region and 0.160 for cross-tier evaluation. The five-axis ablated backbone improves these scores to 0.832 and 0.671, respectively, but reveals that low-dimensional semantic streams are consistently suppressed by high-dimensional streams under shared reconstruction. To address this bottleneck, we propose Capacity-Adaptive Reconstruction (CAR), replacing shared reconstruction with per-stream decoders and stream-level losses to mitigate inter-stream capacity competition. CAR further raises cross-region and cross-tier R2 to 0.848 and 0.693, and restores collapsed labels from negative R2 to a stable range. Using CAR, we infer 14.4 million pixels across 36 cities and eight years and release AEF-Econ, including 128d and 64d compressed versions. Self-diagnostics and case studies show that AEF-Econ captures cross-city hierarchies and intra-urban spatial organization under unsupervised settings, providing a socioeconomic remote sensing foundation embedding complementary to AEF physical embeddings.

AI.tldr: AEF物理嵌入在经济社会任务中表现有限，通过构建CHN-Econ基准和多轴实验，提出CAR方法提升性能，最终发布AEF-Econ经济社会遥感基础嵌入。
AI.motivation: AlphaEarth Foundations (AEF) 专注于物理地表信号，在经济社会任务中表现不佳，需要开发能捕捉社会经济信息的遥感基础嵌入。
AI.method: 整合7种异构数据流构建CHN-Econ基准，通过5轴实验（融合架构、自监督目标、文本集成、嵌入维度、归一化）分析，提出Capacity-Adaptive Reconstruction (CAR) 方法，使用每流解码器和流级损失缓解容量竞争。
AI.result: AEF单独使用时R²仅0.301（跨区域）和0.160（跨层级），5轴消融骨干提升至0.832和0.671，CAR进一步提升至0.848和0.693，并将崩溃标签从负R²恢复至稳定范围。最终生成AEF-Econ嵌入，包含128d和64d压缩版本。
AI.conclusion: AEF-Econ能够捕捉跨城市层级和城市内部空间组织，提供与AEF物理嵌入互补的社会经济遥感基础嵌入。

title: Understanding Latent Flow Models for Tabular Data Synthesis: Targets, Paths, and Sampling
comment: Accepted at ECML-PKDD 2026, Applied Data Science Track. 18 pages main, 27 pages supplementary, 7 figures, 45 tables
summary: Synthetic tabular data enables microdata sharing in regulated domains, yet deploying continuous-time generative models requires balancing analytical utility, disclosure risk, and computational cost. Latent-space flow models are flexible, but theoretical equivalences across learning targets, probability paths, and sampling dynamics can translate into different behaviour under finite-step integration and explicit compute budgets. We present an empirical study of tabular latent flow models across seven datasets, evaluating velocity, score, noise, and posterior matching objectives under optimal transport (OT) and variance-preserving (VP) paths, ODE and SDE sampling, and varying integration budgets. Our contributions are threefold: (1) we show that the learning target largely determines the utility-risk operating regime, with velocity and posterior matching tending to yield higher utility, while score and noise matching tend to achieve lower disclosure risk; (2) we demonstrate that configuration and sampling choices shift performance, with midpoint often improving distributional fidelity and OT paths often tolerating earlier stopping than VP, enabling compute savings under fixed budgets or risk thresholds; and (3) we distil these findings into actionable defaults and practical configuration guidance to support pre-release model selection under disclosure risk and resource constraints. The code implementation and supplementary materials can be accessed in https://github.com/rulnasution/tabular-latent-flow/.

AI.tldr: 该论文对合成表格数据的连续时间生成模型进行了实证研究，比较了不同学习目标、概率路径和采样方法在分析效用、披露风险和计算成本之间的权衡。
AI.motivation: 在受监管领域，合成表格数据可以实现微数据共享，但部署连续时间生成模型需要在分析效用、披露风险和计算成本之间取得平衡。虽然潜在空间流模型具有灵活性，但不同的学习目标、概率路径和采样动态在有限步积分和明确计算预算下可能表现出不同行为。
AI.method: 在七个数据集上对表格潜在流模型进行实证研究，评估了速度匹配、分数匹配、噪声匹配和后验匹配四种学习目标，在最优传输和方差保持两种概率路径下，使用ODE和SDE采样，并变化积分预算。
AI.result: 1) 学习目标主要决定了效用-风险操作机制：速度匹配和后验匹配倾向于获得更高效用，而分数匹配和噪声匹配倾向于实现更低披露风险；2) 配置和采样选择影响性能：中点方法通常改善分布保真度，OT路径比VP路径更能容忍提前停止，可在固定预算或风险阈值下节省计算；3) 提供了可操作的默认设置和实用配置指南，支持在披露风险和资源约束下进行预发布模型选择。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为合成表格数据的连续时间生成模型提供了实证指导，帮助在实际部署中平衡分析效用、披露风险和计算成本，并提供了具体的配置建议和开源实现。

title: World Action Models: A Survey
summary: World Action Models (WAMs) are embodied predictive-action models that make a forecast of the future available to action. Recent WAMs repurpose large video generation models, and a parallel line relies on language or vision-language backbones without a video-generation core. This rapid expansion has blurred the boundary among broad world models, video generation models, action-grounded video world models, Vision-Language-Action policies, and WAMs. This survey gives the field a common account. It first clarifies these boundaries, then organizes existing works through two complementary views. The first view asks what each method is required to generate, spanning rendered futures, latent futures, and video-generation-free action reasoning. The second view decomposes each method by predictive substrate, backbone, action coupling, and deployment regime. This anatomy supports a unified discussion of interactability, causality, persistence, physical plausibility, and generalization, followed by data, evaluation, and open challenges.
