Across these axes, a consistent design pattern emerges: WAMs are not simply video generators with action heads, but predictive-action methods whose design choices trade representational richness against compute, memory, latency, and action-label cost. The field is moving toward methods that generate less of the future while preserving what control requires. The survey homepage is available at https://world-action-models.github.io/.

AI.tldr: 世界行动模型（WAMs）是具身预测-行动模型，能够为行动提供未来预测。该领域快速发展，但概念边界模糊，本文通过两个互补视角梳理现有工作，揭示WAMs的设计模式是在表示丰富性与计算成本间权衡，趋势是生成更少但控制所需的关键未来信息。
AI.motivation: 世界行动模型（WAMs）领域快速发展，但概念边界模糊，混淆了广义世界模型、视频生成模型、行动基础视频世界模型、视觉-语言-行动策略和WAMs之间的区别。需要为领域提供统一的框架和分类方法。
AI.method: 通过两个互补视角组织现有工作：1）要求方法生成什么（渲染的未来、潜在的未来、无视频生成的行为推理）；2）按预测基板、骨干网络、行动耦合和部署机制分解方法。基于此分析交互性、因果性、持久性、物理合理性和泛化性等维度。
AI.result: 揭示了WAMs的一致设计模式：不是简单的带行动头的视频生成器，而是预测-行动方法，其设计选择在表示丰富性与计算、内存、延迟和行动标签成本之间进行权衡。领域趋势是生成更少的未来信息，同时保留控制所需的关键部分。
AI.conclusion: WAMs领域正朝着更高效的方向发展，在保持控制能力的同时减少未来预测的计算负担。该调查为领域提供了统一的分类框架，并指出了数据、评估和开放挑战等未来研究方向。

title: Beyond Templates: Revisiting Zero-Shot Remote Sensing through Meta-Prompting
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) have sparked growing interest in zero-shot Earth Observation (EO) downstream tasks, with further gains enabled by remote-sensing-adapted models. We examine this setting across 17 VLM variants and 12 remote sensing (RS) datasets under Meta-Prompting for Visual Recognition (MPVR), and show that zero-shot performance remains highly sensitive to textual design choices, from the meta-prompts used to guide the LLM in generating class descriptions to the descriptions themselves. We explore why semantically rich LLM-generated class descriptions do not translate into consistent gains over simple domain-adapted CLIP-style descriptions. While LLM descriptions are more semantically expressive, they can also introduce noise in the text embedding space, reducing robustness in downstream tasks. We support this observation through a text log-likelihood analysis in the whitened CLIP feature space, comparing LLM-generated and template-based descriptions. Building on this finding, we study query embedding calibration and show that lightweight calibration of the query space consistently yields strong improvements in zero-shot classification and retrieval. Overall, our results provide practical insight into the trade-off between semantic richness and robustness, and identify embedding calibration as a simple and effective tool for improving zero-shot remote sensing performance.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了视觉语言模型在零样本地球观测任务中的表现，发现文本设计选择对性能影响显著，LLM生成的类别描述虽然语义丰富但可能引入噪声，而轻量级的查询嵌入校准能有效提升零样本性能。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是探索视觉语言模型在零样本地球观测下游任务中的性能，特别是文本设计选择（如元提示和类别描述）对模型表现的影响，以及为什么语义丰富的LLM生成描述并不总是优于简单的模板描述。
AI.method: 方法包括：1）在17个VLM变体和12个遥感数据集上使用MPVR框架进行评估；2）通过文本对数似然分析在whitened CLIP特征空间中比较LLM生成描述和模板描述；3）研究查询嵌入校准技术来提升零样本分类和检索性能。
AI.result: 结果显示：1）零样本性能对文本设计选择高度敏感；2）LLM生成的类别描述虽然语义更丰富，但可能在文本嵌入空间中引入噪声，降低下游任务的鲁棒性；3）轻量级的查询嵌入校准能一致地显著提升零样本分类和检索性能。
AI.conclusion: 结论是：在零样本遥感任务中，需要在语义丰富性和鲁棒性之间进行权衡，而嵌入校准是一种简单有效的工具，可以显著提升视觉语言模型的零样本性能。

title: Temporal Causal Prior-Data Fitted Networks for Panel Data with Learned Reliability Signals
comment: 42 pages, 6 figures, 9 tables. Code and pretrained checkpoint to be released
summary:
Estimating causal effects in industrial time series requires handling temporal dynamics, time-varying treatments, and unobserved confounders. Existing causal foundation models (CausalPFN, CausalFM) operate only on static cross-sectional data; neural temporal methods (CRN, G-Net) require per-dataset training; and concurrent temporal-PFN proposals have not been demonstrated at industrial scale. None output explicit per-pair reliability signals alongside their CATE estimates.
  We introduce Temporal Causal Prior-Data Fitted Networks (TCPFN), a foundation model for zero-shot temporal causal discovery with learned reliability signals. TCPFN makes four contributions: (1) a Causal Judgment Head that jointly predicts null-effect probability, confounding strength, identifiability, mediation fraction, and causal regime; (2) a mixed training prior covering six causal regimes (independent, direct, confounded, mediated, time-varying confounded, feedback) plus CausalFM-style front-door and instrumental-variable priors; (3) a discrete-token panel-data architecture with cross-attention masking that prevents inter-horizon leakage; (4) zero-shot inference at industrial scale via FAISS-based context selection and one-step posterior correction.
  On 19 benchmark datasets across five domains, TCPFN achieves competitive zero-shot causal discovery: AUROC 0.96 on Tennessee Eastman, 0.93 on SWaT, 0.98 on Causal Rivers, 0.97 on CAUSRCA. The null detector reaches NullF1 0.94, AUROC 0.99. TCPFN scales to V=1,275 on a proprietary Kraft pulp-and-paper dataset in 6 hours on a single GPU; PCMCI, a CPU-only library, on a V=666 sub-panel of the same data took 81.5 hours, extrapolating by O(V^2) to ~12.5 days at V=1,275. TCPFN's top edges identify cross-subsystem causal relationships while PCMCI's surface within-instrument controller-measurement coupling -- a scalability case study.

AI.tldr: TCPFN是一种用于零样本时序因果发现的基座模型，通过因果判断头输出可靠性信号，在混合先验训练下实现工业级规模应用
AI.motivation: 现有因果基座模型仅适用于静态数据，时序方法需要针对每个数据集单独训练，且缺乏显式的可靠性信号输出。工业时序因果推断需要处理时间动态、时变处理和未观测混杂因素
AI.method: 提出TCPFN模型，包含：(1)因果判断头联合预测零效应概率、混杂强度、可识别性等；(2)覆盖六种因果机制的混合训练先验；(3)防止跨时间泄漏的离散令牌面板数据架构；(4)基于FAISS的上下文选择和一步后验校正的零样本推理
AI.result: 在19个基准数据集上实现竞争性零样本因果发现：Tennessee Eastman AUROC 0.96，SWaT 0.93，Causal Rivers 0.98，CAUSRCA 0.97。零检测器NullF1达0.94，AUROC 0.99。在V=1,275的工业数据集上6小时完成，相比PCMCI的O(V^2)复杂度大幅提升
AI.conclusion: TCPFN首次实现了工业规模的零样本时序因果发现，并输出显式可靠性信号，在可扩展性和准确性方面显著优于现有方法，能够识别跨子系统因果关系

title: Geometric Entropy: When Trajectory Diversity Helps and Hurts in Imitation Learning
comment: Accepted to IROS 2026. Project page: https://geometric-entropy.github.io/
summary: We study how trajectory-shape diversity in demonstrations affects imitation learning (IL) performance across models, tasks, and data scales. We introduce Geometric Entropy (H_G), a task-agnostic metric that quantifies the intrinsic diversity of transit trajectories after normalizing away extrinsic variation, such as goal pose and workspace scale, via target-frame alignment. Across multiple IL architectures and both simulated and real-robot contact-rich manipulation tasks, we observe a consistent inverted-U relationship between success and H_G: increasing geometric diversity improves robustness in low-diversity regimes but degrades performance once diversity induces strategy ambiguity. Moreover, the optimal entropy shifts toward lower values as task mastery increases through more data, easier tasks, or stronger priors, and for a pretrained vision-language-action model the trend becomes effectively monotonic decreasing. Practically, H_G enables fast pre-training auditing of demonstration datasets and offers a simple guideline for calibrating demonstrations toward the learnable regime.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出几何熵(H_G)作为量化演示轨迹形状多样性的任务无关度量，发现模仿学习性能与几何多样性呈倒U型关系：适度多样性提高鲁棒性，但过度多样性因策略模糊性而降低性能。
AI.motivation: 研究演示轨迹形状多样性如何影响模仿学习性能，缺乏量化多样性影响的理论理解和实践指导。
AI.method: 引入几何熵(H_G)，通过目标帧对齐归一化外在变化，量化内在轨迹形状多样性；在多种IL架构、仿真和真实机器人接触丰富操作任务中验证。
AI.result: 发现成功率和H_G呈一致的倒U型关系：几何多样性在低多样性时提高鲁棒性，但过度多样性导致策略模糊性而降低性能；最优熵值随任务掌握度增加而降低。
AI.conclusion: H_G可用于演示数据集的快速预训练审计，并提供校准演示到可学习区域的简单指导原则。

title: Robust Image-Driven Phenotyping of Ovarian Tumor Cells using Optimized Dynamic Features in Hyperbolic Channels
summary: Label-free, image-based cellular mechanophenotyping in microfluidic devices provides a high-throughput method for single-cell profiling. However, while complex microchannels (e.g., hyperbolic geometries) reveal transient deformation dynamics under continuous extensional stress, the resulting high-dimensional feature spaces are highly susceptible to hydrodynamic artifacts. Flow rate variations often distort discriminative boundaries, linking feature distributions to fluid conditions rather than intrinsic biology. To overcome this, we introduce a stability-guided analytical framework that decouples flow-induced noise from authentic mechanobiological signatures. We tracked the morphodynamic, kinematic, and intracellular optical-density trajectories of healthy and malignant ovarian cells to build a 93-dimensional feature space. Using a cross-flow screening strategy based on structural consistency and statistical persistence, we isolated robust descriptors, creating task-adapted subsets (20 features for binary classification; 25 for cancer subtyping). Variance-attribution analysis confirmed the neutralization of flow-conditioned artifacts; notably, flow-associated variance in the primary principal component fell from 69.9% to 9.3% in the subtyping task. We also found that macroscopic binary discrimination depends on bulk kinematic transitions, while clonal subtyping requires localized intracellular optical heterogeneity. These optimized subsets maintained diagnostic fidelity across multiple machine learning architectures and restricted sampling conditions. This framework establishes a robust, flow-independent foundation for continuous dynamic phenotyping.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一个稳定性导向的分析框架，用于在微流控设备中实现无标记、基于图像的细胞机械表型分析，通过消除流体条件引起的噪声，从真实的机械生物学特征中分离出稳健的描述符。
AI.motivation: 复杂微通道（如双曲线几何结构）在连续拉伸应力下能揭示瞬态变形动力学，但由此产生的高维特征空间极易受流体动力学伪影影响。流速变化常常扭曲判别边界，使特征分布与流体条件而非内在生物学特性相关联。
AI.method: 引入稳定性导向分析框架，通过基于结构一致性和统计持久性的交叉流筛选策略，从93维特征空间中分离稳健描述符，创建任务适应的特征子集（二元分类20个特征，癌症亚型分类25个特征）。
AI.result: 方差归因分析证实了流体条件伪影的中和；在亚型分类任务中，主要主成分的流动相关方差从69.9%降至9.3%。发现宏观二元区分依赖于整体运动学转变，而克隆亚型分类需要局部细胞内光学异质性。优化子集在多种机器学习架构和受限采样条件下保持诊断保真度。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为连续动态表型分析建立了稳健、独立于流体条件的基础，实现了从流体条件噪声中解耦真实机械生物学特征的目标。

title: MMGNN: Multi-level, multi-color graph neural networks for molecular property prediction
summary: Molecular message-passing neural networks commonly propagate chemically diverse interactions through a single graph, which may mix interaction-specific signals and require deep propagation to capture long-range effects. We introduce the Multi-level, Multi-color Graph Neural Network (MMGNN), a hierarchical framework that decomposes a molecular graph into overlapping atom-type-pair-specific subgraphs while preserving atom-level resolution. MMGNN-2D constructs chemical-colored subgraphs from covalent connectivity, whereas MMGNN-3D constructs geometric-colored subgraphs from spatial proximity and augments their edges with distance, angular, and torsional descriptors. Both variants apply a shared communicative message-passing backbone to each subgraph and combine the resulting representations through atom-wise aggregation and molecular readout. We evaluated MMGNN on five classification and three regression benchmarks from MoleculeNet using common scaffold splits and five independent runs. MMGNN-2D achieved the highest macro-average AUC-ROC of 0.838 across the classification datasets and the lowest RMSE on ESOL (0.803). MMGNN-3D obtained the highest mean AUC-ROC on BBBP (0.956) and the lowest RMSE on FreeSolv (1.793), indicating complementary strengths of topological and geometric representations. Structural and leave-one-out analyses further illustrate how the subgraph decomposition affects learned representations and atom-type-pair sensitivities. These results support overlapping interaction-specific graph decomposition as a competitive strategy for molecular property prediction.

AI.tldr: MMGNN是一种多级多色图神经网络，通过将分子图分解为重叠的原子类型对特定子图来改进分子性质预测，提供2D（拓扑）和3D（几何）两种变体，在多个基准测试中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 传统分子图神经网络通常通过单一图传播化学多样性相互作用，这可能会混合特定相互作用的信号，并且需要深度传播来捕获长程效应。
AI.method: MMGNN将分子图分解为重叠的原子类型对特定子图，同时保持原子级分辨率。MMGNN-2D从共价连接构建化学着色子图，MMGNN-3D从空间邻近构建几何着色子图，并增强距离、角度和二面角描述符。两种变体都对每个子图应用共享的通信消息传递主干，并通过原子级聚合和分子读出组合结果表示。
AI.result: 在MoleculeNet的五个分类和三个回归基准测试中，MMGNN-2D在分类数据集上实现了最高的宏观平均AUC-ROC（0.838），在ESOL上实现了最低的RMSE（0.803）。MMGNN-3D在BBBP上获得了最高的平均AUC-ROC（0.956），在FreeSolv上获得了最低的RMSE（1.793），表明拓扑和几何表示具有互补优势。
AI.conclusion: 重叠的相互作用特定图分解是分子性质预测的竞争性策略，结构分析和留一分析进一步说明了子图分解如何影响学习表示和原子类型对敏感性。

title: Vesta: A Generalist Embodied Reasoning Model
summary: Robots operating in open-world environments must seamlessly integrate localization, spatial reasoning, navigation, and long-horizon planning. While specialist models excel at individual tasks, deploying a multi-model stack is computationally expensive and prone to cascading errors. We present Vesta, a unified embodied generalist that consolidates these capabilities into a single foundation model. Our approach combines a diverse and massive curated corpus designed to induce spatial grounding and a simple multimodal memory harness that enables reasoning over extended time horizons. Across diverse benchmarks, Vesta on average beats individual SOTA baselines by >$20\%$ and beats an ensemble of per-category-best baselines by $>10\%$ -- thus demonstrating that a generalist model can match or exceed specialists. On real-world robotic tasks requiring memory and reasoning, Vesta improves task success by >35\%. Our work thus demonstrates that a single generalist is a feasible, scalable, and arguably preferable alternative to combining specialists.

AI.tldr: Vesta是一个统一的具身智能通用模型，将定位、空间推理、导航和长时程规划等能力整合到单个基础模型中，通过大规模多样化语料库和简单多模态记忆机制，在多个基准测试中超越了专门的专家模型。
AI.motivation: 机器人在开放世界环境中需要整合多种能力，而当前部署多个专门模型的方法计算成本高且容易产生级联错误，因此需要一个统一的通用模型来替代多模型堆栈。
AI.method: 结合大规模多样化精选语料库以增强空间基础能力，并使用简单的多模态记忆机制来支持长时程推理。
AI.result: 在多样化基准测试中，Vesta平均比单个最先进基准模型提升超过20%，比按类别最佳基准模型集成提升超过10%；在需要记忆和推理的真实世界机器人任务中，任务成功率提升超过35%。
AI.conclusion: 单个通用模型是可行、可扩展且可能优于组合专门模型的替代方案，展示了通用模型可以匹配甚至超越专门模型的能力。

title: MotionPyramid: Hierarchical Motion Representation and Residual Interfaces
summary: We ask whether the representational hierarchy seen in perception, from local primitives such as edges to higher level structures such as parts and objects, can be established for motion. In humanoid control, low level actions specify immediate motor commands, while meaningful behavior is organized over longer temporal scales, including contacts, gait fragments, balance recovery, reaching, and whole body skills. We introduce MotionPyramid, a hierarchical action representation that learns such structure from motion data. Starting from a motion tracking teacher, it trains a recursive stack of latent decoders: low level latents decode to immediate full body motor commands, while higher level latents unfold through lower levels into temporally extended motion programs. After pretraining, the hierarchy is frozen and reused by downstream reinforcement learning policies as a family of action interfaces at different control resolutions. Experiments show the learned levels form a motion hierarchy: coarser interfaces improve early learning and motion regularity by constraining exploration to structured segments, while finer interfaces preserve feedback control and final task precision. Representation probes show the hierarchy supports traversal, interpolation, transition, and qualitative composition, exposing editable control handles across temporal scales. Finally, we introduce Residual Interfaces, letting a downstream policy maintain coarse, segment level, and frame level residual commands through the frozen hierarchy. Analogous to residual or skip connections in deep networks, this allows coarse motion programs and fine residual corrections to coexist within one controller. MotionPyramid shows that motion, like perception, can be organized into a reusable multi level representation, providing structured abstraction without sacrificing controllability.

AI.tldr: MotionPyramid：一种从运动数据中学习层次化动作表示的方法，通过递归的潜在解码器堆栈构建从低级运动命令到高级运动程序的分层结构，为下游强化学习策略提供不同控制分辨率的动作接口。
AI.motivation: 探索运动是否能够像感知（从边缘到部件再到物体的层次结构）一样建立层次化的表示结构。在人形控制中，低级动作指定即时运动命令，而有意义的行为则组织在更长的时间尺度上，包括接触、步态片段、平衡恢复、伸手和全身技能。
AI.method: 引入MotionPyramid，一种从运动数据中学习层次化动作表示的方法。从运动跟踪教师开始，训练递归的潜在解码器堆栈：低级潜在变量解码为即时全身运动命令，而更高级的潜在变量通过较低级别展开为时间扩展的运动程序。预训练后，该层次结构被冻结并供下游强化学习策略重用，作为不同控制分辨率的动作接口家族。
AI.result: 实验表明学习的层级形成了运动层次结构：较粗的接口通过将探索限制在结构化片段中来改善早期学习和运动规律性，而较细的接口保持反馈控制和最终任务精度。表示探针显示该层次结构支持遍历、插值、过渡和定性组合，暴露了跨时间尺度的可编辑控制手柄。此外引入残差接口，让下游策略通过冻结的层次结构保持粗粒度、片段级和帧级残差命令。
AI.conclusion: MotionPyramid表明，运动可以像感知一样被组织成可重用的多层次表示，在保持可控性的同时提供结构化抽象。这类似于深度网络中的残差或跳跃连接，允许粗粒度运动程序和精细残差修正在一个控制器中共存。

title: Physics-Guided Dual-Stream Heterogeneous Graph Neural Network for Predicting Full-Field Structural Response of Stiffened Panels
summary: Iterative design and optimization of large, complex structures require fast and accurate prediction of stress, displacement, and other fields. Finite element analysis (FEA) is computationally expensive for this task. Existing neural network surrogates often struggle with varying topologies and complex boundary conditions. This study proposes the novel Dual-Stream Heterogeneous Graph Neural Network (DS-HGNN) for full-field stress and displacement prediction in thin-walled structures, demonstrated on box beams made of stiffened panels. DS-HGNN operates on panel-level heterogeneous graph representations and introduces physics-guided edge states initialized from edge types, spatial information, and boundary kinematics. These states are updated through dual-stream message passing that separates longitudinal and transverse structural information while allowing cross-stream exchange. Geometry and loading effects are incorporated through Feature-wise Linear Modulation (FiLM)-conditioned 1-D spectral convolutions, and physical fields are reconstructed using a spectral-bypass low-rank readout. The model is evaluated on stiffened panel datasets with different geometries, boundary kinematics, loading conditions, and material nonlinear responses. DS-HGNN achieves the lowest stress and displacement RMSE compared with six benchmark heterogeneous graph neural network models. It also reaches comparable accuracy to the strongest benchmark models using 19%-38% fewer training samples. A targeted evaluation further shows that DS-HGNN captures yield and post-yield stress features.

AI.tldr: 提出DS-HGNN模型，用于预测薄壁结构（如加筋板箱梁）的全场应力和位移，相比传统FEA和现有神经网络代理模型，在计算效率和精度上均有显著提升。
AI.motivation: 大型复杂结构的迭代设计和优化需要快速准确的应力、位移等场预测。传统有限元分析计算成本高，现有神经网络代理模型在处理变化拓扑和复杂边界条件时存在困难。
AI.method: 提出双流异构图神经网络（DS-HGNN），基于板级异构图表示，引入物理引导的边状态初始化，通过分离纵向和横向结构信息的双流消息传递进行更新，结合FiLM条件化的一维谱卷积处理几何和载荷效应，使用谱旁路低秩读出重建物理场。
AI.result: 在具有不同几何、边界运动学、载荷条件和材料非线性响应的加筋板数据集上评估，DS-HGNN相比六个基准异构图神经网络模型获得最低的应力和位移RMSE，且使用19%-38%更少的训练样本达到可比精度，并能捕捉屈服和屈服后应力特征。
AI.conclusion: DS-HGNN为薄壁结构的全场应力和位移预测提供了一种高效准确的神经网络代理模型，在计算效率和精度上均优于现有方法，特别适用于具有复杂边界条件和材料非线性的结构分析。

title: Learning-Based Modeling of Soft Robots via Cosserat Rod Theory
summary: Modeling soft robot dynamics is challenging due to their continuum structure and typically nonlinear dynamics. Creating models based on first-order principles is typically time-demanding, and their expressiveness is limited, whereas data-driven models lack interpretability and physical consistency. This work aims to overcome these challenges by introducing a port-Hamiltonian Gaussian Process Regression framework for learning and simulating the dynamics of planar, rod-like soft robots. In detail, the proposed model integrates Cosserat rod theory and Hamiltonian physics with data-driven inference to preserve the system's energy structure while accurately learning the rod dynamics. Numerical simulations show that we can achieve accurate and energy-consistent representations of a rod-like soft robot, showing the potential for a robust and interpretable pathway for modeling complex continuum mechanics.

AI.tldr: 提出基于端口哈密顿高斯过程回归的框架，用于学习和模拟平面杆状软体机器人动力学，结合Cosserat杆理论与哈密顿物理，保持能量结构同时准确学习动力学
AI.motivation: 软体机器人动力学建模面临挑战：一阶原理建模耗时且表达能力有限，数据驱动模型缺乏可解释性和物理一致性。需要克服这些限制，建立既准确又物理一致的模型
AI.method: 采用端口哈密顿高斯过程回归框架，整合Cosserat杆理论与哈密顿物理原理，通过数据驱动推断保持系统能量结构，同时准确学习杆动力学
AI.result: 数值模拟显示能够实现杆状软体机器人的准确且能量一致的表示，为复杂连续介质力学建模提供了鲁棒且可解释的途径
AI.conclusion: 该框架为软体机器人动力学建模提供了物理一致且可解释的解决方案，结合了理论物理原理与数据驱动方法的优势

title: GEOPHYS: The Geometry of Physical Plausibility
summary: While humans can identify physically implausible events within milliseconds, machine learning approaches addressing the same problem are extremely slow and expensive. They either rely on external multimodal-LLM judges or require ad-hoc modifications to the training procedure. In this work, we argue that indicators of physical plausibility are implicitly captured by five geometric properties of the per-frame embeddings produced by frozen image encoders. In aggregate, we call them GEOPHYS. First, we show that these signals correlate with human EEG responses to two forms of object-permanence violations. Second, GEOPHYS robustly discriminates physically implausible videos from realistic ones, achieving state-of-the-art physics-violation detection: 98.3% on LikePhys and 93.3% on IntPhys2, whereas V-JEPA 2, GPT-4o, Gemini, and twelve modern video diffusion models perform near chance. Third, used as a best-of-N verifier for physical alignment during video generation, GEOPHYS lifts MAGI-1 24B from 50.01% to 64.50% on PhysicsIQ at 1.5x lower wall-clock and 4.65x lower memory than the V-JEPA 2 world-model verifier. Ultimately, GEOPHYS demonstrates that physical plausibility in videos can be assessed by leveraging the emergent geometric properties of temporal features extracted from image encoders.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出GEOPHYS方法，利用冻结图像编码器产生的每帧嵌入的五个几何属性来评估视频的物理合理性，无需外部多模态LLM或训练过程修改。
AI.motivation: 人类能快速识别物理上不合理的事件，但现有机器学习方法要么依赖外部多模态LLM判断，要么需要修改训练过程，既慢又昂贵。作者认为物理合理性的指标隐含在图像编码器产生的嵌入几何属性中。
AI.method: 提出GEOPHYS方法，分析冻结图像编码器产生的每帧嵌入的五个几何属性（如距离、方向、一致性等），这些属性共同构成物理合理性评估指标。
AI.result: 1) GEOPHYS信号与人类EEG对物体永久性违规的反应相关；2) 在物理违规检测上达到SOTA：LikePhys 98.3%，IntPhys2 93.3%，远超V-JEPA 2、GPT-4o等模型；3) 作为视频生成中的最佳验证器，将MAGI-1 24B在PhysicsIQ上的表现从50.01%提升到64.50%，计算和内存成本更低。
AI.conclusion: GEOPHYS证明视频的物理合理性可以通过利用图像编码器提取的时间特征的涌现几何属性来评估，为物理合理性检测提供了一种高效、轻量级的解决方案。

title: Short-Term Electricity Demand Forecasting for New England Using a Hybrid Transformer-XGBoost Framework with Weather, Calendar, and COVID-19 Indicators
summary: Accurate short-term electricity demand forecasting is critical for reliable power system operation, energy market planning, and infrastructure optimization. This paper presents a hybrid framework combining a Transformer encoder for temporal feature extraction with gradient-boosted decision trees (XGBoost) for daily electricity demand forecasting across New England. The framework integrates meteorological observations from six cities spanning all six New England states, calendar and holiday effects, autoregressive demand lags, and COVID-19 epidemiological variables. Hyperparameter optimization uses Optuna with a multivariate Tree-structured Parzen Estimator over 500 trials, with a leakage-free 70/15/15 chronological train-validation-test split. The hybrid model achieves a test RMSE of 8,876 MWh, MAPE of 2.05%, and R-squared of 0.906. A tabular-only XGBoost baseline achieves RMSE of 9,304 MWh, MAPE of 2.21%, and R-squared of 0.896. A Diebold-Mariano test (Harvey-Leybourne-Newbold correction) confirms the 427.7 MWh difference is statistically indistinguishable from noise (DM = -1.126, p = 0.262). An ablation study reveals COVID-19 features improved training accuracy but had asymmetric test effects: removal degraded hybrid RMSE by 3.2% while marginally improving XGBoost-only by 1.2%. A SHAP temporal analysis shows 5 of 8 COVID features rank higher on the post-acute test set than during pandemic-active training, indicating the model over-applies learned pandemic patterns. These findings establish temporal validity decay as a central mechanism: behavioral disruptions drove a strong COVID-demand signal during 2020-2021, but adaptation was complete by mid-2022, leaving epidemiological features as noise amplifying overfitting to stale pandemic patterns.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合Transformer编码器和XGBoost的混合框架，用于新英格兰地区短期电力需求预测，整合了气象、日历、历史需求和COVID-19变量，但发现COVID-19特征在疫情后阶段会引入噪声并导致过拟合。
AI.motivation: 准确的短期电力需求预测对电力系统可靠运行、能源市场规划和基础设施优化至关重要。现有方法需要更好地整合多种影响因素，特别是COVID-19疫情带来的行为变化对电力需求的影响。
AI.method: 提出了一种混合框架：1)使用Transformer编码器提取时间特征；2)使用XGBoost进行每日电力需求预测；3)整合了六个新英格兰城市的气象观测数据、日历和节假日效应、自回归需求滞后项以及COVID-19流行病学变量；4)使用Optuna进行超参数优化，采用多元树结构Parzen估计器进行500次试验；5)采用无泄漏的70/15/15时间序列划分方法。
AI.result: 混合模型在测试集上的RMSE为8,876 MWh，MAPE为2.05%，R²为0.906。纯XGBoost基线的RMSE为9,304 MWh，MAPE为2.21%，R²为0.896。Diebold-Mariano检验显示427.7 MWh的差异在统计上不显著。消融研究发现：COVID-19特征在训练时提高了准确性，但在测试时产生不对称影响——移除这些特征会使混合模型RMSE恶化3.2%，但使纯XGBoost模型略微改善1.2%。SHAP时间分析显示，8个COVID特征中的5个在疫情后测试集中的重要性高于疫情活跃训练期，表明模型过度应用了学到的疫情模式。
AI.conclusion: 研究发现时间有效性衰减是一个核心机制：行为中断在2020-2021年期间产生了强烈的COVID-需求信号，但到2022年中期适应已经完成，使得流行病学特征变成了噪声，放大了对过时疫情模式的过拟合。这强调了在预测模型中需要考虑特征的时间有效性，特别是在重大事件后的恢复阶段。

title: Heterogeneous Policy Networks for Composite Robot Team Communication and Coordination
summary: High-performing human-human teams learn intelligent and efficient communication and coordination strategies to maximize their joint utility. These teams implicitly understand the different roles of heterogeneous team members and adapt their communication protocols accordingly. Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) has attempted to develop computational methods for synthesizing such joint coordination-communication strategies, but emulating heterogeneous communication patterns across agents with different state, action, and observation spaces has remained a challenge. Without properly modeling agent heterogeneity, as in prior MARL work that leverages homogeneous graph networks, communication becomes less helpful and can even deteriorate the team's performance. In the past, we proposed Heterogeneous Policy Networks (HetNet) to learn efficient and diverse communication models for coordinating cooperative heterogeneous teams. In this extended work, we extend Heterogeneous Policy Networks (HetNet) to support scaling heterogeneous robot teams. Building on heterogeneous graph-attention networks, we show that HetNet not only facilitates learning heterogeneous collaborative policies but also enables end-to-end training for learning highly efficient binarized messaging. Our empirical evaluation shows that HetNet sets a new state of the art in learning coordination and communication strategies for heterogeneous multi-agent teams by achieving an 5.84% to 707.65% performance improvement over the next-best baseline across multiple domains while simultaneously achieving a 200x reduction in the required communication bandwidth.

AI.tldr: HetNet扩展版通过异构图注意力网络，为异构多智能体团队学习协调与通信策略，在多个领域实现5.84%到707.65%的性能提升，同时将所需通信带宽降低200倍。
AI.motivation: 人类团队能学习智能高效的通信协调策略，但现有多智能体强化学习（MARL）方法难以模拟异构智能体间的通信模式。传统使用同构图网络的方法无法正确建模智能体异质性，导致通信效果不佳甚至损害团队性能。
AI.method: 扩展异构策略网络（HetNet），基于异构图注意力网络，支持扩展异构机器人团队。该方法不仅能学习异构协作策略，还能实现端到端训练，学习高效的二值化消息传递。
AI.result: HetNet在多个领域相比次优基线实现5.84%到707.65%的性能提升，同时将所需通信带宽降低200倍，在异构多智能体团队的协调与通信策略学习方面达到新的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: HetNet通过正确建模智能体异质性，成功解决了异构多智能体团队的高效协调与通信问题，实现了显著的性能提升和通信带宽的大幅降低，为异构机器人团队的扩展提供了有效解决方案。

title: TeleStyle V2: Beyond Content-Preserving Style Transfer with Self-Distillation and Distribution-Matching-Distillation
summary: Given a content reference and a style reference, content-preserving style transfer requires the model to generate stylized outputs with content and style consistency. We introduced TeleStyle V1 to tackle this problem. However, TeleStyle V1 is trained with photorealistic content reference and artistic style reference, which makes it incapable to cope with artistic content reference and realistic style reference in most cases. In this paper, we designed a Self-Distillation data synthesis strategy to construct such triplets from TeleStyle V1. Trained with such self-distilled triplets, our TeleStyle V2 supports Content-Style references in the forms of Realistic-and-Realistic (RnR), Realistic-and-Stylized (RnS), Stylized-and-Realistic (SnR), Stylized-and-Stylized (SnS). In addition, we found Distribution Matching Distillation could preserve the general text-guided image editing capability of the foundation model and fix the content consistency degradation caused by SFT process. Through quantitative evaluations, our TeleStyleV2-QIE-2509-DMD performs at least on par with Qwen-Image-Edit-2509-DMD, demonstrating strong general image editing skills beyond content-preserving style transfer. We observed the content/style reference order confusion problem in TeleStyle V1 and further introduced prompt enhancer to solve it. TeleStyle V2 uses Qwen-Image-Edit's VLM encoder, Qwen2.5-VL-7B, to generate content prompt and style prompt for free. TeleStyle V2 could achieve comparable style transfer performance with state-of-the-art commercial model, gemini-3-pro-image-preview.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TeleStyle V2，通过自蒸馏数据合成策略解决V1无法处理艺术内容参考和真实风格参考的问题，支持四种内容-风格参考形式，并引入分布匹配蒸馏来保持基础模型的文本引导图像编辑能力。
AI.motivation: TeleStyle V1只能处理真实内容参考和艺术风格参考，无法处理艺术内容参考和真实风格参考。需要扩展模型的能力范围，使其支持更广泛的内容-风格参考组合。
AI.method: 1. 设计自蒸馏数据合成策略，从TeleStyle V1构建训练三元组；2. 引入分布匹配蒸馏(DMD)来保持基础模型的文本引导图像编辑能力；3. 使用提示增强器解决内容/风格参考顺序混淆问题；4. 利用Qwen2.5-VL-7B视觉语言模型自动生成内容和风格提示。
AI.result: TeleStyle V2支持四种内容-风格参考形式：真实内容-真实风格(RnR)、真实内容-艺术风格(RnS)、艺术内容-真实风格(SnR)、艺术内容-艺术风格(SnS)。在定量评估中，TeleStyleV2-QIE-2509-DMD性能至少与Qwen-Image-Edit-2509-DMD相当，并在风格迁移任务上可与最先进的商业模型gemini-3-pro-image-preview媲美。
AI.conclusion: TeleStyle V2通过自蒸馏数据合成和分布匹配蒸馏，成功扩展了内容保持风格迁移的能力范围，不仅解决了V1的局限性，还保持了强大的通用图像编辑能力，在风格迁移性能上达到了商业模型的水平。

title: $Ω$: Operator-based Mixture Ensemble for Generative Assimilation
summary: Characterizing non-Gaussian posterior distributions in partially observed high-dimensional nonlinear systems remains a fundamental challenge in data assimilation. Ensemble Kalman filters rely on Gaussian approximations that can be inaccurate for strongly non-Gaussian posteriors, whereas particle filters suffer from severe scalability limitations. Recent score-based generative approaches improve posterior characterization but typically require supervised training with ground-truth posterior samples, which are unavailable in most practical applications. We introduce $Ω$ (Operator-based Mixture Ensemble for Generative Assimilation), a scalable framework that integrates conditional Gaussian surrogate modeling, unsupervised score learning, and generative sampling. The conditional Gaussian surrogate provides a nonlinear non-Gaussian baseline approximation while admitting closed-form conditional posterior distributions for the unresolved variables. First, $Ω$ exploits these closed-form conditional distributions to analytically recover the high-dimensional unobserved component, reducing computational cost and mitigating the curse of dimensionality. Second, $Ω$ learns only the residual discrepancy beyond an analytical baseline through denoising score matching using ensemble trajectories alone, eliminating the need for ground-truth posterior samples and substantially reducing the learning burden. Third, $Ω$ reconstructs the full non-Gaussian posterior distribution of both observed and unobserved variables via a Gaussian mixture representation, capturing multimodal, skewed, and heavy-tailed statistics. Finally, $Ω$ employs annealed Langevin sampling to iteratively refine ensemble members from the baseline toward the target posterior. $Ω$ is validated on several turbulent models with intermittency and extreme events, consistently improving posterior accuracy.

AI.tldr: Ω框架通过条件高斯代理模型、无监督分数学习和生成采样，解决了高维非线性系统中非高斯后验分布的表征难题，无需真实后验样本监督训练。
AI.motivation: 部分观测的高维非线性系统中非高斯后验分布的表征是数据同化的基本挑战。集合卡尔曼滤波器依赖可能不准确的高斯近似，而粒子滤波器存在严重的可扩展性限制。现有基于分数的生成方法通常需要真实后验样本的监督训练，这在大多数实际应用中不可用。
AI.method: Ω框架整合了条件高斯代理建模、无监督分数学习和生成采样。首先利用闭式条件分布解析恢复高维未观测分量；其次通过去噪分数匹配仅学习超出解析基线的残差差异；第三通过高斯混合表示重建完整非高斯后验分布；最后采用退火朗之万采样从基线向目标后验迭代优化集合成员。
AI.result: Ω在多个具有间歇性和极端事件的湍流模型上得到验证，一致提高了后验准确性。
AI.conclusion: Ω为高维非线性系统中的非高斯后验表征提供了一个可扩展框架，无需真实后验样本监督训练，能够捕捉多模态、偏斜和重尾统计特性。

title: Duet: Dual-Robot Understanding via Efficient Teaching
summary: Dual-robot collaboration enables tasks that exceed the reach and payload of a single robot, such as collaboratively transporting objects across environments and executing coordinated handovers. Data acquisition is the primary bottleneck for training these systems. To this end, we introduce DUET, a dual-robot learning framework for mobile manipulation. For efficient data collection, we create a unified dual-embodiment synchronized VR-based teleoperation system for in-domain heterogeneous robot data collection. We further develop a complementary tracking pipeline that records human-human coordination and collaborative mobile manipulation priors. To allow efficient learning, we introduce an Action Chunking Transformer based architecture that first pretrains collaborative policies on efficient human-human demonstrations, before finetuning them on a minimal set of real-robot teleoperation trajectories. We develop a benchmark of four collaborative tasks to evaluate our framework using a Unitree G1 humanoid and a Dexmate Vega1 mobile manipulator. The results demonstrate that harnessing human priors not only yields superior task performance compared to baselines trained only on robot data, but also reduces the total human effort required for data collection. Our human data collection pipeline achieves 5.4x acceleration on average from teleoperation, but we perform equally or better than robot-only data trained policies across all tasks. Our project page is available at https://zhaoy37.github.io/Duet/.

AI.tldr: DUET是一个双机器人学习框架，通过VR遥操作收集异构机器人数据并利用人类协作先验知识，显著减少数据收集需求，提升协作任务性能
AI.motivation: 双机器人协作能够完成单机器人无法完成的任务（如跨环境运输物体、协调交接），但数据采集是训练这类系统的主要瓶颈
AI.method: 1) 创建统一的VR遥操作系统收集异构机器人数据；2) 开发追踪管道记录人类协作先验；3) 使用Action Chunking Transformer架构，先在人类协作演示上预训练，再用少量真实机器人数据微调
AI.result: 在四个协作任务基准测试中，利用人类先验知识不仅比仅用机器人数据训练的基线表现更好，还减少了数据收集所需的人类努力。人类数据收集管道比遥操作平均加速5.4倍，性能却相当或更好
AI.conclusion: DUET框架通过结合人类协作先验和高效数据收集方法，有效解决了双机器人协作学习中的数据瓶颈问题，实现了更好的任务性能并减少了数据收集成本

title: Video2Code: Generating Interactive Webpages from UI Videos via Action-Aware Revisit
summary: UI videos provide a natural input for generating interactive webpages, as they capture both webpage appearance and action-triggered state transitions. However, directly applying video-capable vision-language models to this task remains insufficient. Existing models typically rely on sparse sampling or compressed temporal representations, which may miss short action boundaries and break the state-action-state transitions needed to implement webpage behavior. We formulate UI video-to-code generation as executable state-transition recovery from interaction videos, and identify this failure mode as state-transition misalignment. We introduce Video2Code, an action-aware video-to-code approach for recovering executable UI state transitions. Rather than allocating the visual budget uniformly across the video, Video2Code first performs coarse video understanding to locate action-critical regions, then invokes a temporal clipping tool to revisit these regions at higher temporal resolution before generating HTML/CSS/JavaScript code. We instantiate Video2Code with action-aligned video-code supervision and evaluate it under both visual and functional criteria. Experiments show that Video2Code substantially strengthens the underlying open-source model for UI video-to-code generation, improving functional correctness over direct video observation, especially on dense multi-step interactions.

AI.tldr: Video2Code：一种基于UI视频生成交互式网页代码的新方法，通过动作感知的视频理解和时间剪辑工具来恢复可执行的状态转换
AI.motivation: 现有视频语言模型在UI视频转代码任务中存在不足，主要问题是稀疏采样或压缩时间表示会错过短动作边界，破坏状态-动作-状态转换，导致无法正确实现网页行为
AI.method: 1) 将UI视频转代码任务形式化为从交互视频中恢复可执行状态转换；2) 先进行粗粒度视频理解定位动作关键区域；3) 使用时间剪辑工具以更高时间分辨率重新分析这些区域；4) 生成HTML/CSS/JavaScript代码
AI.result: Video2Code显著提升了底层开源模型在UI视频转代码生成方面的性能，特别是在密集多步交互场景下，相比直接视频观察大幅提高了功能正确性
AI.conclusion: 通过动作对齐的视频-代码监督和动作感知的视频分析方法，Video2Code有效解决了状态转换错位问题，能够从UI视频中恢复可执行的网页状态转换

title: Hierarchical Pooling for Sheaf Neural Networks
summary: Sheaf Neural Networks (SNNs) generalize Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) by replacing scalar node signals with stalk-valued signals and by using restriction maps to measure compatibility across edges. Unlike standard graph diffusion, which encourages neighboring node features to become similar, sheaf diffusion promotes consistency through the restriction maps and can therefore model more general relationships between neighboring nodes. However, existing sheaf neural architectures mainly operate at a fixed graph resolution and do not provide a principled pooling mechanism for building hierarchical representations. In this paper, we introduce Hierarchical Sheaf Pool (HiSP), a sheaf-aware pooling framework based on local spectral coarsening. Given a partition of the graph, HiSP constructs each coarse stalk by projecting fine stalk-valued features onto the low-frequency eigenmodes of the cluster-internal sheaf Laplacian. These local modes define a cochain-level prolongation map, which allows the fine sheaf energy to be represented on the coarse space through a Galerkin operator. We further analyze the approximation induced by coarsening by separating truncation loss, due to discarded local modes, from realization loss, due to representing the projected operator as a coarse sheaf. Finally, we implement HiSP as a GNN pooling layer compatible with SNNs and provide a PyG implementation supporting batching, lifted sheaf Laplacians, and hierarchical architectures.

AI.tldr: HiSP 是一种基于局部谱粗化的层次化束池化框架，用于束神经网络，解决了现有束神经网络缺乏层次化表示的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有束神经网络（SNNs）主要在固定图分辨率上操作，缺乏构建层次化表示的原则性池化机制。需要一种能够有效粗化束结构并保持其几何特性的池化方法。
AI.method: 基于局部谱粗化的束感知池化框架。给定图划分后，通过将细粒度束值特征投影到簇内部束拉普拉斯算子的低频本征模上来构建粗粒度束。这些局部模定义了上链层次的延长映射，通过Galerkin算子将细粒度束能量表示在粗化空间上。
AI.result: 实现了HiSP作为与束神经网络兼容的GNN池化层，提供了支持批处理、提升束拉普拉斯算子和层次化架构的PyG实现。分析了由粗化引起的近似误差，将其分为截断损失（丢弃的局部模）和实现损失（将投影算子表示为粗束）。
AI.conclusion: HiSP为束神经网络提供了第一个原则性的层次化池化框架，能够构建多分辨率表示，同时保持束结构的几何特性，增强了束神经网络在复杂图数据上的表达能力。

title: Inductive Generalization for Robotic Manipulation
summary: Understanding the generalization capabilities of visuomotor policies is essential in the development of capable robotic agents. Generalizable models learn structures that transfer across domains. However, in practice, visuomotor policies test performance by interpolation on known distributions using unstructured domain shifts (e.g. lighting, clutter, diverse objects). We argue that to measure generalization capabilities we must instead test the inductive capacity of policies on progressively harder, out-of-distribution task variants. We call this inductive generalization, drawing directly on how axis-based evaluation has revealed inherent generalization limitations in language models (e.g. sequence length, counting) arXiv:2502.00197 . We provide a reusable and formal evaluation protocol for measuring inductive generalization in any manipulation policy, and establish baselines showing that existing paradigms fail this test; e.g. SoTA Vision-Language-Action models and find that policies that appear to generalize to prior domain shifts (distractors, etc) fail inductive generalization tests. These results expose a class of learning challenges orthogonal to those addressed by data and model scaling in robot learning, yet are imperative to solve in order to realize general purpose robots.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了"归纳泛化"的概念，认为要真正衡量视觉运动策略的泛化能力，需要测试其在越来越难的、分布外任务变体上的表现，而不是仅仅在已知分布上进行插值测试。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉运动策略的泛化能力评估主要通过在已知分布上进行插值测试（如光照、杂乱环境、多样物体等非结构化领域偏移），但这种方法无法真正衡量策略的归纳能力。作者认为需要一种新的评估方法来测试策略在越来越难的、分布外任务变体上的表现。
AI.method: 提出了一个可重复使用的正式评估协议，用于衡量任何操作策略的归纳泛化能力。该协议借鉴了语言模型中基于轴评估的方法（如序列长度、计数等），测试策略在逐步变难的、分布外任务变体上的表现。
AI.result: 建立了基线结果，显示现有范式（包括最先进的视觉-语言-动作模型）无法通过归纳泛化测试。研究发现，那些在先前领域偏移（干扰物等）上似乎能泛化的策略，在归纳泛化测试中却失败了。
AI.conclusion: 这些结果揭示了一类与机器人学习中的数据扩展和模型扩展所解决的问题正交的学习挑战，但解决这些挑战对于实现通用机器人至关重要。归纳泛化测试暴露了现有策略的固有局限性，为未来研究提供了新的方向。

title: CDER-SME: A Cross-Device Event-RGB Micro-Expression Dataset under Multi-Level Stress Induction
summary: Micro-expression recognition (MER) in realistic scenarios demands high temporal sensitivity and ecological validity, yet existing benchmarks are largely constrained to laboratory-controlled settings and rigid hardware-coupled sensing. We introduce CDER-SME, a cross-device Event-RGB dataset collected under a multi-level stress induction framework (cognitive and social) to elicit spontaneous emotional leakage. To enable reproducible acquisition with independent, decoupled sensors, we provide a hardware-agnostic alignment pipeline for temporal synchronization and landmark-guided spatial registration. CDER-SME adopts a three-tier structure with 92 subjects and 1,963 expert-annotated samples (Action Units and emotions), including 790 Event-RGB pairs and 210 high-fidelity aligned pairs. We further report a reproducible multimodal baseline, where cross-modal fusion improves performance over single-modality counterparts, supporting the complementarity of event dynamics and RGB cues. By removing the need for coaxial calibration, CDER-SME offers a practical benchmark for cross-device alignment and deployable Event-RGB MER in real-world affective intelligence.

AI.tldr: CDER-SME是一个用于微表情识别的跨设备事件-RGB数据集，通过多级压力诱导框架收集，包含硬件无关的时空对齐流程，支持现实场景中的跨模态融合研究。
AI.motivation: 现有微表情识别基准主要局限于实验室控制环境和硬件耦合传感，缺乏现实场景所需的时间敏感性和生态效度，需要更实用的跨设备数据集。
AI.method: 采用多级压力诱导框架（认知和社会压力）引发自发情绪泄露，通过硬件无关的对齐流程进行时间同步和地标引导的空间配准，构建包含事件和RGB模态的三层结构数据集。
AI.result: 构建了包含92名受试者和1,963个专家标注样本的数据集，包括790个事件-RGB对和210个高保真对齐对，跨模态融合比单模态性能更好，证明了事件动态和RGB线索的互补性。
AI.conclusion: CDER-SME通过消除同轴校准需求，为跨设备对齐和可部署的事件-RGB微表情识别提供了实用的基准，推动了现实世界情感智能的发展。

title: Towards Robust Training in NNGPT AutoML Pipeline: A Loss-Optimizer Pairing Selection Study
summary: The choice of loss function and optimizer is an important decision, that shapes further model training. Yet automated architecture search pipelines (AutoML) benefits significantly more from the optimal pairing selection and vice versa. This paper investigates whether a single recipe is sufficient for heterogeneous architecture pools, or whether the optimal pairing varies across structurally diverse models. We conduct a systematic empirical study of all $3 \times 6 = 18$ combinations of six optimizers (SGD+Momentum, Adam, AdamW, RMSprop, Adagrad, Adadelta), paired with three loss functions: Cross-Entropy (CEL), Negative Log-Likelihood (NLL), and the recently introduced genetically evolved NGL loss across the base models presented in LEMUR heterogeneous architecture pool on six image classification datasets (CelebA-Gender, CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, ImageNette, MNIST, SVHN). The 18 loss-optimizer configurations are applied to each of the 33 compatible base architectures taken from the LEMUR pool, resulting in 594 variants that were generated fully automatically by a source-level injection pipeline and evaluated under fixed hyperparameters, ensuring that observed accuracy differences are attributable solely to the loss-optimizer pairing. Our results confirm that no single pairing is universally optimal. Cross-Entropy with Adam or AdamW is the most robust choice across architecture families and datasets. NGL is a competitive alternative to CEL on standard convolutional classifiers, but only when paired with adaptive optimizers; it degrades substantially with SGD or accumulation-based methods. Adagrad and Adadelta consistently underperform under fixed hyperparameters regardless of loss function, highlighting their sensitivity to learning rate tuning. These findings provide actionable guidance for loss-optimizer selection within NNGPT Framework.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过系统实验发现，在异构架构池中，没有单一损失函数-优化器组合对所有模型都最优，交叉熵与Adam/AdamW是最稳健的选择。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是探究自动架构搜索（AutoML）中损失函数和优化器的选择问题。虽然AutoML能从最优配对中获益，但研究者想知道单一"配方"是否适用于异构架构池，还是最优配对会因模型结构差异而变化。
AI.method: 方法是对18种损失函数-优化器组合（3种损失函数×6种优化器）进行系统实证研究。这些组合应用于LEMUR异构架构池中的33个基础架构，在6个图像分类数据集上评估，共生成594个变体。所有实验使用固定超参数，确保观察到的准确率差异仅归因于损失函数-优化器配对。
AI.result: 结果证实没有单一配对是普遍最优的。交叉熵与Adam或AdamW是跨架构家族和数据集最稳健的选择。NGL在标准卷积分类器上是CEL的竞争性替代方案，但仅在与自适应优化器配对时有效；与SGD或基于累积的方法配对时性能显著下降。Adagrad和Adadelta在固定超参数下始终表现不佳，突显了它们对学习率调优的敏感性。
AI.conclusion: 结论是损失函数-优化器选择应根据具体架构和任务进行调整，交叉熵与Adam/AdamW是最安全的默认选择。这些发现为NNGPT框架中的损失函数-优化器选择提供了实用指导。

title: R2HandoverSim: A Simulation Framework and Benchmark for Robot-to-Human Object Handovers
comment: Accepted by the 2026 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2026)
summary: We present R2HandoverSim, a simulation benchmark for robot-to-human (R2H) object handovers. Although R2H handover methods have advanced rapidly, the lack of standardized evaluation protocols impedes objective comparison. Our benchmark enables reproducible evaluation by systematically comparing four baselines on their predicted shared grasp poses. We conduct a user study with 30 participants, analyze baseline performance, and show that simulation results correlate with real-world evaluation outcomes. Crucially, five complementary metrics (planning feasibility, reachability, grasp stability, grasp affordance, and safety) better reflect user-perceived handover quality than overall success rate alone. Website and code: https://robot-future.github.io/r2handoversim/.

AI.tldr: R2HandoverSim是一个用于机器人向人传递物体（R2H）的仿真基准测试平台，旨在解决该领域缺乏标准化评估协议的问题，通过系统比较四种基线方法在预测共享抓取位姿上的表现，并证明仿真结果与真实世界评估具有相关性。
AI.motivation: 尽管R2H物体传递方法发展迅速，但缺乏标准化的评估协议阻碍了客观比较。现有评估方法不一致，难以进行可重复的评估和公平的性能对比。
AI.method: 开发了R2HandoverSim仿真基准测试平台，系统比较了四种基线方法在预测共享抓取位姿上的表现。通过30名参与者的用户研究分析基线性能，并验证仿真结果与真实世界评估的相关性。提出了五个互补的评估指标：规划可行性、可达性、抓取稳定性、抓取可供性和安全性。
AI.result: 仿真结果与真实世界评估结果具有相关性。五个互补的评估指标（规划可行性、可达性、抓取稳定性、抓取可供性和安全性）比单独使用总体成功率更能反映用户感知的传递质量。用户研究表明了不同基线方法的性能差异。
AI.conclusion: R2HandoverSim为R2H物体传递提供了可重复的评估基准，解决了该领域缺乏标准化评估的问题。提出的五个互补指标能更全面地评估传递质量，为未来研究提供了有价值的评估框架。

title: MIRAGE: Stealthy Visual Prompt Injection for Vulnerability Detection in Web Agents
summary: Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM)-based web agents provide practical, high-precision solutions for visual browser automation; however, they inherently expand the attack surface, introducing novel vision-based vulnerabilities. Existing adversarial evaluations targeting these agents frequently rely on permissive threat models and visually conspicuous artifacts. In this paper, we investigate a constrained vulnerability detection setting: a trusted web platform where the evaluator acts solely as an unprivileged third party, such as a merchant or advertiser, controlling only a semantically legitimate, spatially constrained region, such as an ad slot, a sponsored card, or a localized widget. Operating under these realistic constraints, we propose MIRAGE, a novel visual indirect prompt injection framework for targeted next-action hijacking. Our approach leverages diffusion models to generate perceptually benign adversarial images strictly confined to the attacker-controlled boundaries permitted by the trusted service provider. To maximize attack efficacy within such a restrictive setting, we introduce a robust optimization technique combining curvature-aware adversarial diffusion guidance with sparse, dark-pixel residual perturbations. Comprehensive evaluations against prominent MLLM web agent frameworks, specifically SeeAct and OpenClaw, empirically demonstrate the potency, realism, and stealth of our proposed MIRAGE.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MIRAGE框架，针对MLLM网页代理在受限攻击场景下的视觉间接提示注入漏洞，通过扩散模型生成感知良性但能劫持后续动作的对抗图像。
AI.motivation: 现有针对MLLM网页代理的对抗评估通常采用宽松的威胁模型和视觉明显的攻击痕迹，缺乏在现实约束场景（如广告商仅控制特定区域）下的漏洞检测方法。
AI.method: 提出MIRAGE框架，利用扩散模型在攻击者控制的合法区域内生成感知良性的对抗图像，结合曲率感知对抗扩散引导和稀疏暗像素残差扰动的鲁棒优化技术。
AI.result: 在主流MLLM网页代理框架（SeeAct和OpenClaw）上进行了全面评估，实证证明了MIRAGE攻击的有效性、真实性和隐蔽性。
AI.conclusion: MIRAGE揭示了MLLM网页代理在现实约束场景下的新型视觉安全漏洞，为可信平台上的安全评估提供了新视角。

title: Learning through Internalization
summary: We study internalization processes, by which neural-network-based systems absorb an explicit computational procedure into their own weights, and how they facilitate learning. We investigate how transformers internalize the simulation of semiautomata by internalizing chain-of-thought (CoT) tokens, which classes of semiautomata are harder to internalize, and expose the flip side of internalization, that is, a progressive degradation of out-of-distribution performance. We then provide the first provable analysis of successful internalization: for the task of learning parities, we show that a simplified one-layer transformer provably first learns the target with explicit CoT supervision and then internalizes the autoregressive generation as CoT tokens are progressively removed, learning to directly compute the parity. This task is computationally hard to learn from data without CoT supervision. Finally, we discuss how learning through internalization relates to the \textit{Positive Distribution Shift} phenomenon recently introduced by~\citet{Med+26}.

AI.tldr: 本文研究神经网络系统如何将显式计算过程内化到自身权重中，以及这种内化如何促进学习。通过研究Transformer如何内化半自动机模拟的思维链标记，分析哪些半自动机类别更难内化，并揭示内化的负面影响——分布外性能的渐进退化。作者为奇偶性学习任务提供了首个可证明的内化分析，并讨论了内化学习与"正分布偏移"现象的关系。
AI.motivation: 研究神经网络系统如何将显式计算过程（如思维链）内化到自身权重中，理解这种内化过程如何促进学习，特别是对于从数据中直接学习计算困难的任务。同时探索内化的局限性，特别是对分布外性能的影响。
AI.method: 1) 研究Transformer如何通过内化思维链标记来模拟半自动机；2) 分析不同类别半自动机的内化难度；3) 揭示内化过程中分布外性能的渐进退化；4) 为奇偶性学习任务提供理论分析，证明简化的一层Transformer如何先通过显式思维链监督学习目标，然后逐步内化自回归生成过程；5) 将内化学习与"正分布偏移"现象联系起来。
AI.result: 1) 识别了内化过程的机制和限制；2) 确定了某些半自动机类别比其他类别更难内化；3) 揭示了内化会导致分布外性能的渐进退化；4) 为奇偶性学习任务提供了首个可证明的内化分析，展示了Transformer如何从显式监督过渡到内化计算；5) 建立了内化学习与正分布偏移现象的理论联系。
AI.conclusion: 内化是神经网络系统学习复杂计算任务的重要机制，特别是对于从数据中直接学习计算困难的任务。通过显式思维链监督，系统可以先学习目标，然后将计算过程内化到权重中。然而，内化过程伴随着分布外性能的退化风险。这项工作为理解神经网络如何通过内化学习复杂计算提供了理论基础，并连接了内化学习与正分布偏移现象。

title: BayesFP: Posterior Estimation for Flow-Based Policies via Feynman-Kac Sampling
summary: Robots must generate trajectories that remain faithful to learned expert behavior while satisfying safety constraints and task-specific objectives specified only at inference time. We formulate constrained trajectory generation for pretrained diffusion and flow-matching policies as Bayesian posterior sampling, with the learned demonstration distribution as a prior and an inference-time, cost-derived likelihood tilting it toward feasible, optimal trajectories. To sample from this posterior without any retraining of the base policy, we leverage the Feynman--Kac corrector framework, originally formulated for diffusion models, and extend it to deterministic flow-matching policies. The result is a unified, inference-time, retraining-free sampler for diffusion and flow policies. We validate the approach on pretrained Diffusion Policy, GR00T-N1.6, and $π_{0.5}$ checkpoints across simulated and real-world manipulation tasks, including planning around non-convex obstacles introduced at inference time, and show improvements over the base $π_{0.5}$ on zero-shot tasks.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种无需重训练的推理时间采样器，将预训练扩散和流匹配策略的约束轨迹生成表述为贝叶斯后验采样，使用Feynman-Kac校正器框架统一处理扩散模型和确定性流匹配策略。
AI.motivation: 机器人需要在保持学习到的专家行为的同时，满足推理时指定的安全约束和任务特定目标。现有方法通常需要重新训练基础策略来适应新的约束，这既耗时又低效。
AI.method: 将约束轨迹生成表述为贝叶斯后验采样：以学习到的演示分布作为先验，以推理时的成本函数作为似然，将轨迹推向可行且最优的方向。扩展Feynman-Kac校正器框架到确定性流匹配策略，实现无需重训练的统一采样器。
AI.result: 在预训练的Diffusion Policy、GR00T-N1.6和π0.5检查点上验证了该方法，涵盖仿真和真实世界操作任务，包括推理时引入的非凸障碍物规划。相比基础π0.5，在零样本任务上表现出改进。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为扩散和流匹配策略提供了一个统一的推理时间、无需重训练的采样框架，能够在保持专家行为的同时，灵活适应推理时指定的约束和目标，提高了策略的适应性和实用性。

title: Evaluation of Medical Vision Language Models HuluMed and MedGemma, and general purpose chatbots Gemma 3, ChatGPT Plus, and Claude Pro on real previously unseen wound images
summary: Chronic wound assessment remains a clinically challenging task that requires accurate interpretation of wound morphology, tissue composition, vascular characteristics, and infection risk. Recent advances in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have introduced the possibility of automated multimodal wound analysis through image understanding combined with clinical reasoning. This study evaluates the performance of several general-purpose and medically specialized open-source and proprietary VLMs for clinical wound assessment using an expanded, curated dataset of 20 clinically diverse wounds spanning vascular, surgical, ischemic, venous, lymphedema, and amputation-related etiologies. Six VLMs were evaluated using a structured twelve-question clinical framework covering wound classification, infection risk, vascular intervention recommendations, debridement urgency, wound therapy selection, and advanced management planning. Across 20 wound cases and 240 clinician-graded wound-analysis decisions, ChatGPT achieved the highest overall performance with 174/240 correct responses (72.50%), followed by Claude with 149/240 (62.08%). Among the open-source and medically specialized models, HuluMed achieved the strongest performance with 96/240 correct responses (40.00%), followed by Gemma 3 (81/240, 33.75%), MedGemma 4B (62/240, 25.83%), and MedGemma 27B (42/240, 17.50%). The findings suggest that frontier general-purpose multimodal systems currently demonstrate substantially stronger wound-analysis performance than medically specialized alternatives, highlighting the continued importance of broad multimodal reasoning capabilities alongside domain-specific medical knowledge. Although current VLMs demonstrate promising potential for clinical decision support, substantial limitations remain in advanced wound-management reasoning, procedural planning, and autonomous clinical reliability.

AI.tldr: 该研究评估了多种视觉语言模型在慢性伤口临床评估中的表现，发现通用多模态模型（如ChatGPT）表现优于医学专用模型，但仍有局限性。
AI.motivation: 慢性伤口评估是临床上的挑战性任务，需要准确解读伤口形态、组织组成、血管特征和感染风险。研究旨在评估视觉语言模型在自动化多模态伤口分析中的表现，探索其作为临床决策支持工具的潜力。
AI.method: 研究使用包含20个临床多样化伤口的扩展数据集，涵盖血管、手术、缺血、静脉、淋巴水肿和截肢相关病因。评估了6个视觉语言模型（包括通用型和医学专用型），采用包含12个问题的临床框架，涵盖伤口分类、感染风险、血管干预建议、清创紧迫性、伤口治疗选择和高级管理规划等方面。
AI.result: ChatGPT表现最佳（174/240正确，72.50%），其次是Claude（149/240，62.08%）。在开源和医学专用模型中，HuluMed表现最强（96/240，40.00%），其次是Gemma 3（33.75%）、MedGemma 4B（25.83%）和MedGemma 27B（17.50%）。通用多模态系统表现显著优于医学专用替代方案。
AI.conclusion: 前沿通用多模态系统目前在伤口分析方面表现优于医学专用模型，强调了广泛多模态推理能力与领域特定医学知识相结合的重要性。虽然当前视觉语言模型显示出临床决策支持的潜力，但在高级伤口管理推理、程序规划和自主临床可靠性方面仍存在显著局限性。

title: Grouped Query Experts: Mixture-of-Experts on GQA Self-Attention
summary: Self-attention is central to Transformer performance and is often the most expensive part of the Transformer at long context lengths because its pairwise token interactions scale quadratically with sequence length. Standard dense attention also applies the same set of attention heads to every token regardless of token difficulty or information content. This uniform activation can waste compute, especially as sequences grow longer and attention cost increases rapidly. We propose Grouped Query Experts (GQE), a mixture-of-experts layer on top of grouped-query attention (GQA). Within each GQA group, a router selects k query-head experts per token while all key-value (KV) heads remain dense and unchanged. Thus, GQE keeps the KV cache benefits of GQA and reduces only the active query-head computation. On a fixed 30B token budget at the 250M parameter scale, GQE matches the all-active GQA baseline in downstream accuracy while activating half the query heads per token.

AI.tldr: GQE（Grouped Query Experts）是一种在分组查询注意力（GQA）基础上构建的专家混合层，通过路由器为每个token选择k个查询头专家，减少活跃查询头计算，同时保持KV缓存的优势，在固定计算预算下达到与全活跃GQA基线相当的精度。
AI.motivation: 标准密集注意力对所有token应用相同的注意力头，无论token的难度或信息内容如何。这种均匀激活会浪费计算资源，尤其是在序列变长、注意力成本急剧增加的情况下。自注意力是Transformer性能的核心，但在长上下文长度下通常是最昂贵的部分，因为其成对token交互随序列长度呈二次方缩放。
AI.method: 提出Grouped Query Experts（GQE），在分组查询注意力（GQA）之上构建专家混合层。在每个GQA组内，路由器为每个token选择k个查询头专家，而所有键值（KV）头保持密集且不变。这样GQE保持了GQA的KV缓存优势，同时仅减少活跃查询头计算。
AI.result: 在250M参数规模下，固定30B token预算，GQE能够匹配全活跃GQA基线的下游精度，同时每个token仅激活一半的查询头。
AI.conclusion: GQE通过选择性激活查询头，在保持KV缓存优势的同时有效减少了计算成本，在固定计算预算下实现了与标准方法相当的精度，为解决Transformer长上下文计算效率问题提供了有效方案。

title: Membrane-based Acoustic Microrobots
comment: Accepted to the 2026 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2026). For supplementary video contact fkocabas@wisc.edu
summary: Acoustic microrobots have emerged as a promising frontier for targeted drug delivery and minimally invasive medicine due to their high-power density and biocompatibility. Despite wide-ranging designs, conventional acoustic microrobots mostly rely on air microbubbles trapped within confined microcavities within the robot body, which suffer from limited operational longevity due to rapid gas dissolution and resultant shifts in resonance frequency. In this paper, we propose a robust, membrane-based acoustic microrobot that overcomes these limitations by employing a thin flexible Polydimethylsiloxane (PDMS) membrane bonded over confined microcavities for microstreaming. The introduced design physically prevents gas diffusion, ensuring stable performance over extended periods at high actuation voltages. We systematically characterized the membrane-based acoustic actuator longevity, demonstrating consistent streaming and propulsion for over 24 hours of continuous operation. In addition, by embedding magnetic microparticles into the structural body, these actuators were successfully employed as microswimmers with directional control using low-intensity (2 mT) external magnetic fields. Finally, we demonstrate the scalability of the proposed design architecture down to ~100 um. This membrane-based approach establishes a reliable framework for the development of high-endurance acoustic microactuators and microrobots capable of performing long-term tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于PDMS薄膜的声学微机器人，通过薄膜覆盖微腔防止气体扩散，实现长时间稳定运行和定向磁控
AI.motivation: 传统声学微机器人依赖微气泡，但气体溶解导致寿命短、共振频率漂移，需要解决这些限制以实现长期稳定运行
AI.method: 采用PDMS薄膜覆盖微腔防止气体扩散，嵌入磁性微粒实现磁控，系统表征了长期性能并展示了可扩展性
AI.result: 实现了超过24小时连续稳定运行，在2 mT低强度磁场下实现定向控制，设计可扩展至约100微米尺度
AI.conclusion: 薄膜基声学微执行器为开发高耐久性声学微机器人和执行长期任务提供了可靠框架

title: D2HDMap: Non-visible Driveline Map Prior for Online Vectorized HD Map Prediction
comment: 10 pages, 3 figures, 5 tables, to appear in "IEEE intelligent vehicles symposium (IV) 2026 Proceedings"
summary: Accurate, up-to-date representations of road structures are critical for the safe operation of autonomous vehicles. Existing systems rely either on costly, maintenance-heavy high-definition (HD) maps which compromise safety when outdated, or purely sensor-based online mapping which struggles with long-range reliability and occlusion. Systems incorporating map prior information into online mapping seek to overcome drawbacks of both approaches by combining them in some way. We propose 'Driveline To HD Map' (D2HDMap), an online mapping system that injects a lightweight, non-visible driveline prior to guide the estimation of visible road structures such as lane dividers, road boundaries and crosswalks. This prior incurs less effort to create and update compared to full HD map priors used in other approaches. We also show that training with such a prior can improve generalization at inference time when no prior is available. Ablation studies conducted on the nuScenes and Argoverse 2 dataset demonstrate that models trained using a driveline prior largely retain performance even when priors are not available. On a geographically disjoint split, D2HDMap achieves 44.8 mAP, surpassing recent state-of-the-art. Additionally, noise-aware training substantially increases robustness to realistic localization error.

AI.tldr: D2HDMap提出了一种在线高精地图构建系统，通过注入轻量级、不可见的行车线先验来指导可见道路结构（车道分隔线、道路边界、人行横道）的估计，相比传统HD地图先验更易创建和更新，且在无先验时也能保持良好性能。
AI.motivation: 当前自动驾驶系统依赖的高精地图成本高昂、维护困难且过时会影响安全，而纯传感器在线建图在长距离可靠性和遮挡方面存在不足。需要一种结合两者优势的方法来克服这些缺点。
AI.method: 提出D2HDMap系统，使用轻量级、非可见的行车线先验来指导可见道路结构的估计。这种先验比完整HD地图先验更易创建和更新。还采用噪声感知训练来提高对实际定位误差的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在nuScenes和Argoverse 2数据集上的消融研究表明，使用行车线先验训练的模型在无先验时仍能保持性能。在地理上不相交的分割上，D2HDMap达到44.8 mAP，超过最新SOTA方法。噪声感知训练显著提高了对实际定位误差的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: D2HDMap通过轻量级行车线先验实现了高效、鲁棒的在线高精地图构建，既克服了传统HD地图的高成本维护问题，又提升了纯传感器建图的可靠性，在无先验时仍能保持良好性能。

title: A Gated Graph Neural Network Approach to Fast-Convergent Dynamic Average Estimation
summary: Dynamic average estimation is a critical problem in multi-agent systems, enabling agents to collaboratively estimate time-varying signals using only local information exchange. Traditional model-based approaches often face challenges related to convergence speed and sensitivity to network topology changes. This paper introduces a novel learning-based solution leveraging Gated Graph Neural Networks (GGNNs) for fast-convergent dynamic average estimation in a fully distributed manner. Taking advantage of the inherent structure of GGNNs, the proposed method models the estimation process as a distributed autoregressor, ensuring rapid convergence while maintaining stability. We incorporate a regularization term during training to enforce convergence guarantees and introduce an encoding-decoding mechanism to reduce communication overhead without sacrificing accuracy compared to standard GGNNs. Extensive numerical experiments demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms conventional model-based estimators in terms of both convergence speed and precision, making it a promising alternative for multi-agent applications that require dynamic average estimation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于门控图神经网络（GGNNs）的分布式动态平均估计算法，相比传统模型方法在收敛速度和精度上有显著提升
AI.motivation: 多智能体系统中的动态平均估计是一个关键问题，传统模型方法在收敛速度和网络拓扑变化敏感性方面存在挑战
AI.method: 使用门控图神经网络（GGNNs）构建分布式自回归估计器，加入正则化项保证收敛性，采用编码-解码机制降低通信开销
AI.result: 大量数值实验表明，该方法在收敛速度和精度上显著优于传统模型方法
AI.conclusion: 该方法为需要动态平均估计的多智能体应用提供了一个有前景的替代方案

title: ReFPO: Reflow Regularization for Flow Matching Policy Gradients
summary: We present Reflow-regularized Flow Matching Policy Gradients (ReFPO), a simple online RL method that adds explicit Reflow regularization to FPO for efficient flow-based control. We uncover a key structural property: the gradient updates in Flow Matching Policy Gradients (FPO) can be interpreted as an implicit advantage-weighted Reflow process, providing a new geometric perspective on flow-based policy gradients. Building on this insight, ReFPO introduces an explicit geometric regularizer that can be implemented with a single line of code change without incurring additional computational overhead or auxiliary distillation stages. By synergizing advantage-guided updates with path rectification, our method reduces CFM proxy-ratio spikes, stabilizes PPO-style training, and enables high-fidelity one-step inference that often matches or exceeds multi-step performance. We experimentally demonstrate that ReFPO improves average performance and discretization robustness across GridWorld, MuJoCo Playground, and high-dimensional Humanoid Control tasks, providing a scalable and stable approach for generative policies in complex physical simulations.

AI.tldr: Reflow-regularized Flow Matching Policy Gradients (ReFPO) 是一种简单的在线强化学习方法，通过为 FPO 添加显式的 Reflow 正则化来实现高效的基于流的控制。该方法揭示了 FPO 梯度更新可解释为隐式的优势加权 Reflow 过程，并在此基础上引入几何正则化器，仅需一行代码改动，无需额外计算开销或辅助蒸馏阶段。ReFPO 通过协同优势引导更新与路径校正，减少 CFM 代理比率尖峰，稳定 PPO 风格训练，并实现高保真一步推理，性能常匹配或超越多步推理。
AI.motivation: 本文的动机是解决基于流的策略梯度方法（FPO）中的训练不稳定性和效率问题。虽然 FPO 在连续控制任务中表现出潜力，但其训练过程可能存在代理比率尖峰和收敛困难。作者发现 FPO 的梯度更新具有隐式的优势加权 Reflow 结构，这启发了他们设计显式正则化来改进训练稳定性和推理效率。
AI.method: ReFPO 的核心方法是在 Flow Matching Policy Gradients (FPO) 的基础上添加显式的 Reflow 正则化。关键创新包括：1) 揭示了 FPO 梯度更新可解释为隐式优势加权 Reflow 过程；2) 引入几何正则化器，仅需一行代码改动即可实现；3) 无需额外计算开销或辅助蒸馏阶段；4) 通过协同优势引导更新与路径校正来稳定训练。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，ReFPO 在 GridWorld、MuJoCo Playground 和高维 Humanoid Control 任务中均提升了平均性能和离散化鲁棒性。该方法减少了 CFM 代理比率尖峰，稳定了 PPO 风格训练，并实现了高保真的一步推理，其性能常匹配或超越多步推理。这为复杂物理模拟中的生成策略提供了可扩展且稳定的方法。
AI.conclusion: ReFPO 通过为 FPO 添加显式 Reflow 正则化，提供了一种简单而有效的在线强化学习方法。该方法基于对 FPO 梯度更新的新几何理解，通过一行代码改动实现了训练稳定性和推理效率的显著提升。ReFPO 为基于流的策略在复杂控制任务中的应用提供了可扩展且稳定的解决方案，展现了在生成策略领域的潜力。

title: How Well Can Your Video Model Remember? Measuring Memory-Budget Trade-offs in Long Video Understanding
summary: We introduce a compact empirical model that quantifies how answer accuracy degrades as a function of frame budget B and temporal distance D in long video understanding -- analyzing performance when recalling content from D seconds in the past using a fraction B of total frames. Long-form models operate under strict budgets, yet no prior framework predicts how accuracy degrades as B shrinks and events recede. We fit a weighted least-squares model on ~155,000 binary predictions across ten models and three sampling strategies, deriving a law where logit-accuracy scales linearly in log-budget with a distance-dependent exponent that decays log-linearly with distance. This budget exponent α(D) captures the marginal value of extra frames at distance D. The law achieves cell-level weighted R^2 = 0.05-0.75 across models. Notably, budget effectiveness at D = 1000 s differs by \approx 7.4\times between the best streaming and base models. STREAMINGVLM achieves α(1000) = 1.26 (95% CI: [1.06, 1.58]), meaning a tenfold budget increase substantially improves long-distance accuracy, while the best Qwen3-VL base model reaches only α(1000) = 0.17 (CI: [0.04, 0.34]). In accuracy space, a 10\times budget increase at D = 1000 s yields +29 percentage points for STREAMINGVLM versus +4 pp for the base model. Sampling strategies show model-dependent trade-offs: random sampling yields higher base sensitivity but steeper distance decay. We demonstrate how α(D) enables principled budget allocation, including a model-ranking reversal at long distance, and propose it as a diagnostic metric for streaming video models.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一个紧凑的经验模型，量化了长视频理解中答案准确率如何随帧预算B和时间距离D衰减，揭示了不同模型在预算分配效率上的显著差异。
AI.motivation: 长视频理解模型在严格帧预算下运行，但缺乏预测准确率如何随预算减少和时间距离增加而衰减的框架。需要量化不同模型在预算分配和长距离信息提取上的效率差异。
AI.method: 通过加权最小二乘法拟合约155,000个二元预测数据，涵盖十个模型和三种采样策略，推导出准确率随对数预算线性变化、且指数随距离对数线性衰减的规律。预算指数α(D)捕捉了在距离D处额外帧的边际价值。
AI.result: 模型在单元格级别加权R²为0.05-0.75。在D=1000秒时，最佳流媒体模型与基础模型的预算有效性相差约7.4倍。STREAMINGVLM的α(1000)=1.26，而Qwen3-VL基础模型仅为0.17。在准确率空间，10倍预算增加使STREAMINGVLM在1000秒处提升29个百分点，而基础模型仅提升4个百分点。
AI.conclusion: α(D)可作为流媒体视频模型的诊断指标，支持原则性预算分配，揭示了在长距离下模型排名的反转现象，为模型设计和评估提供了重要洞察。

title: Right Knowledge, Wrong Answer: Test-Time Steering for Temporal Fact Conflicts in Open-Weight Language Models
summary: Large language models can store both outdated facts and newer superseding facts in their parameters, but standard prompting may still elicit the outdated answer. We formalize this problem as Parametric Temporal Conflict (PTC) and introduce Temporal Attractor Steering (TAS), a three-stage test-time intervention that detects likely conflicts, identifies a conflict-critical layer, and steers hidden states toward newer-fact representations without retraining or external retrieval. We construct an 8,746-record verified benchmark across five Wikidata relations and evaluate four open-weight language models from three families: Qwen-2.5-1.5B/7B, Mistral-7B-v0.3, and Llama-3.1-8B. Single-layer activation patching achieves answer-flip rates of 0.72-0.85 across all models. End-to-end TAS resolves 29-57% of PTC cases while preserving 85-99% accuracy on non-conflict queries, outperforming a matched ITI baseline on three of four models. These results show that outdated parametric knowledge can be selectively overridden at inference time.

AI.tldr: Temporal Attractor Steering (TAS) 是一种无需训练或外部检索的三阶段测试时干预方法，可检测参数时间冲突并引导隐藏状态朝向新事实表示，在四个开源语言模型上成功解决了29-57%的时间冲突案例。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型参数中可能同时存储过时事实和更新的替代事实，但标准提示仍可能引出过时答案。这种参数时间冲突问题需要在不重新训练或不依赖外部检索的情况下解决。
AI.method: 提出 Temporal Attractor Steering (TAS) 方法，包含三个阶段：1) 检测可能的时间冲突；2) 识别冲突关键层；3) 引导隐藏状态朝向新事实表示。通过单层激活修补实现答案翻转，在四个开源语言模型上进行评估。
AI.result: 单层激活修补在所有模型上实现了0.72-0.85的答案翻转率。端到端TAS解决了29-57%的参数时间冲突案例，同时在非冲突查询上保持了85-99%的准确率，在四个模型中的三个上优于匹配的ITI基线。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明过时的参数化知识可以在推理时被选择性地覆盖，TAS方法为处理语言模型中的时间知识冲突提供了有效解决方案。

title: MV-WAM: Manifold-Aware World Action Model with Value Augmentation
summary: Achieving robust and generalizable manipulation across diverse environments remains a fundamental challenge in embodied robotics. Recent world action models achieve strong in-domain performance, yet their gains do not extend proportionally to out-of-distribution scenarios. We attribute this to a structural mismatch between visual and action modalities, whose intrinsically heterogeneous manifolds cause joint optimization to disproportionately degrade action robustness under distribution shift. To address this, we propose MV-WAM, a novel end-to-end framework that jointly models visual prediction, action generation, and value estimation designed to effectively leverage video priors during both training and inference for enhanced action generalization. Key to this unification is a cross-modality causal mask that hierarchically grounds actions in predicted video frames and value function tokens in both modalities. To further narrow the generalization gap, MV-WAM adopts a manifold-aware optimization scheme that explicitly accounts for the structural heterogeneity across modalities. Finally, MV-WAM introduces a progress-value regulation mechanism that estimates task completion and detects misalignment between predicted frames and generated actions, enabling the policy to autonomously identify execution deviations and recover through value-guided rollback. On the RoboTwin simulation, MV-WAM achieves a 55.7% mean success rate on random scenarios without any randomized action supervision, outperforming the strongest baseline by 29.3%. MV-WAM achieves a 77.5% mean success rate across four real-world tasks of varying difficulty on a dual-arm robot. Our results demonstrate that manifold-aware cross-modal alignment is essential for robust policy generalization, offering a path toward deployable robotic manipulation.

AI.tldr: MV-WAM是一个端到端的机器人操作框架，通过联合建模视觉预测、动作生成和价值估计，利用视频先验增强动作泛化能力，在模拟和真实世界任务中显著优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 当前世界动作模型在领域内表现良好，但泛化到分布外场景时性能下降严重。作者认为这是由于视觉和动作模态的固有异质性导致联合优化在分布偏移下不成比例地损害动作鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出MV-WAM框架：1) 使用跨模态因果掩码将动作层次化地基于预测的视频帧，并将价值函数token与两种模态对齐；2) 采用流形感知优化方案处理跨模态的结构异质性；3) 引入进度-价值调节机制，估计任务完成度并检测预测帧与生成动作之间的错配，使策略能够自主识别执行偏差并通过价值引导的回滚恢复。
AI.result: 在RoboTwin模拟中，MV-WAM在随机场景下达到55.7%的平均成功率（无随机动作监督），比最强基线高出29.3%。在真实世界双手机器人的四个不同难度任务中，平均成功率达到77.5%。
AI.conclusion: 流形感知的跨模态对齐对于鲁棒的策略泛化至关重要，为实现可部署的机器人操作提供了路径。MV-WAM通过联合建模视觉、动作和价值估计，有效利用视频先验，显著提升了分布外场景的泛化能力。

title: VTOS: Learning to Orchestrate Vision Tools by Co-Searching Solutions and Observers
summary: Vision foundation tools such as open-vocabulary detectors, segmentation models, and post-processing operators are powerful building blocks for computer vision, but their effectiveness depends heavily on how they are orchestrated: which tools are used, in what order, with what parameters, and under what visual conditions. Existing visual-programming agents typically generate a fixed solution pipeline, making them brittle under dense objects, occlusion, small targets, and domain shift. We introduce VTOS (Vision Tools Orchestration Search), a framework for adaptive visual tool orchestration through joint solution--observer search. VTOS co-searches executable solution programs that compose vision tools such as Grounding DINO, SAM, NMS, and slice-and-detect, together with observer programs that diagnose candidate solutions, identify failure modes, and generate actionable feedback. These observations are accumulated in a shared VisionThoughts knowledge base to guide subsequent search. We evaluate VTOS through two case studies: dense object counting on LVIS-Count and zero-shot plant-disease segmentation on PlantSeg-OOD, which stress different orchestration challenges including threshold calibration, NMS, slicing, mask refinement, and domain generalization. Across both tasks, VTOS outperforms static tool pipelines and agentic visual-programming baselines, showing that co-searching solutions and observers is an effective strategy for adapting vision tools to challenging computer vision tasks.

AI.tldr: VTOS是一个自适应视觉工具编排框架，通过联合搜索解决方案和观察者程序，实现视觉基础工具的动态组合与优化。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉编程代理通常生成固定解决方案管道，在密集物体、遮挡、小目标和领域偏移等复杂视觉条件下表现脆弱。需要一种能够自适应编排视觉工具的方法。
AI.method: VTOS通过联合搜索可执行解决方案程序和观察者程序来编排视觉工具。解决方案程序组合Grounding DINO、SAM、NMS、切片检测等工具，观察者程序诊断候选方案、识别失败模式并生成可操作的反馈。这些观察结果积累在共享的VisionThoughts知识库中指导后续搜索。
AI.result: 在两个案例研究中评估：LVIS-Count上的密集物体计数和PlantSeg-OOD上的零样本植物病害分割。VTOS在两项任务中均优于静态工具管道和基于代理的视觉编程基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 联合搜索解决方案和观察者程序是使视觉工具适应具有挑战性计算机视觉任务的有效策略，VTOS框架能够自适应地编排视觉基础工具。

title: Is Our Benchmark Enough? An Analysis of Continual Learning for MLLMs
comment: ICML 2026 Workshop "Continual Adaptation at Scale: Towards Sustainable AI"
summary: Continual adaptation is essential for multimodal large language models (MLLMs) deployed across evolving domains, but the state-of-the-art MR-LoRA method highly relies on the assumption that a MLLM-based router is necessary to process complex multimodal inputs. This paper revisits this claim on the MLLM-CL benchmark and argues for two claims. \textbf{First}, routing does not require an MLLM: a simple training-free, replay-free ptotypical routing method (\textsc{RePRo}), uses frozen pretrained features and task prototypes to match the MLLM-based router of MR-LoRA at far lower computational cost. \textbf{Second}, shared experts do not improve continual learning for MLLMs, despite their theoretical appeal. We show that these findings arise from two structural limitations of MLLM-CL: (1) its tasks are \textbf{highly separable} in representation space, and (2) its fixed task order makes conclusions \textbf{sensitive to a single curriculum} rather than robust across diverse continual-learning trajectories. As a result, the benchmark primarily rewards learning in isolation rather than genuine continual transfer. This motivates a new design for future benchmarks of continual MLLM learning, with overlapping task manifolds, multiple task orders, fine-grained domain shifts, and evaluation protocols that reward forward transfer as well as retention.

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视了多模态大语言模型（MLLM）持续学习中的路由机制，提出简单原型路由方法RePRo可替代MLLM路由器，并指出共享专家机制在MLLM持续学习中无效，同时揭示了当前MLLM-CL基准的结构性缺陷。
AI.motivation: 当前MLLM持续学习方法MR-LoRA依赖复杂的MLLM路由器处理多模态输入，本文旨在验证这种假设的必要性，并探索更高效的路由方法。同时，研究共享专家机制在MLLM持续学习中的实际效果，并分析现有基准的局限性。
AI.method: 提出RePRo（原型路由方法），使用冻结的预训练特征和任务原型进行路由匹配，无需训练和重放。在MLLM-CL基准上对比MLLM路由器与RePRo的性能差异，分析共享专家机制的效果，并识别基准的结构性缺陷。
AI.result: 1. RePRo在计算成本远低于MLLM路由器的情况下达到相同性能；2. 共享专家机制并未改善MLLM持续学习效果；3. 发现MLLM-CL基准存在两个结构缺陷：任务在表示空间高度可分，固定任务顺序使结论对单一课程敏感。
AI.conclusion: MLLM持续学习不需要复杂的MLLM路由器，简单原型路由即可胜任；共享专家机制在MLLM持续学习中无效；现有基准主要奖励孤立学习而非真正的持续迁移，需要设计具有重叠任务流形、多任务顺序、细粒度领域转移的新基准。

title: How Should a Robot Configure Its Laser Scanner for Inspection?
comment: 8 pages, 9 figures. Accepted to the 2026 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2026)
summary: Robotic inspection relies on accurate sensing to acquire high-fidelity geometric measurements for defect detection and metrology. While prior work has focused on robot motion and viewpoint planning, how to configure sensing parameters remains largely underexplored, despite their decisive impact on measurement quality. We propose SenseHD, a robotic sensing system that formulates scanner configuration as an instruction-conditioned sensing decision. Instead of predicting precise parameter values, SenseHD treats sensing parameters as discrete sensing actions and selects stable sensing regimes through hyperdimensional associative memory. Experiments on a real robotic inspection platform demonstrate that SenseHD robustly selects appropriate sensing configurations and significantly improves inspection reliability, while remaining lightweight and efficient compared to baseline methods.

AI.tldr: SenseHD是一个机器人传感系统，通过将扫描仪配置视为指令条件化的传感决策，选择稳定的传感机制，显著提升检查可靠性。
AI.motivation: 机器人检查依赖精确传感来获取高质量几何测量，虽然先前工作关注机器人运动和视角规划，但传感参数配置对测量质量有决定性影响却未被充分探索。
AI.method: 将传感参数视为离散传感动作，通过超维关联记忆选择稳定的传感机制，而不是预测精确的参数值。
AI.result: 在真实机器人检查平台上，SenseHD能稳健选择适当的传感配置，显著提高检查可靠性，且相比基线方法更轻量高效。
AI.conclusion: SenseHD通过创新的传感决策方法有效解决了传感参数配置问题，为机器人检查系统提供了可靠且高效的解决方案。

title: XmoPipe: A Pipeline for Large-Scale In-the-Wild Human Motion Dataset Construction
summary: Large-scale human motion datasets are essential for training robust motion models for analysis, synthesis, and understanding. While marker-based motion capture provides precise data, it is costly and limited in scale and diversity. Recent advances in monocular motion capture and video-language understanding open the way to extract plausible motion from unconstrained online videos. We present a scalable pipeline for constructing in-the-wild human motion datasets. From a few keywords, the system retrieves videos, extracts 3D body and facial motion, and generates high-level textual descriptions. The pipeline is flexible, enabling targeted collection of various motions, multi-person interactions, or expressive behaviors. We demonstrate its quality by training motion reconstruction and motion generation models, showing performance comparable to models trained on traditional motion capture datasets and strong cross-dataset generalization.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个从在线视频中构建大规模野外人类运动数据集的自动化流程，通过关键词检索视频、提取3D身体和面部运动、生成文本描述，实现低成本、多样化的运动数据收集。
AI.motivation: 传统基于标记点的动作捕捉系统虽然精确但成本高、规模有限且缺乏多样性，而单目动作捕捉和视频语言理解的最新进展使得从无约束在线视频中提取合理运动成为可能，需要构建大规模野外人类运动数据集来训练鲁棒的运动模型。
AI.method: 开发了一个可扩展的流水线：1) 通过关键词检索在线视频；2) 从视频中提取3D身体和面部运动；3) 生成高级文本描述。该流水线灵活，可以针对性地收集各种运动、多人互动或表达性行为。
AI.result: 使用该数据集训练的运动重建和运动生成模型，其性能与在传统动作捕捉数据集上训练的模型相当，并表现出强大的跨数据集泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究展示了一种从在线视频中构建大规模、多样化人类运动数据集的有效方法，为运动分析、合成和理解提供了更丰富的数据资源，同时保持了与传统动作捕捉数据相当的质量。

title: Formalizing Task-Space Complexity for Zero-Shot Generalization
summary: Policies must operate across diverse conditions, yet a single policy is often conservative while fully adaptive schemes can be complex. We study zero-shot generalization in contextual dynamical systems and introduce a performance-centric, directional task dissimilarity--the signed divergence--that upper bounds the generalization gap from a source context to a target context. The signed divergence induces $\varepsilon$-tolerance sets that certify when a source policy class generalizes, and it yields a concrete notion of task-space complexity: the minimum number of source contexts needed so that every target context incurs at most $\varepsilon$ generalization gap. Under a mild local smoothness assumption on performance, the induced tolerance sets admit certified inner/outer balls and instance-dependent volume bounds on task-space complexity. In the finite-oracle setting, source selection reduces to set cover; a greedy strategy inherits the standard $H(n)$ approximation guarantee. Using a Mass-Spring-Damper system with linear-quadratic regulator (LQR) controllers and a nonlinear CartPole system with deep reinforcement learning controllers, we show that greedy selection achieves the same $\varepsilon$-coverage with fewer policies than uniform or random baselines. Our approach delivers a performance-based task similarity measure and practical certificates for building generalizable control with simple policies.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于性能的任务相似性度量——符号散度，用于量化上下文动态系统中策略的零样本泛化能力，并提供了实用的泛化保证证书。
AI.motivation: 策略需要在多样化条件下运行，但单一策略往往过于保守，而完全自适应方案又过于复杂。需要一种方法来衡量和保证策略在不同上下文之间的泛化能力。
AI.method: 引入符号散度作为性能导向的任务相似性度量，它能够上界从源上下文到目标上下文的泛化差距。基于此定义ε-容忍集来证明策略类的泛化能力，并提出了任务空间复杂度的概念。在局部平滑性假设下，推导了容忍集的认证内/外球和体积边界。在有限源设置下，源选择问题简化为集合覆盖问题，采用贪心策略获得近似保证。
AI.result: 在质量-弹簧-阻尼器系统（LQR控制器）和非线性CartPole系统（深度强化学习控制器）上的实验表明，贪心选择方法比均匀或随机基线方法能用更少的策略实现相同的ε覆盖。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提供了一种基于性能的任务相似性度量和实用的证书，可用于构建具有简单策略的可泛化控制系统，在保证性能的同时减少策略复杂性。

title: Factor-Aware Mixture-of-Experts with Pretrained Encoder for Combinatorial Generalization
comment: 8 pages, 9 figures, accepted by the 2026 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2026)
summary: The integration of pretrained encoders with diffusion policies has become a dominant paradigm for visual robotic manipulation. However, it still struggles to generalize across complex environments with varying factors such as lighting and surface textures. To address this, we propose FAME, a framework that integrates a factor-aware mixture-of-experts (MoE) with a pretrained encoder to enhance generalization to environmental variations. FAME follows a three-stage training process: (1) policy warmup, where a diffusion policy is trained on standard-environment data with a frozen encoder; (2) factor-specific adapter training, where lightweight adapters inserted between the frozen encoder and the temporarily frozen policy are trained on customized datasets, each targeting a distinct environmental variation; and (3) joint fine-tuning, where a central router and the warmed policy are trained on mixed data to handle multiple factors jointly. FAME is ``factor-aware'' because the central router softly weights frozen factor-specific adapters as a dense MoE, enabling combinatorial generalization across multiple factors. Evaluations on the Meta-World benchmark show that FAME outperforms diffusion policy baselines by 34%.
