We further validate FAME in a real-world pick-and-place task using a compact model trained on newly collected data, where FAME achieves a 35% improvement in generalization under real-world variations.

AI.tldr: FAME框架通过集成因子感知的专家混合机制与预训练编码器，提升视觉机器人操作在复杂环境变化下的泛化能力，在模拟和真实世界任务中分别获得34%和35%的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 当前基于预训练编码器和扩散策略的视觉机器人操作方法在复杂环境变化（如光照、表面纹理）下泛化能力有限，需要一种能够适应多种环境因子的解决方案。
AI.method: FAME采用三阶段训练：1）策略预热：在标准环境数据上训练扩散策略，冻结编码器；2）因子特定适配器训练：为不同环境变化训练轻量级适配器；3）联合微调：训练中央路由器和策略处理多因子组合。框架通过因子感知的专家混合机制实现组合泛化。
AI.result: 在Meta-World基准测试中，FAME超越扩散策略基线34%；在真实世界抓取任务中，使用新收集数据训练的紧凑模型在真实环境变化下获得35%的泛化性能提升。
AI.conclusion: FAME通过因子感知的专家混合机制有效提升了视觉机器人操作在复杂环境变化下的泛化能力，为处理真实世界中的多因子变化提供了一种有效的解决方案。

title: Robust Zero-Shot Generalization for Open-Vocabulary Action Recognition via Task Arithmetic
comment: Accepted by the 22nd International Conference on Advanced Video and Signal-Based Surveillance (AVSS)
summary: Open Vocabulary Action Recognition (OVAR) enables the recognition of novel actions by leveraging vision-language representations, overcoming the limitations of traditional closed-set approaches. However, achieving robust performance in real-world scenarios typically requires domain-specific fine-tuning, which is often costly and raises privacy and regulatory concerns. In this work, we propose an alternative paradigm that bypasses target-domain training and recombines knowledge from existing datasets and models. Leveraging model merging and task arithmetic, we extract and combine task vectors from models fine-tuned on diverse public OVAR datasets. We show that, in out-of-distribution settings, the resulting merged model achieves superior zero-shot generalization to the pre-trained base model. Code is available at https://github.com/omaymaMoussadek/robust-ovar

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种通过模型合并和任务算术来增强开放词汇动作识别零样本泛化能力的方法，无需目标域训练。
AI.motivation: 开放词汇动作识别（OVAR）虽然能识别新动作，但在真实场景中通常需要昂贵的领域特定微调，这会带来隐私和监管问题。因此需要一种无需目标域训练的方法来提升零样本泛化能力。
AI.method: 利用模型合并和任务算术技术，从在多样化公共OVAR数据集上微调的模型中提取和组合任务向量，构建合并模型。
AI.result: 在分布外场景下，合并模型相比预训练基础模型实现了更优越的零样本泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过重新组合现有数据集和模型的知识，可以绕过目标域训练，实现更稳健的开放词汇动作识别。

title: Detecting Satellites in Radio-Frequency Data via Semi-Supervised Learning
summary: Radio-frequency (RF) monitoring is essential for space domain awareness, but it often generates large, variable, and sparsely populated datasets with few labels. These observations can capture satellites, space debris, and the ionospheric background, yet interpreting them typically requires specialized subject-matter expertise. Supervised deep learning methods can perform well on labeled RF data, but they require many annotated examples and may need careful retraining as RF conditions change. Semi-supervised approaches offer a practical alternative for limited-data settings by using unlabeled observations to reveal latent patterns that experts can interpret. In this paper, we present a semi-supervised RF detection and classification workflow for satellite monitoring that combines Non-negative Matrix Factorization with automatic model determination (NMFk), expert-guided cluster interpretation, and classifier-based prediction. We first represent RF observations as a non-negative feature matrix and apply NMFk to estimate the number of clusters that best captures patterns in the unlabeled data. Subject-matter experts then assign physical meaning to the resulting clusters, including satellite detections, ionospheric environmental conditions, and other RF event categories. Finally, we train a classifier on these interpreted clusters to evaluate performance on a test set and categorize future observations. This pipeline reduces reliance on large pre-labeled datasets by pairing unsupervised factorization with expert interpretation, enabling an interpretable and transferable methodology for detecting, observing, and classifying behavior in RF data.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合非负矩阵分解与专家解释的半监督RF检测分类流程，用于卫星监测，减少对大规模标注数据的依赖。
AI.motivation: RF监测产生大量、多变、稀疏且标注少的数据集，需要专业领域知识解释。监督深度学习方法需要大量标注数据且难以适应RF条件变化，需要一种在有限数据设置下实用的替代方案。
AI.method: 将RF观测表示为非负特征矩阵，应用带自动模型确定的NMFk估计最佳聚类数，领域专家为聚类分配物理意义（卫星检测、电离层环境条件等），最后基于这些解释的聚类训练分类器进行预测。
AI.result: 该流程通过将无监督分解与专家解释结合，减少了对大规模预标注数据集的依赖，为RF数据中的行为检测、观测和分类提供了可解释且可转移的方法论。
AI.conclusion: 提出的半监督RF检测分类工作流程为卫星监测提供了一种实用的解决方案，通过专家指导的聚类解释和分类器预测，实现了对RF数据中潜在模式的有效揭示和分类。

title: PoLAR: Factorizing Extent and Mode in Latent Actions for Robot Policy Learning
summary: Latent action pretraining learns representations of visual change from pairs of observations, but existing methods typically encode each transition as a single unstructured representation that entangles transition extent and transition mode. We introduce Polar Latent Actions with Radial structure (PoLAR), which imposes a radial-direction structure on latent actions, encouraging radius to encode transition extent and direction to retain transition mode. PoLAR uses temporal offset between two observations as a weak proxy for transition extent, encouraging latent action from observation pairs separated by larger temporal gaps to occupy larger radii. We instantiate this structure in hyperbolic space, whose expanding volume with radius offers a natural fit for more diverse transition modes at larger extents. Across in-task and large-scale pretraining settings, PoLAR improves downstream policy performance in simulation and real-world robot experiments, outperforming latent action baselines and strong pretrained VLAs. These results suggest that the geometry of the latent action space is an important design choice for transferring visual pretraining to downstream robot policy learning.

AI.tldr: PoLAR提出了一种具有径向结构的潜在动作表示方法，将动作的幅度和模式分离编码，在双曲空间中实现，提升了机器人策略学习性能。
AI.motivation: 现有潜在动作预训练方法通常将视觉变化编码为单一的无结构表示，混淆了动作的幅度（extent）和模式（mode），这限制了表示的质量和下游任务性能。
AI.method: PoLAR在双曲空间中施加径向-方向结构，用半径编码动作幅度，方向编码动作模式。利用观测对之间的时间间隔作为动作幅度的弱监督信号，时间间隔越大对应半径越大。
AI.result: 在任务内和大规模预训练设置中，PoLAR在仿真和真实机器人实验中均提升了下游策略性能，优于现有潜在动作基线和强大的预训练视觉语言动作模型。
AI.conclusion: 潜在动作空间的几何结构是视觉预训练向机器人策略学习迁移的重要设计选择，PoLAR的径向结构为这一领域提供了有效解决方案。

title: REKEY: Metadata-Grounded Visual-Key Regeneration for Contamination-Resilient VQA Evaluation
summary: Static visual question answering (VQA) benchmarks age quickly: Once the items leak into training corpora, scores can reflect memorization rather than genuine visual ability, thus obscuring real progress. Rebuilding high-quality benchmarks such as V*Bench requires substantial human annotation, yet each static release can quickly become another leaked artifact. We propose ReKey, a live benchmark protocol that randomly regenerates the answer-bearing local detail, or visual key, in real images at evaluation time. Using human-validated edit slots, ReKey samples fresh instances with new answers, construction-grounded labels, and controlled visual-search difficulty. On V*Bench, the ReKey regenerated benchmark reveals a sharp score jump across eight frontier vision-language models (VLMs): The original items score 9.5--18.8 percentage points higher than the regenerated variants. By making the visual key renewable, ReKey keeps evaluation fresh as models and training data evolve.

AI.tldr: ReKey是一种动态视觉问答基准协议，通过在评估时随机重新生成图像中的关键视觉细节，防止模型通过记忆训练数据获得高分，从而更准确地评估模型的真实视觉理解能力。
AI.motivation: 传统静态VQA基准存在老化问题：一旦测试项泄露到训练数据中，模型的高分可能反映的是记忆而非真正的视觉能力，从而掩盖真实进展。需要一种能够持续保持新鲜的评估方法。
AI.method: ReKey协议在评估时随机重新生成图像中的答案承载局部细节（视觉关键），使用经过人工验证的编辑槽，生成具有新答案、构建基础标签和可控视觉搜索难度的新鲜实例。
AI.result: 在V*Bench上测试的8个前沿视觉语言模型中，原始测试项得分比ReKey再生变体高出9.5-18.8个百分点，表明原始高分可能来自数据泄露而非真实能力。
AI.conclusion: ReKey通过使视觉关键可更新，能够随着模型和训练数据的演变保持评估的新鲜度，为VQA评估提供了更可靠的动态基准方法。

title: Physics-Guided Fully Convolutional Spatiotemporal Learning Toward Digital-Twin-Enabled Microstructure Evolution Prediction
summary: Understanding and predicting microstructure evolution is central to materials design, yet purely data-driven spatiotemporal learning models often suffer from limited physical consistency and degraded long-term prediction accuracy. In this work, we introduce a physics-guided fully convolutional spatiotemporal learning framework for microstructure evolution prediction. Unlike prior self-supervised approaches, the proposed method explicitly incorporates governing physical equations into the training objective, thereby encouraging the learned dynamics to remain consistent with known thermodynamic and kinetic laws. This physics-guided formulation improves predictive accuracy, long-horizon stability, and robustness across spatial resolutions and temporal prediction settings. Extensive experiments for spinodal decomposition demonstrate that incorporating physics-guided residual regularization leads to more faithful reproduction of microstructural morphology, statistics, and evolution trends compared with purely data-driven baselines. The proposed framework preserves the scalability and computational efficiency of fully convolutional architectures while bridging the gap between high-fidelity physics-based simulations and data-driven surrogate modeling, offering a reliable and efficient surrogate-modeling step toward digital-twin-enabled microstructure evolution prediction.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种物理引导的全卷积时空学习框架，用于预测微观结构演化，通过将物理方程纳入训练目标来提高预测准确性、长期稳定性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 当前数据驱动的时空学习模型在微观结构演化预测中存在物理一致性不足和长期预测精度下降的问题，需要结合物理知识来改进模型性能。
AI.method: 提出物理引导的全卷积时空学习框架，将控制物理方程显式地纳入训练目标，通过物理引导的残差正则化来确保学习到的动力学符合热力学和动力学定律。
AI.result: 在旋节线分解实验中，该方法相比纯数据驱动基线能更准确地再现微观结构的形态、统计特征和演化趋势，具有更好的预测精度、长期稳定性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在保持全卷积架构可扩展性和计算效率的同时，弥合了高保真物理模拟与数据驱动代理建模之间的差距，为数字孪生支持的微观结构演化预测提供了可靠高效的代理建模方法。

title: Pose-Agnostic Robotic Functional Grasping via Observation-Action Canonicalization
summary: Functional robotic grasping requires a policy that generalizes across diverse object geometries and poses while maintaining task-specific contact precision. We study this challenge through mug-handle grasping, where thin handles, instance variation, and upright or inverted placements make both perception and control sensitive to object configuration. Grasp pose detection methods operate open-loop and are sensitive to estimation errors on thin handle structures. Learned visuomotor policies must implicitly learn to handle the coupled variation in visual appearance and action direction induced by different object placements, limiting generalization. We propose AnyMug, a canonicalized visuomotor reinforcement learning framework for functional grasping that trains a single closed-loop policy entirely in simulation and deploys it zero-shot on a real robot. AnyMug introduces observation-action canonicalization, which transforms both the depth observation and the predicted end-effector action into a shared object-centric frame. The policy therefore sees a consistent mug-centered view and emits actions in a canonical direction regardless of mug placement, allowing the same grasping behavior to be reused across configurations. A handle-aware reward further encourages precise approach, gripper alignment, and opposing-finger placement, while a pose curriculum and domain randomization improve training stability and sim-to-real transfer. In simulation, AnyMug achieves over 93% success rate on both unseen upright and inverted mugs and transfers zero-shot to a real Franka Panda, reaching 80% success rate on 5 held-out physical mugs across both pose categories.

AI.tldr: AnyMug是一个用于功能性抓取的规范化视觉运动强化学习框架，通过观察-动作规范化技术，在模拟中训练单闭环策略，并零样本迁移到真实机器人，实现跨不同姿态（正放/倒置）的马克杯把手抓取。
AI.motivation: 当前抓取方法面临挑战：抓取姿态检测方法开环运行，对薄把手结构的估计误差敏感；学习型视觉运动策略需要隐式处理不同物体放置带来的视觉外观和动作方向耦合变化，限制了泛化能力。需要一种能够跨不同物体几何和姿态泛化，同时保持任务特定接触精度的策略。
AI.method: 提出AnyMug框架，采用观察-动作规范化技术，将深度观察和预测的末端执行器动作都转换到共享的物体中心坐标系中。这样策略看到一致的马克杯中心视图，并发出规范方向的行动，无论马克杯如何放置。同时使用把手感知奖励来鼓励精确接近、夹爪对齐和对指放置，以及姿态课程和域随机化来提高训练稳定性和模拟到真实的迁移。
AI.result: 在模拟中，AnyMug在未见过的正放和倒置马克杯上达到超过93%的成功率。零样本迁移到真实Franka Panda机器人，在5个保留的物理马克杯上，跨两种姿态类别达到80%的成功率。
AI.conclusion: AnyMug通过观察-动作规范化解决了跨不同物体姿态的泛化问题，实现了功能性抓取策略，在模拟和真实环境中都表现出色，展示了规范化方法在视觉运动强化学习中处理物体姿态变化的有效性。

title: An approach with Visual and Tabular Mamba to multimodal medical data using Mixed Fusion
comment: 15 pages. accepted to 36th Brazilian Conference on Intelligent Systems
summary: This article presents a complementary approach for integrating multimodal medical data in cancer classification, based on state space models represented by the Mamba architecture. To this end, a mixed multimodal fusion architecture, called Mixed Fusion, was employed and developed to enhance the interpretability of the decision-making process. The proposed approach explores two variants of Mamba: one dedicated to visual processing, responsible for classifying the lesion image and generating probabilities associated with the target classes, and another focused on tabular processing, which uses these probabilities together with clinical and/or sociodemographic data to produce the final diagnosis. The experiments were conducted on two medical datasets: PAD-UFES-20, composed of clinical images and information associated with skin lesions, and NDB-UFES, consisting of histopathological images and sociodemographic data related to oral cancer. The results indicate slightly lower performance in balanced accuracy, compared with Transformer-based approaches, on PAD-UFES-20, and superior performance on NDB-UFES. Additionally, substantial gains were observed in the recall metric. Furthermore, the adoption of the Mixed Fusion architecture enables the application of the Shapley Additive Explanations (SHAP) method, increasing the interpretability of the results. These findings indicate that Mamba-based models constitute a suitable alternative for multimodal classification in medical data, especially in scenarios in which sensitivity is a relevant requirement.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种基于Mamba架构状态空间模型的多模态医学数据癌症分类方法，采用混合融合架构增强可解释性，在两种医学数据集上进行了测试。
AI.motivation: 开发一种基于状态空间模型（Mamba架构）的多模态医学数据融合方法，用于癌症分类，旨在提高决策过程的可解释性，特别是在需要高敏感性的医疗场景中。
AI.method: 提出混合多模态融合架构（Mixed Fusion），使用两种Mamba变体：一个用于视觉处理（分类病变图像并生成类别概率），另一个用于表格处理（结合临床/社会人口学数据和视觉概率生成最终诊断）。
AI.result: 在PAD-UFES-20皮肤病变数据集上表现略低于基于Transformer的方法，但在NDB-UFES口腔癌数据集上表现更优。在召回率指标上观察到显著提升，且混合融合架构支持SHAP方法应用，增强了结果可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 基于Mamba的模型是多模态医学数据分类的合适替代方案，特别适用于对敏感性要求较高的场景，同时混合融合架构提高了模型的可解释性。

title: Continuous-Time Probabilistic Correctors for Uncertainty-Aware Physics-Based Spacecraft Trajectory Forecasting
summary: Long-horizon spacecraft trajectory forecasting suffers from error accumulation due to the absence of corrective observations in the forecast regime, making reliable uncertainty estimation crucial for safety-critical decision-making such as space domain awareness and conjunction assessment. While high-fidelity physics-based orbit propagators provide accurate deterministic forecasts, they typically lack calibrated uncertainty estimates over long horizons. We introduce a Predictor--Corrector framework in which a physics-based continuous-time $\textit{deterministic}$ forecaster is augmented with a learned continuous-time $\textit{probabilistic}$ Corrector that models forecast errors. The proposed Corrector can be wrapped around an existing deterministic propagator to improve forecast accuracy while producing sharp and calibrated full-covariance uncertainty estimates. The Corrector is based on Latent Neural Controlled Differential Equations (Latent NCDEs) and models the probabilistic temporal evolution of forecast errors in continuous time, naturally supporting irregular sampling and missing features. We further introduce a loss function that promotes calibration and sharpness in long-horizon uncertainty propagation. We evaluate the proposed framework on long-horizon spacecraft trajectory forecasting using real-world data from NASA's Crustal Dynamics Data Information System (CDDIS), wrapping the Corrector around NASA's General Mission Analysis Tool (GMAT). Across forecast horizons of 2--4 days without observations and six rolling test windows, the proposed approach consistently improves accuracy and uncertainty calibration compared to deterministic baselines and Latent ODE-based correctors, demonstrating the effectiveness of the continuous-time probabilistic Corrector for trajectory forecasting.

AI.tldr: 提出一个预测器-校正器框架，将基于物理的确定性轨道预报器与学习的概率性校正器结合，用于航天器长期轨迹预测，提高精度并产生校准的不确定性估计。
AI.motivation: 长期航天器轨迹预测由于缺乏观测校正，误差会累积，因此需要可靠的不确定性估计来支持安全关键决策（如空间态势感知和交会评估）。虽然高保真物理轨道传播器能提供准确的确定性预测，但通常缺乏长期视野的校准不确定性估计。
AI.method: 提出预测器-校正器框架：基于物理的连续时间确定性预测器 + 学习的连续时间概率性校正器（基于潜在神经控制微分方程）。校正器可以包装在现有确定性传播器周围，建模预测误差的概率时间演化，支持不规则采样和缺失特征。还引入了促进校准性和锐度的损失函数。
AI.result: 在NASA CDDIS真实数据上评估，包装在GMAT周围。在2-4天无观测的预测视野和六个滚动测试窗口中，相比确定性基线和基于潜在ODE的校正器，该方法持续提高了精度和不确定性校准。
AI.conclusion: 连续时间概率性校正器框架能有效提高长期航天器轨迹预测的准确性和不确定性校准，为安全关键决策提供可靠支持。

title: OmniV2X: A Generative Foundation Planner for Efficient End-to-End Cooperative Driving
summary: We present OmniV2X, a generative foundation model for vehicle-to-everything (V2X) cooperative driving. The model directly interprets independent context sequences comprising multi-modal and multi-agent observations. The new design mitigates the computational cost of dense 3D perception, the vulnerability to data scarcity in cooperative scenarios, and the poor compliance with standardized messaging in existing methods that fuse multi-modal inputs into a shared representation. For training, we present an end-to-end supervised pipeline using a downstream trajectory generation loss, in which a high-capacity generative sequence planner implicitly learns to steer the model and leverage multi-modal inputs via cross-attention injection. As a foundation model, we demonstrate that OmniV2X pre-trained on large-scale single-agent planning datasets can efficiently adapt to cooperative environments by integrating the conditioning context with lightweight, standard-compliant V2X tokens. Evaluated on the DAIR-V2X-Seq dataset, OmniV2X outperforms existing end-to-end cooperative driving baselines, achieving state-of-the-art performance with less than 10% of the fine-tune V2X dataset and less than 1% of the communication bandwidth. We conduct comprehensive evaluations to demonstrate its computational efficiency and robustness under real-world constraints.

AI.tldr: OmniV2X是一个用于车联网协同驾驶的生成式基础模型，通过直接解释多模态多智能体观察序列，解决了现有方法在计算成本、数据稀缺和标准兼容性方面的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有车联网协同驾驶方法面临三个主要问题：密集3D感知计算成本高、协同场景数据稀缺、以及将多模态输入融合到共享表示中时与标准化消息传递兼容性差。
AI.method: 1. 直接解释独立的多模态多智能体观察序列；2. 使用端到端监督训练流程，通过下游轨迹生成损失；3. 高容量生成式序列规划器通过交叉注意力注入隐式学习利用多模态输入；4. 在大规模单智能体规划数据集上预训练，然后通过轻量级标准兼容的V2X令牌适应协同环境。
AI.result: 在DAIR-V2X-Seq数据集上评估，OmniV2X优于现有端到端协同驾驶基线方法，达到最先进性能，仅需不到10%的微调V2X数据集和不到1%的通信带宽。
AI.conclusion: OmniV2X作为车联网协同驾驶的基础模型，通过创新的架构设计解决了现有方法的局限性，在计算效率、数据效率和标准兼容性方面表现出色，为实际部署提供了可行性。

title: Mirage: a Clean-Label Backdoor against LiDAR 3D Object Detection
summary: Deep neural network-based LiDAR 3D object detection serves as a critical perception component in safety-critical autonomous systems. However, recent studies have revealed its vulnerability to backdoor attacks. Existing attacks typically require white-box access or label modification and focus on geometric attacks such as object disappearance or bounding-box manipulation. In this paper, we present Mirage, a black-box and clean-label backdoor attack against deep neural network-based LiDAR 3DOD. Mirage injects a small number of label-consistent poisoning samples into the training set, causing the model to learn a malicious association between a trigger pattern and an attacker-chosen target class while preserving normal training semantics. As a result, the compromised model behaves normally on benign inputs yet systematically misclassifies triggered objects as the target class during deployment. We evaluate Mirage on multiple state-of-the-art LiDAR 3DOD models and benchmark datasets. Experimental results show that Mirage achieves a 73% misclassification success rate with a poisoning rate of only 0.5%, while maintaining detection performance close to that of benign models.

AI.tldr: Mirage是一种针对LiDAR 3D目标检测的黑盒、干净标签后门攻击，通过注入少量标签一致的毒化样本，使模型在保持正常检测性能的同时，对带有触发器的目标进行系统性误分类。
AI.motivation: 现有后门攻击通常需要白盒访问或标签修改，且主要关注几何攻击（如物体消失或边界框操纵）。需要开发更隐蔽的黑盒、干净标签攻击方法，以揭示LiDAR 3D目标检测模型的安全漏洞。
AI.method: Mirage通过向训练集注入少量标签一致的毒化样本，使模型学习恶意关联（触发模式与目标类别），同时保持正常的训练语义。攻击采用黑盒设置，无需修改标签。
AI.result: 在多个最先进的LiDAR 3DOD模型和基准数据集上，Mirage仅用0.5%的毒化率就实现了73%的误分类成功率，同时保持与良性模型接近的检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了LiDAR 3D目标检测模型在真实场景中的安全风险，提出了有效的黑盒、干净标签后门攻击方法，为防御此类攻击提供了重要参考。

title: Structure-Aware Graph Multi-Task Learning for Dynamic Sparse OD Demand Prediction
summary: Origin-Destination (OD) demand prediction is fundamental to intelligent transportation systems, yet real-world OD flows are often dynamically sparse, long-tailed, and characterized by heterogeneous zero-flow patterns. These properties make it difficult to distinguish whether an OD connection is active from how much demand it generates once activated. Many existing methods primarily treat OD prediction as a single flow regression task, which limits their ability to model low-frequency, intermittent, and long-tailed OD interactions. To address these challenges, we propose SAGMTL, a Structure-Aware Graph Multi-Task Learning framework for dynamic sparse OD demand prediction. SAGMTL decomposes OD prediction into structural state modeling and flow intensity estimation, jointly learning regional activity states, OD connection activity, and edge-level flow intensity within a unified framework. Specifically, a node-edge collaborative representation module captures regional semantics, temporal dynamics, and spatial priors through interactive node-edge updates, producing structure-aware representations for dynamic OD interactions. Based on these representations, SAGMTL estimates OD flows by jointly modeling stable demand patterns and short-term fluctuations. A multi-constraint objective further improves sparsity awareness and structural consistency. Experiments on three real-world urban mobility datasets from Beijing, Chengdu, and Nanjing show that SAGMTL achieves superior overall performance compared with state-of-the-art baselines. Further analysis demonstrates that explicitly modeling regional activity, connection states, and flow intensity improves the robustness of dynamic sparse OD demand prediction.

AI.tldr: SAGMTL是一个用于动态稀疏OD需求预测的结构感知图多任务学习框架，将OD预测分解为结构状态建模和流量强度估计，解决了真实OD流数据的动态稀疏性、长尾分布和异质零流模式问题。
AI.motivation: 真实世界OD需求具有动态稀疏、长尾分布和异质零流模式的特点，这使得难以区分OD连接是否活跃以及活跃后的需求强度。现有方法主要将OD预测视为单一流量回归任务，难以建模低频、间歇性和长尾的OD交互。
AI.method: SAGMTL将OD预测分解为结构状态建模和流量强度估计，通过节点-边协同表示模块捕获区域语义、时序动态和空间先验，联合建模区域活跃状态、OD连接活动和边级流量强度，使用多约束目标提升稀疏感知和结构一致性。
AI.result: 在北京、成都和南京三个真实城市移动数据集上的实验表明，SAGMTL相比最先进的基线方法取得了更优的整体性能。进一步分析表明，显式建模区域活跃性、连接状态和流量强度提高了动态稀疏OD需求预测的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: SAGMTL通过结构感知的多任务学习框架有效解决了动态稀疏OD需求预测的挑战，显式建模结构状态和流量强度能够提升预测性能，为智能交通系统中的OD需求预测提供了新思路。

title: Remember what you did?: Learning Behavioral Memories for Partially Observable Object Manipulation
summary: Long horizon, contact-rich manipulation is inherently partially observable. This is as a single visual observation rarely captures a robot's full action context, including prior attempts, interactions, or progress. Consequently, standard visuomotor policies or vision-language-action models are prone to struggle in such tasks due to a lack of memory. To address this, we introduce Compressed Action Memory Policy (CAMP) based on the insight that a robot's own action history serves as a highly informative, self-supervised signal, enabling the policy to learn a robust, compact history representation. In our approach, we train a memory module to maintain a compressed representation of past actions, forcing it to encode a latent behavioral memory of all the robot's past interactions that can then be used to better contextualize future actions. This allows our approach to implicitly track generalized task progress and learn from failed attempts without any additional supervision, or external oversight. We evaluate CAMP across four real-robot setups and two novel simulation benchmarks: Memory-T-Bench and Memory-Manip-Bench. By demonstrating substantial gains over state-of-the-art baselines, CAMP is, to our knowledge, the first policy to demonstrate substantial success on contact-rich partially observable manipulation tasks purely through learned memory.

AI.tldr: CAMP是一种基于压缩动作记忆的策略，通过自监督学习机器人动作历史的压缩表示，解决部分可观测的长时程接触式操作任务中的记忆问题。
AI.motivation: 长时程接触式操作任务本质上是部分可观测的，单次视觉观察难以捕捉完整的动作上下文（包括先前尝试、交互或进度）。标准的视觉运动策略或视觉-语言-动作模型由于缺乏记忆机制，在此类任务中表现不佳。
AI.method: 提出压缩动作记忆策略（CAMP），训练记忆模块维护过去动作的压缩表示，强制其编码机器人所有过去交互的潜在行为记忆，从而更好地为未来动作提供上下文。该方法无需额外监督或外部监督。
AI.result: 在四个真实机器人设置和两个新颖的仿真基准（Memory-T-Bench和Memory-Manip-Bench）上评估CAMP，相比最先进的基线方法取得了显著提升。
AI.conclusion: CAMP是首个通过纯学习记忆在接触式部分可观测操作任务中取得显著成功的策略，证明了压缩动作历史表示的有效性。

title: One Image is All You Need: Agentic One-Shot Image Generation via Text-Based World Models for Long-Tail Spatial Perception
summary: Reliable spatial decision automation, such as autonomous driving and maritime surveillance, critically depends on robust visual perception. However, real-world spatiotemporal data exhibits severe heterogeneity, often manifesting as extreme long-tail distributions for safety-critical scenarios. This data scarcity induces dataset shift that degrades detection performance and pose safety risks. While synthetic data generation offers a potential solution, existing generative approaches, such as diffusion models and Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs), often lack explicit spatial grounding and structural constraints, resulting in spatial and physical inconsistencies in generated scenes. To address these challenges, we introduce WMGen-v1, an agentic text-based world model framework for long-tail spatial data generation. WMGen-v1 employs a Large Vision-Language Model (LVLM) to construct a structured scene representation from a single reference image, while a Large Language Model (LLM) performs guidance-based scene expansion under physical plausibility and commonsense constraints. Subsequently, conditioned on the structured semantic representations produced by this reasoning process, a diffusion model generates diverse and physically grounded long-tail training data. Experiments on internal industrial datasets, ROADWork, and LaRS benchmarks demonstrate that WMGen-v1 outperforms baseline approaches. Notably, detectors trained solely on WMGen-v1 synthetic data approach real-only performance on aggregate dataset-level metrics, highlighting its potential to alleviate long-tail data scarcity for downstream spatial perception.

AI.tldr: WMGen-v1是一个基于代理的文本世界模型框架，用于生成长尾空间数据，通过结合大型视觉语言模型和大型语言模型来构建结构化场景表示，并利用扩散模型生成物理一致的长尾训练数据。
AI.motivation: 现实世界时空数据存在严重的异质性，表现为安全关键场景的极端长尾分布，导致数据集偏移和检测性能下降。现有生成方法（如扩散模型和GAN）缺乏明确的空间基础和结构约束，导致生成场景存在空间和物理不一致性。
AI.method: WMGen-v1采用大型视觉语言模型从单张参考图像构建结构化场景表示，大型语言模型在物理合理性和常识约束下执行基于指导的场景扩展，然后基于这些结构化语义表示，扩散模型生成多样且物理基础的长尾训练数据。
AI.result: 在内部工业数据集、ROADWork和LaRS基准测试中，WMGen-v1优于基线方法。仅使用WMGen-v1合成数据训练的检测器在聚合数据集级指标上接近仅使用真实数据的性能。
AI.conclusion: WMGen-v1能够有效缓解下游空间感知中的长尾数据稀缺问题，为可靠的空间决策自动化（如自动驾驶和海上监视）提供高质量的合成数据支持。

title: Demystifying Numerical Instability in LLM Inference: Achieving Reproducible Inference for Mission-Critical Tasks with HEAL
summary: As Large Language Models (LLMs) deploy into mission-critical domains (e.g., finance, medicine, and law), output reproducibility has become a strict system requirement. While practitioners use greedy decoding to eliminate algorithmic stochasticity, empirical deployments with 16-bit precisions still exhibit catastrophic output divergence across heterogeneous GPUs. Through SASS-level profiling, we reveal that this inconsistency is fundamentally driven by truncation errors introduced during downcasting at kernel boundaries. However, achieving reproducibility via a global FP32 pipeline incurs prohibitive system penalties: bypassing 16-bit hardware accelerators hurts compute efficiency, while upcasting the KV cache doubles memory overhead. To bridge this gap, we propose Hybrid Error ALleviation (HEAL), a targeted intervention that approximates FP32 precision while resolving hardware constraints through two targeted mechanisms. First, recognizing that floating-point formats underutilize their bit-width for Q, K, V tensors, HEAL applies INT16 quantization that preserves numerical stability without expanding the KV cache footprint. Second, HEAL synthesizes high-precision matrix multiplications via an algebraic error compensation strategy, executing entirely on high-throughput 16-bit Tensor Cores. To evaluate our approach practically, we introduce MCR-Bench, a benchmark targeting reproducibility in mission-critical tasks. HEAL achieves the same level of reproducibility on downstream tasks as the FP32 baseline while reducing the performance overhead by up to 7.1x.

AI.tldr: HEAL方法通过INT16量化和代数误差补偿策略，在保持KV缓存大小不变的情况下实现FP32级别的输出可重现性，同时利用16位张量核心减少7.1倍性能开销。
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型在金融、医疗、法律等关键任务领域部署，输出可重现性成为严格系统要求。虽然实践中使用贪婪解码消除算法随机性，但16位精度在异构GPU上的实际部署仍出现灾难性输出分歧。研究发现这种不一致性源于内核边界下转换引入的截断误差。
AI.method: 提出混合错误缓解（HEAL）方法：1）对Q、K、V张量应用INT16量化，在保持KV缓存占用不变的情况下保持数值稳定性；2）通过代数误差补偿策略合成高精度矩阵乘法，完全在16位张量核心上执行。
AI.result: HEAL在下游任务中实现了与FP32基线相同的可重现性水平，同时将性能开销减少高达7.1倍。提出的MCR-Bench基准测试针对关键任务中的可重现性。
AI.conclusion: HEAL通过针对性的干预措施，在保持KV缓存大小不变的情况下近似FP32精度，解决了硬件约束，为关键任务领域的大语言模型部署提供了实用的可重现性解决方案。

title: A scalar per patch from pre-trained ViTs enables fast moving navigation in the real world
comment: European Conference on Computer Vision -- ECCV 2026
summary: Trained policies for real-world robotics rely on computer vision components, typically in the form of pre-trained visual encoders. These encoders are an essential component and it has been shown that their power does not emerge from training on robotics downstream losses alone. Pre-training with auxiliary losses in the form of computer-vision pre-text tasks is a defining factor and heavily conditions agent performance in robotics tasks. In this unprecedented large-scale study, we ran 966 navigation episodes of static point goal navigation in a real-world building for 24km and asked which components really matter for the computer vision aspects of robotics: we evaluate state-of-the art visual encoders in realistic conditions. We explore the usefulness of heterogeneous multi-teacher distillation leading to encoders with multiple different and complementary skills. We investigate how much information from these encoders is necessary for robotics by bottlenecking them in a principled and spatially useful way and we show that this leads to the emergence of interpretable features linked to affordances. We also argue that training policies on RGB data alone does not lead to an optimal usage of visual features and show this by finetuning policies pre-trained on privileged information. All in all, we paint a more complete picture of what aspects of computer vision are relevant for real-world navigation.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过大规模真实世界导航实验（966个导航片段，24公里）系统评估了视觉编码器在机器人导航中的关键作用，探索了多教师蒸馏、特征瓶颈和特权信息预训练等方法对性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 机器人策略在真实世界中严重依赖预训练的视觉编码器，但这些编码器的能力并非仅通过机器人下游任务训练就能获得。计算机视觉预训练任务的辅助损失对机器人性能有决定性影响，但哪些视觉组件真正重要尚不明确。
AI.method: 1) 在真实建筑中进行大规模静态点目标导航实验；2) 评估最先进的视觉编码器在真实条件下的表现；3) 探索异构多教师蒸馏方法，获得具有互补技能的编码器；4) 通过有原则的空间瓶颈方法研究编码器信息量的必要性；5) 通过特权信息预训练策略，证明仅RGB数据训练的不足。
AI.result: 1) 多教师蒸馏产生了具有不同互补技能的编码器；2) 瓶颈方法导致了与可操作性相关的可解释特征的出现；3) 仅基于RGB数据训练策略无法最优利用视觉特征；4) 在特权信息上预训练再微调的策略表现更好；5) 为真实世界导航的计算机视觉需求提供了更全面的理解。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过大规模真实世界实验，系统揭示了计算机视觉组件在机器人导航中的关键作用，特别是多技能编码器、可解释特征提取和特权信息预训练的重要性，为机器人视觉系统的设计提供了重要见解。

title: UniSLAD: A Unified Framework for Structural and Logical Industrial Visual Anomaly Detection
comment: This work has been accepted for publication in the Proceedings of the 2026 IEEE International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering (CASE)
summary: Visual anomaly detection is a fundamental task in industrial automation. While existing approaches have achieved notable progress in identifying structural defects, the detection of logical anomalies remains relatively underexplored. In practice, structural and logical anomalies frequently co-occur in industrial workflows. Therefore, a solution capable of detecting both structural and logical anomalies is crucial for advancing comprehensive anomaly detection research. To address this limitation, we propose a unified framework, termed UniSLAD, which jointly addresses logical and structural anomalies without additional training, enabling a practical solution for dynamic industrial environments. First, we introduce a dual-feature extractor that synergistically integrates a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) backbone for local texture perception with a Transformer backbone for global contextual reasoning, yielding richer and more comprehensive representations. Building on this foundation, we design dual-granularity feature representation modules. At the patch level, memory banks enhanced by the Mahalanobis Transform (MT) preserve representative features and support more discriminative anomaly scoring. At the image level, distribution maps are aggregated using Lower-Upper Mean (LUM) and Power Mean Pooling (PMP), yielding a more robust global representation than conventional average pooling. Extensive experiments on the two industrial benchmarks demonstrate that UniSLAD achieves competitive performance in comprehensive anomaly detection, achieving 99.4% and 93.1%, respectively. Furthermore, ablation studies verify the individual contributions and effectiveness of each proposed component.

AI.tldr: UniSLAD是一个统一的视觉异常检测框架，能够同时检测结构性和逻辑性异常，无需额外训练，在工业基准测试中达到99.4%和93.1%的优异性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在检测结构性缺陷方面取得了进展，但对逻辑性异常的研究相对不足。在实际工业工作流中，结构性和逻辑性异常经常同时出现，因此需要一个能够同时检测这两种异常的综合解决方案。
AI.method:
1. 双特征提取器：结合CNN主干（局部纹理感知）和Transformer主干（全局上下文推理）
2. 双粒度特征表示模块：
- 补丁级：通过马氏变换增强的记忆库保存代表性特征
- 图像级：使用上下均值池化和幂均值池化聚合分布图
3. 统一的异常评分框架
AI.result: 在两个工业基准测试中，UniSLAD在综合异常检测方面取得了有竞争力的性能，分别达到99.4%和93.1%的检测率。消融研究验证了每个组件的贡献和有效性。
AI.conclusion: UniSLAD提供了一个实用的统一框架，能够同时处理结构性和逻辑性异常，适用于动态工业环境，无需额外训练，为全面的异常检测研究提供了重要进展。

title: An Efficient and Effective Architecture for Large-Scale Traffic Prediction via Geometry-Adaptive Square Partitioning
summary: Traffic prediction is a core task in intelligent transportation systems and urban-scale decision making. Despite the effectiveness of mainstream neural-network based methods, their deployment in real-world settings with thousands of traffic sensors is jeopardized severely by their poor computational scalability. To address this, the community has attempted to incorporate spatial database partitioning techniques (e.g., Grid, Quadtree, and K-D Tree) to improve model scalability. However, these approaches rely on handcrafted geometric heuristics and often produce irregular or imbalanced data partitions, leading to boundary fragmentation, excessive padding overheads, and degraded model accuracy. In this paper, we propose SqLinear, an efficient and effective architecture for large-scale traffic prediction. First, we design Square Partition, a geometry-adaptive algorithm that partitions massive traffic sensors into balanced, non-overlapping, and near-square spatial regions. Unlike existing heuristic-based designs, Square Partition is theoretically grounded and provides provable guarantees on aspect ratio, balance, and partition utilization, establishing a high-quality foundation for downstream spatiotemporal modeling. Next, we propose a Hierarchical Linear Interaction (HLI) module that abandons the costly attention mechanisms commonly used in Transformer-based spatio-temporal models. HLI efficiently captures both local intra-region dynamics and global inter-region dependencies through a lightweight linear interaction scheme, enabling effective spatiotemporal modeling with linear computational complexity. Extensive experiments on four large-scale traffic datasets and 10 baselines show that SqLinear reduces MAE by 2.30% on average under standard setting and by 5.81% under extreme scalability settings, while reducing training runtime by 13.27%--30.84% in spatial- and horizon-scaling scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出SqLinear架构，通过Square Partition算法将交通传感器划分为平衡、非重叠的近方形区域，并采用Hierarchical Linear Interaction模块以线性复杂度实现有效的时空建模，显著提升大规模交通预测的效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络方法在数千个交通传感器的实际部署中面临计算可扩展性差的问题。虽然社区尝试使用空间数据库分区技术（如Grid、Quadtree、K-D Tree）来改进模型可扩展性，但这些方法依赖手工几何启发式，常产生不规则或不平衡的数据分区，导致边界碎片化、填充开销过大和模型精度下降。
AI.method: 1. Square Partition算法：几何自适应算法，将大量交通传感器划分为平衡、非重叠、近方形的空间区域，提供长宽比、平衡性和分区利用率的理论保证。2. Hierarchical Linear Interaction模块：放弃Transformer中常用的昂贵注意力机制，通过轻量级线性交互方案有效捕捉区域内局部动态和区域间全局依赖，实现线性计算复杂度。
AI.result: 在4个大规模交通数据集和10个基线方法上的实验表明，SqLinear在标准设置下平均降低MAE 2.30%，在极端可扩展性设置下降低MAE 5.81%，同时在空间和时域扩展场景中减少训练运行时间13.27%-30.84%。
AI.conclusion: SqLinear通过理论保证的高质量空间分区和线性复杂度的层次线性交互模块，为大规模交通预测提供了高效且有效的解决方案，显著提升了计算可扩展性和预测准确性。

title: A UAV-Mounted Sensor Network for Close-Range Inspection of Wind Turbine Rotor Blades
comment: The Aerial Inspection for Marine Infrastructures (AIMI) workshop
summary:
Inspection of offshore wind turbine rotor blades is critical for predictive maintenance to maximise efficiency and extend operational lifetime. However, it remains a challenging task due to remote locations, large structural dimensions, and the limitations of current UAV-compatible sensor systems. While existing approaches can detect certain types of surface anomalies, reliable classification of defect types often remains a manual and error-prone process.
  This paper presents the design of a UAV-mounted multimodal sensor network combining an industrial RGB camera, a passive thermal infrared camera, and an in-house developed 3D scanner. All sensors are co-calibrated into a common coordinate frame, enabling spatial superimposition of geometric, colour, and thermal data. The system is designed to operate at close range, addressing three fundamental sensing challenges: platform motion, large field of view, and millimetre-level measurement accuracy. Preliminary laboratory results demonstrate synchronised multi-sensor acquisition and initial point cloud reconstructions, forming the basis for future airborne inspection trials.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种用于海上风力涡轮机叶片检测的无人机载多模态传感器网络，结合RGB相机、热红外相机和3D扫描仪，通过共同校准实现几何、颜色和热数据的空间叠加，以解决近距离检测中的平台运动、大视场和毫米级精度等挑战。
AI.motivation: 海上风力涡轮机叶片检测对预测性维护至关重要，但由于远程位置、大结构尺寸以及当前无人机兼容传感器系统的限制，这仍然是一个具有挑战性的任务。现有方法只能检测某些类型的表面异常，而缺陷类型的可靠分类通常仍然是手动且容易出错的过程。
AI.method: 设计了一个无人机载多模态传感器网络，结合工业RGB相机、被动热红外相机和内部开发的3D扫描仪。所有传感器都共同校准到一个共同的坐标系中，实现几何、颜色和热数据的空间叠加。该系统设计用于近距离操作，解决了三个基本传感挑战：平台运动、大视场和毫米级测量精度。
AI.result: 初步实验室结果展示了同步的多传感器采集和初始点云重建，为未来的空中检测试验奠定了基础。
AI.conclusion: 该多模态传感器系统为海上风力涡轮机叶片检测提供了一种创新的解决方案，通过数据融合提高了缺陷检测和分类的可靠性，为自动化预测性维护系统铺平了道路。

title: TriMotion: Modality-Agnostic Camera Control for Video Generation
summary: Camera motion control is essential for directing viewpoint changes in generative systems. However, existing methods typically condition the generation process on a single specific modality, such as explicit pose trajectories or reference videos, limiting their ability to support heterogeneous user inputs. To address this limitation, we present TriMotion, a modality-agnostic framework for camera-controlled video generation that maps video, pose, and text inputs, describing the same camera trajectory into a shared motion embedding space. Learning such a space requires synchronized supervision across modalities. Therefore, we build the Motion Triplet Dataset by extending a Multi-Cam Video Dataset with geometry-grounded motion descriptions derived from camera extrinsics. We further introduce a latent motion consistency objective that leverages the motion embedding space to encourage the generated video to follow the target camera trajectory directly in latent space, avoiding the cost of pixel-space decoding. Extensive experiments show that TriMotion generates high-quality videos that accurately follow the target camera trajectories across all three modalities. Beyond standard generation, the shared motion embedding space also enables flexible applications such as sequential motion composition and cross-modal motion interpolation.

AI.tldr: TriMotion是一个模态无关的相机控制视频生成框架，通过将视频、姿态和文本输入映射到共享运动嵌入空间，支持多种用户输入方式。
AI.motivation: 现有相机运动控制方法通常只支持单一特定模态（如明确姿态轨迹或参考视频），限制了用户使用异构输入的能力，需要更灵活的框架来支持多种输入方式。
AI.method: 构建TriMotion框架：1）将视频、姿态和文本输入映射到共享运动嵌入空间；2）创建Motion Triplet数据集，通过多相机视频数据集扩展，基于相机外参推导几何基础的运动描述；3）引入潜在运动一致性目标，利用运动嵌入空间直接在潜在空间鼓励生成视频遵循目标相机轨迹，避免像素空间解码成本。
AI.result: 实验表明TriMotion能生成高质量视频，在所有三种模态下都能准确跟随目标相机轨迹。此外，共享运动嵌入空间还支持顺序运动组合和跨模态运动插值等灵活应用。
AI.conclusion: TriMotion通过构建模态无关的共享运动嵌入空间，成功解决了现有相机控制视频生成方法对单一模态的依赖问题，实现了更灵活的用户输入支持和多样的应用场景。

title: Sim2O: Efficient Offline-to-Online MARL via Joint Action Composition
summary: Offline-to-online adaptation serves as a pivotal paradigm for mitigating the prohibitive cost of online exploration by bootstrapping reinforcement learning from offline datasets. While this paradigm has been extensively studied in single-agent settings, its extension to Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) remains largely unexplored, despite its critical relevance to complex coordinated decision-making. To bridge this gap, we introduce Sim2O, an elegant and minimalist framework for offline-to-online MARL. Rather than treating adaptation as a monolithic joint decision, Sim2O conceptualizes it as a compositional process. Specifically, candidate joint actions are synthesized by dynamically blending offline and online action proposals across agents. By leveraging a centralized value function to evaluate these hybrid combinations, Sim2O identifies high-value coordination strategies without requiring auxiliary training objectives or structural overhead. Empirical evaluations across diverse benchmarks demonstrate that Sim2O significantly outperforms existing baselines, underscoring that a minimalist design is not only viable but highly effective for multi-agent offline-to-online adaptation.

AI.tldr: Sim2O是一个简约的离线到在线多智能体强化学习框架，通过动态混合离线与在线动作提案来合成候选联合动作，利用集中价值函数评估这些混合组合，无需额外训练目标或结构开销。
AI.motivation: 离线到在线适应在单智能体强化学习中已被广泛研究，但在多智能体强化学习（MARL）中仍未被充分探索，尽管其在复杂协调决策中具有关键相关性。需要弥合这一研究空白。
AI.method: Sim2O将适应过程概念化为组合过程：通过动态混合各智能体的离线与在线动作提案来合成候选联合动作，利用集中价值函数评估这些混合组合，从而识别高价值协调策略。
AI.result: 在多样化基准测试中的实证评估表明，Sim2O显著优于现有基线方法，证明简约设计不仅可行，而且对多智能体离线到在线适应非常有效。
AI.conclusion: Sim2O为多智能体离线到在线强化学习提供了一个优雅简约的框架，通过将适应过程视为组合过程，无需额外训练目标或结构开销，就能有效识别高价值协调策略，在复杂协调决策中具有重要应用价值。

title: FleetAgent: Teleoperation Assistant for Autonomous Fleets via Vectorized V2N Messages
summary: Large-scale autonomous fleets rely on teleoperation to resolve rare failures, yet streaming raw sensor data from many vehicles is costly, and remote operators can only monitor a limited number of vehicles at a time. We introduce FleetAgent, a cloud-hosted multimodal large language model (MLLM) assistant that consumes compact vectorized vehicle-to-network (V2N) messages, such as map elements, detected objects, and the ego planned path. It provides a structured natural-language response (including narration, explanation, and evaluation of the plan and scene), along with an intervention urgency score for operator prioritization. To make structured messages compatible with token-based MLLMs, we propose VecFormer, a vector-to-embedding interface with differentiable top-K context selection that bounds context length and GPU KV-cache growth, enabling more efficient batch processing, which is important under the context of cloud-hosted large-scale fleet management. We also construct VecEval, a nuScenes-derived dataset with paired human and synthetic imperfect plans and human-verified language labels, to facilitate the training and evaluation of our proposed system. Our proposed system can reduce uplink payload by up to 625 times compared with raw images and reduce KV-cache memory by 16.54 times compared with original text descriptions. On VecEval, FleetAgent improves Lingo-Judge score by 16.8% and reduces intervention failure rate by 19.9%, compared with Qwen2.5-VL-7B using language descriptions. These results demonstrate that FleetAgent can utilize compact structured V2N messaging to enable efficient, explainable teleoperation monitoring for autonomous fleets.

AI.tldr: FleetAgent是一个基于多模态大语言模型的云托管系统，通过压缩的向量化V2N消息实现高效、可解释的自动驾驶车队远程监控，大幅降低上行数据量和计算资源消耗。
AI.motivation: 大规模自动驾驶车队依赖远程操作解决罕见故障，但原始传感器数据流传输成本高，且远程操作员同时监控车辆数量有限，需要更高效的监控解决方案。
AI.method: 提出FleetAgent系统，包含：1）VecFormer向量到嵌入接口，使用可微分的top-K上下文选择限制上下文长度和GPU KV缓存增长；2）VecEval数据集，基于nuScenes构建，包含人工和合成的不完善规划及人工验证的语言标签。
AI.result: 相比原始图像，上行负载降低625倍；相比原始文本描述，KV缓存内存减少16.54倍；在VecEval数据集上，Lingo-Judge分数提升16.8%，干预失败率降低19.9%。
AI.conclusion: FleetAgent能够利用紧凑的结构化V2N消息实现高效、可解释的车队远程操作监控，显著降低通信和计算成本，提高监控效率。

title: GroundShot: Visually Consistent Multi-Shot Long Video Generation via Entity-Grounded Shot Scheduling
summary: Generating visually consistent multi-shot videos remains an open challenge. As videos span more shots, inconsistencies can accumulate across shots, causing entities that reappear across shots -- characters, objects, and locations -- to drift away from how they first appear. We observe that viewers judge consistency by comparing each later appearance of an entity with its first clear appearance; the visual quality of this initial appearance sets the consistency ceiling for all that follows. Motivated by this, we present \textbf{GroundShot}, a training-free, model-agnostic agentic framework for entity-grounded multi-shot generation. GroundShot builds an entity-level visual memory online from accepted generated shots: it schedules shots' generation order by their expected usefulness as entity references, grounds entities from generated videos, verifies their reliability before adding them to memory, and retrieves suitable entity references from memory before each shot is generated. To evaluate this entity-centered view of consistency, we further introduce \textbf{GroundBench}, a diagnostic benchmark that measures consistency at the entity level while isolating controlled challenge dimensions. Experiments show that GroundShot improves multi-shot consistency over existing methods while requiring no additional training or model modification.

AI.tldr: GroundShot是一个无需训练、模型无关的智能体框架，通过构建实体级视觉记忆来提升多镜头视频生成中实体的一致性。
AI.motivation: 多镜头视频生成中，随着镜头增多，实体（角色、物体、场景）在不同镜头间会出现视觉漂移和不一致问题。研究发现观众通过比较实体首次清晰出现与后续出现来评判一致性，首次出现的视觉质量设定了后续一致性的上限。
AI.method: GroundShot是一个在线构建实体级视觉记忆的框架：1）按预期参考价值安排镜头生成顺序；2）从生成视频中提取实体；3）验证可靠性后加入记忆；4）在生成每个镜头前从记忆中检索合适的实体参考。无需额外训练或模型修改。
AI.result: 实验表明GroundShot相比现有方法能显著提升多镜头一致性，同时引入了GroundBench诊断基准来在实体层面测量一致性并隔离控制挑战维度。
AI.conclusion: 通过实体中心的视觉记忆框架，GroundShot有效解决了多镜头视频生成中的一致性累积问题，为评估和提升实体级一致性提供了新方法。

title: BASIL: Bayesian Application for Scientific Iteration and Learning
summary: We introduce BASIL, a user-friendly desktop application for process optimization. BASIL employs a Bayesian approach, incorporating special acquisition functions that can be used to solve both single and multi-objective optimization problems. It provides a graphical interface that enables users to input their experimental parameters, optimization objectives, and legacy data. This is then used to build surrogate models, which are coupled with acquisition functions to guide and optimize a process towards a desired objective. To facilitate model building, BASIL provides a variety of predefined surrogate model templates. BASIL can be used to optimize any arbitrary experiment or process with known, user-defined input variables, optimization objectives, and defined output.

AI.tldr: BASIL是一个基于贝叶斯方法的桌面应用，用于过程优化，支持单目标和多目标优化，提供图形界面和预定义代理模型模板。
AI.motivation: 开发一个用户友好的工具，使研究人员和工程师能够轻松地进行过程优化，无需深厚的优化算法知识，通过图形界面简化优化流程。
AI.method: 采用贝叶斯优化方法，结合专门的采集函数，构建代理模型，支持用户输入实验参数、优化目标和历史数据，提供预定义代理模型模板。
AI.result: 开发了BASIL桌面应用，能够优化任意实验或过程，只要用户定义了输入变量、优化目标和输出，提供了直观的图形界面。
AI.conclusion: BASIL是一个有效的过程优化工具，通过贝叶斯方法和用户友好界面，降低了优化技术的使用门槛，适用于各种实验和过程优化场景。

title: Ultra-Fusion: A Resilient Tightly-Coupled Multi-Sensor Fusion SLAM Framework under Sensor Degradation and Spatiotemporal Perturbation for Intelligent Transportation Systems
summary: Reliable localization is essential for intelligent transportation systems (ITS), including autonomous vehicles, quadruped last-mile carriers, and infrastructure-inspection unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs). Although tightly-coupled multi-sensor fusion improves accuracy in favorable conditions, deployed systems remain vulnerable to sensor degradation -- poor illumination, LiDAR degeneracy, wheel slippage, and GNSS outage -- and to spatiotemporal calibration errors. These failures are common in urban canyons, tunnels, and high-speed corridors, where localization drift can degrade route tracking, tunnel passage continuity, and local map alignment. This paper presents Ultra-Fusion, a tightly-coupled multi-sensor localization framework based on a unified sliding-window estimator. Asynchronous measurements are timestamp-ordered and converted into optional factors within one optimization window, supporting WIO, VIO, LIO, and LVIO with optional wheel and GNSS augmentation. Observability-aware initialization selects the bootstrap mode, factor-wise reliability scheduling gates degraded measurements, and online LiDAR--IMU spatiotemporal calibration refines temporal offsets and rotational extrinsics during operation. We extend the M3DGR benchmark with simulation trajectories and evaluate more than 60 open-source SLAM systems on M3DGR, M2DGR-Plus, KAIST, GrandTour, and MARS-LVIG. The results show competitive accuracy across wheeled, legged, and aerial platforms under long-duration and high-speed operation, degradation, and calibration perturbation, improving localization availability for road-level autonomy, campus and warehouse mobility, and low-altitude aerial inspection. To benefit the industrial and academic community, we will release source code and datasets upon paper acceptance.

AI.tldr: Ultra-Fusion是一个紧耦合多传感器定位框架，通过统一滑动窗口估计器处理异步测量，支持多种传感器组合，具备可观测性感知初始化、可靠性调度和在线标定功能，在多种平台和恶劣条件下实现高精度定位。
AI.motivation: 智能交通系统中的定位可靠性对自动驾驶、无人机等应用至关重要。现有紧耦合多传感器融合系统在良好条件下精度高，但在传感器退化（如光照差、激光雷达退化、轮子打滑、GNSS中断）以及时空标定误差等常见故障场景下仍很脆弱，这些故障在城市场景、隧道和高速走廊中经常发生，会导致定位漂移影响路径跟踪、隧道通过连续性和局部地图对齐。
AI.method: 提出Ultra-Fusion框架，基于统一滑动窗口估计器进行紧耦合多传感器定位。异步测量按时间戳排序并转换为优化窗口内的可选因子，支持WIO、VIO、LIO、LVIO以及可选轮式和GNSS增强。采用可观测性感知初始化选择引导模式，因子级可靠性调度门控退化测量，在线激光雷达-IMU时空标定在运行期间优化时间偏移和旋转外参。
AI.result: 在扩展的M3DGR基准测试中评估了60多个开源SLAM系统，包括M3DGR、M2DGR-Plus、KAIST、GrandTour和MARS-LVIG数据集。结果显示在轮式、腿式和空中平台的长时高速运行、传感器退化和标定扰动条件下，Ultra-Fusion具有竞争性的精度，提高了道路级自主性、校园仓库移动性和低空空中检查的定位可用性。
AI.conclusion: Ultra-Fusion是一个鲁棒的多传感器定位框架，通过统一估计器设计、可观测性感知初始化、可靠性调度和在线标定，在传感器退化和标定误差等现实挑战下保持高精度定位，为工业和研究社区提供了实用的解决方案。

title: NeoLoc-68: End-to-end 68-point neonatal facial landmark localisation in neonatal clinical environments
summary: Facial landmark localisation is a prerequisite for developing automated, non-contact neonatal pain assessment methods. Clinicians use pain scales to judge the severity of pain, many of which rely on facial expression. However, facial landmark detectors trained on adult faces perform poorly in neonatal clinical environments due to frequent occlusions caused by medical equipment, varied head poses, and challenging imaging conditions, including motion blur triggered by sudden pain-related movements. We propose an end-to-end facial landmark detector capable of predicting 68 landmarks on neonatal faces in clinical environments. We combined 37,459 single-face images from 11 public datasets, standardised to 68-point markup, with 1,123 manually annotated frames from a neonatal research dataset (totalling over 76,000 landmarks). A YOLO-based keypoint model was adapted to regress the facial landmarks, initialised with weights from a pretrained neonatal face detector. On public datasets, our proposed model achieved state-of-the-art performance: Normalised Mean Error (NME) = 5.37, Failure Rate (FR) = 12.5%, Area Under the Cumulative Error Curve (AUC) at AUC0.08 = 38.00% and AUC0.1 = 48.70%. On the clinical neonatal test set, before fine-tuning, the model achieved the lowest Detection Failure Rate (DFR) = 5.3% among all baselines and showed strong generalisation. After fine-tuning, performance improved further to NME = 6.36, FR = 22.30%, DFR = 1.77%, AUC0.08 = 29.24% and AUC0.1 = 40.25%. To the best of our knowledge, this represents the first end-to-end 68-point neonatal facial landmark detection model. With further dataset expansion and refinement, it could support downstream tasks in neonatal health monitoring and pain-related facial analysis.

AI.tldr: 提出首个端到端68点新生儿面部关键点检测模型，在临床环境中的新生儿面部识别上表现优异，支持新生儿健康监测和疼痛分析。
AI.motivation: 新生儿疼痛评估需要面部关键点定位，但现有基于成人面部训练的检测器在临床环境中表现不佳，主要受医疗设备遮挡、头部姿态变化和运动模糊等因素影响。
AI.method: 结合11个公共数据集的37,459张单脸图像和新生儿研究数据集的1,123张手动标注帧，构建超过76,000个关键点的数据集。采用基于YOLO的关键点模型，使用预训练新生儿人脸检测器权重初始化，回归68个面部关键点。
AI.result: 在公共数据集上达到SOTA性能：NME=5.37，FR=12.5%，AUC0.08=38.00%，AUC0.1=48.70%。在临床新生儿测试集上，微调前DFR=5.3%为所有基线中最低；微调后性能进一步提升：NME=6.36，FR=22.30%，DFR=1.77%，AUC0.08=29.24%，AUC0.1=40.25%。
AI.conclusion: 这是首个端到端68点新生儿面部关键点检测模型，在临床环境中表现良好，通过进一步数据集扩展和优化，可支持新生儿健康监测和疼痛相关面部分析的下游任务。

title: SLeDGe: Semi-Supervised Learning on Data Streams with Graph Structure Learning
summary: Semi-supervised learning (SSL) on data streams is challenging due to the continuous evolution of high-volume data and the scarcity of labels. Existing methods are limited in leveraging the intrinsic relationships among samples because they typically rely on fixed similarity measures or static graph structures, which cannot capture how relationships evolve over time. We propose SLeDGe, an SSL method for data streams that jointly learns a predictive model and an adaptive graph structure under strict memory and label constraints. SLeDGe maintains compact labeled and unlabeled memories using distinct update strategies, balancing rapid adaptation to novel features with the retention of historical consistency. In addition, by encouraging sparsity in the relational graph, SLeDGe filters out spurious connections and enables effective propagation of label supervision. Across 12 datasets, SLeDGe outperforms state-of-the-art competitors, achieving average relative accuracy gains of 31.7% with 0.1% labels and 14.8% with 1% labels.

AI.tldr: SLeDGe：一种用于数据流的半监督学习方法，通过联合学习预测模型和自适应图结构，在严格的内存和标签约束下处理持续演化的数据。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在利用样本间内在关系方面有限，因为它们通常依赖固定的相似性度量或静态图结构，无法捕捉关系随时间演化的特性。数据流中的半监督学习面临高容量数据的持续演化和标签稀缺的挑战。
AI.method: SLeDGe 在严格的内存和标签约束下，联合学习预测模型和自适应图结构。它使用不同的更新策略维护紧凑的标记和未标记记忆，平衡对新特征的快速适应和历史一致性的保留。通过鼓励关系图的稀疏性，过滤虚假连接并实现标签监督的有效传播。
AI.result: 在12个数据集上，SLeDGe 优于最先进的竞争对手，在0.1%标签下实现平均相对准确率提升31.7%，在1%标签下实现14.8%的提升。
AI.conclusion: SLeDGe 通过自适应图结构和联合学习框架，有效解决了数据流半监督学习中的关系演化问题，在严格资源约束下取得了显著性能提升。

title: A Human-Inspired Thumb-Index Robotic Hand with Strain Gauges Embedded in Soft Joints
summary: Human hand grasp adaptation depends mainly on the synergy between physical structure and biological feedback. Inspired by this biomechanical principle, the Safe Thumb-Index Robotic (STIR) Hand was developed as a minimal, lightweight, and low-cost two-digit prototype featuring an asymmetric thumb-index configuration. By pairing an underactuated, tendon-driven mechanical design with flexible strain gauges embedded into silicone-encapsulated soft joints, the system achieves passive grasp adaptation while establishing both internal proprioception and external perception. Unsupervised analysis was carried out on a dataset of the STIR hand grasping 20 different objects, along with an object classification task and an ablation study to highlight the contribution of the soft joint sensors. The object classification task discriminated object size, shape, and material stiffness with a high classification accuracy. In contrast to traditional industrial grippers and robotic hands, the STIR Hand demonstrates that sensorized compliant joints significantly improve overall sensitivity and ensure safe grasping, while remaining independent of additional fingertip tactile elements or external vision systems. Finally, a comparison to similar devices grasping identical objects validates the utility of the STIR Hand.

AI.tldr: STIR手是一种受生物力学启发的两指机器人手，采用非对称拇指-食指配置，通过软关节嵌入式传感器实现被动抓取适应和感知，无需额外触觉或视觉系统。
AI.motivation: 受人类手抓取适应机制启发，开发一种基于物理结构和生物反馈协同作用的轻量、低成本机器人手，实现安全抓取和感知能力。
AI.method: 采用非对称拇指-食指配置的欠驱动肌腱驱动机械设计，在硅胶封装软关节中嵌入柔性应变计，实现被动抓取适应和内外感知。
AI.result: STIR手成功抓取20种不同物体，软关节传感器显著提升系统灵敏度，物体分类任务在尺寸、形状和材料刚度识别上达到高准确率，无需额外触觉或视觉系统。
AI.conclusion: STIR手证明传感器化柔顺关节能显著提升整体灵敏度并确保安全抓取，相比传统工业夹持器和机器人手具有优势，验证了其实际应用价值。

title: From Uncertainty to Stability and Fidelity: Guiding Sparse-View 3D Gaussian Splatting with Fisher Information
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has emerged as a promising technique for novel view synthesis. However, 3DGS requires dense input views to achieve high-quality rendering. In sparse-view scenarios, 3DGS often prones to overfitting, resulting in noticeable artifacts and degraded rendering quality. Previous methods explore to address this issue by introducing additional priors (e.g. depth priors) or integrating regularization techniques (e.g. Dropout). However, these methods are often applied without principled guidance. In particular, prior-based augmentation typically samples novel viewpoints randomly, while Dropout-based regularization randomly removes Gaussians. The compounded randomness introduces uncertainty and instability, limiting the fidelity of novel view synthesis. In this paper, we propose a novel method for sparse-view 3DGS that incorporates Fisher Information to quantitatively guide the utilization of geometric priors and regularization. Specifically, our method comprises two key components: (1) Stereo augmentation with Fisher Information. By leveraging Fisher Information, we actively select most informative supporting views and use depth priors to curate reliable pseudo ground truths, which reduces randomness in augmentation and improves stability and rendering fidelity; (2) Uncertainty-aware regularization. We reduce the instability of Dropout-based regularization by using Fisher Information to quantitatively measure the uncertainty of each 3D Gaussian, and adaptively adjust the removal probability, leading to more stable and effective regularization. With these two components, our method effectively mitigates overfitting and improves the stability of optimization in sparse-view 3DGS, resulting in superior rendering fidelity. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in sparse-view novel view synthesis benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Fisher信息的新方法，用于解决稀疏视角下3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）的过拟合问题，通过信息引导的立体增强和不确定性感知正则化，显著提升了渲染质量。
AI.motivation: 3DGS在稀疏视角下容易过拟合，导致伪影和渲染质量下降。现有方法（如深度先验、Dropout）缺乏原则性指导，随机性引入不确定性和不稳定性，限制了新视角合成的保真度。
AI.method: 提出两个核心组件：1）基于Fisher信息的立体增强：主动选择信息量最大的支持视角，利用深度先验生成可靠伪真值，减少增强的随机性；2）不确定性感知正则化：使用Fisher信息量化每个3D高斯的不确定性，自适应调整移除概率，实现更稳定的正则化。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，该方法在稀疏视角新视角合成基准测试中达到了最先进的性能，有效缓解了过拟合问题，提升了优化稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 通过Fisher信息定量指导几何先验和正则化的使用，提出的方法显著改善了稀疏视角3DGS的渲染保真度，为相关领域提供了更稳定、高效的解决方案。

title: Enhancing Differentially Private Mechanisms via Empirical Bayes
summary: Differential privacy (DP) has become the gold standard for ensuring the privacy protection of machine learning and statistical algorithms in recent decades. A plethora of algorithms and methods have been developed to enhance the utility of DP algorithms while maintaining the same level of DP. However, these are often overly complex or computationally ineffective. We propose a novel approach focusing on denoising the output of the simple additive Gaussian mechanism by adopting the idea of \textit{empirical Bayes estimation}. We highlight that the empirical Bayes approach can reduce the mean-squared error solely by taking the output of the Gaussian mechanism as input. Our numerical studies show that this simple yet powerful approach can be applied to improve upon various statistical problems, including histogram release, principal component analysis, and linear regression, often outperforming existing private algorithms.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于经验贝叶斯估计的新方法，通过去噪简单加性高斯机制的输出来提高差分隐私算法的效用，在多个统计问题中表现优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 差分隐私已成为机器学习隐私保护的标准，但现有方法往往过于复杂或计算效率低下。作者旨在通过更简单有效的方法提高差分隐私算法的效用。
AI.method: 采用经验贝叶斯估计方法，对简单加性高斯机制的输出进行去噪处理，仅以高斯机制输出作为输入即可降低均方误差。
AI.result: 数值研究表明该方法可应用于直方图发布、主成分分析和线性回归等多种统计问题，通常优于现有的隐私算法。
AI.conclusion: 经验贝叶斯方法是一种简单而强大的差分隐私改进方法，能有效提高隐私保护算法的效用而不增加复杂性。

title: Spectral GS-SLAM: Observability-Aware, Degeneracy-Robust Tracking for Real-Time 3D Gaussian Splatting SLAM
comment: This work has been accepted to IROS 2026
summary: Recent 3DGS-SLAM systems enable real-time operation by leveraging conventional feature matching or ICP-based tracking, thereby avoiding the heavy dense photometric optimization used in earlier approaches. However, feature matching remains prone to failure in textureless environments, while ICP-based tracking struggles in structureless or geometrically degenerate scenes due to ill-conditioned optimization. To address this issue, we propose Spectral GS-SLAM, an efficient yet robust tracking framework that integrates ICP with complementary feature-based constraints. Our method mitigates numerical instability by adaptively compensating under-constrained directions in degenerate scenarios, without interfering with the shared Gaussian representation used for mapping. We further introduce a Gaussian-aware planarity weighting mechanism that exploits the intrinsic covariance structure of 3D Gaussians to characterize scene geometry and guide information fusion. Extensive evaluations on challenging TUM RGB-D sequences demonstrate that Spectral GS-SLAM achieves real-time performance (40.14 FPS) while maintaining consistent tracking in both structureless and featureless environments. The proposed method preserves trajectory integrity in degenerate scenes while maintaining competitive performance in non-adverse conditions.

AI.tldr: Spectral GS-SLAM：一种高效且鲁棒的3D高斯SLAM框架，通过结合ICP与特征约束，在无纹理和无结构场景中实现稳定跟踪，同时保持实时性能。
AI.motivation: 现有3DGS-SLAM系统依赖特征匹配或ICP跟踪，但在无纹理环境中特征匹配易失效，在无结构场景中ICP跟踪因优化病态而失败。需要一种能同时处理这两种退化场景的鲁棒跟踪方法。
AI.method: 提出Spectral GS-SLAM框架：1）集成ICP与互补的特征约束；2）通过自适应补偿退化场景中的欠约束方向来缓解数值不稳定性；3）引入高斯感知的平面性加权机制，利用3D高斯的内在协方差结构表征场景几何并指导信息融合。
AI.result: 在具有挑战性的TUM RGB-D序列上评估，实现实时性能（40.14 FPS），在无结构和无特征环境中均保持一致的跟踪。在退化场景中保持轨迹完整性，同时在非不利条件下保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: Spectral GS-SLAM通过结合ICP和特征约束，有效解决了现有方法在纹理或结构退化场景中的局限性，实现了高效且鲁棒的实时SLAM系统。

authors: Eduardo Moreno Judice de Mattos Farina
title: Translating Inference-Time Control to Radiology Vision-Language Models: Activation Steering for Pneumonia Classification on Chest X-rays
summary: Inference-time engineering can alter model behavior without fine-tuning. However, its utility for improving diagnostic performance in medical vision-language models (VLMs) remains unclear. We aim to evaluate whether Contrastive Activation Addition (CAA) can improve pneumonia classification in chest radiograph VLMs without updating model weights. Three frozen chest radiograph VLMs (MedGemma-4B-IT, NV-Reason-CXR-3B, and CheXOne-3B) were evaluated on the public Kermany pneumonia test set. Classification was based on the logits of the tokens Yes and No under a binary prompt. Steering vectors included a 30-pair answer-bias control, a 30-pair pneumonia text contrast, and an image-conditioned contrast derived from 30 pneumonia and 30 normal development images. A deterministic 200-image development set was used for layer and scale selection (100 images) and threshold calibration (100 images). Performance was assessed using ROC-AUC, PR-AUC, F1 score, threshold analyses, reverse-vector controls, random-vector controls, and conditional bootstrap confidence intervals. Fixed-threshold F1 improvements were frequently observed but did not consistently indicate improved diagnostic performance. For MedGemma-4B-IT. NV-Reason-CXR-3B showed the strongest benefit: calibrated F1 improved from 0.7692 in the zero-shot setting to 0.8619 with pneumonia-text steering and to 0.8727 with image-conditioned steering. For CheXOne-3B, pneumonia-text steering increased calibrated F1 from 0.8528 to 0.8666, although the confidence interval crossed zero. On this public pneumonia benchmark, CAA substantially altered prediction score distributions and operating characteristics without fine-tuning. Meaningful performance gains were observed in one of three evaluated VLMs, suggesting that activation steering may serve as a lightweight approach for adapting medical VLM behavior.

AI.tldr: 评估对比激活添加（CAA）能否在不更新模型权重的情况下提升胸部X光视觉语言模型（VLM）的肺炎分类性能。研究发现CAA能显著改变预测分数分布和操作特性，但仅在部分模型中观察到有意义的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 推理时工程可以在不微调的情况下改变模型行为，但其在医学视觉语言模型中改善诊断性能的效用尚不明确。本研究旨在评估对比激活添加（CAA）能否在不更新模型权重的情况下提升胸部X光VLM的肺炎分类性能。
AI.method: 使用三个冻结的胸部X光VLM（MedGemma-4B-IT、NV-Reason-CXR-3B和CheXOne-3B）在公开的Kermany肺炎测试集上进行评估。分类基于二元提示下"Yes"和"No"标记的logits。使用30对答案偏置控制、30对肺炎文本对比以及30张肺炎和30张正常开发图像生成的图像条件对比作为引导向量。使用200张图像的确定性开发集进行层和尺度选择（100张）以及阈值校准（100张）。
AI.result: 固定阈值F1改进经常被观察到，但并不能一致表明诊断性能的改善。NV-Reason-CXR-3B显示出最强的效益：校准F1从零样本设置的0.7692提升到肺炎文本引导的0.8619和图像条件引导的0.8727。CheXOne-3B中肺炎文本引导将校准F1从0.8528提升到0.8666，但置信区间跨越零。CAA显著改变了预测分数分布和操作特性，无需微调。
AI.conclusion: 在这个公开的肺炎基准测试中，CAA在不进行微调的情况下显著改变了预测分数分布和操作特性。在三个评估的VLM中，只有一个观察到了有意义的性能提升，这表明激活引导可能作为适应医学VLM行为的轻量级方法。

title: Chem2Gen-Bench: Benchmarking Chemical-to-Genetic Translation in Perturbation Response Space
summary: Virtual-cell and perturbation models are increasingly used to predict cellular responses for biomedical discovery, but chemical and genetic perturbations are not automatically interchangeable. Existing evaluations often study chemical response prediction or genetic perturbation prediction separately, leaving target-matched chemical-to-genetic translation under-tested. We introduce Chem2Gen-Bench, a benchmark comprising 260,084 chemical and 1,099,045 genetic perturbation profiles organized into cell-target contexts, and evaluate pairwise alignment, retrieval, protocol covariate associations, feature spaces, and foundation-model embeddings. Across matched contexts, translation fidelity is measurable but heterogeneous; background adjustment increases the association between pairwise similarity and retrieval success, while paired tests show lower mean retrieval success after adjustment under the evaluated settings. In a target-matched K562 audit, the evaluated foundation-model embeddings did not consistently improve over gene-delta baselines. Chem2Gen-Bench provides an auditable framework for testing when chemical and genetic perturbations align around shared targets and when representation gains are supported by matched perturbation evidence.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了Chem2Gen-Bench基准测试，用于评估化学扰动与遗传扰动在共享靶点下的可互换性，发现翻译保真度存在异质性，基础模型嵌入在K562细胞系中未显著优于基因差异基线。
AI.motivation: 虚拟细胞和扰动模型在生物医学发现中用于预测细胞反应，但化学扰动和遗传扰动并非自动可互换。现有评估通常分别研究化学反应预测或遗传扰动预测，导致靶点匹配的化学-遗传转换测试不足。
AI.method: 提出Chem2Gen-Bench基准测试，包含260,084个化学扰动和1,099,045个遗传扰动配置文件，按细胞-靶点上下文组织。评估了成对对齐、检索、协议协变量关联、特征空间和基础模型嵌入。
AI.result: 在匹配的上下文中，翻译保真度可测量但存在异质性；背景调整增加了成对相似性与检索成功之间的关联，但在评估设置下，配对测试显示调整后平均检索成功率较低。在靶点匹配的K562审计中，评估的基础模型嵌入未一致优于基因差异基线。
AI.conclusion: Chem2Gen-Bench提供了一个可审计的框架，用于测试化学和遗传扰动何时围绕共享靶点对齐，以及何时表示增益得到匹配扰动证据的支持。

title: RogueRover: Autonomous Rogue Device Localization for Incident Response
comment: 14 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables. Code and data are available in the accompanying artifact repository
summary: Physically localizing unauthorized wireless devices remains a critical bottleneck in cyber-physical security operations, where rogue access points can provide entry points for lateral movement and persistent compromise. While such devices can often be detected through network-side mechanisms, determining their physical location typically requires dense sensing infrastructure, site-specific RF fingerprinting, or manual inspection, limiting timely incident response. We investigate whether a single commodity robot can autonomously detect and localize rogue wireless devices under zero-configuration constraints, without RF fingerprinting, pre-installed sensors, or site calibration. We present RogueRover, an end-to-end system in which a quadruped robot autonomously patrols, collects spatially labeled RSSI measurements via a standard 802.11 interface, and estimates device locations offline. We evaluate the system across 11 patrol runs in a real indoor environment, with 6 rogue devices deployed under heterogeneous propagation conditions. Across 62 AP-patrol sessions, RogueRover achieves a median single-patrol localization error of 1.62 m without prior RF knowledge. Under multi-run aggregation, five of six devices are localized within 1 m. A blind trial validates the full pipeline, correctly identifying rogue devices among 73 observed BSSIDs and localizing them with errors of 0.34 m and 1.84 m. Across environments, simple weighted-centroid estimators perform comparably to, or better than, parametric path-loss models, indicating that measurement coverage from autonomous patrols is the primary determinant of localization accuracy under zero-prior constraints. Our results demonstrate that infrastructure-free, autonomous localization is feasible in practice, enabling rapid physical incident response in cyber-physical environments without additional sensing infrastructure.

AI.tldr: RogueRover系统使用四足机器人自主巡逻，通过标准802.11接口收集空间标记的RSSI测量值，在零配置、无RF指纹或站点校准条件下定位未授权无线设备。
AI.motivation: 未授权无线设备的物理定位是网络物理安全的关键瓶颈，传统方法需要密集传感基础设施、站点特定RF指纹或人工检查，限制了及时的事件响应能力。
AI.method: RogueRover系统使用单个商品四足机器人自主巡逻，通过标准802.11接口收集空间标记的RSSI测量值，采用加权质心估计器和参数路径损耗模型进行离线设备位置估计。
AI.result: 在真实室内环境中11次巡逻运行中，对6个未授权设备进行测试。单次巡逻中值定位误差为1.62米，多运行聚合后5/6设备定位在1米内。盲测中从73个BSSID中正确识别未授权设备，定位误差0.34米和1.84米。
AI.conclusion: 自主巡逻的测量覆盖是零先验约束下定位精度的主要决定因素，加权质心估计器性能与参数路径损耗模型相当或更好。基础设施免费、自主定位在实践中可行，无需额外传感基础设施即可实现快速物理事件响应。

title: Stochastic Signed Distance Processes
summary: Multi-view surface reconstruction is a core problem in computer vision. One prominent line of work represents the surface implicitly as a signed distance field (SDF), optimizing it based on the photometric loss between rendered and observed pixel colors. These approaches typically employ SDF-based volume rendering to obtain a differentiable relaxation of discontinuous visibility along rays, thereby reducing reliance on silhouette supervision. In this paper, we reformulate SDF-based volume rendering as probabilistic surface rendering, where each pixel color is modeled as a mixture distribution induced by the random first ray-surface intersection. To this end, we introduce Stochastic Signed Distance Processes (SSDP), which model the SDF along each ray as a stochastic process, inducing a first-passage-time distribution for each ray. We then derive the first-passage probability for each sampling interval based on Bayesian filtering, together with its practical approximation for parallel rendering. We further show that NeuS, an existing SDF-based volume rendering method, arises as a special case of our formulation. Experiments on the DTU and MobileBrick datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms baselines in both surface reconstruction and uncertainty quantification, supporting the effectiveness of our first-passage formulation. Our code is available at https://github.com/skmhrk1209/SSDP.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新的多视角表面重建方法SSDP，将SDF体渲染重新表述为概率表面渲染，通过随机有符号距离过程建模射线与表面的首次相遇分布，在表面重建和不确定性量化方面优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于SDF的体渲染方法虽然通过可微的可见性松弛减少了对轮廓监督的依赖，但缺乏对射线-表面首次相遇的显式概率建模。作者希望建立更严谨的概率框架来改进表面重建和不确定性量化。
AI.method: 提出随机有符号距离过程（SSDP），将每条射线上的SDF建模为随机过程，推导出首次相遇时间的分布。基于贝叶斯滤波计算每个采样区间的首次相遇概率，并设计了适用于并行渲染的实用近似方法。
AI.result: 在DTU和MobileBrick数据集上的实验表明，该方法在表面重建精度和不确定性量化方面均优于基线方法（包括NeuS等现有SDF体渲染方法）。
AI.conclusion: SSDP通过将SDF体重新表述为概率表面渲染，提供了更严谨的首次相遇时间建模框架，在表面重建和不确定性量化方面取得了更好的性能，NeuS可作为该框架的特例。

title: What Accuracy and Gradient Cosine Miss: Evaluating Feedback Alignment via Scale Stability, Reference Validity, and Depth Utility
summary: Despite the success of deep learning, training deep networks in biologically plausible and hardware-efficient ways remains an open challenge. Feedback alignment (FA) methods address this by replacing backpropagation's symmetric backward weights with fixed random matrices, but their effectiveness depends critically on whether they can be accurately evaluated. The standard evaluation relies on two quantities: task accuracy and cosine similarity between the method's credit signal and the backpropagation gradient. We show that this reporting pair is insufficient by identifying two independent failure modes, both silent under current reporting: (1) measurement degeneracy, where the BP reference gradient collapses to the numerical floor in terminal-LayerNorm residual architectures, rendering cosine uninterpretable; and (2) aggregation collapse, where the aggregate cosine masks layerwise heterogeneity that concentrates credit at one end of the network. To address these limitations, we propose a diagnostic evaluation protocol based on three checks -- scale stability, reference validity, and depth utility -- together with per-layer rather than aggregate cosine reporting. Across multiple architectures and methods, the standard reporting pair gives no signal of failure in any audited case, while our protocol identifies all failures with wide calibration margins. The two failure modes are causally independent: a per-block scale penalty alleviates Mode 1 (residual scale explosion driving reference collapse) without affecting Mode 2 (cosine ranking that contradicts every functional metric we measured). Identifying these silent failures prevents researchers from building on non-functional credit assignment and provides actionable guidance for developing FA methods that genuinely train deep layers.

AI.tldr: 该论文指出当前反馈对齐方法评估存在不足，提出了新的诊断评估协议来检测两种独立但被现有评估掩盖的失败模式。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习取得了成功，但在生物合理性和硬件效率方面训练深度网络仍然是一个开放挑战。反馈对齐方法通过用固定随机矩阵替代反向传播的对称后向权重来解决这一问题，但其有效性关键取决于能否准确评估。当前标准评估方法存在不足，无法检测到两种独立的失败模式。
AI.method: 提出了基于三个检查的诊断评估协议：尺度稳定性、参考有效性和深度效用，以及逐层而非聚合余弦报告。通过分析多种架构和方法，识别了两种独立失败模式：测量退化（在终端层归一化残差架构中BP参考梯度崩溃）和聚合崩溃（聚合余弦掩盖了层间异质性）。
AI.result: 标准报告对任何审计案例都没有给出失败信号，而新协议能够以宽校准裕度识别所有失败。两种失败模式因果独立：逐块尺度惩罚可以缓解模式1（残差尺度爆炸导致参考崩溃），但不影响模式2（与所有功能指标相矛盾的余弦排名）。
AI.conclusion: 识别这些静默失败可以防止研究人员基于非功能性的信用分配进行构建，并为开发真正能够训练深层网络的反馈对齐方法提供可操作的指导。新的诊断评估协议比当前标准评估方法更全面有效。

title: NAC: Neural Action Codec for Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision-language-action (VLA) models rely on discrete action tokenizers to bridge continuous robot control and autoregressive sequence modeling, yet existing tokenizers often trade off between compression, latency, and downstream performance. We revisit this design through the lens of neural audio codecs-convolutional encoder-decoder architectures with residual vector quantization that serve as the standard front end for audio foundation models. Motivated by their success, we introduce the Neural Action Codec (NAC), which treats short robot action trajectories as multi-channel 1D signals and compresses them using a multi-scale RVQGAN architecture. We observe that audio-specific mel-spectrogram objectives are ill-suited for kinematic signals; however, by replacing them with simple time-domain and non-mel spectral reconstruction losses, audio-codec-style models can autoencode actions with high fidelity without substantial architectural changes. NAC provides a compact, ordered token space via offset codebooks, enabling standard autoregressive policies to operate over short, structured sequences. Meanwhile, a Vocos-style decoder with an ISTFT head and adversarial discriminators recovers smooth, detailed trajectories. Across LIBERO-10, RoboMimic, and a suite of real-world manipulation tasks, NAC achieves lower reconstruction error and higher success rates than binning, FAST, and prior VQ-based tokenizers at comparable or better compression rates. These results demonstrate that repurposed neural audio codecs offer a strong, practical backbone for learned action tokenization in modern VLAs.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种名为NAC（神经动作编解码器）的新型动作标记化方法，通过重新利用神经音频编解码器架构来处理机器人动作轨迹，在压缩率、延迟和下游性能之间取得了更好的平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型使用的离散动作标记器在压缩、延迟和下游性能之间存在权衡问题。受音频基础模型中神经音频编解码器成功的启发，作者希望将类似架构应用于机器人动作轨迹的编码。
AI.method: 将短机器人动作轨迹视为多通道1D信号，使用多尺度RVQGAN架构进行压缩。用简单的时间域和非梅尔频谱重构损失替代音频特定的梅尔频谱目标函数，通过偏移码本提供紧凑有序的标记空间，并使用带有ISTFT头和对抗判别器的Vocos风格解码器恢复平滑轨迹。
AI.result: 在LIBERO-10、RoboMimic和真实世界操作任务中，NAC相比分箱法、FAST和先前基于VQ的标记器，在可比较或更好的压缩率下实现了更低的重构误差和更高的成功率。
AI.conclusion: 重新设计的神经音频编解码器为现代VLA模型中的学习动作标记化提供了强大实用的骨干架构，证明了音频编解码器架构在机器人动作处理中的适用性。

title: FOCA: Future-Oriented Conditioning for Data-Efficient Vision-Language-Action Adaptation
comment: Accepted at ICML 2026. Project page: https://focavla.github.io/
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models enable general-purpose robotic control via large-scale multimodal pretraining, yet their effectiveness under few-shot imitation learning remains limited. We conduct a systematic stress test of state-of-the-art VLA models and show that performance degrades sharply as demonstrations are reduced, revealing a key weakness of existing adaptation strategies. To address this, we introduce FOCA, a future-oriented conditioning framework for data-efficient VLA adaptation. FOCA combines explicit prediction of task-grounded future interaction embeddings with implicit alignment to future goal observations, enabling long-horizon reasoning in latent space without pixel-level prediction. This formulation naturally supports action-free co-training with synthetic videos from video world models and can be interpreted as learning a future-conditioned value-like representation. Extensive experiments demonstrate FOCA achieves 95.7% success with 20 demonstrations on LIBERO, improves 7-12% on RoboCasa, and delivers up to 26% absolute gains on real robots, establishing a new state of the art in few-shot VLA adaptation.

AI.tldr: FOCA：一种面向未来的条件化框架，通过预测任务相关的未来交互嵌入和对齐未来目标观察，在少量演示下显著提升VLA模型的适应性能
AI.motivation: 当前Vision-Language-Action (VLA)模型在少量演示的模仿学习中表现有限，性能随演示减少而急剧下降，现有适应策略存在关键弱点
AI.method: 提出FOCA框架，结合显式预测任务相关的未来交互嵌入和隐式对齐未来目标观察，在潜在空间进行长时程推理，无需像素级预测。支持与视频世界模型生成的合成视频进行无动作协同训练，可解释为学习未来条件化的价值类表示
AI.result: 在LIBERO上仅用20个演示达到95.7%成功率，在RoboCasa上提升7-12%，在真实机器人上实现高达26%的绝对增益，建立了少量演示VLA适应的新SOTA
AI.conclusion: FOCA通过未来导向的条件化框架，有效解决了VLA模型在少量演示下的适应问题，显著提升了数据效率和长时程推理能力

title: Horizon Adaptive Offline Policy Learning via Value Stitching
summary: Learning accurate value functions plays a decisive role for reinforcement learning (RL) agents to solve long-horizon, complex tasks. Conventional temporal-difference (TD) learning objectives suffer from value-estimation bias that accumulates over the horizon, while extended-horizon modeling methods, such as n-step TD backups and Q-chunking, adopt a rigid, fixed-horizon value-modeling recipe that is often not flexible enough to capture complex value structures in long-horizon, multi-stage tasks. In this paper, we show that enabling value updates with dynamic horizon composition can yield a strong offline policy learning scheme. Our method, Horizon Adaptive Offline Policy Learning via VAlue STitching (VAST), replaces fixed-horizon backups with recursive, horizon-adaptive value composition. Its key ingredient is to couple value optimization with a future state- and horizon-length-conditioned auxiliary value function that is learned through direct data supervision, and a stitching policy that optimally selects the reward-maximizing horizon length and future sub-goal to achieve horizon-adaptive value stitching. This design enables direct estimation and compositional "stitching" of variable-length returns grounded in actionable sub-goal states, providing an accurate and greedily exploitable value-supervision signal for offline policy optimization. Across 50 tasks on OGBench, VAST outperforms fixed-step, extended-horizon methods, and generative-value offline RL baselines, achieving strong performance particularly in high-complexity, long-horizon decision-making tasks.

AI.tldr: VAST 提出了一种动态视野组合的价值学习方法，通过可执行的子目标状态实现可变长度回报的直接估计和"缝合"，为离线策略优化提供准确且可贪心利用的价值监督信号。
AI.motivation: 传统TD学习存在价值估计偏差累积问题，而固定视野的扩展视野建模方法（如n步TD备份和Q-chunking）不够灵活，难以捕捉长视野、多阶段任务中的复杂价值结构。
AI.method: VAST 通过递归的、视野自适应的价值组合替代固定视野备份。核心是耦合价值优化与一个基于未来状态和视野长度的辅助价值函数（通过直接数据监督学习），以及一个缝合策略，该策略最优选择奖励最大化的视野长度和未来子目标，实现视野自适应的价值缝合。
AI.result: 在OGBench的50个任务上，VAST超越了固定步长的扩展视野方法和生成式价值离线RL基线，特别是在高复杂度、长视野的决策任务中表现出色。
AI.conclusion: 通过动态视野组合进行价值更新能够产生强大的离线策略学习方案，VAST 通过直接估计和组合可执行子目标状态的可变长度回报，提供了准确且可贪心利用的价值监督信号。

title: Long-Distance Real-World Navigation of the Legged-Wheeled Robot Go2-W Using Deep Reinforcement Learning
