In this work, we propose Hierarchical Block-Local Learning (HBLL), a framework that decomposes deep neural networks into hierarchically linked blocks trained using local learning objectives derived from variational principles, eliminating the need for full end-to-end backpropagation while maintaining effective information propagation across the network. HBLL is the first algorithm that is able to train deep neural networks in $\mathcal{O}(\log N)$ parallel time complexity, where $N$ is the number of network layers. We show that HBLL implicitly defines a family of subnetworks corresponding to different hierarchical paths, enabling flexible inference with different effective numbers of layers. We evaluate HBLL on a set of challenging vision and language modeling tasks, achieving competitive performance. We also extend HBLL to recurrent sequence architectures, applying to settings that otherwise rely on backpropagation through time.

AI.tldr: HBLL是一种分层块局部学习框架，通过变分原理分解深度神经网络为分层链接的块，无需端到端反向传播即可训练，实现O(log N)并行时间复杂度的深度网络训练。
AI.motivation: 传统反向传播存在两个主要限制：锁定（层间更新严格依赖无法并行）和权重传输问题（需要对称的前向和后向路径），这些限制了并行性、增加了内存和通信开销，对可扩展学习构成挑战。
AI.method: 提出分层块局部学习（HBLL）框架，将深度神经网络分解为分层链接的块，使用基于变分原理的局部学习目标进行训练，消除端到端反向传播需求，同时保持网络间的有效信息传播。
AI.result: HBLL是首个能够以O(log N)并行时间复杂度训练深度神经网络的算法，其中N是网络层数。在具有挑战性的视觉和语言建模任务上实现了竞争性性能，并扩展到循环序列架构。
AI.conclusion: HBLL通过分层块局部学习解决了反向传播的锁定和权重传输问题，实现了高效的并行训练，为可扩展深度学习提供了新途径。

title: Full Nonlinear Nonholonomic Dynamics and Motion Analysis of a 3-DoF Underactuated Spherical Rolling Robot
summary: This paper presents a full nonlinear constrained dynamic model of MonoRollBot, a novel 3-DoF spherical rolling robot driven by a single motor, a lead-screw transmission, and a spring-coupled internal moving mass, together with motion analysis of its behavior. To the best of our knowledge, this is one of the first full nonlinear nonholonomic models reported for a mono-actuated, super-underactuated spherical rolling robot of this kind. Because rolling without slipping is nonholonomic, the dynamics are derived using the Lagrange--d'Alembert formulation, with the lead-screw relation imposed as a holonomic constraint and the rolling condition imposed in Pfaffian form. The formulation retains the complete generalized coordinates of shell translation, shell attitude, screw travel, nut rotation, and radial mass motion. Simulations and representative motion studies show qualitative agreement with prototype behavior and reveal how gravity, compliance, and inertia jointly shape the locomotion and motion capabilities of this strongly underactuated robot. The resulting model also provides a mechanically consistent basis for future state estimation and hybrid controller design for this nonholonomic mono-actuated rolling robot.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了MonoRollBot（一种由单个电机、丝杠传动和弹簧耦合内部移动质量块驱动的新型3自由度球型滚动机器人）的完整非线性约束动力学模型，并对其运动行为进行了分析。
AI.motivation: 为这种单驱动、超欠驱动的球形滚动机器人建立完整的非线性非完整模型，目前此类模型在文献中报道较少。由于无滑滚动是非完整约束，需要合适的建模方法来描述其动力学行为。
AI.method: 采用Lagrange-d'Alembert公式推导动力学模型，将丝杠关系作为完整约束，滚动条件以Pfaffian形式施加。模型保留了完整的广义坐标：壳体平动、壳体姿态、丝杠行程、螺母旋转和径向质量运动。
AI.result: 仿真和代表性运动研究表明，模型行为与原型机定性一致，揭示了重力、柔性和惯性如何共同塑造这种强欠驱动机器人的运动和移动能力。
AI.conclusion: 所建立的模型为这种非完整单驱动滚动机器人提供了机械一致的动力学基础，可用于未来的状态估计和混合控制器设计。

title: LEViL: Label-Efficient Video Learning via Zero-Shot Distillation over VLM-Generated Pseudo-Label Spaces
summary: Supervised video pretraining is a common transfer learning practice for improving downstream action recognition performance. However, it requires large-scale labeled source datasets, and the effectiveness of the learned initialization is influenced by the similarity between the source and target domains. Constructing such labeled pretraining datasets for different target domains is costly and difficult to scale. To address these limitations, this study proposes a label-efficient video learning framework that combines annotation-free video pretraining with target-label-set-aware fine-tuning. During pretraining, a vision-language model (VLM) generates textual descriptions of unlabeled videos, which are processed to construct an interpretable semantic pseudo-label space. A frozen video-language model then produces zero-shot soft target distributions over this space, allowing a student video encoder to learn semantically rich representations without manual source annotations. During downstream adaptation, target-label-set-aware fine-tuning combines supervised learning from labeled target videos with zero-shot distillation over the actual target label set, helping preserve VLM-derived semantic guidance while adapting the pretrained encoder to the target task. Experiments on UCF101 and HMDB51 show that the proposed framework outperforms the compared semi-supervised video action recognition methods across all evaluated limited-label regimes. Moreover, the annotation-free pretraining stage learns transferable representations that provide an effective initialization for full-data fine-tuning, despite relying on a comparatively modest unlabeled pretraining pool.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种标签高效的视频学习框架，结合无标注视频预训练和目标标签集感知微调，减少对大规模标注源数据集的依赖，在有限标签情况下提升动作识别性能。
AI.motivation: 传统监督视频预训练需要大规模标注源数据集，且效果受源域和目标域相似性影响。为不同目标域构建标注预训练数据集成本高、难以扩展。本研究旨在解决这些限制。
AI.method: 1. 预训练阶段：使用视觉语言模型为无标注视频生成文本描述，构建可解释的语义伪标签空间；冻结的视频语言模型在该空间上产生零样本软目标分布，学生视频编码器学习语义丰富的表示。2. 下游适应阶段：目标标签集感知微调结合有标注目标视频的监督学习和实际目标标签集上的零样本蒸馏，在适应目标任务的同时保留VLM的语义指导。
AI.result: 在UCF101和HMDB51数据集上的实验表明，该框架在所有评估的有限标签机制中都优于对比的半监督视频动作识别方法。无标注预训练阶段学习的可迁移表示为全数据微调提供了有效的初始化，尽管仅依赖相对较小的无标注预训练池。
AI.conclusion: 该标签高效的视频学习框架通过结合无标注预训练和目标标签集感知微调，有效减少了对大规模标注源数据集的依赖，在有限标签情况下取得了优越的动作识别性能，同时学习的表示具有良好的可迁移性。

title: Privacy-Preserving Federated Temporal Graph Learning with Digital Twin--Guided Adaptive Deception for Cyber-Resilient IoMT
summary: The rapid proliferation of IoT and IoMT devices introduces critical cybersecurity vulnerabilities in healthcare and industrial environments where resource-constrained devices operate under strict latency and data-privacy regulations. This paper presents the Federated Temporal Graph Convolutional Network with Advantage Actor-Critic (Federated TGCN-A2C), a privacy-preserving defense architecture integrating four mechanisms: a PyG-based Temporal GCN using GCNConv layers with global mean pooling and a learned anomaly gate for flow-level threat classification; LSTM-based Digital Twins generating per-device anomaly scores gating the classifier via learned sigmoid coupling; a Federated A2C agent selecting among ALLOW, ISOLATE, and HONEYPOT-REDIRECT actions based on a seven-dimensional state capturing confidence, entropy, anomaly magnitude, and traffic composition; and an enhanced honeypot layer converting suspicious traffic into threat intelligence with adaptive thresholds. Federated aggregation employs EMA-smoothed per-client validation losses as inverse-weighted FedAvg coefficients to stabilize global model updates under non-IID distributions, with cosine-annealed learning rates per round. Evaluated on CICDDoS 2019 and TON-IoT benchmarks, the framework achieves 99.48% and 99.61% test accuracy with weighted-F1 scores of 0.9948 and 0.9961, converging within 25 and 10 federated rounds, outperforming Fed-Inforce-Fusion by 0.21 percentage points while covering three additional attack categories. All sixteen CICDDoS 2019 classes achieve F1 of at least 0.9237 and all ten TON-IoT classes achieve F1 of at least 0.9488, including the severely imbalanced MITM category. Post-hoc explainability via SHAP, LIME, Grad-CAM, and counterfactual analysis confirms decisions are grounded in semantically meaningful flow features, supporting regulatory accountability in clinical deployments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了联邦TGCN-A2C框架，一种用于医疗和工业环境中资源受限IoT/IoMT设备的隐私保护防御架构，通过集成时间图卷积网络、数字孪生、联邦A2C智能体和增强蜜罐层，在非IID数据分布下实现高效威胁检测。
AI.motivation: IoT和IoMT设备在医疗和工业环境中的快速普及带来了严重的安全漏洞，这些资源受限设备需要在严格的延迟和数据隐私法规下运行，因此需要一种既能保护隐私又能高效检测威胁的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出了Federated TGCN-A2C框架，包含四个核心机制：1）基于PyG的时间图卷积网络（TGCN），使用GCNConv层和全局平均池化，配合学习型异常门进行流级威胁分类；2）基于LSTM的数字孪生，生成设备级异常分数并通过学习型sigmoid耦合控制分类器；3）联邦A2C智能体，基于七维状态（置信度、熵、异常幅度、流量组成）选择ALLOW、ISOLATE和HONEYPOT-REDIRECT三种动作；4）增强蜜罐层，将可疑流量转化为威胁情报。采用EMA平滑的客户端验证损失作为逆加权FedAvg系数，配合余弦退火学习率来稳定非IID数据下的全局模型更新。
AI.result: 在CICDDoS 2019和TON-IoT基准测试中，分别实现了99.48%和99.61%的测试准确率，加权F1分数分别为0.9948和0.9961，分别在25轮和10轮联邦学习后收敛。相比Fed-Inforce-Fusion方法提升了0.21个百分点，并额外覆盖了三种攻击类别。所有16个CICDDoS 2019类别F1分数至少为0.9237，所有10个TON-IoT类别F1分数至少为0.9488，包括严重不平衡的MITM类别。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在保护隐私的同时实现了高效的威胁检测，通过SHAP、LIME、Grad-CAM和反事实分析验证了决策基于语义上有意义的流量特征，支持临床部署中的监管问责要求。

title: OpenHLM: An Empirical Recipe for Whole-Body Humanoid Loco-Manipulation
summary: Whole-body humanoid loco-manipulation requires coordinating the robot's entire kinematic chain. However, most existing systems typically decouple the upper and lower bodies into separate controllers, limiting such coordination and yielding behaviors similar to those of a wheeled dual-arm platform. In this paper, we ask what it takes to build a whole-body native vision-language-action (VLA) model that maps language and pixels directly to all of the humanoid's degrees of freedom. We conduct a systematic empirical study organized as a roadmap of one-variable-at-a-time experiments across three phases: whole-body teleoperation, VLA model design, and heterogeneous co-training. Our study yields several intriguing findings: a joint-based whole-body teleoperation interface outperforms alternatives that only partially expose the humanoid's degrees of freedom; a VLA pretrained on static and wheeled dual-arm platforms transfers surprisingly well to a humanoid's full action space; and co-training with HuMI, the humanoid analog of UMI, extends the policy to new objects and instructions without additional whole-body teleoperation on those targets. Following this roadmap yields OpenHLM, an open-source recipe for whole-body humanoid loco-manipulation. In a challenging long-horizon task that spans a wide vertical range of the humanoid, OpenHLM outperforms two state-of-the-art humanoid VLA baselines (GR00T N1.6 and $Ψ_0$) using less than half the total demonstration time. Our code, training data, and model checkpoints are available at [https://openhlm-project.github.io/].

AI.tldr: 开发了一个名为OpenHLM的全身人形机器人视觉-语言-动作模型，通过系统化的三阶段实验路线图（全身遥操作、VLA模型设计、异构协同训练），实现了语言指令和像素直接映射到人形机器人所有自由度的控制。
AI.motivation: 现有系统通常将人形机器人的上下半身解耦为独立控制器，限制了协调能力，行为类似轮式双臂平台。需要构建一个全身原生的视觉-语言-动作模型，直接映射语言和像素到人形机器人的所有自由度。
AI.method: 采用三阶段系统化实证研究：1) 全身遥操作（关节式接口优于部分自由度暴露方案）；2) VLA模型设计（在静态和轮式双臂平台预训练的VLA能良好迁移到人形机器人全身动作空间）；3) 异构协同训练（使用人形机器人版本的UMI进行协同训练，无需对目标进行额外全身遥操作）。
AI.result: OpenHLM在挑战性长时程任务中（覆盖人形机器人广泛垂直范围），使用不到一半总演示时间，优于两个最先进的人形机器人VLA基线模型（GR00T N1.6和$Ψ_0$）。
AI.conclusion: 通过系统化路线图开发了OpenHLM开源方案，实现了高效的全身人形机器人运动操控，证明了全身原生VLA模型的可行性和优越性，为相关研究提供了可复现的框架。

title: Graph-of-Differences: Anatomy-Structured Difference Alignment for Medical Image Re-Identification
summary: Medical image re-identification (MedReID) enables longitudinal patient linkage but remains vulnerable to shortcut learning and often produces decisions that clinicians cannot audit against named anatomy. We propose Graph-of-Differences (GoD), which grounds identity comparisons in explicit anatomical structure. Each image is represented as an anatomy graph whose nodes correspond to named anatomical regions; given an image pair, soft node correspondence is established, and differences are computed over matched anatomy. A graph-level difference alignment objective ties these anatomy-matched differences to the global backbone difference, ensuring the retrieval signal is anchored in homologous structures rather than arbitrary spatial tokens. Explanations are defined over named graph nodes and quantitatively audited via node insertion/deletion tests, replacing unstable pixel heatmaps with verifiable structure-level evidence. On internal benchmarks, GoD improves Rank-1 by +7.1 pp on fundus and +3.1 pp on CXR over a strong frozen-backbone baseline, with further gains on zero-shot external transfers confirming that anatomy grounding improves both accuracy and generalization. Code is available at https://github.com/GenMI-Lab/GoD.git.

AI.tldr: GoD通过解剖结构图进行医学图像再识别，将身份比较锚定在明确命名的解剖区域上，避免捷径学习并提供可审计的解释。
AI.motivation: 现有医学图像再识别方法容易陷入捷径学习，且产生的决策无法让临床医生基于命名解剖结构进行审计。
AI.method: 将每张图像表示为解剖结构图（节点对应命名解剖区域），建立图像对间的软节点对应关系，计算匹配解剖区域的差异，并通过图级差异对齐目标将这些差异与全局骨干网络差异关联。
AI.result: 在内部基准测试中，GoD在眼底图像上Rank-1提升+7.1个百分点，在胸部X光片上提升+3.1个百分点；在零样本外部迁移上也有进一步增益，证明基于解剖结构的方法提高了准确性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: GoD通过将身份比较锚定在明确解剖结构上，提高了医学图像再识别的准确性、可解释性和泛化能力，为临床审计提供了可验证的结构级证据。

title: Towards Understanding the Power and Limits of the Muon Optimizer: A River-Valley Perspective
summary: Recently, Muon has gained substantial attention as an appealing alternative to Adam-like optimizers, with many works highlighting its advantages through spectral normalization and improved conditioning. Yet this positive theoretical narrative contrasts with its empirical performance in large language model (LLM) training, where Muon's gains over Adam/AdamW are often mixed, schedule-sensitive, and not uniformly superior. To address this gap, we develop a trajectory-level theory characterizing both the strengths and limitations of Muon. We introduce a mixed-spiked matrix sensing model whose sensing operator decomposes into signal, spike, and bulk components, capturing a mixture of anisotropic structure and long-tail information reminiscent of LLM training. On top of it, we adopted a river-valley perspective in which we view the landscape as composed of a river direction flowing to the desired solution and hill directions encoding nuisance or task-irrelevant information. In the momentum-free setting, we show that Muon moves faster along the information-bearing river direction during early optimization, but can converge much more slowly near the river bottom than gradient descent. We then extend the river-valley perspective to general nonconvex objectives with momentum by studying points on the spectral river. There, while Muon converges faster early on, its orthogonalized update removes residual scale information, making it prone to overshooting and oscillation near the target solution. Together, these results suggest that our characterizations extend beyond spiked matrix sensing and motivate switching to GD-like refinement optimizers in the final phase, rather than relying only on a fixed learning-rate schedule for Muon. We also provide preliminary evidence supporting this two-stage approach in language model training experiments.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过河流-山谷视角分析Muon优化器，发现其在早期优化阶段沿信息丰富的河流方向移动更快，但在接近最优解时容易振荡和收敛缓慢，建议在语言模型训练中采用两阶段优化策略。
AI.motivation: Muon优化器在理论上具有优势，但在大语言模型训练中的实际表现参差不齐，存在调度敏感性和不稳定的性能提升。作者旨在通过轨迹层面的理论分析，揭示Muon的优势和局限性，解释理论与实践的差距。
AI.method: 提出混合尖峰矩阵感知模型，将感知算子分解为信号、尖峰和主体分量，模拟LLM训练中的各向异性结构和长尾信息。采用河流-山谷视角，将优化景观视为流向目标解的河流方向和编码无关信息的山丘方向。分析无动量设置下Muon的行为，并扩展到带动量的一般非凸目标。
AI.result: Muon在早期优化阶段沿信息丰富的河流方向移动更快，但在接近河流底部时收敛速度远慢于梯度下降。在带动量情况下，Muon的正交化更新会移除残差尺度信息，容易在目标解附近产生超调和振荡。这些特性超出了尖峰矩阵感知的范围。
AI.conclusion: Muon在早期阶段表现优异，但在最终阶段需要切换到类似梯度下降的细化优化器，而不是仅依赖固定的学习率调度。初步实验证据支持在语言模型训练中采用这种两阶段方法。

title: Geometric Reconstruction of Extrinsic Contact Trajectories using Tactile Sensing and Proprioception for Tool Manipulation
comment: Accepted to the 2026 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2026)
summary: Tactile sensing enables robots to perceive rich contact information at the grasp, supporting tasks such as object recognition, in-hand pose estimation, and slip detection. However, in many tool-mediated manipulation tasks, the interaction that determines task success occurs at the tool tip, away from the tactile sensor, making direct sensing of tool-environment contact difficult, particularly when the contact moves during interaction. In this work, we reconstruct the trajectory of extrinsic tool-tip contact using tactile sensing and robot proprioception. We formulate tool-tip trajectory reconstruction as a geometric inference problem under a single-point contact assumption. Our method first estimates the global tool-tip contact location from a calibration segment designed to approximate fixed-point behavior, and then reconstructs the full trajectory by composing relative tool motion estimated from tactile marker observations under continuous contact. Across n=51 trials with multiple trajectories, tools, wrist poses, and grasp configurations, the proposed pipeline achieves a trajectory RMSE of 8.59 +/- 2.41 mm in the world frame and a shape RMSE of 5.96 +/- 1.16 mm, while operating online at 14.00 +/- 4.11 Hz. Overall, the results show that extrinsic tool-tip trajectory geometry can be recovered consistently from grasp-level tactile sensing, with trajectory shape remaining stable across variations in tools, wrist poses, and grasp configurations.

AI.tldr: 通过触觉传感和机器人本体感知重建工具尖端接触轨迹的几何推理方法
AI.motivation: 在工具介导的操纵任务中，工具尖端与环境的接触点远离触觉传感器，难以直接感知工具-环境接触，特别是在接触点移动时。
AI.method: 将工具尖端轨迹重建建模为单点接触假设下的几何推理问题：首先通过校准段估计全局工具尖端接触位置，然后通过触觉标记观测在连续接触下估计相对工具运动来重建完整轨迹。
AI.result: 在51次试验中，世界坐标系下的轨迹RMSE为8.59±2.41mm，形状RMSE为5.96±1.16mm，在线运行频率为14.00±4.11Hz。
AI.conclusion: 从抓握级触觉传感可以一致地恢复外部工具尖端轨迹几何，轨迹形状在不同工具、手腕姿态和抓握配置下保持稳定。

title: FLM-Occ: Feed-forward Likelihood Maximization for Efficient Indoor Occupancy Prediction
summary: Recent indoor occupancy prediction methods adopt Gaussian primitives as a sparse 3D representation for computational efficiency. However, their training relies on voxel classification, which imposes only local constraints and lacks global supervision on the distribution of the primitives. Therefore, they inevitably predict spurious primitives in empty regions, undermining both representational and computational efficiency. To address this, we propose Feed-forward Likelihood Maximization (FLM), a novel framework that reformulates occupancy prediction as voxel distribution estimation. In FLM, a network is trained to predict a mixture model that maximizes the likelihood over ground-truth occupied voxels in a feed-forward manner. To enable end-to-end training of networks and voxelization of a standard mixture model, we define mixture weights as normalized primitive volumes to implicitly enforce simplex constraints and derive novel voxelization formulas. Based on FLM, our FLM-Occ, a novel method that is capable of relocating randomly initialized primitives over long distances to model a scene. On Occ-ScanNet, FLM-Occ achieves superior accuracy using only 32 superquadrics, 2.7% of the prior SoTA, while running 3.7 times faster.

AI.tldr: FLM-Occ：一种基于前馈似然最大化的室内占用预测新方法，通过将占用预测重新定义为体素分布估计，使用混合模型最大化真实占用体素的似然，显著减少了虚假基元，仅用32个超二次曲面就实现了SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于高斯基元的室内占用预测方法依赖体素分类，仅施加局部约束，缺乏对基元分布的全局监督，导致在空区域预测虚假基元，损害了表示和计算效率。
AI.method: 提出前馈似然最大化（FLM）框架，将占用预测重新定义为体素分布估计。网络训练预测混合模型，以前馈方式最大化真实占用体素的似然。通过将混合权重定义为归一化基元体积来隐式强制执行单纯形约束，并推导新的体素化公式。基于FLM的FLM-Occ方法能够将随机初始化的基元长距离重定位以建模场景。
AI.result: 在Occ-ScanNet上，FLM-Occ仅使用32个超二次曲面（仅为先前SOTA的2.7%）就实现了更优的准确性，同时运行速度快3.7倍。
AI.conclusion: FLM框架通过将占用预测重新定义为体素分布估计，解决了现有方法中虚假基元的问题。FLM-Occ方法在保持高精度的同时显著减少了基元数量，提高了计算效率，为室内占用预测提供了更有效的解决方案。

title: Backpropagating Through Simulation: Analytic Policy Gradients for Sample and Learning Efficient Differentiable Continuous Control
summary: Model-free reinforcement learning algorithms such as Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) treat the environment as a black box, estimating policy gradients from sampled rewards; this process demands millions of interactions and relies on high-variance advantage estimates. When environment dynamics are differentiable, the return is an end-to-end differentiable function of the policy parameters, enabling exact gradient computation via backpropagation through simulation. We term this approach Analytic Policy Gradients (APG) and evaluate it against PPO on four continuous control tasks of increasing dynamical complexity: a one-dimensional point-mass target-reaching task, a 2D point-mass navigation task with obstacle avoidance, a 2D rigid-body T-block pushing task, and a 7-DOF Franka FR3 end-effector reaching task. Both algorithms share identical model architectures, observation normalization, and optimizer settings. To decouple sample efficiency from compute efficiency, we design a multi-axis evaluation protocol that records performance against environment steps and gradient steps. We report a segmented backpropagation scheme with MC and critic-based bootstrap modes that mitigates gradient degradation on long-horizon tasks, and present ablations over segment length and bootstrap strategy.

AI.tldr: 论文提出分析策略梯度（APG）方法，通过环境可微分性实现端到端梯度计算，与PPO相比在连续控制任务中展示出更好的样本效率
AI.motivation: 传统无模型强化学习（如PPO）将环境视为黑盒，需要大量交互样本且依赖高方差优势估计。当环境动态可微分时，回报对策略参数是端到端可微分的，可以精确计算梯度。
AI.method: 提出分析策略梯度（APG）方法，利用环境可微分性通过反向传播精确计算梯度。设计分段反向传播方案，结合MC和基于critic的引导模式，缓解长时域任务的梯度退化问题。
AI.result: 在四个复杂度递增的连续控制任务上评估APG与PPO：1D点质量目标到达、2D点质量导航避障、2D刚体T形块推动、7自由度Franka FR3末端执行器到达任务。使用多轴评估协议记录环境步数和梯度步数下的性能。
AI.conclusion: APG通过环境可微分性实现精确梯度计算，相比PPO在样本效率上表现更好。分段反向传播和引导策略能有效缓解长时域任务的梯度退化问题。

title: Any-Body Guard: Universal Safeguarding for Manipulation Policies via Action Masking
summary: Ensuring safety of learning-enabled robotic manipulation across diverse embodiments and tasks still requires significant manual engineering. Existing approaches typically rely on heuristically designed fallback controllers or complex forward invariance assessments. These methods are often too conservative for task success, too computationally expensive for real-time execution, too heuristic to provide useful safety guarantees, or too engineering-heavy to transfer between setups. In this paper, we propose a universal safeguarding approach, X-Safe, which reasons directly in the robot's configuration space to provide formal probabilistic guarantees for collision avoidance. By operating in the configuration space, our method transfers across embodiments while relying solely on an object-based, quasi-static scene representation and a forward kinematics model of the robotic manipulator. Thus, X-Safe provides useful formal safety guarantees without requiring additional data, or engineering effort for different embodiments or scenes. We demonstrate X-Safe for diverse embodiments and policies, both in simulation and on hardware. We observe less degradation in task performance compared to state-of-the-art safeguarding, no collisions on hardware experiments, and empirically corroborate our formal guarantees.

AI.tldr: X-Safe：一种通用的安全保障方法，通过直接在机器人配置空间中推理，为避碰提供形式化概率保证，无需针对不同机器人本体进行额外工程工作
AI.motivation: 当前学习型机器人操纵的安全保障方法通常依赖于启发式设计的回退控制器或复杂的前向不变性评估，这些方法要么过于保守影响任务成功率，要么计算成本过高无法实时执行，要么过于启发式无法提供有用的安全保证，要么工程量大难以在不同设置间转移
AI.method: 提出X-Safe方法，直接在机器人配置空间中推理，仅依赖基于对象的准静态场景表示和机器人操纵器的前向运动学模型，为避碰提供形式化概率保证
AI.result: 在仿真和硬件实验中验证了X-Safe对多种机器人本体和策略的有效性，相比现有安全保障方法任务性能下降更少，硬件实验中无碰撞发生，并经验证证实了形式化保证
AI.conclusion: X-Safe提供了一种通用的安全保障方法，能够在不同机器人本体间转移，提供有用的形式化安全保证，而无需额外数据或针对不同本体和场景的工程工作

title: OSOG: A Differentiable, Physics-Informed Synthetic Data Engine for Micro-Optical Environments
summary: Deep learning in computational microscopy is severely constrained by the scarcity of densely annotated datasets. While synthetic data generation has bridged this gap in macroscopic computer vision, traditional graphics engines rely on geometric ray-tracing, failing to capture the micro-optical phenomena required for microscopy. Conversely, while wave-optics formulations exist, rendering them computationally tractable at the scale required for deep learning remains a massive systems challenge. To address this, we introduce the Optical Synthetic Object Generator (OSOG), a high-performance, fully differentiable forward-modeling engine. Drawing on established physical models of diffraction and phase retardation, OSOG maps continuous Optical Path Difference (OPD) calculations into a highly optimized, PyTorch-native Structure-of-Arrays (SoA) architecture. We validate this computational framework across three axes: First, object detection models (YOLOv11-OBB) trained purely on OSOG-generated data achieve robust zero-shot transfer to real-world highly occluded Lysozyme micrographs. Second, we introduce DiffOSOG, demonstrating that the engine's end-to-end differentiability allows for the exact recovery of continuous optical parameters via curriculum-guided inverse rendering. Finally, OSOG bypasses the $\mathcal{O}(N)$ bottlenecks of sequential ray-tracing, demonstrating sub-linear scaling by synthesizing 40,000 complex wave-optic particles in under 50 milliseconds (\>20 FPS). By providing a fast, scalable, and physically grounded tensor pipeline, OSOG enables true real-time, on-the-fly dataset generation.

AI.tldr: OSOG是一个高性能、完全可微的光学合成对象生成器，用于解决计算显微镜中深度学习数据稀缺问题。它基于物理光学模型，通过优化的PyTorch架构实现快速、可扩展的合成数据生成，支持零样本迁移和参数反演。
AI.motivation: 计算显微镜中深度学习面临密集标注数据集稀缺的严重制约。虽然合成数据生成在宏观计算机视觉中弥补了这一差距，但传统图形引擎基于几何光线追踪，无法捕捉显微镜所需的微光学现象。而现有的波动光学公式在深度学习所需规模上计算成本过高。
AI.method: 提出光学合成对象生成器(OSOG)，这是一个高性能、完全可微的前向建模引擎。基于已建立的衍射和相位延迟物理模型，将连续光程差(OPD)计算映射到高度优化的PyTorch原生结构数组(SoA)架构中。
AI.result: 1) 仅用OSOG生成数据训练的物体检测模型(YOLOv11-OBB)在真实世界高度遮挡的溶菌酶显微图像上实现鲁棒的零样本迁移；2) 引入DiffOSOG，通过课程引导的反向渲染精确恢复连续光学参数；3) OSOG绕过顺序光线追踪的O(N)瓶颈，在50毫秒内合成40,000个复杂波动光学粒子(>20 FPS)，实现亚线性扩展。
AI.conclusion: OSOG通过提供快速、可扩展且物理基础扎实的张量管道，实现了真正的实时、动态数据集生成，为计算显微镜中的深度学习解决了数据稀缺的关键问题。

title: Memory Is No Longer a Bottleneck: Memory-Efficient Graph Filtering for Scalable Collaborative Filtering
comment: 13 pages, 7 figures, 8 tables; IEEE Transactions on Knowledge and Data Engineering (to appear) (Please cite our journal version.)
summary: Graph convolutional networks (GCNs) have demonstrated significant success in capturing complex user-item relationships for collaborative filtering (CF). However, due to their reliance on extensive model training, training-free graph filtering (GF)-based CF methods have emerged as a promising alternative, offering computational efficiency by smoothing graph signals via matrix operations. In particular, polynomial GF-based approaches demonstrate improved accuracy through their ability to design more expressive and flexible filtering functions. Despite these advantages, existing GF methods suffer from a critical memory bottleneck: they necessitate storing the full item similarity graph, incurring prohibitive memory costs for large-scale datasets, which limits their practical applicability. To tackle this challenge, we propose Mem-GF (Memory-efficient GF), a new GF-based CF method that departs from conventional designs by principally leveraging the structure of Krylov subspaces as a core mechanism for approximating polynomial graph filters without explicitly storing the item similarity graph. We theoretically analyze the minimum Krylov subspace size that guarantees lossless approximation. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate that Mem-GF achieves up to 5.74$\times$ lower memory usage and 4.38$\times$ speedup in runtime, while consistently exceeding the recommendation accuracy of state-of-the-art GF and GCN-based methods. Mem-GF robustly scales to datasets with tens of millions of interactions, establishing itself as a practically viable and theoretically grounded solution for efficient CF.

AI.tldr: 提出Mem-GF方法，通过Krylov子空间结构近似多项式图滤波器，无需显式存储物品相似图，显著降低内存使用和运行时间，同时保持推荐准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图过滤的协同过滤方法虽然计算高效，但需要存储完整的物品相似图，导致大规模数据集上内存成本过高，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 提出Mem-GF方法，利用Krylov子空间结构作为核心机制来近似多项式图滤波器，无需显式存储物品相似图，并理论分析了保证无损近似的最小Krylov子空间大小。
AI.result: Mem-GF实现了高达5.74倍的内存使用降低和4.38倍的运行时间加速，同时在推荐准确性上持续优于最先进的图过滤和图卷积网络方法，并能扩展到数千万交互的数据集。
AI.conclusion: Mem-GF为高效协同过滤提供了一个实际可行且理论基础的解决方案，解决了现有图过滤方法的内存瓶颈问题。

title: FlowDPG: Deterministic Policy Gradient on Flow Matching Policies for Real-World Manipulation
summary: Real-world reinforcement learning for robotic manipulation remains challenging, and this difficulty is amplified for flow matching policies: applying policy gradient methods to these policies is fundamentally limited by the need to backpropagate through time(BPTT) along the multi-step ODE that maps noise to actions, which is computationally prohibitive and numerically fragile. We propose FlowDPG, a DDPG-style method specifically designed for flow matching policies that distills the critic gradient into the velocity field at training time, bypassing BPTT entirely. Intuitively, FlowDPG combines two complementary vectors: the demonstration-driven velocity that keeps the action feasible, and the critic-driven correction that steers it toward higher value. Our contributions are threefold: (1) a BPTT-free distillation framework that enables stable DDPG-style policy improvement on flow matching policies, (2) a formal connection between the FlowDPG update direction and vanilla Deterministic Policy Gradient via three explicit approximations, and (3) real-world validation on a long-horizon, multi-stage, dual-arm AirPods assembly task, where FlowDPG attains a 92% end-to-end success rate, substantially outperforming recent RL methods spanning value-conditioning, auxiliary-module adaptation, and adjoint-based critic-gradient approaches. Videos and more results are provided on the project page https://flowdpg.github.io.

AI.tldr: FlowDPG是一种专为流匹配策略设计的DDPG风格方法，通过将批评者梯度蒸馏到速度场中，避免了反向传播通过时间(BPTT)的计算负担和数值不稳定性，在现实世界机器人操作任务中取得了92%的成功率。
AI.motivation: 现实世界机器人操作的强化学习仍然具有挑战性，特别是对于流匹配策略。传统的策略梯度方法需要通过多步ODE的反向传播(BPTT)，这计算成本高昂且数值不稳定，限制了流匹配策略在实际应用中的效果。
AI.method: FlowDPG是一种DDPG风格的专为流匹配策略设计的方法。它通过将批评者梯度蒸馏到速度场中，完全绕过了BPTT。该方法结合了两个互补的向量：保持动作可行的演示驱动速度，以及引导动作获得更高价值的批评者驱动修正。
AI.result: 在长视野、多阶段、双臂AirPods组装任务中，FlowDPG实现了92%的端到端成功率，显著优于最近的价值条件化、辅助模块适应和伴随梯度方法等RL方法。
AI.conclusion: FlowDPG提供了一个无需BPTT的蒸馏框架，能够在流匹配策略上实现稳定的DDPG风格策略改进，建立了FlowDPG更新方向与传统确定性策略梯度之间的形式化联系，并在真实世界机器人操作任务中验证了其有效性。

title: EnTrust: Modeling Inter-Modal Conflict for Trustworthy Multimodal Medical Image Analysis
summary: Multimodal medical imaging fuses complementary anatomical and functional information, yet modalities frequently disagree in pathologically heterogeneous regions. Current segmentation models handle this in one of two inadequate ways: deterministic fusion that averages away disagreement, or post-hoc uncertainty estimation decoupled from the fusion process that produces it. Both obscure the clinically critical question: why is this prediction unreliable? We present EnTrust, a framework that treats inter-modal conflict as the primary source of predictive uncertainty. Our EnFuse module decomposes multimodal features into three disentangled components: shared anatomical consensus (F_c), modality-specific cues (F_{u,m}), and spatially localized conflict signals (F_{cf}), with independence enforced via a cross-covariance objective. This structured decomposition conditions SegDiff, a diffusion-based generative segmentation model whose sampled hypotheses diverge specifically in regions of modal disagreement. TrustMap then translates this hypothesis divergence into calibrated, pixel-wise uncertainty using ensemble entropy, conflict-guided perturbation probing, and a learned calibration head, enabling clinicians to understand not only where predictions are uncertain, but why. Across four benchmarks spanning brain, cardiac, lesion, and oncology domains, EnTrust achieves state-of-the-art segmentation accuracy while reducing calibration error by 40% compared to the strongest baseline. Notably, it outperforms 5x deep ensembles using a single model at roughly half the memory footprint. Code and checkpoints are available at https://github.com/GenMI-Lab/EnTrust.git.

AI.tldr: EnTrust是一个用于多模态医学图像分割的框架，通过解耦模态冲突作为主要不确定性来源，结合扩散模型和校准机制，在提高分割精度的同时显著降低校准误差。
AI.motivation: 多模态医学成像融合了互补的解剖和功能信息，但在病理异质性区域模态经常存在分歧。现有方法要么通过确定性融合平均化分歧，要么使用与融合过程解耦的后验不确定性估计，都无法回答"为什么预测不可靠"这一临床关键问题。
AI.method: 1. EnFuse模块将多模态特征解耦为三个独立分量：共享解剖共识、模态特定线索和空间局部化冲突信号，通过交叉协方差目标强制独立性。2. SegDiff扩散生成分割模型利用这种结构化分解，在模态分歧区域产生不同的假设样本。3. TrustMap通过集成熵、冲突引导扰动探测和学习校准头，将假设差异转化为校准的像素级不确定性。
AI.result: 在脑部、心脏、病变和肿瘤学四个领域的基准测试中，EnTrust实现了最先进的分割精度，同时将校准误差相比最强基线降低了40%。值得注意的是，它仅使用单个模型（约一半内存占用）就超越了5倍深度集成的性能。
AI.conclusion: EnTrust通过将模态间冲突作为主要不确定性来源，并提供结构化分解和校准机制，不仅提高了多模态医学图像分割的准确性，更重要的是让临床医生能够理解预测不确定性的原因，而不仅仅是位置。

title: LIG: Layer-wise Integrated Gradients for Within-Layer Flow Analysis in Transformers
comment: 15 pages, 4 figures, 1 table. cs.LG. Experiments on BERT-base and PTB. Code: https://github.com/eightsuzuki/layer-wise-integrated-gradients
summary: Transformers achieve strong performance, but their internal computations remain opaque. We view each Transformer layer as a dynamic graph whose nodes are token representations and per-head attention outputs, with Multi-Head Attention (ATT) and MLP as module boundaries. On this graph we use LIG (Layer-wise Integrated Gradients), which applies set-to-set Integrated Gradients (IG) at nonlinear module boundaries. Set-to-set IG applies IG to a map from a set of input token representations to a set of output representations, evaluating token-to-token contributions, which is not standard in prior IG applications. This extends IG from the usual scalar-objective setting to set-to-set maps via an L2 scalarization, and composes within-layer contributions in the spirit of Layer-wise Relevance Propagation (LRP), with IG completeness playing the role of LRP-style conservation at each boundary. We use LIG to analyze (i) the agreement between module-wise composition and layer-whole attribution under an L2 criterion, and (ii) within-layer information flow by tracing separated ATT and MLP contributions. On BERT-base and PTB, configurations that best preserved within-layer consistency used the target token's embedding as the ATT baseline and either the ATT output at a=0 or Zero as the MLP baseline. We therefore present LIG as a diagnostic XAI tool at module-boundary granularity, without model-specific retraining or per-operation interpreter design. Code is available at https://github.com/eightsuzuki/layer-wise-integrated-gradients.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于层间集成梯度（LIG）的Transformer可解释性方法，将每个Transformer层视为动态图，在注意力头和MLP模块边界应用集合到集合的集成梯度来分析内部信息流。
AI.motivation: Transformer模型虽然性能强大，但其内部计算过程仍然不够透明。为了理解Transformer层内部的信息流动和贡献，需要一种能够在模块边界粒度上进行分析的可解释性工具，而不需要重新训练模型或为每个操作设计特定的解释器。
AI.method: 将每个Transformer层视为动态图，节点为token表示和每头注意力输出，以多头注意力（ATT）和MLP作为模块边界。使用层间集成梯度（LIG），在非线性模块边界应用集合到集合的集成梯度（IG），通过L2标量化将IG从传统的标量目标设置扩展到集合到集合的映射，并在层内以层间相关性传播（LRP）的精神组合贡献。
AI.result: 在BERT-base和PTB上的实验表明，保持层内一致性的最佳配置是：使用目标token的嵌入作为ATT基线，使用ATT输出在a=0或Zero作为MLP基线。LIG能够分析（i）模块级组合与整个层归因在L2准则下的一致性，以及（ii）通过追踪分离的ATT和MLP贡献来分析层内信息流。
AI.conclusion: LIG作为一种诊断性XAI工具，能够在模块边界粒度上提供Transformer的可解释性分析，无需模型特定的重新训练或每个操作的解释器设计。该方法为理解Transformer内部计算提供了新的视角和工具。

title: EmbodiedUS-FS: Fast Slow Intelligence for Ultrasound Robotics
summary: Robotic ultrasound scanning in real clinical environments requires both high-level clinical workflow reasoning and low-level closed-loop execution. Physicians natural-language instructions often contain implicit anatomical targets, procedural logic, image-quality requirements, and safety constraints, while execution is affected by patient motion, contact variations, and target drift. We propose a fast and slow hierarchical embodied ultrasound system for safe and interpretable robotic ultrasound assistance. The Slow Brain performs intent parsing and stage-wise task planning with knowledge augmentation from an API and handbook corpus, and generates executable plans through task-graph construction and structured plan verification. The Fast Brain fuses multimodal feedback, including ultrasound images, robot pose and force states, and patient-motion information, to refine local actions and perform image-quality-guided recovery behaviors. The system further integrates a Safety Shield and a hierarchical escalation policy to constrain risky actions and trigger replanning or human confirmation under persistent failures or safety-bound violations. Experiments on planning evaluation, closed-loop execution under dynamic perturbations, and safety-mechanism validation demonstrate that the proposed hierarchical design improves task success rates while reducing safety violations.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种快慢分层机器人超声系统，通过慢脑进行意图解析和任务规划，快脑进行多模态反馈融合和动作执行，结合安全防护机制，提高临床超声扫描的安全性和成功率
AI.motivation: 临床环境中的机器人超声扫描需要高层次临床工作流推理和低层次闭环执行，医生指令包含隐式解剖目标、程序逻辑、图像质量要求和安全约束，而执行过程受患者运动、接触变化和目标漂移影响
AI.method: 提出快慢分层系统：慢脑进行意图解析和阶段任务规划，利用API和手册知识库，通过任务图构建和结构化计划验证生成可执行计划；快脑融合超声图像、机器人位姿和力状态、患者运动等多模态反馈，优化局部动作并执行图像质量引导的恢复行为；集成安全防护和分级升级策略
AI.result: 在规划评估、动态扰动下的闭环执行和安全机制验证实验中，该分层设计提高了任务成功率，同时减少了安全违规
AI.conclusion: 提出的分层系统设计能够实现安全、可解释的机器人超声辅助，通过快慢脑协同工作，结合安全防护机制，有效应对临床环境中的复杂挑战

title: MIRCaps: A Large-Scale Mixed-Domain Dataset with Image-Level and Region-Level Captions for Fine-Grained Vision-Language Learning
summary: Despite recent progress in Vision-Language Models (VLMs), mixed-domain image-caption datasets for both general-purpose and CCTV-based video surveillance systems remain limited. To address this gap, we introduce a large-scale multimodal dataset comprising 141,364 images, 981,947 image-level captions, 1,742,264 region-level captions, and 1,391,779 bounding box annotations. Each image is associated with an average of seven image-level captions describing different aspects of the overall scene, as well as seven region-level captions for each annotated bounding box. These complementary caption types are designed to help VLMs learn fine-grained visual attributes, including object categories, estimated sizes, colors, actions, states, and surrounding environmental context. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the dataset on two important downstream tasks: image captioning and object detection. Experimental results show that lightweight VLMs, including SmolVLM-256M-Instruct, BLIP, BLIP2, and Qwen2.5-VL 3B-Instruct, can be effectively fine-tuned using our dataset. Our dataset and code are publicly available at https://zenodo.org/records/20418601.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个大规模多模态数据集，包含14万+图像、98万+图像级描述、174万+区域级描述和139万+边界框标注，用于提升视觉语言模型在通用和监控场景下的细粒度视觉理解能力。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉语言模型在通用和CCTV监控系统领域的混合域图像-描述数据集有限，需要大规模多模态数据来提升模型对细粒度视觉属性（如物体类别、尺寸、颜色、动作、状态和环境上下文）的理解能力。
AI.method: 构建了一个包含141,364张图像的大规模数据集，每张图像平均有7个图像级描述（描述整体场景不同方面）和7个区域级描述（针对每个边界框标注），共包含981,947个图像级描述、1,742,264个区域级描述和1,391,779个边界框标注。
AI.result: 实验证明轻量级视觉语言模型（如SmolVLM-256M-Instruct、BLIP、BLIP2、Qwen2.5-VL 3B-Instruct）可以使用该数据集有效微调，在图像描述和物体检测两个下游任务上表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集填补了混合域图像-描述数据的空白，通过提供互补的图像级和区域级描述，有助于视觉语言模型学习细粒度视觉属性，提升在通用和监控场景下的性能。

title: The Cost Geometry of Belief: finite-resource inference under noisy observation
summary: We equip the space of beliefs with a cost geometry (what it costs to pass from one belief to another): optimal transport in Wasserstein space, reweighted conformally by Fisher information (the price of the precision at stake), distinct from the Fisher-Rao metric. In the setting we consider, a finite machine maintains a digital twin of a system; observing the territory through finite, noisy sensors, we model its coherent output as a belief: a probability density over states, the Bayes posterior. Certainty (the perfect twin) is denied twice, by observation and by physics, both read off the Fisher information. On the conformal class, essentially location-scale, three results emerge, all invariants of one change of cost unit. A wall: a well-posed inference rejects certainty to infinite distance as soon as the cost dominates the Fisher information (necessity conjectured beyond power laws). An honesty: an honest (eikonal) cost, each nat the same length everywhere, selects the geometries proportional to the Fisher information. A rigidity: these geometries are hyperbolic, and the Stam bound crowns the Gaussian, the most hyperbolic location-scale belief. Changing the unit dilates the geometry yet preserves the wall, the curvature ordering, and the extremality of the Gaussian: an absolute cost says nothing, only relative cost carries meaning, the value -1/4 being one of its images. The cost of reaching a given precision then has a geometric floor diverging at certainty. Thermodynamics fixes the cost unit and motivates this framework; the results are geometric, in nats.

AI.tldr: 该论文为信念空间引入了一种基于最优传输的代价几何结构，通过Fisher信息重新加权，区别于传统的Fisher-Rao度量。在有限机器维护数字孪生的背景下，研究信念（后验概率密度）的几何特性，发现确定性（完美孪生）被观测噪声和物理限制双重否定。
AI.motivation: 研究信念（概率密度）空间中的几何结构，为数字孪生系统中的信念更新和推理提供理论基础。传统Fisher-Rao度量不足以描述信念转换的实际代价，需要结合最优传输理论和Fisher信息来建立更符合实际推理成本的几何框架。
AI.method: 在Wasserstein空间中构建代价几何，通过Fisher信息对最优传输进行保形重加权。在位置-尺度变换类中分析几何特性，研究代价单位变化下的不变性，推导几何约束条件。
AI.result: 1. 发现"墙"现象：当代价主导Fisher信息时，良好定义的推理将确定性排斥到无限远距离；2. 建立"诚实"代价：每个nat具有相同长度，选择与Fisher信息成比例的几何；3. 证明"刚性"特性：这些几何是双曲的，Stam界使高斯分布成为最双曲的位置-尺度信念；4. 代价单位变化仅缩放几何，但保持墙、曲率排序和高斯极值性不变。
AI.conclusion: 信念空间的相对代价才有意义，绝对代价无意义。达到给定精度的代价存在几何下界，在确定性处发散。热力学固定了代价单位，为数字孪生系统中的信念推理提供了几何框架，所有结果以nat为单位表示几何特性。

title: Tactile Genesis: Exploring Tactile Sensors at Scale for Learning Dexterous Tasks
summary: Tactile sensing is critical for contact-rich dexterous manipulation, yet it remains unclear which tactile abstractions a policy needs and when richer tactile fields justify their hardware cost. This is hard to study empirically: each sensor effectively defines a new robot, and no lab can replicate the same learning experiment across all of them. We present Tactile Genesis, a GPU-parallel tactile sensor simulation platform that exposes binary contact, contact depth, per-taxel kinematic force/torque, elastomer marker displacement, geometry-aware proximity, contact audio, and a voxelized temperature field (the first of its kind in robot learning physics simulation platforms) under a common interface, with configurable placement, resolution, and a realistic noise model (drift, hysteresis, dead taxels, crosstalk). It scales past 20,000 parallel environments and 1,000 taxels on a single GPU, improving throughput by 3 to 20 times over previous tactile simulators. We train teacher-student policies on three dexterous tasks, ablating sensor type, placement, resolution, and noise, and verify transfer to the real XHand1. Proprioception alone is insufficient on every task. Sensor placement dominates sensor type: fingertip-only coverage trails whole-hand coverage by a wide margin, while adding the palm and proximal phalanges closes most of the gap to the privileged teacher. Resolution matters far less than coverage: placing 200 taxels across the whole hand suffices across tasks. We find that force/torque per taxel is consistently the most useful sensor type. These results give concrete guidance for both future tactile hardware design for improving robot hands and policy-side observation choice in dexterous manipulation. https://neuroagents-lab.github.io/2026-tactile-genesis/

AI.tldr: 本文提出Tactile Genesis，一个GPU并行触觉传感器仿真平台，支持多种触觉抽象，用于研究触觉传感在灵巧操作中的作用，发现传感器布局比传感器类型更重要。
AI.motivation: 触觉传感对于接触丰富的灵巧操作至关重要，但尚不清楚策略需要哪些触觉抽象，以及何时更丰富的触觉场能证明其硬件成本。现有研究难以实证，因为每个传感器都定义了一个新的机器人，且没有实验室能在所有传感器上复制相同的学习实验。
AI.method: 提出Tactile Genesis，一个GPU并行的触觉传感器仿真平台，提供二进制接触、接触深度、每像素运动力/扭矩、弹性体标记位移、几何感知接近度、接触音频和体素化温度场等多种触觉抽象，具有可配置的布局、分辨率和真实噪声模型。平台在单个GPU上可扩展到20,000个并行环境和1,000个触觉像素，吞吐量比之前的触觉仿真器提高3到20倍。
AI.result: 在三个灵巧任务上训练教师-学生策略，消融传感器类型、布局、分辨率和噪声，并验证到真实XHand1上的迁移。发现仅本体感觉在所有任务中都不够。传感器布局比传感器类型更重要：仅指尖覆盖与全手覆盖差距很大，而添加手掌和近节指骨能弥补大部分与特权教师的差距。分辨率比覆盖范围重要得多：在整个手上放置200个触觉像素足以应对所有任务。每像素力/扭矩是最有用的传感器类型。
AI.conclusion: 这些结果为未来改进机器人手的触觉硬件设计和灵巧操作中策略侧观测选择提供了具体指导。

title: Synergistic Dual-Branch Adaptation for Multi-modal Generalized Category Discovery
summary: Generalized Category Discovery (GCD) aims to classify old categories and discover new ones from unlabeled data. Recent multi-modal approaches introduce retrieved or synthesized texts into a dual-branch architecture to provide semantic cues complementary to visual features. However, the cross-modal synergy in existing dual-branch methods remains coarse and incomplete: the two modalities are encoded independently with the bias and noise in the derived text left unaddressed during encoding, and existing mutual learning strategies operate only on global class-level anchors, lacking fine-grained relational supervision. To address these limitations, we propose the Synergistic Dual-Branch Adaptation (SDBA) framework, which serves as a plug-and-play enhancement compatible with existing dual-branch methods such as GET and TextGCD. SDBA comprises two components: the cross-modal synergistic adapter inserts lightweight adapters into both branches and further injects visual information into the text adapter at each encoder layer to enhance text feature learning during encoding; the neighborhood mutual learning module enforces consistent local neighborhood distributions between the two branches via bidirectional KL divergence, providing fine-grained relational supervision for both old and new classes. Extensive experiments on six benchmarks demonstrate state-of-the-art performance, and consistent improvements on different baselines validate the broad scalability of the proposed framework.

AI.tldr: SDBA框架通过跨模态协同适配器和邻域互学习模块，增强双分支GCD方法的跨模态协同，在六个基准上实现SOTA性能
AI.motivation: 现有双分支GCD方法存在跨模态协同粗糙和不完整的问题：两种模态独立编码，文本中的偏差和噪声未处理；现有互学习策略仅作用于全局类别锚点，缺乏细粒度关系监督。
AI.method: 提出协同双分支适配（SDBA）框架，包含两个组件：跨模态协同适配器（在双分支中插入轻量适配器，并在每层编码器注入视觉信息到文本适配器）；邻域互学习模块（通过双向KL散度强制两分支间局部邻域分布一致）。
AI.result: 在六个基准测试上实现了最先进的性能，在不同基线上的一致改进验证了框架的广泛可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: SDBA框架作为即插即用的增强模块，有效解决了现有双分支GCD方法的局限性，通过增强的跨模态协同和细粒度关系监督，显著提升了GCD性能。

title: FAST: A Framework for Aligned Sampling and Training in Parallel Reinforcement Learning for Autonomous Driving
summary: Deep reinforcement learning is pivotal for closed-loop autonomous driving yet remains constrained by severe bottlenecks in sampling efficiency. Standard parallel sampling mitigates this but suffers from the straggler effect, where the premature termination of a single environment necessitates a synchronized batch re-initialization, leading to suboptimal sample utilization and prohibitive re-initialization latency. To address this, we propose FAST, a synchronous parallel framework tailored for closed-loop simulation. Specifically, FAST employs Dynamic Parallel Sampling Alignment (DPSA) to maintain vectorization synchronization by extending terminated episodes via virtual continuation, thereby decoupling the sampling loop from individual terminations. By dynamically triggering global truncation based on the termination rate of parallel clips, FAST effectively eliminates the bottleneck of premature resets without sacrificing data diversity. Furthermore, to strictly preserve theoretical consistency, we incorporate a Scaled Mask-Padding Optimization (SMPO) that leverages validity masking and adaptive loss normalization to nullify the bias from auxiliary padding data. Empirical evaluations demonstrate that FAST achieves at least a 1.78 times wall-clock speedup over the single-clip baseline while preserving statistical unbiasedness.

AI.tldr: FAST是一个用于闭环自动驾驶的同步并行框架，通过动态并行采样对齐和缩放掩码填充优化，解决了并行采样中的拖尾效应问题，显著提升了采样效率。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习在闭环自动驾驶中至关重要，但采样效率存在严重瓶颈。标准并行采样虽然能缓解这一问题，但受到拖尾效应的影响：单个环境提前终止会导致同步批处理重新初始化，造成样本利用率低下和重新初始化延迟过高。
AI.method: 提出FAST框架，采用动态并行采样对齐（DPSA）通过虚拟延续来维持向量化同步，将采样循环与单个终止解耦。同时使用缩放掩码填充优化（SMPO）通过有效性掩码和自适应损失归一化来消除辅助填充数据的偏差。
AI.result: 实验评估表明，FAST相比单片段基线实现了至少1.78倍的时钟速度提升，同时保持了统计无偏性。
AI.conclusion: FAST框架有效解决了并行采样中的拖尾效应问题，在保持统计无偏性的同时显著提升了采样效率，为闭环自动驾驶的强化学习训练提供了高效的解决方案。

title: Multi-AUV Marine Life Tracking with Single Hydrophone Payloads via a Hidden Markov Model Equipped Particle Filter
summary: Researchers tag and track marine animals to study migration patterns, human impacts on behavior, and behavioral shifts due to climate change. Accurate data collection often requires tagging individual animals to collect spatio-temporal state estimates of the animal's geo-position and depth. Acoustic transmitters are prominent due to their continuous communication without requiring retrieval or surfacing to collect data. These transmitters emit underwater acoustic pulses that can be detected by hydrophones. However, the frequent movement of aquatic animals results in high data loss when the animal moves out of the detection range of a stationary hydrophone. Autonomous underwater vehicle (AUV) systems offer a solution for localizing transmitters with higher resolution over longer periods of time. Such systems previously deployed have often required multiple hydrophones mounted on a large frame carried by the AUV. This increases drag, limiting the speed at which the AUV can track highly mobile animals. This work provides an alternative by equipping multiple AUVs with a single compact hydrophone payload. A particle filter algorithm equipped with a hidden Markov model (HMM) behavioral motion model fuses measurements from multiple AUVs to estimate the transmitter's position. Real-world data shows a root mean square error (RMSE) of approximately 10 meters for short-term deployments, and a larger simulated dataset shows an RMSE of approximately 15 meters for longer deployments over a larger area. The HMM fit to historical animal movement data outperforms a generic velocity motion model, and both outperform a baseline random walk motion model.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出使用配备单个紧凑水听器的多AUV系统，结合粒子滤波算法和HMM行为运动模型，来追踪海洋动物携带的声学发射器，以解决传统固定水听器数据丢失问题，并提高追踪精度。
AI.motivation: 传统固定水听器在追踪移动海洋动物时存在数据丢失问题，因为动物会频繁移出水听器检测范围。现有AUV系统通常需要多个水听器安装在大型框架上，这会增加阻力，限制AUV追踪高速移动动物的能力。因此需要一种更高效的追踪方案。
AI.method: 采用多AUV系统，每个AUV配备单个紧凑水听器载荷。使用粒子滤波算法结合隐马尔可夫模型(HMM)行为运动模型，融合来自多个AUV的测量数据来估计发射器位置。HMM模型基于历史动物运动数据进行拟合。
AI.result: 真实世界数据显示短期部署的均方根误差约为10米。更大规模的模拟数据集显示，在更大区域进行长期部署时，均方根误差约为15米。HMM模型优于通用的速度运动模型，两者都优于基准随机游走运动模型。
AI.conclusion: 多AUV系统配备紧凑水听器结合HMM行为运动模型，能够有效追踪海洋动物，减少数据丢失，提高定位精度，为研究动物迁徙、人类影响和气候变化下的行为变化提供更可靠的数据收集方法。

title: Technical Report for ICRA 2026 GOOSE 2D Fine-Grained Semantic Segmentation Challenge: Exploring Query-Based Segmentation and Increased Spatial Context for Outdoor Scene Understanding
comment: Ranked 5th in the GOOSE 2D Fine-Grained Semantic Segmentation Challenge at the IEEE ICRA 2026 Workshop on Field Robotics
summary: In this report, we present our submission to the GOOSE 2D Fine-Grained Semantic Segmentation Challenge, organized as part of the Workshop on Field Robotics at ICRA 2026. The challenge combines data from the GOOSE and GOOSE-Ex datasets, which comprise more than 13k images captured from 4 distinct camera setups, annotated using a hierarchical taxonomy of 56 fine-grained classes and 11 broader categories. Starting from SegFormer as a baseline, we progressively improve segmentation performance through increased training crop sizes, a transition to the query-based Mask2Former architecture, and test-time augmentation. Our experiments show that query-based segmentation significantly outperforms the baseline model. Furthermore, increasing the crop size used during training yields substantial gains, highlighting the relevance of preserving scene context for fine-grained semantic disambiguation. Our final submission, using test-time augmentation, achieves an mIoU of 69.6% on the challenge test set, providing a strong baseline for fine-grained semantic segmentation in outdoor environments. To facilitate reproducibility and future research, code and weights will be made publicly available at https://github.com/RoboticsLabURJC/outdoor-fine-grained-segmentation .

AI.tldr: 该论文介绍了参加GOOSE 2D细粒度语义分割挑战的解决方案，通过改进SegFormer基线模型，采用Mask2Former架构和测试时增强，在室外环境细粒度分割任务上取得了69.6% mIoU的优异性能。
AI.motivation: 针对室外环境中的细粒度语义分割挑战，需要处理来自4个不同相机设置的13k+图像，包含56个细粒度类别和11个更广泛的类别。现有方法在细粒度语义区分方面存在局限，需要更好的模型来保留场景上下文信息。
AI.method: 从SegFormer作为基线开始，通过逐步增加训练裁剪尺寸、转向基于查询的Mask2Former架构，以及采用测试时增强来提升分割性能。重点研究了裁剪尺寸对场景上下文保留的影响。
AI.result: 基于查询的分割方法显著优于基线模型，增加训练裁剪尺寸带来实质性性能提升，表明保留场景上下文对细粒度语义区分至关重要。最终提交方案在挑战测试集上达到69.6% mIoU。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为室外环境细粒度语义分割提供了强有力的基线，证明了基于查询的架构和保留场景上下文的重要性。代码和权重已公开，便于复现和未来研究。

title: Geometric and Information Compression of Representations in Deep Learning
comment: Published at ECML PKDD 2026; Dataset: https://doi.org/10.17877/RCTRUST-2026-DWMJTZ. Code: https://github.com/link-er/information_geometric_compression
summary: Deep neural networks transform input data into latent representations that support a wide range of downstream tasks. These representations can be characterized along information-theoretic and geometric dimensions, but their relationship remains poorly understood. A central open question is whether low mutual information (MI) between inputs and representations necessarily implies geometrically compressed latent spaces and vice versa. We investigate this question using class-wise clustering as a measure of geometric compression and theoretically sound MI estimation in conditional entropy bottleneck (CEB) networks and continuous dropout networks. We evaluate the interplay between MI, geometric compression, and generalization on classification tasks under controlled noise injection schemes. Our findings show that low MI does not reliably correspond to geometric compression, and that the connection between the two is more nuanced than often assumed. Indeed, our experiments reveal a negative and nonlinear relationship that can reverse when varying training setup. Our results put forward a hypothesis that generalization acts as a potential confounder in this connection rather than being their direct consequence.

AI.tldr: 该研究探讨了深度神经网络中信息论（互信息）与几何压缩（类间聚类）之间的关系，发现低互信息并不一定对应几何压缩，两者关系比通常假设的更复杂，且泛化可能是潜在的混淆因素而非直接结果。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络的潜在表示在信息论和几何维度上都有特征，但两者关系尚不清楚。核心问题是：输入与表示之间的低互信息是否必然意味着几何压缩的潜在空间，反之亦然？
AI.method: 使用类间聚类作为几何压缩的度量，结合理论可靠的互信息估计方法，在条件熵瓶颈网络和连续dropout网络中研究。通过控制噪声注入方案，在分类任务上评估互信息、几何压缩和泛化之间的相互作用。
AI.result: 研究发现低互信息并不可靠地对应几何压缩，两者关系比通常假设的更微妙。实验揭示了负向且非线性的关系，这种关系在改变训练设置时可能反转。泛化可能是这一连接中的潜在混淆因素，而非直接结果。
AI.conclusion: 信息论压缩（低互信息）与几何压缩（类间聚类）之间的关系并非简单对应，而是复杂且受训练设置影响。研究提出假设：泛化可能是这一关系的混淆因素，而非直接后果，这对理解神经网络表示学习有重要意义。

title: Benchmarking Robot Memory Under Interference
summary: Robots deployed in realistic settings will accumulate experience across many sessions and tasks over their deployment. The robot's tasks may often require it to remember information from multiple sessions ago, making long-context robot memory important for real-world deployments. However, most robot-memory benchmarks today are based on single episodes or a short context. To measure how current robot memory systems perform on longer sessions with more distractions, we introduce RoboMME-Interference, a cross-session benchmark built on RoboMME. For each query episode, we construct a session history using the query's relevant prior demonstration followed by a controlled number of unrelated sessions, which we provide to the VLA as memory and measure accuracy. Running RoboMME's released memory-augmented $π_{0.5}$ variants unmodified through this benchmark, we find that while perceptual memory variants improve success when given the history without any distractors, they decay strongly and steadily as unrelated sessions accumulate. With this release, we emphasize the importance of long-context memory and robustness to interference and show that current systems largely fail on such capabilities. The project page, videos, code, and data are at https://robotmemorybench.com.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了RoboMME-Interference基准，用于评估机器人长期记忆系统在跨会话干扰下的性能，发现现有系统在面对无关会话干扰时性能显著下降。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的机器人需要在多个会话和任务中积累经验，经常需要记住多个会话前的信息，但现有机器人记忆基准大多基于单次或短上下文场景，缺乏对长期记忆和干扰鲁棒性的评估。
AI.method: 基于RoboMME构建跨会话基准RoboMME-Interference，为每个查询构建包含相关演示和可控数量无关会话的历史记录，提供给视觉语言模型作为记忆，并测量其准确性。
AI.result: 测试RoboMME发布的记忆增强变体发现，虽然感知记忆变体在没有干扰的情况下能提高成功率，但随着无关会话的积累，性能显著且持续下降。
AI.conclusion: 强调长期记忆和抗干扰能力的重要性，当前系统在这方面基本失败，需要开发更鲁棒的长期记忆系统。

title: Native space based pipelines outperform template space based pipeline in subcortical segmentation
summary: Accurate segmentation of subcortical regions is critical for neurosurgical planning and functional research. Most automated methods rely on template space coregistration, which may compromise patient-specific accuracy, particularly in small structures. We identify a need to evaluate whether native space approaches offer a measurable advantage, which we evaluate in the context of movement disorders. We developed two UNet-based segmentation pipelines of the Subthalamic Nucleus (STN) - a common surgical target in Parkinson's Disease - and the neighbouring Red Nucleus (RN) and Substantia Nigra (SN). We collected 7T and 3T MRI data from five public datasets. The pipelines were evaluated in the native-space against manual labels. We further investigated the effect of the template resolution. Motivated by the hypothesis that models may better learn target boundaries in higher field, we tested the transferability of 7T-trained models to 3T clinical images, and whether synthetic 3T training data - generated via a disentangled representation learning method - could help bridging this domain gap. On held-out 7T data, the native pipeline consistently outperformed the template one. For the STN, native-space Dice reached 0.775 +- 0.055 versus 0.713 +- 0.051 (1 mm template), with HD95 of 0.79 +- 0.24 mm versus 1.17 +- 1.10 mm, respectively. Similar advantages were observed for the RN and SN. Increasing template resolution did not improve accuracy. When applied to 3T images, all models showed a considerable performance drop. Adding synthetic 3T data yielded only modest improvements, though without degrading 7T performance. Native-space segmentation is preferable for applications requiring patient specific anatomical fidelity, such as the surgical planning in PD. Bridging the 7T-to-3T domain gap remains an open challenge, motivating future work on domain adaptation tailored to subcortical structures.

AI.tldr: 该研究比较了丘脑底核（STN）等皮层下结构在原生空间与模板空间的分割方法，发现原生空间方法在7T MRI数据上表现更优，但将7T训练的模型迁移到3T临床图像时性能显著下降，合成3T数据仅带来有限改善。
AI.motivation: 皮层下区域的准确分割对神经外科手术规划和功能研究至关重要。大多数自动化方法依赖模板空间配准，这可能影响患者特异性精度，特别是在小结构分割中。需要评估原生空间方法是否提供可测量的优势，特别是在运动障碍背景下。
AI.method: 开发了两个基于UNet的分割流程（原生空间和模板空间）用于分割丘脑底核（STN）、红核（RN）和黑质（SN）。收集了来自五个公共数据集的7T和3T MRI数据。在原生空间中使用手动标签评估流程。进一步研究了模板分辨率的影响。测试了7T训练模型向3T临床图像的迁移能力，以及使用解耦表示学习方法生成的合成3T数据是否能帮助弥合领域差距。
AI.result: 在保留的7T数据上，原生空间流程始终优于模板空间流程。对于STN，原生空间Dice系数达到0.775±0.055，而1mm模板为0.713±0.051；HD95分别为0.79±0.24mm和1.17±1.10mm。RN和SN也观察到类似优势。增加模板分辨率并未提高准确性。当应用于3T图像时，所有模型性能显著下降。添加合成3T数据仅带来适度改善，且未降低7T性能。
AI.conclusion: 对于需要患者特异性解剖保真度的应用（如帕金森病手术规划），原生空间分割更为可取。弥合7T到3T的领域差距仍然是一个开放挑战，需要未来针对皮层下结构的领域适应研究。

title: Learning to Place Guards by Reinforcement: A Geo-Free Neural Policy for the Vertex-Guard Art Gallery Problem
summary: Neural combinatorial optimization (NCO) has shown that policies trained by reinforcement can construct strong solutions to NP-hard problems directly from raw instances. What such a policy actually learns, as opposed to what its decoder expresses, remains much less clear. We study this distinction on the vertex-guard Art Gallery Problem, the NP-hard task of choosing polygon vertices from which to observe an entire region. A pointer-network policy is trained from a coverage-aware reward over its own rollouts under the constraint we call geo-free inference: at test time it sees only vertex coordinates, with no visibility computation and no geometric oracle. The policy places guards economically but leaves a tail of under-covered polygons that widens far beyond the training range. To locate the cause, we freeze the trained encoder and read its embeddings with a small single-shot classifier, still geo-free at inference. The classifier closes most of the feasibility gap, in and out of distribution and at up to roughly five times the training range, cutting under-covered polygons by about an order of magnitude at an explicitly reported cost in guard count. We read this as evidence that the reinforcement-trained representation already encodes the geometry required for feasibility, and that residual failures reflect decoder calibration rather than missing knowledge. Probing a frozen encoder thus offers a practical way to ask what a neural combinatorial solver has internalized.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过分析NCO策略在顶点警卫艺术画廊问题上的表现，发现训练后的编码器已经内化了所需的几何知识，解码器未能充分利用这些知识，而冻结编码器后用分类器读取能显著提升可行性。
AI.motivation: 研究神经组合优化(NCO)策略实际学到了什么，而不是其解码器表达了什么。关注顶点警卫艺术画廊问题，探索策略在无几何推理约束下的表现，并分析其内部表示。
AI.method: 使用指针网络策略训练，采用覆盖感知奖励，在测试时仅看到顶点坐标（无可见性计算和几何推理）。然后冻结训练后的编码器，使用小型单次分类器读取其嵌入，仍然保持无几何推理约束。
AI.result: 训练策略能经济地放置警卫，但在训练范围外会出现覆盖不足的问题。分类器显著减少了可行性差距（约一个数量级），即使在训练范围5倍的情况下仍有效，但明确报告了警卫数量的成本。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习训练的表示已经编码了可行性所需的几何知识，剩余失败反映了解码器校准问题而非知识缺失。通过探测冻结编码器可以了解神经组合求解器内化了什么知识。

title: A Taxonomy of Conceptual Alignment in Human-Robot Dialogue
comment: 8 pages, 2 figures. To be presented at RO-MAN 2026
summary: Successful conversations require speakers to align on the meaning of concepts, a challenging but crucial task for human-robot interaction. Understanding the process of establishing such alignment is hindered by competing interpretations of the term and isolated, unidirectional investigations of its design space. This paper argues for a design-centric understanding of conceptual alignment as a bidirectional and co-constructive process. We introduce a taxonomy that characterizes conceptual alignment dialogues along what triggers its initiation and what level(s) of conceptual understanding it concerns. We further present a dialogue act schema as an operational tool that captures the interactional moves through which alignment is achieved. Together, these contributions provide a structured foundation for analyzing, comparing, and designing conceptual alignment in human-robot interaction.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种设计导向的概念对齐理解框架，将其视为双向共建过程，并提供了用于分析和设计人机交互中概念对齐对话的分类法和对话行为模式。
AI.motivation: 成功的对话需要说话者在概念含义上达成一致，这对于人机交互至关重要。然而，目前对概念对齐的理解存在术语竞争性解释和孤立、单向的研究，阻碍了对这一过程的理解。
AI.method:
1. 提出将概念对齐视为双向共建过程的设计导向理解框架
2. 引入分类法，根据对话触发因素和所涉及的概念理解层次来表征概念对齐对话
3. 提出对话行为模式作为操作工具，捕捉实现对齐的交互动作
AI.result: 建立了一个结构化框架，用于分析、比较和设计人机交互中的概念对齐，为研究者和实践者提供了系统的方法论工具。
AI.conclusion: 通过将概念对齐重新定义为双向共建过程，并提供分类法和对话行为模式，该研究为人机交互中的概念对齐分析、比较和设计奠定了结构化基础，有助于改善人机对话质量。

title: Semi-Supervised Vision-Language-Action Model
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models enable robots to predict actions directly from visual observations and language instructions, but adapting them to new environments still depends on costly action-labeled demonstrations. To reduce this dependence, we study semi-supervised VLA adaptation under limited supervision signals, where only a small portion of trajectories contain robot actions and the remaining trajectories provide action-unlabeled vision-language observations. Unlike standard semi-supervised learning, the missing supervision is an embodied action signal that must be visually grounded, language-consistent, physically feasible, and temporally stable. To address this problem, we propose SemiVLA, a self-distilled teacher-student framework that learns from reliable pseudo-actions on unlabeled trajectories. SemiVLA introduces a VLA-specific reliability controller to assess vision-language alignment, action feasibility, and temporal transition consistency, and further updates the teacher through a Bottleneck-Projected Alignment Update to avoid noisy feedback contamination. With OpenVLA as the backbone, SemiVLA consistently improves multiple PEFT strategies across LIBERO and CALVIN. Under 10\% labeled trajectories, SemiVLA with Selective LoRA achieves 89.0\% average success on LIBERO, outperforming supervised LoRA by 8.0 points without extra inference cost.

AI.tldr: SemiVLA 是一个自蒸馏的师生框架，用于在只有少量动作标注轨迹的情况下适应视觉-语言-动作模型，通过可靠性控制从无标注轨迹中学习伪动作，显著提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: VLA模型需要大量动作标注数据来适应新环境，但获取这些标注成本高昂。本文研究在有限监督信号下（只有小部分轨迹包含机器人动作，其余只有视觉-语言观测）的半监督VLA适应问题。
AI.method: 提出SemiVLA框架，包含：1）VLA特定的可靠性控制器，评估视觉-语言对齐、动作可行性和时间过渡一致性；2）瓶颈投影对齐更新，避免噪声反馈污染教师模型；3）以OpenVLA为骨干，结合多种PEFT策略。
AI.result: 在LIBERO和CALVIN基准测试中，SemiVLA持续改进多种PEFT策略。在10%标注轨迹下，SemiVLA结合Selective LoRA在LIBERO上达到89.0%平均成功率，比监督LoRA高出8.0个百分点，且无额外推理成本。
AI.conclusion: SemiVLA通过自蒸馏和可靠性控制，有效利用无标注轨迹学习伪动作，显著减少对昂贵动作标注的依赖，为半监督VLA适应提供了有效解决方案。

title: The Two-Hump Problem: Bridging the Difficulty Gap in Mathematical Reinforcement Learning
comment: Accepted at ICML 2026. 38 pages, 9 figures. Code and datasets: https://github.com/Math-AI-Caltech/ACSolverX
summary: Mathematical search problems present a unique challenge for Reinforcement Learning (RL) due to vast search spaces and sparse rewards. In previous works, the Andrews-Curtis (AC) conjecture was established as an illustrative example of such problems. In this work, we identify a critical structural barrier in the AC landscape: a "Two-Hump" distribution, where problem instances are either trivially solvable or effectively impossible, with a scarcity of intermediate "hard-but-solvable" instances required for effective learning. We tackle this challenge through two primary avenues: novel data generation techniques to populate the difficulty gap, and significant algorithmic enhancements including the introduction of supermoves and Transformer-based architectures. We demonstrate substantial performance improvements over previous baselines, and release new comprehensive benchmark datasets including AC-19 (125,192 AC-trivial presentations of varying difficulty with length at most 19) and AC-1M (1,136,154 hard AC-trivial presentations of length at most 30), the first large-scale, publicly available datasets of this kind.

AI.tldr: 该论文针对数学搜索问题中的Andrews-Curtis猜想，识别了"双峰"分布的结构障碍，通过新数据生成和算法改进（包括supermoves和Transformer架构）显著提升了性能，并发布了大规模基准数据集。
AI.motivation: 数学搜索问题对强化学习具有挑战性，因为搜索空间巨大且奖励稀疏。Andrews-Curtis猜想作为这类问题的典型案例，存在"双峰"分布的结构障碍：问题实例要么容易解决，要么几乎不可能解决，缺乏中间难度的"困难但可解"实例，这阻碍了有效学习。
AI.method: 采用两种主要方法：1）新颖的数据生成技术来填补难度空白；2）重要的算法增强，包括引入supermoves（超移动）和基于Transformer的架构。
AI.result: 相比之前的基线方法，展示了显著的性能改进。发布了新的综合基准数据集：AC-19（125,192个长度不超过19的AC平凡表示，难度各异）和AC-1M（1,136,154个长度不超过30的困难AC平凡表示），这是首个此类大规模公开数据集。
AI.conclusion: 通过识别Andrews-Curtis猜想中的"双峰"分布结构障碍，并采用数据生成和算法改进相结合的方法，成功克服了数学搜索问题中强化学习面临的挑战，为相关研究提供了新的基准和工具。

title: Do Rigid-Body Simulators Dream of Soft Robots? Learning Contact-Rich Manipulation for Tendon-Driven Continuum Robots
summary: Learning contact-rich, whole-body manipulation for soft continuum robots is held back by the lack of simulation infrastructure that has accelerated rigid-robot manipulation. Existing soft robot simulators are physically grounded but lack the contact handling, actuation support, or learning integration needed for contact-rich manipulation; rigid-body approximations offer these capabilities but sacrifice physical grounding. We bridge this gap for tendon-driven continuum robots (TDCRs) by deriving a continuum-mechanics-informed discretization that places the soft robot natively inside MuJoCo, unifying tendon forces, body contact, and dynamics in a single physics pipeline. We validate the simulator against a Cosserat rod reference (static and dynamic) and real TDCR hardware. We then train state-based imitation learning policies via teleoperation in simulation and deploy them zero-shot to a physical 3-segment TDCR on a 7-DoF Franka arm across two contact-rich manipulation tasks. To our knowledge, this is the first demonstration of sim-to-real transfer for contact-rich manipulation with continuum robots.

AI.tldr: 开发了一个基于MuJoCo的肌腱驱动连续体机器人仿真器，实现物理精确的接触处理，并首次展示了连续体机器人在接触丰富操作任务中的仿真到现实迁移。
AI.motivation: 连续体机器人缺乏像刚性机器人那样的仿真基础设施，现有仿真器要么物理不准确，要么缺少接触处理能力，这阻碍了学习接触丰富的全身操作。
AI.method: 提出了基于连续介质力学的离散化方法，将软体机器人原生集成到MuJoCo中，统一肌腱力、身体接触和动力学，并通过状态模仿学习策略在仿真中训练。
AI.result: 仿真器在静态和动态方面验证有效，成功将仿真中训练的模仿学习策略零样本部署到3段TDCR硬件上，完成两个接触丰富的操作任务。
AI.conclusion: 这是首次展示连续体机器人在接触丰富操作任务中的仿真到现实迁移，为软体机器人操作学习提供了关键基础设施。

title: Compressing Observation History into Agent Memory: Distilling Transformers into Recurrent Transformers
summary: Transformers are AI's workhorse with strong performance in modeling sequential data, but their computational cost becomes prohibitive when processing long sequences. We target long-horizon streaming vision and robotics applications like map-free pose estimation, where it is particularly impractical to store and maintain a history of observations. Recurrent Transformers address this limitation by maintaining fixed-size memory but their performance lags behind that of transformers operating over the full observation history. We argue that this gap does not stem from architectural limitations, but from differences in how these models learn to compress past information. Without access to an observation history, recurrent models must explicitly decide what to retain in memory at each step, a significantly harder learning problem. In this work, we propose a distillation approach that transfers the compression strategy of a classical full-history transformer to a recurrent variant. We enable this by designing a teacher model that explicitly compresses its observation history into a fixed-size bottleneck representation. By directly supervising the student's memory with this bottleneck representation, we align the two compression mechanisms. We show that this approach allows to train a recurrent latent robotic memory with linear-time complexity while substantially narrowing the performance gap to full-history transformers.

AI.tldr: 提出一种蒸馏方法，将全历史Transformer的压缩策略转移到循环Transformer，以缩小性能差距并实现线性时间复杂度的机器人记忆
AI.motivation: 循环Transformer在处理长序列时计算成本低，但性能落后于全历史Transformer。作者认为这种差距不是架构限制，而是学习压缩过去信息的策略不同导致的。循环模型必须显式决定每一步保留什么信息，这是一个更困难的学习问题。
AI.method: 设计一个教师模型，将观察历史显式压缩为固定大小的瓶颈表示。通过用这种瓶颈表示直接监督学生模型的记忆，使两种压缩机制对齐。这种方法可以训练具有线性时间复杂度的循环潜在机器人记忆。
AI.result: 该方法显著缩小了循环Transformer与全历史Transformer之间的性能差距，同时保持了线性时间复杂度的优势。
AI.conclusion: 通过蒸馏方法将全历史Transformer的压缩策略转移到循环变体，可以在保持计算效率的同时提升循环模型的性能，适用于长时域流式视觉和机器人应用。

title: HERALD: High-Throughput Block Diffusion LLM Serving via CPU-GPU Cooperative KV Cache Retrieval
summary: Diffusion LLMs (dLLMs) improve GPU utilization over autoregressive decoding by generating multiple tokens per forward pass, but their KV cache still grows linearly with context, limiting throughput at long contexts. KV cache offloading to host DRAM alleviates this memory pressure, but the limited PCIe bandwidth necessitates recalling only a sparse subset of KV entries. In block dLLMs, the relevant KV entries remain consistent across denoising steps within a block, enabling high-accuracy selection by identifying the top-k entries once and reusing them throughout all denoising steps. This property appears attractive for offloading as it amortizes the selection overhead across the entire block, but it requires exact attention over the full KV cache, which is too expensive under offloading. We present HERALD, a KV offloading system for block dLLMs that resolves this through two opportunities that reduce the required selection compute by a factor of the block size and enable selection to be overlapped with denoising. Across three block dLLMs and five long context tasks, HERALD achieves near-lossless accuracy at 5-10% KV budget and up to 1.59x lower per block latency and 2.47x higher throughput over GPU-only inference, with speedups growing with context length.

AI.tldr: HERALD是一个针对块扩散大语言模型的KV缓存卸载系统，通过稀疏选择和计算优化，在长上下文场景下实现高效推理。
AI.motivation: 扩散LLMs虽然通过每前向传递生成多个令牌提高了GPU利用率，但其KV缓存随上下文线性增长，限制了长上下文下的吞吐量。KV缓存卸载到主机DRAM可以缓解内存压力，但PCIe带宽有限，需要稀疏选择KV条目。
AI.method: HERALD利用块扩散LLMs的特性：在块内去噪步骤中相关KV条目保持一致性，通过一次性识别top-k条目并在所有去噪步骤中重用，将选择开销分摊到整个块。系统通过两个机会减少所需选择计算（减少因子为块大小），并使选择与去噪重叠。
AI.result: 在三个块扩散LLMs和五个长上下文任务上，HERALD以5-10%的KV预算实现近乎无损的准确性，相比纯GPU推理，每块延迟降低1.59倍，吞吐量提高2.47倍，且随着上下文长度增加，加速效果更明显。
AI.conclusion: HERALD系统有效解决了扩散LLMs在长上下文推理中的KV缓存内存瓶颈问题，通过智能的稀疏选择和计算优化，实现了高效的内存卸载和性能提升。

title: SPiralRoll: A Novel Adjustable-Stiffness Underactuated 3-DoF Joint with Torsion Springs for Rolling Robots
summary: Compliant mechanisms are important in robotics because they can improve adaptability, safety, and energy efficiency while reducing hardware complexity. This paper presents SPiralRoll, a novel torsion-spring-based underactuated compliant mechanism for rolling robots and compliant robotic actuation. The mechanism uses arc-distributed elastic members and two motor inputs to realize three physically observable output motions: rotational motion, radial expansion/contraction, and axial spin induced by nonlinear compliant deformation. Two configurations, namely full-arc and single-arc designs, are developed and experimentally evaluated. Beyond benchtop validation, the mechanism is integrated into a spherical rolling robot, where proof-of-concept experiments demonstrate forward rolling and turning. The results show that the full-arc design provides better structural support and smoother deformation, whereas the single-arc design yields larger deformation and stronger inertial excitation, making it more suitable for pendulum-driven rolling locomotion. Overall, SPiralRoll provides a low-cost, compact, and fully 3D-printable solution for underactuated compliant rolling robots and adaptive robotic joints.

AI.tldr: SPiralRoll是一种基于扭簧的欠驱动柔顺机构，用于滚动机器人和柔顺驱动，通过弧形分布的弹性元件和两个电机输入实现三种输出运动，具有低成本、紧凑、可3D打印的特点。
AI.motivation: 柔顺机构在机器人中很重要，可以提高适应性、安全性和能源效率，同时降低硬件复杂性。需要开发一种新型的欠驱动柔顺机构来满足滚动机器人和柔顺驱动应用的需求。
AI.method: 提出SPiralRoll机构，采用弧形分布的弹性元件和两个电机输入，实现旋转运动、径向膨胀/收缩以及由非线性柔顺变形引起的轴向自旋。开发了全弧设计和单弧设计两种配置，并进行了实验评估。将机构集成到球形滚动机器人中进行验证。
AI.result: 全弧设计提供更好的结构支撑和更平滑的变形，而单弧设计产生更大的变形和更强的惯性激励，更适合摆驱动滚动运动。概念验证实验展示了前向滚动和转向功能。
AI.conclusion: SPiralRoll为欠驱动柔顺滚动机器人和自适应机器人关节提供了一种低成本、紧凑、完全可3D打印的解决方案。两种设计各有优势，可根据具体应用需求选择。

title: A Smart Classroom Behavior Analysis Framework with a New Highly Congested Classroom Dataset
summary: Student behavior detection is important for intelligent classroom analysis but remains challenging in large-class scenarios due to dense instance co-occurrence, asymmetric occlusion, depth-wise scale variation, and fine-grained semantic degradation in distant targets. Existing classroom behavior datasets and general-purpose detectors are insufficient to characterize and address these challenges. This paper constructs the Highly Congested Classroom Behavior (HCCB) dataset, containing 50,229 student behavior instances across seven categories: reading, writing, heads up, sleeping, looking around, bowing head, and using phone. HCCB provides a challenging benchmark that integrates dense distributions, severe occlusion, scale variation, and fine-grained behavioral semantics. To address these issues, we propose ODER-HSFNet, a YOLO-based detection framework tailored to highly crowded classrooms. At its core, ODER-HSFNet introduces three task-specific innovations: the Occlusion-aware Deformable Edge Rectifier (ODER), which strengthens boundary evidence under occlusion; the Hypergraph-State Spatial Fusion (HSSF) module, which integrates local structure enhancement, state-space contextual modeling, and high-order relation aggregation; and the Occlusion-Calibrated Detection Head (OCDetect), which suppresses low-quality Pre-NMS candidates and reduces false positives from occlusion boundaries and neighboring instances. Experiments on two classroom behavior detection datasets show that ODER-HSFNet outperforms mainstream YOLO-series methods, achieving 60.60%/80.12% mAP50:95/mAP50 on HCCB and 57.36%/74.65% on SCB-D3-S. Ablation studies further verify the effectiveness of the proposed design for highly crowded classroom behavior detection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ODER-HSFNet框架，针对拥挤课堂中学生行为检测的挑战（密集实例、遮挡、尺度变化、语义退化），在HCCB数据集上取得60.60%/80.12%的mAP50:95/mAP50性能。
AI.motivation: 现有课堂行为数据集和通用检测器难以应对大班教学场景中的密集实例共存、非对称遮挡、深度尺度变化和远距离目标细粒度语义退化等挑战。
AI.method: 提出ODER-HSFNet框架，包含三个核心创新：ODER模块（遮挡感知可变形边缘矫正器）增强遮挡下的边界证据；HSSF模块（超图状态空间融合）整合局部结构增强、状态空间上下文建模和高阶关系聚合；OCDetect检测头（遮挡校准）抑制低质量候选框并减少遮挡边界和相邻实例的误报。
AI.result: 在两个课堂行为检测数据集上，ODER-HSFNet优于主流YOLO系列方法，在HCCB数据集上达到60.60%/80.12%的mAP50:95/mAP50，在SCB-D3-S数据集上达到57.36%/74.65%。消融实验验证了所提设计的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文构建了HCCB数据集并提出了针对高度拥挤课堂的ODER-HSFNet检测框架，有效解决了密集分布、严重遮挡、尺度变化和细粒度行为语义等挑战，为智能课堂分析提供了更好的解决方案。

title: A new classification method based on Minimum Spanning Trees
summary: Minimum Spanning Trees have been used in unsupervised learning, particularly in clustering tasks, due to their ability to recognize clusters by removing edges that are considered inconsistent in defining those clusters. This paper aims to study the use of Minimum Spanning Trees in supervised learning. Specifically, we propose a classification algorithm based on Minimum Spanning Trees. To improve its performance, we introduce a robust version of the method that is also computationally more efficient. We evaluate the effectiveness of our proposed method through an extensive simulation study. We also apply the proposed methodology to a real-world case study involving aircraft trajectories.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了最小生成树在监督学习中的应用，提出了一种基于最小生成树的分类算法，并开发了更鲁棒、计算更高效的版本。
AI.motivation: 最小生成树在无监督学习（特别是聚类任务）中已有应用，但该论文旨在探索其在监督学习中的应用潜力，特别是用于分类任务。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于最小生成树的分类算法，并进一步开发了鲁棒版本以提高性能并降低计算复杂度。
AI.result: 通过广泛的模拟研究评估了所提方法的有效性，并应用于飞机轨迹的真实案例研究。
AI.conclusion: 最小生成树可以成功应用于监督学习分类任务，提出的鲁棒版本在性能和计算效率方面都有改进。

title: BLENDS: Bayesian Learning-Enhanced Deep Smoothing for GNSS-Denied Environments
summary: Maintaining accurate navigation during GNSS outages remains a significant challenge for autonomous systems relying on low-cost inertial sensors. While classical smoothing methods, such as the two-filter smoother and Rauch-Tung-Striebel smoother, exploit measurements collected before and after an outage, their performance remains limited by the accuracy of conventional GNSS measurements. This paper presents Bayesian learning-enhanced navigation with deep smoothing (BLENDS), a transformer-based framework that augments Bayesian smoothing with learned covariance adaptation and state correction. The proposed method preserves the statistical foundations of Bayesian estimation while leveraging data-driven learning to improve navigation accuracy. Evaluations on the quadrotor dataset with GNSS outages demonstrate that BLENDS consistently outperforms both model-based smoothers, achieving up to 25.6% improvement in the position root mean square error while also reducing estimation uncertainty. Furthermore, BLENDS learns to compensate for the systematic bias between conventional GNSS positioning and RTK ground truth, enabling accuracy beyond that achievable with conventional GNSS measurements alone. The results demonstrate the potential of learning-enhanced Bayesian smoothing for resilient and high-accuracy navigation in GNSS-challenged environments.

AI.tldr: BLENDS是一种基于Transformer的贝叶斯平滑框架，通过数据驱动学习增强导航精度，在GNSS中断时显著提升位置估计准确性。
AI.motivation: GNSS中断时，低成本惯性传感器的导航精度保持是自主系统的重大挑战。传统平滑方法受限于常规GNSS测量精度，需要更先进的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出BLENDS框架，结合贝叶斯平滑与深度学习，使用Transformer架构进行协方差自适应和状态校正，在保持贝叶斯估计统计基础的同时利用数据驱动学习。
AI.result: 在四旋翼数据集GNSS中断测试中，BLENDS比传统模型平滑器提升达25.6%的位置均方根误差，同时降低估计不确定性，并能补偿常规GNSS与RTK地面真值间的系统偏差。
AI.conclusion: BLENDS展示了学习增强贝叶斯平滑在GNSS挑战环境中实现弹性和高精度导航的潜力，超越了仅依赖常规GNSS测量的精度极限。

title: The Unreasonable Effectiveness of VLMs for Zero-shot Procedural Mistake Detection
summary: Procedural mistake detection is important for quality control and user assistance across many disciplines. Recent work in this field has achieved significant gains by using the reasoning capabilities of Video-Language Models (VLMs) as components within multi-stage pipelines, which consist of separate modules for supervised temporal action segmentation, error detection, and explainability. Consequently, they remain dependent on tailored training datasets and require task-specific training, limiting their wider applicability. To remedy this, we introduce zero-shot procedural mistake detection and propose a unified Zero-shot Procedural Mistake detection (ZeProM) framework that jointly solves procedural mistake detection and temporal action segmentation with a single pre-trained VLM. By evaluating our framework on two canonical mistake detection benchmarks, EgoPER and CaptainCook4D, we find that ZeProM can perform these tasks successfully, while approaching, or even outperforming, the performance of fully supervised methods. For instance, we achieve a 4.4 point improvement in EDA and a 2.0 point improvement in F1@.5 on average over all five EgoPER tasks compared to the strongest supervised methods. Overall, our results show the potential of unified methods for procedural mistake detection, and we hope this will steer the field away from highly complex pipelines and toward more generally applicable solutions.

AI.tldr: ZeProM是一个统一的零样本程序错误检测框架，使用单一预训练视频语言模型联合解决程序错误检测和时间动作分割，无需特定任务训练，在多个基准测试中达到甚至超越全监督方法性能。
AI.motivation: 现有程序错误检测方法依赖多阶段流水线（监督时间动作分割、错误检测、可解释性模块），需要定制训练数据和任务特定训练，限制了广泛应用。需要更通用的零样本解决方案。
AI.method: 提出ZeProM框架，使用单一预训练视频语言模型联合处理程序错误检测和时间动作分割，实现零样本学习，避免复杂流水线和特定任务训练。
AI.result: 在EgoPER和CaptainCook4D两个基准测试中，ZeProM成功执行任务，性能接近甚至超越全监督方法。在EgoPER的五个任务上，平均EDA提升4.4点，F1@.5提升2.0点。
AI.conclusion: 统一方法在程序错误检测中具有潜力，应推动领域从复杂流水线转向更通用的解决方案，为质量控制和用户协助提供广泛适用工具。
