title: When Is an LLM Worth It for Hyperparameter Optimization? A Budget-Matched Study on Tabular Data Finds the Warm-Start Is a Default Configuration, Not the Model
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have been proposed as hyperparameter-optimization (HPO) advisors that "warm-start" search from prior knowledge, proposing strong configurations in very few evaluations. We test that claim under a budget-matched, multi-seed protocol on eight PMLB tabular benchmarks, comparing an LLM advisor (LLM-OptFlow) against four classical baselines (random search, Optuna-TPE, Gaussian-process Bayesian optimization, and successive halving) over one shared search space, with paired tests and bootstrap 95% CIs across 8 x 5 = 40 (task, seed) units. The finding is cautionary. The advisor's strong first point is not an LLM output at all: like prior LLM-HPO systems the loop is seeded with a fixed default configuration, evaluated before any model call, which alone reaches 88.7% mean best-CV, identical to within 0.01 pp across all seven advisor models tested. The LLM's own proposals add only +0.40 pp of cross-validation accuracy over that seed and nothing on held-out test (LLM-Default = -0.01 pp, p = 0.92). When the same seed is granted to classical search, the apparent lead collapses: against seeded random search it leads by +0.20 pp at 2 evaluations, is tied by 5, and is behind by 12 (-0.37 pp). Without the seed, classical search ties the advisor by 12 evaluations and beats it by 40 (+0.6 to +0.8 pp, p <= 1e-4). Two LLM-specific behaviors survive: a single-task exploration failure (vehicle), and a rule-based confidence filter that removes ~33% of wasted compute without changing accuracy. The recommendation is deflationary: on tabular HPO, seed classical search with a sensible default; an LLM advisor adds no measurable generalization benefit and is overtaken within a handful of evaluations. We release the harness and a script that reproduces every statistic.

AI.tldr: LLM在超参数优化中作为"热启动"顾问的效果被夸大，实际表现主要依赖初始默认配置，而非LLM自身的建议
AI.motivation: 验证LLM作为超参数优化顾问的声称效果，即能否通过先验知识"热启动"搜索，在少量评估中提出强配置
AI.method: 在8个PMLB表格基准上，采用预算匹配、多种子协议，比较LLM顾问(LLM-OptFlow)与四种经典基线方法，使用配对测试和95%置信区间
AI.result: LLM顾问的强初始点实际来自固定默认配置，而非LLM输出；LLM自身建议仅增加0.40pp交叉验证精度；与经典搜索相比，LLM优势短暂且最终被超越
AI.conclusion: 在表格超参数优化中，建议用合理默认配置种子化经典搜索；LLM顾问未提供可测量的泛化收益，在少量评估内即被超越

title: Scalable Multi-Task Data Generation via Reinforcement Learning for Language-Conditioned Bimanual Dexterous Manipulation
summary: A key bottleneck in training generalist policies for bimanual dexterous manipulation is the lack of large-scale, high-quality datasets. Synthetic data generation in simulation provides a scalable alternative to human video demonstrations by overcoming challenges such as morphology mismatch, missing physical interactions, and the generation of robot actions. However, existing approaches based on human teleoperation offer limited task diversity, as object-centric trajectory matching often neglects the feasibility of robot execution. Reinforcement learning (RL) enables broader scalability but is often constrained by handcrafted, task-specific rewards. In this work, we propose a systematic RL-based data generation pipeline that integrates generalizable reward design, effective domain randomization, and language-conditioned task annotations. This pipeline synthesizes diverse, high-quality datasets for dexterous bimanual manipulation and enables training of language-conditioned multi-task policies. Our experiments show that the generated data significantly improves generalization across three representative manipulation tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出一个基于强化学习的系统化数据生成管道，用于生成双手灵巧操作的大规模高质量数据集，解决了现有方法任务多样性有限的问题。
AI.motivation: 训练通用双手灵巧操作策略的关键瓶颈是缺乏大规模高质量数据集。现有方法存在局限性：人类遥操作任务多样性有限，物体中心轨迹匹配常忽略机器人执行可行性；强化学习虽可扩展但受限于手工设计的任务特定奖励。
AI.method: 提出了一个系统化的RL数据生成管道，整合了可泛化的奖励设计、有效的领域随机化和语言条件任务标注。该管道能够合成多样化的高质量双手灵巧操作数据集，并支持训练语言条件多任务策略。
AI.result: 实验表明生成的数据显著提升了在三个代表性操作任务上的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 提出的系统化RL数据生成管道能够有效解决双手灵巧操作数据集稀缺问题，通过整合可泛化奖励、领域随机化和语言标注，实现了多样化高质量数据生成，从而提升了策略的泛化性能。

title: Radial Basis Function Networks as Projection Heads in Self-Supervised Learning
summary: Self-supervised learning (SSL) typically relies on a backbone encoder followed by a small multilayer perceptron (MLP) projection head, which is conventionally discarded after training, while backbone quality is assessed via costly linear probing on labeled data. We argue that this approach including discarding the projector is rather computationally wasteful. Instead, we propose replacing the MLP head with a radial basis function network (RBFN), whose interpretable center and shape parameters can be exploited to judge representation quality without labels or a separate classifier. To this end, we introduce Scale-Normalized Separation (SNS), a novel label-free quality metric derived solely from the kernel centers and shapes learned during training. Across five canonical SSL architectures (MoCo, SimCLR, BYOL, SwAV and SimSiam) and four image classification datasets, we show that RBFN projection heads are competitive drop-in replacements for standard MLP projectors. We recommend constructing them with three RBF layers activated by the Gaussian radial basis function. Moreover, SNS exhibits strong to very strong positive correlation with established logistic regression metrics, demonstrating that a trained RBFN projector can act as a reliable proxy for backbone representation quality. We additionally publish a novel PyTorch compatible image classification dataset based on Google's Open Images V7 to facilitate reproducible research into representation learning.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出用RBFN（径向基函数网络）替代传统SSL中的MLP投影头，并引入无标签的质量度量SNS来评估表示质量，避免昂贵的线性探测
AI.motivation: 传统自监督学习在训练后丢弃投影头并依赖昂贵的线性探测来评估主干网络质量，这种方法计算浪费且效率低下
AI.method: 用RBFN替换MLP投影头，引入基于核中心与形状的SNS无标签质量度量，在5种SSL架构上验证，推荐使用3层高斯RBF激活
AI.result: RBFN投影头可作为MLP的竞争性替代品，SNS与传统逻辑回归指标呈强正相关，能可靠评估表示质量，并发布了基于Open Images V7的新数据集
AI.conclusion: RBFN投影头结合SNS度量提供了一种高效、可解释且无需标签的SSL表示质量评估方法，减少了计算浪费

title: A Framework for Directed Acyclic Hypergraph Learning
comment: 3 pages. Accepted and presented as an oral presentation at the 9th Graph Signal Processing Workshop (GSP 2026), June 8-10, 2026, Madrid, Spain
summary: Continuous optimization methods for learning Directed Acyclic Graphs (DAGs) operate on weighted adjacency matrices and are therefore limited to pairwise causal relationships. We propose a framework for learning Directed Acyclic Hypergraphs (DAHGs) from observational data, capturing joint parental influences that pairwise models cannot represent. Our approach rests on three components: (i) a generalized linear structural equation model (SEM) with multiplicative interaction terms whose non-zero weights correspond one-to-one with directed hyperedges; (ii) a weighted adjacency tensor representation whose acyclicity is characterized via nilpotency under the tensor t-product; and (iii) a differentiable acyclicity constraint derived through the Fourier decomposition of the t-product, which reduces tensor nilpotency to slice-wise matrix nilpotency and enables least-squares learning via the augmented Lagrangian method.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种从观测数据中学习有向无环超图（DAHG）的框架，能够捕捉成对模型无法表示的联合父节点影响
AI.motivation: 现有的有向无环图（DAG）学习方法只能处理成对因果关系，无法捕捉多个父节点对子节点的联合影响。为了表示这种联合因果关系，需要扩展到有向无环超图
AI.method: 基于三个核心组件：1）带有乘法交互项的广义线性结构方程模型，其非零权重对应有向超边；2）使用加权邻接张量表示，通过张量t积的幂零性表征无环性；3）通过t积的傅里叶分解导出可微的无环性约束，将张量幂零性简化为切片矩阵幂零性，并通过增广拉格朗日方法进行最小二乘学习
AI.result: 提出了一个能够学习有向无环超图的完整框架，能够表示和发现数据中存在的联合因果关系
AI.conclusion: 该框架扩展了传统的DAG学习方法，能够捕捉更复杂的联合因果关系，为因果发现提供了更强大的建模工具

title: ARP: Enhancing Quantized Skill Abstractions via Visual Alignment and Iterative Refinement for Robotic Manipulation
summary: Learning visuomotor policies for long-horizon manipulation remains a fundamental challenge. Recent skill-based imitation learning methods based on discrete quantization have shown promising results by representing complex behaviors as temporally extended skills. However, most existing approaches primarily encode action trajectories into latent skills, yielding weak visual-semantic grounding and limiting the ability to leverage visual observations for skill selection. Moreover, discrete tokenization inevitably incurs precision errors during continuous action generation. To alleviate these issues, we propose Aligned Refinement Policy (ARP), a discrete-skill framework that couples semantic grounding with execution-level refinement. Specifically, ARP introduces (i) a visual--action alignment objective that contrastively aligns visual embeddings with pre-quantized action representations in a shared latent space while preserving a state-independent skill decoder, and (ii) a lightweight Iterative Residual Head (IRH) that performs a two-step refinement to recover fine-grained control for precise execution. Extensive experiments show that ARP achieves state-of-the-art performance on the LIBERO and Meta-World benchmarks. Moreover, real-robot experiments on the Kuavo 4 Pro humanoid platform further validate its effectiveness, yielding consistent performance gains over several baselines on two challenging manipulation tasks.

AI.tldr: ARP是一个离散技能框架，通过视觉-动作对齐和迭代残差头来提升长时程操作任务的性能，在仿真和真实机器人实验中均取得优异表现。
AI.motivation: 现有基于离散量化的技能模仿学习方法主要编码动作轨迹为潜在技能，导致视觉语义基础薄弱，难以利用视觉观察进行技能选择，且离散化在连续动作生成时会产生精度误差。
AI.method: 提出对齐细化策略(ARP)：1)视觉-动作对齐目标，在共享潜在空间中对齐视觉嵌入与预量化动作表示，同时保持状态无关的技能解码器；2)轻量级迭代残差头(IRH)，通过两步细化恢复精细控制以实现精确执行。
AI.result: 在LIBERO和Meta-World基准测试中达到最先进性能，在Kuavo 4 Pro人形机器人平台上的真实实验进一步验证了其有效性，在两个具有挑战性的操作任务上相比多个基线获得一致性能提升。
AI.conclusion: ARP通过结合语义基础和细粒度执行细化，有效解决了现有离散技能方法在视觉语义基础和动作精度方面的不足，为长时程操作任务提供了有效的解决方案。

title: Boundary-by-Mask: Few-Shot Instance Segmentation with Mask-Conditioned Boundary Learning for Texture-Poor Industrial Parts
summary: Recent advances in large pre-trained models have led to remarkable progress in instance segmentation on general images. However, industrial scenarios remain challenging. Instance definitions are often application-specific and inconsistent, and the domain gap from general imagery is substantial due to weak textures and limited contextual cues. Consequently, a direct application of existing models is unreliable. We propose Boundary-by-Mask, a few-shot instance segmentation framework that supervises boundaries instead of interior appearance. Given a few RGB images and corresponding instance masks, the method extracts rich visual features using a foundation-model encoder and trains a lightweight Signed Distance Function (SDF) head to predict boundary-aware distance maps. Segmentation masks are obtained through an SDF-to-mask reconstruction process. By explicitly estimating contours, the framework achieves reliable instance separation even on low-texture and color-uniform surfaces. The instance definition is conditioned by the instance mask. Replacing the mask specifies the segmentation target, such as the whole object or a sub-part. A pixel-wise shallow MLP head enables rapid training. Experiments on industrial parts and food items with ambiguous boundaries show strong few-shot generalization, robustness in feature-poor conditions, and precise control over mask-level targets.

AI.tldr: 基于边界监督的少样本实例分割框架，通过预测边界感知距离图实现工业场景下的可靠实例分离
AI.motivation: 工业场景实例分割面临挑战：实例定义应用特定且不一致，与通用图像存在显著域差距（纹理弱、上下文线索有限），现有模型直接应用不可靠
AI.method: 提出Boundary-by-Mask框架：使用基础模型编码器提取视觉特征，训练轻量级SDF头预测边界感知距离图，通过SDF到掩码重建过程获得分割掩码
AI.result: 在工业零件和食品等边界模糊场景中表现出强大的少样本泛化能力，在特征匮乏条件下具有鲁棒性，并能精确控制掩码级目标
AI.conclusion: 通过显式估计轮廓，该框架即使在低纹理和颜色均匀表面上也能实现可靠的实例分离，实例定义由实例掩码条件化，替换掩码可指定分割目标

title: Decodable but Not Faithful: Coupling Natural-Language Rationales to Programmatic Verifiers
comment: Accepted to the ICML 2026 AI4Math Workshop as a poster
summary: Language models can generate plausible rationales for their predictions, but these explanations may not faithfully represent the model's internal reasoning. We propose verifier-coupled reasoning, a framework that inserts inline claims into reasoning traces and trains an auxiliary consistency head to predict programmatic verifier outputs from rationale-span hidden states. The central finding is a gap between decodability and faithfulness: consistency training reliably makes verifier information decodable from rationale representations, but decodability does not guarantee faithful generation. In LeanCheck (formal theorem proving), rationale-only and proof-only pooling achieve perfect directional separation under counterfactual conflict. In KataGo (Go engine), commentary spans encode 10-way win-rate buckets at 81% accuracy. Yet in a code setting, the model achieves 98.6% coupling while its generated explanations remain unfaithful: fluent prose with correct structured claims, but describing unrelated algorithms; a controlled pretrained-vs-from-scratch comparison shows the gap is not capacity-driven. Synthetic activation patching confirms causal influence (73-89% vs. 31% baseline), FEVER reveals that evidence-only pooling isolates genuine evidence sensitivity at the cost of raw accuracy, and per-claim analysis shows that consistency loss disproportionately benefits fine-grained claims over binary ones. These results establish that consistency losses are effective diagnostics and representation-shaping tools, but not sufficient conditions for faithful reasoning.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出验证器耦合推理框架，通过插入内联声明到推理轨迹并训练一致性头来解码验证器输出，发现可解码性与忠实性之间存在差距：模型能解码验证信息但生成的解释不忠实。
AI.motivation: 语言模型生成的解释可能不忠实反映其内部推理过程，需要开发能够评估和确保解释忠实性的方法。
AI.method: 提出验证器耦合推理框架：1) 在推理轨迹中插入内联声明；2) 训练辅助一致性头从理性跨度隐藏状态预测程序化验证器输出；3) 在不同任务（定理证明、围棋、代码）中测试。
AI.result: 1) 可解码性与忠实性存在差距：一致性训练使验证信息可解码，但可解码不保证忠实生成；2) LeanCheck中实现完美方向分离；3) KataGo中编码胜率准确率达81%；4) 代码场景中耦合率达98.6%但解释不忠实；5) 合成激活修补证实因果影响（73-89% vs 31%基线）。
AI.conclusion: 一致性损失是有效的诊断和表征塑造工具，但不是忠实推理的充分条件，需要进一步研究确保解释忠实性的方法。

title: PenduMorph: Development and Motion Analysis of Pendulum-Actuated Rolling Reconfigurable Spherical Robot with Magnetic-Coupling
summary: This paper presents "PenduMorph", a wireless reconfigurable rolling spherical robot designed as a modular platform for enclosed locomotion and inter-module interaction in challenging environments. The proposed robot extends our previous pendulum-actuated rolling disk concept to a fully enclosed spherical architecture integrating a 2-DoF internal pendulum, onboard control, battery-powered operation, and magnetic docking. The design aims to combine independent rolling mobility with protected hardware and reliable reconfigurability. We first present the robot design and an analytical study of the magnetic coupling mechanism to evaluate retention and interaction between coupled modules. We then experimentally investigate key motion behaviors at both the single-module and dual-module levels, including independent rolling, magnetic coupling, and coordinated coupled motion. The results show that the proposed platform enables stable wireless operation and a set of distinctive reconfigurable rolling behaviors, providing a useful foundation for future modular spherical robots operating in contact-rich and demanding environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无线可重构球形滚动机器人PenduMorph，作为模块化平台，用于在挑战性环境中实现封闭式运动与模块间交互。
AI.motivation: 设计一种结合独立滚动移动、硬件保护与可靠可重构性的模块化球形机器人，用于接触密集和苛刻环境中的操作。
AI.method: 将先前摆锤驱动的滚动圆盘概念扩展到完全封闭的球形架构，集成2自由度内部摆锤、板载控制、电池供电和磁性对接，并分析磁性耦合机制。
AI.result: 实验表明该平台支持稳定无线操作和一系列独特的可重构滚动行为，包括独立滚动、磁性耦合和协调耦合运动。
AI.conclusion: PenduMorph为未来在接触密集和苛刻环境中运行的模块化球形机器人提供了有用基础。

title: $φ$-Scene: Physically Grounded Image-to-3D Scene Reconstruction
summary: Reconstructing compositional 3D scenes from a single image is a fundamental challenge in 3D world modeling. Recent methods can recover high-fidelity, complete 3D objects and predict plausible scene arrangements, but most still treat scene reconstruction primarily as a visual and geometric prediction problem. Their outputs may therefore contain floating objects, interpenetrations, or unstable-contact artifacts, limiting their physical validity and downstream usability in simulation, robotics, and interactive environments. We present $φ$-Scene, a physically grounded approach to open-vocabulary and compositional image-to-3D scene reconstruction. The key premise is that a reconstructed scene should not be treated merely as a set of objects with predicted poses, but as a stable physical system. Accordingly, $φ$-Scene formulates reconstruction as topology-driven physical assembly: it infers how objects support one another, orders them accordingly, and progressively settles each object against its already stabilized support context. For each object in topological order, SDF-based optimization first resolves penetrations against the pre-settled support context, and rigid-body simulation then settles the object into a stable contact configuration under real-world physical constraints. Experiments on 3D-Front show that $φ$-Scene achieves the strongest overall performance among out-of-domain methods and remains highly competitive with in-domain baselines. Human and VLM evaluations further show strong preference for $φ$-Scene in visual quality, reference alignment, and physical plausibility. Finally, dedicated physical plausibility metrics covering static contact quality and dynamic stability demonstrate that $φ$-Scene substantially reduces penetration artifacts while producing much lower post-simulation drift, indicating more stable and physically grounded 3D scenes.

AI.tldr: φ-Scene：一种基于物理的开放词汇图像到3D场景重建方法，通过拓扑驱动的物理装配解决现有方法中物体漂浮、穿透等物理不合理问题
AI.motivation: 现有3D场景重建方法主要关注视觉和几何预测，但输出常包含漂浮物体、穿透或不稳定接触等物理不合理现象，限制了在仿真、机器人等下游应用中的实用性。需要一种能够生成物理合理3D场景的方法。
AI.method: φ-Scene将场景重建视为拓扑驱动的物理装配：1)推断物体间的支撑关系并排序；2)按拓扑顺序逐步稳定每个物体；3)对每个物体，先用SDF优化解决与已稳定支撑环境的穿透问题，再用刚体仿真在真实物理约束下将物体稳定到接触配置。
AI.result: 在3D-Front数据集上，φ-Scene在域外方法中表现最佳，与域内基线方法竞争力相当。人类和VLM评估都更偏好φ-Scene的视觉质量、参考对齐和物理合理性。专门的物理合理性指标显示φ-Scene显著减少了穿透伪影，并产生更低的仿真后漂移，表明生成更稳定、物理更合理的3D场景。
AI.conclusion: φ-Scene通过将场景重建视为物理系统而非单纯几何预测，实现了更物理合理的3D场景重建，为下游应用提供了更实用的3D场景模型。

title: Expressivity Saturation: Reduced Affine Region Usage Under Increasing Task Complexity
summary: Piecewise-affine neural networks (e.g., with ReLU or LeakyReLU activations) implement continuous piecewise-affine maps, and the number of affine regions provides a natural proxy for expressive capacity. However, the gap between theoretical region capacity and the affine regions realized after training remains insufficiently understood. We study this gap from two complementary perspectives. First, we give a rigorous, architecture-dependent theorem for affine line-segment probes: for multilayer perceptrons with piecewise-affine activations, the number of affine pieces realized along an affine line-segment probe is upper bounded by an explicit product of layer-wise width terms (and activation breakpoint factors). This yields a neuron-threshold lower bound for representing target functions with prescribed one-dimensional piece complexity, formalizing the minimal region budget required for complex signals. Second, we exactly enumerate affine regions realized within bounded 2D and higher-dimensional domains under controlled task complexity. Under fixed architectures and training protocols, increasing input--label complexity yields trained solutions with markedly fewer realized regions in the evaluation domain, even though worst-case architectural capacity is unchanged; we call this reduced region usage expressivity saturation. Moreover, in the most challenging regimes, 2D visualizations show that region-usage collapse often coincides with degraded decision boundaries. Finally, we visualize the training dynamics of affine-region partitions and decision boundaries, revealing a consistent refinement process during optimization.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了分段仿射神经网络（如ReLU/LeakyReLU激活）的理论区域容量与实际训练后实现的仿射区域之间的差距，提出了"表达性饱和"概念，并分析了区域使用与决策边界质量的关系。
AI.motivation: 分段仿射神经网络的理论区域容量（仿射区域数量）与实际训练后实现的区域之间存在未充分理解的差距。本文旨在从两个互补视角研究这一差距：一是通过仿射线段探测给出严格的架构相关定理，二是在受控任务复杂度下精确枚举实现的仿射区域。
AI.method: 1. 提出仿射线段探测方法：对于多层感知机，给出沿仿射线段实现的仿射片段数量的显式上界（层宽乘积与激活断点因子的乘积）。2. 在有限2D及高维域中精确枚举实现的仿射区域，分析输入-标签复杂度增加时区域使用变化。3. 可视化训练动态中的仿射区域划分和决策边界演变。
AI.result: 1. 获得了架构依赖的严格上界定理，为表示目标函数所需的最小区域预算提供了形式化下界。2. 发现随着输入-标签复杂度增加，训练解在评估域中实现的区域显著减少（表达性饱和），即使最坏情况架构容量不变。3. 在最困难情况下，2D可视化显示区域使用崩溃常伴随决策边界退化。4. 训练动态显示优化过程中存在一致的细化过程。
AI.conclusion: 分段仿射神经网络的理论区域容量与实际实现之间存在显著差距，表现为"表达性饱和"现象。区域使用减少与决策边界质量下降相关，这为理解神经网络表达能力与训练动态提供了新视角，对网络架构设计和训练策略有重要启示。

title: Semantic-Aware Autonomous Exploration for UAVs in Unknown Indoor Environments
summary: Autonomous exploration in unknown environments requires unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) to efficiently generate informative trajectories while simultaneously constructing accurate maps. Although many existing exploration methods rely on geometric information, they often lack semantic awareness, resulting in suboptimal exploration efficiency and limited environmental understanding. To address this limitation, this paper proposes a semantic-aware exploration framework that adds semantic information to a roadmap-based exploration strategy. The proposed method builds on the Dynamic Exploration Planner (DEP), which incrementally constructs a Probabilistic Roadmap (PRM), and augments this roadmap with a semantic layer. A semantic reward function is introduced to prioritize regions containing meaningful objects and structures, enabling the UAV to focus on areas with higher information value. Furthermore, the roadmap is continuously updated to support efficient frontier selection and path planning during exploration. The proposed framework is implemented in ROS Noetic and Gazebo using an RGB-D sensor for simultaneous acquisition of geometric and semantic information. Experimental results in multiple simulated environments demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves exploration coverage rates between 90% and 94% while reducing exploration time and travel distance compared with conventional geometry-based exploration methods.

AI.tldr: 提出基于语义感知的无人机自主探索框架，在基于路标的探索策略中加入语义信息，提高探索效率和环境理解能力
AI.motivation: 现有无人机自主探索方法主要依赖几何信息，缺乏语义感知，导致探索效率不高且环境理解有限
AI.method: 在动态探索规划器(DEP)的基础上，为概率路标图(PRM)增加语义层，引入语义奖励函数优先探索包含有意义物体的区域，并持续更新路标图以支持高效边界选择和路径规划
AI.result: 在多个模拟环境中实现90%-94%的探索覆盖率，相比传统基于几何的探索方法，减少了探索时间和旅行距离
AI.conclusion: 语义感知探索框架能有效提高无人机自主探索的效率和环境理解能力，为智能探索系统提供了新思路

title: $μ$Match: Foundation Models for Semi-supervised Learning and Domain Adaptation in EM
summary: Vision foundation models have substantially advanced computer vision, enabling state-of-the-art performance in zero- and few-shot settings. They have been successfully applied to biomedical imaging tasks ranging from organ segmentation in computed tomography to cell segmentation in light microscopy. Electron microscopy (EM) is a central modality for analyzing cellular ultrastructure due to its nanometer-scale resolution. However, the application of foundation models in EM has so far been limited to specific organelles, such as mitochondria, largely due to the diversity of segmentation tasks and the scarcity of comprehensively annotated data. As a result, EM segmentation still predominantly relies on supervised learning, requiring extensive manual annotation and limiting ultrastructural analysis. To address this gap, we propose $μ$Match, a framework for semi-supervised learning and domain adaptation that leverages foundation models. We implement state-of-the-art student-teacher-based methods and evaluate multiple foundation models (SAM, SAM2, $μ$SAM, DINOv2/v3) on challenging EM tasks, including mitochondrion, nucleus, and neurite segmentation. Our results demonstrate consistent improvements over strong baselines and highlight a path toward substantially reducing the annotation effort in EM.

AI.tldr: μMatch框架利用视觉基础模型进行电子显微镜图像半监督学习和领域自适应，显著减少标注需求，在细胞器分割任务上取得改进。
AI.motivation: 电子显微镜(EM)是细胞超微结构分析的核心模态，但基础模型在EM中的应用局限于特定细胞器(如线粒体)，主要由于分割任务多样性和标注数据稀缺。EM分割仍主要依赖监督学习，需要大量人工标注，限制了超微结构分析。
AI.method: 提出μMatch框架，采用基于师生模型(state-of-the-art student-teacher-based methods)的半监督学习和领域自适应方法，评估多种基础模型(SAM、SAM2、μSAM、DINOv2/v3)在挑战性EM任务(线粒体、细胞核、神经突分割)上的表现。
AI.result: 在基线方法基础上取得了一致性改进，展示了减少EM标注工作量的有效路径。
AI.conclusion: μMatch框架通过利用基础模型进行半监督学习和领域自适应，为显著降低电子显微镜图像分割的标注工作量提供了可行路径。

title: Embedding Linear Equality Constraints in Probabilistic Neural Networks for Dynamic Modelling
summary: Machine learning models are increasingly used to model chemical process systems, yet they often lack principled uncertainty quantification and mechanisms to enforce physical constraints. We propose a probabilistic neural network framework that guarantees satisfaction of linear equality constraints within a given tolerance, while capturing aleatoric uncertainty. Compared to state-of-the-art methods, our formulation demonstrates improved predictive accuracy, uncertainty calibration, and adherence to constraints on reduced data. It also demonstrates competitive performance, but with significantly faster training times when evaluated on large data regimes. We evaluated this on two batch reactor case studies, enforcing mass balances.

AI.tldr: 提出一种概率神经网络框架，保证线性等式约束在给定容差内满足，同时捕捉偶然不确定性，在减少数据和大型数据场景下均表现优异。
AI.motivation: 机器学习模型在化工过程系统中应用日益增多，但通常缺乏原则性的不确定性量化和物理约束强制执行机制。
AI.method: 提出概率神经网络框架，保证线性等式约束在给定容差内满足，同时捕捉偶然不确定性。
AI.result: 相比最先进方法，在减少数据时表现出更好的预测准确性、不确定性校准和约束遵守；在大型数据场景下具有竞争性能，但训练时间显著缩短。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在批量反应器案例研究中成功实施质量平衡约束，为化工过程系统提供了既保证物理约束又量化不确定性的有效机器学习框架。

title: Efficient Continuous Semantic Mapping based on Spatio-Temporal Awareness
summary: Continuous semantic mapping allows autonomous robots to understand both the spatial structure and the semantic content of complex environments. However, most existing methods process the entire space, treat voxels as independent units, and do not keep the semantic labels consistent over time. This leads to high computational cost and reduced robustness in dynamic scenes. This paper proposes a semantic mapping method that brings spatial and temporal relationships into the semantic inference process. The method adjusts the inference range according to the local semantic uncertainty and fuses labels over time to improve map stability and computational efficiency. Experiments on the SemanticKITTI dataset show that the proposed method improves mapping accuracy by about 12% and reaches an mIoU of 54.92%, which is 13.18 percentage points higher than spatial-only mapping. These results show that spatiotemporal reasoning is effective for continuous semantic mapping in autonomous robotic systems.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合时空关系的语义建图方法，通过局部语义不确定性调整推理范围并融合时间标签，提高建图稳定性和计算效率
AI.motivation: 现有语义建图方法通常处理整个空间、将体素视为独立单元且不保持语义标签的时间一致性，导致计算成本高且在动态场景中鲁棒性降低
AI.method: 将空间和时间关系引入语义推理过程，根据局部语义不确定性调整推理范围，并融合时间标签以改善地图稳定性和计算效率
AI.result: 在SemanticKITTI数据集上实验显示，该方法将建图精度提高约12%，mIoU达到54.92%，比仅空间建图高出13.18个百分点
AI.conclusion: 时空推理对于自主机器人系统中的连续语义建图是有效的

title: T-MOR: Learning Motion-Aware Skeleton Representations for Human Action Recognition
summary: Vision-language models such as CLIP have recently achieved strong performance on a wide range of visual understanding tasks. However, most existing models rely primarily on appearance-level supervision from images or videos, and do not explicitly model human motion, which is essential for fine-grained and human-centric action recognition task as actions are defined by temporally structured and physically grounded body movements. To address this problem, we propose Transferable skeleton MOtion Representation (T-MOR), a motion-aware framework that learns transferable action representations from skeleton sequences with the aid of video and language supervision during training. T-MOR adopts a multi-modal contrastive learning scheme that aligns skeleton motion with visual and textual representations, while performing inference using only lightweight skeleton inputs. To support large-scale pre-training, we construct PoseCap-1M, a new dataset that contains over one million synchronized video, skeleton, and text triplets covering diverse human activities. We evaluate T-MOR on a range of human-centric action recognition benchmarks, including action classification and frame-wise temporal detection. Experimental results show that T-MOR consistently improves performance across multiple datasets, such as Toyota Smarthome, Penn Action, UAV-Human, TSU, and Charades. In addition, T-MOR demonstrates strong generalization ability in few-shot and zero-shot settings, highlighting the effectiveness of motion-centric and embodied representations for transferable action understanding.

AI.tldr: T-MOR是一个基于骨架运动的可迁移动作表示学习框架，通过多模态对比学习将骨架运动与视觉和文本表示对齐，仅使用轻量级骨架输入进行推理。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型主要依赖外观级监督，没有显式建模人体运动，而动作是由时间结构和物理基础的身体运动定义的，这对于细粒度和以人为中心的动作识别至关重要。
AI.method: 提出T-MOR框架，采用多模态对比学习方案，在训练时利用视频和语言监督学习骨架序列的可迁移动作表示，构建了包含100万同步视频、骨架和文本三元组的PoseCap-1M数据集进行预训练。
AI.result: 在多个以人为中心的动作识别基准测试中（包括Toyota Smarthome、Penn Action、UAV-Human、TSU和Charades）表现一致提升，在少样本和零样本设置中展现出强大的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: T-MOR证明了以运动为中心和具身表示对于可迁移动作理解的有效性，为基于骨架的动作识别提供了强大的多模态学习框架。

title: AdaPrivate-TS: Private Thompson Sampling for Contextual Bandits with Privacy Amplification
comment: Accepted at the 39th Canadian Conference on Artificial Intelligence (Canadian AI 2026) as a long paper; selected for oral presentation. 12 pages, 6 tables
summary: We present AdaPrivate-TS, a differentially private contextual bandit algorithm that combines Thompson Sampling with batched zCDP composition. Our key insight is that differential privacy noise inflates the posterior covariance in a structured way: adding Gaussian noise $N(0,σ^2 I)$ to $b$ yields sampling covariance $v^2 A^{-1} + σ^2 A^{-2}$, which Thompson Sampling interprets as increased uncertainty rather than pure corruption. Under event-level privacy (protecting individual interactions) with stochastic contexts, we prove that the privacy cost is only $O(\sqrt{d}\,\log T/\sqrtρ)$, logarithmic in $T$, because parallel composition amortizes noise across batches. Additionally, we explore privacy amplification via Poisson subsampling, which can reduce effective noise at stringent privacy budgets. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate: (1) AdaPrivate-TS achieves 93-99% of non-private performance at $\varepsilon \in [0.5, 5]$, outperforming UCB by 0.5-3.7% and up to 18% with tuned adaptive exploration at extreme $\varepsilon$; (2) privacy amplification provides additional 2-5% gains at low $\varepsilon$; (3) on MovieLens and Jester, AdaPrivate-TS achieves the best overall performance among event-level baselines, dominating at $\varepsilon \geq 2$; (4) under DP-SVD private features, TS's advantage over UCB grows to +11%, confirming noise-as-uncertainty is not limited to reward privacy. We provide rigorous proofs for privacy guarantees under interactive zCDP composition and comprehensive evaluation including convergence curves, 12-seed CIs, and DP-SVD feature ablation.

AI.tldr: AdaPrivate-TS是一种结合Thompson Sampling与批量zCDP组合的差分隐私上下文bandit算法，通过将隐私噪声解释为后验协方差的结构性膨胀，在事件级隐私下实现对数级隐私成本，并在实验中达到接近非私有性能的效果。
AI.motivation: 传统差分隐私bandit算法通常将隐私噪声视为纯粹的干扰，这会降低算法性能。本文发现差分隐私噪声实际上会以结构化的方式膨胀后验协方差，Thompson Sampling可以将这种膨胀解释为不确定性增加而非单纯的数据污染，从而更好地利用隐私噪声。
AI.method: AdaPrivate-TS结合Thompson Sampling与批量zCDP组合，通过将高斯噪声添加到参数b中，得到采样协方差v^2A^{-1}+σ^2A^{-2}的结构化膨胀。利用并行组合在批次间摊销噪声，实现O(√d log T/√ρ)的隐私成本。还探索了通过泊松子采样进行隐私放大的方法。
AI.result: 在ε∈[0.5,5]范围内，AdaPrivate-TS达到非私有性能的93-99%，优于UCB算法0.5-3.7%，在极端ε下通过自适应探索达到18%的优势。隐私放大在低ε时提供额外2-5%增益。在MovieLens和Jester数据集上，AdaPrivate-TS在事件级基线中表现最佳，在ε≥2时占主导地位。在DP-SVD私有特征下，TS相对UCB的优势增至+11%。
AI.conclusion: AdaPrivate-TS通过将差分隐私噪声解释为后验协方差的结构性膨胀，使Thompson Sampling能够将噪声视为不确定性而非污染，从而在保持强隐私保护的同时实现接近非私有算法的性能。该方法不仅适用于奖励隐私，也适用于特征隐私，为差分隐私上下文bandit提供了有效的解决方案。

title: Integrated cloud-based architecture for robot-robot and human-robot collaboration using ROS 2--MQTT in Mediterranean Greenhouses
summary: The imperative to develop more sustainable agriculture demands a transition from isolated automation toward the deployment of multi-robot systems (MRS) in agrifood environments. However, Mediterranean greenhouse settings-characterized by narrow corridors, dense biomass, and structural metallic interference-pose significant challenges for robust and scalable communication between agents. Traditional robotic frameworks, such as ROS 2, frequently encounter node discovery issues and latency spikes due to dynamic obstacles, dense foliage, and other characteristic greenhouse elements, creating a critical bottleneck for real-time coordination. This paper proposes an innovative cloud-based hybrid architecture that establishes a two-way communication bridge between ROS 2, acting as an edge computing platform, and iVeg as a Decision Support System (DSS), using MQTT and the European FIWARE platform. The proposed framework enables seamless interoperability between fleets of multiple robots in environments with communication constraints, facilitating the synchronised exchange of high-level telemetry, point cloud data and farmer identification for collaboration, amongst other critical data. The architecture was validated in a high-fidelity simulation environment and subsequently tested in a real-world greenhouse scenario, demonstrating its ability to maintain persistent connectivity and data integrity under adverse network conditions. The results indicate that the integration of MQTT effectively eliminates information silos, providing a scalable and decentralised solution for managing complex robotic missions, which are executed locally via Edge Computing. This work sets a new methodological precedent for the concept of Greenhouse Models as a Service (GMaaS), bridging the gap between low-level robotic control and high-level, cloud-based IoT decision-making.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于云的混合架构，用于解决地中海温室环境中多机器人系统的通信挑战，通过ROS 2与iVeg决策支持系统的集成，实现了在通信受限环境下的无缝互操作性。
AI.motivation: 地中海温室环境（狭窄走廊、密集生物量、金属结构干扰）对多机器人系统通信构成重大挑战，传统机器人框架如ROS 2在动态障碍和密集植被下存在节点发现问题和延迟峰值，阻碍实时协调。
AI.method: 提出创新的云基混合架构，建立ROS 2（边缘计算平台）与iVeg决策支持系统之间的双向通信桥梁，使用MQTT和欧洲FIWARE平台，实现高维遥测、点云数据和农民识别等关键数据的同步交换。
AI.result: 在高保真仿真环境和真实温室场景中验证，证明该架构能在不利网络条件下保持持久连接和数据完整性，MQTT集成有效消除信息孤岛，为复杂机器人任务提供可扩展的分散解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为"温室模型即服务"(GMaaS)概念设定了新的方法学先例，弥合了低级机器人控制与高级云基物联网决策之间的差距。

title: CurvSegFlow: Time-Conditioned Flow Matching for Robust Segmentation of Curvilinear Structures in Noisy Biomedical Images
summary: Accurate segmentation of curvilinear structures remains challenging in biomedical imaging due to their thin geometry, complex topology, and sensitivity to noise. This is particularly critical for microscopy images of cytoskeletal network, where low signal-to-noise ratios and dense filament crossings often lead to fragmented or inaccurate segmentation. In this work, we propose CurvSegFlow, a segmentation framework based on time-conditioned flow matching. Instead of predicting a segmentation mask in a single pass, the method models segmentation as a dynamic process that progressively refines a noisy initialization into the target structure through a learned velocity field. The proposed model combines a U-Net backbone with triple-term loss function and temporal embeddings to guide the refinement process across reconstruction stages. This formulation enables gradual error correction and improves the continuity of thin structures. CurvSegFlow is evaluated on multiple synthetic and real microtubule datasets, as well as on public benchmarks of retinal vessels, corneal nerves and coronary arteries. Across datasets, the method achieves competitive or superior performance compared to established segmentation models, with consistent improvements in precision and structural continuity, particularly under low signal-to-noise conditions. These results show that flow-based iterative refinement provides a robust and general framework for curvilinear structure segmentation. Overall, the proposed approach improves segmentation quality in challenging imaging conditions and generalizes effectively across modalities without architectural changes.

AI.tldr: CurvSegFlow：基于时间条件流匹配的曲线结构分割框架，通过迭代细化过程提升分割质量
AI.motivation: 生物医学图像中曲线结构（如细胞骨架网络）的分割面临挑战：几何形状细薄、拓扑结构复杂、对噪声敏感，特别是在低信噪比和密集纤维交叉的情况下容易导致分割不连续或不准确
AI.method: 提出CurvSegFlow框架，基于时间条件流匹配，将分割建模为动态过程：通过学习的速度场，将噪声初始化逐步细化为目标结构；使用U-Net骨干网络、三重损失函数和时间嵌入来指导重建阶段的细化过程
AI.result: 在多个合成和真实微管数据集以及视网膜血管、角膜神经和冠状动脉等公共基准测试中，该方法相比现有分割模型取得竞争性或更优的性能，在精度和结构连续性方面有持续改进，特别是在低信噪比条件下表现突出
AI.conclusion: 基于流的迭代细化为曲线结构分割提供了鲁棒且通用的框架，能够在具有挑战性的成像条件下提高分割质量，并无需架构更改即可有效泛化到不同模态

title: Decision-Focused Learning: When and Why Traditional Prediction Models Fail
summary: Plugging predictions of unknown parameters into downstream optimization problems, often referred to as the ``predict-then-optimize'' paradigm, has long been a standard approach in decision-making under uncertainty. However, improved predictive accuracy does not, in general, translate into improved decision quality. This disconnect has motivated growing interest in decision-focused learning (DFL) within the operations research community. This tutorial reviews recent developments in DFL and highlights key methodological insights, with a particular focus on stochastic linear programming as the downstream decision-making problem. We discuss why several widely used tools in traditional statistical learning are not directly suited to decision-focused settings and must be rethought, including (i) data collection strategies driven purely by predictive uncertainty and (ii) distributional distance measures such as the Wasserstein distance. We summarize properties of DFL that distinguish it from conventional predictive modeling and provide insights into the development of new decision-focused tools.

AI.tldr: 决策导向学习（DFL）教程综述，聚焦于"预测-优化"范式中的决策质量提升，而非单纯预测精度
AI.motivation: 传统"预测-优化"方法中预测准确性的提升不一定能改善决策质量，这促使了决策导向学习在运筹学领域的发展，需要重新思考传统统计学习工具在决策导向环境中的适用性
AI.method: 以随机线性规划作为下游决策问题，综述决策导向学习的最新进展，分析为什么传统统计学习工具（如基于预测不确定性的数据收集策略和Wasserstein距离等分布距离度量）在决策导向环境中不适用
AI.result: 总结了决策导向学习与传统预测建模的区别特性，为开发新的决策导向工具提供了见解，强调需要重新设计适合决策质量评估的学习框架
AI.conclusion: 决策导向学习为不确定环境下的决策提供了新的方法论视角，需要发展专门针对决策质量优化的学习工具和策略，而不仅仅是追求预测准确性

title: Temporal Logic Guidance for Action-Only Diffusion Policies with World Models
comment: Accepted at the ICRA 2026 Workshop on Bridging the Gap between Robot Learning and Human-Robot Interaction. 3 pages, 2 figures, 1 table
summary: Diffusion policies enable multimodal robot behavior but offer limited ability to choose among behavior modes at inference time, even though such control is desirable in human-robot settings. Prior solutions to this lack of control have utilized Signal Temporal Logic (STL) to express human intentions and provide corresponding guidance for diffusion policy inference. However, these approaches can only guide diffusion policies that jointly generate future actions and states, increasing both complexity and runtime. We propose a novel guidance method for action-only diffusion policies that uses a separate learned world model to enable differentiable evaluation of STL robustness, with its gradient then injected into the diffusion process. This steers behavior toward constraint satisfaction without retraining, improving constraint adherence while preserving task performance. On the Can Transport task from Robomimic, our method maintains 100% task success while reducing constraint violations from over 80% for baseline methods to 4%. We also discuss extensions toward improved robustness and more complex constraints.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于仅动作扩散策略的新引导方法，使用单独学习的世界模型实现信号时序逻辑约束的可微分评估，通过梯度注入扩散过程来引导行为满足约束
AI.motivation: 扩散策略能生成多模态机器人行为，但缺乏在推理时选择行为模式的控制能力，这在人机交互场景中很重要。现有方法使用信号时序逻辑表达人类意图，但只能引导同时生成动作和状态的扩散策略，增加了复杂性和运行时间
AI.method: 提出新颖的引导方法：1）使用单独学习的世界模型实现信号时序逻辑约束的可微分评估；2）将评估得到的梯度注入扩散过程；3）引导行为满足约束而无需重新训练
AI.result: 在Robomimic的Can Transport任务中，方法保持100%任务成功率，同时将约束违反从基线方法的80%以上降低到4%
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效引导仅动作扩散策略满足信号时序逻辑约束，提高约束遵守率同时保持任务性能，并讨论了向改进鲁棒性和更复杂约束的扩展

title: Cross-Modal Corroboration for Annotation-Free Wildlife Monitoring
comment: Presented at the 2026 CV4Animals Workshop, colocated with CVPR
summary: Scaling wildlife monitoring for real-world conservation deployments requires automated analysis of smart sensors that operate under severe annotation scarcity. We propose leveraging expert knowledge of species activity patterns as an annotation-free validation signal for multimodal monitoring pipelines. We operationalize agreement as the alignment of independently derived hourly activity curves both with each other and with published behavioral priors-a three-way convergence that rules out shared-data confounds and dataset-internal correlation as alternative explanations. Our vision pipeline combines zero-shot species detection via BioCLIP 2, sliced inference to handle deployment-constrained camera positioning, and geometry-based geographic localization from camera trap imagery. Our acoustic pipeline detects species vocalizations via a fine-tuned classifier. We validate the pipeline on a breeding herd of Milu deer and demonstrate that both modalities independently recover activity patterns consistent with known deer behavioral ecology with minimal manual annotation. The framework applies to species detectable in both visual and acoustic modalities for which behavioral priors are documented in the literature, suggesting a practical path toward self-validating wildlife-monitoring pipelines at conservation scale.

AI.tldr: 提出一种利用物种活动模式专家知识作为无标注验证信号的多模态野生动物监测框架，通过视觉和声音两种模态独立验证活动曲线的一致性，减少人工标注需求。
AI.motivation: 现实世界保护部署中，智能传感器监测需要自动化分析，但面临严重的标注稀缺问题。需要一种能够减少人工标注依赖的验证方法。
AI.method: 1) 利用物种活动模式专家知识作为无标注验证信号；2) 视觉管道：使用BioCLIP 2进行零样本物种检测、切片推理处理部署约束、基于几何的地理定位；3) 声音管道：使用微调分类器检测物种发声；4) 通过三种方式验证一致性：两个模态独立推导的活动曲线相互对齐、与已发表的行为先验对齐。
AI.result: 在麋鹿繁殖群体上验证了该框架，两种模态都独立恢复了与已知鹿类行为生态学一致的活动模式，仅需极少人工标注。
AI.conclusion: 该框架适用于视觉和声音模态均可检测且行为先验有文献记载的物种，为保护规模的自验证野生动物监测管道提供了实用路径。

title: Beyond the Next Step: Variable-Length Latent World Models for Long-Horizon Planning
summary: Recently, world models have emerged as a promising paradigm for building intelligent agents by learning predictive models that estimate future environment states conditioned on observations and actions. In particular, JEPA-style latent world models provide an efficient alternative to pixel space prediction by learning action-conditioned dynamics in compact representation spaces. However, existing latent world models typically rely on one-step prediction and must be recursively rolled out for long-horizon planning, which leads to compounding errors and a mismatch between training objectives and downstream planning tasks. To address this limitation, we propose Variable-length Latent World Models (VLWMs), a framework that learns to predict future latent states conditioned on action sequences of variable lengths. Instead of training only on one-step transitions, VLWMs directly model temporally extended dynamics, allowing the same predictor to evaluate action plans over different horizons. We further introduce a curriculum training strategy that progressively expands the action horizon, stabilizing optimization from short-range dynamics to long-range prediction. At test time, we design planning methods tailored to VLWMs to better exploit their variable-length predictive capabilities. Experiments on long-horizon control tasks show that VLWMs significantly improve latent space world models, achieving 13\% average improvement over the state-of-the-art LeWM across different datasets, with especially large gains on tasks requiring extended planning. These results suggest that VLWM provides a simple yet effective paradigm for improving long-horizon prediction and planning in latent world models.

AI.tldr: VLWM提出可变长度潜在世界模型，通过直接学习变长动作序列的未来状态预测，解决传统单步预测模型在长时规划中的累积误差问题，显著提升长时控制任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有潜在世界模型通常依赖单步预测，需要通过递归展开进行长时规划，这会导致累积误差和训练目标与下游规划任务不匹配的问题。需要一种能直接建模长时间动态的方法来改善长时预测和规划能力。
AI.method: 提出可变长度潜在世界模型（VLWM），学习在变长动作序列条件下预测未来潜在状态。采用课程训练策略，逐步扩展动作视野，从短时动态稳定优化到长时预测。并设计专门的规划方法来充分利用其变长预测能力。
AI.result: 在长时控制任务实验中，VLWM显著提升了潜在空间世界模型的性能，相比最先进的LeWM平均提升13%，在需要扩展规划的任务上获得特别大的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: VLWM为改进潜在世界模型中的长时预测和规划提供了一个简单而有效的范式，通过直接建模变长动作序列的动态关系，克服了传统单步预测模型的局限性。

title: HERCULES: An Open-Source Simulation Framework for Heterogeneous Multi-Robot SLAM, Collaborative Perception, and Exploration
summary: We present HERCULES, an open-source simulator and data-collection pipeline for heterogeneous multi-robot autonomy. Built upon the Unreal Engine 5 (UE5)-based simulators AirSim and Cosys-AirSim, HERCULES resolves key architectural limitations of prior frameworks to enable concurrent unmanned aerial and ground vehicle (UAV-UGV) operation in large-scale, photorealistic, dynamic environments. It introduces a new waypoint-tracking UGV controller that mirrors existing UAV control interfaces, and provides a shared navigation stack for mapping, traversability analysis, planning, and control across heterogeneous platforms. Expanding inherited sensor suites, it adds physics-based long-wave infrared (LWIR) cameras and configurable night-vision modes for degraded visual environments. HERCULES provides lightweight APIs, ROS 2 wrappers, and rigorous time synchronization across sensors and platforms, and brings state-of-the-art game-engine capabilities into robotics simulation, integrating intelligent agents such as pedestrians, traffic, and wildlife with high-fidelity dynamic phenomena, including fire, flooding, and crop disease spread. HERCULES runs in two modes: passively, replaying offline-designed trajectories to generate reproducible multi-modal datasets, and actively, running an online planner in closed loop from live observations. Our experiments in heterogeneous multi-robot SLAM, collaborative perception, and exploration, using both HERCULES-generated data and active closed-loop execution, demonstrate its utility for advancing heterogeneous multi-robot autonomy. We publicly release our source code, experiment code, documentation, and datasets, including a heterogeneous multi-robot SLAM benchmark collected with two UAVs and two UGVs across kilometer-scale desert, forest, and city environments, at https://lunarlab-gatech.github.io/HERCULES-website.

AI.tldr: HERCULES是一个基于UE5的开源异构多机器人自主仿真与数据采集框架，解决了现有架构限制，支持无人机和地面车辆在大型逼真动态环境中协同操作，提供共享导航栈、物理传感器模拟和严格时间同步，支持被动和主动两种运行模式。
AI.motivation: 现有异构多机器人仿真框架存在架构限制，无法支持无人机和地面车辆在大型、逼真、动态环境中的并发操作。需要一个新的仿真和数据采集平台来推进异构多机器人自主性研究。
AI.method: 基于UE5的AirSim和Cosys-AirSim构建，引入新的路径点跟踪地面车辆控制器（与无人机控制接口一致），提供共享导航栈（建图、可达性分析、规划、控制），扩展传感器套件（物理长波红外相机、可配置夜视模式），提供轻量级API、ROS 2封装和严格时间同步。
AI.result: 实现了异构多机器人SLAM、协作感知和探索实验，展示了框架的实用性。提供了开源代码、实验代码、文档和数据集，包括一个由两架无人机和两辆地面车辆在千米级沙漠、森林和城市环境中收集的异构多机器人SLAM基准。
AI.conclusion: HERCULES是一个功能强大的异构多机器人仿真和数据采集平台，解决了现有框架的限制，集成了先进的游戏引擎能力，支持被动和主动两种运行模式，能够有效推进异构多机器人自主性研究。

title: A DVDrive Approach for doScenes Instructed Driving Challenge
summary: Instruction-conditioned trajectory prediction is an emerging problem in autonomous driving, where a model predicts the future ego trajectory not only from visual scene context and historical motion, but also from a natural-language maneuver instruction. This paper presents our submission to the doScenes Instructed Driving Challenge, built upon OmniDrive, a vision-language-action driving agent with 3D perception, reasoning, and planning capabilities. We adapt OmniDrive to the doScenes setting by training it on instruction-annotated nuScenes scenes and generating a 6-second ego trajectory represented by 12 future waypoints. To improve multi-view visual grounding, we further introduce a DVPE-style divided-view perception module into the OmniDrive perception head. Instead of attending globally to all camera features, the proposed module groups query features and image tokens into divided local view spaces and performs visibility-aware cross-attention within each view. This design reduces irrelevant cross-view interference and helps the model better align language instructions with local driving-relevant visual evidence. The code is publicly available at: https://github.com/feel12348/doscenes-omnidrive.

AI.tldr: 基于OmniDrive的指令条件轨迹预测模型，通过改进的多视角视觉感知模块提升驾驶指令与视觉证据的对齐能力
AI.motivation: 解决自动驾驶中指令条件轨迹预测问题，需要模型同时考虑视觉场景、历史运动和自然语言指令，以生成符合指令的未来轨迹
AI.method: 1. 基于OmniDrive视觉-语言-动作驾驶代理 2. 引入DVPE风格的分视角感知模块，将查询特征和图像token分组到局部视角空间 3. 在每个视角内执行可见性感知的交叉注意力，减少无关跨视角干扰
AI.result: 模型在doScenes Instructed Driving Challenge中提交，能够生成6秒的未来轨迹（12个航点），代码已开源
AI.conclusion: 提出的分视角感知模块有效提升了语言指令与局部驾驶相关视觉证据的对齐能力，为指令条件轨迹预测提供了有效解决方案

title: A Causal DAG Prior for Synthetic Time-Series Classification Datasets
comment: Accepted at the 2nd ICML 2026 Workshop on Foundation Models for Structured Data (FMSD). 4 pages (main text), 2 figures, plus references and appendix
summary: A Prior-data fitted Network learns the posterior predictive induced by its training prior; bringing this paradigm to multivariate time-series classification therefore calls for a synthetic generator that produces complete labelled datasets with temporal structure. We introduce a causal prior that synthesizes each dataset from a randomly sampled DAG over typed nodes across two modalities (tabular attributes and time series), natively producing multivariate, multi-class TSC datasets with cross-modal causal structure across channels, timesteps and labels, a regime not addressed by existing synthetic priors. To validate the prior, we finetune TabPFN v2.5 with minimal adaptations and evaluate on 75 UCR/UEA datasets within TabPFN's operating regime. Finetuning on our generator significantly outperforms both the unmodified upstream model and a tabular-only ablation of the same prior (Wilcoxon signed-rank $p=3.0\times 10^{-8}$ on ROC-AUC), isolating the contribution of the cross-modal temporal structure.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种因果先验方法，用于生成具有时间结构的多元时间序列分类数据集，并通过微调TabPFN模型验证了该先验的有效性
AI.motivation: 现有的合成先验无法处理具有跨模态因果结构的多元时间序列分类数据集，需要一种能够生成具有时间结构、跨通道、时间步和标签因果关系的合成数据生成器
AI.method: 引入因果先验，通过随机采样的有向无环图（DAG）在两种模态（表格属性和时间序列）上合成数据集，生成具有跨模态因果结构的多元多类时间序列分类数据集
AI.result: 在75个UCR/UEA数据集上微调TabPFN v2.5，使用该生成器的方法显著优于未修改的上游模型和仅表格先验的消融实验（Wilcoxon符号秩检验p=3.0×10^-8）
AI.conclusion: 提出的因果先验能够有效生成具有时间结构的时间序列数据集，跨模态时间结构对模型性能有显著贡献，为时间序列分类任务提供了有效的先验数据拟合方法

title: Cooperative-ORCA*: Real-Time Proactive Deadlock Avoidance for Continuous-Space Multi-Agent Navigation
summary: Multi-Agent Path Finding (MAPF) is a problem that requires computing collision-free paths for a set of agents from their start locations to designated goal locations. The problem has broad applications in domains where teams of robots must operate in a coordinated manner. ORCA* is a real time MAPF solver that assigns for each timestep a velocity for each agent. Due to its real time nature, it is myopic to future deadlocks that result from current decisions. ORCA*-MAPF attempts to remedy this limitation by introducing fallback mechanisms when deadlocks are detected. However, post hoc interventions often introduce significant flowtime overhead. In this paper, we introduce C-ORCA* and C-ORCA*-MAPF, continuous space MAPF algorithms that incorporate agents' entire spatial trajectory and their spatial dependencies to proactively prevent deadlocks from occurring, thus avoiding the high flowtime overhead associated with post hoc corrections in ORCA*-MAPF. The C-ORCA* family of algorithms significantly outperform previous state-of-the-art in terms of solve rate, runtime, and flowtime.

AI.tldr: C-ORCA*和C-ORCA*-MAPF是连续空间多智能体路径规划算法，通过考虑智能体的完整空间轨迹和空间依赖关系，主动预防死锁，避免ORCA*-MAPF中事后修正带来的高流时开销。
AI.motivation: ORCA*作为实时MAPF求解器，由于其实时性，对当前决策导致的未来死锁短视。ORCA*-MAPF通过死锁检测后的回退机制试图解决此问题，但事后干预常引入显著的流时开销。
AI.method: 提出C-ORCA*和C-ORCA*-MAPF连续空间MAPF算法，整合智能体的完整空间轨迹和空间依赖关系，主动预防死锁发生。
AI.result: C-ORCA*系列算法在求解率、运行时间和流时方面显著优于之前的最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过主动预防死锁而非事后修正，C-ORCA*系列算法能够显著提高多智能体路径规划的性能。

title: Chehre: An Emoji-Prompted Video Dataset for Perceptually Diverse Facial Expression Recognition
summary: Facial expressions are nonverbal social signals used in human interaction, but facial expression recognition datasets often focus on static images, basic emotion categories, or single deterministic annotations. We introduce Chehre, an emoji-prompted video dataset for analyzing dynamic facial expressions across a wide range of expressions for exploring inter-individual perceptual diversity. In Chehre, participants were prompted to express and record 40 facial emojis. Later, their facial motions were transferred onto synthetic faces to preserve privacy. A separate group of annotators analyzed the anonymized videos using emoji and label annotations, resulting in 2,111 high quality videos collected from 203 performers and validated by 902 annotators. We define two benchmark tasks: dominant expression recognition, which tests whether models recover the top human-rated labels, and distributional expression recognition, which tests whether models capture the diversity of human responses. We benchmark recent vision-language models using random sampling and persona prompting to generate multiple predictions per video. Results show that both tasks are challenging: among the models evaluated, the best-performing model achieves only 32.5% Top-1 accuracy on dominant expression recognition and a Spread Ratio well below the human reference on distributional recognition. Chehre provides a benchmark for evaluating diverse, dynamic, and distributional facial expression recognition

AI.tldr: Chehre是一个基于表情符号提示的视频数据集，用于分析动态面部表情的个体感知多样性，包含2,111个高质量匿名视频，定义了两种基准任务：主导表情识别和分布表情识别。
AI.motivation: 现有面部表情识别数据集通常关注静态图像、基本情绪类别或单一确定性标注，缺乏对动态表情和个体感知多样性的研究。
AI.method: 收集参与者表达40种面部表情符号的视频，将面部动作转移到合成人脸以保护隐私，然后由902名标注者使用表情符号和标签进行标注分析。
AI.result: 创建了包含2,111个高质量视频的数据集，来自203名表演者和902名验证者。基准测试显示现有模型在主导表情识别任务上最佳仅达32.5% Top-1准确率，在分布表情识别任务上Spread Ratio远低于人类参考。
AI.conclusion: Chehre为评估多样化、动态和分布式的面部表情识别提供了基准，揭示了当前模型在捕捉人类表情感知多样性方面的挑战。

title: RocketPFN: Accurate Time Series Classification via In-Context Learning
comment: 10 pages main text, 4 figures; 15 pages including references and appendix
summary: We introduce RocketPFN, a training-free pipeline for time series classification that combines random convolutional feature extraction (Rocket) with in-context classification via a pretrained tabular foundation model (TabPFN v2.5). On 92 UCR datasets (30-resample protocol), RocketPFN matches HC2, the strongest published method on the archive, in mean accuracy (both 0.900, Wilcoxon p=0.50), with no training on the target data and a median inference time of 30 seconds per fold. It also significantly outperforms every individual classifier in the HC2 ensemble. On UEA (20 datasets) the difference is likewise not statistically significant. A separate comparison concerns TSC foundation models: when paired with the same downstream classifier, MOMENT, Mantis, and MantisV2 are all significantly outperformed by RocketPFN using fewer extracted features and no learned parameters (p<0.001 in each case). This holds even when the encoders were pretrained on corpora that include the UCR training samples. We propose this two-stage pipeline as a reference point for evaluating zero-shot TSC foundation models.

AI.tldr: RocketPFN：一种无需训练的零样本时间序列分类方法，结合随机卷积特征提取（Rocket）和预训练表格基础模型（TabPFN v2.5），在UCR数据集上与最强方法HC2表现相当，且显著优于其他时间序列基础模型。
AI.motivation: 为时间序列分类（TSC）建立一个无需目标数据训练、计算高效的零样本参考基准，以评估当前TSC基础模型的性能。
AI.method: 采用两阶段流水线：1）使用Rocket进行随机卷积核特征提取，将时间序列转换为特征向量；2）将提取的特征输入预训练的表格基础模型TabPFN v2.5进行上下文分类，整个过程无需在目标数据集上进行训练。
AI.result: 在92个UCR数据集上，RocketPFN的平均准确率达到0.900，与当前最强方法HC2相当（Wilcoxon p=0.50），且显著优于HC2集成中的每个单独分类器。在UEA数据集上同样无显著差异。与MOMENT、Mantis、MantisV2等TSC基础模型相比，RocketPFN使用更少的特征且无需学习参数，性能显著更优（p<0.001）。
AI.conclusion: RocketPFN为评估零样本TSC基础模型提供了一个有效的参考基准，展示了结合简单特征提取和预训练表格模型的潜力，无需专门的时间序列训练即可达到最先进性能。

title: UniFS: Unified Fast-to-Slow Hierarchical Architecture for Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Mainstream Fast-Slow dual system vision-language-action models decouple a high-frequency action expert from a low-frequency vision-language model for efficiency, yet they face a fundamental frequency dilemma: large update gaps cause semantic drift from stale context, while small gaps erode the intended computational savings. Moreover, because the action expert receives only the VLM's final-layer representation at a single fixed frequency, rich intermediate features are discarded, limiting both information coupling and manipulation precision. Inspired by multi-timescale neural processing in the human brain, we introduce UniFS, a unified fast-to-slow architecture that resolves these challenges through three key designs. First, we stratify the VLM layers into groups with progressively decreasing update frequencies, enabling shallow layers to capture fast-changing dynamics while deeper layers cache stable semantic context. Second, a latent vector inversion mechanism re-routes the interaction order between multi-scale VLM features and the action expert, aligning fast-varying representations with fine-grained action decoding and slow-varying ones with coarse planning. Third, a multi-level supervision strategy enforces a coarse-to-fine learning hierarchy across temporal scales. Together, these designs enable richer cross-frequency information transfer within a single backbone, while the low-frequency pathways additionally preserve temporal context across steps. Experiments on LIBERO show that UniFS achieves state-of-the-art performance (98.3\% average success rate, a 2.5\% gain over VLA-Adapter baseline) while reducing average inference latency from 36.5~ms to 17.8~ms (2.1$\times$ speedup). Real-robot experiments on a Franka platform further validate its practical applicability. Code is opensourced at https://github.com/linsun449/UniFS.

AI.tldr: UniFS通过分层更新频率、潜在向量反转和多层次监督，解决了传统快-慢双系统模型的频率困境，在保持效率的同时提升了性能和精度。
AI.motivation: 传统快-慢双系统视觉-语言-动作模型面临频率困境：大更新间隔导致语义漂移，小间隔又牺牲计算效率。同时，动作专家仅接收VLM最终层表示，丢弃了丰富的中间特征，限制了信息耦合和操作精度。
AI.method: 1. 将VLM层按逐渐降低的更新频率分层，浅层捕捉快速变化动态，深层缓存稳定语义上下文。2. 潜在向量反转机制重新路由多尺度VLM特征与动作专家的交互顺序，对齐快速变化表示与细粒度动作解码，慢速变化表示与粗粒度规划。3. 多层次监督策略在时间尺度上实施从粗到细的学习层次。
AI.result: 在LIBERO上实现了98.3%的平均成功率（比VLA-Adapter基线提高2.5%），平均推理延迟从36.5ms降至17.8ms（2.1倍加速）。在Franka平台上的真实机器人实验进一步验证了其实用性。
AI.conclusion: UniFS通过统一快-慢架构解决了传统双系统模型的频率困境，在单个骨干网络中实现了更丰富的跨频率信息传递，同时保持计算效率，在性能和速度上均达到最先进水平。

title: UnityShots: Memory-Driven Multi-Shot Audio-Video Generation with Boundary-Aware Gating
summary: Generating a coherent multi-shot video requires structured cross-shot memory. Subject appearance, scene context, and speaker identity must persist across cuts. Existing approaches either train end-to-end over fixed-length sequences and cannot scale, generate shot-by-shot with memory banks that grow linearly, or orchestrate pretrained generators under an LLM planner without a multi-shot-aware backbone. We present UnityShots, a memory-driven multi-shot audio-video generation system built on LTX-2.3, trained on annotated cinematic and music-video shots. The video stream maintains two fixed-size slots, a long-term memory (LTM) slot anchored to the opening shot and a short-term memory (STM) slot holding the immediately preceding tail, both updated at every cut by a boundary-conditioned gate that fuses visual cut probability and beat-tracker signals. The audio stream injects a reference speaker token at every shot to preserve vocal timbre without a sliding audio bank. A discrete cut-type prior, learned through AdaLN, becomes an inference-time control knob over transition strength. We release a benchmark of $200$ multi-cultural multi-shot sequences spanning six ethnic regions and ten or more languages, with per-shot reference identities, reference audio, and per-boundary transition labels. Evaluated across I2V, T2V, and R2V conditioning modes, UnityShots leads open-source baselines on every cross-shot coherence metric and matches the strongest closed-source system on the multi-shot axes.

AI.tldr: UnityShots是一个基于LTX-2.3构建的记忆驱动多镜头音频-视频生成系统，通过固定大小的长短期记忆槽和边界条件门控机制，实现了跨镜头的一致性，在多种条件模式下均优于开源基线系统。
AI.motivation: 现有方法存在三个主要问题：1）端到端训练方法无法扩展到可变长度序列；2）逐镜头生成方法的内存需求线性增长；3）基于LLM规划器的预训练生成器缺乏多镜头感知的骨干网络。因此需要开发能够保持跨镜头一致性的多镜头视频生成系统。
AI.method: UnityShots采用记忆驱动架构，视频流维护两个固定大小的记忆槽：长时记忆槽锚定开场镜头，短时记忆槽保存前一个镜头尾部。通过边界条件门控机制（融合视觉切割概率和节拍跟踪信号）在每个镜头切换时更新记忆。音频流在每个镜头注入参考说话人令牌以保持音色一致性。系统还通过AdaLN学习离散切割类型先验，作为推理时控制过渡强度的调节参数。
AI.result: 研究发布了包含200个多文化多镜头序列的基准数据集，涵盖6个民族区域和10多种语言。在I2V、T2V和R2V三种条件模式下评估，UnityShots在所有跨镜头一致性指标上均领先开源基线系统，并在多镜头轴上与最强的闭源系统表现相当。
AI.conclusion: UnityShots通过创新的记忆驱动架构和边界条件门控机制，成功解决了多镜头视频生成中的跨镜头一致性问题，为连贯的多镜头视频生成提供了有效的解决方案，并在多文化数据集上展现了卓越的性能。

title: What Do Lorentz-Equivariant Jet Taggers Learn?
comment: Accepted at the AI4Physics Workshop, ICML 2026. 21 pages, 15 figures
summary: We study what Lorentz-equivariant jet taggers learn internally, using equivariance tests, linear probes and grade ablations across five models including L-GATr, L-GATr-slim and LLoCa-T. Linear probes show that equivariant models suppress frame-dependent pseudorapidity to zero while encoding jet mass and N-subjettiness strongly. Grade ablations on L-GATr reveal that bivector channels are negligible for top-quark tagging while vector-like channels are dominant but seed variable, consistent with the network exploiting multiple representational pathways. These results characterize which physical features and algebraic grade structures carry discriminative information in equivariant taggers and may inform future development of such models.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过等变性测试、线性探测和等级消融等方法，分析了五种Lorentz等变喷注标记器（包括L-GATr、L-GATr-slim和LLoCa-T）的内部学习机制，揭示了这些模型如何编码物理特征和代数结构。
AI.motivation: 理解Lorentz等变喷注标记器内部学习机制，探究这些模型如何编码物理特征，以及不同代数等级结构在判别信息中的作用，为未来等变模型开发提供指导。
AI.method: 使用等变性测试、线性探测和等级消融三种方法，对五种模型（L-GATr、L-GATr-slim、LLoCa-T等）进行分析。线性探测评估特征编码，等级消融分析不同代数等级通道的贡献。
AI.result: 等变模型将参考系依赖的赝快度抑制为零，同时强烈编码喷注质量和N-subjettiness。L-GATr的等级消融显示，双向量通道对顶夸克标记贡献可忽略，而矢量类通道虽占主导但存在冗余，网络利用多种表示路径。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了等变喷注标记器中哪些物理特征和代数等级结构携带判别信息，为未来等变模型开发提供了重要见解，有助于优化模型设计和理解其内部工作机制。

title: Cloak: Zero-Shot Cross-Embodiment Manipulation by Masking the End-Effector from the VLA
summary: We present Cloak, a training recipe that endows a Vision-Language-Action (VLA) model with zero-shot cross-embodiment transfer by cloaking the end-effector from its own wrist camera. The end-effector occupies a large and consistent region of the wrist view and masking it allows for embodiment-agnostic visual reasoning. Cloak renders a mask in simulation from the robot's known geometry, accurately and in real time, with no segmentation or generative models. During training, we augment the mask so the model generalizes to embodiments unseen at training time. We demonstrate the recipe with Cloak-VLA, a VLA trained with Cloak on a single parallel-jaw gripper dataset. No data of new embodiments is ever collected. Cloak-VLA transfers zero-shot to various unseen embodiments, including another gripper, another arm, and a five-fingered hand, while preserving the source embodiment's performance. By decoupling the wrist view from its own embodiment, Cloak allows data to outlive the hardware it was collected on.

AI.tldr: Cloak是一种训练方法，通过从手腕摄像头中遮蔽末端执行器，使视觉语言动作模型能够实现零样本跨具身迁移，实现硬件无关的视觉推理。
AI.motivation: 解决视觉语言动作模型在不同机器人硬件（具身）之间的迁移问题，使训练数据能够超越收集时使用的硬件，实现数据重用和跨具身泛化。
AI.method: 在训练过程中，利用已知的机器人几何结构在模拟中实时渲染末端执行器的掩码，遮蔽手腕视图中的末端执行器区域，并对掩码进行增强以提高泛化能力。
AI.result: Cloak-VLA模型在仅使用平行夹爪数据集训练的情况下，能够零样本迁移到未见过的具身上（包括其他夹爪、其他手臂和五指手），同时保持源具身的性能。
AI.conclusion: Cloak方法通过解耦手腕视图与其自身具身的关联，实现了跨具身的视觉语言动作模型迁移，使数据能够超越收集时使用的硬件，具有重要的实际应用价值。

title: Enlight: Fast Low-Light Image Enhancement via Multi-Objective Optimization and Shadow-Aware Refinement
summary: We present ENLIGHT, a fast and training free framework for low-light image enhancement based on direct optimization of a perceptual objective. Unlike deep learning approaches that require large scale training data and supervision, ENLIGHT operates in a zero-shot manner by optimizing image quality at inference time. The method employs a two stage global to local optimization strategy. In the first stage, ENLIGHT performs global illumination adjustment to improve visibility while maintaining structural consistency and avoiding excessive noise enhancement. In the second stage, a shadow aware refinement selectively improves low-intensity regions through masked local optimization, enhancing visibility without overexposure. To balance quality and efficiency, we introduce two modes: Fast, which uses a multi-objective formulation combining entropy, gradient preservation, and noise regularization, and Ultrafast, which reduces computational cost via a lightweight approximation of the same objective. The framework is optimizer agnostic and supports both evolutionary and lightweight local search methods. Experiments on BAID, Backlit300, LIME, MEF, NPE, and DICM demonstrate that ENLIGHT achieves competitive perceptual quality (MUSIQ, NIQE, BRISQUE) with significantly lower inference time. Qualitative results further show improved contrast, preserved structural details, and controlled noise amplification, making ENLIGHT a practical and interpretable alternative to learning based methods.

AI.tldr: ENLIGHT是一个无需训练的低光图像增强框架，通过直接优化感知目标实现快速增强，采用两阶段全局到局部优化策略，支持快速和超快速两种模式。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习低光增强方法需要大量训练数据和监督，计算成本高。ENLIGHT旨在提供一种无需训练、快速且可解释的替代方案，通过直接优化图像质量实现零样本增强。
AI.method: 采用两阶段优化策略：1) 全局光照调整，改善可见性同时保持结构一致性并避免噪声增强；2) 阴影感知细化，通过掩码局部优化选择性改善低强度区域。提供两种模式：Fast模式使用多目标公式（熵、梯度保持、噪声正则化），Ultrafast模式通过轻量级近似降低计算成本。框架与优化器无关，支持进化和轻量级局部搜索方法。
AI.result: 在BAID、Backlit300、LIME、MEF、NPE和DICM数据集上的实验表明，ENLIGHT在感知质量指标（MUSIQ、NIQE、BRISQUE）上达到竞争性水平，且推理时间显著更低。定性结果显示改进的对比度、保留的结构细节和可控的噪声放大。
AI.conclusion: ENLIGHT是一个实用且可解释的低光图像增强框架，无需训练数据，在保持高质量的同时显著降低计算成本，为基于学习的方法提供了有效的替代方案。

title: Discretizing Reward Models
summary: Despite their widespread use, the role of reward models in shaping reinforcement learning is poorly understood. Reward models offer a tempting promise: they automatically estimate response quality in the absence of verifiers or human judges. Unlike "verifiable rewards" which typically produce binary scores, reward models typically produce continuous scores, allowing them to be sensitive to fine-grained differences in responses. However, we show this apparent strength is a serious weakness: many popular reward models are oversensitive, assigning different scores to equally good responses. Theoretically, we show that seemingly perfect reward models can be highly oversensitive; empirically, this oversensitivity can lead to bad policies. In place of existing notions of "reward model accuracy," we propose evaluating reward models using distinct measures of "discriminative ability" and "specificity" (the complement of oversensitivity). As a solution, we describe a training-free algorithm that uses Monte Carlo dropout on any neural reward model to produce discrete reward clusters. Theoretically, we prove there exist discretizations that reduce oversensitivity at minimal expense of discriminative ability; empirically we show, in both controlled and natural RL settings, that discretizing rewards leads to less reward hacking and better policies than training on the original rewards.

AI.tldr: 该论文指出奖励模型存在过度敏感问题，并提出通过离散化奖励来减少过度敏感性，从而改善强化学习策略。
AI.motivation: 尽管奖励模型被广泛使用，但其在塑造强化学习中的作用尚未被充分理解。奖励模型在缺乏验证器或人工评判时能自动估计响应质量，但存在过度敏感问题，给同等好的响应分配不同分数，导致不良策略。
AI.method: 提出使用不同的"判别能力"和"特异性"（过度敏感性的补集）来评估奖励模型。提出一种无需训练的方法，使用蒙特卡洛dropout在任何神经奖励模型上产生离散奖励簇，通过离散化奖励来减少过度敏感性。
AI.result: 理论上证明存在能最小化判别能力损失而减少过度敏感性的离散化方法；实证表明，在受控和自然RL设置中，离散化奖励比原始奖励训练产生更少的奖励黑客攻击和更好的策略。
AI.conclusion: 奖励模型的过度敏感性是一个严重问题，通过离散化奖励可以显著减少过度敏感性，改善强化学习策略的性能，这为奖励模型评估和使用提供了新视角。

title: FPAS: Frontier-Based Path Planning with Adaptive Sampling for Large-Scale Unknown Environments
summary: In this work, we propose Frontier-based Path Planning with Adaptive Sampling (FPAS), a novel framework designed for efficient goal-reaching in large-scale, unknown environments. While existing planners often struggle with computational bottlenecks or inefficient paths during long-range navigation, FPAS overcomes these challenges by reinterpreting the frontier concept for goal-directed tasks. Specifically, our method leverages frontiers to effectively guide forward progression into unobserved regions and to select promising subgoals for backtracking from dead-ends or inefficient paths. Furthermore, FPAS introduces an adaptive sampling mechanism based on a frontier-derived openness metric. This mechanism dynamically adjusts the global graph's density by employing sparse nodes in open areas to alleviate computational burdens, while preserving denser sampling in narrow passages to ensure connectivity. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that FPAS substantially improves computational efficiency over baseline methods while maintaining highly competitive goal-reaching performance.

AI.tldr: FPAS是一种基于前沿的自适应采样路径规划框架，通过前沿引导前进和回溯子目标选择，结合基于开放度的自适应采样机制，在大规模未知环境中实现高效目标到达。
AI.motivation: 现有规划器在大规模未知环境中进行长距离导航时，常面临计算瓶颈或路径效率低下的问题，需要一种能够平衡计算效率和路径质量的解决方案。
AI.method: 重新解释前沿概念用于目标导向任务，利用前沿引导向前推进和选择回溯子目标；引入基于前沿开放度度量的自适应采样机制，在开放区域使用稀疏节点减少计算负担，在狭窄通道保持密集节点确保连通性。
AI.result: 广泛评估表明，FPAS相比基线方法显著提高了计算效率，同时保持了高度竞争力的目标到达性能。
AI.conclusion: FPAS通过前沿引导和自适应采样机制，成功解决了大规模未知环境中长距离导航的计算效率和路径质量问题。

title: VT-DUDA: Visual Token Conditioning for Diffusion-guided Unsupervised Domain Adaptation
summary: Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) aims to learn a target-domain classifier from labeled source data and unlabeled target data under distribution shift. Recent diffusion-based UDA methods approach this problem by synthesizing labeled target-style images and training on the resulting synthetic data. However, their performance depends heavily on the conditioning design: class prompts provide only coarse guidance, while domain adaptation modules mainly control appearance, which may leave target-style synthesis insufficiently specified. We propose VT-DUDA, a visual-token conditioning framework for diffusion-guided UDA. Instead of relying only on text prompts, VT-DUDA uses source images to provide additional instance-level visual context for target-style synthesis. Specifically, VT-DUDA maps each source image to a compact sequence of visual tokens and forms a hybrid conditioning context by concatenating these tokens with the corresponding text embeddings along the cross-attention context dimension of a latent diffusion model. This provides instance-dependent conditioning beyond text alone, while synthesis is performed with the target-domain adapter branch. Because guidance is represented explicitly as a token sequence, the same interface also permits inference-time manipulation of the conditioning signal through token selection and token-strength adjustment. The proposed method preserves the standard diffusion objective and can be integrated into existing adapter-based diffusion frameworks without modifying the backbone. Across Office-31, Office-Home, and VisDA-2017, VT-DUDA improves average target-domain accuracy over strong discriminative and diffusion-based UDA baselines. The results suggest that, in generation-based UDA, a stronger conditioning interface can improve the downstream usefulness of synthetic target-style data.

AI.tldr: VT-DUDA提出了一种基于视觉令牌的扩散模型条件框架，用于无监督域适应，通过源图像提供实例级视觉上下文来改进目标域风格合成，从而提高目标域分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散的UDA方法主要依赖文本提示进行条件控制，但文本提示只能提供粗粒度指导，域适应模块主要控制外观，这可能导致目标风格合成不够精确。需要更强大的条件接口来改进合成目标风格数据的质量。
AI.method: 提出VT-DUDA框架：1) 将源图像映射为紧凑的视觉令牌序列；2) 将这些视觉令牌与文本嵌入沿交叉注意力上下文维度拼接，形成混合条件上下文；3) 使用目标域适配器分支进行合成；4) 支持通过令牌选择和强度调整进行推理时条件信号操作。
AI.result: 在Office-31、Office-Home和VisDA-2017数据集上，VT-DUDA相比强大的判别式和基于扩散的UDA基线方法，显著提高了平均目标域分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: 在基于生成的UDA中，更强的条件接口可以改善合成目标风格数据的下游实用性。视觉令牌条件框架为扩散引导的UDA提供了更精确的实例级指导，同时保持标准扩散目标并兼容现有适配器框架。

title: Causal Variational Deep Embedding: A Family of Interventional Generators for Confounded Images
summary: Deep generative models reproduce the observational distribution of their training data, inheriting any spurious associations it contains. A common source is an unobserved confounder that shapes both an attribute the user wants to control at sampling time and an attribute expected to vary in response. Existing causal generative approaches resolve the resulting ambiguity by imposing structural assumptions strong enough to single out one interventional distribution; in image domains, such assumptions are rarely warranted, and the data is generally consistent with a set of distinct causal mechanisms -- a feasible region of interventional distributions. We propose CauVaDE (Causal Variational Deep Embedding), built on a canonical augmented SCM in which the unobserved confounder collapses, without loss of generality, into a discrete latent cluster of bounded support while continuous variation is absorbed into independent noises. We prove that this canonical class is dense, in both observational and interventional Wasserstein distance, in the class of augmented SCMs compatible with a given causal diagram, and instantiate it as a mixture variational autoencoder whose cluster variable plays the role of the canonical confounder. An entropy regularizer with weight $γ$ on the cluster posterior then traces a family of candidate causal effects that fit the observational data to comparable likelihood while spanning the feasible region. Experiments on image data benchmarks show that CauVaDE produces diverse interventional samples and improves FID against an unconfounded reference.

AI.tldr: CauVaDE是一种因果变分深度嵌入方法，通过将未观测混杂因子建模为离散潜变量簇，在图像生成中处理混杂关联问题，生成多样化的干预样本。
AI.motivation: 深度生成模型会继承训练数据中的虚假关联，特别是当存在未观测混杂因子同时影响用户想要控制的属性和预期变化的属性时。现有因果生成方法需要强结构假设来识别单一干预分布，但在图像领域这种假设通常不成立，数据通常与多个不同因果机制一致。
AI.method: 提出CauVaDE（因果变分深度嵌入），基于规范化的增强结构因果模型，将未观测混杂因子建模为有界支持的离散潜变量簇，连续变化被吸收到独立噪声中。该方法被实例化为混合变分自编码器，其中簇变量扮演规范混杂因子的角色，通过熵正则化器追踪候选因果效应族。
AI.result: 理论证明该规范类在观测和干预Wasserstein距离上在兼容给定因果图的增强SCM类中是稠密的。实验表明CauVaDE能产生多样化的干预样本，并相对于无混杂参考提高了FID分数。
AI.conclusion: CauVaDE为图像领域的因果生成提供了一种灵活框架，能够在不需要强结构假设的情况下处理未观测混杂问题，生成符合观测数据似然性的多样化干预分布。

title: HiL-ResRL: A Model-Agnostic Finetuning Adapter via Human-in-the-loop Residual Reinforcement Learning
summary: Recent advancements in generative imitation learning have significantly propelled the field of robotic manipulation. However, the majority of existing models rely heavily on Behavior Cloning (BC), a paradigm that suffers from compounding errors and distributional shift. Consequently, the efficacy of these models in practical industrial deployments remains limited. To address these challenges, we introduce a novel, plug-and-play fine-tuning pipeline designed to facilitate the robust deployment of Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models in real-world environments. In contrast to contemporary reinforcement learning (RL) fine-tuning strategies, which are often constrained by specific model architectures, our proposed framework is model-agnostic and adaptable to a diverse range of VLA models. We conceptualize VLA-generated actions as a unified interface, upon which we train a residual policy. This policy is designed to rectify suboptimal actions and address the distributional shift inherent in imitation learning. Additionally, we incorporate human-in-the-loop guidance to ensure safe exploration and maximize training efficiency. We conduct experiments directly in real-world robotic settings. The results demonstrate that within only 1.5 hour of real-world online RL training, the average success rate exceeds 95% on real robots. Our work presents a practical solution for deploying behavior cloning models in industrial scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种即插即用的微调管道，用于在真实世界环境中稳健部署Vision-Language-Action模型，通过训练残差策略纠正次优动作，仅需1.5小时真实世界在线RL训练即可达到95%以上的成功率。
AI.motivation: 当前基于行为克隆的生成式模仿学习模型存在复合错误和分布偏移问题，在实际工业部署中效果有限。需要一种能够稳健部署VLA模型的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出模型无关、即插即用的微调框架，将VLA生成的动作视为统一接口，训练残差策略来纠正次优动作和解决分布偏移。结合人在回路的指导确保安全探索和训练效率。
AI.result: 在真实机器人环境中进行实验，仅需1.5小时真实世界在线强化学习训练，平均成功率就超过95%。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为在工业场景中部署行为克隆模型提供了实用的解决方案，通过残差策略和人机协作实现了VLA模型的高效稳健部署。

title: Structural Assessment for Understanding and Guiding Dataset Distillation in Discrete Token Space
summary: Dataset distillation (DD) has proven to reduce training cost while preserving accuracy. While promising, the factors that make one distilled dataset more effective than another remain poorly understood. In this work, we investigate this question through the lens of discrete visual tokenizers. Whereas many prior DD efforts emphasize matching global data distributions, we suggest that the effectiveness depends on which semantic concepts are captured and how they are composed. Discrete visual tokenizers provide a finite vocabulary that enables direct statistical analysis of such compositional structure. Through quantitative analysis of token-level statistics, we introduce the structural score to measure the adequacy of token compositions. We observe that distilled datasets with balanced token composition yield higher validation performance. On the other hand, divergence from the original data does not necessarily harm performance. We further show that samples with high structural scores in the discrete token space can effectively guide diffusion-based DD. Our findings highlight the importance of token composition in dataset effectiveness, offering a principled complement to distributional similarity considerations in DD.

AI.tldr: 该研究从离散视觉标记器的角度分析数据集蒸馏效果，发现标记组合结构比全局分布匹配更重要，提出结构分数衡量标记组合的充分性，平衡的标记组合能带来更高性能
AI.motivation: 虽然数据集蒸馏能降低训练成本并保持准确性，但什么因素使一个蒸馏数据集比另一个更有效仍不清楚。研究者希望通过离散视觉标记器来理解这一问题的关键因素
AI.method: 使用离散视觉标记器提供有限词汇表，通过标记级统计的定量分析，引入结构分数来测量标记组合的充分性。进一步展示高结构分数的样本能有效指导基于扩散的数据集蒸馏
AI.result: 研究发现具有平衡标记组合的蒸馏数据集能获得更高的验证性能，而偏离原始数据并不一定会损害性能。结构分数能有效衡量数据集的有效性
AI.conclusion: 标记组合在数据集有效性中起关键作用，为数据集蒸馏提供了分布相似性考虑之外的原理性补充，强调语义概念捕获和组合的重要性

title: Causal Gaussian Processes for Robust Treatment Effect Evaluation with Unobserved Confounding
summary: The presence of confounding bias poses a key challenge in policy evaluation, as the target causal effects of actions are not identifiable (i.e., underdetermined) from observational data. On the other hand, existing confounding-robust evaluation strategies require detailed prior knowledge about the environment or apply only to discrete treatments and outcomes. This paper investigates causal effect evaluation over the continuous domain from confounded observations, while requiring only basic temporal ordering between the treatment and the outcome. We introduce a universal discretization of the exogenous domains that approximates the observational and interventional distributions of any causal model with arbitrary accuracy using a finite number of latent states. Building on this newfound universal approximation property, we develop a novel family of Causal Gaussian process (CGP) models that effectively approximate the observational and interventional distributions of any causal model with confounded observations.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种在连续域上处理混杂偏倚的因果效应评估方法，通过引入通用离散化和因果高斯过程模型来近似观测和干预分布。
AI.motivation: 混杂偏倚是政策评估中的关键挑战，现有的混杂鲁棒评估策略要么需要详细先验知识，要么仅适用于离散处理和结果，无法处理连续域上的因果效应评估问题。
AI.method: 引入外生域的通用离散化，使用有限潜在状态近似任何因果模型的观测和干预分布；在此基础上开发因果高斯过程（CGP）模型家族，有效近似具有混杂观测的因果模型分布。
AI.result: 提出的方法能够以任意精度近似任何因果模型的观测和干预分布，为连续域上的因果效应评估提供了理论基础和实用框架。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为从混杂观测中评估连续因果效应提供了新方法，仅需基本的处理与结果时间顺序信息，无需详细环境先验知识，具有较好的通用性和实用性。

title: A Vendor-Agnostic LiDAR Data Conversion System with Multi-Signal Detection and Multi-Format Output
comment: Manuscript under review at Expert Systems with Applications (Elsevier)
summary: LiDAR (Light Detection and Ranging) sensors capture the surrounding environment as dense 3D point clouds by measuring the time-of-flight of emitted laser pulses, making them foundational across autonomous vehicles, robotics, and large-scale mapping. PCAP (Packet Capture) files from these sensors are the starting point of most 3D perception pipelines, yet internal packet structures, UDP (User Datagram Protocol) port conventions and encoding schemes differ enough across manufacturers that no single tool reads them all. Ouster, Velodyne, Hesai, and Livox each require their own SDK (Software Development Kit), their own environment setup, and their own conversion workflow. Supporting all four means maintaining four disconnected pipelines with no shared infrastructure. The pipeline described here takes a raw PCAP as input and handles vendor identification automatically, scoring six independent file characteristics through a weighted multi-signal approach to determine the source sensor. C++ SDKs handle Ouster and Velodyne, while Hesai and Livox rely on Python-based dpkt parsing where no open source SDK exists. From there, a single command writes output to any of five industry-standard formats. We tested on real outdoor captures.
