Finally, we address learning along four classical RL dimensions: model-free versus model-based, value-based versus policy-based versus actor-critic, on-policy versus off-policy, and credit assignment, including both Monte Carlo methods, which rely on full return estimates, and bootstrapping methods, which update estimates using other learned predictions.
  Mapping the LLM literature onto this taxonomy reveals a strikingly non-uniform distribution of research effort. Critic-free policy gradients and Monte Carlo credit assignment are densely populated, while value-based methods, off-policy actor-critic training, and bootstrapping-based credit assignment remain largely unexplored despite well-established counterparts in classical RL. These gaps represent concrete opportunities for transferring proven RL techniques to LLM training.
  By making these gaps explicit alongside the methods that have proven effective, this survey offers researchers in both RL and LLMs a shared framework for understanding current practice and identifying promising directions for future work.

AI.tldr: 该论文对LLM强化学习后训练方法进行了系统调查，揭示了当前主要使用PPO和GRPO等有限方法，而许多经典RL技术尚未在LLM训练中得到充分探索，为未来研究提供了明确方向。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM后训练主要依赖PPO和GRPO等少数RL方法，这仅代表了RL技术的一小部分。需要系统性地理解这些方法为何主导，以及存在哪些替代方案，从而为LLM训练开辟更广阔的RL技术应用空间。
AI.method: 围绕RL算法构建的三个阶段建立系统分类框架：1) MDP创建（奖励函数、状态空间、动作空间等定义）；2) 探索策略（温度采样、熵正则化、内在动机等）；3) 学习机制（模型/模型无关、价值/策略/行动者-评论家、同策略/异策略、信用分配方法）。将LLM文献映射到该分类体系。
AI.result: 研究发现LLM RL研究分布极不均衡：无评论家策略梯度和蒙特卡洛信用分配方法研究密集，而价值基础方法、异策略行动者-评论家训练、基于自举的信用分配等方法在经典RL中已有成熟应用，但在LLM训练中几乎未被探索，这些空白代表了具体的技术转移机会。
AI.conclusion: 该调查为RL和LLM研究者提供了共享框架，既能理解当前实践，又能识别未来有前景的研究方向。通过明确技术空白和已证明有效的方法，促进了经典RL技术向LLM训练的迁移，有望推动LLM后训练方法的多样化发展。

title: Bridging Semantics and Kinematics: A Modular Framework for Zero-Shot Robotic Manipulation
summary: This paper presents a modular training-free framework for zero-shot, language-guided robotic manipulation in semi-structured environments. The architecture bridges the gap between high-level reasoning and low-level kinematics by decomposing the vision-action pipeline into three stages: visual perception, semantic interpretation, and task execution. To overcome the spatial ambiguity and semantic hallucinations inherent in standard Vision-Language Models (VLMs), the perception module employs FastSAM and Set-of-Mark (SoM) prompting to dynamically generate grounded, alphanumeric visual anchors. The same foundation model then operates purely as a Large Language Model (LLM) to act as a semantic router, translating unconstrained human directives into verifiable, reconfigurable configurations. Finally, these configurations are dynamically parsed by a Task Orchestrator into MoveIt Task Constructor (MTC) to generate collision-free trajectories. The framework is evaluated across two zero-shot experimental setups: unconstrained open-world sequential manipulation and dense relational spatial reasoning, achieving a 62% end-to-end task success rate across both scenarios, demonstrating its capacity to reliably execute complex physical actions without domain-specific training or manual coordinate programming.

AI.tldr: 提出模块化免训练框架，用于零样本、语言引导的机器人操作，通过视觉感知、语义解释和任务执行三阶段解决半结构化环境中的空间模糊和语义幻觉问题
AI.motivation: 解决标准视觉语言模型在机器人操作中存在的空间模糊性和语义幻觉问题，弥合高层推理与低层运动学之间的鸿沟，实现无需领域特定训练或手动坐标编程的复杂物理动作执行
AI.method: 采用三阶段架构：1) 使用FastSAM和Set-of-Mark提示生成视觉锚点的感知模块；2) 作为语义路由器的LLM，将人类指令转换为可验证配置；3) 任务编排器将配置解析为MoveIt任务构造器以生成无碰撞轨迹
AI.result: 在两个零样本实验设置中（无约束开放世界顺序操作和密集关系空间推理）实现了62%的端到端任务成功率，展示了无需特定训练即可可靠执行复杂物理动作的能力
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功实现了零样本、语言引导的机器人操作，通过模块化设计有效解决了视觉语言模型的空间模糊问题，为半结构化环境中的机器人操作提供了一种免训练、可配置的解决方案

title: Artic-O: End-to-End Articulated Object Reconstruction via Latent Geometry Learning
summary: Reconstructing articulated objects from sparse images requires recovering complete geometry, movable parts, and motion parameters. Recent methods typically separate geometry reconstruction, part reasoning, and articulation estimation into different stages. This separation can weaken consistency between shape, active parts, and motion, while also incurring substantial inference cost. We introduce Artic-O, an end-to-end, feed-forward framework for articulated object reconstruction via latent geometry learning. Instead of fitting geometry in image or view space, Artic-O maps sparse multi-state observations into a pretrained latent geometry space, where a frozen flow-matching decoder provides a complete-shape prior for recovering visible and occluded structures. To connect geometry with articulation, Artic-O fuses visual tokens, geometry latents, and point-wise decoder features in an image-grounded part-reasoning module for active-part segmentation and articulation prediction. We further train the model with a geometry-to-articulation curriculum and a decoupled two-pass strategy to balance reconstruction and part-level supervision. On PartNet-Mobility, Artic-O achieves strong reconstruction quality while being substantially more efficient than LARM, a strong prior method. It reduces Chamfer Distance, improves F-score, and achieves comparable or better articulation accuracy across most joint metrics, while reducing inference time from 9 minutes to about 0.3 seconds per object.

AI.tldr: Artic-O是一个端到端的框架，通过潜在几何学习从稀疏图像重建关节物体，显著提高了效率和重建质量。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将几何重建、部件推理和关节估计分离到不同阶段，这会削弱形状、活动部件和运动之间的一致性，同时产生大量推理成本。需要一种更一致、更高效的方法。
AI.method: Artic-O将稀疏多状态观测映射到预训练的潜在几何空间，使用冻结的流匹配解码器提供完整形状先验。通过融合视觉标记、几何潜在表示和解码器特征进行部件推理和关节预测，并采用几何到关节的课程学习和解耦的两阶段策略进行训练。
AI.result: 在PartNet-Mobility数据集上，Artic-O实现了强大的重建质量，同时比LARM方法更高效。它减少了Chamfer距离，提高了F-score，在大多数关节指标上达到可比或更好的精度，同时将推理时间从9分钟减少到约0.3秒。
AI.conclusion: Artic-O通过端到端的潜在几何学习方法，在保持高质量重建的同时，显著提高了关节物体重建的效率，为稀疏图像下的关节物体重建提供了有效的解决方案。

title: On the Curse of Dimensionality in Private Sparse Covariance Estimation and PCA
summary:
We study high-dimensional differentially private (DP) covariance estimation in the operator norm, and principal component analysis (PCA), under $k$-row-column sparsity ($k$-RCS) of the covariance matrix. In the non-private setting, it is known that $\mathsf{poly}(k, \log d)$ samples suffice to solve both of these problems. However, the only comparable result known under DP (Wang et al. 2021) requires $Ω(d)$ samples under standard parameterizations of the problem. We investigate when this curse of dimensionality is inherent for sparse covariance estimation tasks under DP.
  On the upper bound front, we show that a $\mathsf{poly}(k, \log d)$ sample complexity for PCA is possible under DP, if we also posit sparsity of the leading eigenvector. We complement this result with $\mathsf{poly}(d)$ lower bounds under DP for both sparse covariance estimation and PCA, establishing an exponential gap between the private and non-private variants of these problems when $k = \mathsf{polylog}(d)$. To our knowledge, no such separation has previously been demonstrated for any sparse estimation problems in private high-dimensional statistics. Our techniques are flexible enough that they imply stronger lower bounds even for the well-studied problem of standard DP PCA, without sparsity assumptions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究高维差分隐私(DP)协方差估计和主成分分析(PCA)，发现在k-行列稀疏性下，DP版本需要指数级更多样本，揭示了隐私与非隐私版本之间的指数差距。
AI.motivation: 研究在差分隐私约束下，高维稀疏协方差估计和PCA问题的样本复杂度。非隐私设置下，poly(k, log d)样本足够；但现有DP结果需要Ω(d)样本。本文旨在探究这种维度诅咒是否在DP稀疏协方差估计中固有存在。
AI.method: 1) 上界：证明在DP下，如果主特征向量也具有稀疏性，PCA可以实现poly(k, log d)样本复杂度。2) 下界：为稀疏协方差估计和PCA建立poly(d)下界，显示当k=polylog(d)时，隐私与非隐私版本存在指数差距。3) 技术灵活，甚至为无稀疏假设的标准DP PCA提供更强下界。
AI.result: 1) 在DP下，如果主特征向量稀疏，PCA可实现poly(k, log d)样本复杂度。2) 对于稀疏协方差估计和PCA，建立了poly(d)下界。3) 当k=polylog(d)时，隐私与非隐私版本存在指数差距，这是首次在私有高维统计的稀疏估计问题中展示这种分离。4) 技术也为标准DP PCA提供了更强下界。
AI.conclusion: 差分隐私对高维稀疏协方差估计和PCA问题引入了显著的样本复杂度代价。当协方差矩阵具有k-行列稀疏性时，非隐私版本只需poly(k, log d)样本，而DP版本需要poly(d)样本，存在指数差距。这种分离是首次在私有高维统计的稀疏估计问题中证明，揭示了隐私保护在稀疏高维统计中的根本性限制。

title: Lessons from the Field: A Case Study of Robotic Intervention in an Industrial Emergency
comment: Accepted final version. IEEE International Symposium on Safety, Security, and Rescue Robotics (SSRR), Galway, Ireland, October 2025
summary: Incidents in chemical plants can pose a high level of risk and harsh environments for first responders. Contamination and explosion hazards can deny human access to the affected infrastructure, underscoring the need for capable robot systems. This field report documents the successful deployment of a robotic task force to neutralize an explosive gas hazard at a chemical plant after a fire incident. An Unmanned Ground Vehicle (UGV) with a custom manipulation tool opened a critical valve under hazardous conditions, averting the threat of a large-scale explosion. We provide insights into robot deployment and use the mission results to highlight both the importance of rescue robotics and limitations of using research platforms in real emergency deployments, such as communication constraints and the need for enhanced operator-assistance functions.

AI.tldr: 成功部署机器人任务小组在化工厂火灾后处理爆炸性气体危险，使用无人地面车辆和定制工具打开关键阀门，避免大规模爆炸，同时总结了救援机器人部署的经验和限制。
AI.motivation: 化工厂事故对第一响应者构成高风险和恶劣环境，污染和爆炸危险可能阻碍人员进入受影响基础设施，因此需要能够应对这些挑战的机器人系统。
AI.method: 部署机器人任务小组，使用配备定制操纵工具的无人地面车辆（UGV），在危险条件下打开关键阀门以消除爆炸性气体危险。
AI.result: 成功打开关键阀门，避免了大规模爆炸的威胁，证明了机器人系统在实际紧急情况下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 强调了救援机器人的重要性，同时指出了研究平台在实际紧急部署中的局限性，如通信限制和需要增强操作员辅助功能。

title: ScalePredictor: Instance-aware Scale Learning for Accurate Quantization of Vision Transformers
summary: Vision Transformers have achieved remarkable success in many fields, yet their deployment on edge devices remains challenging due to their substantial computational demands. Post-Training Quantization (PTQ) offers an attractive solution by compressing models using a small calibration set with minimal training overhead. However, most existing PTQ works adopt a static quantization paradigm that is uniformly applied to all instances. Given the substantial diversity of natural images, the activation distributions vary significantly across samples, making these methods inherently suboptimal. In this paper, we propose ScalePredictor, a dynamic quantization framework for accurate and efficient quantization scale learning of ViTs. We first reveal a hidden correlation between the distribution range of shallow-layer activations and the optimal scales of deeper layers. Based on this, we develop a scale learning mechanism that integrates an efficient range extraction approach to capture robust range statistics at the shallow stage, which are then fed into a Taylor-motivated polynomial scale projection module to generate all quantization scales simultaneously. With the efficiency of polynomial approximation, ScalePredictor introduces insignificant computational overhead while avoiding costly just-in-time calibration. Extensive experiments on ImageNet demonstrate that ScalePredictor consistently outperforms prior PTQ methods, achieving a more favorable accuracy-efficiency trade-off. Code and additional results are shown in the supplementary materials.

AI.tldr: ScalePredictor：一种用于ViT的动态量化框架，通过浅层激活分布预测深层最优量化尺度，在保持高效的同时显著提升量化精度
AI.motivation: 现有PTQ方法采用静态量化范式，对所有实例统一应用，但自然图像多样性导致激活分布差异显著，静态方法存在固有次优性。需要一种能适应不同样本的动态量化方法
AI.method: 提出ScalePredictor动态量化框架：1）发现浅层激活分布范围与深层最优量化尺度的隐藏相关性；2）开发高效范围提取方法捕获浅层稳健统计；3）设计泰勒启发的多项式尺度投影模块，同时生成所有量化尺度
AI.result: 在ImageNet上的广泛实验表明，ScalePredictor持续优于现有PTQ方法，实现了更好的精度-效率权衡，同时引入的计算开销可忽略不计
AI.conclusion: ScalePredictor通过动态量化有效解决了ViT部署中的计算挑战，利用浅层-深层相关性实现了高效准确的量化尺度学习，为边缘设备部署提供了实用解决方案

title: Learning by Shifting: Temporal View Construction for Time Series Contrastive Learning
comment: Published in the European Conference on Machine Learning and Principles and Practice of Knowledge Discovery in Databases (ECMLPKDD)
summary: Supervised learning demands large quantities of labeled data, a bottleneck that is expensive and reliant on domain-specific expertise. Self-supervised learning, particularly contrastive learning, has emerged as a compelling alternative, enabling rich representation learning directly from unlabeled data. Yet its success hinges critically on the design of positive and negative sample pairs. Existing approaches for time series rely on hand-crafted augmentations and masking heuristics that embed strong domain assumptions, often limiting generalization across diverse temporal patterns and potentially introducing spurious correlations. In this work, we challenge this paradigm by demonstrating that explicitly encoding temporal shift invariance through a simple, deterministic view construction is sufficient to learn strong representations for time series classification. By exploiting temporal structure, our method, Shift Invariant Feature Training (ShiFT), achieves state-of-the-art performance on six diverse real-world time series benchmark datasets, as well as the UCR and UEA archives, while reducing training time. Beyond empirical performance, we present a systematic analysis of contrastive learning dynamics in time series settings, examining the effects of batch size and the number of negatives on downstream performance. Our findings provide practical insights for designing efficient contrastive learning frameworks for time series representation learning. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/sfi-norwai/ShiFT.

AI.tldr: ShiFT提出了一种简单而有效的自监督学习方法，通过确定性视图构造编码时间平移不变性，在时间序列分类任务上实现了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 监督学习需要大量标注数据，成本高昂且依赖领域专业知识。现有的时间序列对比学习方法依赖手工设计的增强和掩码启发式方法，这些方法嵌入了强烈的领域假设，限制了跨不同时间模式的泛化能力，并可能引入虚假相关性。
AI.method: 提出Shift Invariant Feature Training (ShiFT)方法，通过利用时间结构，采用简单的确定性视图构造来编码时间平移不变性，从而学习时间序列的强表示。
AI.result: 在六个不同的真实世界时间序列基准数据集以及UCR和UEA档案库上实现了最先进的性能，同时减少了训练时间。还对时间序列设置中的对比学习动态进行了系统分析，研究了批量大小和负样本数量对下游性能的影响。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式编码时间平移不变性的简单确定性视图构造足以学习时间序列分类的强表示，为设计高效的时间序列表示学习对比学习框架提供了实用见解。

title: LP-NavOA: Integrated Local Navigation and Obstacle Avoidance for Humanoid Robots under Limited Perception
summary: Humanoid local navigation in cluttered environments must jointly resolve obstacle avoidance, sparse-goal recovery, and stable whole-body locomotion under short-range and partially observable sensing. Explicit planner-control decompositions introduce latency and can mismatch agile humanoid command-tracking limits, while purely reactive controllers may lose the goal after obstacle occlusion. We present LP-NavOA, a limited-perception navigation and obstacle-avoidance framework for humanoid robots. A raycast-conditioned perception-action proximal policy optimization (PPO) locomotion backbone is first trained with a robot-centered circular heading-speed command and a shared command-side safety filter. With this backbone frozen, A-star and waypoint teachers generate rollouts for distilling a recurrent local planner that overwrites only the heading command at deployment, leaving the whole-body policy intact. At runtime, LP-NavOA uses proprioception, short-range local range sensing, and a body-frame goal direction, requiring no global map, waypoint stream, or external planner. In MuJoCo open-wall and indoor layouts, the distilled planner produces obstacle bypassing and post-avoidance goal recovery, raising teacher-calibrated on-time arrival from 38--40\% to 85--97\% and reducing brush/contact-heavy progress relative to a backbone-only controller. Ablations show that dynamic route shaping, teacher-active data collection, and the circular command interface are important for navigation efficiency and for training the 3.0\,m/s backbone. A Unitree G1 deployment analysis demonstrates hardware executability without continuous joystick steering.

AI.tldr: LP-NavOA是一个用于人形机器人在杂乱环境中的局部导航框架，通过感知-动作PPO策略和蒸馏的局部规划器，实现避障和稀疏目标恢复，无需全局地图或外部规划器。
AI.motivation: 人形机器人在杂乱环境中的局部导航需要同时解决避障、稀疏目标恢复和稳定全身运动问题。传统的显式规划-控制分解会引入延迟且与机器人敏捷性不匹配，而纯反应式控制器在障碍物遮挡后容易丢失目标。
AI.method: 1. 训练基于射线感知的PPO策略作为运动骨干，使用机器人中心的圆形航向-速度命令和共享安全滤波器；2. 冻结骨干策略，使用A-star和航点教师生成数据蒸馏循环局部规划器，该规划器在部署时只覆盖航向命令；3. 运行时仅需本体感知、短程局部距离感知和体坐标系目标方向。
AI.result: 在MuJoCo开放墙和室内布局中，蒸馏规划器实现了障碍物绕行和避障后目标恢复，将教师校准的准时到达率从38-40%提升到85-97%，减少了与障碍物的接触。在Unitree G1上的部署分析表明该方法具有硬件执行可行性。
AI.conclusion: LP-NavOA框架通过蒸馏局部规划器有效解决了人形机器人在短程感知环境中的导航问题，动态路径塑造、教师主动数据收集和圆形命令接口对导航效率和高速骨干训练至关重要。

title: CapRiCorn-1K: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Video Captioning and Subject Referential Consistency Across Temporal Scales
summary: Accurate and comprehensive video captions with consistent subject references are critical for downstream understanding and generation tasks. However, few existing benchmarks can objectively and comprehensively evaluate these properties across diverse durations and scenarios, thereby hindering the advancement of video captioning models. To bridge this gap, we propose CapRiCorn-1K, a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate both video captioning quality and subject referential consistency across long temporal horizons and diverse video domains. To accommodate varied evaluation needs, our benchmark supports both audiovisual and visual-only settings. Extensive experiments on CapRiCorn-1K reveal that current models generally struggle to generate accurate and comprehensive captions while maintaining consistent subject references. Moreover, as video duration increases, both the overall caption quality and subject referential consistency decline. Notably, our evaluation metrics exhibit strong correlations with the performance of downstream understanding and generation tasks conditioned on the generated captions, further validating their effectiveness. The project is available at https://github.com/xlchen0205/CapRiCorn-1K .

AI.tldr: CapRiCorn-1K是一个全面的视频字幕评估基准，用于评估视频字幕质量和主题指称一致性，特别关注长视频和多样化场景。
AI.motivation: 现有基准难以客观全面地评估视频字幕的准确性和主题指称一致性，特别是在不同时长和场景下，这阻碍了视频字幕模型的发展。
AI.method: 提出CapRiCorn-1K基准，支持视听和纯视觉两种设置，评估视频字幕质量和主题指称一致性，涵盖长时域和多样化视频领域。
AI.result: 当前模型在生成准确全面的字幕同时保持主题指称一致性方面存在困难，且随着视频时长增加，字幕质量和一致性都会下降。提出的评估指标与下游任务性能有强相关性。
AI.conclusion: CapRiCorn-1K是一个有效的视频字幕评估基准，揭示了当前模型的局限性，其评估指标能有效预测下游任务性能。

title: A Standard Processing Pipeline for High-accuracy Measurement of Few-shot Regression on Laser Induced Breakdown Spectroscopy
summary: Laser-induced breakdown spectroscopy (LIBS) faces challenges in high-accuracy quantitative measurement under few-shot scenarios due to spectral noise and data scarcity. Traditional preprocessing methods often fail to preserve subtle spectral features or capture nonlinear correlations. This work proposes a standardized processing pipeline integrating diffusion-based denoising, attention-based autoencoder for dimensionality reduction, group shuffling data augmentation, and ordinary least squares regression. The diffusion module employs a 3D UNet architecture to remove spectral noise while preserving essential emission features. The attention-autoencoder captures nonlinear spectral correlations, effectively reducing high-dimensional spectral data to compact latent representations. Group shuffling data augmentation enhances model robustness by creating synthetic samples through feature group permutation. Experimental results on multiple elemental concentrations demonstrate that our Diffusion-DA-AE pipeline achieves superior performance with a mean RMAE of 0.2847, representing 37.7\% and 37.6\% improvements over baseline autoencoder and traditional PCA-PLS regression, respectively. The framework's effectiveness validates its generalizability and establishes a new benchmark for few-shot LIBS regression.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种名为Diffusion-DA-AE的标准化处理流程，用于解决少样本激光诱导击穿光谱（LIBS）定量分析中的噪声和样本稀缺问题，通过扩散去噪、注意力自编码器降维、组洗牌数据增强和最小二乘回归，显著提升了测量精度。
AI.motivation: 激光诱导击穿光谱（LIBS）在少样本场景下进行高精度定量测量面临挑战，主要由于光谱噪声和数据稀缺。传统预处理方法往往无法保留细微光谱特征或捕捉非线性相关性。
AI.method: 提出标准化处理流程，包括：1) 基于扩散的3D UNet架构去噪模块，去除光谱噪声同时保留关键发射特征；2) 注意力自编码器捕捉非线性光谱相关性，将高维光谱数据降维为紧凑潜在表示；3) 组洗牌数据增强，通过特征组排列创建合成样本增强模型鲁棒性；4) 普通最小二乘回归进行最终定量分析。
AI.result: 在多元素浓度数据集上的实验结果表明，Diffusion-DA-AE流程取得了优异性能，平均RMAE为0.2847，相比基线自编码器和传统PCA-PLS回归分别提升了37.7%和37.6%。
AI.conclusion: 该框架的有效性验证了其泛化能力，为少样本LIBS回归建立了新的基准，为解决LIBS定量分析中的噪声和样本稀缺问题提供了有效解决方案。

title: Conceptual Design of an Ecosystem for Real Farm Data Collection toward Agricultural AI Foundation Models
summary: Data scarcity is a fundamental challenge in developing AI and foundation models for agricultural robots. Existing open-source data platforms do not provide sufficient incentives for data providers so long-term data collection remains difficult. Furthermore, advances in generative AI have introduced a new challenge of verifying that collected data genuinely originates from real farm environments. We propose an ecosystem for the sustainable collection and distribution of real farm data, integrating automatic pricing driven by demand and rarity, revenue sharing that distributes earnings to farmers as an incentive to keep providing data, and data authenticity guarantees through authenticated device uploads. To demonstrate the economic sustainability for all three parties among farmers, AI companies, and the platform, we estimate the economic value that agricultural robots stand to generate.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一个可持续的农场数据收集与分发生态系统，通过需求驱动的自动定价、向农民分配收益的激励机制，以及通过认证设备上传确保数据真实性的机制，解决农业机器人AI开发中的数据稀缺问题。
AI.motivation: 农业机器人AI开发面临数据稀缺的根本挑战，现有开源数据平台无法为数据提供者提供足够激励，导致长期数据收集困难；同时生成式AI的进步带来了验证数据是否真正来自真实农场环境的新挑战。
AI.method: 提出一个整合了三个核心机制的生态系统：1）基于需求和稀缺性的自动定价驱动 2）向农民分配收益的收入分享机制作为持续提供数据的激励 3）通过认证设备上传确保数据真实性的保障机制
AI.result: 通过估计农业机器人可能产生的经济价值，论证了该系统对农民、AI公司和平台三方都具有经济可持续性。
AI.conclusion: 该生态系统能够可持续地收集和分发真实农场数据，解决农业AI开发中的数据稀缺和真实性验证问题，为所有参与方创造经济价值。

title: Denoising-Enhanced Coarse-to-Fine Infrared Small Target Detection with Attention Prior-Guided Knowledge Distillation
summary: Infrared small target detection (IRSTD) in high-resolution images is crucial for many practical applications, such as surveillance of unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) and UAV-based ground monitoring. However, IRSTD remains challenging due to the small size and weak features of targets, as well as significant interference from complex dynamic backgrounds. Existing detection methods often suffer from redundant computations on non-target background regions and insufficient exploitation of target context information, which limits their performance in complex backgrounds. To address these issues, we propose an efficient coarse-to-fine infrared small target detection framework with attention prior-guided knowledge distillation, termed ECFNet. In the coarse stage, we design a region binary classification network (RBCN) on grid-based multi-scale feature maps to efficiently recognize target-containing context region proposals while suppressing complex backgrounds. Moreover, we introduce a novel denoising-assisted training strategy that incorporates noisy ground-truth (GT) masks into the feature maps of RBCN and trains the network to reconstruct the GT masks through a denoising task, thereby enhancing its ability to distinguish target proposals from background regions and accelerating convergence. In the fine stage, we customize a lightweight target detector to the coarse stage's region proposals for balancing accuracy and efficiency. Furthermore, we propose a knowledge distillation strategy guided by the teacher-student cross-attention prior. This mechanism directs the student to focus on critical target regions, thereby enhancing the discriminative feature representation for infrared small targets. Extensive experiments on three real infrared datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms both existing single-stage and two-stage approaches while maintaining high real-time processing efficiency.

AI.tldr: ECFNet：一种基于注意力先验知识蒸馏的粗-细红外小目标检测框架，通过区域二分类网络和去噪辅助训练策略提升检测性能
AI.motivation: 红外小目标检测在无人机监控等应用中至关重要，但现有方法存在两个主要问题：1）在非目标背景区域进行冗余计算；2）对目标上下文信息利用不足，导致复杂背景下的性能受限
AI.method: 提出ECFNet框架，包含粗阶段和细阶段：1）粗阶段设计区域二分类网络（RBCN）识别目标区域，采用基于网格的多尺度特征图，并引入去噪辅助训练策略；2）细阶段定制轻量级目标检测器；3）提出基于师生交叉注意力先验的知识蒸馏策略，指导学生关注关键目标区域
AI.result: 在三个真实红外数据集上的大量实验表明，该方法在保持高实时处理效率的同时，优于现有的单阶段和两阶段方法
AI.conclusion: ECFNet通过粗-细检测框架、注意力先验知识蒸馏和去噪辅助训练，有效解决了红外小目标检测中的背景干扰和目标特征弱的问题，实现了精度和效率的平衡

title: VegSim: A Geospatial World Model for Scenario-Conditioned Vegetation Simulation
summary: Vegetation monitoring under climate stress requires answering not only how it will evolve given the expected weather, but how it would respond to alternative meteorological conditions. Forecasting models return the expected vegetation state for the observed weather and cannot answer these scenario-conditioned questions, because future weather is fixed to the recorded trajectory. We present VegSim, a geospatial world model for scenario-conditioned vegetation simulation. VegSim infers a latent vegetation state from sparse satellite-derived NDVI histories, past meteorological covariates, and static spatial context, propagates it forward under future weather forcing through recurrent latent dynamics, and decodes predictive NDVI quantiles at each lead time. Because future forcing enters as a controllable input, the same trained model supports probabilistic forecasting under observed weather and conditional simulation under user-defined meteorological forcing, without supervision on scenario responses. We evaluate VegSim on GreenEarthNet across in-distribution data and spatial, temporal, and joint spatial-temporal shift, where it achieves strong point and probabilistic accuracy against time series and Earth observation forecasting baselines while using a compact architecture. We then simulate vegetation responses across Europe under four meteorological scenarios, and in a France summer 2022 case study, obtaining spatially coherent patterns consistent with known sensitivity to temperature and precipitation. The code is available at https://github.com/arco-group/vegsim.

AI.tldr: VegSim是一个用于情景条件植被模拟的地理空间世界模型，能够基于用户定义的气象强迫进行条件模拟，而不仅仅是基于观测天气的预测。
AI.motivation: 在气候压力下进行植被监测不仅需要预测在预期天气条件下的植被演变，还需要回答在替代气象条件下植被会如何响应。传统的预测模型只能基于观测天气轨迹进行预测，无法回答这些情景条件问题。
AI.method: VegSim从稀疏的卫星NDVI历史数据、过去的气象协变量和静态空间背景中推断潜在植被状态，通过潜在动态循环传播将其向前推进，并在每个领先时间解码预测的NDVI分位数。模型将未来强迫作为可控输入，支持在观测天气下的概率预测和用户定义气象强迫下的条件模拟。
AI.result: 在GreenEarthNet数据集上，VegSim在分布内数据和空间、时间、时空联合偏移情况下均表现出强大的点预测和概率准确性，优于时间序列和地球观测预测基线模型。在欧洲四种气象情景下的模拟结果显示了与已知温度和降水敏感性一致的空间连贯模式。
AI.conclusion: VegSim提供了一个灵活的地理空间世界模型，能够同时支持基于观测天气的植被预测和基于用户定义气象情景的条件植被模拟，为气候压力下的植被监测提供了新的分析工具。

title: Causal Reward World Models: Zero-shot Reward Design for Automated Skill Generation
summary: Automated Reward Design (ARD) aims to replace manual reward engineering in reinforcement learning with language-driven reward function synthesis. However, existing approaches based on large language models (LLMs) remain inherently correlation-driven, relying on iterative environmental feedback to refine reward hypotheses for each specific task. This paradigm not only results in inefficient reasoning but also makes LLMs susceptible to semantically plausible yet causally spurious reward components, leading to ineffective optimization. To address these limitations, we propose the Causal Reward World Model (CRWM), which explicitly models the causal topological relationships between candidate reward components and task-targeted physical variables through offline pre-training on multi-task interaction data. Based on a coarse-to-fine pre-training strategy, we introduce a joint optimization module that integrates Explicit Mechanism Decoupling with Confidence-Aware Soft Fusion to refine coarse structural priors using micro-level trajectories, thereby constructing a robust and interpretable causal skeleton. During inference, LLMs leverage CRWM as a task-irrelevant causal prior to constrain the reward generation, enabling zero-shot reward function design. Our work opens up a new white-box paradigm for the ARD problem. Extensive experiments on complex continuous control benchmarks demonstrate that CRWM generates executable reward functions without feedback-driven reward refinement, significantly reducing the design latency for acquiring new robotic skills while matching or surpassing state-of-the-art performance, and further exhibits strong generalization capabilities across unseen tasks and diverse robotic embodiments.

AI.tldr: CRWM通过离线预训练构建因果拓扑模型，为LLM提供任务无关的因果先验，实现零样本奖励函数设计，无需迭代反馈，显著降低机器人技能获取延迟
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的自动奖励设计方法依赖迭代环境反馈，效率低下且容易产生语义合理但因果虚假的奖励组件，导致优化效果不佳
AI.method: 提出因果奖励世界模型(CRWM)，通过多任务交互数据的离线预训练，显式建模候选奖励组件与任务目标物理变量间的因果拓扑关系。采用粗到细的预训练策略，结合显式机制解耦和置信感知软融合的联合优化模块，利用微观轨迹细化粗粒度结构先验，构建鲁棒可解释的因果骨架
AI.result: 在复杂连续控制基准测试中，CRWM无需反馈驱动的奖励细化即可生成可执行的奖励函数，显著降低新机器人技能获取的设计延迟，性能匹配或超越现有最佳方法，并在未见任务和多样化机器人实体上表现出强泛化能力
AI.conclusion: CRWM为自动奖励设计问题开辟了新的白盒范式，通过因果先验约束奖励生成，实现零样本奖励函数设计，解决了现有相关驱动方法的局限性

title: Look Before You Zoom: Adaptive Routing for the Resolution-Context Trade-off in Visual RAG
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) struggle as query-relevant objects become smaller. To address this, recent training-free approaches dynamically retrieve and zoom into local image regions. However, we show that indiscriminately applying retrieval ignores a critical vulnerability: the resolution-context trade-off. Patch-based zooming recovers details for small targets, but can split large objects and destroy global spatial context; attention-based retrieval better preserves large objects, but remains less reliable on tiny details; and global perception is often fastest when retrieval is unnecessary. Motivated by these failure modes, we introduce ViRGo (Visual Retrieval or Global Perception), a lightweight framework that formulates visual retrieval as an adaptive routing problem. ViRGo estimates object scale from the VLM's intrinsic localization heads during the initial forward pass and combines it with semantic token confidence to select between global perception, patch-based retrieval, and attention-based retrieval with minimal additional computation. Experiments across multiple VQA benchmarks and object-size groups show that ViRGo improves the accuracy-efficiency trade-off: it matches patch retrieval on small details, leverages attention-based retrieval for larger objects, and reduces inference time by routing to the global baseline when zooming is unnecessary.

AI.tldr: ViRGo是一个轻量级框架，通过自适应路由在全局感知、基于patch的检索和基于attention的检索之间进行选择，解决了VLM在处理不同大小物体时的分辨率-上下文权衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在处理小物体时表现不佳，而现有的无训练检索方法存在分辨率-上下文权衡问题：基于patch的缩放会破坏大物体的全局空间上下文，基于attention的检索对小细节不可靠，全局感知在不需要缩放时最快。
AI.method: ViRGo将视觉检索制定为自适应路由问题，利用VLM内在的定位头估计物体尺度，结合语义token置信度，在全局感知、基于patch的检索和基于attention的检索之间进行选择，计算开销最小。
AI.result: 在多个VQA基准测试和不同物体大小组上的实验表明，ViRGo改善了准确率-效率权衡：在小细节上匹配patch检索，对大物体利用attention检索，当不需要缩放时路由到全局基线以减少推理时间。
AI.conclusion: ViRGo通过自适应路由机制有效解决了VLM中的分辨率-上下文权衡问题，在保持准确率的同时提高了推理效率，为视觉检索提供了一种轻量级且高效的解决方案。

title: SPOTR: Spatio-temporal Pooling One-Token Reconstruction for Universal Physiological Signal Self-supervised Learning
comment: The paper has been accepted by IJCAI-ECAI 2026
summary: Physiological signals such as EEG, ECG, and PPG are widely used in clinical monitoring. Recent self-supervised learning (SSL) methods offer an attractive way to leverage unlabeled recordings, yet they still fall short in practice. In particular, current SSL methods struggle across heterogeneous datasets, often distorting clinically meaningful structures or learning shortcuts from temporal and cross-channel redundancy. Consequently, existing SSL methods often deliver limited performance under linear probing, a lightweight adaptation setting that better matches real-world medical scenarios. Moreover, most Transformer-based SSL models encode a flattened spatiotemporal token sequence, incurring high computation and memory cost, and are typically developed within a single modality. To address these limitations, we present SPOTR (Spatio-temporal Pooling One-Token Reconstruction), a compress-reconstruct pretraining framework that introduces a single-token global bottleneck for physiological signals. SPOTR compresses each waveform into a single-token representation and reconstructs the signal conditioned only on this representation. Meanwhile, SPOTR introduces an efficient spatio-temporal compaction module to reduce computation and memory cost. Pretrained on 20 datasets spanning EEG, iEEG, ECG, and PPG, SPOTR consistently outperforms the strongest baseline under linear probing, improving average AUC by 18.49%, 21.71%, 17.86%, and 4.64%, respectively. Compared with a representative general-purpose time-series foundation model, SPOTR achieves around 78% lower latency and 52% lower peak GPU memory on average. The code can be found at https://github.com/5GYYYYY/SPOTR.

AI.tldr: SPOTR是一个用于多模态生理信号的压缩-重建自监督学习框架，通过单令牌全局瓶颈和时空压缩模块，在保持临床结构的同时显著降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法在异质生理数据集上表现不佳，容易扭曲临床有意义的结构或学习冗余捷径，且Transformer模型计算成本高，通常局限于单一模态。
AI.method: 提出SPOTR框架：1) 将每个波形压缩为单令牌表示，仅基于此表示重建信号；2) 引入高效的时空压缩模块降低计算和内存成本；3) 支持多模态生理信号（EEG、iEEG、ECG、PPG）。
AI.result: 在20个数据集上预训练后，SPOTR在线性探测中显著优于基线，AUC平均提升：EEG 18.49%、iEEG 21.71%、ECG 17.86%、PPG 4.64%。相比通用时间序列基础模型，延迟降低78%，GPU峰值内存降低52%。
AI.conclusion: SPOTR通过单令牌全局瓶颈和时空压缩，有效解决了生理信号自监督学习中的异质数据适应、临床结构保持和计算效率问题，为多模态生理信号分析提供了高效解决方案。

title: IOI: Decoupling Kinematics and Physics for Interactive World Models
summary: Developing generalist embodied agents requires interactive environments providing visually realistic feedback and accurate action-conditioned dynamics. Interactive world models address this by simulating such complex dynamics. However, purely data-driven methods struggle to ensure precise control alignment and physically plausible visual feedback due to a lack of explicit structural constraints. To address this, we propose IOI, a hybrid interactive world model integrating analytical kinematic priors with learned physical dynamics. Unlike data-driven approaches prone to spatiotemporal drift, IOI introduces explicit kinematic guidance, computing forward kinematics from action sequences for accurate motion trajectories. These trajectories are rendered into synchronized front, side, and top orthographic projections, eliminating the need for extrinsic camera calibration. A Multi-view Kinematic Aggregation and Injection module fuses these geometric cues and injects them into the video generator, providing geometry-consistent guidance. Conditioning video generation on these deterministic trajectories establishes a synergy between the analytical simulator and the world model. Decoupling deterministic motion into the kinematic prior frees the generator to model stochastic physical interactions. Experiments on the RoboTwin benchmark validate IOI across kinematic fidelity, out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization, and policy evaluation. IOI achieves state-of-the-art simulation performance and robust zero-shot generalization to unseen OOD tasks. Furthermore, IOI serves as a reliable policy evaluator, yielding success rates closely aligning with ground-truth physics simulators. On real-world platforms, policies trained on IOI-synthesized data match those trained on teleoperation demonstrations, solidifying its practical value for embodied policy learning.

AI.tldr: IOI 是一个混合交互世界模型，将解析运动学先验与学习物理动力学相结合，用于开发通用具身智能体。它通过运动学引导确保精确控制对齐和物理合理的视觉反馈，在机器人仿真中实现了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 纯数据驱动方法缺乏显式结构约束，难以确保精确控制对齐和物理合理的视觉反馈，这限制了交互世界模型在具身智能体开发中的实用性。
AI.method: 提出IOI混合模型，整合解析运动学先验与学习物理动力学。通过动作序列计算前向运动学获得精确运动轨迹，渲染为多视图正交投影，通过多视图运动学聚合与注入模块将几何线索融合到视频生成器中，实现几何一致性引导。
AI.result: 在RoboTwin基准测试中，IOI在运动学保真度、OOD泛化和策略评估方面均表现优异，实现了最先进的仿真性能和鲁棒的零样本泛化。作为策略评估器，其成功率与真实物理仿真器高度一致。
AI.conclusion: IOI通过整合解析运动学先验，解决了纯数据驱动方法的局限性，为具身策略学习提供了实用价值。在真实平台上，基于IOI合成数据训练的策略性能与基于遥操作演示训练的相当。

title: CoDMD: Copula-aware Distribution Matching Distillation for Fast Video Generation
summary: Few-step distillation for video diffusion models has attracted significant attention, driven by the urgent demand for efficient deployment in real-world scenarios. However, Distribution Matching Distillation (DMD), a leading paradigm, tends to degrade under limited NFE budgets, manifesting in video generation as layout instability, oversaturation, and broken motion dynamics. We trace this failure to a structural limitation: standard DMD is an intra-sample distribution-matching objective with coordinate-wise gradients, and thus imposes no explicit constraint on the relational geometry across batch elements or temporal frames, leaving the underlying copula largely unregulated. Combined with the mode-seeking tendency of its reverse-KL objective, this absence of relational guidance makes DMD prone to collapsing into local optima in the few-step regime. Motivated by this insight, we propose Copula-aware DMD (CoDMD), a lightweight relational regularizer that reuses score estimates already produced by the frozen teacher and the online fake model to construct pairwise relation matrices across samples and frames. These are matched through a supplementary distributional objective that requires no additional networks, datasets, or sampling trajectories. On the Wan-2.1-T2V model series at 1.3B & 14B scales, CoDMD distills 50-step teachers into 4-step students, achieving an approximate 25$\times$ speed-up while attaining VBench scores of 84.46 & 84.87, outperforming prior trajectory-based (rCM 82.81 & 84.05) and distribution-based (DMD 83.38 & 83.81) methods.

AI.tldr: CoDMD是一种轻量级关系正则化方法，通过匹配样本和帧间的成对关系矩阵来改进视频扩散模型的少步蒸馏，解决了DMD在有限NFE预算下的布局不稳定、过饱和和运动动态破坏问题。
AI.motivation: 传统分布匹配蒸馏(DMD)在有限NFE预算下会退化，表现为视频生成中的布局不稳定、过饱和和运动动态破坏。作者发现这是因为DMD是样本内分布匹配目标，缺乏对批次元素或时间帧间关系几何的显式约束，使得底层copula基本未受调控。
AI.method: 提出Copula-aware DMD (CoDMD)，一种轻量级关系正则化器，重用冻结教师和在线假模型的分数估计来构建跨样本和帧的成对关系矩阵。通过补充分布目标匹配这些矩阵，无需额外网络、数据集或采样轨迹。
AI.result: 在Wan-2.1-T2V模型系列(1.3B和14B规模)上，CoDMD将50步教师蒸馏为4步学生，实现约25倍加速，VBench得分达到84.46和84.87，优于之前的轨迹基方法(rCM 82.81和84.05)和分布基方法(DMD 83.38和83.81)。
AI.conclusion: CoDMD通过引入关系正则化有效解决了DMD在少步蒸馏中的退化问题，在保持高效性的同时显著提升了视频生成质量，为视频扩散模型的实时部署提供了有效解决方案。

title: Prefix-Guided On-Policy Distillation: Mining Golden Trajectories from Rollouts
summary: On-policy distillation (OPD) improves reasoning models by applying dense teacher supervision on student-sampled trajectories. However, scaling OPD to long-horizon mathematical reasoning exposes a reliability and efficiency problem: standard OPD assigns every sampled candidate the same long rollout budget, even though some trajectories may quickly become weakly aligned with the teacher and provide less useful supervision. Prior analyses suggest that successful OPD depends on local teacher-student compatibility, which can be measured by top-k overlap on student-visited prefixes. When this overlap is low, continuing to generate or train on long suffixes may waste computation and introduce noisy learning signal. To address this, we introduce Prefix-Guided On-Policy Distillation (PG-OPD), a simple rollout-allocation framework that uses fixed-length prefixes to estimate trajectory value before expensive long-horizon generation. PG-OPD first decodes every sampled candidate to the same prefix length, computes teacher-student top-k overlap within an early probe window of that prefix, and selectively continues high-overlap candidates to a fixed long length. Low-overlap candidates stop at the fixed prefix, avoiding unnecessary suffix generation. Across diverse teacher-student combinations on AMC, AIME, and HMMT benchmarks, PG-OPD improves average accuracy by up to 4.80 points while reducing training time by up to 2.46x. These results suggest that prefix-level compatibility provides a practical signal for directing OPD computation toward trajectories that remain learnable from the teacher.

AI.tldr: PG-OPD通过前缀引导的on-policy蒸馏，利用前缀级教师学生兼容性作为轨迹价值估计，选择性继续高重叠候选轨迹，减少低价值轨迹的冗余计算，提高数学推理模型的训练效率和性能。
AI.motivation: 标准OPD在长程数学推理中存在可靠性和效率问题：为所有采样候选分配相同的长rollout预算，即使某些轨迹与教师模型快速弱对齐，提供的有用监督较少。这导致计算浪费和噪声学习信号。
AI.method: 提出前缀引导的On-Policy蒸馏（PG-OPD）：首先将所有采样候选解码到相同前缀长度，在早期探测窗口内计算教师-学生top-k重叠度，选择性继续高重叠候选到固定长长度，低重叠候选在固定前缀处停止，避免不必要的后缀生成。
AI.result: 在AMC、AIME和HMMT基准测试中，PG-OPD将平均准确率提高最多4.80个百分点，同时将训练时间减少最多2.46倍。前缀级兼容性为将OPD计算导向保持可学习性的轨迹提供了实用信号。
AI.conclusion: PG-OPD通过前缀级教师学生兼容性估计轨迹价值，有效解决了标准OPD在长程数学推理中的可靠性和效率问题，实现了性能提升和计算效率的平衡。

title: From Pixels to Concepts: Growing Rich 3D Semantic Scene Graph Forests utilizing Foundation Models
comment: To be published in the Proceedings of the IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots & Systems (IEEE IROS 2026)
summary: Operating in complex real-world environments requires robots to understand their surroundings on a functional semantic level. This demands a detailed multi-layer world model capturing the complex relations of its surroundings. Hierarchical 3D scene graphs address this challenge by integrating geometric, semantic, and relational data within a unified spatial framework. However, current 3D scene graph approaches often restrict themselves to rigid structures of pre-determined relationship classes, mostly neglecting important semantic connections, like causal connections or environmental contexts. This paper explores the potential of foundation models to build forests of 3D scene graphs with open semantic relationships to improve scene understanding and robotic task execution. We propose a method where instance-specific concept-nodes and relationships are first identified by a VLM and extended upon by a LLM, inferring broader, more abstract concept-nodes and relationships through reasoning. These object-nodes, concept-nodes, and relationships are then assembled into a forest of hierarchical 3D scene graphs, enhanced with concept-nodes to represent abstract concepts. Evaluations were conducted on the uHumans2 and ScanNet indoor dataset, validating the accuracy and relevance of the generated relationships. Downstream suitability of scene-graph forests for robotics applications is demonstrated in an open-vocabulary object-retrieval task utilizing both ScanNet data and a real-world indoor deployment using a Boston Dynamics Spot. This paper leverages foundation models to create more expressive, semantically deep 3D hierarchical scene graphs and demonstrates their potential to advance semantic and environmental understanding in robotics.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出利用基础模型构建具有开放语义关系的3D场景图森林，以增强机器人对复杂环境的语义理解，并在真实机器人任务中验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 当前3D场景图方法通常局限于预定义的关系类别和刚性结构，忽略了重要的语义连接（如因果关系和环境上下文），限制了机器人对复杂环境的语义理解能力。
AI.method: 提出一种方法：首先通过视觉语言模型（VLM）识别实例特定的概念节点和关系，然后通过大型语言模型（LLM）进行扩展推理，推断更广泛、更抽象的概念节点和关系，最后将这些元素组装成包含概念节点的层次化3D场景图森林。
AI.result: 在uHumans2和ScanNet室内数据集上评估，验证了生成关系的准确性和相关性。在开放词汇对象检索任务中，使用ScanNet数据和波士顿动力Spot机器人在真实室内环境中部署，展示了场景图森林在机器人应用中的下游适用性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究利用基础模型创建了更具表达力、语义更丰富的3D层次化场景图，并展示了其在提升机器人语义和环境理解方面的潜力。

title: One-Shot Data Selection for Medical Image Classification via Graph Coverage
summary: Training medical image classifiers on entire datasets is wasteful when annotation budgets are limited: not all samples contribute equally, yet acquiring expert labels is expensive. Active learning reduces annotation cost through iterative querying, but assumes repeated access to an oracle and requires multiple rounds of model training. One-shot geometry-based methods such as facility location avoid retraining but operate on pairwise distances that ignore the local structure of the data manifold. We propose a graph-based one-shot selection method that operates entirely on frozen foundation model embeddings. Given embeddings from a pretrained encoder, we construct a k-nearest neighbor graph over all training samples and derive a two-term coverage kernel from the heat diffusion kernel, capturing both direct and two-hop neighborhood relationships. Greedy facility location on this kernel selects class-balanced subsets that maximize coverage of the data manifold. The two-term kernel matches the full spectral heat kernel in selection behavior while reducing computation to sparse matrix operations with a single hyperparameter. We evaluate on five MedMNIST datasets spanning histopathology, radiology, and microscopy, comparing against both training-dynamics and geometry-based baselines. Our method achieves the highest balanced accuracy on nine of ten dataset-ratio conditions, with the largest gains on class-imbalanced datasets where global graph construction captures cross-class structure that per-class methods miss, all without any model training during selection. Code is available at https://github.com/zahiriddin-rustamov/graph-coverage-selection.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于图的单次选择方法，使用预训练基础模型嵌入，通过构建k近邻图和热扩散核来最大化数据流形覆盖，无需模型训练即可选择类别平衡的子集。
AI.motivation: 医学图像标注成本高昂，传统主动学习需要多次模型训练和专家交互，而基于几何的方法忽略了数据流形的局部结构。需要一种无需训练、能有效利用预训练模型嵌入的单次选择方法。
AI.method: 基于预训练编码器的嵌入构建k近邻图，从热扩散核推导出两段覆盖核，捕捉直接和两跳邻域关系，通过贪心设施选址在该核上选择类别平衡的子集。
AI.result: 在五个MedMNIST数据集上评估，在10个数据集-比例条件中的9个上获得最高平衡准确率，在类别不平衡数据集上提升最大，且选择过程无需模型训练。
AI.conclusion: 提出的基于图的覆盖选择方法能有效利用预训练模型嵌入，通过全局图构建捕捉跨类别结构，在医学图像分类中实现高效的单次样本选择。

title: Load Testing for Machine Learning Model Serving Systems at Scale
comment: The paper is accepted at ECSA 2026
summary: Machine learning (ML) model serving has become a dominant consumer of GPU infrastructure, yet capacity planning in these systems remains largely ad hoc. Under-provisioning leads to service-level objective (SLO) violations and production incidents, while over-provisioning results in substantial resource waste. This paper presents \sys, an industrial load testing framework for ML serving systems that systematically estimates serving capacity through an adaptive, feedback-driven search strategy. The approach leverages real-time performance signals, incorporating dampening, spike tolerance, and convergence detection to efficiently identify maximum sustainable throughput under SLO constraints. We evaluate \sys through a longitudinal analysis of 14 industrial case studies spanning four ML architecture classes: recommendation, ranking, vision, and NLP. This study demonstrates that systematic load testing leads to substantial improvements in GPU resource efficiency and operational reliability. Prior to adopting \sys, a significant fraction of model launches were under-provisioned, resulting in recurring incidents; these issues were substantially reduced after deployment. Our results show that ML-specific design decisions are critical to accurate capacity estimation: workload calibration using recorded traffic reduces estimation error from approximately 30\% to 2--6\%, while proper warmup handling yields a 22.2\% improvement in accuracy. Further analysis reveals key factors influencing prediction error, including model size and co-location effects. This paper distills six lessons and derive architectural guidelines for ML load testing, offering actionable insights for building reliable and efficient ML serving systems.

AI.tldr: ML模型服务容量规划常依赖经验判断，导致资源浪费或SLO违规。本文提出一个工业级ML服务系统负载测试框架，通过自适应反馈驱动搜索策略，在SLO约束下高效识别最大可持续吞吐量，显著提升GPU资源效率和运营可靠性。
AI.motivation: 当前ML模型服务的容量规划大多依赖经验判断，缺乏系统方法。资源不足会导致SLO违规和生产事故，而资源过度配置则造成大量资源浪费。需要一种系统化的负载测试框架来准确估计服务容量。
AI.method: 提出一个工业负载测试框架，采用自适应、反馈驱动的搜索策略，利用实时性能信号，结合阻尼、尖峰容忍和收敛检测等技术，在SLO约束下高效识别最大可持续吞吐量。
AI.result: 在14个工业案例研究中验证了框架效果：使用记录流量进行工作负载校准将估计误差从约30%降低到2-6%；适当的热身处理使准确率提高22.2%。部署后显著减少了因资源不足导致的事故，提升了GPU资源效率和运营可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 系统化的负载测试对ML服务系统至关重要，能显著提升资源效率和运营可靠性。本文提炼了六条经验教训和架构指南，为构建可靠高效的ML服务系统提供了实用见解。

title: When Robots Rate Their Own Interactions: Engagement Validity and the Strangeness Failure
summary: Human-robot interaction (HRI) evaluation relies almost exclusively on human-completed questionnaires, leaving the robot's perspective unexamined. We propose an \textit{inverted evaluation}, in which LLM-powered robots complete the same standardized instruments from their own perspective, and test whether these ratings agree with human ground truth. In Study~1, five LLMs completed HRI-CUES, Godspeed, and RoSAS questionnaires for 25~interactions ($N = 1{,}522$ evaluations) from the HRI-CUES dataset. LLMs achieved moderate-to-strong agreement on engagement dimensions (satisfaction $r$ up to $.65$ and enjoyment $r$ up to $.72$) with excellent test-retest reliability (ICC $\geq .82$), but \textit{systematically inverted} the comfort/strangeness dimension ($r = -.44$ to $-.67$, all $p < .05$), conflating engagement with comfort. In Study~2, a Nao robot running Claude~Sonnet~4.5 replicated these patterns in live interactions ($N = 4$), including real-time turn-by-turn assessment. The strangeness failure persisted across five models, synthetic controls, and embodied deployment for two participants. We argue that current LLM-based robots lack access to the internal affective states needed to assess constructs like strangeness, and that inverted evaluation requires supplementary modalities (e.g., physiological signals, gaze, proxemics) to move beyond behavioral proxies. These findings establish boundary conditions for using LLMs as interaction evaluators in HRI.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种"倒置评估"方法，让LLM赋能的机器人从自身视角完成标准化HRI问卷，发现LLM在参与度维度上与人类评估有中等至强一致性，但在舒适/陌生感维度上出现系统性的倒置评估（负相关），表明当前LLM机器人无法准确评估内部情感状态。
AI.motivation: 传统HRI评估几乎完全依赖人类填写的问卷，忽略了机器人的视角。研究者希望探索LLM赋能的机器人是否能从自身视角完成标准化评估工具，并检验这些评分是否与人类真实评估一致。
AI.method: 研究1：让5个LLM为HRI-CUES数据集中的25个交互完成HRI-CUES、Godspeed和RoSAS问卷，共1522次评估。研究2：让运行Claude Sonnet 4.5的Nao机器人在实时交互中进行评估，包括实时逐轮评估。
AI.result: LLM在参与度维度（满意度和享受度）与人类评估有中等至强一致性（r最高达0.72），重测信度优秀（ICC≥0.82）。但在舒适/陌生感维度上出现系统性倒置评估（r=-0.44到-0.67），将参与度与舒适度混淆。这种陌生感评估失败在五个模型、合成控制和实体部署中均持续存在。
AI.conclusion: 当前基于LLM的机器人缺乏评估陌生感等内部情感状态的能力，倒置评估需要补充生理信号、注视、空间距离等多模态信息。这些发现为在HRI中使用LLM作为交互评估器建立了边界条件。

title: Topological summaries of fingerprint ridge patterns carry identity information
summary: Fingerprints are the most widely deployed biometric. Verifying whether two impressions come from the same finger typically relies on minutiae, small landmarks such as skin ridge endings and bifurcations. These landmarks are extracted through a multi-stage pipeline of image enhancement, skeletonization, minutiae detection, and alignment. We investigate an alternative: using topological data analysis to represent the full pattern of skin ridges and valleys directly, bypassing minutiae detection and the downstream matching pipeline. We apply persistent homology, a topological tool that tracks how loops in the ridge pattern form and fill in across spatial scales, producing multi-scale summaries of ridge geometry. We develop and compare a range of verification methods on a standard benchmark dataset, FVC2000 DB1. Even the simplest topological summaries, with no trained parameters, substantially outperform geometry-only baselines. A trained method achieves an AUC of 0.91, while an optimal-transport method excels at the strictest false-accept thresholds, suggesting they capture different aspects of the ridge pattern. Fusing these two approaches yields the best performance at every low false-accept threshold we examine. Our results establish that these topological summaries capture substantial fingerprint identity information, far more effective for verification than raw pixel-level geometry. Because the entire pipeline is openly specified, it offers a transparent complement to minutiae-based systems, and we provide a modular framework for constructing, evaluating, and combining topological verification methods.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出使用拓扑数据分析（特别是持续同调）来直接表示指纹脊线模式，绕过传统基于细节点的识别流程。在FVC2000 DB1数据集上的实验表明，拓扑方法显著优于几何基线，融合方法在低误接受率下表现最佳。
AI.motivation: 传统指纹识别依赖细节点的检测和匹配流程，而该研究探索使用拓扑数据分析直接捕捉脊线模式的整体结构，提供一种更透明、可替代的识别方法。
AI.method: 应用持续同调分析指纹脊线模式，跟踪不同空间尺度下脊线环路的形成和填充过程，生成多尺度拓扑摘要。开发了多种验证方法，包括无训练参数的简单方法、训练方法和最优传输方法。
AI.result: 在FVC2000 DB1数据集上，最简单的拓扑摘要显著优于纯几何基线。训练方法达到0.91的AUC，最优传输方法在严格误接受阈值下表现优异。融合两种方法在所有低误接受阈值下获得最佳性能。
AI.conclusion: 拓扑摘要能够有效捕捉指纹身份信息，比原始像素级几何更有效。该方法为基于细节点的系统提供了透明的补充，并提供了构建、评估和组合拓扑验证方法的模块化框架。

title: Channel Location Constrains the Auditability of Subliminal Learning
summary: Subliminal learning lets a student inherit a teacher's hidden trait from distillation data that never names it. We ask when such transfer can be audited before training. The answer is not model identity or scale alone, but channel location: the carrier through which the trait reaches the student. We find three regimes. In a controlled initialization-dependent body channel, a pre-training screen works. Coverage, the cosine between the student's initial distillation update and the teacher's fine-tuning displacement, predicts held-out transfer (Spearman $ρ\approx 0.95$; AUROC 0.997). In pretrained language models, masked single-token traits instead ride convergent vocabulary geometry. This channel is initialization-independent, so initialization-alignment screens, including coverage, are not mechanistic; the useful handles are post-hoc detection and targeted mitigation. Even when a single-token named entity is removed from the loss, the student's held-out probability for that entity rises to 0.40 on average ($\sim 2500\times$), and a related semantic class transfers. In an untied-head model, orthogonalizing the trait's output row against entangled neighbours collapses leakage, while equal-size random-subspace edits do not. Thus removing a target string from distillation labels does not remove the corresponding preference: neighbouring tokens can carry it. Finally, conditional behaviours can route through the network body. For sycophancy, with agreement and correction markers masked from the loss, transfer reaches about 0.63 of the teacher's effect, localizes to body computation, and evades four audits across two model families. We scope this as masked transfer of a condition-present policy. Channel location is necessary for deciding which audits can be sound. It is not a deployment-ready screen: an audit used outside its carrier regime can give false assurance.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了潜隐学习中的特质转移审计问题，发现转移通道位置（而非模型身份或规模）决定审计有效性，识别出三种不同通道机制，并提出了相应的审计方法。
AI.motivation: 潜隐学习允许学生从蒸馏数据中继承教师未明确命名的隐藏特质。研究动机是探究在训练前何时能够审计这种特质转移，以避免潜在的负面转移风险。
AI.method: 通过分析不同转移通道机制：1)受初始化依赖的体通道，使用预训练筛选方法；2)预训练语言模型中的词汇几何通道，使用后验检测和针对性缓解；3)条件行为通过网络体的路由机制。开发了覆盖度指标、正交化编辑等审计技术。
AI.result: 在体通道中，覆盖度指标能高精度预测特质转移（Spearman ρ≈0.95，AUROC 0.997）。在词汇通道中，即使从损失中移除单令牌实体，学生对该实体的概率仍上升至0.40（约2500倍）。在条件行为通道中，同意和纠正标记被掩码时，转移效果仍达到教师效应的约0.63。
AI.conclusion: 特质转移的通道位置是决定审计方法有效性的关键因素，而非模型身份或规模。不同通道机制需要不同的审计策略，错误使用审计方法可能产生虚假保证。通道位置分析为潜隐学习中的安全审计提供了理论框架。

title: A Relaxed Quadratic-Program-based Framework for Trajectory Tracking of Unicycle Robots with Singularity Avoidance
comment: 6 pages, 4 figures, paper accepted at Conference of Control Technology and Applications (CCTA) 2026
summary: Dynamic feedback linearization (DFL) is a classical technique for trajectory tracking of unicycle-type mobile robots, but the resulting DFL-based controller becomes singular when the linear velocity vanishes, rendering standard DFL-based controllers unsuitable for stop-and-reverse maneuvers. This paper proposes a quadratic-program (QP)-based optimal control framework that avoids this singularity, while establishing local Lipschitz continuity of the resulting feedback law. Our approach reformulates the DFL constraints as an equality-constrained QP with a slack variable, ensuring feasibility for all states and reference signals, including at points where the robot's velocity vanishes. By introducing slack variables and tunable parameters, we demonstrate that the singular configuration can be avoided for a large class of reference trajectories. The effectiveness of the proposed approach for trajectory tracking is demonstrated through ROS 2-Gazebo simulations on a TurtleBot3 Waffle robot. The code is available at https://gradslab.github.io/DFL_QP_Unicycle/

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于二次规划的最优控制框架，解决动态反馈线性化在速度为零时的奇异问题，使机器人能够执行停止-反向机动
AI.motivation: 传统动态反馈线性化控制器在机器人线速度为零时会出现奇异，无法处理停止-反向机动，需要一种避免奇异性的控制方法
AI.method: 将DFL约束重新表述为带松弛变量的等式约束二次规划问题，引入可调参数确保所有状态和参考信号下的可行性
AI.result: 提出的方法避免了奇异配置，建立了局部Lipschitz连续性，在TurtleBot3 Waffle机器人上通过ROS 2-Gazebo仿真验证了轨迹跟踪有效性
AI.conclusion: 基于二次规划的最优控制框架成功解决了DFL的奇异问题，使单轮型移动机器人能够执行包括停止-反向在内的复杂轨迹跟踪任务

title: IDAG-Edit: Multi-Object Video Editing via Instance-Decoupled Attention and Guidance
summary: Diffusion-based video editing has made significant progress; however, achieving precise and temporally consistent object-level control, especially in multi-object scenarios, remains challenging due to attention leakage, identity drift, and unstable temporal dynamics. In this work, we propose IDAGEdit, a training-free framework for fine-grained multi-object video editing with strong temporal consistency. The framework adopts Layout-guided Attention Modulation to facilitate coherent multi-object editing, while Instance-level Masks are introduced to preserve individual object identity and enforce localized attention within each object region, thereby enabling fine-grained, object-level editing. Extensive qualitative and quantitative evaluations demonstrate that our method improves temporal stability and multi-object controllability over state-of-the-art video editing approaches.

AI.tldr: IDAGEdit是一个无需训练的框架，通过布局引导注意力调制和实例级掩码，实现细粒度多对象视频编辑，提升时间一致性和对象可控性
AI.motivation: 当前基于扩散的视频编辑在精确和时序一致的对象级控制方面存在挑战，特别是在多对象场景下，存在注意力泄漏、身份漂移和不稳定时间动态等问题
AI.method: 采用布局引导注意力调制促进连贯的多对象编辑，同时引入实例级掩码来保持单个对象身份，并在每个对象区域内强制局部化注意力，实现细粒度对象级编辑
AI.result: 广泛的定性和定量评估表明，该方法在时间稳定性和多对象可控性方面优于最先进的视频编辑方法
AI.conclusion: IDAGEdit是一个无需训练的框架，能够实现细粒度多对象视频编辑，具有强大的时间一致性

title: Cluster-Specific Localized Drift Detection for Efficient Batch Model Adaptation under Controlled Distribution Shift
summary: Machine learning systems deployed in dynamic environments frequently operate under nonstationary data distributions, where controlled distribution shift can progressively degrade predictive performance. However, many widely used tabular benchmark datasets lack explicit temporal structure, limiting reproducible evaluation of drift adaptation methods. This work proposes a cluster-induced distribution shift simulation framework that transforms static tabular datasets into controlled evolving data streams through structured perturbations across featurespace partitions. Using this framework, six adaptation strategies are systematically evaluated: static learning, sliding-window retraining, global ADWIN retraining, cluster-local ADWIN retraining, random subspace drift detection, and feature-partitioned drift detection. Experiments are conducted on five benchmark datasets covering both classification and regression tasks using diverse predictive model families, including linear models, k-Nearest Neighbours, tree ensembles, boosting methods, and adaptive online learners.

AI.tldr: 提出一个聚类诱导分布漂移模拟框架，将静态表格数据集转换为受控的演化数据流，并系统评估六种适应策略
AI.motivation: 机器学习系统在动态环境中经常面临非平稳数据分布，但许多广泛使用的表格基准数据集缺乏明确的时间结构，限制了漂移适应方法的可重复评估
AI.method: 提出聚类诱导分布漂移模拟框架，通过结构化扰动将静态表格数据集转换为受控的演化数据流，并评估六种适应策略：静态学习、滑动窗口重训练、全局ADWIN重训练、聚类局部ADWIN重训练、随机子空间漂移检测和特征分区漂移检测
AI.result: 在五个基准数据集上进行了实验，涵盖分类和回归任务，使用了多种预测模型家族，包括线性模型、k近邻、树集成、提升方法和自适应在线学习器
AI.conclusion: 该框架为评估漂移适应方法提供了可重复的测试环境，系统比较了不同适应策略在受控分布漂移下的性能表现

title: TSD: A Physics-Inspired Trajectory Saliency Detector for Efficient Imitation Learning
summary: For imitation learning in robotic manipulation, high data collection costs result in the scarcity of high quality data. In this paper, we leverage the inherent heterogeneity of trajectories to address this challenge. Based on our observations of manipulation tasks, we categorize motions into transitional, precise, and agile types, defining the latter two as trajectory saliency due to their criticality to task success in contrast to the prevalent but less relevant transitional motions. Therefore, we propose the Trajectory Saliency Detector (TSD), a training-free and plug-and-play framework to identify trajectory saliency. TSD employs two physically-grounded metrics: spatial entropy to capture fine-grained manipulation and centripetal acceleration to detect agile maneuvering. We further leverage TSD to develop a dataset compression method that reduces training costs and a dataset expansion strategy that improves data collection efficiency. Extensive experiments in both simulation and real-world settings demonstrate that models trained on TSD-condensed datasets achieve comparable or even superior performance with 25% less data on average. These results validate the effectiveness of our dataset compression and expansion strategies, thereby confirming the utility of TSD. Consequently, TSD offers a scalable and cost-effective pathway to synthesize information-dense datasets for efficient robot learning. Project page: https://trajectory-saliency-detector.github.io/trajectory-saliency-detector/

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种名为轨迹显著性检测器(TSD)的训练即用框架，通过空间熵和向心加速度两个物理基础指标来识别机器人操作任务中的关键轨迹段，并基于此开发了数据集压缩和扩展策略，显著降低了数据收集成本。
AI.motivation: 机器人模仿学习中高质量数据收集成本高昂且稀缺，而操作轨迹存在固有的异质性。作者观察到操作任务中的运动可分为过渡性、精确性和敏捷性三类，后两者对任务成功更为关键，因此需要识别这些轨迹显著性来提升学习效率。
AI.method: 提出TSD框架，采用两种物理基础指标：空间熵捕捉精细操作，向心加速度检测敏捷机动。该框架无需训练即可识别轨迹显著性，并基于此开发了数据集压缩方法（减少训练数据）和数据集扩展策略（提升数据收集效率）。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实环境中的大量实验表明，使用TSD压缩的数据集训练的模型在平均减少25%数据量的情况下，仍能达到相当甚至更优的性能。这验证了数据集压缩和扩展策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: TSD提供了一种可扩展且经济高效的途径，能够合成信息密集的数据集，从而实现高效的机器人学习。该框架证实了轨迹显著性检测在降低数据收集成本方面的实用性。

title: A Controlled Study of CLIP-Based Body-Scene Fusion for Emotion Recognition in Context
summary: Apparent emotion in natural images is often not visible from the face alone. The face may be small, hidden, or neutral, while posture and scene context carry much of the evidence. This work studies context-aware emotion recognition on EMOTIC with an image-only two-stream model. A ResNet-18 body stream encodes the target-person crop, and a CLIP ViT-B/16 scene stream encodes the full image. The fused feature predicts 26 categorical emotion labels and the continuous valence, arousal, and dominance values. This study examines whether small context-debiasing or rare-class training changes still help after adding a CLIP scene encoder. The clean two-stream model is compared with simplified CCIM-style intervention, CLEF-lite context-bias subtraction, ASL tuning, and class-balanced sampling under the same implementation pipeline. No tested variant improves over the clean two-stream model, which achieves 34.52% mAP on the EMOTIC test split. CLIP gives the model broad scene semantics, but the simplified causal, counterfactual, and rare-class changes do not automatically improve performance. Most remaining errors are in rare and subtle emotion categories, so the next step should focus on label relationships and finer subject-context interaction.

AI.tldr: 该研究在EMOTIC数据集上探索了上下文感知的情绪识别，使用双流模型（身体流+场景流）预测26类情绪标签和连续维度值。研究发现，简化的因果干预、反事实去偏和稀有类别训练方法在加入CLIP场景编码器后并未提升性能，最佳模型达到34.52% mAP。
AI.motivation: 自然图像中的情绪表达往往不能仅从面部识别，因为面部可能小、被遮挡或中性，而姿态和场景上下文携带重要情绪证据。研究旨在探索上下文感知的情绪识别方法。
AI.method: 使用双流模型：ResNet-18身体流编码目标人物裁剪区域，CLIP ViT-B/16场景流编码完整图像。融合特征预测26个分类情绪标签和连续维度（效价、唤醒度、支配度）。比较了多种变体：简化的CCIM风格干预、CLEF-lite上下文偏置减法、ASL调优和类别平衡采样。
AI.result: 所有测试的变体（因果干预、反事实去偏、稀有类别训练）均未超越基础双流模型。最佳模型在EMOTIC测试集上达到34.52% mAP。CLIP提供了广泛的场景语义，但简化的干预方法未能自动提升性能。
AI.conclusion: CLIP场景编码器已为模型提供丰富的场景语义，但简化的因果、反事实和稀有类别的改进方法未能进一步提升性能。主要错误集中在稀有和细微情绪类别，未来应关注标签关系和更精细的主体-上下文交互建模。

title: A Completion-Aware Framework for Impactful Counterfactual Explainability in Graph Neural Networks
summary: In this study, we propose a novel pipeline for generic, model-agnostic, local-level counterfactual explainability in graph neural networks (GNNs). Although counterfactual explainers capable of both adding and removing edges have emerged in recent years, the need for generic and efficient solutions remains unmet, particularly concerning qualitative explanation generation. Our approach couples progress in factual explainability with missing edge prediction models rooted in link prediction research, in order to enhance the quality, robustness and intuitiveness of explanations. A multi-faceted experimental analysis conducted on real-world and synthetic graph classification benchmarks, both binary and multi-label, demonstrates the advancements in comparison to state-of-the-art baselines across diverse metrics.

AI.tldr: 提出一种通用的、模型无关的图神经网络局部反事实解释方法，通过结合事实解释和缺失边预测技术，提高解释的质量和直观性。
AI.motivation: 当前图神经网络的反事实解释方法虽然能增删边，但仍缺乏通用、高效的解决方案，特别是在生成高质量解释方面存在不足。
AI.method: 将事实解释技术与基于链接预测的缺失边预测模型相结合，构建一个模型无关的局部反事实解释流程。
AI.result: 在真实世界和合成的图分类基准测试（包括二分类和多标签分类）上进行多维度实验分析，结果显示该方法在多种指标上优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过结合事实解释和缺失边预测，显著提升了图神经网络反事实解释的质量、鲁棒性和直观性。

title: Flowing With Purpose: Latent Action Guided Flow Matching Policies For Robotic Manipulation
summary: Flow matching has recently become a new standard for behavior cloning in robotic manipulation. However, state-of-the-art flow matching policies suffer from a systematic structural mismatch: they rely on a globally fixed isotropic source distribution despite the strongly fragmented and heteroscedastic structure of robotic action spaces. This agnostic initialization forces the model to learn highly entangled vector fields, bottlenecking training efficiency and limiting overall policy performance. To address this limitation, we introduce Latent Action Guided Flow Matching (LAFM), a novel framework that replaces the monolithic Gaussian with an adaptive library of learned prior distributions. By grounding these distributions using a latent action model, LAFM maps current observations to discrete motion primitives, selecting a specialized base distribution that provides an informed, structurally aligned initialization for the denoising process. This dynamic adaptivity naturally accommodates heteroscedasticity in human demonstrations and makes transport trajectories shorter and less entangled. Empirically, LAFM substantially outperforms standard flow matching formulations, increasing task success rates by 23.4% in real-world robotic deployments and by 10.4% on the LIBERO-90 benchmark. Furthermore, we demonstrate that LAFM achieves state-of-the-art results, surpassing massively pre-trained vision-language-action models while utilizing significantly smaller architectures.

AI.tldr: LAFM提出了一种新的流匹配框架，通过潜在动作模型选择专门的先验分布来替代全局固定的高斯分布，解决了机器人动作空间的结构不匹配问题，显著提升了策略性能。
AI.motivation: 当前流匹配策略存在系统性结构不匹配问题：它们依赖于全局固定的各向同性源分布，而机器人动作空间具有高度碎片化和异方差结构。这种初始化方式迫使模型学习高度纠缠的向量场，限制了训练效率和策略性能。
AI.method: LAFM（潜在动作引导流匹配）框架，用自适应学习先验分布库替代单一高斯分布。通过潜在动作模型将当前观测映射到离散运动基元，选择专门的基分布为去噪过程提供结构对齐的初始化。
AI.result: LAFM显著优于标准流匹配方法：在真实机器人部署中任务成功率提升23.4%，在LIBERO-90基准上提升10.4%。同时超越了大规模预训练视觉-语言-动作模型，且使用更小的架构。
AI.conclusion: LAFM通过自适应先验分布解决了流匹配中的结构不匹配问题，使传输轨迹更短、更少纠缠，显著提升了机器人行为克隆的性能和效率。

title: Learning Cross-View Semantic Priors for Single-Reference Unseen Object Pose Estimation
summary: Single-reference unseen object 6D pose estimation reduces object onboarding by estimating poses of arbitrary novel objects from only one reference view. Recent correspondence-based pipelines have achieved robust performance with vision foundation model (VFM) features. However, they typically treat these features as intra-view descriptors, leaving dense visual-semantic cues, including appearance, structure, and context, insufficiently exchanged across views before geometric decoding. Consequently, the decoded point features may lack joint semantic and geometric discriminability, making correspondence estimation still difficult in challenging cases. Instead of processing features independently, we build the correspondence pipeline around an early cross-view semantic prior. Specifically, cross-view semantic interaction (CVSI) enables dense query and reference VFM tokens to exchange semantic context and form a cross-view prior. Nevertheless, direct CVSI may disturb the VFM token structure, while the resulting semantic prior still needs 3D representation consistency for rigid correspondence. To make this CVSI prior reliable for 3D correspondence learning, we introduce two complementary training-time constraints: the intra-view structure preservation (IVSP) loss preserves the original intra-view token affinity structure during interaction, while the reference-anchored geometric consistency (RAGC) loss enforces spatial representation consistency of decoded point features. The final pose is recovered from learned correspondences through weighted SVD. We further construct a challenging view-pair protocol from the BOP Challenge datasets YCB-V and TUD-L to evaluate robustness in difficult matching scenarios. Extensive experiments on six benchmarks under different view-pair settings show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance while maintaining comparable inference speed.

AI.tldr: 提出CVSI方法增强单参考视图的6D位姿估计，通过跨视图语义交互和训练约束提升对应点学习效果
AI.motivation: 现有基于对应点的方法将视觉基础模型特征作为视图内描述符，缺乏跨视图的语义信息交换，导致对应点估计在复杂场景中困难
AI.method: 提出跨视图语义交互（CVSI）建立早期语义先验，配合两种训练约束：视图内结构保持损失（IVSP）和参考锚定几何一致性损失（RAGC），最后通过加权SVD恢复位姿
AI.result: 在六个基准测试和不同视图对设置下达到最先进性能，同时保持相当的推理速度，在挑战性匹配场景中表现鲁棒
AI.conclusion: 通过早期跨视图语义交互和训练约束，能够有效提升单参考视图6D位姿估计的对应点学习质量，在复杂场景中表现优异

title: Gradient-Descent Steps to Success over Mean Accuracy: A Paradigm Shift for ML
summary: Traditional evaluation of machine learning (ML) models typically focuses on achieving the maximum possible accuracy irrespective of the computational cost. In this article, we propose a paradigm shift towards evaluating performance based on computational effort-explicitly defined here as the total number of gradient descent steps required to reach an acceptable level of accuracy with high probability. Building upon the concept of computational effort originally introduced by Koza for Genetic Programming, we extend this metric to any ML model trained via gradient descent. Furthermore, we demonstrate that minimising this effort acts as a novel form of Automatic Machine Learning (AutoML). By evaluating it across 11 diverse ML models and five standard classification datasets, we uncover significant insights into the dynamics of gradient-based learning. Our findings reveal that optimal hyper-parameters consistently favour unusually large learning rates. Crucially, we demonstrate that the rapid, aggressive landscape traversal enabled by these large rates not only promotes generalisation-as seen in phenomena like superconvergence-but also statistically minimises the expected computational effort for training. Furthermore, we identify distinct phase transitions in the optimal search strategy: while a single training run suffices for lower accuracy targets, reaching a model's performance limit requires a dramatic shift towards conducting numerous independent, short restarts. Finally, we illustrate how this effort-based paradigm provides a robust framework for model selection, allowing practitioners to choose optimal algorithms based on the difficulty of a problem as perceived by different models for a given target accuracy, or to maximise the achievable accuracy for a fixed budget of gradient descent steps.

AI.tldr: 论文提出以计算努力（达到特定准确率所需的梯度下降步数）作为评估机器学习模型的新范式，替代传统只关注最终准确率的方法，并发现最小化计算努力能实现新型AutoML。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习评估只关注最终准确率而忽略计算成本，本文旨在建立基于计算努力的评估范式，将训练效率作为核心指标。
AI.method: 将计算努力（达到可接受准确率所需梯度下降步数）扩展到所有基于梯度下降的ML模型，在11种模型和5个分类数据集上评估，通过最小化计算努力实现AutoML。
AI.result: 发现最优超参数偏好大学习率，这种激进的优化方式不仅促进泛化（如超收敛现象），还能在统计上最小化训练计算努力。同时识别出最优搜索策略的相变：低准确率目标只需单次训练，而达到性能极限需要大量独立短期重启。
AI.conclusion: 基于计算努力的范式为模型选择提供了稳健框架，可根据问题难度选择最优算法，或在固定计算预算下最大化可达到的准确率。

title: DexTeleop-0: Force-Aware Bimanual Dexterous Teleoperation with Ego-Centric Perception towards Shared Autonomy
summary: Fine-grained, bimanual dexterous manipulation remains a foundational challenge in robotics. Traditional teleoperation systems often fail in contact-rich tasks because embodiment gaps hinder accurate kinematic mapping, while tactile and force feedback remain absent. Consequently, data collection efficiency for high-precision tasks remains prohibitively low. To address these limitations, we propose a tactile-driven adaptation strategy designed to enable fine-grained manipulation on top of teleoperation pipelines. Instantiated within our bimanual dexterous framework, DexTeleop-0, this strategy introduces a real-time optimization loop that bridges the embodiment gap by translating coarse human tracking intents into precise, force-compliant robotic commands with tactile sensing. By estimating accurate contact points and leveraging a tactile-enabled fingertip force-sensing profile, the system dynamically computes localized corrections using the operational space Jacobian with respect to joint angle updates. We rigorously evaluate this tactile-driven adaptation strategy across both simulated environments and real-world hardware. Compared with representative baselines, the proposed method consistently achieves higher task success rates and improved execution efficiency in robust grasping, disturbance-resilient manipulation, and complex dexterous tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于触觉驱动的自适应策略，用于解决双手灵巧操作中的精细控制问题，通过实时优化循环将粗略的人类跟踪意图转化为精确的、力顺从的机器人命令。
AI.motivation: 传统的遥操作系统在接触丰富的任务中经常失败，因为体现差距阻碍了准确的运动学映射，同时缺乏触觉和力反馈，导致高精度任务的数据收集效率极低。
AI.method: 提出了触觉驱动的自适应策略，在DexTeleop-0双手灵巧框架中实现实时优化循环，通过估计准确接触点并利用触觉感知的指尖力传感轮廓，使用操作空间雅可比矩阵动态计算局部校正。
AI.result: 在模拟环境和真实硬件上进行了严格评估，与代表性基线相比，该方法在稳健抓取、抗干扰操作和复杂灵巧任务中始终实现更高的任务成功率和执行效率。
AI.conclusion: 触觉驱动的自适应策略有效解决了精细双手操作中的体现差距问题，显著提高了遥操作系统的精度和效率，为高精度灵巧操作提供了可行的解决方案。

title: Morphology-Aware Multimodal Representation Learning for Insect Phylogenetic Reconstruction
summary: Morphological traits provide important evidence for phylogenetic reconstruction and evolutionary relationship analysis. Recent image-based approaches have introduced deep learning, particularly convolutional models, to derive morphological features from specimen images, but these methods generally rely on single-modality visual representations and do not explicitly incorporate morphological semantics. This study proposes a morphology-aware multimodal alignment framework for insect phylogenetic reconstruction. The framework combines specimen images with curated morphological descriptions by adapting a vision transformer through parameter-efficient fine-tuning and supervised contrastive learning, followed by image-text alignment in a shared latent space. The learned image embeddings are then used as continuous traits for Bayesian phylogenetic reconstruction. On the public Rove-Tree-11 dataset, comparative and ablation experiments across multiple visual backbones and feature adaptation strategies demonstrate that multimodal alignment improves topological agreement with the reference phylogeny. The results indicate that the proposed framework can derive morphology-aware visual traits for computational phylogenetic reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种用于昆虫系统发育重建的形态感知多模态对齐框架，通过结合标本图像和形态描述，在共享潜在空间中进行图像-文本对齐，将学习到的图像嵌入作为连续性状用于贝叶斯系统发育重建。
AI.motivation: 当前基于图像的系统发育重建方法主要依赖单模态视觉表示，缺乏明确的形态语义信息。形态特征对于系统发育重建和进化关系分析至关重要，但现有深度学习方法未能有效整合形态学语义信息。
AI.method: 1. 提出形态感知多模态对齐框架，结合标本图像和形态描述；2. 通过参数高效微调和监督对比学习适配视觉变换器；3. 在共享潜在空间中进行图像-文本对齐；4. 将学习到的图像嵌入作为连续性状用于贝叶斯系统发育重建。
AI.result: 在Rove-Tree-11公开数据集上的比较和消融实验表明，多模态对齐提高了与参考系统发育树的拓扑一致性。该框架能够为计算系统发育重建提取形态感知的视觉性状。
AI.conclusion: 提出的形态感知多模态对齐框架能够有效整合视觉和文本信息，为计算系统发育重建提供更准确的形态感知视觉性状，提高了系统发育重建的准确性。

title: Provably Efficient Policy-Reward Co-Pretraining for Adversarial Imitation Learning
summary: Adversarial imitation learning (AIL) achieves high-quality imitation compared to behavioral cloning (BC), but demands substantial online environment interaction. Recent empirical work has explored initializing AIL algorithms with BC pretrained policies to address this limitation, yet a rigorous theoretical understanding of pretraining's role in AIL remains elusive. This paper provides a systematic theoretical analysis and introduces principled pretraining algorithms for accelerating AIL. We begin by analyzing AIL with policy pretraining alone, identifying reward error as the dominant source of suboptimality. This reveals a critical and previously overlooked gap: the absence of reward pretraining. Motivated by this finding, we develop a principled policy-reward co-pretraining approach grounded in a reward shaping analysis. Our analysis uncovers a fundamental connection between expert policies and shaping rewards, which naturally gives rise to CoPT-AIL, an approach that jointly pretrains both policy and reward through a single BC procedure. We prove that CoPT-AIL achieves an improved imitation gap bound over standard AIL, establishing the first theoretical guarantee for the benefits of pretraining in AIL. Experimental results confirm CoPT-AIL's superior performance over existing AIL methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的对抗模仿学习方法CoPT-AIL，通过策略-奖励协同预训练来加速AIL收敛，相比传统AIL方法具有更好的理论保证和实际性能
AI.motivation: 虽然对抗模仿学习(AIL)比行为克隆(BC)质量更高，但需要大量在线环境交互。现有工作通过BC预训练策略来初始化AIL，但缺乏理论理解。本文旨在系统分析预训练在AIL中的作用，并开发有理论保证的预训练算法
AI.method: 1. 首先分析仅策略预训练的AIL，发现奖励误差是次优性的主要来源；2. 提出策略-奖励协同预训练方法，基于奖励塑形分析；3. 发现专家策略与塑形奖励之间的基本联系；4. 提出CoPT-AIL方法，通过单一BC过程联合预训练策略和奖励
AI.result: 1. 理论证明CoPT-AIL相比标准AIL有改进的模仿差距界限；2. 建立了AIL中预训练益处的首个理论保证；3. 实验结果表明CoPT-AIL优于现有AIL方法
AI.conclusion: 本文填补了AIL预训练的理论空白，提出了有理论保证的策略-奖励协同预训练方法CoPT-AIL，显著提高了模仿学习效率，为加速对抗模仿学习提供了新的理论基础和实用算法

title: SkyJEPA: Learning Long-Horizon World Models for Zero-Shot Sim-to-Real Control of Quadrotors
summary: Accurate dynamics models are critical for informed decision-making in robotic systems, particularly for agile aerial vehicles operating under uncertainty. Neural network dynamics models are attractive for capturing complex nonlinear effects, but existing predictive approaches struggle with long-horizon forecasting because their autoregressive rollout mechanism amplifies errors over time. Joint Embedding Predictive Architectures (JEPAs) offer a compelling alternative by modeling dynamics in latent space, yet prior JEPA-style methods for robot navigation have been studied primarily for kinematic-level planning, with limited investigation in high-frequency control. In this work, we introduce the JEPA-style model for real-time quadrotor control. The proposed approach combines a latent dynamics model with a novel physics-inspired prober that maps frozen latents to interpretable state, enabling physically grounded long-horizon prediction. Additionally, we combine the learned model with a sampling-based optimal control solution to take advantage of its predictive capabilities for real-time control on embedded hardware. Finally, to reduce the dependence on expensive and unsafe real-world data collection, we develop a structured pipeline for automated dataset generation. Extensive open-loop and outdoor closed-loop experiments demonstrate accurate prediction, robust zero-shot sim-to-real transfer, and strong generalization across diverse operating conditions.

AI.tldr: JEPA风格模型用于四旋翼实时控制，结合潜在动力学模型与物理启发的探针，实现长期预测，并通过采样最优控制实现嵌入式硬件实时控制，减少对真实数据依赖。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络动力学模型在长期预测中误差累积严重，JEPA方法在机器人导航中主要应用于运动学层面规划，缺乏在高频控制中的深入研究。
AI.method: 提出JEPA风格模型，结合潜在动力学模型与物理启发探针，将冻结潜在状态映射到可解释状态；结合采样最优控制；开发自动化数据集生成管道。
AI.result: 开环和户外闭环实验显示准确预测、鲁棒的零样本仿真到现实迁移，以及在多样化操作条件下的强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: JEPA风格模型能有效实现四旋翼实时控制，提供物理可解释的长期预测，减少对昂贵真实数据依赖，具有实际应用潜力。

title: BAC-JEPA: Label-Efficient Breast Arterial Calcification Segmentation via Synthetic Mammography-Guided Supervision
summary: Breast arterial calcification (BAC) on screening mammograms is an emerging cardiovascular risk biomarker, but quantitative use requires reproducible segmentation and expert pixel-level labels are costly. We present BAC-JEPA, a label-efficient segmentation framework trained on procedurally generated arterial calcification inserted into real mammographic backgrounds with exact masks. Candidate backgrounds were selected from model-screened mammograms with low predicted BAC response; the generator samples arterial structure, disease burden, radiographic appearance, and hard-negative distractors including nonarterial calcifications and metallic objects. Synthetic masks are paired with mammography self-supervised Vision Transformer encoders and a high-resolution convolutional decoder to produce full-resolution segmentation maps. The study used 75,472 mammography studies from 34,956 patients for background selection and representation learning, trained on synthetic images from 10,000 backgrounds, selected checkpoints with 1,000 development backgrounds, and evaluated transfer on all 1,000 human-labeled BacSeg synthetic 2D mammograms. On held-out synthetic validation data, the larger backbone achieved IoU 0.5325 and Dice 0.6357. On BacSeg, image-level classification from segmentation probability maps reached AUROC 0.8719, with 0.8547 for the smaller backbone. Four-view inference required 110.68--213.63 ms on an RTX 5090 GPU, and severe-preset synthetic image generation averaged 2.7071 s per image on a multicore workstation. These results indicate that BAC-specific synthetic supervision can produce useful image-level transfer without human pixel-level training masks, while expert-reviewed real-mammogram segmentation remains necessary for clinical validation and calibration.

AI.tldr: BAC-JEPA：一种用于乳腺动脉钙化分割的标签高效框架，通过将程序生成的钙化插入真实乳腺X光背景中来训练模型，无需昂贵的人工像素级标注。
