AI.motivation: 乳腺动脉钙化是新兴的心血管风险生物标志物，但定量使用需要可重复的分割，而专家像素级标注成本高昂。需要开发标签高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出BAC-JEPA框架：1）从预测BAC响应低的乳腺X光中筛选背景；2）生成器采样动脉结构、疾病负担、放射学外观和硬负样本；3）将合成掩码与自监督ViT编码器和高分辨率卷积解码器结合；4）使用75,472个乳腺X光研究进行训练和评估。
AI.result: 在合成验证数据上，较大骨干网络达到IoU 0.5325和Dice 0.6357；在BacSeg上，基于分割概率图的图像级分类达到AUROC 0.8719；四视图推理在RTX 5090 GPU上需110.68-213.63毫秒。
AI.conclusion: BAC特定合成监督可以在无需人工像素级训练掩码的情况下产生有用的图像级迁移，但专家审查的真实乳腺X光分割对于临床验证和校准仍然是必要的。

title: New Smooth Loss functions for Robust Regression that Closely Approximate Absolute Error and Provide Improved Performance on Datasets With Significant Outliers
summary: The performance of supervised machine learning models is directly related to the quality of the training dataset. In particular, the presence of significantly many outliers in the training data can lead to low accuracy because popular loss function like the Mean Squared Error (MSE) assign very high importance to large errors. The Mean Absolute Error (MAE) loss assigns equal importance to all errors and is most robust to outliers, but suffers from being non-differentiable at the origin. MAE also has large derivative values close to its minimum leading to instability and oscillations during training. Thus differentiable approximations to MAE namely Huber and Log-Cosh losses were introduced for robust regression tasks. This paper introduces two new infinitely differentiable loss functions that more closely approximate the MAE loss and provide improved performance on regression tasks with significantly many outliers in the training dataset. A comparison of the performance of regression models with different loss functions on a wide variety of benchmarks and datasets is presented to demonstrate the superior performance of the Square Root Loss (SRL) and Smooth Mean Absolute Error (SMAE) losses proposed in this paper. The SRL loss is shown to be strictly convex and the SMAE loss is shown to be strictly quasi-convex. Given the fundamental importance of linear regression, two new robust linear regression models are presented.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了两种新的无限可微损失函数（SRL和SMAE），它们能更好地近似MAE损失，在处理包含大量异常值的训练数据时，相比Huber和Log-Cosh等现有鲁棒损失函数，在回归任务中表现更优。
AI.motivation: 监督机器学习模型的性能与训练数据质量直接相关。当训练数据中存在大量异常值时，MSE等常用损失函数会给大误差分配过高权重，导致准确率下降；而MAE虽对异常值鲁棒，但存在原点不可微和最小值附近导数过大导致训练不稳定等问题。现有近似MAE的Huber和Log-Cosh损失函数仍有改进空间。
AI.method: 提出了两种新的无限可微损失函数：平方根损失（SRL）和平滑平均绝对误差（SMAE），它们能更紧密地近似MAE损失。SRL被证明是严格凸函数，SMAE被证明是严格拟凸函数。基于线性回归的基础重要性，还提出了两种新的鲁棒线性回归模型。
AI.result: 在多种基准测试和数据集上的回归任务比较表明，SRL和SMAE损失函数相比现有损失函数（包括MSE、MAE、Huber、Log-Cosh等）表现出更优越的性能，特别是在训练数据包含大量异常值的情况下。
AI.conclusion: SRL和SMAE损失函数为处理包含异常值的回归问题提供了更有效的解决方案，它们结合了MAE的鲁棒性和可微性优势，在多种数据集上表现出优于现有方法的性能。

title: DVL-DeepONet: A Physics-Guided Operator Learning for Resilient Underwater Navigation
summary: Autonomous Underwater Vehicles (AUVs) rely heavily on the fusion of inertial sensors and Doppler velocity logs (DVLs) for navigation. In standard autonomous navigation systems, the DVL measures four beam velocities, thereby enabling the estimation of the AUV velocity vector. However, during real-world missions, the DVL may receive noisy or incomplete beam measurements due to marine obstacles, seabed reflections, or environmental disturbances. Furthermore, some low-cost underwater platforms operate without inertial sensors to reduce system complexity and cost. In such cases, reliable estimation of the AUV velocity vector in real-world missing beam scenarios becomes challenging, leading to degraded navigation solutions. To circumvent these challenges and enable resilient underwater navigation, we propose DVL-DeepONet, a physics-guided deep neural operator framework along with three variants. The proposed models are designed to estimate DVL-based velocity information under multiple operational scenarios, including (i) noise-resilient estimation in coupled inertial/DVL measurements, (ii) DVL-only learning, and (iii) beam measurement recovery. By learning a nonlinear operator that maps temporal inertial/DVL observations directly to vehicle velocity while enforcing DVL measurement physics through a consistency constraint, the proposed approach enables robust velocity estimation even under degraded sensing conditions. The proposed framework is validated using real-world AUV experiments, comprising a cumulative path length of approximately 10,000 m. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed DVL-DeepONet architectures outperform baseline model-based approaches and learning-based algorithms by 40%.

AI.tldr: 提出DVL-DeepONet物理引导深度神经网络框架，用于解决AUV在DVL波束测量缺失或噪声情况下的鲁棒速度估计问题。
AI.motivation: AUV导航依赖惯性传感器和DVL融合，但实际任务中DVL可能因海洋障碍物、海底反射或环境干扰而收到噪声或不完整波束测量。低成本水下平台甚至可能没有惯性传感器，导致在波束缺失场景下难以可靠估计AUV速度向量，导航性能下降。
AI.method: 提出DVL-DeepONet物理引导深度神经算子框架及其三个变体。通过学习将时间惯性/DVL观测直接映射到车辆速度的非线性算子，并通过一致性约束强制实施DVL测量物理原理，实现鲁棒速度估计。处理三种操作场景：耦合惯性/DVL测量的噪声弹性估计、仅DVL学习、波束测量恢复。
AI.result: 使用真实AUV实验验证，累计路径长度约10,000米。实验结果表明，提出的DVL-DeepONet架构比基于模型的方法和学习算法性能提升40%。
AI.conclusion: DVL-DeepONet框架能够在退化的传感条件下实现鲁棒速度估计，为弹性水下导航提供有效解决方案，特别是在DVL波束测量不完整或噪声干扰的实际场景中。

title: Cross-View Yaw Estimation in Location Uncertainty with Line-Aligning Yaw Scoring
summary: Accurate yaw estimation is a bottleneck in cross-view localization between ground view and Bird's Eye View (BEV). Existing methods couple yaw with translation and rely on height or projection assumptions that degrade under large yaw ambiguity. We disentangle yaw from location accuracy and introduce LAYS, a radially invariant line-consensus voting method. By exploiting the radial invariance of our formulation, we achieve sub-degree yaw precision via 3D voting over all candidate poses, while eliminating the need for accurate location. Our key observation is that a ground-image column matched to BEV pixels induces the same yaw across all camera positions along the radial direction of the pixels. LAYS matches BEV pixels to ground columns using feature similarity and accumulates the induced yaw votes into discrete 3D bins, where correct correspondences along the radial line concentrate into a sharp peak for the correct yaw. Experiments on Mapillary, Ford, KITTI, and VIGOR show significant gains under unknown yaw, particularly for normal FoV with unknown yaw (+28$\sim$45\%p), and using LAYS as a yaw prior improves downstream 3-DoF localization.

AI.tldr: LAYS是一种解耦偏航角与位置估计的跨视角定位方法，通过径向不变性线一致性投票实现亚度级偏航角精度，无需精确位置信息
AI.motivation: 现有跨视角定位方法将偏航角与平移耦合，依赖高度或投影假设，在大偏航角模糊情况下性能下降。需要解耦偏航角与位置精度，提高偏航角估计的鲁棒性
AI.method: 提出径向不变性线一致性投票方法LAYS：将地面图像列与BEV像素匹配，利用径向方向上的偏航角不变性，通过特征相似性匹配BEV像素与地面列，将诱导的偏航角投票累积到离散3D容器中，正确对应关系沿径向线集中形成尖锐峰值
AI.result: 在Mapillary、Ford、KITTI和VIGOR数据集上实验显示，在未知偏航角情况下显著提升性能，特别是正常视场下未知偏航角提升28-45个百分点，作为偏航角先验可改善下游3自由度定位
AI.conclusion: LAYS通过解耦偏航角与位置估计，利用径向不变性实现高精度偏航角估计，解决了跨视角定位中的偏航角估计瓶颈问题，为下游定位任务提供了有效的偏航角先验

title: Frequency-Domain Neural ODEs for Modeling Non-Linear Dynamical Systems
comment: 11 pages. figures, tables, and results are at the bottom of the file
summary: Standard continuous-depth models, such as Neural Ordinary Differential Equations (NODEs), offer significant advantages in modeling physical systems by learning continuous vector fields rather than discrete temporal steps. However, when applied to complex dynamical systems, standard NODEs frequently struggle with highly nonlinear dynamics. This paper investigates the Frequency-domain Neural ODE (FNODE), an architecture that projects continuous temporal dynamics into the frequency domain using the Fast Fourier Transform (FFT). By operating in the frequency domain, the model provides better generalization to the dynamical system. The architecture is empirically evaluated against discrete models, specifically Gated Recurrent Units (GRUs) and Long Short-Term Memory (LSTMs), and other continuous-depth variants, including Augmented Neural ODE (ANODE), across four distinct dynamical systems: the Lotka-Volterra model, the forced Duffing oscillator, the Van der Pol oscillator, and the Lorenz system. To rigorously assess generalization and robustness, curriculum and ensemble learning are used to evaluate the model's convergence by estimating confidence intervals across different ensemble models. The empirical results demonstrate that the FNODE architecture achieves better generalization while exhibiting remarkable convergence stability.

AI.tldr: FNODE通过FFT将连续时间动态投影到频域，相比传统NODE和离散模型在复杂动力系统中具有更好的泛化能力和收敛稳定性。
AI.motivation: 标准连续深度模型（如NODE）在建模物理系统时具有优势，但在处理高度非线性动力系统时存在困难。需要一种能更好泛化到复杂动力系统的方法。
AI.method: 提出频域神经常微分方程（FNODE）架构，使用快速傅里叶变换将连续时间动态投影到频域，通过频域操作提高模型对动力系统的泛化能力。
AI.result: 在四个不同动力系统（Lotka-Volterra模型、强迫Duffing振子、Van der Pol振子、Lorenz系统）的实验中，FNODE相比GRU、LSTM、ANODE等模型表现出更好的泛化能力和显著的收敛稳定性。
AI.conclusion: FNODE架构通过在频域操作连续时间动态，能够更好地泛化到复杂动力系统，同时保持收敛稳定性，为连续深度模型在动力系统建模中的应用提供了改进方向。

title: BiliVLA: Scene-Aware Vision-Language-Action Model with Reinforcement Learning for Autonomous Biliary Endoscopic Navigation
summary: Endoscopic retrograde cholangiopancreatography (ERCP) demands precise endoscopic navigation and stable biliary cannulation within a narrow monocular field characterized by specular reflections, partial occlusions, and frequent tissue contact. Although recent robotic systems and vision-based assistance techniques improve operator ergonomics and provide perceptual cues, their performance degrades under pronounced anatomical variability and safety-critical visual artifacts, which hinders reliable autonomy in cannulation-grade procedures. Here, we present BiliVLA, a scene-aware Vision-Language-Action (VLA) framework that formulates biliary endoscopic navigation as an instruction-conditioned visuomotor learning problem. Given an endoscopic observation and a stage-specific language instruction, BiliVLA jointly predicts the target category, a grounded bounding box, and a discrete three degrees of freedom (DoF) motor command for a continuum endoscope. The proposed framework incorporates scene-aware supervision to enhance semantic target consistency and safety-aware recovery supervision to induce conservative retreat behaviors under luminal wall contact. A key component of BiliVLA is a two-stage training paradigm that combines grounding-enhanced supervised fine-tuning (SFT) with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), which significantly improves action reliability and decision consistency during closed-loop navigation. Across three ERCP subtasks, BiliVLA achieves an average action precision of 91.96\% and an overall success rate (SR) of 84.85\% in real-world phantom experiments. These results indicate that integrating semantic grounding, scene-aware learning, and reward-guided optimization improves perception-action alignment and enables robust autonomous endoscopic navigation.

AI.tldr: 提出BiliVLA框架，将胆道内窥镜导航转化为指令条件视觉运动学习问题，通过语义接地和场景感知提升ERCP手术的自主导航性能。
AI.motivation: ERCP手术需要在内窥镜狭窄的单目视野中进行精确导航和稳定胆管插管，现有机器人系统和视觉辅助技术在解剖变异大和存在视觉伪影时性能下降，难以实现可靠的插管级自主操作。
AI.method: 提出BiliVLA框架，将胆道内窥镜导航建模为指令条件的视觉运动学习问题。给定内窥镜观察和阶段特定语言指令，联合预测目标类别、接地边界框和3自由度电机命令。采用场景感知监督增强语义目标一致性，安全感知恢复监督诱导接触时的保守后退行为。关键采用两阶段训练：接地增强监督微调+群体相对策略优化。
AI.result: 在三个ERCP子任务中，BiliVLA在真实世界体模实验中达到平均动作精度91.96%和总体成功率84.85%。
AI.conclusion: 集成语义接地、场景感知学习和奖励引导优化能够改善感知-动作对齐，实现鲁棒的自主内窥镜导航。

title: Accurate identification and measurement of the precipitate area by two-stage deep neural networks in novel chromium-based alloys
comment: 18 pages, 11 figures. Published in Phys. Chem. Chem. Phys
summary: The performance of advanced materials for extreme environments is underpinned by their microstructure, including the size and distribution of reinforcing phases. Chromium-based superalloys are a recently proposed alternative to conventional face-centred-cubic superalloys for high-temperature applications, such as Concentrated Solar Power, and their development requires efficient measurement of precipitate volume fraction and size distribution from electron microscopy images. Traditional fixed-threshold image processing is sensitive to background noise, generalises poorly across materials, and requires substantial manual measurement effort. To address these bottlenecks, this study proposes DT-SegNet, an end-to-end two-stage deep learning scheme based on YOLOv5 and SegFormer for object detection and segmentation in electron microscopy images. The approach combines the training efficiency of convolutional neural networks at the detection stage with the segmentation accuracy of a Vision Transformer. Numerical experiments show that DT-SegNet substantially outperforms state-of-the-art segmentation tools offered by Weka and ilastik across metrics including accuracy, precision, recall, and F1-score. The model provides a useful tool for alloy-development microstructure examinations and helps address the large datasets associated with high-throughput alloy development.

AI.tldr: DT-SegNet：一种基于深度学习的端到端两阶段方法，用于电子显微图像中析出相的检测与分割，显著优于现有工具
AI.motivation: 铬基高温合金作为传统面心立方高温合金的替代材料，其性能取决于微观结构中的析出相尺寸和分布。传统固定阈值图像处理方法对背景噪声敏感、跨材料泛化能力差且需要大量人工测量，阻碍了合金开发效率
AI.method: 提出DT-SegNet，一种基于YOLOv5和SegFormer的端到端两阶段深度学习方案。第一阶段利用卷积神经网络（YOLOv5）进行目标检测，第二阶段使用视觉变换器（SegFormer）进行精确分割，结合了CNN的训练效率和ViT的分割精度
AI.result: DT-SegNet在准确率、精确率、召回率和F1分数等指标上显著优于Weka和ilastik等最先进的分割工具，为合金开发中的微观结构分析提供了有效工具
AI.conclusion: DT-SegNet解决了传统图像处理方法在电子显微图像分析中的局限性，能够高效处理高通量合金开发产生的大规模数据集，为先进高温合金的微观结构表征提供了可靠的技术支持

title: OphthaDT: Generative Digital Twins for Forecasting Visual Acuity Trajectories in Ophthalmology
summary: Precision medicine in ophthalmology requires accurate longitudinal predictions, but the fragmented nature of multimodal clinical data remains a barrier to forecasting. We introduce OphthaDT, an LLM-based digital twin for ophthalmology that serializes longitudinal patient histories from 3,220 patients across four Phase III clinical trials into structured narratives to forecast best corrected visual acuity (BCVA). In benchmarks spanning up to 100 weeks, OphthaDT demonstrated the lowest prediction error in neovascular age-related macular degeneration (nAMD), achieving an average mean absolute error (MAE) reduction of 6.0% compared to all baselines. In diabetic macular edema (DME), OphthaDT demonstrated competitive performance against all baselines while outperforming Random Forest and XGBoost by an average MAE reduction of 2.6% and 6.9%, respectively. Results reveal that OphthaDT's predictive advantage scales with trajectory complexity: whereas linear models remain effective for the more stable treatment responses of DME, OphthaDT's capacity is better suited for capturing the high longitudinal variability of nAMD. Finally, OphthaDT handles irregular sampling without imputation, positioning LLM-based clinical trajectory modeling as a methodology that could reduce patient burden and accelerate drug development.

AI.tldr: OphthaDT是一个基于LLM的眼科数字孪生系统，通过将多模态临床数据序列化为结构化叙述来预测最佳矫正视力，在nAMD和DME预测中表现优于传统基线方法。
AI.motivation: 眼科精准医疗需要准确的纵向预测，但多模态临床数据的碎片化特性阻碍了预测能力。现有方法难以处理不规则采样和高纵向变异性的患者数据。
AI.method: 开发了OphthaDT，一个基于大语言模型（LLM）的眼科数字孪生系统，将来自3,220名患者、跨越四个III期临床试验的纵向患者历史序列化为结构化叙述，用于预测最佳矫正视力（BCVA）。系统能够处理不规则采样而无需插补。
AI.result: 在长达100周的基准测试中，OphthaDT在新生血管性年龄相关性黄斑变性（nAMD）中表现出最低的预测误差，平均绝对误差（MAE）相比所有基线降低了6.0%。在糖尿病性黄斑水肿（DME）中，OphthaDT表现出与所有基线竞争的性能，同时比随机森林和XGBoost分别平均降低MAE 2.6%和6.9%。
AI.conclusion: OphthaDT的预测优势随轨迹复杂性而扩展：线性模型对DME的稳定治疗反应有效，而OphthaDT更适合捕捉nAMD的高纵向变异性。基于LLM的临床轨迹建模方法可以减少患者负担并加速药物开发。

title: HoloAgent-0: A Unified Embodied Agent Framework with 3D Spatial Memory
summary: LLM agents follow a practical execution loop in digital environments: they reason over structured states, invoke tools, inspect feedback, and revise actions. Extending this loop to physical robots is difficult because physical execution is continuous, embodiment-dependent, uncertain, and constrained by safety. Existing embodied-AI systems have advanced manipulation, spatial understanding, navigation, and humanoid control, but these capabilities often remain specialized modules or loosely coupled decision loops. In this work, we introduce HoloAgent-0, a unified embodied agent framework for real-world robot deployment. Embodied AgentOS converts language instructions into executable skill graphs, schedules robot resources, monitors execution, and triggers clarification or re-planning from runtime feedback. HoloAgent-0 organizes heterogeneous robot models and controllers through three coupled layers: Embodied AgentOS for closed-loop execution, 3D spatial memory for physical world grounding, and embodied skills for robot action. We deploy HoloAgent-0 on real hardware and evaluate its spatial memory, long-horizon navigation, and closed-loop execution across motion generation, object search, cross-robot coordination, and mobile manipulation.

AI.tldr: HoloAgent-0是一个统一的具身智能体框架，用于现实世界机器人部署，通过三层结构实现语言指令到可执行技能图的转换、机器人资源调度、执行监控和基于反馈的重新规划。
AI.motivation: 将LLM智能体的执行循环扩展到物理机器人面临挑战，因为物理执行是连续的、依赖具身性、不确定且受安全约束。现有具身AI系统虽然具备操作、空间理解、导航和人形控制等能力，但这些通常是专门化模块或松散耦合的决策循环。
AI.method: HoloAgent-0通过三层耦合结构组织异构机器人模型和控制器：1) Embodied AgentOS用于闭环执行，将语言指令转换为可执行技能图，调度机器人资源，监控执行并触发澄清或重新规划；2) 3D空间记忆用于物理世界接地；3) 具身技能用于机器人动作。
AI.result: 在真实硬件上部署HoloAgent-0，评估了其空间记忆、长时程导航和闭环执行能力，涵盖运动生成、物体搜索、跨机器人协调和移动操作等任务。
AI.conclusion: HoloAgent-0提供了一个统一的具身智能体框架，能够有效处理物理机器人部署中的连续性、具身依赖性、不确定性和安全约束等挑战，实现了从语言指令到物理执行的闭环控制。

authors: Ronald L. P. D. de Jong
title: Surgical Anatomy Recognition with Context Learning using Foundation Representations
comment: Provisionally accepted for presentation at MICCAI 2026
summary: Accurate recognition of anatomical structures is essential for safe and effective minimally invasive surgery (MIS), yet it remains underexplored in surgical computer vision due to limited annotated data and methods tailored primarily to natural scenes. In this work, we present a combined dataset and model framework to advance anatomy-aware perception in MIS. First, we introduce ATLAS-120k, a large-scale clip-level semantic segmentation dataset comprising over 120,000 annotated frames from 100 surgical videos spanning 14 procedures and multiple modalities, including laparoscopic and robot-assisted surgery. The dataset captures substantial procedural variability and was created using a scalable annotation pipeline that integrates expert manual labeling, automated propagation, iterative refinement, and surgeon verification to ensure high-quality annotations. Second, we propose ATLAS (Anatomy Recognition with Context Learning using Foundation Representations), a video semantic segmentation model specifically designed for surgical anatomy recognition. Unlike conventional approaches that emphasize object tracking, ATLAS leverages foundation-model embeddings together with lightweight temporal reasoning to incorporate contextual cues such as procedure type, surgical phase, and short-term visual memory. This design enables temporally consistent and accurate predictions while maintaining real-time feasibility. Together, the dataset and model establish a practical foundation for robust surgical scene understanding and support the development of clinically applicable guidance systems for minimally invasive surgery. The models, dataset annotations and annotation platform are publicly available at: https://github.com/TimJaspers0801/ATLAS.

AI.tldr: 提出ATLAS-120k大规模手术视频语义分割数据集和ATLAS模型，用于提升微创手术中的解剖结构识别能力。
AI.motivation: 微创手术中准确识别解剖结构对安全性和有效性至关重要，但由于标注数据有限且现有方法主要针对自然场景，手术计算机视觉领域对此研究不足。
AI.method: 1) 创建ATLAS-120k数据集：包含100个手术视频、120,000+标注帧，涵盖14种手术和多种模态；采用专家手动标注、自动传播、迭代优化和外科医生验证的标注流程。2) 提出ATLAS模型：利用基础模型嵌入和轻量级时序推理，结合手术类型、手术阶段和短期视觉记忆等上下文信息进行视频语义分割。
AI.result: 建立了大规模手术解剖识别数据集和专门设计的模型框架，实现了时间一致且准确的预测，同时保持实时可行性，为临床适用的手术导航系统开发奠定基础。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集和模型共同为稳健的手术场景理解建立了实用基础，支持微创手术临床指导系统的开发，所有资源已公开。

title: Meta-Reinforcement Learning via Evolution for Multi-Objective Combinatorial Supply Chain Optimisation
summary: Meta-reinforcement learning is a promising approach to multi-objective optimisation because it enables rapid policy adaptation across changing environments and preference settings. However, conventional few-shot methods usually fine-tune from a single shared meta-policy, which can reduce solution diversity and limit exploration of the Pareto front, especially in high-dimensional combinatorial problems such as supply chain optimisation. We propose a population-based Meta-reinforcement learning framework that combines decomposition with evolutionary search in scalarisation weight space. The framework maintains a population of weight vectors, each associated with a distinct meta-policy trained through gradient-based meta-learning, and iteratively refines this population through elitist selection, crossover, and mutation guided by hypervolume and entropy contributions. We evaluate the method in a multi-objective supply chain setting with conflicting economic, environmental, and social goals, and further test its generality on standard reinforcement learning problems. The results show that the proposed approach yields more diverse, better distributed Pareto front approximations, improves cross-task adaptation, increases hypervolume by up to 32\% over Meta-multi-objective reinforcement learning in the complex case, and attains the lowest average Hausdorff distance among all compared methods.

AI.tldr: 提出基于种群的元强化学习框架，结合分解和标量化权重空间的进化搜索，用于多目标优化，在供应链优化等复杂问题中产生更多样、分布更好的Pareto前沿。
AI.motivation: 传统少样本元强化学习方法通常从单一共享元策略进行微调，这会减少解多样性并限制Pareto前沿的探索，特别是在供应链优化等高维组合问题中。
AI.method: 提出基于种群的元强化学习框架，结合分解与标量化权重空间的进化搜索。维护权重向量种群，每个权重向量关联一个通过基于梯度的元学习训练的不同元策略，并通过基于超体积和熵贡献的精英选择、交叉和变异迭代优化种群。
AI.result: 在具有经济、环境和社会目标冲突的多目标供应链设置中评估方法。结果显示该方法产生更多样、分布更好的Pareto前沿近似，改善跨任务适应能力，在复杂情况下超体积比元多目标强化学习提高达32%，在所有比较方法中获得最低平均Hausdorff距离。
AI.conclusion: 提出的基于种群的元强化学习框架能有效解决传统方法在解多样性和Pareto前沿探索方面的限制，在复杂多目标优化问题中表现优异。

title: A Generative Model for Closed-Loop Microsimulation of Signalized Intersections
summary: Traffic microsimulators rely on hand-crafted behavior models that reproduce aggregate flow but miss the heterogeneous interactions between vehicles at signalized intersections. Learned trajectory predictors capture richer interactions but are short-horizon and tend to be unstable when run in closed loop. We present Enactor, an actor-centric generative model for closed-loop intersection microsimulation. The model focuses on vehicles; pedestrians are included as context that can influence vehicle decisions but not predicted. Dynamic actors and lane polylines are encoded in polar coordinates referenced to the intersection center. A transformer with separate spatial and temporal attention blocks predicts a distribution over each actor's next-step motion ($s$, $α$). Training uses a closed-loop curriculum so the model is exposed to its own predictions. We evaluate Enactor in two regimes. In a 4000-second simulation-in-the-loop test at two intersection geometries, Enactor controls every dynamic vehicle against a continuously refreshing actor set rather than the fixed cohort that learned trajectory predictors are usually evaluated against. It recovers the SUMO data generator's speed and travel-time distributions with KL divergence over an order of magnitude lower than a recent transformer baseline on travel time, and substantially lower on speed (roughly $5\times$ lower at Site 1), and reduces red-light violations relative to the same baseline by more than an order of magnitude. An ablation isolates the leader rear-bumper feature as the change with the largest effect on intersection-aware safety metrics. We also evaluate on real-world field data and apply the same architecture to naturalistic vehicle trajectories from a fish-eye camera at a signalized intersection and evaluate it on multi-horizon predictive tasks. Enactor outperforms a constant-velocity baseline at every horizon evaluated.

AI.tldr: Enactor是一个用于交叉口微观仿真的生成模型，通过注意力机制和闭环训练策略，在车辆控制和轨迹预测方面优于传统方法和基线模型。
AI.motivation: 传统交通微观仿真器依赖手工行为模型，能重现宏观流量但无法捕捉信号交叉口车辆间的异质交互；而学习型轨迹预测器虽能捕捉更丰富的交互，但存在短期预测和闭环运行不稳定的问题。
AI.method: 提出基于极坐标编码动态参与者和车道线的Enactor模型，使用分离的空间和时间注意力块Transformer预测每个参与者下一步运动分布，采用闭环课程训练策略使模型接触自身预测。
AI.result: 在4000秒仿真测试中，Enactor在速度和行程时间分布的KL散度比基线低一个数量级，闯红灯违规减少超过一个数量级；在真实世界数据上，所有预测时域均优于恒定速度基线。
AI.conclusion: Enactor能够生成更真实、安全的交叉口微观仿真，通过领导者后保险杠特征显著提升交叉口感知的安全指标，为交通仿真提供了新的生成式建模方法。

title: Feed-forward Motion In-betweening for Any 4D
summary: 4D dynamics (3D geometry evolving over time) is a fundamental representation of the physical world and plays a crucial role in world modeling (e.g., animation and games). Owing to the scarcity of large-scale, long-horizon 4D mesh data with arbitrary shapes, early text-to-4D methods rely on distillation or test-time optimization from video diffusion priors, making inference prohibitively slow. Recent feed-forward generators greatly reduce inference cost but offer limited spatiotemporal controllability, and short-horizon generation often leads to error accumulation in long-horizon sequences. We propose a novel feed-forward in-betweening framework for arbitrary 4D meshes with keyframe conditioning. Building on universal mesh-animation latents, we introduce a frame-wise mesh VAE that encodes each frame into topology-agnostic latent tokens anchored by a reference mesh for keyframe conditioning. We further introduce a keyframe-conditioned rectified flow model with an MMDiT backbone that synthesizes non-keyframe frames conditioned on sparse keyframes. Experiments show strong performance and improved controllability on both DyMesh16 and DyMesh32 benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于关键帧条件的前馈式中间帧生成框架，用于任意4D网格的生成，解决了现有方法推理速度慢和时空可控性有限的问题。
AI.motivation: 4D动态（3D几何随时间演变）是物理世界的基本表示，在动画和游戏等世界建模中至关重要。由于缺乏大规模、长时程的任意形状4D网格数据，早期文本到4D方法依赖视频扩散先验的蒸馏或测试时优化，导致推理速度极慢。最近的前馈生成器虽然降低了推理成本，但时空可控性有限，且短时程生成容易在长时程序列中导致误差累积。
AI.method: 提出一种基于关键帧条件的前馈式中间帧生成框架。基于通用网格动画潜在空间，引入帧级网格VAE，将每帧编码为拓扑无关的潜在标记，通过参考网格锚定以支持关键帧条件。进一步提出基于MMDiT骨干的关键帧条件整流流模型，在稀疏关键帧条件下合成非关键帧帧。
AI.result: 在DyMesh16和DyMesh32基准测试中表现出强大的性能和改进的可控性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过关键帧条件的前馈中间帧生成，有效提高了4D网格生成的时空可控性和长时程序列的稳定性，同时保持了高效的推理速度。

title: Parameterized Representations via Implicit Stochastic Modulation for High-Dimensional and High-Order Neural PDE Solvers
summary: Solving high-dimensional and high-order PDEs is challenged by the coupled growth of spatial dimensionality and derivative order. Recent stochastic derivative estimators reduce this cost by replacing full derivative tensors with randomized dimension or Taylor estimators, but they are mostly designed for fixed physical parameters and require retraining for each new parameter. We show that direct conditional parameterization of such solvers entangles physical parameters with the high-order automatic differentiation graph, causing extra memory growth and parameter-induced variance amplification. We propose Parameterized Representations via Implicit Stochastic Modulation (PRISM), a plug-and-play framework for parameterized high-dimensional and high-order stochastic neural PDE solvers. PRISM uses a hyper-generator to map physical parameters to affine modulators that scale and shift a purely spatial latent manifold, while keeping parameter branches value-connected but spatial-tangent-disconnected. This design preserves unbiased stochastic dimension and Taylor estimators, removes the parameter encoder from high-order spatial AD, and provides a variance-aware Lipschitz envelope over the parameter space. We prove parameterized unbiasedness, estimation-error bounds, and convergence under bounded stochastic variance. Experiments with PRISM-STDE and PRISM-SDGD on nonlinear parameterized PDEs show stable zero-shot generalization, reduced memory usage, and scalability up to 100,000 dimensions on a single GPU, with efficient low-rank SVD adaptation for unseen parameters.

AI.tldr: PRISM框架：通过隐式随机调制实现参数化高维高阶PDE求解器，支持零样本泛化，降低内存使用，可扩展到10万维
AI.motivation: 现有随机导数估计器主要针对固定物理参数设计，为每个新参数需要重新训练，且直接条件参数化会导致物理参数与高阶自动微分图纠缠，造成额外内存增长和参数诱导方差放大
AI.method: 提出PRISM框架，使用超生成器将物理参数映射到仿射调制器，缩放和平移纯空间潜在流形，保持参数分支值连接但空间切线断开，从而保留无偏随机维数和泰勒估计器，将参数编码器从高阶空间AD中移除
AI.result: 在非线性参数化PDE上，PRISM-STDE和PRISM-SDGD表现出稳定的零样本泛化能力，减少内存使用，在单个GPU上可扩展到100,000维，并能通过低秩SVD适应高效适应未见参数
AI.conclusion: PRISM为参数化高维高阶随机神经PDE求解器提供了一个即插即用框架，证明了参数化无偏性、估计误差界限和有界随机方差下的收敛性，解决了参数化PDE求解中的内存和泛化问题

title: KEMO: Event-Driven Keyframe Memory for Long-Horizon Robot Manipulation with VLA Policies
summary: Long-horizon robot manipulation remains challenging because similar observations may occur at different execution stages, while the appropriate action depends on previously completed operations. Memory can address this ambiguity by enabling policies to infer task progress from execution history. However, existing memory-augmented approaches often either retain dense histories that require compression or rely primarily on recent context that may discard earlier task-relevant events. In this work, we propose propose KEMO, a lightweight plug-in memory framework that automatically selectively preserves keyframes associated with task-relevant state changes for VLA policies. KEMO combines robot kinematics with visual filtering to detect events, encodes the selected keyframes as compact temporally ordered memory tokens, and integrates them with current visual features through cross-attention and gated residual fusion for VLA training. The detected events also define higher-weight training samples near critical transitions. We evaluate KEMO on various real-world dual-arm manipulation tasks spanning 2 to 6 scored subtasks, and trajectory length ranging from 830 steps to 2846 execution steps (durations from 28 to 95 seconds). Compared with the memory-free baseline (e.g., $π_{0.5}$), KEMO improves aggregate Task Success Rate by 23.6\% and Stage Completion Rate by 34.1\%. Ablations show that event-driven keyframe selection outperforms uniform sampling and recent-frame retention, while the proposed gated fusion and keyframe-aligned loss weighting provide complementary gains.

AI.tldr: KEMO：一种轻量级记忆框架，通过机器人运动学和视觉过滤检测任务相关状态变化，选择性保留关键帧作为时间有序记忆标记，结合交叉注意力和门控残差融合增强VLA策略，解决长时程机器人操作中的历史依赖问题。
AI.motivation: 长时程机器人操作中，相似观察可能出现在不同执行阶段，而适当动作依赖于已完成的先前操作。现有记忆增强方法要么保留需要压缩的密集历史，要么主要依赖可能丢弃早期任务相关事件的近期上下文。
AI.method: KEMO结合机器人运动学和视觉过滤检测任务相关状态变化事件，将选定的关键帧编码为紧凑的时间有序记忆标记，通过交叉注意力和门控残差融合与当前视觉特征集成。检测到的事件还定义了关键转换附近的高权重训练样本。
AI.result: 在真实世界双臂操作任务（2-6个子任务，轨迹长度830-2846步，持续时间28-95秒）上评估，相比无记忆基线，KEMO将总体任务成功率提高23.6%，阶段完成率提高34.1%。消融实验显示事件驱动关键帧选择优于均匀采样和近期帧保留，门控融合和关键帧对齐损失加权提供互补增益。
AI.conclusion: KEMO通过事件驱动关键帧选择、紧凑记忆编码和门控融合机制，有效解决了长时程机器人操作中的历史依赖问题，显著提升了任务成功率和阶段完成率。

title: SAGE: An Expert-Annotated South Asian GI Endoscopy Dataset for Multimodal Learning and Hallucination Analysis
summary: Gastrointestinal cancers represent a growing health burden in the South Asian region, driven largely by rapid changes in socio-economic conditions & lifestyle habits. However, early diagnosis of such malignancies remains a significant challenge, largely due to a lack of modern equipment, lack of financial support, and a scarcity of GI experts. AI-assisted diagnosis & report generation, show great promise in alleviating this problem by providing low-skill manpower the technical expertise to perform diagnosis. However, almost all open-source, publicly available datasets are predominantly collected from the European region, with no representation from the South Asian region. The lack of open-source GI datasets from diverse geographic regions has made it difficult to assess whether population bias is present in existing models, and to develop geographically inclusive AI tools for automated GI diagnosis. To address this gap, we introduce SAGE: An Expert-Annotated South Asian GI Endoscopy dataset for image captioning, multi-label classification, and visual question answering (VQA) tasks. It consists of 1,300 images, their captions along with hallucination tag, 18 labels and 14,726 question-answer pairs making it well-suited for diverse range of tasks including classification, benchmarking, and fine-tuning large multimodal models (LMMs). We further conducted benchmarking of multi-class classifiers on the effect of population shift in GI imaging AI tasks, and contemporary LMMs on their performance. Our study reveals that task-specific models, such as multi-class classification models, suffer the most, with an average performance drop of 58% when evaluated on the South Asian dataset. For contemporary LMMs, benchmarking reveals a substantial drop in the average GREEN score for anatomical landmark detection (0.308) and abnormality detection (0.410).

AI.tldr: SAGE是一个专家标注的南亚胃肠内窥镜数据集，包含1300张图像、标注、18个标签和14,726个问答对，用于图像描述、多标签分类和视觉问答任务，旨在解决现有数据集主要来自欧洲地区、缺乏地理多样性的问题。
AI.motivation: 南亚地区胃肠道癌症负担日益加重，但早期诊断面临设备不足、资金缺乏和专家稀缺等挑战。现有公开数据集主要来自欧洲地区，缺乏南亚地区数据，导致无法评估现有模型是否存在人口偏见，也难以开发具有地理包容性的AI辅助诊断工具。
AI.method: 创建SAGE数据集，包含1300张南亚胃肠内窥镜图像，每张图像配有专家标注的描述（含幻觉标签）、18个分类标签和14,726个问答对。使用该数据集对多类分类模型和当代大型多模态模型进行基准测试，评估人口偏移对模型性能的影响。
AI.result: 任务特定模型（如多类分类模型）在南亚数据集上平均性能下降58%。当代大型多模态模型在解剖标志检测的GREEN分数下降0.308，异常检测下降0.410，显示存在显著性能下降。
AI.conclusion: SAGE数据集填补了南亚胃肠内窥镜数据的空白，揭示了现有AI模型在南亚人群数据上存在显著性能下降，强调了开发地理包容性AI工具的重要性，并为多模态模型在医疗领域的应用提供了基准。

title: Drowning in Routine: Signal Dilution in Multi-Turn Agent Training
comment: Accepted at the FAGEN Workshop at ICML 2026, Seoul, South Korea. 14 pages, 9 figures
summary: Multi-turn agents interleave consequential decisions with routine execution: some actions change the downstream return distribution, while others are necessary but reward-equivalent. The cost of trajectory-level credit assignment, often attributed to long horizons, is in fact governed by decision density $ρ$: the fraction of turns whose actions affect the return. When decision density is low, routine turns create signal dilution: they add gradient variance to trajectory-level estimators such as GRPO without adding expected signal. Under explicit assumptions, the resulting turn-level to trajectory-level signal-to-noise ratio scales as $ρ^{-1/2}$, provided critic error remains controlled. The same analysis identifies the complementary regime: at high decision density, trajectory-level methods can remain competitive while avoiding the cost of a critic. In a controlled environment where $ρ$ is exactly tunable, the predicted scaling is recovered with $R^2 = 0.999$, and the training-step gap widens significantly as $ρ\to 0$.

AI.tldr: 论文分析了多轮智能体中决策密度对信用分配效率的影响，发现低决策密度会导致信号稀释，使轨迹级估计器（如GRPO）的梯度方差增加，提出了决策密度与信号噪声比的量化关系。
AI.motivation: 研究多轮智能体中决策密度对信用分配效率的影响，解决轨迹级信用分配成本高的问题，特别是在决策密度低时信号稀释导致的训练效率下降。
AI.method: 通过理论分析建立决策密度与信号噪声比的量化关系，在可控环境中精确调节决策密度进行实验验证，使用轨迹级估计器（如GRPO）作为基准方法。
AI.result: 理论预测的缩放关系（决策密度ρ的-1/2次方）在实验中得到高度验证（R²=0.999），当决策密度趋近于0时，训练步数差距显著扩大。
AI.conclusion: 决策密度是影响多轮智能体信用分配效率的关键因素，低密度时轨迹级方法效率低下，高密度时仍可保持竞争力，为选择合适的学习方法提供了理论指导。

title: Real-Time Multimodal Activity-Aware Error Detection in Robot-Assisted Surgery
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: Robot-assisted minimally invasive surgery improves surgical precision but introduces complexity, making technical error detection essential for ensuring patient safety. Current executional error detection methods using video data often overlook fine-grained contextual descriptions of activities and error types within the hierarchical structure of surgical procedures. They also under-utilize complementary multimodal information. We propose a unified framework for executional error detection that leverages multimodal input, including video, kinematics, and descriptive textual prompts. Through activity prompting, we integrate descriptive language in gesture-level activities, instrument-object interactions, and error definitions. We also introduce activity-aware visual embeddings derived from vision encoders pretrained on surgical activity labels to compare the effectiveness of contrastive language-image embeddings with traditional image-based embeddings for error detection. By seamlessly integrating kinematic data with video and textual modalities, our framework significantly improves error detection performance. Achieving up to 5\% and 16.6\% F1 score improvements over state-of-the-art baselines on the JIGSAWS and SAR-RARP50 datasets, respectively, we demonstrate the value of combining curated textual prompts with multimodal data for accurate error detection.

AI.tldr: 提出统一多模态框架，利用视频、运动学和文本提示进行手术执行错误检测，通过活动提示和活动感知视觉嵌入提升性能
AI.motivation: 机器人辅助微创手术提高了手术精度但增加了复杂性，需要技术错误检测来确保患者安全。当前基于视频的错误检测方法忽略了手术程序层次结构中活动的细粒度上下文描述和错误类型，且未充分利用互补的多模态信息。
AI.method: 提出统一多模态框架，整合视频、运动学和描述性文本提示。通过活动提示集成手势级活动、器械-对象交互和错误定义的描述性语言。引入基于手术活动标签预训练的视觉编码器生成活动感知视觉嵌入，比较对比语言-图像嵌入与传统图像嵌入的效果。无缝整合运动学数据与其他模态。
AI.result: 在JIGSAWS和SAR-RARP50数据集上，相比最先进基线分别实现了最高5%和16.6%的F1分数提升，证明了结合精心设计的文本提示与多模态数据对于准确错误检测的价值。
AI.conclusion: 提出的多模态框架通过整合视频、运动学和文本提示，显著提高了手术执行错误检测性能，展示了多模态数据和描述性语言在手术错误检测中的重要性。

title: Improving Reasoning in Vision-Language Models via Perception Verified Self-Training
summary: Achieving human-like reasoning in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) remains a long-standing challenge. Recent approaches leverage Chain-of-Thought (CoT) rationales generated by human annotators or proprietary models to improve reasoning, which is costly and difficult to scale. Self-training offers a promising alternative by using models own outputs as supervision. However, existing methods often suffer from visual hallucinations -- where rationales describe non-existent visual content, and language shortcuts -- where predictions rely on textual priors rather than true visual grounding, as rationales are typically filtered only by answer correctness without verifying visual perception. To address this limitation, we propose a perception-verified self-training framework that enforces visually grounded reasoning. First, our method employs a CoT template (caption-reasoning-conclusion) that disentangles perception from reasoning, enabling independent verification of visual understanding. To compensate for the absence of ground-truth captions, we propose PerceptEval, an unsupervised method that evaluates caption quality based on its alignment with visual and textual elements present in the image. Using caption verification together with answer correctness, we partition the data into three subsets: easy (correct caption and conclusion), medium (correct caption but incorrect conclusion), and hard (incorrect caption). Building on this partitioning, we design a two-stage curriculum learning strategy. In Stage 1, the model is trained on easy examples and subsequently in Stage 2, medium samples are incorporated through a caption-guided reasoning enhancement procedure that regenerates reasoning conditioned on verified captions. Only regenerated samples with the correct conclusions are retained.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种感知验证的自训练框架，通过解耦感知与推理，使用无监督的PerceptEval方法评估字幕质量，并结合答案正确性将数据分为三个难度等级，采用两阶段课程学习策略来减少视觉幻觉和语言捷径问题。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉语言模型在实现类人推理方面面临挑战。现有方法依赖人工标注或专有模型生成的思维链，成本高且难以扩展。自训练方法虽然可行，但存在视觉幻觉（推理描述不存在的视觉内容）和语言捷径（预测依赖文本先验而非真实视觉基础）的问题，因为现有方法通常只通过答案正确性过滤，缺乏对视觉感知的验证。
AI.method: 提出感知验证的自训练框架：1）使用"字幕-推理-结论"的思维链模板，将感知与推理解耦；2）提出无监督的PerceptEval方法，基于字幕与图像中视觉和文本元素的对齐度评估字幕质量；3）结合字幕验证和答案正确性，将数据分为简单（字幕和结论都正确）、中等（字幕正确但结论错误）和困难（字幕错误）三个子集；4）设计两阶段课程学习策略：第一阶段训练简单样本，第二阶段通过字幕引导的推理增强程序，在验证的字幕条件下重新生成推理，只保留结论正确的样本。
AI.result: 该方法通过强制视觉基础推理，减少了视觉幻觉和语言捷径问题，实现了更可靠的视觉语言模型自训练，为扩展视觉语言模型的推理能力提供了一条可扩展的途径。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提出的感知验证自训练框架通过解耦感知与推理、无监督字幕质量评估和课程学习策略，有效解决了视觉语言模型自训练中的视觉幻觉和语言捷径问题，为实现可扩展的类人推理提供了有前景的方向。

title: Early-Exit Graph Neural Networks for Link Prediction
summary: Graph Neural Networks are great for link prediction in various network-like structures; however, the question of their speed/quality tradeoff has been barely studied. While in practice the time it takes to do inference matters little for small benchmarks, the latency does limit applicability in large-scale domains. In this work, we explore early-exiting strategies that can be applied to Graph Neural Networks to solve the problem of link-prediction faster. We use no auxiliary losses to enforce early exiting, allowing it to emerge as an implicit property of the architecture. We show that our method enables early exiting in several setups, moving the Pareto frontier on the HeaRT benchmark for GCN and SAS-GNN backbones. Our findings show that inference speed of GNNs on many link-prediction problems can be improved, while losing little, or even winning in terms of prediction quality. The code is available in our repository: https://github.com/knyazer/link_prediction.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种用于图神经网络的早期退出策略，以加速链接预测任务，无需额外损失函数，在多个设置下实现了速度与质量的帕累托前沿改进。
AI.motivation: 图神经网络在链接预测中表现出色，但其速度/质量权衡问题研究不足。虽然在小规模基准测试中推理时间影响不大，但在大规模应用中延迟成为限制因素。需要探索能够加速图神经网络链接预测的方法。
AI.method: 采用早期退出策略，无需辅助损失函数来强制早期退出，而是让早期退出作为架构的隐含属性自然出现。该方法适用于GCN和SAS-GNN等多种骨干网络。
AI.result: 在HeaRT基准测试中，该方法为GCN和SAS-GNN骨干网络移动了帕累托前沿。实验表明，在许多链接预测问题上，图神经网络的推理速度可以得到显著提升，同时预测质量损失很小甚至有所提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过早期退出策略，图神经网络在链接预测任务中的推理速度可以得到有效提升，同时保持甚至提升预测质量，为解决大规模应用中的延迟问题提供了有效方案。

title: Autonomous Subsea Cable Search and Tracking with Graph-Optimised Priors and Visual Tracking
summary: Global communications rely on subsea cable infrastructure that remains vulnerable to damage from natural hazards and human activity. Autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs) offer an efficient means to inspect long sections of exposed cable, but uncertainty in cable route maps, small cable diameters and partial burial makes continuous tracking a challenge. This paper presents a novel cable search and tracking method that leverages uncertain prior cable route maps. Graph-based optimisation continuously update the cable route to remain consistent with visual observations. Route uncertainty is constrained as a function of distance from observations using physics-based catenary models that account for cable parameters (i.e., lay depth, diameter, and density), bounding the search space to physically feasible regions and improving search efficiency. Cable detection is performed using a semi-supervised classifier running in real-time on-board a camera-equipped AUV. These detections both update the graph-based optimisation and enable visual cable tracking. When tracking is lost due to misclassification, burial or imperfect control, the bounded search space enables efficient recovery. The approach was demonstrated in field trials using the University of Southampton's Smarty200 AUV. The system successfully located the cable despite deliberate errors in it initial cable route map, updating this to be consistent with observations and using visual tracking to inspect up to 59% of a 120m test cable, with successful recovered after tracking loss.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种利用不确定先验电缆路线图进行海底电缆搜索和跟踪的新方法，通过图优化和物理悬链线模型约束搜索空间，结合半监督分类器实现实时电缆检测，在实地试验中成功定位并跟踪电缆。
AI.motivation: 全球通信依赖海底电缆基础设施，但这些电缆容易受到自然灾害和人类活动损坏。自主水下航行器（AUV）是检查长距离暴露电缆的有效手段，但由于电缆路线图的不确定性、电缆直径小以及部分埋藏等因素，连续跟踪面临挑战。需要一种能够处理先验信息不确定性并实现高效搜索和跟踪的方法。
AI.method: 提出了一种新颖的电缆搜索和跟踪方法：1）利用不确定的先验电缆路线图；2）通过图优化持续更新电缆路线以保持与视觉观测的一致性；3）使用基于物理的悬链线模型约束路线不确定性，考虑电缆参数（铺设深度、直径和密度），将搜索空间限制在物理可行区域；4）采用半监督分类器在配备摄像头的AUV上实时进行电缆检测；5）检测结果既更新图优化，又支持视觉电缆跟踪；6）当跟踪因误分类、埋藏或控制不完美而丢失时，有界搜索空间支持高效恢复。
AI.result: 在南安普顿大学Smarty200 AUV的实地试验中，系统成功定位了电缆，尽管初始电缆路线图存在故意错误。系统能够更新路线图以与观测保持一致，并使用视觉跟踪检查了120米测试电缆的59%，在跟踪丢失后成功恢复。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够有效处理先验电缆路线图的不确定性，通过图优化和物理约束提高搜索效率，结合实时检测实现可靠的电缆跟踪和恢复，为海底电缆的自主检查和维护提供了实用解决方案。

title: From Convolution to Transformer: A Comparative Study of U-Net Variants for Brain Tumor and Retinal Vessel Segmentation
summary: Medical image segmentation plays an important role in computer aided diagnosis, treatment planning, and disease monitoring. U-Net has been widely used for biomedical image segmentation because of its encoder decoder structure and skip connections. However, conventional convolution based U-Net models may have limited ability to capture long range dependencies and global contextual information, which can affect performance in complex segmentation tasks. This paper presents a comparative study of five U-Net based architectures: U-Net 3D, Residual U-Net, Attention U-Net, UNETR, and Swin UNETR. The models are evaluated on two benchmark datasets: BraTS 2023 for brain tumor segmentation and DRIVE for retinal vessel segmentation. Experimental results show that Swin UNETR achieves the best overall performance, with Dice scores of 0.8965 on BraTS 2023 and 0.8078 on DRIVE. The results suggest that transformer based U-Net variants are effective for segmentation tasks requiring global contextual modeling, while residual learning remains useful for fine structure segmentation. This study provides practical insights into model selection for medical image segmentation across volumetric MRI and retinal imaging tasks.

AI.tldr: 该研究比较了五种基于U-Net的医学图像分割架构，发现Swin UNETR在脑肿瘤和视网膜血管分割任务中表现最佳，表明基于Transformer的U-Net变体在需要全局上下文建模的任务中更有效。
AI.motivation: 传统基于卷积的U-Net模型在捕捉长距离依赖和全局上下文信息方面能力有限，这可能影响复杂分割任务的性能。因此需要比较不同U-Net变体在医学图像分割中的效果。
AI.method: 比较了五种U-Net架构：U-Net 3D、Residual U-Net、Attention U-Net、UNETR和Swin UNETR。在两个基准数据集上评估：BraTS 2023（脑肿瘤分割）和DRIVE（视网膜血管分割）。
AI.result: Swin UNETR获得最佳整体性能，在BraTS 2023上Dice分数为0.8965，在DRIVE上为0.8078。基于Transformer的U-Net变体在需要全局上下文建模的任务中表现优异，而残差学习在精细结构分割中仍然有用。
AI.conclusion: Swin UNETR在医学图像分割中表现最佳，特别是对于需要全局上下文建模的任务。该研究为医学图像分割模型选择提供了实用见解，特别是在体素MRI和视网膜成像任务中。

title: Beyond Time Series: Spatial Reasoning for Epidemic Forecasting via Multimodal Learning
comment: To appear in the Proceedings of the 32nd ACM SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining (KDD 2026), AI for Science Track
summary: Epidemic forecasting models typically rely on surveillance data reported over administrative regions, treating them as atomic units, thereby obscuring sub-regional spatial structure that shapes disease dynamics. We introduce a spatially structured multimodal epidemic forecasting setting that integrates region-level temporal surveillance data with spatially localized auxiliary signals that are misaligned in resolution and structure, reflecting realistic public health reporting constraints. Building on this formulation, we propose M-SPICE (Multimodal SPatIal Context for Epidemic Forecasting), a structure-aware spatiotemporal forecasting framework that performs joint reasoning over temporal disease dynamics and spatial context via attention-based multimodal fusion, allowing spatial signals to selectively condition temporal representations across forecast horizons. We evaluate our approach on real-world COVID-19, influenza, and influenza-like illness (ILI) forecasting tasks under realistic real-time evaluation protocols. Across all forecasting settings, our method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art multivariate time-series, multimodal, and epidemiological forecasting baselines while maintaining strong probabilistic forecasting performance. Finally, interpretability analyses reveal when, where, and how spatial signals are leveraged, highlighting settings in which purely temporal, region-aggregated models are most likely to fail.

AI.tldr: M-SPICE是一个用于流行病预测的多模态空间上下文框架，通过整合区域级时间监测数据和空间局部辅助信号，在保持强概率预测性能的同时，显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 传统流行病预测模型通常依赖行政区划的监测数据，将其视为原子单元，从而忽略了塑造疾病动态的亚区域空间结构。需要一种能够整合分辨率不匹配的空间局部辅助信号的方法，以反映现实公共卫生报告约束。
AI.method: 提出了M-SPICE（多模态空间上下文流行病预测）框架，通过基于注意力的多模态融合，在时间疾病动态和空间上下文之间进行联合推理，允许空间信号选择性地调节不同预测时间范围的时间表示。
AI.result: 在COVID-19、流感和流感样疾病（ILI）预测任务中，M-SPICE在现实实时评估协议下，始终优于最先进的多变量时间序列、多模态和流行病学预测基线，同时保持强大的概率预测性能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了整合空间局部信号对提升流行病预测准确性的重要性，可解释性分析揭示了空间信号在何时、何地以及如何被利用，突出了纯时间、区域聚合模型最可能失败的情况。

title: RECALL: Recovery Experience Collection for Active Lifelong Learning in Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models are commonly fine-tuned through passive imitation learning, where additional demonstrations are collected for tasks where the policy performs poorly. This approach incurs several downsides: it requires the robot to fail before data collection is triggered, provides little guidance about which states require supervision, and wastes demonstrator effort on redundant parts of the task where the policy already performs well. In this paper, we propose an active, continual learning paradigm for VLAs. We demonstrate that active, uncertainty-guided data collection leads to more efficient fine-tuning than when using passively-collected demonstrations. However, we also find that fine-tuning only on actively-collected recovery data leads to catastrophic forgetting. We evaluate techniques for continual learning, including replay-based data mixing and elastic weight consolidation, and identify tradeoffs between plasticity to uncertainty-guided recovery data and retention of previously learned behaviors. Overall, our work contributes an empirical study of active continual learning for autoregressive VLAs, establishing that uncertainty-guided recovery demonstrations can improve adaptation efficiency while also revealing open challenges when targeted new data is incorporated into large robot policies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种主动持续学习范式用于视觉-语言-动作模型，通过不确定性引导的数据收集提高微调效率，但发现仅使用主动收集的恢复数据会导致灾难性遗忘，并评估了多种持续学习技术的权衡。
AI.motivation: 传统被动模仿学习存在多个缺点：需要机器人先失败才能触发数据收集、缺乏对哪些状态需要监督的指导、以及浪费演示者在策略已经表现良好的冗余任务上的努力。
AI.method: 提出主动持续学习范式，使用不确定性引导的数据收集来识别需要额外监督的状态，并评估了基于回放的数据混合和弹性权重巩固等持续学习技术。
AI.result: 不确定性引导的数据收集比被动收集的演示更有效地提高微调效率，但仅使用主动收集的恢复数据进行微调会导致灾难性遗忘，需要在可塑性和保留性之间权衡。
AI.conclusion: 主动持续学习能提高视觉-语言-动作模型的适应效率，但将针对性新数据整合到大型机器人策略中仍面临挑战，需要在不确定性引导的恢复数据和先前学习行为保留之间找到平衡。

title: Dual-Stream EEG Decoding for 3D Visual Perception
comment: 17 pages, 4 figures. Accepted at the Symmetry and Geometry in Neural Representations Workshop (NeurReps), NeurIPS 2025. To appear in Proceedings of Machine Learning Research (PMLR)
summary: This paper explores a novel brain decoding model for 3D shape perception through a dual pathway architecture mirroring biological vision. Our bio-inspired approach implements separate decoding modules for object identity and spatial orientation, inspired by ventral and dorsal pathways, during continuous rotations. We employ circular regression for angle prediction and develop EEG-conditioned multiview diffusion for 3D reconstruction. Our approach successfully decodes both object identity and spatial orientation from EEG signals and enables 3D reconstruction from neural activity, with interpretability analyses revealing temporally structured involvement of ventral, dorsal, and motor-related channels rather than a static ventral dominance in supporting object and angle decoding.

AI.tldr: 基于双通路架构的脑解码模型，通过模仿生物视觉的腹侧和背侧通路，从EEG信号中解码3D形状感知，包括物体身份和空间朝向，并实现3D重建。
AI.motivation: 受生物视觉系统启发，开发能够从脑电信号中解码3D形状感知的模型，特别是同时解码物体身份和空间朝向信息，这有助于理解大脑如何处理复杂视觉信息。
AI.method: 采用双通路架构，分别对应腹侧和背侧通路，处理物体身份和空间朝向解码。使用环形回归进行角度预测，并开发了EEG条件多视图扩散模型进行3D重建。
AI.result: 成功从EEG信号中解码物体身份和空间朝向，实现了从神经活动到3D形状的重建。可解释性分析显示腹侧、背侧和运动相关通道的时变结构参与，而非静态的腹侧主导模式。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了基于生物启发的双通路架构能够有效解码3D形状感知，揭示了大脑处理物体和空间信息时动态的神经机制，为脑机接口和神经科学研究提供了新方法。

title: Gated MLPs as Symmetry-Broken Rank-1 Bilinear Attention
summary: We show that the conventional gated MLP can be viewed as a rank-1 approximation to a bilinear attention mechanism with two distinct factors corresponding to the query and the key. We further show that moving the nonlinearity onto one factor breaks the exchange symmetry between the two factors and, for non-homogeneous activations, the inverse-scaling symmetry as well. This perspective may help explain why gated MLPs are effective in practice and inform the design of future architectures.

AI.tldr: 论文提出传统门控MLP可视为双线性注意力机制的秩1近似，其中两个因子分别对应查询和键。将非线性移到其中一个因子会打破因子间的交换对称性，对于非齐次激活函数还会破坏逆尺度对称性。
AI.motivation: 从理论角度解释为什么门控MLP在实践中表现有效，为未来架构设计提供理论指导。通过揭示门控MLP与双线性注意力机制的内在联系，帮助理解其工作机制。
AI.method: 将传统门控MLP重新解释为双线性注意力机制的秩1近似，分析其对称性特征。研究将非线性移到其中一个因子对对称性的影响，特别是交换对称性和逆尺度对称性。
AI.result: 证明了门控MLP是双线性注意力机制的特殊近似形式，揭示了其对称性特性。发现移动非线性会破坏因子间的交换对称性，对于非齐次激活函数还会破坏逆尺度对称性。
AI.conclusion: 这一理论视角有助于解释门控MLP的实际有效性，并为未来神经网络架构的设计提供理论依据。通过理解门控MLP与注意力机制的联系，可以指导更有效的架构创新。

title: dVLA-RL: Reinforcement Learning over Denoising Trajectories for Discrete Diffusion Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have established a powerful paradigm for generalist robotic manipulation by grounding control into the semantic reasoning of VLMs. Prevailing architectures typically model actions continuously via diffusion or flow processes, or discretely through either autoregressive generation or parallel decoding. Recently, Discrete Diffusion VLAs (dVLAs) have emerged as a distinct alternative, unifying vision, language, and action into a single discrete token space via masked generative modeling. While combining iterative refinement with unified representations, its training has thus far been restricted to Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT), leaving the potential of Reinforcement Learning (RL) for further policy refinement largely unexplored. A fundamental challenge in RL for dVLAs is that the marginal probability of the final action generated by dVLAs remains intractable. To solve this problem, we propose \textbf{dVLA-RL}, shifting the learning objective from the marginal action probability to the joint probability of the sampled generation path. Specifically, by modeling the denoising process as a Markov Decision Process (MDP), we mathematically formulate this path probability as a product of step-wise transitions. This trajectory-level objective provides a unified formulation that natively accommodates variable denoising steps. Leveraging this intrinsic fexibility, we introduce a unified step scheduling approach for complex multi-task learning, tailoring denoising steps to specific task complexities to maximize both success rates and computational effciency. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that our approach achieves a success rate of \textbf{99.7\%} on LIBERO. Furthermore, it establishes strong VLA-based results on RoboTwin 2.0 by delivering a \textbf{30.6\%} improvement over the SFT baseline, remaining competitive with strong World-Action Model baselines.

AI.tldr: dVLA-RL：一种将离散扩散VLA模型与强化学习结合的新方法，通过将去噪过程建模为MDP，将学习目标从边缘动作概率转移到采样生成路径的联合概率，实现了对复杂多任务的自适应步长调度，在机器人操作任务上取得了显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: 离散扩散VLA模型（dVLAs）将视觉、语言和动作统一到单个离散标记空间，但现有训练仅限于监督微调，未能充分利用强化学习进行策略优化。主要挑战在于dVLAs生成最终动作的边缘概率难以计算，限制了RL的应用。
AI.method: 提出dVLA-RL方法，将去噪过程建模为马尔可夫决策过程，将学习目标从边缘动作概率转移到采样生成路径的联合概率。通过轨迹级目标函数，统一支持可变去噪步长。引入统一步长调度方法，根据任务复杂度自适应调整去噪步长，平衡成功率和计算效率。
AI.result: 在LIBERO基准上达到99.7%的成功率；在RoboTwin 2.0上相比SFT基线提升30.6%，与世界-动作模型基线保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: dVLA-RL成功将强化学习应用于离散扩散VLA模型，通过路径概率优化和自适应步长调度，显著提升了机器人操作性能，为VLA模型的RL优化提供了新范式。

title: Resolving Multi-Target Association in OFDM-based ISAC via Vision-aided Multi-Modal Learning
summary: Orthogonal frequency division multiplexing (OFDM)-based integrated sensing and communication (ISAC) systems commonly extract target parameters by peak-searching a delay-Doppler map (DDM) constructed from reflected pilots. In multi-target scenarios, this results in ambiguity: the DDM does not reveal which physical target produced which peak, and two targets within the same delay-Doppler resolution cell cannot be separated. We propose a vision-assisted OFDM-ISAC framework that resolves both limitations by fusing wireless and visual modalities. The transmitter encodes an onboard street-view image with deep joint source-channel coding (DeepJSCC) and transmits it over the same OFDM waveform used for sensing; the receiver reconstructs the image, runs a fine-tuned YOLOv5 detector and fuses the resulting per-target features (bounding-box coordinates and class labels) with the DDM and transmitter-receiver geometry through a learned multi-modal network. To stabilize training of the high dimensional delay and Doppler classifiers, we introduce a Kullback Leibler loss against triangular soft labels centered on the ground-truth bin. On a Blender-rendered vehicular testbed, the proposed framework achieves a 16 cm localization root mean square error (RMSE) and a 10.8 ns delay RMSE. An ablation study confirms that removing the visual modality causes a 60x degradation in localization. These results highlight the potential of vision to overcome the data-association and resolution limits of single-modality ISAC.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种视觉辅助的OFDM集成感知与通信系统，通过融合无线和视觉模态来解决多目标场景中的目标关联和分辨率限制问题
AI.motivation: 传统OFDM-ISAC系统在多目标场景中存在两个主要问题：1）延迟-多普勒图无法确定哪个物理目标产生哪个峰值（目标关联模糊）；2）同一分辨率单元内的两个目标无法分离。单模态ISAC存在这些数据关联和分辨率限制
AI.method: 提出视觉辅助OFDM-ISAC框架：1）发射器使用深度联合源信道编码将街景图像编码，并通过用于感知的相同OFDM波形传输；2）接收器重建图像，运行微调的YOLOv5检测器；3）通过学习的多模态网络将目标特征（边界框坐标和类别标签）与延迟-多普勒图及发射器-接收器几何信息融合；4）引入基于KL散度的三角软标签损失来稳定高维延迟和多普勒分类器的训练
AI.result: 在Blender渲染的车辆测试平台上，该框架实现了16厘米的定位均方根误差和10.8纳秒的延迟均方根误差。消融研究表明，移除视觉模态会导致定位性能下降60倍
AI.conclusion: 视觉辅助能够克服单模态ISAC的数据关联和分辨率限制，展示了视觉在无线感知系统中的巨大潜力。多模态融合为ISAC系统提供了更强大的目标检测和参数估计能力

title: Residue-Level Attributions in Protein Language Models Do Not Recover Allergen Epitopes
comment: Accepted at the ICML 2026 Mechanistic Interpretability Workshop (peer-reviewed)
summary: Deep allergenicity classifiers are increasingly used in safety screening of novel foods, and recent protein language models have substantially improved protein-level allergenicity prediction. However, whether their explanations capture biologically meaningful information remains unclear. We introduce an epitope-grounded residue-level benchmark for quantitatively evaluating attribution faithfulness in protein allergenicity models. Across frozen ESM-2, multi-task ESM-2, and DeepPlantAllergy, protein-level classification was robust, yet classification-head explanation signals did not significantly exceed random in their residue-level alignment with annotated epitopes across AUROC, AUPRC, and Precision@k. Integrated Gradients identified residues that were functionally important to the model, but not overlapping annotated epitopes. Saturation mutagenesis further suggested classifiers may rely on physicochemical and compositional sequence features rather than epitope-specific mechanisms. Residue-level importance signals should therefore not be interpreted as immunological explanations for safety screening or hypoallergen design without quantitative validation. Code available: https://github.com/Jeffateth/XAllergen2.0-paper

AI.tldr: 该研究评估了深度过敏原性分类器的解释可靠性，发现虽然蛋白质级分类准确，但模型解释与已知表位缺乏显著关联，不应将其视为免疫学解释用于安全筛选。
AI.motivation: 尽管蛋白质语言模型显著提升了蛋白质级过敏原性预测，但其解释是否捕捉到生物学上有意义的信息（特别是表位信息）仍不明确，需要定量评估。
AI.method: 引入基于表位的残基级基准，定量评估蛋白质过敏原性模型的归因忠实性。测试了冻结的ESM-2、多任务ESM-2和DeepPlantAllergy模型，使用AUROC、AUPRC和Precision@k等指标评估解释信号与注释表位的对齐程度，并采用集成梯度分析和饱和诱变。
AI.result: 蛋白质级分类稳健，但分类头解释信号与注释表位的残基级对齐在统计上不显著优于随机。集成梯度识别出对模型重要的残基，但这些残基与注释表位不重叠。饱和诱变表明分类器可能依赖理化性质和组成序列特征而非表位特异性机制。
AI.conclusion: 残基级重要性信号不应在未经定量验证的情况下被解释为免疫学解释，用于安全筛选或低过敏原设计，因为模型可能依赖非表位机制进行预测。

title: Learning to See While Learning to Act: Diffusion Models for Active Perception in Robot Imitation
summary: Most imitation learning methods assume full observability in table-top settings. In practice, objects are often occluded, requiring robots to both search and act, and learning this coupled behavior from limited demonstrations remains challenging. We propose See2Act, an imitation learning approach that conditions action prediction on a sequence of actively-inferred viewpoints at test time, by coupling action denoising with viewpoint refinement. The policy is trained using camera poses anchored to keyframe actions from offline demonstrations, enabling implicit learning of where to see, while learning how to act. We empirically demonstrate that in Ravens the policy recovers informative viewpoints under severe occlusions, and on RLBench tasks it improves performance by up to 34% over prior methods. In the real world, we collect 50 demonstrations in a digital twin and achieve zero-shot sim-to-real transfer on pick-and-place tasks using depth observations. The policy handles significant occlusions, showing that learned viewpoint reasoning enables robust manipulation under partial observability.

AI.tldr: See2Act是一种模仿学习方法，通过将动作去噪与视角细化耦合，在测试时基于主动推断的视角序列来预测动作，从而在部分可观测环境下实现鲁棒操作。
AI.motivation: 大多数模仿学习方法假设桌面场景下完全可观测，但实际中物体常被遮挡，机器人需要同时搜索和行动。从有限演示中学习这种耦合行为具有挑战性。
AI.method: 提出See2Act方法，在测试时基于主动推断的视角序列来条件化动作预测，通过将动作去噪与视角细化耦合。使用离线演示中关键帧动作锚定的相机位姿进行训练，隐式学习"看哪里"的同时学习"如何行动"。
AI.result: 在Ravens中，策略能在严重遮挡下恢复信息丰富的视角；在RLBench任务上，性能比先前方法提升34%；在真实世界中，通过数字孪生收集50个演示，使用深度观测实现零样本仿真到真实迁移，处理显著遮挡。
AI.conclusion: 学习的视角推理能力使策略在部分可观测条件下实现鲁棒操作，See2Act方法有效解决了遮挡环境下的模仿学习问题。

title: Multi4D: High-Fidelity Dynamic Gaussian Splatting via Multi-Level Competitive Allocation
summary: Dynamic 3D Gaussian splatting faces a fundamental tension between motion consistency and visual fidelity. Deformation-based approaches preserve temporal correspondence but suffer from motion over-factorization, oversmoothing high-frequency dynamics. In contrast, 4D-primitive methods capture fine visual details yet incur temporal overparameterization, breaking object identity and leading to severe storage overhead. To resolve this, we introduce Multi4D, a framework for high-fidelity dynamic Gaussian Splatting based on multi-level competitive allocation. Instead of a monolithic representation, we distribute modeling capacity across three structured levels: static structure, persistent dynamic geometry, and transient appearance primitives. Through shared rasterization and residual-driven optimization, these levels dynamically compete to explain photometric error, enabling adaptive specialization without pre-assigned decomposition. This allocation preserves long-term motion consistency while capturing fine dynamic detail, achieving state-of-the-art rendering quality and real-time performance with significantly fewer dynamic primitives. Furthermore, because our representation explicitly tracks compact persistent Gaussians over time, semantic features can be embedded afterward, enabling Multi4D to achieve state-of-the-art 4D segmentation accuracy with an order-of-magnitude speedup. Project page: https://batfacewayne.github.io/Multi4D.io/

AI.tldr: Multi4D是一个用于高保真动态高斯溅射的框架，通过多级竞争分配解决动态3D高斯表示中运动一致性和视觉保真度的矛盾。
AI.motivation: 现有动态3D高斯表示方法存在根本矛盾：基于变形的方法保持时间一致性但会过度分解运动，平滑化高频动态；而4D基元方法能捕捉精细视觉细节但会导致时间过度参数化，破坏对象一致性并带来巨大存储开销。
AI.method: 采用多级竞争分配框架，将建模能力分布在三个结构化层级：静态结构、持久动态几何和瞬态外观基元。通过共享光栅化和残差驱动优化，这些层级动态竞争解释光度误差，实现自适应专业化而无需预分配分解。
AI.result: 在保持长期运动一致性的同时捕捉精细动态细节，实现了最先进的渲染质量和实时性能，且使用显著更少的动态基元。此外，通过显式跟踪紧凑持久高斯，能够嵌入语义特征，实现最先进的4D分割精度，且速度提升一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: Multi4D通过多级竞争分配框架有效解决了动态3D高斯表示中的基本张力，在保持运动一致性的同时实现高视觉保真度，并为后续语义分析提供了高效基础。

title: Bayesian Adaptation Gym: A Benchmark for the Bayesian Low-Rank Adaptation of Multi-Modal Language Models
summary: Large multi-modal language models are increasingly deployed in high-stakes domains, making well-calibrated uncertainty essential. Traditional Bayesian methods approximate posteriors over all model weights, which becomes intractable for modern large models. For this reason, recent work instead considers Bayesian low-rank adaptation to enable tractable posterior approximation. Due to a lack of a standardized benchmark to evaluate these approaches, it remains unclear where these methods provide meaningful benefits. To fill this gap, we introduce Bayesian Adaptation Gym (BAG), a benchmark for the Bayesian adaptation of multi-modal language models. BAG provides reference implementations of classic Bayesian baselines and state-of-the-art adaptation methods, along with a multi-modal dataset and task suite designed to probe calibration, robustness under distribution shift, and decision-making under uncertainty via active learning. Using BAG, we conduct and report extensive experiments across model sizes, datasets, and tasks to highlight the successes and failures of current Bayesian adaptation approaches. To enable further research, BAG is fully open source: https://github.com/SRI-CSL/BayesAdapt.

AI.tldr: 该论文介绍了BAG基准测试，用于评估多模态语言模型的贝叶斯自适应方法，填补了该领域标准化评估工具的空白。
AI.motivation: 随着大型多模态语言模型在高风险领域的部署，准确的不确定性校准变得至关重要。传统的贝叶斯方法由于计算复杂性无法适用于现代大模型，而现有的贝叶斯低秩自适应方法缺乏标准化评估基准，难以确定其实际价值。
AI.method: 提出了贝叶斯自适应竞技场（BAG）基准测试，包含经典贝叶斯基线和最先进自适应方法的参考实现，以及专门设计的多模态数据集和任务套件，用于测试校准性能、分布偏移下的鲁棒性以及主动学习中的不确定性决策。
AI.result: 通过BAG进行了大规模实验，评估了不同模型规模、数据集和任务下的表现，揭示了当前贝叶斯自适应方法的成功与失败之处，为研究提供了实证基础。
AI.conclusion: BAG填补了多模态语言模型贝叶斯自适应评估的空白，提供了开源基准测试平台，有助于推动该领域的研究进展，特别是在不确定性校准和鲁棒性方面的改进。

title: Flatness Preserves Instruction Following in Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision-language-action (VLA) models have the potential for open-world generalization by leveraging pretrained vision-language representations, yet downstream finetuning on limited robot data often degrades these representations, leading to brittle policies that ignore language instructions in favor of visual shortcuts, a failure mode we term instruction blindness. We hypothesize that standard finetuning with limited data applies gradients to a sparse set of points, which manifests as a sharp loss landscape with high-curvature minima. We propose to address this directly through flatness-preserving optimization while finetuning on the exact same data, where learning a flatter landscape results in a model more robust to perturbations in the weight space. Specifically, we demonstrate that simply applying sharpness-aware minimization during VLA finetuning significantly improves instruction following by over 60% across multiple simulation and real-world benchmarks without additional data, architectural modification, or retraining. We further analyze the effect of selective sharpness, quantify its effects, and show that our approach is complementary to existing guidance techniques. Project page can be found at https://haochenz11.github.io/papers/flatness-vla/.

AI.tldr: VLA模型微调时容易产生"指令盲目"问题，通过平坦性保持优化（sharpness-aware minimization）可显著提升指令跟随能力60%以上，无需额外数据、架构修改或重新训练。
AI.motivation: VLA模型在有限机器人数据上微调时，会破坏预训练视觉语言表示，导致策略忽略语言指令而依赖视觉捷径，这种现象称为"指令盲目"。
AI.method: 在VLA微调过程中应用平坦性保持优化（sharpness-aware minimization），学习平坦的损失景观，使模型对权重空间扰动更鲁棒。
AI.result: 在多个仿真和真实世界基准测试中，指令跟随能力提升超过60%，无需额外数据、架构修改或重新训练。
AI.conclusion: 平坦性保持优化能有效解决VLA微调中的指令盲目问题，与现有指导技术互补，显著提升模型泛化能力。

title: MultiMem: Measuring and Mitigating Memorization in Multi-Modal Contrastive Learninga
comment: Accepted at The 19th European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV), 2026
summary: Memorization in machine learning models enables high performance on rare in-distribution samples by capturing their atypical patterns. However, it also causes harmful retention of noise and outliers, degrading generalization. While memorization has been extensively studied in both supervised and self-supervised learning in the vision domain, it remains unexplored in multi-modal contrastive learning. We address this gap by introducing MultiMem, the first metric designed to quantify memorization in multi-modal contrastive learning. Through our systematic analysis, we demonstrate that cross-modal semantic misalignment has the strongest influence on memorization, with text being the dominant modality driving memorization, followed by video, image, and audio. We show that targeted augmentations applied across all modalities effectively reduce memorization as measured by our MultiMem metric and improve model performance. Overall, this work establishes the first framework for measuring and mitigating memorization in multi-modal contrastive learning, preventing harmful data retention and contributing to higher-performing models.

AI.tldr: 提出首个用于量化多模态对比学习中记忆化的度量标准MultiMem，发现跨模态语义错位对记忆化影响最大，文本是驱动记忆化的主导模态，通过针对性数据增强可有效减少记忆化并提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 记忆化在机器学习中虽然能提升罕见分布内样本的性能，但也会导致噪声和异常值的有害保留，降低泛化能力。虽然记忆化在视觉领域的监督和自监督学习中已有广泛研究，但在多模态对比学习领域仍未被探索。
AI.method: 引入MultiMem度量标准来量化多模态对比学习中的记忆化，通过系统分析研究不同模态对记忆化的影响，并应用针对性的跨模态数据增强来减少记忆化。
AI.result: 跨模态语义错位对记忆化影响最大，文本是驱动记忆化的主导模态，其次是视频、图像和音频。通过针对性数据增强可有效减少MultiMem度量的记忆化并提升模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 建立了首个用于测量和缓解多模态对比学习中记忆化的框架，防止有害数据保留，有助于构建更高性能的模型。

title: L20-Edu-135M: An Auditable Single-GPU Study of Data-Efficient Small Language Modeling
summary: Small language models are cheap to serve and feasible on local hardware, but strong public 135M-class systems are commonly trained with hundreds of billions to trillions of tokens on large clusters. We study a sharply resource-constrained regime: a complete 134.5M-parameter language-model pipeline executed on one NVIDIA L20 GPU. The released checkpoint, L20-Edu-135M, receives approximately 13B pretraining tokens: 10B FineWeb-Edu tokens followed by a 3B-token educational, mathematics, code, and reasoning mixture. We document the architecture, data gates, cross-source MinHash/LSH near-deduplication, segment deduplication, benchmark-overlap removal, throughput optimization, supervised fine-tuning (SFT) with weight interpolation, and reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards (RLVR) on GSM8K. In a self-run zero-shot six-task harness, L20-Edu-135M obtains a mean score of 0.4150. It trails SmolLM-135M (0.4767) and SmolLM2-135M (0.4917), but its mean is 87.1% of SmolLM-135M's while its nominal token count is 2.17% as large. This ratio is descriptive, not evidence of statistical equivalence or a controlled scaling law. The model exceeds several older 100M-160M public baselines under the same harness. Direct GRPO-style RLVR decreases GSM8K exact-match accuracy from 1.82% to 1.59% (192-token completions) and 1.21% (320-token completions). These single-run results identify a concrete failure mode rather than establishing a general lower bound on RLVR. The contribution is an auditable resource-constrained case study, not a state-of-the-art claim.

AI.tldr: 该研究在极有限的资源约束下（单块NVIDIA L20 GPU）训练了一个134.5M参数的语言模型L20-Edu-135M，仅使用约13B tokens进行预训练，在六项任务上达到基准模型SmolLM-135M 87.1%的性能，但仅用了其2.17%的训练数据量。
AI.motivation: 研究旨在探索在严格资源限制下的语言模型训练可行性，特别是针对小型语言模型在有限计算资源（单GPU）和训练数据量（约13B tokens）下的表现，为资源受限环境提供可审计的案例研究。
AI.method: 采用完整的134.5M参数语言模型流水线，包括：1）数据预处理（FineWeb-Edu tokens + 教育/数学/代码/推理混合数据）；2）数据去重技术（跨源MinHash/LSH近重复检测、段去重）；3）基准重叠移除；4）吞吐优化；5）监督微调与权重插值；6）在GSM8K上使用可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）。
AI.result: L20-Edu-135M在六项任务上平均得分0.4150，落后于SmolLM-135M（0.4767）和SmolLM2-135M（0.4917），但性能达到SmolLM-135M的87.1%，而训练数据量仅为其2.17%。模型超过多个旧版100M-160M基线。直接RLVR降低了GSM8K的准确率（从1.82%降至1.59%/1.21%）。
AI.conclusion: 该研究展示了在极端资源约束下训练可行的小型语言模型，但强化学习方法（RLVR）在此设置下出现了具体失败模式。研究贡献在于提供了一个可审计的资源受限案例研究，而非追求最先进性能。

title: A Reduced Order Model for Emergent Mechanics in Woven Systems
summary: Woven structures exhibit rich mechanical behaviors including anisotropic stiffness, shear-induced locking, and crimp interchange that emerge purely from the geometric arrangement of individual weavers rather than from constituent material properties. Existing models either homogenize these interactions or resolve them at prohibitive computational cost. We introduce a reduced-order model that bridges this gap by representing individual weaver interactions through a system of nodes and four physically interpretable stiffness elements capturing axial deformation, in-plane uncrimping, inter-weaver shear, and frictional slip. Eigenvalue analysis of the unit cell confirms that the lowest-energy deformation modes correspond directly to known weave-specific phenomena, and that each element is necessary for a complete kinematic and mechanistic description. Element stiffness parameters are calibrated against empirical three-point bending and shear data, achieving agreement within 5% across varied weaver widths and spacings. The validated model is then applied to demonstrate capabilities beyond the reach of continuum approaches including: the emergent Poisson's response arising from crimp interchange, stepwise force reduction during progressive weaver pullout, stress localization under three distinct tearing configurations, and programmable mechanical anisotropy through spatially graded weaver stiffness. The physical transparency and computational efficiency of the framework position it as a practical tool for the analysis and design of woven architected materials with programmable mechanical response.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种用于编织结构的降阶模型，通过节点和四个物理可解释的刚度元素来捕捉编织物的相互作用，实现了计算效率和物理透明度的平衡。
AI.motivation: 编织结构展现出丰富的力学行为，如各向异性刚度、剪切诱导锁定和卷曲交换等，这些行为源于编织物的几何排列而非材料属性。现有模型要么过度简化这些相互作用，要么计算成本过高。
AI.method: 引入一个降阶模型，通过节点系统和四个物理可解释的刚度元素来表示编织物的相互作用：轴向变形、平面内解卷曲、编织物间剪切和摩擦滑移。通过特征值分析确认最低能量变形模式对应已知编织现象，并校准刚度参数。
AI.result: 模型参数通过三点弯曲和剪切实验数据校准，误差在5%以内。模型成功展示了连续介质方法无法实现的现象：卷曲交换产生的泊松响应、渐进编织物拔出时的逐步力减少、三种撕裂配置下的应力局部化，以及通过空间梯度编织物刚度实现的可编程力学各向异性。
AI.conclusion: 该模型具有物理透明度和计算效率，为分析和设计具有可编程力学响应的编织架构材料提供了一个实用工具。

title: Efficient Document Tampering Localization with Multi-Level Discrepancy Features and Unified DCT-Quantization Embedding
summary: Localizing document tampering is extremely challenging, as manipulations are crafted to appear visually consistent and often leave only subtle traces that are nearly invisible to the human eye. In prior work, evaluation has been largely dominated by synthetic benchmarks that closely match the training distribution, and methods have shown steady progress under this setting. However, these gains often translate poorly to human-made forgeries and to cross-domain evaluation, where both the source documents and the tampering pipeline can change, leading to a distribution shift. In addition, since the introduction of the Frequency Perception Head for the discrete cosine transform (DCT) modality, it has become a standard choice, and subsequent work has largely focused on downstream modules and fusion strategies rather than revisiting the backbone itself. To help close this gap in cross-domain performance and improve the DCT backbone design, we propose \textbf{DiffNet}, a relatively simple yet effective RGB--DCT early-fusion architecture driven by two key design choices. First, to ensure that the decoder aggregates multi-scale inconsistency evidence rather than operating on raw, content-heavy activations, we apply a lightweight multi-level discrepancy transformation at the output of each backbone stage, replacing features with magnitude-only responses to learned zero-sum filters. Second, we design an efficient DCT-domain backbone that relies on a lightweight frequency-index-aware DCT--quantization joint embedding. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on cross-domain and human-made document tampering localization, outperforming prior methods by around 30\%, with up to $7\times$ higher throughput than the previous best model.

AI.tldr: DiffNet：一种用于文档篡改定位的RGB-DCT早期融合架构，通过多级差异变换和轻量级DCT-量化联合嵌入，显著提升跨域和人工伪造文档的检测性能
AI.motivation: 现有方法在合成数据上表现良好，但在跨域评估和人工伪造文档上性能下降明显。DCT模态的频域感知头成为标准选择后，后续工作主要关注下游模块和融合策略，而忽略了骨干网络本身的改进。
AI.method: 提出DiffNet架构，包含两个关键设计：1) 在每级骨干网络输出应用轻量级多级差异变换，将特征替换为仅对学习到的零和滤波器的幅度响应；2) 设计高效的DCT域骨干网络，使用轻量级频率索引感知的DCT-量化联合嵌入。
AI.result: 在跨域和人工伪造文档篡改定位任务上达到最先进性能，比先前方法提升约30%，吞吐量比之前最佳模型提高7倍。
AI.conclusion: DiffNet通过改进DCT骨干网络设计和多级差异变换，有效提升了文档篡改定位的跨域性能，同时保持了高效率。

title: Neural Conjugate Aggregation: Identifiable Unsupervised Multi-Sensor Regression under Heterogeneous Sensor Bias
summary: We study regression-based data fusion under uncertainty, where multiple noisy and biased measurement sources are available but ground-truth labels are absent during training. This setting arises in sensor networks, simulation ensembles, and scientific monitoring systems where supervision is costly or infeasible. We propose the Neural Conjugate Aggregation Model (NCAM), a hierarchical Bayesian framework that combines neural networks with conjugate Gaussian inference for unsupervised multi-source fusion. NCAM learns source-specific bias and reliability conditioned on contextual covariates, yielding an analytically tractable posterior over a latent target variable with decomposed epistemic and aleatoric uncertainty. Structural non-identifiability is resolved through sensor anchoring and variance regularization, enabling stable and interpretable posterior aggregation. To complement Bayesian uncertainty with finite-sample guarantees, we integrate locally adaptive Monte Carlo conformal prediction, producing heteroscedastic prediction intervals with coverage guarantees under exchangeability assumptions. Experiments on synthetic and real-world air-quality datasets demonstrate improved predictive accuracy and well-calibrated uncertainty compared to unsupervised baselines, including mean aggregation, probabilistic PCA, and Kalman filtering.

AI.tldr: 提出NCAM框架，通过分层贝叶斯方法在无监督条件下融合多源噪声和偏差数据，结合神经网络的表达能力与共轭高斯推断的可解析性，实现不确定性分解和预测区间生成。
AI.motivation: 解决传感器网络、仿真集成和科学监测系统中，由于缺乏真实标签且数据来源存在噪声和偏差的无监督多源数据融合问题。传统方法需要昂贵或不可行的监督，而现有无监督方法难以同时处理源特异性偏差、可靠性和不确定性量化。
AI.method: 提出神经共轭聚合模型（NCAM），结合神经网络与共轭高斯推断的分层贝叶斯框架。神经网络学习基于上下文协变量的源特异性偏差和可靠性，共轭高斯推断提供潜在目标变量的可解析后验分布，分解认知不确定性和偶然不确定性。通过传感器锚定和方差正则化解决结构不可识别性问题。集成局部自适应蒙特卡洛保形预测，在交换性假设下提供有限样本覆盖保证的异方差预测区间。
AI.result: 在合成和真实空气质量数据集上的实验表明，NCAM相比无监督基线方法（包括平均聚合、概率PCA和卡尔曼滤波）具有更好的预测准确性和更校准的不确定性估计。
AI.conclusion: NCAM框架成功解决了无监督多源数据融合中的关键挑战，通过结合神经网络的灵活性和贝叶斯推断的解析性，实现了对源特异性偏差和可靠性的条件建模，提供了可解释的不确定性分解和具有统计保证的预测区间，在缺乏真实标签的情况下实现了准确和可靠的数据融合。

title: CoorDex: Coordinating Body and Hand Priors for Continuous Dexterous Humanoid Loco-Manipulation
summary: Humanoid loco-manipulation is often simplified into a stop-and-go process: walking to an object, stopping to manipulate it, and then resuming locomotion. It also commonly relies on low degree-of-freedom (DoF) end effectors that behave like an open-close grasp primitive. We introduce CoorDex, a learning pipeline that converts high-dimensional body and dexterous hand control into coordinated latent residual control, enabling high-DoF dexterous loco-manipulation on the move. Starting from simulated whole-body and hand demonstrations, CoorDex trains privileged motion tracking teachers for the humanoid body and dexterous hand, distills them into proprioception-conditioned latent priors, and uses the frozen priors as the action space for downstream residual reinforcement learning. A coordinated latent residual policy composes these priors through shared task context and separate body-hand residual heads, preserving natural whole-body motion while improving finger-level contact reliability. CoorDex enables a Unitree G1 humanoid with a 20-DoF WUJI hand to execute dexterous manipulation while in motion, including non-stop bottle grasping and carrying, fridge door opening on the move, and cube pick-and-turn. Ablations on the walk-grasp-carry task show that joint-space PPO, joint-space hand control, and monolithic latent prediction all fail under the same reward budget, while the latent-prior interface and coordinated residual structure make high-dimensional contact-rich loco-manipulation trainable. Project Page: https://skevinci.github.io/coordex/

AI.tldr: CoorDex是一个学习框架，将高维人体和灵巧手控制转化为协调的潜在残差控制，实现移动中的高自由度灵巧操作
AI.motivation: 传统人形机器人操作常采用"走-停-操作-走"的分离模式，且依赖低自由度末端执行器，限制了移动中的灵巧操作能力
AI.method: 从仿真演示训练特权运动跟踪教师，蒸馏为基于本体感觉的潜在先验，作为下游残差强化学习的动作空间，通过协调的潜在残差策略组合这些先验
AI.result: 成功实现Unitree G1人形机器人（配备20自由度WUJI手）在移动中执行灵巧操作，包括不停顿抓取和搬运瓶子、移动中打开冰箱门、方块拾取和旋转
AI.conclusion: CoorDex的潜在先验接口和协调残差结构使高维接触丰富的移动操作可训练，优于传统方法如关节空间PPO、关节空间手控制和单一潜在预测

title: Towards Accurate and Robust Surveillance Roadside IVD via Trackletized Audio-Visual Reasoning
summary: Idling Vehicle Detection (IVD) seeks to determine, at the final frame of a video clip, whether any vehicle is idling, meaning the vehicle is stationary with its engine running, using synchronized video from a remote surveillance camera and multichannel audio captured by spatially distributed wireless microphones along the roadside. Prior full-image, clip-level fusion approaches tend to overfit scene background and full-frame context, produce unstable temporal decisions, and lack an explicit spatial prior to align vehicles with microphones, which makes them brittle under domain shift and data inefficient. Instead, we introduce TAVR-IVD, an audio-visual framework guided by multi-object tracking. Our method detects vehicles, links detections into tracklets, and classifies each vehicle by operating on its tracklet. This design raises the effective signal-to-noise ratio, stabilizes temporal decisions through tracklets, enforces an explicit spatial prior to align vehicles with microphones, and adapts across domains with limited calibration annotations while remaining detector agnostic and efficient. To evaluate deployment robustness, we further curate two evaluation extensions, AVIVD-LT and AVIVD-M, covering inter-day and cross-site shifts.

AI.tldr: TAVR-IVD：基于多目标跟踪的音频-视觉车辆怠速检测框架，通过车辆跟踪提升信号噪声比、稳定时间决策、实现空间对齐，提高跨域鲁棒性
AI.motivation: 现有基于全图像、片段级融合的方法容易过拟合场景背景和全帧上下文，产生不稳定的时间决策，缺乏明确的空间先验来对齐车辆和麦克风，导致在域偏移下脆弱且数据效率低下
AI.method: 基于多目标跟踪的音频-视觉框架：检测车辆，将检测结果链接为轨迹片段，基于轨迹片段对每辆车进行分类。这种设计提高了有效信噪比，通过轨迹片段稳定时间决策，强制执行空间先验来对齐车辆和麦克风
AI.result: 提出了TAVR-IVD框架，并创建了两个评估扩展AVIVD-LT和AVIVD-M，覆盖了日间和跨站点偏移，用于评估部署鲁棒性
AI.conclusion: TAVR-IVD框架通过多目标跟踪引导的音频-视觉方法，提高了车辆怠速检测的鲁棒性、数据效率和跨域适应性，解决了现有方法的局限性

title: Sequential Minimal Optimization Algorithm for One-Class Support Vector Machines With Privileged Information
