summary: Forecasting chaotic dynamical systems such as the Lorenz attractor is notoriously difficult: small numerical errors are amplified exponentially over long autoregressive rollouts. We study seven recurrent and convolutional architectures for the AI-DEEDS 2026 Chaotic Systems Challenge: a vanilla LSTM, an LSTM with additive attention, a Bidirectional LSTM (BiLSTM), a BiLSTM trained with the Huber loss, a Temporal Convolutional Network (TCN), a CNN front-end followed by an LSTM, and a CNN front-end followed by a BiLSTM. All models share the same pre-processing, sequence length, and rollout procedure, isolating the contribution of each design choice. The challenge scores predictions on a 0-100 scale where higher is better. We obtain leaderboard scores between 45.72 and 58.81, with the BiLSTM trained with Huber loss being the strongest configuration. Two findings stand out: (i) adding additive attention to the unidirectional baseline degraded performance by over ten points, and (ii) prepending a CNN front-end to either an LSTM or a BiLSTM did not help and slightly hurt the score. Per-pair RMSE measurements confirm that the BiLSTM family generalizes better in the harder pairs (6-7), while the LSTM + Attention model collapses there (RMSE up to 8.94 on pair 6). We discuss why bidirectional context and a robust loss help in chaotic regimes while attention and CNN front-ends fail in this setting.

AI.tldr: 该研究比较了七种神经网络架构在混沌系统预测任务上的表现，发现使用Huber损失的双向LSTM效果最佳，而添加注意力机制和CNN前端会降低性能。
AI.motivation: 混沌动力系统（如洛伦兹吸引子）的预测非常困难，因为微小的数值误差会在长期自回归推演中呈指数级放大。研究旨在通过AI-DEEDS 2026混沌系统挑战赛，比较不同神经网络架构在混沌系统预测任务上的表现。
AI.method: 研究了七种循环和卷积架构：普通LSTM、带加性注意力的LSTM、双向LSTM（BiLSTM）、使用Huber损失的BiLSTM、时序卷积网络（TCN）、CNN前端+LSTM、CNN前端+BiLSTM。所有模型共享相同的预处理、序列长度和推演过程，以隔离每个设计选择的影响。
AI.result: 在0-100分的挑战评分中，获得了45.72到58.81的分数，其中使用Huber损失的BiLSTM表现最强。关键发现：1）在单向基线中添加注意力机制使性能下降超过10分；2）在LSTM或BiLSTM前添加CNN前端没有帮助，反而略微降低了分数。BiLSTM系列在较难的数据对（6-7）上泛化更好，而LSTM+注意力模型在这些数据对上表现崩溃（RMSE高达8.94）。
AI.conclusion: 在混沌系统预测中，双向上下文和鲁棒损失函数（Huber损失）有助于提高性能，而注意力机制和CNN前端在这种设置下会失败。这表明对于混沌动力系统的预测，模型架构的选择需要特别考虑系统的混沌特性。

title: MaRS: Robust Out-of-Distribution Detection via Mahalanobis Residual Scoring
summary: Foundation models provide highly descriptive representations for medical images, yet their reliability degrades under distribution shifts arising from changes in patients, devices, or acquisition conditions. Reliable out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is therefore essential for safe deployment. Recent post-hoc detectors efficiently exploit frozen embeddings (\emph{e.g.}, kNN), whereas reconstruction-based OOD detection in latent feature space has seen limited adoption due to inconsistent performance. In this work, we show that the limitation of reconstruction-based methods in latent space does not stem from poor reconstruction quality, but from how reconstruction errors are scored. Standard $L_2$ residual norms collapse the anisotropic residual structure, thereby suppressing informative deviations. To address this limitation, we introduce \texttt{MaRS} (Mahalanobis Residual Scoring), a label-free OOD detector that learns an in-distribution manifold using a lightweight autoencoder and measures deviation via a Mahalanobis distance on reconstruction residuals, yielding variance-aware OOD scores. Across three imaging modalities, multiple types of distribution shift, and different model families and scales, \texttt{MaRS} outperforms established confidence-, distance-, and reconstruction-based baselines, while remaining fully post-hoc and lightweight. The code is available at https://github.com/francescodisalvo05/mars.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种名为MaRS的无标签OOD检测器，通过马氏距离对重构残差进行评分，显著提升了基于重构的OOD检测性能。
AI.motivation: 基础模型为医学图像提供了高度描述性的表示，但在患者、设备或采集条件变化导致的分布偏移下，其可靠性会下降。现有的基于重构的OOD检测方法在潜在空间中性能有限，作者发现这并非源于重构质量差，而是由于标准L2残差范数压制了信息性偏差。
AI.method: 提出MaRS（马氏残差评分）方法：使用轻量级自编码器学习in-distribution流形，通过重构残差的马氏距离测量偏差，产生方差感知的OOD分数。
AI.result: 在三种成像模态、多种分布偏移类型以及不同模型家族和规模下，MaRS均优于现有的置信度、距离和重构基线方法，同时保持完全后处理且轻量级。
AI.conclusion: 通过马氏距离对重构残差进行评分，可以有效捕捉各向异性的残差结构，显著提升基于重构的OOD检测性能，为医学图像的安全部署提供了可靠解决方案。

title: Clipping the Price of Adaptivity at the Tail
summary: Adaptive stochastic convex optimization (SCO) methods face a fundamental ``price of adaptivity'' barrier: under the standard set of assumptions, they cannot efficiently adapt to large uncertainty in both the initial distance to optimality and the Lipschitz constant. We circumvent this barrier by requiring a small amount of additional structure common to many learning problems. Specifically, we assume that the objective decomposes into a model and a loss function, enabling us to intervene by modifying the model's output before it passes to the loss function. Under this assumption, we design a method that clips the learned model output in tail events where it deviates too much from the output of a fixed reference model. Our method matches the optimal bounds for known-parameter SCO up to logarithmic factors in the uncertainty in the distance and Lipschitz parameters, thus efficiently adapting to large uncertainty in both.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种通过修改模型输出来规避自适应随机凸优化中"自适应代价"障碍的新方法，通过引入参考模型和裁剪机制，在模型和损失函数可分解的假设下，实现了对初始距离和Lipschitz常数不确定性的高效适应。
AI.motivation: 自适应随机凸优化方法面临"自适应代价"的根本障碍：在标准假设下，无法有效适应初始距离到最优性和Lipschitz常数的大不确定性。需要一种新方法来解决这一限制。
AI.method: 假设目标函数可分解为模型和损失函数，通过修改模型输出（在尾部事件中裁剪学习模型输出，使其不偏离固定参考模型输出太远）来干预优化过程。
AI.result: 提出的方法在距离和Lipschitz参数不确定性方面，以对数因子匹配已知参数SCO的最优边界，从而有效适应这两个参数的大不确定性。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用学习问题中常见的额外结构（目标函数可分解为模型和损失函数），可以规避自适应随机凸优化的"自适应代价"障碍，实现高效的自适应优化。

title: Prompting Diffusion Models for Zero-Shot Instance Segmentation
summary: Several disruptive research directions have recently emerged in computer vision, including foundation models achieving previously unseen zero-shot performance in scene understanding, even interactively, and generative models that synthesize extremely realistic images. The latter have also been shown to be highly effective in scene understanding tasks thanks to their rich priors. However, for promptable segmentation, foundation models struggle with accurately segmenting an object's region, leading to false positives and over-segmentation. Notably, early attempts that leverage generative priors use prompts only during post-processing, yielding suboptimal segments because the process is agnostic to the user input. In this paper, we target these limitations with Prompt2Seg, a spatial conditioning framework for diffusion-based segmentation. Prompt2Seg augments a frozen diffusion segmentation model with a conditioning branch. Our approach takes spatial prompts, represented as 2D Gaussians or confidence maps, as explicit input signals, training the model to respond directly to user intent. Fine-tuned on a deliberately constrained set of object categories drawn from Hypersim and Virtual KITTI 2, Prompt2Seg generalizes zero-shot to a wide range of unseen object types and visual domains. We evaluate on seven datasets ranging from standard benchmarks to more challenging domains, including paintings, egocentric views, and X-ray data. Furthermore, we demonstrate that Prompt2Seg consistently outperforms the underlying diffusion segmentation backbone across all benchmarks. Our results suggest that the rich priors encoded in generative pretraining, combined with principled spatial conditioning, offer a compelling path toward broadly generalizing interactive segmentation without large-scale mask supervision.

AI.tldr: Prompt2Seg是一个基于扩散的交互式分割框架，通过空间条件分支将用户的空间提示（如2D高斯或置信度图）作为显式输入信号，使模型能更准确地响应用户意图，在多种未见过的对象类型和视觉域上实现零样本泛化，性能优于基础扩散分割模型。
AI.motivation: 现有基础模型在可提示分割任务中难以准确分割对象区域，存在误报和过分割问题；而基于生成先验的方法仅在后处理中使用提示，导致分割结果不理想。本文旨在解决这些限制，通过空间条件框架使模型能直接响应用户意图。
AI.method: 提出Prompt2Seg框架，在冻结的扩散分割模型基础上添加条件分支，将空间提示（2D高斯或置信度图）作为显式输入信号进行训练。使用Hypersim和Virtual KITTI 2中的受限对象类别进行微调，实现零样本泛化。
AI.result: 在七个数据集（包括标准基准和更具挑战性的领域，如绘画、第一人称视角和X射线数据）上评估，Prompt2Seg在所有基准测试中始终优于基础扩散分割模型，展示了强大的零样本泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 生成预训练中编码的丰富先验与原则性空间条件相结合，为无需大规模掩码监督的广泛泛化交互式分割提供了一条有前景的路径。

title: SCRUB-FL: Sanitizing and Cleansing Representations via Unlearning of Backdoors
summary: Federated Learning (FL) enables collaborative model training without sharing raw data, making it a promising paradigm for privacy-sensitive applications. However, its decentralized nature makes it inherently vulnerable to backdoor attacks, where malicious clients embed hidden triggers into local training data to manipulate model predictions. Existing defenses mainly operate during before and during aggregation cannot fully eliminate backdoor behaviors that persist in the converged global model. Moreover, the effectiveness of post-training sanitization is often limited by the server's lack of knowledge of trigger patterns or poisoned clients after convergence, resulting in residual backdoor behaviors or accuracy degradation due to neuron entanglement. To address this limitation, we propose SCRUB-FL (Sanitizing and Cleansing Representations via Unlearning of Backdoors), a two-phase solution for post-training backdoor removal in FL. During training, clients identify suspicious samples using spectral analysis and activation clustering, then train lightweight Wasserstein Generative Adversarial Network with Gradient Penalty (WGAN-GP) models to capture trigger-related distributions. The generator parameters are aggregated server-side to construct a global representation of suspicious patterns without exposing raw data. After convergence, the server synthesizes trigger-approximating samples and applies machine unlearning to erase the trigger-target association by redistributing predictions toward a uniform distribution. Experimental evaluations on CIFAR-10 and GTSRB across three attack types and up to 40% malicious participation demonstrate that SCRUB-FL reduces the backdoor attack success rate to as low as 3.88% while maintaining over 91% normal task accuracy, outperforming state-of-the-art defenses without requiring prior trigger knowledge or a large clean proxy dataset at the server.

AI.tldr: SCRUB-FL是一种联邦学习后训练后门移除方法，通过两阶段方案在训练时识别可疑样本并构建触发器模式表示，收敛后合成触发近似样本并应用机器遗忘技术，有效消除后门行为同时保持正常任务准确性。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习的去中心化特性使其容易受到后门攻击，现有防御方法在聚合前后操作无法完全消除收敛全局模型中的后门行为，后训练净化效果受限于服务器缺乏触发器模式或中毒客户端知识，导致残留后门行为或准确率下降。
AI.method: SCRUB-FL采用两阶段方案：1) 训练阶段：客户端通过谱分析和激活聚类识别可疑样本，训练轻量级WGAN-GP模型捕获触发器相关分布，生成器参数在服务器端聚合构建可疑模式全局表示；2) 收敛后阶段：服务器合成触发近似样本，应用机器遗忘技术通过重新分配预测到均匀分布来消除触发器-目标关联。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10和GTSRB数据集上，针对三种攻击类型和高达40%恶意参与率的实验表明，SCRUB-FL将后门攻击成功率降低至3.88%，同时保持超过91%的正常任务准确率，优于现有最先进防御方法，且无需先验触发器知识或服务器端大量干净代理数据集。
AI.conclusion: SCRUB-FL为联邦学习提供了一种有效的后训练后门移除解决方案，能够在不需要触发器先验知识的情况下，显著降低后门攻击成功率同时保持模型正常任务性能。

title: SATURN: Symbolic Spatial Reasoning for Multi-Perspective Grounding
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) remain unreliable when spatial reasoning requires composing relations whose meanings depend on frames of reference. Existing neuro-symbolic methods make reasoning more explicit, but often depend on brittle geometric procedures and hard decisions over noisy perception. We propose SATURN, a neuro-symbolic framework for perspective-aware compositional spatial reasoning. SATURN reconstructs an approximate 3D scene, derives soft perspective-aware spatial predicates, and composes them with a training-free Pythonic symbolic executor, separating perception from reasoning while preserving uncertainty through multi-hop inference. We also introduce 3D FORCE, a diagnostic benchmark that controls reasoning depth, view, and perspective composition across spatial arrangement grounding (SAG) and referring expression grounding (REF). On 3D FORCE, VLMs and spatially trained models degrade sharply as depth and perspective complexity increase, whereas SATURN remains stable and outperforms strong baselines. On the real-world MindCube benchmark, SATURN achieves 78.57% overall accuracy, outperforming the strongest baseline by 14 pp.

AI.tldr: SATURN是一个神经符号框架，通过3D场景重建、软空间谓词推导和Python符号执行器，实现视角感知的组合空间推理，在复杂空间关系任务上表现稳定且优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在需要依赖参考框架的空间关系组合推理中不可靠，而现有的神经符号方法依赖脆弱的几何程序和噪声感知的硬决策。
AI.method: SATURN框架重建近似3D场景，推导软视角感知空间谓词，使用免训练的Python符号执行器组合这些谓词，将感知与推理分离，同时通过多跳推理保持不确定性。
AI.result: 在3D FORCE基准测试中，视觉语言模型随推理深度和视角复杂度增加而性能急剧下降，而SATURN保持稳定并优于强基线。在真实世界MindCube基准测试中，SATURN达到78.57%的总体准确率，比最强基线高出14个百分点。
AI.conclusion: SATURN通过神经符号方法实现了鲁棒的视角感知组合空间推理，在复杂空间关系任务上显著优于现有方法，展示了分离感知与推理的优势。

title: Subspace-Constrained Federated Learning with Low-Rank Adaptation
summary: Federated low-rank adaptation methods are attractive for fine-tuning large models under communication and privacy constraints, but heterogeneous client data can induce geometric misalignment between local low-rank updates. We study whether this subspace misalignment leads to destructive aggregation and slower convergence in LoRA-based federated learning. We propose a subspace-regularized federated LoRA objective that encourages local client updates to remain close to a shared global reference subspace. We present a complete empirical evaluation on two pretrained models, RoBERTa-large and SmolLM-360M, over HellaSwag in a non-IID 10-client federated setting, across 3 random seeds (42, 43, 44), yielding 24 total experimental runs (4 methods x 3 seeds x 2 models). On RoBERTa-large, Subspace-Reg achieves the strongest mean best accuracy (0.454 +/- 0.023), mean final accuracy (0.429 +/- 0.011), and lowest final loss (1.363) across all three seeds, outperforming FedAvg, SVD redistribution, and FedSVD baselines by a large margin. On SmolLM-360M, FedAvg leads on accuracy, revealing that accuracy gains are model-dependent. Crucially, Subspace-Reg achieves near-perfect basis overlap, approximately 0.9999, on both models and across all seeds, versus 0.958 to 0.991 for all baselines, providing robust support for the geometric alignment hypothesis. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/sadia-sigma-lab/Subspace-Constrained-Federated-learning-with-Lora.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于子空间正则化的联邦LoRA方法，解决异构客户端数据导致的低秩更新子空间错位问题，在RoBERTa-large上取得最佳性能，并在SmolLM-360M上验证了模型依赖性。
AI.motivation: 联邦低秩自适应方法在通信和隐私约束下具有吸引力，但异构客户端数据会导致本地低秩更新的子空间错位。研究这种子空间错位是否会导致破坏性聚合和较慢收敛。
AI.method: 提出子空间正则化的联邦LoRA目标，鼓励本地客户端更新保持接近共享的全局参考子空间。在RoBERTa-large和SmolLM-360M两个预训练模型上，在非IID 10客户端联邦设置中，使用3个随机种子进行24次实验。
AI.result: 在RoBERTa-large上，Subspace-Reg获得最强的平均最佳准确率(0.454±0.023)、平均最终准确率(0.429±0.011)和最低的最终损失(1.363)，显著优于FedAvg、SVD重分配和FedSVD基线。在SmolLM-360M上，FedAvg在准确率上领先，显示收益具有模型依赖性。Subspace-Reg在两种模型和所有种子上都实现了接近完美的基重叠(~0.9999)，而基线仅为0.958-0.991。
AI.conclusion: 子空间正则化能有效解决联邦LoRA中的子空间错位问题，实现几何对齐，提升性能。准确率收益具有模型依赖性，但几何对齐假设得到鲁棒支持。

title: NullFlow: One-Step Generative Reconstruction
comment: 9 pages, 3 figures. Xiao Shi and Edward P. Chandler contributed equally
summary: We propose NullFlow, a principled framework for one-step generative image reconstruction. Our key idea is to confine the generative flow to a measurement-consistent subspace. Because the flow never leaves this subspace, NullFlow needs no separate data-fidelity corrections, unlike existing solvers. NullFlow samples in a single network evaluation by learning the flow's average velocity, avoiding the step-by-step integration of traditional flow matching methods. We prove that the average velocity of this constrained flow yields a training objective whose global minimizer is a one-step posterior sampler. We show on image inpainting that NullFlow matches state-of-the-art diffusion solvers while cutting inference from hundreds of network evaluations to one.

AI.tldr: NullFlow是一种单步生成图像重建框架，通过将生成流限制在测量一致子空间，无需单独的数据保真度校正，只需一次网络评估即可完成采样。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式图像重建方法需要数百步网络评估，计算成本高。传统方法需要单独的数据保真度校正步骤，流程复杂。需要一种既能保持高质量重建，又能大幅减少推理步骤的解决方案。
AI.method: 将生成流限制在测量一致子空间，确保流始终不离开该空间。学习流的平均速度，避免传统流匹配方法的逐步积分过程。通过约束流的平均速度构建训练目标，其全局最小化器是单步后验采样器。
AI.result: 在图像修复任务中，NullFlow与最先进的扩散求解器性能相当，但将推理从数百次网络评估减少到一次。实现了高质量的单步图像重建。
AI.conclusion: NullFlow提供了一种原理性的单步生成图像重建框架，通过将流限制在测量一致子空间，无需数据保真度校正，显著提高了推理效率，同时保持了重建质量。

title: GRADE: Graph Representation of LLM Agent Dependency and Execution
summary: Can one graph represent every kind of LLM agent's run? A trace records what each step did, never what it relied on, the state it read, and the results it reused. GRADE recovers that missing layer: it models any run as one graph over its step nodes with two edge layers, execution edges (what ran in what order) read from the trace for free, and dependency edges (what each step relied on) rarely logged, so each is graded by how it is known, observed, declared, or inferred. One representation, and each layer earns its place. Across six corpora of LLM agents spanning tool use, coding, and the web, the dependency layer can predict failure where run size is weak and, under leave-one-corpus-out transfer, stays above chance on every held-out class while run size fails. Meanwhile, the execution layer localizes the faulting step in a failed multi-agent run. This work also provides a more in-depth analysis of why generic graph neural networks may misread the dependency layer, unlike our feature-based alternative. The same graph representation opens further uses, carrying from failure diagnosis in a single run to efficiency and robustness optimization at scale.

AI.tldr: GRADE提出了一种统一的图表示方法，用于建模LLM智能体运行过程，包含执行层和依赖层两个边层，能够预测失败、定位故障步骤，并为优化提供基础。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体运行记录（trace）只记录每个步骤做了什么，但缺少对步骤所依赖的状态、读取的信息和重用结果等依赖关系的记录。需要一种能够全面表示智能体运行的统一方法。
AI.method: GRADE将任何智能体运行建模为一个图，其中节点表示步骤，边分为两层：执行边（记录步骤执行顺序，可从trace中免费获取）和依赖边（表示步骤间的依赖关系，通过分级方式获取：已知、观察到、声明或推断）。
AI.result: 在六个涵盖工具使用、编码和网页操作的LLM智能体语料库上，依赖层能够在运行规模指标较弱时预测失败，并在留一语料库转移测试中在所有类别上保持高于随机水平的表现，而运行规模指标则失败。同时，执行层能够在多智能体运行失败时定位故障步骤。
AI.conclusion: GRADE提供了一种统一的图表示方法，不仅能够用于单次运行的故障诊断，还能扩展到大规模效率和鲁棒性优化。该工作还分析了通用图神经网络可能误读依赖层的原因，并提出了基于特征的替代方案。

title: Catching Lies Without Sending the Video: Privacy-Preserving Multimodal Deception Detection
summary: Frontier multimodal models can guess whether a person is lying from a testimony video. To do so, they stream that raw face and voice to a third-party model. We ask whether the heavy media is needed at all. On the Real-life Trial Deception dataset, Whissle on-device speech and vision stack extracts a compact digest: transcript, emotion, age, gender, intent distributions, a deception intent filter, fluency and rhythm, per-frame facial behaviour, and prosody. Under speaker-independent evaluation, we report three findings. A small classifier on this digest reaches AUC 0.741, matching Gemini 2.5 Pro on full video. Handing the digest to a frontier LLM reaches AUC 0.755 with Claude Opus 4.8 at 7.8X fewer input tokens, with no media leaving the device. The reported 75% accuracy is a speaker-leakage artifact. We release code and experiments.

AI.tldr: 该论文探讨通过轻量级设备端特征提取替代完整多媒体流进行谎言检测，发现仅使用文本、情感等元数据就能达到与大模型相当的性能，同时保护隐私。
AI.motivation: 现有前沿多模态模型通过将完整的视频和音频流发送到第三方模型来检测谎言，这存在隐私泄露和计算开销大的问题。作者质疑是否真的需要传输如此庞大的原始媒体数据。
AI.method: 提出Whissle系统，在设备端从音频和视频中提取紧凑的元数据特征，包括：转录文本、情感、年龄、性别、意图分布、欺骗意图过滤器、流畅度和节奏、每帧面部行为、韵律等，然后在这些特征上训练小型分类器或使用前沿LLM进行分析。
AI.result:
1. 在Real-life Trial Deception数据集上，小型分类器在元数据特征上达到AUC 0.741，与Gemini 2.5 Pro在完整视频上的性能相当。
2. 将元数据特征提供给Claude Opus 4.8达到AUC 0.755，输入token减少7.8倍，且无需媒体数据离开设备。
3. 发现之前报告的75%准确率存在说话者泄露的伪影。
AI.conclusion: 设备端提取的紧凑元数据特征可以替代完整的原始媒体流进行谎言检测，在保护隐私的同时达到与大模型相当的性能，且计算开销显著降低。这为隐私保护的边缘计算提供了新思路。

title: Error Highways: Scaling Predictive Coding to Very Deep Networks
summary: Predictive coding networks (PCNs) offer a biologically-plausible, local-learning alternative to back-propagation of errors (backprop). Nevertheless, they have remained largely confined to shallow architectures and evaluated on simple machine intelligence benchmarks. A central obstacle to scaling PCNs is that the learning signal decays rapidly as it propagates away from the clamped boundaries, leaving interior layers effectively unchanged. To directly counter this problem, we propose highway error propagation (HEP), a scheme that augments the free energy function underlying predictive coding (PC) by altering its neural structure with feedback matrices $V_{L\to i}$ that couple selected hidden states directly to the clamped output error. Since this coupling is linear in the hidden state, the highway pathway delivers a correction at every inference step whose magnitude is independent of depth, in contrast to vanilla PC where the output error reaches the $i$-th hidden layer with attenuation that decays exponentially in depth. This bypasses the Jacobian chain while preserving the local PC synaptic update rule. On MNIST and Fashion-MNIST, we show that HEP effectively trains MLPs of up to 128 layers with accuracy that is robust with respect to depth.

AI.tldr: 提出HEP方法解决PCNs深度扩展问题，通过反馈矩阵直接耦合隐藏层与输出误差，避免信号衰减，成功训练128层MLP
AI.motivation: 预测编码网络（PCNs）作为生物可解释的局部学习替代方案，但主要局限于浅层架构。核心障碍是学习信号在远离固定边界时迅速衰减，导致内部层几乎不变。
AI.method: 提出高速公路误差传播（HEP）方案，通过反馈矩阵$V_{L\to i}$将选定隐藏状态直接耦合到固定输出误差，修改预测编码的自由能函数。这种线性耦合在每次推理步骤中传递校正，幅度与深度无关。
AI.result: 在MNIST和Fashion-MNIST上，HEP有效训练了多达128层的MLP，且准确率对深度具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: HEP通过直接耦合隐藏层与输出误差，绕过雅可比链，同时保留局部PC突触更新规则，成功解决了PCNs的深度扩展问题。

title: Modular Diffusion Models for Structured Visual Recognition
summary: Traditional supervised methods for structured visual recognition tasks -- such as object detection, segmentation, and scene graph generation -- often produce deterministic, fixed outputs, limiting their ability to capture the inherent uncertainty in complex visual scenes. As a consequence, such point estimates are unable to capture the prediction uncertainty (or multi modality) intrinsic to these problems, often arising from natural ambiguities (e.g., ambiguity in size of partially occluded objects, local ambiguity of exact segmentation boundary, etc.) as well as noise and sparsity of training data. To address this limitation, we present Modular Diffusion Models (MDMs), a simple and novel framework that learns a distribution over structured outputs for a given input image. MDMs decompose the diffusion process into distinct, task-specific modules, each focused on capturing a different aspect of the structured information space, such as object categories, spatial locations, and inter-object relationships. This modular design allows each component to be learned independently, with seamless integration at inference without additional training. Furthermore, the modularity of MDMs enables the diffusion process to easily operate over the heterogeneous output space common in many structured learning tasks (e.g., a continuous bounding boxes and discrete class labels). Experimental results over three distinct structured tasks -- object detection, instance segmentation, and scene graph generation -- highlight the benefits of our proposed framework.

AI.tldr: MDMs是一个新颖的模块化扩散模型框架，用于学习结构化视觉识别任务（如目标检测、分割、场景图生成）的输出分布，以捕捉视觉场景中的固有不确定性。
AI.motivation: 传统监督方法在结构化视觉识别任务中通常产生确定性的固定输出，无法捕捉复杂视觉场景中固有的不确定性（如部分遮挡物体的尺寸模糊性、分割边界的局部模糊性等）以及训练数据的噪声和稀疏性带来的预测不确定性或多模态性。
AI.method: 提出模块化扩散模型（MDMs），将扩散过程分解为不同的任务特定模块，每个模块专注于捕捉结构化信息空间的不同方面（如物体类别、空间位置、物体间关系）。这种模块化设计允许各组件独立学习，在推理时无需额外训练即可无缝集成，并能轻松处理结构化学习任务中常见的异构输出空间。
AI.result: 在三个不同的结构化任务（目标检测、实例分割、场景图生成）上的实验结果表明，该框架具有显著优势。
AI.conclusion: MDMs为结构化视觉识别任务提供了一种简单而有效的框架，能够学习输入图像对应的结构化输出分布，有效捕捉视觉场景中的不确定性，并在多个任务上展现出优越性能。

title: One-Step Flow Matching for Generative Modeling of Path-Dependent Physical Fields
summary: Physical simulations for intricate geometries with path-dependent constitutive models face difficulties due to the enormous computational cost they require. Recently, the emergence of generative AI models, which succeed in image and video synthesis tasks, has provided a promise to further improve simulations. Although U-Net-based denoising diffusion probabilistic models (DDPMs) have been adopted for elastic stress field generation, they typically require hundreds of sampling steps, and applications of generative models to path-dependent, e.g. plastic, stress fields remain very limited. In this work, we propose a novel flow matching (FM) model based on a transformer backbone for high-resolution path-dependent stress field generation with stochastic loading-unloading paths and geometry. The proposed model operates within the latent space of a variational autoencoder (VAE) and formulates the simulation of plastic fields as a video synthesis task, directly generating the stress fields across all time steps. Meanwhile, we design a non-Gaussian source distribution for flow matching, such that crossings among conditional transport paths are reduced during training. This enables our model to generate satisfactory samples in one step without relying on distillation. In addition, we introduce token-level loading embeddings and two auxiliary networks to further enhance the model performance in path-dependent simulation. The results demonstrate that, even with a limited training dataset, our model can accurately generate high-resolution path-dependent fields. It is much more computationally efficient than finite element analysis, providing a speedup of 6 to 7 times over FEM on CPUs and approximately two orders of magnitude speedup on consumer-grade GPUs.

AI.tldr: 基于Transformer的流匹配模型，用于高效生成高分辨率路径依赖应力场，比有限元分析快6-7倍（CPU）或两个数量级（GPU）
AI.motivation: 复杂几何路径依赖本构模型的物理模拟计算成本高昂，现有生成模型（如DDPM）需要数百步采样且难以处理塑性应力场，需要更高效的方法
AI.method: 提出基于Transformer的流匹配模型，在VAE潜在空间中操作，将塑性场模拟视为视频合成任务，设计非高斯源分布减少条件传输路径交叉，引入token级加载嵌入和辅助网络
AI.result: 模型能在有限训练数据下准确生成高分辨率路径依赖场，计算效率显著优于有限元分析：CPU上快6-7倍，消费级GPU上快约两个数量级
AI.conclusion: 该流匹配模型为路径依赖应力场生成提供了高效解决方案，在计算效率和准确性方面均优于传统有限元方法，有望推动物理模拟的进一步发展

title: Generative Relightable Avatars
summary: We present Generative Relightable Avatars (GRA), a person-specific method for photorealistic free-view rendering and environment-map relighting of full-body humans. We postulate that modeling fine-grained appearance details is inherently a one-to-many problem that can benefit from a generative formulation. In contrast to fully regressive relightable avatar methods, GRA follows a hybrid approach that combines controllable, physics-grounded relighting with probabilistic refinement. Starting from a tracked animated mesh, we optimize material parameters in UV-space and render a coarse relit appearance under a target HDR environment map. Next, we refine the textures with a feed-forward model to capture pose-dependent texture dynamics and illumination effects beyond simplified reflectance assumptions. Finally, a fine-tuned video-to-video diffusion model transforms the physically grounded renderings into temporally coherent, high-detail videos while preserving 3D control, with an error-recycling strategy for generating long videos. Experimental evaluations demonstrate our method's improved perceptual quality over prior relightable avatar baselines. Project Page: https://vcai.mpi-inf.mpg.de/projects/GRA/

AI.tldr: GRA是一种生成式可重光照虚拟人方法，结合物理基础渲染与概率细化，实现高细节、时序一致的全身人体自由视角渲染和环境光重光照。
AI.motivation: 细粒度外观细节建模本质上是多对一问题，生成式方法能更好处理这种复杂性。现有可重光照虚拟人方法多为完全回归式，缺乏对细节变化的建模能力。
AI.method: 采用混合方法：1)从跟踪动画网格优化UV空间材质参数，渲染粗略重光照结果；2)用前馈模型细化纹理，捕捉姿态相关纹理动态；3)微调的视频到视频扩散模型生成高细节时序一致视频，保持3D控制，使用错误回收策略生成长视频。
AI.result: 实验评估显示，GRA在感知质量上优于先前可重光照虚拟人基线方法，实现了更高细节和真实感的渲染效果。
AI.conclusion: GRA通过生成式方法结合物理基础渲染与概率细化，成功解决了可重光照虚拟人中的细粒度细节建模问题，实现了高质量的自由视角渲染和环境光重光照。

title: Factored Gossip DiLoCo: Reducing Blocking Communication in DiLoCo
summary: To make large-scale distributed training practical outside high-bandwidth datacenters, we must reduce blocking, high-volume synchronization. While DiLoCo communicates infrequently, its outer synchronization remains bandwidth-heavy and brittle to stragglers and transient failures. We relax exact synchronization to approximate synchronization via mixing/gossip, which degrades gracefully under delays and communication failures. This allows us to factorize DiLoCo synchronization into a non-blocking mixing step that overlaps computation with no staleness, and a blocking mixing step that tightens worker agreement, yielding a tunable trade-off between compute utilization and optimization stability. On up to billion-parameter language models in low-bandwidth settings, our framework substantially improves compute utilization compared to DiLoCo, with training progress ranging from comparable to closely matching it, and is more robust to failures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过近似同步替代DiLoCo精确同步的方法，使用混合/传播机制，在低带宽环境下显著提升计算利用率，同时保持训练效果
AI.motivation: 在大规模分布式训练中，特别是在高带宽数据中心之外，需要减少阻塞性的高容量同步。DiLoCo虽然通信频率低，但其外部同步仍然带宽消耗大，且对慢节点和瞬时故障敏感。
AI.method: 采用近似同步替代精确同步，通过混合/传播机制实现优雅降级。将DiLoCo同步分解为：1)非阻塞混合步骤（与计算重叠，无陈旧性），2)阻塞混合步骤（增强工作者一致性），提供计算利用率和优化稳定性之间的可调权衡。
AI.result: 在低带宽环境下，针对高达十亿参数的语言模型，相比DiLoCo显著提高了计算利用率，训练进度可与之相当或接近匹配，且对故障更具鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过近似同步和混合机制，在保持训练效果的同时，显著提升了低带宽环境下分布式训练的计算效率和鲁棒性。

title: Interpretable Uncertainty Routing Separating Emotion Ambiguity from Distribution Shift in Facial Expression Recognition
summary: Facial expression recognition (FER) is inherently ambiguous: human annotators frequently disagree, and models deployed in real environments face distribution shift. Crucially, these two conditions demand different downstream actions, as ambiguous in-distribution faces should be reported with their ambiguity whereas out-of-distribution inputs should be rejected. However, a single uncertainty score conflates the two. In this study, uncertainty decomposition into aleatoric and epistemic components for FER is investigated, and Uncertainty-Aware Routing (UAR), an inference-time routing mechanism that exploits the separation, is introduced. Specifically, aleatoric and epistemic uncertainties are obtained from a Deep Ensemble of fully fine-tuned DINOv2 models and are each validated against an independent external signal: aleatoric against human annotator disagreement, and epistemic against distribution shift induced by image corruptions. The proposed dual-validation protocol reveals that aleatoric recovers annotator disagreement with Spearman correlation 0.66 (95% CI: 0.64-0.68), and epistemic detects corruption-induced shifts, achieving average AUROC of 0.699 at the highest corruption severity. UAR retains approximately 1.8 times more ambiguous in-distribution faces than single-uncertainty routing at a matched out-of-distribution rejection rate. A strong label-distribution-learning baseline achieves comparable disagreement recovery but cannot separate ambiguity from shift and therefore cannot route, establishing that the value of decomposition lies in the separation enabling interpretable and differentiated action selection.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出不确定性分解方法，将面部表情识别中的不确定性分为aleatoric和epistemic两类，并开发了基于分解的推理时路由机制UAR，以区分标注者分歧和分布偏移，实现更精准的决策。
AI.motivation: 面部表情识别存在固有模糊性：人类标注者经常存在分歧，且真实环境中的模型面临分布偏移。这两种情况需要不同的处理策略——分布内模糊样本应报告其模糊性，而分布外输入应被拒绝。但传统单一不确定性分数无法区分这两种情况。
AI.method:
1. 通过DINOv2模型的深度集成获得aleatoric和epistemic不确定性
2. 设计双重验证协议：aleatoric不确定性用人类标注者分歧验证，epistemic不确定性用图像腐蚀诱导的分布偏移验证
3. 提出不确定性感知路由(UAR)机制，在推理时利用不确定性分解进行路由决策
AI.result:
1. Aleatoric不确定性恢复标注者分歧的Spearman相关系数达0.66(95% CI: 0.64-0.68)
2. Epistemic不确定性检测腐蚀诱导偏移，在最高腐蚀程度下平均AUROC达0.699
3. UAR在匹配的分布外拒绝率下，比单一不确定性路由多保留约1.8倍的模糊分布内样本
AI.conclusion: 不确定性分解能够有效区分面部表情识别中的标注者分歧和分布偏移，为不同场景提供可解释的差异化行动选择。UAR机制证明了分解的价值在于实现分离，而不仅仅是恢复分歧，这为实际应用中的决策提供了更精细的指导。

title: Noise is Signal: Density-Based Outliers as Leading Indicators of Occupational Emergence in Labor Market Text
summary: Standard NLP pipelines for occupational clustering discard the 10-15% of job postings that density-based methods assign to noise. We argue this is an error: in rapidly evolving domains, low posting density signals novelty, not incoherence. We formalize this as the Emergence-Density Inversion (EDI) hypothesis and test it longitudinally on 84,988 job postings across eight quarters (Q4 2022-Q3 2024). EDI is partially confirmed: high-EOS outlier groups transition to stable clusters in 1.4 +/- 0.6 quarters vs. 4.1 +/- 1.2 for low-EOS groups (p < 0.001), though the signal fails in approximately 19% of cases, which we characterize as a failure analysis. We extend the Emerging Occupation Score (EOS) with Temporal Velocity and Cross-Platform Convergence, improving 2-quarter cluster-formation prediction from F1 = 0.61 to 0.74, outperforming Isolation Forest, LOF, GLOSH, and BERTrend baselines. A retrospective study on three now-established roles (MLOps Engineer, DevOps/SRE, Data Engineer) confirms EOS signalled 2-3 quarters before cluster formation, providing held-out validation. A held-out annotator panel (kappa = 0.74) rates EOS > 0.75 as coherent emerging occupations with 77% precision. Prompt Engineer, AI Safety Researcher, Foundation Model Engineer, and Agent Systems Engineer, all absent from O*NET, are top-4 in Q3 2024 and form stable clusters by Q1 2025.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出"密度-涌现反转"假说，认为传统NLP职业聚类方法将低密度职位视为噪声是错误的，实际上这些低密度职位可能代表新兴职业。通过扩展新兴职业评分(EOS)并加入时间动态和跨平台收敛特征，能更早预测新兴职业的形成。
AI.motivation: 传统NLP职业聚类流程会丢弃10-15%被密度方法标记为噪声的职位发布，但作者认为在快速发展的领域中，低发布密度可能表示新颖性而非不连贯性，因此需要重新评估这些"噪声"数据的价值。
AI.method: 提出"涌现-密度反转"假说(EDI)，在84,988个职位发布数据上进行了8个季度(Q4 2022-Q3 2024)的纵向研究。扩展了新兴职业评分(EOS)，加入时间速度和跨平台收敛特征。使用Isolation Forest、LOF、GLOSH和BERTrend作为基线模型进行比较。
AI.result: 高EOS异常组在1.4±0.6个季度内转变为稳定聚类，而低EOS组需要4.1±1.2个季度(p<0.001)。改进后的EOS将2季度聚类形成预测从F1=0.61提升到0.74。对三个已确立职业的回顾性研究显示EOS能提前2-3个季度发出信号。Prompt Engineer、AI Safety Researcher等新兴职业在Q3 2024排名前四，到Q1 2025形成稳定聚类。
AI.conclusion: 低密度职位发布确实可能代表新兴职业而非噪声，EDI假说得到部分证实。扩展的EOS框架能有效识别和预测新兴职业的形成，为职业分类和政策制定提供早期预警系统。

title: RaysUp: Ultra-light Universal Feature Upsampling via Geometry-Aware Ray Representation
summary: Pre-trained Vision Foundation Models (VFMs) have become central to modern computer vision due to their powerful semantic representations and strong generalization ability. However, their patchified or pooled outputs are inherently low-resolution, limiting their effectiveness in tasks requiring fine-grained, pixel-level reasoning. Existing feature upsampling approaches either degrade semantic fidelity or rely on VFM-specific retraining and heavy architectures, hindering efficiency and scalability. To address these challenges, we propose RaysUp, an ultra-lightweight, task-agnostic, and VFM-agnostic feature upsampling framework that reconstructs high-resolution feature maps at arbitrary resolutions. Unlike conventional 2D interpolation or attention-based schemes, RaysUp lifts feature reconstruction into a geometry-aware ray domain. Specifically, we introduce a Spatially Decoupled Guidance Encoder for direction-aware guidance encoding, an Any-Resolution Cross-Attention mechanism for resolution-flexible reconstruction, and a novel Ray Positional Encoding (RayPE) that injects implicit 3D geometric priors via 6D Plucker ray coordinates. Finally, a Geometry-Aware Neighborhood Attention module further ensures content-adaptive bilateral aggregation while preserving geometric consistency. Extensive experiments across diverse dense prediction tasks demonstrate that RaysUp achieves state-of-the-art performance while using only 16% of the parameters of AnyUp and delivering approximately 7x faster inference. These results highlight a substantially improved accuracy-efficiency trade-off and establish RaysUp as a practical and scalable solution for universal feature upsampling. Code is available at https://github.com/MAP-RaysUp/RaysUp.

AI.tldr: RaysUp是一个超轻量级、任务无关、VFM无关的特征上采样框架，通过几何感知的射线域重建实现任意分辨率的高分辨率特征图，在保持语义保真度的同时显著提升效率。
AI.motivation: 预训练视觉基础模型（VFMs）的补丁化或池化输出本质上是低分辨率的，限制了其在需要细粒度像素级推理任务中的有效性。现有特征上采样方法要么降低语义保真度，要么依赖VFM特定重训练和重型架构，影响效率和可扩展性。
AI.method: 提出RaysUp框架：1）空间解耦引导编码器进行方向感知引导编码；2）任意分辨率交叉注意力机制实现分辨率灵活重建；3）新颖的射线位置编码（RayPE）通过6D Plucker射线坐标注入隐式3D几何先验；4）几何感知邻域注意力模块确保内容自适应双边聚合同时保持几何一致性。
AI.result: 在各种密集预测任务上的实验表明，RaysUp实现了最先进的性能，仅使用AnyUp 16%的参数，推理速度提升约7倍，显著改善了准确率-效率权衡。
AI.conclusion: RaysUp作为一个实用且可扩展的通用特征上采样解决方案，通过将特征重建提升到几何感知的射线域，实现了语义保真度和计算效率的平衡。

title: Statistical Matching via Schrödinger Bridge beyond Conditional Independence
summary: Statistical matching combines partially overlapping datasets that share covariates $X$ but observe the target $Y$ and auxiliary variables $Z$ separately. Classical approaches typically invoke the conditional independence assumption (CIA), which makes the problem identifiable but fundamentally implies that the imported auxiliary variable provides no additional predictive power for $Y$ once $X$ is known. To capture this latent $Y$--$Z$ dependence, we propose a novel dependency-aware Schrödinger bridge for predictive statistical matching. Our approach couples the two separated databases by tilting the conservative CIA baseline with a transportation-based compatibility cost, recovering an informative joint distribution. The resulting statistical learning framework yields full probabilistic posterior rules for bidirectional imputation. Theoretically, we establish a sufficient condition under which the learned bridge strictly improves over the CIA baseline, alongside an exact joint recovery guarantee in the Gaussian setting under an appropriate cost. Across synthetic benchmarks and real-world datasets (CelebA and Adult), we demonstrate that our dependency-aware completion consistently improves downstream predictive utility, proving especially beneficial in settings like data recoding where the underlying population exhibits strong $Y$--$Z$ dependence.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种依赖感知的薛定谔桥方法用于预测性统计匹配，通过引入运输成本来捕捉Y和Z之间的潜在依赖关系，相比传统的条件独立性假设基线有显著改进。
AI.motivation: 传统统计匹配方法通常采用条件独立性假设(CIA)，这使得问题可识别但隐含假设一旦已知X，辅助变量Z对Y没有额外的预测能力。为了捕捉Y和Z之间的潜在依赖关系，需要新的方法来提高预测性能。
AI.method: 提出依赖感知的薛定谔桥方法，通过引入运输成本来倾斜保守的CIA基线，恢复信息丰富的联合分布。该方法为双向插补提供完整的概率后验规则。
AI.result: 理论分析表明，在特定条件下学习到的桥严格优于CIA基线，并在高斯设置下提供精确的联合恢复保证。在合成基准和真实数据集(CelebA和Adult)上的实验表明，该方法能一致提高下游预测效用。
AI.conclusion: 依赖感知的统计匹配方法在Y-Z依赖关系强的场景中特别有益，如在数据重新编码等应用中，能显著提升预测性能。

title: READ More than What You See: Reinforcement Learning for Accurate and Coherent Audio Description Generations
summary: Audio Description aims to generate concise narrations of essential visual content in audio-visual media for blind and low-vision audiences. Existing methods either rely on prompting off-the-shelf multimodal models, which often mismatch AD style, or partially optimize training-based systems with next-token prediction, which under-explores model capacity and biases generation toward generic expressions. We present READ, the first reinforcement-learning (RL) framework for training-based AD generation. READ formulates AD as sequence-level optimization with reference-matching, length, and format rewards, and further introduces a dedicated coherence reward under context-aware supervision to promote narratively coherent descriptions. Experiments on MAD-Eval, CMD-AD, and TV-AD show that READ substantially outperforms prior methods across diverse evaluation metrics. Our results highlight RL as a promising paradigm for accurate and coherent AD generation. Our codes, models, and benchmark results will be publicly available.

AI.tldr: READ是首个基于强化学习的音频描述生成框架，通过序列级优化和多种奖励机制，显著提升了音频描述的准确性和连贯性。
AI.motivation: 现有音频描述生成方法存在局限性：基于提示的多模态模型风格不匹配，基于训练的系统采用下一个词预测导致能力开发不足且生成偏向通用表达。需要开发更有效的训练框架来提升音频描述的质量。
AI.method: 提出READ强化学习框架，将音频描述制定为序列级优化问题，包含参考匹配、长度、格式奖励，并引入上下文感知监督下的连贯性奖励来促进叙事连贯的描述生成。
AI.result: 在MAD-Eval、CMD-AD和TV-AD三个数据集上的实验表明，READ在多种评估指标上显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习是准确且连贯的音频描述生成的有前景范式，READ框架为音频描述生成提供了有效的训练方法。

title: GeoRouteNet: Geometry-Enhanced Non-Autoregressive Neural Solver for the Traveling Salesman Problem
summary: The traveling salesman problem (TSP) is a canonical NP-hard combinatorial optimization benchmark that tests the representational capacity and generalization of neural solvers. While non-autoregressive (NAR) approaches offer parallel inference, they often lack sufficient geometric inductive bias and stable training signals, leading to degraded performance under cross-scale and cross-distribution shifts. We propose GeoRouteNet, a geometry-enhanced NAR neural solver for Euclidean TSP. On the model side, GeoRouteNet incorporates centered node features, learnable radial distance basis functions, distance-aware graph attention with explicit edge messaging, LayerNorm-SwiGLU feed-forward blocks, and cross-layer attentive residual mixing. On the training side, we design multi-candidate self-comparison reinforcement learning (MCS-RL), which samples multiple candidate tours per instance, constructs adaptive baselines from greedy and peer candidates, and adds winner-candidate guidance with annealed entropy regularization. On 10,000 random TSP50 instances, GeoRouteNet achieves a 0.32% optimality gap under Beam-1000 decoding. On TSP100, the gap is 1.26%. On 27 stratified TSPLIB EUC_2D instances, the overall gap drops from 17.12% (NAR4TSP reproduction) to 3.60%, while batch inference throughput substantially exceeds that of Concorde and LKH3. Ablation studies confirm that geometric structure enhancement and multi-candidate training are complementary: structure improvements dominate cross-distribution gains, while MCS-RL further stabilizes solution quality when paired with a strong geometric encoder.

AI.tldr: GeoRouteNet是一个几何增强的非自回归神经网络求解器，用于解决欧几里得旅行商问题，通过结合几何结构增强和多候选训练策略，在性能和泛化能力上取得了显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有非自回归方法在解决旅行商问题时缺乏足够的几何归纳偏置和稳定的训练信号，导致在跨尺度和跨分布变化时性能下降。需要开发一种既能保持并行推理优势又能提高泛化能力的神经求解器。
AI.method: 模型方面：引入居中节点特征、可学习的径向距离基函数、距离感知图注意力机制、LayerNorm-SwiGLU前馈块和跨层注意力残差混合。训练方面：设计多候选自比较强化学习，通过采样多个候选路径、构建自适应基线并添加获胜者候选指导和退火熵正则化。
AI.result: 在10,000个随机TSP50实例上，使用Beam-1000解码时达到0.32%的最优性差距；在TSP100上为1.26%。在27个分层TSPLIB EUC_2D实例上，整体差距从17.12%降至3.60%，同时批量推理吞吐量显著超过Concorde和LKH3。
AI.conclusion: 几何结构增强和多候选训练是互补的：结构改进主导跨分布泛化能力提升，而MCS-RL在配合强几何编码器时能进一步稳定解的质量。该方法为非自回归神经求解器提供了有效的几何增强和训练策略。

title: LoCC: Detection and Localization of Lip-Syncing Deepfakes via Counterfactual Frame Consistency
comment: Accepted at the IEEE International Conference on Multimedia and Expo (ICME) 2026
summary: Lip-syncing deepfakes are among the most challenging forms of manipulated media because their artifacts are localized almost exclusively to the mouth region and evolve dynamically over time. Detecting such deepfakes requires precise temporal and spatial modeling of lip motion. In this paper, we propose LoCC, a novel detection framework that performs fine-grained detection and localization of lip-syncing deepfakes at both segment and frame levels. Unlike prior approaches that analyze videos holistically, our method evaluates whether each frame aligns with a counterfactual estimate generated from its temporal neighbors. Real videos exhibit strong and stable consistency, whereas lip-sync deepfakes introduce localized inconsistencies. Following a teacher-student learning paradigm, our model effectively captures these frame-level discrepancies and achieves superior performance over state-of-the-art methods on multiple benchmark lip-syncing deepfake datasets, including LAV-DF, AVDF1M, FakeAVCeleb, and KODF, and generalizes well across compression levels and datasets.

AI.tldr: 提出LoCC框架，用于细粒度检测唇语同步深度伪造，在片段和帧级别进行定位，通过分析帧与时间邻居的反事实估计的一致性来识别伪造。
AI.motivation: 唇语同步深度伪造检测极具挑战性，因为其伪影几乎只局限于嘴唇区域且随时间动态变化。现有方法通常整体分析视频，难以精确捕捉唇部运动的时空异常。
AI.method: 提出LoCC框架，采用师生学习范式，通过比较每帧与其时间邻居生成的反事实估计来评估一致性。真实视频表现出强且稳定的时间一致性，而唇语同步伪造会引入局部不一致性。
AI.result: 在多个唇语同步深度伪造基准数据集（LAV-DF、AVDF1M、FakeAVCeleb、KODF）上超越现有最优方法，在不同压缩级别和数据集间表现出良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: LoCC通过细粒度的时间一致性分析，有效检测唇语同步深度伪造，在检测精度和泛化性方面均有显著提升，为动态唇部伪造检测提供了新思路。

title: Explainable AI for Mental Health Prediction in Drug-Affected Populations with Dragonfly Algorithm and GAN Oversampling
comment: Accepted for presenting at the 16th International Conference on Advanced Computer Information Technologies (ACIT 2026). To appear in IEEE conference proceedings
summary: Mental illnesses among drug users are an increasing international issue, particularly in regions where early detection cannot be easily undertaken. The current literature tends to ignore the use of AI-based mental health analysis in drug users, and low quality of the class imbalance treatment, low interpretability, and optimal hyperparameter optimization can lower predictive quality and clinical utility. This study present a detailed, explainable machine learning (ML) model of multiclass mental health prediction, using a multidimensional data set of drug-affected persons. We combine hybrid PCA-Information Gain (PCA-IG) feature selection, Generative Adversarial Network (GAN)-based oversampling, and Dragonfly Algorithm (DA)-optimized XGBoost to address some of the limitations of existing methods. The suggested framework is effective to work with high-dimensional categorical data, address the issue of class imbalance, and improve predictive performance due to intelligent hyperparameter tuning. The experimental findings show that the XGBoost model optimized using the DA, in combination with GAN-based oversampling, has an accuracy of 94.17% and a weighted F1-score of 93.80%, which is better than the traditional and baseline models. The behavioral, lifestyle, and health factors, particularly sleep quality, physical health, and emotional regulation, are strongly predictive of mental health, with demographic factors having little impact, as seen through feature analysis. SHAP-based explainable AI provides easy-to-understand, instance-level information, enhancing interpretability and trust in models to be used in clinical settings. The results indicate that this framework has the potential to generate valid mental health forecasting tools, which would facilitate early intervention and enhance the treatment of drug-influenced people.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种可解释的机器学习框架，用于药物使用者心理健康的多分类预测，结合了混合PCA-信息增益特征选择、GAN过采样和蜻蜓算法优化的XGBoost，在准确率和F1分数上优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 药物使用者的心理健康问题是日益严重的国际问题，特别是在早期检测不易实施的地区。现有文献往往忽略AI在药物使用者心理健康分析中的应用，且存在类别不平衡处理质量低、可解释性差、超参数优化不足等问题，降低了预测质量和临床实用性。
AI.method: 提出了一种可解释的机器学习框架，包含：1) 混合PCA-信息增益特征选择处理高维分类数据；2) 生成对抗网络过采样解决类别不平衡问题；3) 蜻蜓算法优化的XGBoost模型进行智能超参数调优；4) 使用SHAP提供实例级可解释性分析。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，DA优化的XGBoost模型结合GAN过采样，准确率达到94.17%，加权F1分数为93.80%，优于传统和基线模型。特征分析表明，行为、生活方式和健康因素（特别是睡眠质量、身体健康和情绪调节）对心理健康有强预测性，而人口统计学因素影响较小。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能够生成有效的心理健康预测工具，有助于早期干预和改善药物使用者的治疗。SHAP提供的可解释性增强了模型在临床环境中的可信度和实用性，为解决药物使用者心理健康问题提供了有前景的技术方案。

title: Visual Geometry Transformer in the Wild: Distractor-Free 3D Reconstruction
summary: Current end-to-end multi-view 3D reconstruction methods achieve impressive results, but rely on a restrictive static assumption: the scenes is entire distractor-free with perfect cross-view geometry. This reliance on idealized inputs causes even the most advanced methods to fail in real-world settings, where transient distractors and occlusions present. To address this, we propose Visual Geometry Transformer in the Wild (VGTW), an end-to-end framework for robust reconstruction from inconsistent views. At its core, we isolate and suppress distractor-affected regions while preserving the consistent components across views. Specifically, we introduce a Distractor-aware Training (DAT) strategy that separates clean features from distractor-contaminated ones in the attention mechanism while enforcing feature consistency across images. To enable this, we train the model with an auxiliary mask prediction head, using supervision from a new dataset we collected with pixel-level distractor masks. The resulting VGTW model is a feed-forward network that directly outputs clean, distractor-free point clouds. Remarkably, it requires no additional 3D supervision, remains computationally efficient, and is compatible with existing pipelines. Extensive experiments validate our approach, demonstrating state-of-the-art performance and robust generalization in diverse, real-world scenarios.

AI.tldr: VGTW是一个端到端的多视图3D重建框架，通过注意力机制分离和抑制干扰区域，在存在遮挡和干扰的现实场景中实现鲁棒重建
AI.motivation: 当前端到端多视图3D重建方法依赖静态假设（完美几何、无干扰），在现实场景中遇到瞬态干扰和遮挡时会失败，需要更鲁棒的解决方案
AI.method: 提出VGTW框架，核心是干扰感知训练策略：在注意力机制中分离干净特征和受干扰特征，强制跨视图特征一致性；使用辅助掩码预测头，基于新收集的像素级干扰掩码数据集进行训练
AI.result: VGTW在多样化现实场景中实现最先进性能，具有鲁棒泛化能力；直接输出干净的、无干扰的点云，无需额外3D监督，计算高效，与现有管道兼容
AI.conclusion: VGTW通过干扰感知训练解决了现实场景中多视图3D重建的鲁棒性问题，在存在遮挡和干扰的情况下仍能实现高质量重建

title: Towards Robust Personalized Federated Learning: Vulnerability Assessment and Defense Co-Design
summary: The proliferation of IoT devices has fueled distributed edge systems to collect vast amounts of sensitive data, creating fertile ground for on-device machine learning applications. While federated learning (FL) mitigates privacy concerns by exchanging model parameters instead of raw data, we identify a critical blind spot in current research. We examine the most commonly used personalized federated learning (PFL) methods, which allow clients to maintain private, personalized models to address data heterogeneity across clients. Through systematic analysis, we reveal that PFL methods exhibit heightened vulnerability to transfer-based adversarial attacks compared to centralized learning paradigms. Wherein, malicious clients can exploit local model knowledge to craft adversarial examples that can compromise peer clients' personalized models. We establish this vulnerability through both theoretical analysis and empirical evaluation across multiple benchmark datasets, demonstrating significant accuracy drops across various PFL methods. To address this challenge, we propose a defense framework combining stochastic input noise, input-scaled trace regularization, and parameter sensitivity maximization to improve FL's robustness. Our findings establish the first systematic study of adversarial threats in PFL systems, providing both diagnostic tools and practical countermeasures.

AI.tldr: PFL方法相比集中式学习更容易受到基于迁移的对抗攻击，恶意客户端可利用本地模型知识制作对抗样本来破坏其他客户端的个性化模型。作者通过理论和实证分析验证了这一漏洞，并提出了结合随机输入噪声、输入缩放迹正则化和参数敏感度最大化的防御框架。
AI.motivation: 物联网设备激增导致分布式边缘系统收集大量敏感数据，推动了设备端机器学习应用。虽然联邦学习通过交换模型参数而非原始数据缓解了隐私问题，但当前研究存在一个关键盲点：个性化联邦学习方法在面对对抗攻击时的脆弱性。
AI.method: 通过系统性分析揭示PFL方法的脆弱性，包括理论分析和在多个基准数据集上的实证评估。提出了防御框架，结合随机输入噪声、输入缩放迹正则化和参数敏感度最大化来增强联邦学习的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 研究表明PFL方法相比集中式学习范式表现出更高的对抗攻击脆弱性，恶意客户端能够利用本地模型知识制作对抗样本来破坏同伴客户端的个性化模型，导致各种PFL方法的准确率显著下降。
AI.conclusion: 这是首个对PFL系统中对抗威胁的系统性研究，提供了诊断工具和实用对策。提出的防御框架能有效提高联邦学习的鲁棒性，为个性化联邦学习的安全部署提供了重要参考。

title: Learning Adaptive Dynamical Features via Multi-$τ$ Liquid-Mamba for All-in-one Image Restoration
summary: Image restoration aims to recover high-quality images from degraded observations. Recent Mamba-based image restoration models have demonstrated strong potential in modeling long-range dependencies with linear complexity. However, most existing designs still rely on a single state-evolution timescale, which limits their adaptability to spatially heterogeneous and task-dependent degradation patterns in all-in-one image restoration. In this paper, we propose Multi-$τ$ Liquid-Mamba, an adaptive state space module that introduces input-conditioned multi-timescale liquid discretization into selective state space modeling. Instead of changing the overall selective scan pipeline, the proposed module modulates the effective discretization steps of multiple dynamical branches and adaptively fuses their responses according to degradation-aware gating weights. This design allows the model to capture both fast-varying local details and slowly evolving global structures while preserving the linear scaling property of Mamba with respect to sequence length. Importantly, Multi-$τ$ Liquid-Mamba modulates the effective transition dynamics while preserving the original selective parameterization and hardware-efficient selective scan mechanism, making it a plug-and-play module that can be seamlessly integrated into existing Mamba-based architectures. Built upon this framework, we develop a Multi-$τ$ Liquid-Mamba Image Restoration Network (MLMIR) for all-in-one image restoration. Extensive experiments on a wide range of restoration benchmarks demonstrate that MLMIR consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance in all-in-one image restoration while remaining highly competitive in task-aligned restoration settings.

AI.tldr: 提出了Multi-τ Liquid-Mamba模块，通过输入条件化的多时间尺度液体离散化来增强选择性状态空间建模，用于一体化图像恢复任务，在保持Mamba线性复杂度的同时提升对空间异质和任务相关退化模式的适应性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Mamba的图像恢复模型大多依赖单一状态演化时间尺度，限制了它们对空间异质和任务相关退化模式的适应性，特别是在一体化图像恢复任务中。
AI.method: 提出Multi-τ Liquid-Mamba模块，引入输入条件化的多时间尺度液体离散化到选择性状态空间建模中。该模块调制多个动态分支的有效离散化步骤，并根据退化感知门控权重自适应融合它们的响应，同时保持原始选择性参数化和硬件高效的选择性扫描机制。
AI.result: 基于该框架开发了Multi-τ Liquid-Mamba图像恢复网络（MLMIR），在广泛的一体化图像恢复基准测试中始终达到最先进的性能，同时在任务对齐的恢复设置中保持高度竞争力。
AI.conclusion: Multi-τ Liquid-Mamba通过自适应多时间尺度建模有效提升了Mamba在图像恢复中的性能，是一个即插即用的模块，可以无缝集成到现有的基于Mamba的架构中。

title: Retrieval-Augmented Multimodal Learning for Enzyme-Substrate Interaction Prediction Under Low-Homology Shift
summary: Enzyme substrate interaction (ESI) prediction is a fundamental computational task for biocatalyst discovery and reaction screening in large biochemical spaces. In practical settings, ESI prediction is challenged by sparse positive supervision and low-homology distribution shift, where test enzymes share limited sequence identity with those observed during training. To address these challenges, we propose RAMMESI, a retrieval-augmented multimodal framework for robust ESI prediction. RAMMESI learns explicit pairwise enzyme-substrate representations through directional cross-modal interaction modeling and adaptive fusion. To enhance robustness, RAMMESI retrieves neighboring enzymes at inference time, recombines them with the query substrate, and aggregates the resulting pairwise predictions as contextual evidence. To improve learning under sparse positive supervision, we further adopt an imbalance-aware weighted-BCE objective. Experiments on two ESI benchmarks under sequence-identity-aware splits demonstrate that RAMMESI achieves consistently strong performance, with particular advantages in more challenging low-identity regimes. In addition, the retrieval module improves multiple ESI backbones in a plug-and-play manner, suggesting that retrieval provides a general mechanism for improving robustness under homology shift.

AI.tldr: RAMMESI是一个检索增强的多模态框架，通过方向性跨模态交互建模和自适应融合学习酶-底物对表示，在低同源性分布偏移下实现稳健的酶底物相互作用预测。
AI.motivation: 酶底物相互作用预测面临两个主要挑战：稀疏的正监督信号（正样本少）和低同源性分布偏移（测试酶与训练酶序列相似性低）。现有方法在这些挑战下表现不佳，需要更稳健的预测框架。
AI.method: RAMMESI采用多模态框架学习酶-底物对的明确表示，通过方向性跨模态交互建模和自适应融合。在推理时，检索邻近酶与查询底物重组，聚合预测结果作为上下文证据。同时使用不平衡感知的加权二元交叉熵损失来改善稀疏正监督下的学习。
AI.result: 在两个ESI基准测试的序列身份感知分割实验中，RAMMESI实现了持续强劲的性能，在更具挑战性的低同源性区域表现尤为突出。检索模块可以即插即用地改进多个ESI骨干网络，表明检索是改善同源性偏移下稳健性的通用机制。
AI.conclusion: RAMMESI通过检索增强的多模态框架有效解决了ESI预测中的稀疏正监督和低同源性分布偏移问题，为生物催化剂发现和大规模生化空间反应筛选提供了更稳健的计算工具。

title: CoVStream: Edge-Cloud Collaboration for Understanding of Long Video Streams
summary: Long, continuous video streams are an increasingly critical driver of multimedia intelligence. Existing efforts often handle long videos with a sample-encode-reason approach using large models. However, they overlook a crucial deployment fact: the stream is often produced by computationally constrained devices. This forces an untenable compromise: cloud offloading unlocks strong reasoning but incurs prohibitive bandwidth overhead, while on-device processing remains limited by edge hardware capacity. Therefore, we propose CoVStream, the first edge-cloud collaborative framework for understanding long video streams. The edge node distills raw video streams into compact visual features and semantic captions for transmission to the cloud, minimizing bandwidth costs, while the cloud server integrates this data into an entity graph and global visual context, activating the heavy reasoning model only when a user query arrives. Experiments on VideoMME-Long, LVBench, and RTV-Bench show that CoVStream reduces bandwidth usage by 87.6% while retaining 99.2% of the cloud baseline accuracy on LVBench.

AI.tldr: CoVStream是一个边缘-云协作框架，用于处理长视频流，通过边缘设备提取紧凑视觉特征和语义描述，大幅降低带宽消耗，同时云端保留强大推理能力，实现高效部署。
AI.motivation: 现有长视频处理方法通常采用"采样-编码-推理"模式，但忽略了实际部署中视频流常由计算资源受限的边缘设备产生。这导致两难选择：云端卸载能提供强大推理但带宽开销巨大，而边缘处理受限于硬件能力。因此需要一种边缘-云协作方案来平衡性能与资源消耗。
AI.method: CoVStream框架包含边缘节点和云端服务器。边缘节点将原始视频流提炼为紧凑的视觉特征和语义描述进行传输，大幅减少带宽需求。云端服务器将这些数据整合到实体图和全局视觉上下文中，仅在用户查询到达时才激活重型推理模型。
AI.result: 在VideoMME-Long、LVBench和RTV-Bench上的实验表明，CoVStream将带宽使用降低了87.6%，同时在LVBench上保持了云端基线准确率的99.2%。
AI.conclusion: CoVStream成功解决了长视频流处理中的边缘-云协作难题，通过智能数据压缩和延迟推理策略，在显著降低带宽消耗的同时保持了接近云端的推理精度，为实际部署提供了可行方案。

title: BranchShine: Compact Raw-Audio-to-IPA Transcription with a RoPE E-Branchformer Encoder
summary: Speech-to-IPA transcription is useful when the desired output is pronunciation rather than orthographic text, but competitive multilingual systems are often large and evaluation is sensitive to normalization choices. This paper presents BranchShine, a 33M-parameter raw-audio CTC recognizer with a lightweight convolutional front end and a 19-block RoPE E-Branchformer encoder. We find that BranchShine provides a compact and competitive operating point for IPA transcription under matched normalization and scoring. On a 16,660-utterance multilingual test set covering 41 language labels, BranchShine obtains 9.19% whitespace-insensitive IPA character error rate, compared with 9.78% for the 575.00M-parameter PhoneticXEUS baseline. A secondary child speech reading analysis shows a complementary operating profile: BranchShine is more conservative on incorrect readings, while Whisper-Medium is stronger on exact acceptance of correct readings. Overall, the results indicate that a compact raw-audio-to-IPA model can approach much larger baselines on character-level IPA transcription.

AI.tldr: BranchShine是一个3300万参数的原始音频到IPA转录模型，在41种语言测试集上达到9.19%的字符错误率，优于5.75亿参数的PhoneticXEUS基线（9.78%），展示了紧凑模型在IPA转录任务上的竞争力。
AI.motivation: 当前语音到IPA转录系统通常规模庞大，且评估结果对标准化选择敏感。本文旨在开发一个紧凑而具有竞争力的原始音频到IPA转录模型。
AI.method: 提出BranchShine模型，包含轻量级卷积前端和19块RoPE E-Branchformer编码器，采用CTC识别器架构，参数规模为3300万。在匹配的标准化和评分条件下进行多语言IPA转录评估。
AI.result: 在覆盖41种语言的16,660条话语测试集上，BranchShine获得9.19%的空白不敏感IPA字符错误率，优于5.75亿参数的PhoneticXEUS基线（9.78%）。在儿童语音阅读分析中显示互补特性：BranchShine对错误阅读更保守，而Whisper-Medium对正确阅读的准确接受更强。
AI.conclusion: 紧凑的原始音频到IPA模型可以接近更大基线的字符级IPA转录性能，为语音到IPA转录提供了高效实用的解决方案。

title: Policy-as-Data: Learning Generalizable HOI Diffusion Models from Simulated Physics
summary: Synthesizing realistic Human-Object Interactions (HOI) is critical for creating embodied avatars and functional virtual environments. However, current data-driven approaches primarily rely on motion capture datasets, which are expensive to scale and limited in functional diversity. Models trained with these datasets fail to generalize to unseen objects and maintain physical consistency over long horizons. In this paper, we propose a novel framework that leverages a physics simulator to overcome the data-scarcity bottleneck in HOI generation. Specifically, we propose a scalable pipeline, called \ours, which leverages policies trained with reinforcement learning in a physics simulator for task-oriented data generation and trains a generative model on the augmented dataset for generalizable HOI generation. To seamlessly utilize the synthetic data, we introduce a coarse-to-fine retargeting process that bridges the representation gap between the simplified model used in physics simulator and the standard parametric body models required for generative training. Validated through comprehensive experiments, our method demonstrates enhanced generalization to unseen objects and the capability of long-horizon generation, while exhibiting greater dynamic diversity and physical plausibility.

AI.tldr: 提出一个名为 \ours 的框架，利用物理模拟器解决HOI生成的数据稀缺问题，通过强化学习策略生成任务导向数据，并训练生成模型实现泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 当前基于运动捕捉数据的方法存在成本高、功能多样性有限的问题，难以泛化到未见物体并保持长期物理一致性。
AI.method: 提出基于物理模拟器的可扩展管道，使用强化学习训练策略生成任务导向数据，然后训练生成模型；引入粗到精细的重新定位过程，弥合物理模拟器简化模型与标准参数化身体模型之间的表示差距。
AI.result: 方法在未见物体上表现出增强的泛化能力和长时程生成能力，同时具有更大的动态多样性和物理合理性。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用物理模拟器解决数据稀缺瓶颈，提出的框架在HOI生成方面实现了更好的泛化能力和物理一致性。

title: CLIP-guided Diffusion Model for Backdoor Generation in Sensor-based Human Activity Recognition
summary: Sensors are critical components of modern intelligent devices. The proliferation of the Internet of Things (IoT) and wearable mobile devices has enabled the integration of such sensors to monitor the environment and enable users to take predictive actions. Human activity recognition (HAR) is a popular application in which Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU)-based sensors, such as accelerometers and gyroscopes, are used to provide insights into health, training, and medical diagnosis. However, the accuracy of such a model is hindered by the lack of data. The diffusion model-based technique has proven successful in generating synthetic data for training HAR models. In this paper, we propose a backdoor training technique, IMU-DM-CLIP, that leverages a diffusion model to enable trigger-based attacks on HAR models. Our empirical analysis shows that the attack is successful even with a very small backdoor injection rate of 10\% and 10\% of the data guided for the diffusion model.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为IMU-DM-CLIP的后门训练技术，利用扩散模型对基于IMU传感器的人类活动识别模型进行触发式攻击。
AI.motivation: 人类活动识别（HAR）在健康监测和医疗诊断中应用广泛，但模型准确性受限于数据不足问题。扩散模型已被证明能有效生成合成数据用于HAR模型训练，但本文关注的是利用扩散模型进行安全攻击的可能性。
AI.method: 提出IMU-DM-CLIP后门训练技术，通过扩散模型在HAR模型中植入后门。该技术使用触发机制，仅需10%的数据引导扩散模型，并以10%的后门注入率就能实现攻击。
AI.result: 实证分析表明，该攻击方法非常有效，即使在非常小的后门注入率（10%）和仅使用10%数据引导扩散模型的情况下，也能成功实施攻击。
AI.conclusion: 扩散模型在HAR数据增强中的使用可能带来安全风险，需要关注扩散模型被恶意利用进行后门攻击的可能性，特别是在IMU传感器数据的安全应用中。

title: DBT-Bleed: Dual-Branch Temporal Modeling with Key-Frame Selection for Surgical Bleeding Detection
summary: Intraoperative Adverse Events (IAEs) detection is critical for improving surgical safety, with bleeding being among the most frequent events across many surgery types. Existing methods struggle to distinguish bleeding IAE from visually similar residual blood due to limited temporal reasoning. Moreover, modeling long surgical videos while preserving fine-grained temporal dynamics remains computationally challenging. We propose DBT-Bleed, a dual-branch multi-scale temporal modeling framework disentangling bleeding and normal representations using layer-wise temporal adapters for short- and long-term bleeding progression. To efficiently process long surgical videos without sacrificing fine-grained temporal information, we introduce HiRED, a Hierarchical Entropy-Driven frame selection strategy that retains temporally informative segments while removing redundancy. Experiments on the MultiBypass dataset demonstrate gains of 6.53% in F1, 5.62% in Recall and 9% in MCC values for bleeding IAE detection, consistently outperforming video-level baselines. Additionally, we evaluate cross-procedure generalization on a newly curated dataset from a different surgical procedure type, where DBT-Bleed demonstrates robust transferability by achieving gain of 6% in F1 and 8% in MCC under zero-shot setting. To support this evaluation, we introduce EndoPit-IAE, an Endonasal Pituitary Surgery dataset annotated for IAEs, representing the first IAE-annotated dataset in neurosurgery. Code will be made publicly available upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: DBT-Bleed：一种用于手术中出血事件检测的双分支多尺度时序建模框架，结合分层熵驱动帧选择策略，在MultiBypass数据集上F1提升6.53%，并展示了跨手术类型的强泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以区分手术出血事件与视觉相似的血迹残留，且在处理长手术视频时难以同时保持细粒度时序动态，计算成本高。
AI.method: 提出DBT-Bleed双分支多尺度时序建模框架，使用分层时序适配器分离出血和正常表征；引入HiRED分层熵驱动帧选择策略，高效处理长视频并保留信息丰富片段。
AI.result: 在MultiBypass数据集上，出血事件检测的F1提升6.53%，召回率提升5.62%，MCC提升9%；在跨手术类型零样本设置下，F1提升6%，MCC提升8%。
AI.conclusion: DBT-Bleed能有效检测手术中出血事件，具有优秀的时序建模能力和跨手术类型泛化性；同时发布了首个神经外科IAE标注数据集EndoPit-IAE。

title: RLM-Cascade: Response-Level Speculative Decoding for Cost-Efficient LLM API Serving
summary: We present RLM-Cascade, a proxy-layer system that applies speculative decoding at the response level to reduce LLM API costs without requiring model architecture access or a shared vocabulary. A fast, inexpensive draft model generates a candidate response; a capable verify model accepts, enhances, or is bypassed entirely depending on a lightweight complexity router. On a real-world agentic coding workload (Claude Code), RLM-Cascade achieves a draft-use rate of 88.8% across 125 production requests, reducing API cost by 45.8% relative to a direct Opus baseline. Counter-intuitively, the proxy also reduces end-to-end latency: median response time is 2,026 ms versus 3,698 ms for Native Opus -- a 1.83X speedup at p50 -- because the SKIPPED path (DeepSeek only, no Opus call) dominates the workload distribution. Quality matches or exceeds the Opus baseline: 100% pass rate on a 20-task Code/Math/Instruct benchmark versus 95% for Native Opus. We further describe a rule-based complexity router that selects the SKIPPED path for simple agentic turns and a hybrid tool-call strategy that bypasses the speculative pipeline for schema-critical tool-selection turns. RLM-Cascade is deployed in production as an enterprise AI infrastructure component and published as open source with a live metrics dashboard and Prometheus endpoint.

AI.tldr: RLM-Cascade是一种代理层系统，通过响应级推测解码减少LLM API成本，无需模型架构访问或共享词汇表。在真实世界编码工作负载上实现45.8%成本降低和1.83倍速度提升，同时保持或超过基线质量。
AI.motivation: 降低LLM API使用成本，同时不依赖模型架构访问或共享词汇表。通过智能路由和推测解码技术，在保持质量的前提下减少昂贵模型调用。
AI.method: 1. 使用快速廉价的草稿模型生成候选响应；2. 通过轻量级复杂度路由器决定验证模型接受、增强或完全跳过；3. 采用基于规则的复杂度路由器选择SKIPPED路径处理简单任务；4. 混合工具调用策略绕过推测管道处理模式关键的工具选择轮次。
AI.result: 1. 在125个生产请求中实现88.8%的草稿使用率；2. 相比直接使用Opus基线减少45.8%的API成本；3. 中位响应时间从3,698ms降至2,026ms（1.83倍加速）；4. 在20任务代码/数学/指令基准测试中达到100%通过率（基线为95%）。
AI.conclusion: RLM-Cascade成功实现了在保持质量的同时显著降低LLM API成本和延迟，已在生产中作为企业AI基础设施组件部署并开源，提供了实用的LLM成本优化解决方案。

title: Homographic Navigation: Geometry-Driven Camera Guidance for Deterministic Planar Capture
summary: We present homographic navigation, a geometry-centric framework for guiding camera acquisition toward precise capture of planar regions. Rather than treating homography as an output, we use it as an organizing variable that unifies learning, alignment, and evaluation. From a single annotated reference image, we generate unlimited synthetic training data via homographic augmentation and train a single-shot model for joint recognition and localization of multiple artifacts (physical objects with a rectangular planar target) through sparse keypoint prediction. To address precision under limited model input resolution, we introduce a two-pass inference scheme with global detection followed by localized refinement, and a Stable Warp training strategy that significantly improves accuracy, particularly in the high-precision regime. The model also predicts confidence estimates per predicted keypoint and per the whole sample. Experimental results demonstrate that accurate planar alignment can be achieved from minimal supervision, providing a foundation for geometry-driven camera guidance and future learning from in-the-wild video data.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于单应性的几何中心框架，通过单应性作为统一变量实现平面区域的精确相机采集引导。
AI.motivation: 传统方法将单应性作为输出，本文提出将其作为组织变量来统一学习、对齐和评估，旨在实现从最小监督中实现精确平面对齐，为几何驱动的相机引导奠定基础。
AI.method: 1) 通过单应性增强从单个标注参考图像生成无限合成训练数据；2) 训练单次模型通过稀疏关键点预测进行多工件的联合识别和定位；3) 引入两阶段推理方案（全局检测+局部细化）和稳定扭曲训练策略以提高精度；4) 模型预测每个关键点和整个样本的置信度估计。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法能够从最小监督中实现准确的平面对齐，显著提高了高精度区域的准确性，为几何驱动的相机引导和未来从野外视频数据学习提供了基础。
AI.conclusion: 单应性导航框架成功将单应性作为组织变量，实现了从单个标注图像中学习精确平面对齐，展示了从最小监督中实现几何驱动相机引导的可行性。

title: The Unseen Hand: Manipulating Model Fairness and SHAP with Targeted Identity Re-Association Attacks
summary: As machine learning models grow more influential and opaque, algorithmic fairness and explainability are critical for ensuring accountability. However, we demonstrate that these auditing mechanisms are themselves vulnerable to subtle manipulation, camouflaging the influence of protected features. While prior work on data-agnostic attacks has exposed this vulnerability, they leave behind detectable artifacts that compromise their stealth. We introduce Targeted Identity Re-Association (TIRA) attacks, a novel family of attacks that iteratively and probabilistically manipulate a model's outputs without requiring access to the model's internals or feature representations. We formalize two algorithms: Probabilistic Micro-Shuffling (PMiS), which applies localized adjacent swaps, and Probabilistic Rank-Shift Micro-Perturbation (PRSMP), which introduces small, randomized rank shifts. We empirically demonstrate that TIRA attacks are highly effective at pushing fairness metrics towards ideal values. Crucially, TIRA attacks successfully confound SHAP-based explanations, leaving effectively zero residual attribution for protected features, a major improvement over prior work.

AI.tldr: TIRA攻击通过概率性微扰操纵模型输出，既能有效改善公平性指标，又能完全隐藏受保护特征的影响，欺骗SHAP解释器。
AI.motivation: 随着机器学习模型变得日益不透明，公平性和可解释性审计机制变得至关重要。然而，这些审计机制本身容易受到微妙操纵，攻击者可以隐藏受保护特征的影响。现有攻击方法会留下可检测的痕迹，缺乏隐蔽性。
AI.method: 提出目标身份重关联(TIRA)攻击，通过迭代概率性操纵模型输出，无需访问模型内部或特征表示。具体包括两种算法：概率微洗牌(PMiS)进行局部相邻交换，概率秩移微扰(PRSMP)引入小的随机秩移。
AI.result: TIRA攻击能有效将公平性指标推向理想值，更重要的是能成功欺骗SHAP解释器，使受保护特征的残差归因几乎为零，相比先前工作有显著改进。
AI.conclusion: TIRA攻击揭示了当前公平性和可解释性审计机制的严重脆弱性，攻击者可以隐蔽地操纵模型输出并隐藏受保护特征的影响，这对算法问责制的可靠性提出了严峻挑战。

title: OrthoMotion:Disentangling Camera and Subject Motion via Geometry Semantics Orthogonal Attention
summary: Controllable video generation demands independent command of the camera and the subject, yet 2D conditioning entangles them: camera- and object-induced optical flow share the same inverse-depth (1/Z) scaling and cannot be separated from image evidence alone. We first prove that this entanglement is representational, not architectural -- the 2D camera/object split is a non-identifiable inverse problem -- and therefore reframe decoupling as a question of operator design. We resolve it at the level of the attention operator. OrthoMotion routes camera motion into a geometric channel, a norm-preserving rotation of the rotary position embedding (RoPE) phase, and subject motion into a semantic channel, a gated value injection in cross-attention. Because these sub-operators are algebraically complementary -- a rotation versus a translation of the affine action on tokens -- a lightweight decoupling regularizer provably drives their response subspaces to orthogonality, so the two controls stop interfering. To our knowledge OrthoMotion is the first method to guarantee disentanglement by construction rather than hope for it to emerge. It attains state-of-the-art camera and subject accuracy at once while minimizing cross-talk, which we quantify with a new Cross-Talk Error (CTE) metric, cutting cross-talk by more than 2.4x with no loss in fidelity and generalizing across backbones.

AI.tldr: OrthoMotion通过设计正交的注意力操作符，在视频生成中实现相机运动和主体运动的解耦控制，解决了传统2D条件中两者纠缠的问题。
AI.motivation: 可控视频生成需要独立控制相机和主体运动，但2D条件使两者纠缠：相机和物体引起的光流共享相同的逆深度缩放，无法仅从图像证据中分离。这种纠缠是表示层面的，而非架构层面的，因此需要从操作符设计的角度解决解耦问题。
AI.method: OrthoMotion在注意力操作符层面实现解耦：将相机运动路由到几何通道（通过旋转RoPE相位），将主体运动路由到语义通道（通过门控值注入交叉注意力）。由于这些子操作符在代数上是互补的（旋转vs平移），轻量级的解耦正则化器可驱动它们的响应子空间正交化，从而避免控制干扰。
AI.result: OrthoMotion在同时实现最先进的相机和主体控制精度方面表现优异，同时最小化了串扰。通过新的Cross-Talk Error（CTE）指标量化，将串扰减少了2.4倍以上，且不损失保真度，并能在不同骨干网络上泛化。
AI.conclusion: OrthoMotion是首个通过构造保证解耦而非依赖其自然出现的方法，通过设计正交的注意力操作符，在视频生成中实现了相机和主体运动的可靠解耦控制，为解决可控视频生成中的纠缠问题提供了新的理论框架和实践方案。

title: When AUC 0.998 Is Not Enough: A Candidate Evaluation Protocol for Hidden-State Probes of Indirect Prompt Injection in Multimodal Computer-Use Agents
comment: 17 pages, 3 figures. Camera-ready version for EvalMG '26, The 2nd Workshop on Evaluation for Multimodal Generation, co-located with SIGIR 2026
summary: Hidden-state probing -- a linear classifier on a frozen vision-language model's internal activations -- has emerged as an attractive evaluation tool for flagging indirect prompt injection (IPI) in multimodal computer-use agents before the agent emits a corrupted action. We argue, on a single-backbone cautionary case study (Qwen2.5-VL-7B on Mind2Web, teacher-forced replay), that a high probing AUC on a clean-vs-attack split is not, on its own, evidence of malicious-content detection. Two post-hoc diagnostics -- a paired-construction scalar baseline on text-side injections, and same-step nuisance-matched visual controls on the overlay surface -- do not license an unqualified malicious-content interpretation of the headline while leaving room for partly-semantic readings. We package the diagnostics as a candidate control set with reporting heuristics for what a high clean-vs-attack AUC does and does not license. Labels are injection-surface-present, not attack success; generalisation beyond this backbone and benchmark is a conjecture.

AI.tldr: 该论文警告说，仅凭隐藏状态探测在clean-vs-attack分割上的高AUC值，并不能证明模型能够检测恶意内容，需要结合额外的诊断方法。
AI.motivation: 隐藏状态探测作为一种评估工具，被用于检测多模态智能体中的间接提示注入攻击。但作者担心仅凭高AUC值就得出模型能检测恶意内容的结论可能存在问题。
AI.method: 在Qwen2.5-VL-7B模型和Mind2Web数据集上进行案例研究，使用两种后验诊断方法：文本侧注入的配对构造标量基线，以及覆盖表面上的同步骤干扰匹配视觉控制。
AI.result: 研究发现，仅凭clean-vs-attack分割的高探测AUC值不能证明恶意内容检测能力。诊断结果不支持对高AUC值的无限制恶意内容解释，但允许部分语义解释。
AI.conclusion: 作者提出了一套包含诊断方法和报告启发式的候选控制集，用于正确解释高clean-vs-attack AUC值的含义。标签仅表示注入表面存在，而非攻击成功，且结论的普适性仍需验证。

title: G-MASt3R-SfM: Graph-based View Pruning and Multi-stage Optimization for Robust SfM
summary: Structure from Motion (SfM) is essential for multi-view 3D reconstruction, however, its accuracy heavily relies on the accuracy of image matching. While the recent correspondence matching method, MASt3R, enables robust matching even under challenging conditions, it tends to generate incorrect correspondences for non-overlapping image pairs. Consequently, existing SfM methods using MASt3R, such as MASt3R-SfM, suffer from significant degradation in pose estimation accuracy as they incorporate these unreliable matches directly into optimization. To address this issue, we propose G-MASt3R-SfM, a novel SfM pipeline that enhances robustness through two key modules. First, the Graph-based View Pruning (GVP) module constructs a scene graph from matching confidence and geometrically prunes outlier views. Second, the Multi-Stage Optimization (MSO) module progressively refines camera parameters by expanding the optimization scope from local consistency to the global consistency. Experiments on the ETH3D dataset demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art accuracy in both camera pose estimation and 3D reconstruction, effectively suppressing noise caused by outliers.

AI.tldr: G-MASt3R-SfM：一种增强鲁棒性的SfM方法，通过图基视图剪枝和多阶段优化模块解决MASt3R匹配中非重叠图像对错误对应的问题
AI.motivation: 虽然MASt3R匹配方法在挑战性条件下能实现鲁棒匹配，但对非重叠图像对会产生错误对应，导致现有基于MASt3R的SfM方法（如MASt3R-SfM）在姿态估计精度上显著下降
AI.method: 提出G-MASt3R-SfM，包含两个关键模块：1）图基视图剪枝（GVP）模块，基于匹配置信度构建场景图并几何剪枝异常视图；2）多阶段优化（MSO）模块，从局部一致性到全局一致性逐步细化相机参数
AI.result: 在ETH3D数据集上的实验表明，该方法在相机姿态估计和三维重建方面均达到最先进精度，有效抑制了异常值带来的噪声
AI.conclusion: G-MASt3R-SfM通过创新的图基视图剪枝和多阶段优化策略，显著提升了基于MASt3R匹配的SfM系统的鲁棒性和准确性

title: Discovering Crystal Structure Prediction Algorithms with an AI Co-Scientist
summary: We introduce Human-AI Co-discovery system (HACO) for scientific algorithm discovery through cross-domain search and sparse human steering. Starting from the goal of generating crystal structures from chemical compositions, HACO searched across generative modeling methodologies from multiple fields and identified MaskGIT, a masked generative model from vision, as a promising framework for crystal structure prediction (CSP). HACO instantiated this masked formulation as a discrete token model of crystal structure; guided by sparse high-level human objectives, it then added crystallographic symmetry tokens, space group stratified sampling for polymorph coverage, and sub-bin coordinate refinement, yielding the Masked Generative Crystal Transformer (MaskGXT). On the MP-20 polymorph split, MaskGXT reaches 79.06% match-everyone-to-reference (METRe) accuracy, compared with 70.87% for the strongest evaluated baseline. MaskGXT also attains the best match rate on standard MP-20 and MPTS-52 CSP benchmarks. These results provide evidence that, in domains offering cheap, fast, and well-aligned validation, transfer-guided interactive AI co-scientists can contribute to scientific algorithm discovery by identifying transferable modeling principles and combining them with targeted human domain guidance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Human-AI Co-discovery系统（HACO），通过跨领域搜索和稀疏人类引导实现科学算法发现，开发了Masked Generative Crystal Transformer（MaskGXT）用于晶体结构预测，在多项基准测试中取得最佳性能。
AI.motivation: 传统晶体结构预测方法存在局限性，需要跨领域探索新的建模框架。研究旨在通过人机协同发现系统，结合跨领域算法搜索和人类专家引导，开发更有效的晶体结构预测方法。
AI.method: HACO系统从化学组成生成晶体结构的目标出发，跨多个领域搜索生成建模方法，识别出视觉领域的MaskGIT作为基础框架。将其转化为晶体结构的离散token模型，并基于稀疏高层人类目标指导，添加晶体学对称性token、空间群分层采样以覆盖多晶型，以及子箱坐标细化，最终形成MaskGXT模型。
AI.result: 在MP-20多晶型分割上，MaskGXT达到79.06%的METRe准确率，显著优于最强基线的70.87%。在标准MP-20和MPTS-52晶体结构预测基准测试中均取得最佳匹配率。
AI.conclusion: 在提供廉价、快速且对齐良好的验证的领域中，转移引导的交互式AI协同科学家可以通过识别可转移的建模原则并结合针对性的人类领域指导，为科学算法发现做出贡献。人机协同发现系统在科学算法创新方面具有潜力。

title: Chains That See, Answers That Don't: A Multi-Aspect Evaluation Recipe for Forced Chain-of-Thought on Video-MME
comment: 10 pages, 5 figures. To appear at The 2nd Workshop on Evaluation for Multimodal Generation @ SIGIR 2026 (EvalMG '26)
summary: Forced chain-of-thought (CoT) is widely assumed to make vision-language models more reliable on video question answering. We propose a small three-probe evaluation recipe to test that assumption: paired accuracy across direct, CoT, answer-first, and no-video conditions; a counterfactual video-swap diagnostic over the CoT chains; and a four-rung visual-degradation ladder. Each probe is reported under both a strict and a permissive regex scorer, with multiplicity correction over a manuscript-declared primary family. Applied to Qwen2.5-VL on Video-MME subsets, the recipe returns a two-part finding. The CoT chains are strongly video-conditioned: swapping the input video collapses chain overlap and flips most final letters, the opposite of what a "boilerplate-chain" null would predict. Yet on the same data, forced CoT does not improve MCQ accuracy, and on the smaller 7B model it produces a small but statistically supported drop under a post-hoc primary scorer choice. We do not claim this generalizes beyond the Qwen2.5-VL / Video-MME instantiation; the raw responses and a single recomputation script will be released with the supplementary material so every number can be re-derived.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过三探针评估方法检验强制思维链（CoT）是否真的能提升视觉语言模型在视频问答中的可靠性，发现虽然CoT链对视频内容敏感，但强制CoT并未提高多选题准确率，在7B模型中反而导致轻微但有统计显著性的性能下降。
AI.motivation: 检验广泛假设：强制思维链（CoT）是否真的能让视觉语言模型在视频问答中更可靠。研究者质疑这一假设，认为需要系统性的评估方法来验证CoT的实际效果。
AI.method: 提出三探针评估方案：1）配对准确率比较（直接回答、CoT、答案优先和无视频条件）；2）视频交换反事实诊断，分析CoT链的变化；3）四级视觉退化阶梯测试。所有探针都使用严格和宽松两种正则表达式评分器，并对主要模型家族进行多重性校正。
AI.result: 在Qwen2.5-VL模型和Video-MME数据子集上的测试显示：CoT链对视频内容高度敏感（视频交换会显著改变链内容），但强制CoT并未提高多选题准确率，在7B模型中反而导致轻微但有统计显著性的性能下降。
AI.conclusion: 强制思维链虽然能产生视频敏感的推理链，但并未提升视频问答的准确性，在某些情况下甚至可能损害性能。研究强调这一发现仅限于特定模型和数据，并提供了原始响应和可复现脚本供进一步验证。

title: SpotAttention: Plug-In Block-Sparse Routing for Pretrained Long-Context Transformers
summary: Long contexts have become standard in pretrained LLMs, yet they remain expensive to run: prefill compute grows quadratically with sequence length, and every decode step re-reads a key-value cache that grows linearly with it. Sparse attention cuts these costs by attending only to a relevant subset of past tokens, but selecting that subset is itself expensive. We present SpotAttention, a lightweight selector that attaches to a frozen pretrained transformer and learns by KL distillation to estimate its attention distribution. The selector picks the top-K keys each query attends to, and because its estimate is a calibrated distribution, a dual top-p rule reads the per-query, per-layer budget directly from it. Across Qwen3 (dense, 4B-32B) and Qwen3.5 (hybrid linear/full attention, 4B-9B), SpotAttention matches dense accuracy at contexts up to 128K tokens, eight times the training length. Decode at L=128K runs 3.9x faster than FlashAttention and 1.8x faster than Twilight, the strongest training-free baseline. Quantizing the selector's K-cache to INT4 or FP4 microscale shrinks it 3.5x at no accuracy cost.

AI.tldr: SpotAttention 是一种轻量级选择器，通过 KL 蒸馏学习估计预训练 transformer 的注意力分布，选择 top-K 关键令牌，实现稀疏注意力，在长上下文场景中显著提升解码速度并保持准确性。
AI.motivation: 长上下文已成为预训练 LLM 的标准配置，但运行成本高昂：预填充计算随序列长度呈二次方增长，每个解码步骤都需要重新读取线性增长的键值缓存。稀疏注意力通过仅关注相关令牌子集来降低成本，但选择该子集本身也很昂贵。
AI.method: SpotAttention 是一种轻量级选择器，附加到冻结的预训练 transformer 上，通过 KL 蒸馏学习估计其注意力分布。选择器为每个查询选择 top-K 关键令牌，由于其估计是校准分布，双重 top-p 规则直接从该分布读取每个查询、每层的预算。支持将选择器的 K 缓存量化为 INT4 或 FP4 微缩格式，进一步压缩存储。
AI.result: 在 Qwen3（密集，4B-32B）和 Qwen3.5（混合线性/全注意力，4B-9B）上，SpotAttention 在长达 128K 令牌的上下文中匹配密集注意力准确性，这是训练长度的八倍。在 L=128K 时的解码速度比 FlashAttention 快 3.9 倍，比最强的无训练基线 Twilight 快 1.8 倍。将选择器的 K 缓存量化为 INT4 或 FP4 微缩格式可将其压缩 3.5 倍而不损失准确性。
AI.conclusion: SpotAttention 提供了一种高效的长上下文处理方法，通过轻量级选择器实现稀疏注意力，在保持模型准确性的同时显著提升解码速度，并通过量化进一步优化存储效率。

title: VideoLatent: Video-Language Learning via Latent Self-Forcing
