Experimental evaluations conducted on real-world temporal QoS datasets reveal that our proposed EKL surpasses existing state-of-the-art models with respect to both computational efficiency and prediction accuracy for missing temporal QoS data.

AI.tldr: 提出EKL模型，结合扩展卡尔曼滤波与潜在特征分析，通过双向模型-数据驱动学习实现高效准确的时序QoS预测
AI.motivation: 现有纯数据驱动方法难以捕捉时序QoS数据的非平稳模式，在数据波动时预测精度下降，需要结合模型驱动来提升性能
AI.method: 1) 设计基于扩展卡尔曼滤波的模型驱动特征提取器捕捉时序模式；2) 使用交替最小二乘算法构建数据驱动特征提取器识别时不变特征；3) 采用基于密度的并行策略平衡工作负载提升计算效率
AI.result: 在真实时序QoS数据集上，EKL模型在计算效率和缺失数据预测精度方面均超越现有最先进模型
AI.conclusion: EKL通过双向模型-数据驱动学习有效捕捉时序QoS的非平稳模式，在精度和效率上均有显著提升，为网络服务和云计算资源优化提供有力工具

title: ScalingAttention: Discovering Intrinsic Sparse Attention Topology for Video Diffusion Transformers
summary: While Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) have revolutionized high-fidelity video generation, their reliance on 3D full attention creates a quadratic computational bottleneck. Existing sparse methods face a dilemma: dynamic pruning suffers from prohibitive runtime overhead and memory fragmentation, while static heuristics fail to capture fine-grained dependencies. In this work, we propose ScalingAttention, a training-free framework grounded in a key inductive bias: while individual activations are input-dependent, the high-mass attention regions for each head rapidly converge to a stable, prompt-agnostic Intrinsic Sparse Topology. This topology is weight-encoded, scale-invariant, and efficient to extract. ScalingAttention decouples topology discovery from sparsity control via: (1) WEST (Weight-Encoded Sparse Topology), which extracts a robust block-sparse prior mask offline to eliminate runtime search; (2) FAST (Fidelity-Aware Sensitivity Tuning), which adaptively tunes head-wise sparsity based on diffusion fidelity requirements. To ensure practical acceleration, we co-design a hardware-aligned bit-wise block-sparse kernel. Experiments on Wan2.1 show up to 1.90X end-to-end speedup with superior fidelity, establishing a new Pareto frontier over state-of-the-art baselines.

AI.tldr: ScalingAttention是一个训练免费框架，通过提取权重编码的固有稀疏拓扑和自适应调整注意力头稀疏度，显著加速扩散变换器视频生成，同时保持高保真度。
AI.motivation: 扩散变换器(DiTs)在高保真视频生成方面表现优异，但3D全注意力机制导致二次计算复杂度，现有稀疏方法存在运行时开销过大或无法捕捉细粒度依赖的问题。
AI.method: 提出ScalingAttention框架，包含两个核心组件：1）WEST（权重编码稀疏拓扑），离线提取稳定的块稀疏先验掩码；2）FAST（保真度感知灵敏度调优），自适应调整注意力头稀疏度。同时设计硬件对齐的位级块稀疏内核。
AI.result: 在Wan2.1数据集上实现高达1.90倍的端到端加速，同时保持优于现有方法的保真度，建立了新的帕累托前沿。
AI.conclusion: ScalingAttention成功解决了扩散变换器中的计算瓶颈问题，通过权重编码的固有稀疏拓扑和自适应稀疏控制，实现了高效且高保真的视频生成。

title: Counterfactual learning of new adaptive instructional policies using logged data
summary: Optimizing instructional policies in Intelligent Tutoring Systems (ITS) typically requires costly online experimentation or student simulators that may fail to capture real-world dynamics. This paper introduces an offline contextual bandit framework that learns new adaptive policies directly from logged interaction data. By mapping student-item interactions onto a continuous latent proficiency-difficulty scale using a Rasch model, we cast the tutoring process as a continuous stochastic bandit problem. We propose a novel reward function designed to optimize ''flow'' by balancing task challenge with student success. Our approach includes a round-specific behavior policy estimation that serves as both a propensity model for off-policy evaluation and a diagnostic tool for ITS adaptivity. We demonstrate the efficacy of this framework across four large-scale real-world datasets, achieving consistent policy improvements over the logged behavior policy. The results show that effective instructional policies can be learned and visualized within seconds of computation, providing a scalable path for improving adaptive learning systems without further data collection.

AI.tldr: 基于离线上下文老虎机框架，直接从历史交互数据中学习自适应教学策略，通过Rasch模型将学生-题目交互映射到连续潜在能力-难度尺度，提出优化"心流"的奖励函数，在四个真实数据集上实现策略改进。
AI.motivation: 智能辅导系统（ITS）中的教学策略优化通常需要昂贵的在线实验或可能无法捕捉真实世界动态的学生模拟器，因此需要一种能够直接从日志交互数据中学习有效策略的离线方法。
AI.method: 使用Rasch模型将学生-题目交互映射到连续潜在能力-难度尺度，将辅导过程建模为连续随机老虎机问题，提出优化"心流"的奖励函数，并包含轮次特定的行为策略估计，用于离策略评估和ITS适应性诊断。
AI.result: 在四个大规模真实世界数据集上验证了该框架的有效性，实现了相对于记录行为策略的一致策略改进，能够在数秒计算时间内学习和可视化有效的教学策略。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为改进自适应学习系统提供了一条可扩展的路径，无需进一步数据收集，能够直接从日志数据中学习有效的教学策略。

title: Boosting Neural Video Codec via Scale-Driven Online Flow Refinement
comment: Accepted to ICME 2026 as an oral paper
summary: Although state-of-the-art neural video codecs (NVCs) have achieved remarkable performance, they suffer from limited generalization when encountering complex motion patterns unseen during training. To bridge this domain gap without the expensive cost of online fine-tuning, we propose a Training-Free Scale-Driven Online Flow Refinement (SOFR) method. Serving as a plug-and-play module, SOFR integrates motion information from coarse and fine scales and dynamically fuses them according to warping accuracy, effectively rectifying motion estimation errors with negligible computational overhead. Furthermore, we design a rate-aware strategy that selects different dynamic fusion strategies according to bitrate modes, and employs a reliability check based on warping error to ensure robustness. Extensive experiments on the USTC-TD dataset verify the effectiveness and generalization of SOFR across various NVC frameworks, including DCVC-SDD, DCVC-FM, and EHVC. Notably, it brings an average of 2.84% and 4.05% bitrate savings in terms of PSNR and MS-SSIM, respectively, to DCVC-FM with negligible coding time increase. Our code is available at https://github.com/SunnyMass/SOFR.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种无需训练、基于多尺度光流精炼的在线视频编码优化方法SOFR，通过动态融合不同尺度的运动信息来纠正运动估计错误，显著提升了神经视频编码器对复杂运动模式的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 当前先进的神经视频编码器在遇到训练中未见过的复杂运动模式时，泛化能力有限，而在线微调成本高昂。需要一种无需训练、计算开销小的解决方案来提升编码器对复杂运动的适应能力。
AI.method: 提出了SOFR（Training-Free Scale-Driven Online Flow Refinement）方法，作为即插即用模块。该方法整合了粗粒度和细粒度的运动信息，根据扭曲精度动态融合它们，有效纠正运动估计错误。还设计了码率感知策略，根据不同码率模式选择不同的动态融合策略，并基于扭曲误差进行可靠性检查以确保鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在USTC-TD数据集上的广泛实验验证了SOFR在各种神经视频编码框架（包括DCVC-SDD、DCVC-FM和EHVC）中的有效性和泛化能力。特别是，在DCVC-FM上，PSNR和MS-SSIM分别平均带来2.84%和4.05%的码率节省，而编码时间增加可忽略不计。
AI.conclusion: SOFR方法提供了一种无需训练、计算高效的在线光流精炼方案，能够显著提升神经视频编码器对复杂运动模式的适应能力，实现显著的码率节省，且具有很好的泛化性。

title: EvoRubrics: Dynamic Rubrics as Rewards via Adversarial Co-Evolution for LLM Reinforcement Learning
summary: Rubric-based rewards offer interpretable and fine-grained optimization signals for reinforcement learning in open-ended tasks where verifiable answers are unavailable. However, pre-constructed rubrics remain static throughout training, creating a fundamental mismatch with the evolving policy: fixed criteria gradually lose discriminative power as the model improves, leading to reward saturation and potential hacking. Recent dynamic rubric methods partially address this but rely on external frontier models or ground-truth answers, and update rubrics only at coarse granularity. We propose EvoRubrics, a co-evolutionary RL framework where a Policy LLM and a Rubric Generator jointly improve through adversarial interaction within each training step. As the policy improves under the rubric generator's guidance, the rubric generator adapts its criteria to remain discriminative and informative, enabling evaluation to track the policy in real time and naturally inducing an automatic curriculum. Experiments show that EvoRubrics consistently outperforms static and dynamic rubric baselines across benchmarks. The learned Rubric Generator further generalizes as a transferable reward model. Notably, even a fully self-supervised variant without any external supervision achieves meaningful gains, suggesting that co-evolution between generation and evaluation alone can provide sufficiently rich learning signals. Our code is publicly available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/EvoRubrics-2155/.

AI.tldr: EvoRubrics：一个协同进化的强化学习框架，通过策略LLM和评分标准生成器在训练过程中的对抗性交互，实现动态、自适应的评估标准，解决静态评分标准在模型改进过程中逐渐失效的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统基于评分标准的强化学习方法在开放式任务中存在根本性不匹配问题：静态评分标准随着模型改进逐渐失去区分能力，导致奖励饱和和潜在的黑客行为。现有动态评分方法依赖外部前沿模型或真实答案，且更新粒度较粗。
AI.method: 提出EvoRubrics协同进化RL框架，策略LLM和评分标准生成器在每个训练步骤中通过对抗性交互共同改进。随着策略在评分生成器指导下改进，评分生成器自适应调整其标准以保持区分性和信息性，实现实时评估跟踪和自动课程学习。
AI.result: 实验表明EvoRubrics在多个基准测试中一致优于静态和动态评分基线。学习到的评分生成器可进一步推广为可迁移的奖励模型。值得注意的是，即使完全无监督的变体也能实现有意义的改进，表明生成与评估之间的协同进化本身就能提供足够丰富的学习信号。
AI.conclusion: EvoRubrics通过协同进化框架解决了传统评分标准的局限性，实现了动态、自适应的评估标准，在开放式任务中提供了更有效的强化学习信号，且具有可迁移性和自监督潜力。

title: Learning Stable Canonical Worlds for Novel View Synthesis and Beyond
summary: Feed-forward Gaussian splatting (FFGS) facilitates real-time novel view synthesis, yet current methods often remain tied to view-dependent predictions. As more input views are added, they may accumulate noisy or redundant evidence instead of converging to a stable scene representation. In this paper, we introduce CanonicalGS, a feed-forward pipeline that maps cluttered multi-view observations into a stable, scene-centric representation. CanonicalGS first extracts view-centric evidence from depth, semantic features, and uncertainty estimates, and then aggregates this evidence in a canonical latent world using uncertainty-aware fusion. By emphasizing reliable observations while suppressing uncertain or redundant ones, CanonicalGS produces representations that scale more effectively for novel view synthesis and transfer to downstream visual perception tasks. Experiments show up to a $2.5$ dB improvement in peak signal-to-noise ratio for synthesizing novel views and an $11\%$ gain in semantic segmentation accuracy.

AI.tldr: CanonicalGS提出了一种前馈式高斯泼溅方法，通过将多视角观测映射到稳定的场景中心表示，解决了现有方法在增加输入视角时产生噪声和冗余证据的问题。
AI.motivation: 当前的前馈高斯泼溅方法虽然能实现实时新视角合成，但仍依赖于视角相关的预测。随着输入视角的增加，这些方法会积累噪声或冗余证据，而不是收敛到稳定的场景表示。
AI.method: CanonicalGS首先从深度、语义特征和不确定性估计中提取视角中心证据，然后通过不确定性感知融合将这些证据聚合到规范潜在世界中。该方法强调可靠观测，同时抑制不确定或冗余的观测。
AI.result: 实验显示，在新视角合成方面，峰值信噪比提高了2.5 dB；在语义分割任务中，准确率提升了11%。
AI.conclusion: CanonicalGS能够产生更有效的表示，不仅在新视角合成方面表现更好，还能迁移到下游视觉感知任务中。

title: Prime Fourier Embeddings: A Principled Basis for Modular Arithmetic
summary: Numbers have algebraic structure that standard neural embeddings often fail to expose. We introduce Prime Fourier Embeddings (PFE), which encode integers as prime-indexed (cos, sin) pairs derived from the harmonic analysis of Q, providing a pre-structured representation in which modular arithmetic reduces to selecting the relevant prime channel rather than discovering algebraic structure from scratch. We prove that any linear map equivariant with respect to the product group action on PFE must be block-diagonal with one independent block per prime -- a consequence of Schur's lemma applied to the resulting character decomposition. For square-free composite moduli, the Chinese Remainder Theorem predicts which prime channels are task-relevant. Both predictions are confirmed empirically: ablation studies show specialization ratios exceeding 500x between task-relevant and task-irrelevant channels, with perfect in-distribution test accuracy across all square-free composite moduli tested.

AI.tldr: Prime Fourier Embeddings (PFE) 是一种将整数编码为素数索引的 (cos, sin) 对的新型嵌入方法，利用模运算的代数结构，通过素数通道选择实现高效的算术运算。
AI.motivation: 标准神经网络嵌入通常无法捕捉数字的代数结构，而模运算等代数操作需要从零开始学习结构。PFE 旨在提供预结构化的表示，使模运算等代数操作更加高效。
AI.method: PFE 将整数编码为素数索引的余弦-正弦对，基于 Q 的调和分析。利用 Schur 引理证明线性映射在乘积群作用下必须是块对角的，每个素数对应一个独立块。对于无平方因子的合数模数，使用中国剩余定理确定任务相关的素数通道。
AI.result: 经验验证显示：消融研究中，任务相关通道与任务无关通道的专业化比率超过 500 倍；在所有测试的无平方因子合数模数上，分布内测试准确率达到 100%。
AI.conclusion: PFE 提供了一种预结构化的数字表示方法，能够有效捕捉代数结构，使模运算等任务更加高效，为神经网络处理代数问题提供了新思路。

title: Physics-Guided Spatiotemporal State Space Modeling for Lookahead Molten Pool Segmentation in Laser Wire-Feed Welding
summary: Real-time weld-pool perception is critical for closed-loop control in laser wire-feed welding, where sensing, computation, and actuator response introduce unavoidable delay. This paper presents a physics-guided spatiotemporal state space network for lookahead weld-pool segmentation. The model uses historical coaxial grayscale images, welding process parameters, and aligned wire-state electrical signals to predict the future semantic layout of three physically meaningful regions: keyhole, wire, and molten pool. It combines a visual encoder, process- and sensor-conditioned feature normalization, patch-level temporal state space modeling, horizon-conditioned latent prediction, dense future feature prediction, and a motion-aware mask decoder. Auxiliary signed-distance-function supervision, temporal consistency, feature distillation, and fine-grained keyhole losses further constrain the predicted geometry and local motion. Experiments on a 43-sequence laser welding dataset show that the proposed WeldMamba reaches 74.63\% mIoU at a 500 ms lookahead. Ablation studies further show that temporal history, patch-level state space modeling, and keyhole motion awareness are the main contributors to robust future segmentation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于物理引导的时空状态空间网络，用于激光送丝焊接中的前瞻熔池分割，通过历史图像、工艺参数和电信号预测未来关键孔、焊丝和熔池的语义布局。
AI.motivation: 激光送丝焊接中的实时熔池感知对闭环控制至关重要，但传感、计算和执行器响应存在不可避免的延迟，需要前瞻预测来补偿这些延迟。
AI.method: 结合视觉编码器、工艺和传感器条件特征归一化、补丁级时空状态空间建模、水平条件潜在预测、密集未来特征预测和运动感知掩码解码器，并采用符号距离函数监督、时间一致性、特征蒸馏和细粒度关键孔损失等辅助约束。
AI.result: 在43个序列的激光焊接数据集上，提出的WeldMamba模型在500毫秒前瞻预测中达到74.63%的mIoU，消融研究表明时间历史、补丁级状态空间建模和关键孔运动感知是主要贡献因素。
AI.conclusion: 该物理引导的时空状态空间网络能够有效预测未来熔池语义分割，为激光送丝焊接的闭环延迟补偿提供了可行解决方案。

title: PeLAP-A: Adaptive Latent Pruning for Lightweight Latent Diffusion Models
summary: Latent diffusion models achieve strong generative performance by operating in a compressed latent space produced by a variational autoencoder (VAE). However, it remains unclear whether all latent channels contribute equally to the diffusion process, or whether significant redundancy exists. We introduce PeLAP-A (Adaptive Latent Pruning for Diffusion), a lightweight framework that augments a standard latent diffusion pipeline with a learnable channel-wise importance predictor. A two-layer MLP operating on globally pooled latent features produces a soft mask that suppresses unimportant latent channels before they enter the denoising UNet. The entire system is trained jointly on CIFAR-10 under a combined diffusion, reconstruction, and sparsity loss. Experiments reveal a striking result: under aggressive sparsity regularization (lambda = 0.01), the importance predictor drives all latent channels to near-zero yet the denoising UNet achieves lower diffusion loss (0.0236 vs. 0.0240) and lower VAE reconstruction MSE (22.59 vs. 24.67) compared to the unpruned baseline. We term this the sparsity collapse phenomenon and provide an analysis of why it occurs and what it reveals about the information requirements of latent diffusion models. These findings constitute an exploratory study of sparsity dynamics in latent diffusion training, and demonstrate that denoising UNets can remain remarkably robust to latent channel suppression even under aggressive regularization. Code is available at: https://github.com/kissasium/PeLAP-A.git.

AI.tldr: PeLAP-A是一个轻量级框架，通过可学习的通道重要性预测器对潜在扩散模型的潜在通道进行自适应剪枝，发现在强稀疏正则化下，所有潜在通道都被抑制到接近零值，但扩散损失和重建损失反而降低，出现了"稀疏性坍塌"现象。
AI.motivation: 研究潜在扩散模型中潜在通道的贡献是否均匀，是否存在显著冗余，探索稀疏正则化对潜在扩散训练的影响。
AI.method: 提出PeLAP-A框架，在标准潜在扩散流程中增加一个可学习的通道重要性预测器（两层MLP），基于全局池化的潜在特征生成软掩码，在潜在通道进入去噪UNet前抑制不重要通道。系统在CIFAR-10上联合训练，结合扩散损失、重建损失和稀疏损失。
AI.result: 在强稀疏正则化（λ=0.01）下，重要性预测器将所有潜在通道抑制到接近零，但去噪UNet的扩散损失（0.0236 vs 0.0240）和VAE重建MSE（22.59 vs 24.67）反而比未剪枝基线更低，出现了"稀疏性坍塌"现象。
AI.conclusion: 这是对潜在扩散训练中稀疏动态的探索性研究，表明去噪UNet即使在强正则化下对潜在通道抑制也表现出显著鲁棒性，揭示了潜在扩散模型的信息需求特性。

title: DrivingVoxels: Compositional Sparse Voxel Rasterization for Dynamic Driving Scene Reconstruction
summary: Reconstructing dynamic urban scenes remains challenging due to the unbounded nature of driving environments and the presence of multiple dynamic objects. Currently, potentially faster sparse voxel methods are mainly designed for static scenarios. On the other hand, dynamic approaches based on 3D Gaussian Splatting, despite their high-fidelity, are often time-consuming for driving scenarios and exhibit uncontrollable memory growth in large scenes. To address these limitations, we present DrivingVoxels, a compositional sparse voxel rendering framework for dynamic driving scenes. Our method jointly rasterizes sparse voxels from multiple independent octrees within a single rendering pass. Each rigid dynamic object is represented by an octree defined in its local coordinate frame, while a separate static octree models the stationary background. DrivingVoxels adopts a fully explicit, neural-free representation together with a LiDAR-guided structural initialization that efficiently captures scene geometry. We evaluate our framework on the PandaSet benchmark, demonstrating that DrivingVoxels performs on par on perceptual metrics and better on structural metrics for NVS and reconstruction while requiring shorter training times than previous 3DGS-base methods to an efficient optimization workflow anchored by a strong LiDAR prior.

AI.tldr: DrivingVoxels：一种用于动态驾驶场景的复合稀疏体素渲染框架，通过多独立八叉树联合光栅化解决动态城市场景重建的挑战，在保持高质量的同时显著提升训练效率。
AI.motivation: 动态城市场景重建面临两大挑战：1）驾驶环境的无界性；2）多动态物体的存在。现有方法要么只适用于静态场景（稀疏体素方法），要么在驾驶场景中训练耗时且内存增长不可控（基于3D高斯泼溅的动态方法）。需要一种既能处理动态场景又能保持高效率的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出DrivingVoxels框架：1）采用复合表示：每个刚性动态物体用其局部坐标系中的八叉树表示，静态背景用单独的静态八叉树建模；2）单次渲染中联合光栅化多个独立八叉树的稀疏体素；3）使用完全显式、无神经网络的表示；4）通过LiDAR引导的结构初始化高效捕获场景几何；5）基于强LiDAR先验的高效优化流程。
AI.result: 在PandaSet基准测试中，DrivingVoxels在感知指标上与先前方法相当，在NVS和重建的结构指标上表现更好。相比基于3DGS的方法，训练时间显著缩短，实现了高效的优化流程。
AI.conclusion: DrivingVoxels成功解决了动态驾驶场景重建的效率和内存问题，通过复合稀疏体素表示和LiDAR引导的初始化，在保持高质量的同时实现了快速训练，为大规模动态场景重建提供了实用解决方案。

title: FlowTrain: Flow-Based Decoupled Training for Industrial-Grade Vision-Language Models
summary: Industrial-grade distributed training of vision-language models (VLMs) remains far less efficient than that of unimodal LLMs. Existing solutions either follow a monolithic design that assigns uniform parallelism to heterogeneous modules or adopt a disaggregated deployment that separates modules while executing them as a batch-synchronized pipeline. In this paper, we highlight that the above solutions are still not sufficient, and VLM training can be further decoupled. To this end, we present FlowTrain, a flow-based decoupled training framework that reformulates VLM training as a producer-consumer dataflow coordinated through a unified memory pool. The encoder and backbone can progress independently over a global virtual address space. Since this execution decoupling fundamentally changes the optimization objective of allocation and scheduling, FlowTrain further introduces a heterogeneous parallel allocator that assigns module-specific parallelism strategies by solving a throughput matching problem. The dynamic packing scheduler is used to construct balanced microbatches at runtime according to the actual LLM-side computation cost. Extensive experiments on real-world workloads show that FlowTrain achieves over 50% MFU and up to 1.7x throughput improvement, narrowing the efficiency gap to LLM-only training.

AI.tldr: FlowTrain是一个基于数据流的解耦训练框架，通过统一内存池协调生产者和消费者的数据流，将视觉语言模型训练解耦为独立模块，实现超过50%的MFU和1.7倍吞吐量提升。
AI.motivation: 工业级视觉语言模型（VLM）分布式训练效率远低于单模态LLM。现有解决方案要么采用统一并行度的整体设计，要么采用模块分离但批量同步执行的部署方式，这些方案仍不充分，VLM训练可以进一步解耦。
AI.method: 1. FlowTrain框架：将VLM训练重新定义为通过统一内存池协调的生产者-消费者数据流，编码器和骨干网络可以在全局虚拟地址空间上独立进展。2. 异构并行分配器：通过解决吞吐量匹配问题，为模块分配特定的并行策略。3. 动态打包调度器：根据实际的LLM侧计算成本，在运行时构建平衡的微批次。
AI.result: 在真实世界工作负载上的广泛实验表明，FlowTrain实现了超过50%的MFU（模型浮点运算利用率）和高达1.7倍的吞吐量提升，缩小了与纯LLM训练的效率差距。
AI.conclusion: FlowTrain通过数据流解耦训练框架，显著提升了视觉语言模型训练的效率和吞吐量，为解决VLM与LLM训练效率差距提供了有效方案。

title: SPAR: Semantic-Pixel Self-Alignment and Adaptive Routing for Unified Multimodal Models
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable success in visual understanding but remain constrained in visual generation due to the fundamental feature discrepancy between semantic perception and pixel-level reconstruction. Bridging this gap requires overcoming two core challenges: endowing semantic encoders with high-fidelity reconstruction capabilities, and effectively aligning generative models with semantic spaces without relying on external teachers. To this end, we propose a novel unified multimodal framework featuring \textbf{S}emantic-\textbf{P}ixel self-alignment and \textbf{A}daptive \textbf{R}outing (\textbf{SPAR}). First, to reconcile semantic perception with pixel-level reconstruction, we introduce an asymmetric dual-stream unified tokenizer. A lightweight semantic stream anchors discriminative features, while a Transformer-augmented pixel stream recovers fine-grained visual details into a unified compact latent space. Second, to eliminate external dependencies, we propose a self-aligned generation paradigm that natively leverages this optimized tokenizer as an internal alignment teacher for the diffusion model. Furthermore, to facilitate flexible multimodal interaction within this unified space, we introduce Dynamic Token Routing, which enables each token to adaptively aggregate multi-layer MLLM features based on its distinct semantic demands. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SPAR establishes the state-of-the-art for unified architectures, achieving exceptional generation and reconstruction quality while preserving foundational visual understanding capabilities.

AI.tldr: SPAR是一个统一的多模态框架，通过语义-像素自对齐和自适应路由机制，解决了MLLMs在视觉生成方面的限制，实现了感知与生成能力的统一。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在视觉理解方面取得了显著成功，但在视觉生成方面仍受限制，主要因为语义感知与像素级重建之间存在根本特征差异。需要克服两个核心挑战：赋予语义编码器高保真重建能力，以及在没有外部教师的情况下有效对齐生成模型与语义空间。
AI.method: 提出SPAR框架：1）引入非对称双流统一分词器，轻量级语义流锚定判别特征，Transformer增强的像素流恢复细粒度视觉细节到统一紧凑潜在空间；2）提出自对齐生成范式，利用优化的分词器作为扩散模型的内部对齐教师；3）引入动态令牌路由，使每个令牌能够根据其特定语义需求自适应聚合多层MLLM特征。
AI.result: 广泛实验表明，SPAR在统一架构中建立了最先进的性能，实现了卓越的生成和重建质量，同时保持了基础的视觉理解能力。
AI.conclusion: SPAR通过创新的语义-像素自对齐和自适应路由机制，成功解决了多模态模型中感知与生成的鸿沟，为统一的多模态理解和生成提供了有效的解决方案。

title: FLFL: Federated Latent Factor Learning for Private Recovery of Spatio-Temporal Signals
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2504.15525
summary: Wireless sensor network (WSNs) stands out as a burgeoning and promising domain in intelligent sensing. Owing to various factors such as sudden sensor malfunctions or deliberate shutdown of partial nodes to save energy, the collected sensing signals from WSNs commonly have massive missing data, leading to adverse effects on subsequent analysis or decision-making. Latent factor learning (LFL) has proven to be highly effective in recovering the missing data for WSNs. However, the existing LFL models require the collected sensing signals to be maintained in one central place like a central server, which is becoming unacceptable for data owners who are getting increasingly privacy-sensitive. To address this issue, this paper innovatively proposes a federated latent factor learning (FLFL) model for privacy-preserving spatio-temporal signal recovery. Its main idea is two-fold: 1) it designs a sensor-level federated learning framework based on LFL, where each sensor only needs to upload gradient information rather than raw data for training a privacy-preserving recovery model, and 2) it incorporates the spatio-temporal correlation into the designed federated learning framework as the regularization constraint to improve its recovery accuracy. With such designs, FLFL can not only accurately recover the missing data of WSNs but also ensure data owners' privacy-preserving of raw data. To evaluate the proposed FLFL model, extensive experiments have been conducted on four real-world WSN datasets. The results demonstrate that FLFL significantly outperforms eight state-of-the-art federated and non-federated signal recovery models in terms of recovery accuracy with privacy-preserving.

AI.tldr: 提出联邦潜在因子学习(FLFL)模型，用于无线传感器网络(WSN)中隐私保护的时空信号恢复，解决传统集中式方法的数据隐私问题。
AI.motivation: 无线传感器网络常因传感器故障或节能关闭导致大量缺失数据，传统潜在因子学习需要集中存储原始数据，无法满足日益增长的隐私保护需求。
AI.method: 1) 设计基于潜在因子学习的传感器级联邦学习框架，传感器仅上传梯度信息而非原始数据；2) 将时空相关性作为正则化约束融入联邦学习框架以提高恢复精度。
AI.result: 在四个真实WSN数据集上的实验表明，FLFL在恢复精度上显著优于8个最先进的联邦和非联邦信号恢复模型，同时确保数据隐私保护。
AI.conclusion: 提出的FLFL模型既能准确恢复WSN缺失数据，又能确保原始数据的隐私保护，为隐私敏感的无线传感器网络信号恢复提供了有效解决方案。

title: UECP: Uncertainty-Enhanced Collaborative Perception
summary: Collaborative perception serves as a pivotal solution to enhance the perception capability of individual agents in autonomous driving, where a core challenge lies in seeking reliable evidence to quantify and weight the contribution of each participating agent. Existing methods typically rely on a confidence map, which is co-trained with the detection head, but it is inherently correlated with the detection results and thus fails to provide unbiased physical evidence. Furthermore, how to deeply integrate evidence into the cooperative fusion process remains an open question. To address these issues, this paper first proposes an uncertainty map, a physically grounded and unambiguous metric for evaluating perception quality. This map is directly supervised by real-time sensor signals, i.e., LiDAR point density, ensuring decoupling from detection noise and thereby providing physical scenario-aware evidence for weighting agent contribution. Based on this map, we develop the Uncertainty-Enhanced Collaborative Perception (UECP) framework, centered on the Uncertainty-Aware Pyramid Fusion (UAPF) module. UAPF uses a coarse-to-fine strategy, with two key components: Uncertainty-Weighted Downsampling (UWD) for high-fidelity feature preservation, and Uncertainty-Guided Residual Fusion (UGRF) to reinforce ego features, suppressing noise and ensuring robust fusion. Extensive experiments on real-world datasets show UECP outperforms state-of-the-art methods in effectiveness and robustness by embedding the uncertainty map into fusion. Code will be publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于不确定性地图的协同感知框架UECP，通过物理基础的不确定性度量来量化各智能体贡献，解决了现有方法中置信度地图与检测结果耦合的问题，实现了更鲁棒的融合。
AI.motivation: 现有协同感知方法通常使用与检测头共同训练的置信度地图来量化各智能体贡献，但这种方法与检测结果存在固有耦合，无法提供无偏的物理证据。需要一种物理基础、明确的质量评估指标来指导融合过程。
AI.method: 提出不确定性地图作为感知质量评估的物理基础指标，直接由实时传感器信号（LiDAR点密度）监督，与检测噪声解耦。基于此构建UECP框架，核心是UAPF模块，采用由粗到精策略，包含不确定性加权下采样（UWD）和高保真特征保持、不确定性引导残差融合（UGRF）来增强自我特征并抑制噪声。
AI.result: 在真实世界数据集上的广泛实验表明，UECP通过将不确定性地图嵌入融合过程，在有效性和鲁棒性方面优于最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: 不确定性地图为协同感知提供了物理基础、无偏的证据，UECP框架通过不确定性感知的金字塔融合实现了更鲁棒的特征融合，显著提升了协同感知性能。

title: Minimax Quantile Lower Bounds for Interactive Statistical Decision Making with Privacy
summary: Minimax risk and regret are expectation-based criteria and do not capture rare but consequential failures. To address this concern, we develop a $δ$-explicit minimax-quantile theory for interactive statistical decision making (ISDM). We first provide structural relations between minimax quantiles, lower minimax quantiles, and minimax risk. This includes a quantile-to-expectation conversion and an equivalence between strict and lower minimax quantiles outside a countable set of confidence levels. We then derive two converse tools for ISDM: a high-probability interactive Fano's method and a high-probability interactive Le Cam's method. Then, we show that mutual-information (MI) privacy can be handled in the same framework by restricting the admissible decision class. For coordinatewise Gaussian privatization, we derive a two-point template that isolates the privacy-induced variance inflation. We instantiate this template for Gaussian mean estimation, and use the same two-point strategy directly for two-armed Gaussian bandits. We then derive a minimax quantile lower bound for the $K$-armed Gaussian bandit problem, showing that the interactive Fano method captures the exploration cost over multiple possible best arms. The resulting lower bounds are explicit in the confidence level $δ$ and in the privacy budget for the private problems. They yield $\log(1/δ)/n$ scaling for squared-error Gaussian mean estimation, $\sqrt{T\log(1/δ)}$ scaling for two-armed bounded-mean Gaussian bandits, and $\sqrt{KT\log(1/δ)}$-type scaling for the $K$-armed bandits, with privacy appearing through a Gaussian variance-inflation factor for the private problems.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个δ-显式极小极大分位数理论，用于交互式统计决策，以处理罕见但后果严重的失败情况，并应用于隐私保护和高斯多臂老虎机问题。
AI.motivation: 传统极小极大风险和遗憾是基于期望的准则，无法捕捉罕见但有严重后果的失败。为了处理这一问题，需要开发一个能够明确考虑置信水平δ的理论框架。
AI.method: 开发δ-显式极小极大分位数理论，包括分位数与期望的转换关系、严格和下限极小极大分位数的等价性。提出两种交互式逆工具：高概率交互式Fano方法和高概率交互式Le Cam方法。将互信息隐私纳入同一框架，并针对坐标高斯隐私化推导两点模板。
AI.result: 建立了极小极大分位数、下限极小极大分位数和极小极大风险之间的结构关系。推导出高斯均值估计的log(1/δ)/n缩放、双臂有界均值高斯老虎机的√(Tlog(1/δ))缩放，以及K臂老虎机的√(KTlog(1/δ))型缩放。隐私问题通过高斯方差膨胀因子体现。
AI.conclusion: 该理论为交互式统计决策提供了高概率性能保证，能够处理罕见失败和隐私约束，特别适用于高斯多臂老虎机等序列决策问题，为隐私保护机器学习提供了理论工具。

title: Unlimited OCR Works
summary: Recently, end-to-end OCR models, exemplified by DeepSeek OCR, have once again thrust OCR into the spotlight. A widely held view is that employing a large language model (LLM) as the decoder allows the model to leverage the prior distribution of language, leading to improved OCR performance. However, the downside is equally evident: as the output sequence lengthens, the accumulated KV cache drives up memory consumption and progressively slows down generation. This stands in stark contrast to humans, who exhibit no such decline in efficiency during long-horizon copying tasks. In this technical report, we propose Unlimited OCR, a model designed to emulate human parsing working memory. Taking DeepSeek OCR as the baseline, we replace all attention layers in the decoder with our proposed Reference Sliding Window Attention (R-SWA), which reduces attention computation costs while maintaining a constant KV cache throughout the entire decoding process. By combining the high compression rate of DeepSeek OCR's encoder with our constant KV cache design, Unlimited OCR can transcribe dozens of pages of documents in a single forward pass under a standard maximum length of 32K. More importantly, R-SWA is a general-purpose parsing attention mechanism - beyond OCR, it is equally applicable to tasks such as ASR, translation, etc. Codes and model weights are publicly available at http://github.com/baidu/Unlimited-OCR.

AI.tldr: Unlimited OCR提出了一种基于参考滑动窗口注意力(R-SWA)的OCR模型，通过模拟人类解析工作记忆，在长序列解码时保持恒定KV缓存，显著降低内存消耗和计算成本。
AI.motivation: 当前基于大语言模型解码器的端到端OCR模型在处理长序列时存在KV缓存累积导致内存消耗大、生成速度下降的问题，这与人类在长篇幅抄写任务中效率不下降的特点形成鲜明对比。
AI.method: 以DeepSeek OCR为基线，将解码器中的所有注意力层替换为提出的参考滑动窗口注意力(R-SWA)，该机制在保持恒定KV缓存的同时降低注意力计算成本，结合DeepSeek OCR编码器的高压缩率，实现单次前向传播处理数十页文档。
AI.result: Unlimited OCR能够在标准最大长度32K下，单次前向传播转录数十页文档，显著降低了长序列解码的内存和计算开销。R-SWA是一种通用解析注意力机制，同样适用于ASR、翻译等任务。
AI.conclusion: 通过模拟人类工作记忆的R-SWA机制，Unlimited OCR解决了长序列OCR中的KV缓存膨胀问题，实现了高效的长文档转录，为端到端OCR和其他序列任务提供了新的解决方案。

title: ReNIO: Reweighting Negative Trajectory Importance for LLM On-Policy Distillation
summary: On-policy distillation (OPD) improves LLM reasoning by training a student model on its own generated outputs, but standard OPD treats all student-generated outputs (SGOs) equally regardless of their informativeness. We observe a consistent asymmetry in controlled filtering experiments: in both OPD and on-policy self distillation (OPSD), training only on incorrect SGOs outperforms training only on correct ones. Our further analysis suggests that models trained on correct-only SGOs tend to generate shorter reasoning traces and show weaker reflection behavior, while incorrect SGOs better preserve exploratory reasoning near the model's capability boundary. To exploit this signal without requiring full answer-containing rollouts, we introduce ReNIO, which Reweights Negative trajectory Importance for LLM On-policy distillation. By using the student-to-teacher probability ratio, ReNIO identifies pivotal tokens leading to wrong reasoning traces and aggregates their information into a normalized sample weight, inherently assigning larger weights to likely negative trajectories without observing the correctness of final-answer. Since Re-NIO only uses prefix-conditioned token probabilities, it preserves OPD's prefix training advantage over full-rollout reinforcement learning. Across both mathematical reasoning and code generation tasks, ReNIO improves both OPD and OPSD, with representative relative gains of up to 8.90% for Qwen3-1.7B and 10.00% for R1-Distill-Qwen-7B on mathematical reasoning benchmarks. Code repo: https://github.com/BDML-lab/ReNIO.

AI.tldr: ReNIO是一种改进LLM推理的on-policy蒸馏方法，通过重加权负轨迹重要性来提升训练效果，无需完整答案轨迹即可识别关键错误推理标记。
AI.motivation: 标准on-policy蒸馏（OPD）平等对待所有学生生成输出，忽略了不同输出的信息价值差异。研究发现训练仅使用错误输出比仅使用正确输出效果更好，因为错误输出能更好地保留模型能力边界附近的探索性推理。
AI.method: 提出ReNIO方法，使用学生到教师的概率比率识别导致错误推理轨迹的关键标记，将这些信息聚合为归一化样本权重，为可能负轨迹分配更大权重，仅使用前缀条件标记概率，无需观察最终答案正确性。
AI.result: 在数学推理和代码生成任务上，ReNIO显著提升了OPD和OPSD效果，Qwen3-1.7B在数学推理基准上相对提升8.90%，R1-Distill-Qwen-7B提升10.00%。
AI.conclusion: ReNIO通过利用负轨迹的重要性重加权，有效改进了on-policy蒸馏，在保持前缀训练优势的同时提升了模型推理能力，为LLM蒸馏提供了新思路。

title: Three-Step Hierarchical Transformer for Multi-Pedestrian Trajectory Prediction
summary: Pedestrian trajectory prediction requires modeling temporal dynamics, multimodal cues, and social interactions in crowded environments. Existing methods often address these factors separately or entangle them in costly attention blocks, limiting scalability, flexibility, and interpretability. We propose a three-step hierarchical Transformer that explicitly separates temporal encoding, multimodal fusion, and scene-level interaction reasoning. Lightweight GRU summaries enable efficient cross-modal attention, while social attention over time--agent tokens captures inter-pedestrian influences at manageable cost. Experiments on JTA, JRDB, and the Pedestrians and Cyclists in Road Traffic dataset show state-of-the-art performance on real-world datasets (JRDB, Urban) and competitive results on JTA. Ablation and qualitative analyses confirm the contribution of each stage and the model's ability to anticipate complex behaviors such as early turning.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种三层次Transformer架构，用于行人轨迹预测，通过分离时间编码、多模态融合和场景级交互推理来提高可扩展性、灵活性和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常单独处理时间动态、多模态线索和社交交互，或将它们纠缠在昂贵的注意力块中，限制了可扩展性、灵活性和可解释性。需要一种更高效、更清晰的架构来同时处理这些因素。
AI.method: 提出三层次Transformer架构：1) 时间编码层处理个体轨迹的时间动态；2) 多模态融合层使用轻量级GRU摘要实现高效的跨模态注意力；3) 场景级交互推理层通过时间-智能体令牌的社交注意力以可管理成本捕捉行人间的相互影响。
AI.result: 在JTA、JRDB和道路行人及自行车数据集上进行了实验，在真实世界数据集（JRDB、Urban）上达到了最先进的性能，在JTA数据集上获得了有竞争力的结果。消融实验和定性分析证实了每个阶段的贡献，以及模型预测复杂行为（如早期转弯）的能力。
AI.conclusion: 提出的三层次Transformer架构通过明确分离时间编码、多模态融合和场景级交互推理，在行人轨迹预测任务中实现了更好的可扩展性、灵活性和可解释性，同时保持了高效性和性能优势。

title: Self-Evolution for Multi-Turn Tool-Calling Agents via Divergence-Point Preference Learning
summary: Multi-turn tool-using agents must coordinate long-horizon tool sequences while tracking dialogue state and policy constraints. Existing approaches often separate inference-time orchestration from parameter-level learning, leaving tool selection weakly structured and preference updates vulnerable to train--deployment prompt mismatch. For within-benchmark self-improvement, ToolGraph combines schema-derived topology, transition weights estimated from successful rollouts, and history-aware controls for write prerequisites and repeated-search loops. We then construct 161 preference pairs by locating divergence points via state-based matching and prefix-based alignment, filtered through action-correctness annotations, and train DPO under the same ToolGraph context used at inference. Across 375 tau2-bench tasks, ToolGraph raises the weighted average reward from 0.304 to 0.338 (+11.2% relative), while ToolGraph+DPO reaches 0.355 (+16.8% over the baseline), with the DPO gain concentrated in airline and retail. Fine-grained diagnostics further show that roughly half of telecom trajectories exhaust the step budget before action execution and that chosen reward positivity is the most useful checkpoint signal across our 16 evaluated DPO configurations.

AI.tldr: ToolGraph结合了模式衍生的拓扑结构、从成功轨迹估计的转移权重和历史感知控制，通过DPO训练提升多轮工具使用智能体的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的多轮工具使用智能体方法将推理时编排与参数级学习分离，导致工具选择结构弱化，偏好更新容易受到训练-部署提示不匹配的影响。
AI.method: ToolGraph结合模式衍生的拓扑结构、从成功轨迹估计的转移权重和历史感知控制（用于写入前提条件和重复搜索循环）。通过状态匹配和前缀对齐构建161个偏好对，在ToolGraph上下文下训练DPO。
AI.result: 在375个tau2-bench任务中，ToolGraph将加权平均奖励从0.304提升到0.338（相对+11.2%），ToolGraph+DPO达到0.355（比基线+16.8%），DPO增益主要集中在航空和零售领域。诊断显示电信轨迹约一半在行动执行前耗尽步数预算，选择的奖励积极性是16个DPO配置中最有用的检查点信号。
AI.conclusion: ToolGraph通过结构化工具选择和上下文一致的DPO训练，有效提升了多轮工具使用智能体的性能，特别是在特定领域任务中表现出显著改进。

title: MotionHalluc: Diagnosing Kinematic Hallucinations in Fine-Grained Motion Reasoning
summary: Motion instruction generation in cross-video comparison aims to produce corrective feedback that describes the differences between a query and a reference motion. However, existing models often generate instructions that exhibit motion hallucinations, failing to reflect actual kinematic differences between paired videos. To systematically investigate these hallucinations, we introduce MotionHalluc, a dedicated benchmark for evaluating motion hallucinations in paired-video comparison. MotionHalluc comprises 1540 fine-grained questions over 553 video pairs, evaluating hallucinations along three core dimensions: (1)directional hallucination, (2)attributional hallucination, and (3)temporal hallucination. Extensive evaluations of state-of-the-art large multimodal models demonstrate high susceptibility to these hallucinations. Furthermore, we provide Perceive-Parse-Verify (PPV) as a training-free measurements extraction and verification baseline that converts candidate instructions into executable measurement queries and supplies kinematic measurements at inference time. Our results show that this simple measurements injection yields an average 10.6% performance gain across models, suggesting that motion reasoning with explicit quantitative measurements is a key factor in reducing hallucinations in cross-video comparison. Our code and dataset will be made publicly available upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了MotionHalluc基准，用于评估跨视频比较中的运动幻觉问题，并提出了基于测量的训练免费方法PPV来减少幻觉。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在跨视频比较中生成的运动指令经常出现运动幻觉，无法准确反映配对视频之间的实际运动学差异，需要系统性地研究和解决这一问题。
AI.method: 1) 构建MotionHalluc基准，包含1540个细粒度问题和553个视频对，评估三个维度的幻觉：方向性、属性性和时间性幻觉；2) 提出Perceive-Parse-Verify(PPV)方法，将候选指令转换为可执行的测量查询，在推理时提供运动学测量。
AI.result: 1) 对现有最先进大模型评估显示它们对运动幻觉高度敏感；2) PPV方法通过测量注入平均获得10.6%的性能提升，表明显式定量测量是减少跨视频比较中幻觉的关键因素。
AI.conclusion: 运动幻觉是跨视频比较中的重要问题，MotionHalluc基准为系统评估提供了工具，而基于测量的方法能有效减少幻觉，显式定量测量对准确的运动推理至关重要。

title: Temporal-Spectral Alignment with Frequency Adaptation for Source-Free Time-Series Adaptation
summary: The goal of source-free domain adaptation (SFDA) for time-series data is to transfer knowledge from a pre-trained source model to an unlabeled target domain without requiring access to source data, while addressing feature shift and temporal drift inherent in the signals. Although existing approaches have explored temporal dynamics in unsupervised source-free adaptation, they largely overlook spectral shifts in time-series data. Towards this end, we propose a novel approach termed temporal-Spectral Alignment with Frequency Adaptation (SAFA) for source-free time-series domain adaptation. Specifically, we first model the source domain at multiple scales by jointly capturing temporal dependencies and spectral characteristics. To adapt time-series data in the target domain, we introduce a trainable frequency adaptation module that modulates the phase and amplitude of target signals in the frequency domain to align them with the source distribution. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate the efficacy and robustness of SAFA.

AI.tldr: 提出SAFA方法，通过频率适应模块在频域调整目标信号的相位和幅度，解决时间序列数据在源自由域自适应中的频谱偏移问题
AI.motivation: 现有源自由域自适应方法主要关注时间动态性，但忽略了时间序列数据中的频谱偏移问题，这限制了跨域知识迁移的效果
AI.method: 提出SAFA方法：1) 多尺度建模源域的时间依赖和频谱特征；2) 引入可训练的频率适应模块，在频域调整目标信号的相位和幅度以对齐源分布
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验表明SAFA方法有效且鲁棒
AI.conclusion: SAFA通过同时处理时间依赖和频谱特征，有效解决了时间序列源自由域自适应中的频谱偏移问题

title: Attention-Spectrum Regularization for Replay-Free Continual Multimodal LLMs
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are increasingly required to adapt to non-stationary streams of visual domains, question types, and user instructions, yet continual fine-tuning often causes severe forgetting of previously acquired multimodal skills. Existing continual vision-language methods mainly preserve outputs, replay data or pseudo-data, regularize embedding geometry, or allocate task-specific parameters, but they provide limited control over how internal cross-modal attention patterns supporting old skills drift during adaptation. We propose Attention-Spectrum Regularization (ASR), a replay-free continual learning framework that preserves skill-conditioned structures of cross-modal attention. ASR treats cross-attention maps as two-dimensional signals, summarizes their scale and directional properties into compact spectral statistics, and stores only skill-wise prototype distributions instead of replaying past image-question pairs, generated pseudo-examples, or old-stage teacher snapshots. In later stages, a phase-invariant spectral regularizer constrains harmful drift of these prototypes while allowing instance-level attention to adapt to new tasks. We provide theoretical analysis showing that skill-conditioned spectral drift controls forgetting under a spectral sufficiency assumption, and that Fourier power spectra are stable to spatial translations and bounded perturbations. Experiments on continual VQA and multimodal instruction-tuning benchmarks, including VQA v2, VQACL, CLT-VQA, CoIN, and UCIT, show that ASR consistently improves final performance and reduces forgetting over strong replay-, regularization-, and adapter-based baselines. Preserving skill-level attention structure is an effective and lightweight mechanism for continual MLLMs. Code is available at https://github.com/Creative-zcx/attention-spectrum-replay

AI.tldr: ASR是一种无需重放数据的持续学习框架，通过保留跨模态注意力图的谱统计特征来防止多模态大语言模型在适应新任务时的遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型需要适应不断变化的视觉领域、问题类型和用户指令，但持续微调往往会导致先前学习的多模态技能严重遗忘。现有方法主要通过保留输出、重放数据、正则化嵌入几何或分配任务特定参数，但对跨模态注意力模式在适应过程中的有害漂移控制有限。
AI.method: 提出注意力谱正则化(ASR)框架，将跨注意力图视为二维信号，将其尺度和方向属性总结为紧凑的谱统计特征，仅存储技能级别的原型分布而非重放过去的图像-问题对。在后阶段，通过相位不变的谱正则化器约束这些原型的有害漂移，同时允许实例级注意力适应新任务。
AI.result: 在持续VQA和多模态指令调优基准测试（包括VQA v2、VQACL、CLT-VQA、CoIN和UCIT）上的实验表明，ASR在最终性能和减少遗忘方面持续优于基于重放、正则化和适配器的强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 保留技能级别的注意力结构是持续多模态大语言模型的一种有效且轻量级的机制，ASR通过控制跨模态注意力谱统计特征的有害漂移来缓解遗忘问题。

title: The Fractal Neural Operator: Overcoming Spectral Bias in Chaotic Attractors via Prime-Harmonic Weierstrass Encodings
summary: Deep learning models, particularly Transformers and Neural Operators, exhibit a well-documented "spectral bias," effectively acting as low-pass filters that smooth out high-frequency information. While benign in fluid dynamics, this bias is catastrophic for Chaotic Dynamical Systems, where the underlying strange attractor is characterized by fractal geometry and infinite spectral density. We introduce the Fractal Neural Operator (FNO), a novel architecture that utilizes a non-resonant prime number basis to approximate continuous dynamical systems. Unlike geometric encodings ($2^k$), which suffer from spectral gaps and resonance, our Harmonic Weierstrass Encoder injects infinite spectral resolution into the latent space. We demonstrate that FNO extends the valid prediction horizon of the Lorenz-63 system to 347 Lyapunov times, exceeding state-of-the-art Reservoir Computing baselines by a factor of 2.3x. These results suggest that "chaos" is not inherently unpredictable to neural networks, but rather requires non-differentiable, fractal embedding manifolds.

AI.tldr: 论文提出Fractal Neural Operator（分形神经算子）来解决深度学习模型在混沌动力系统中的频谱偏差问题，通过非共振质数基和谐波Weierstrass编码器实现无限频谱分辨率，显著延长了Lorenz-63系统的预测时间范围。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型（特别是Transformers和神经算子）存在"频谱偏差"，表现为低通滤波器，会平滑掉高频信息。这对于混沌动力系统是灾难性的，因为混沌系统的奇异吸引子具有分形几何和无限频谱密度特征。
AI.method: 提出Fractal Neural Operator（FNO）架构，采用非共振质数基来近似连续动力系统。不同于存在频谱间隙和共振问题的几何编码（2^k），提出的Harmonic Weierstrass Encoder（谐波Weierstrass编码器）将无限频谱分辨率注入到潜在空间中。
AI.result: FNO将Lorenz-63系统的有效预测时间范围扩展到347个Lyapunov时间，超过了最先进的Reservoir Computing基准方法的2.3倍。
AI.conclusion: 混沌并非本质上对神经网络不可预测，而是需要非可微的分形嵌入流形。FNO通过分形几何方法成功捕捉了混沌系统的无限频谱特性。

title: Rethinking Prototype-based Similarity Learning for Few-Shot Object Detection
summary: Few-shot object detection aims to detect novel object categories from only a few labeled examples, avoiding costly large-scale annotation. Recent prototype-based similarity learning approaches enable training-free adaptation by matching query features with class prototypes. However, they suffer from two fundamental limitations: (i) class confusion arising from inter-class similarity margin collapse, and (ii) insufficient visual cues for precise localization, as similarity scores capture only class-level semantic affinity while providing limited spatial information. To address these issues, we introduce two complementary components. Text-Anchored Semantic Mask (TSMa) leverages class-level text features as semantic anchors to identify semantically aligned channels through channel-wise interaction between visual and text features. By suppressing style-induced spurious responses and emphasizing class-intrinsic signals, TSMa enlarges inter-class similarity margins and mitigates class confusion. We further propose Stage-Aligned Hierarchical Autoregressive Regression (SHARe), which reformulates localization as a hierarchical autoregressive process that progressively refines bounding boxes across multiple stages. SHARe leverages the layer-wise characteristics of ViT representations by aligning feature abstraction levels with regression stages: deeper layers guide early coarse localization, while shallower layers rich in edge and texture cues refine spatial details in later stages. Experiments on COCO demonstrate a new state of the art, outperforming the previous best by +10.1 nAP, with extensive analysis validating each component. The code is available at https://github.com/VisualScienceLab-KHU/ReSet.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TSMa和SHARe两个组件，解决少样本目标检测中类别混淆和定位不精确的问题，在COCO数据集上达到新的SOTA，比之前最佳方法提升10.1 nAP。
AI.motivation: 现有基于原型相似性学习的少样本目标检测方法存在两个根本限制：1) 类别间相似度边界塌陷导致的类别混淆；2) 相似度分数仅捕获类别级语义亲和力，缺乏空间信息，导致定位不精确。
AI.method: 提出两个互补组件：1) TSMa（文本锚定语义掩码）：利用类别级文本特征作为语义锚点，通过视觉和文本特征的通道级交互识别语义对齐的通道，抑制风格诱导的虚假响应，强调类别内在信号；2) SHARe（阶段对齐分层自回归回归）：将定位重新表述为分层自回归过程，在多个阶段逐步细化边界框，利用ViT表示的层级特性，深层特征指导早期粗定位，浅层丰富的边缘纹理线索细化后期空间细节。
AI.result: 在COCO数据集上实现新的最先进性能，比之前最佳方法提升+10.1 nAP，通过广泛分析验证了每个组件的有效性。
AI.conclusion: TSMa和SHARe有效解决了少样本目标检测中的类别混淆和定位不精确问题，通过文本锚定语义掩码增强类别区分能力，通过分层自回归回归提升定位精度，为少样本目标检测提供了新的有效解决方案。

title: Weighted Score-Oriented Losses for Temporally Localized Event Prediction
summary: Operational event-detection systems are rarely assessed by pointwise accuracy alone. In anomaly detection, changepoint detection, and warning systems, the utility of an alarm depends on its temporal position relative to an event. This produces a score-loss mismatch. Neural networks are commonly trained with classical loss functions, such as cross-entropy, whereas deployment decisions are obtained by thresholding network predictions, merging alarms through post-processing rules, and evaluating them with event-based metrics defined by detection windows and false-alarm costs. This paper studies a temporally localized specialization of weighted score-oriented loss (wSOL) for event prediction. Starting from score-oriented losses based on expected confusion matrices and from the weighted SOL framework of Marchetti et al., we consider temporal weights that discount near-event false positives and reduce false-negative penalties when an event is preceded by an admissible alarm. The resulting objective is differentiable with respect to the network predictions, and therefore can be optimized by back-propagation. It can be instantiated with balanced accuracy, true skill statistic, F1, critical success index, and related confusion-matrix scores. We evaluate the proposed approach by comparing cross-entropy, unweighted score-oriented loss, and wSOL on three benchmark datasets for time-series event prediction and detection. The results show that wSOL can improve performance when the evaluation utility is localized in time and is not already encoded by the pointwise labels.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种针对事件预测的时间局部化加权得分导向损失函数（wSOL），解决了传统损失函数与事件检测评估指标之间的不匹配问题。
AI.motivation: 在异常检测、变化点检测和预警系统中，传统神经网络使用交叉熵等经典损失函数进行训练，但实际部署时通过阈值处理、后处理规则和基于事件的指标（如检测窗口和误报成本）进行评估，这导致了得分-损失不匹配问题。
AI.method: 基于Marchetti等人的加权得分导向损失框架，提出时间局部化加权得分导向损失函数，使用时间权重来折扣事件附近的误报，并在事件前有可接受警报时减少漏报惩罚。该损失函数对网络预测可微分，可通过反向传播优化，适用于平衡准确率、真实技能统计量、F1分数、关键成功指数等混淆矩阵得分。
AI.result: 在三个时间序列事件预测和检测基准数据集上比较交叉熵、未加权得分导向损失和wSOL，结果表明当评估效用具有时间局部性且未编码到点状标签中时，wSOL能够提升性能。
AI.conclusion: 时间局部化加权得分导向损失函数能够有效解决事件预测中损失函数与评估指标的不匹配问题，在时间局部化评估场景下优于传统损失函数。

title: Poisson2Gaussian: Noise Gaussianization to Enhance Image Denoising
summary: The quantum nature of light determines the inherent Poisson stochasticity of photon detection, which is ubiquitous in photography, microscopy, and astronomy. However, our controlled numerical studies reveal that the signal-dependency, heteroscedasticity, and statistical asymmetry of Poisson-mixed noise make it challenging for existing denoisers to learn. In contrast, i.i.d. Gaussian noise, with its statistical independence and symmetric distribution, is easier to model for networks. To address this gap, we propose Poisson2Gaussian (P2G), a noise Gaussianization method that explicitly converts complex real-world noise to i.i.d. Gaussian noise via probability density matching beyond low-order moments. We also design an unbiased denoising framework that synergizes P2G with downstream denoisers, ensuring convergence to the underlying signal without requiring paired clean data or explicit noise parameters. Extensive experiments demonstrate that P2G consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance across diverse datasets. In challenging scenarios where noise strongly deviates from Gaussian statistics, our method improves the PSNR by up to 0.75 dB. Notably, P2G is architecture-agnostic and can provide universal improvements for various denoisers. The source code will be publicly available.

AI.tldr: 提出Poisson2Gaussian (P2G)方法，通过概率密度匹配将复杂泊松噪声转换为i.i.d.高斯噪声，结合去噪器实现无偏去噪，无需配对干净数据或噪声参数。
AI.motivation: 光子检测固有的泊松随机性广泛存在于摄影、显微镜和天文学中，但现有去噪方法难以处理泊松混合噪声的信号依赖性、异方差性和统计不对称性，而i.i.d.高斯噪声因其统计独立性和对称分布更易于建模。
AI.method: 提出Poisson2Gaussian (P2G)噪声高斯化方法，通过概率密度匹配（超越低阶矩）将复杂真实噪声显式转换为i.i.d.高斯噪声；设计无偏去噪框架，将P2G与下游去噪器协同，确保收敛到基础信号，无需配对干净数据或显式噪声参数。
AI.result: P2G在多个数据集上持续实现最先进性能；在噪声强烈偏离高斯统计的挑战性场景中，PSNR提升高达0.75 dB；P2G与架构无关，可为各种去噪器提供普遍改进。
AI.conclusion: P2G通过将复杂噪声转换为i.i.d.高斯噪声，有效解决了泊松混合噪声去噪的挑战，为各种去噪器提供了通用改进方案，在噪声偏离高斯统计时表现尤为突出。

title: Substitution-Based Analysis of Structural Novelty for Generative Models of Materials
comment: 27 pages (20 pages of main text). See https://github.com/WMD-group/xtaledit for the code
summary: There has been rapid progress in generative artificial intelligence (AI) models for inorganic crystal design, which can efficiently generate large numbers of candidate compounds after being trained on databases of known crystals. However, it remains unclear whether they genuinely expand the accessible materials search space beyond conventional strategies such as elemental substitution within known structure types. We address this question by developing a workflow to assess whether AI-generated crystals are duplicates of training structures, reproducible by elemental substitution, or unmatched by either criterion. Applying this workflow to representative generative models reveals that 81-92% of chemically valid and metastable generated crystals are either training duplicates or substitution-derived structures. This tendency is particularly strong in high-symmetry crystal systems, even though many possible structural prototypes remain unexplored. Further analysis of the underlying structural fingerprints shows that low-symmetry structures beyond duplication or substitution can be interpreted as interpolation in training-data-rich regions, while high-symmetry duplicates appear to result from memorisation in training-sparse regions. Our findings highlight a limitation in the current generation of models that exhibit a bias towards known structural prototypes in the high symmetry regions, but enable wider exploration of the low-symmetry structural space.

AI.tldr: 当前无机晶体生成AI模型存在局限性：81-92%的生成晶体要么是训练数据重复，要么是元素替换产物，未能真正扩展材料搜索空间
AI.motivation: 评估当前无机晶体生成AI模型是否真正扩展了材料搜索空间，还是仅仅复制训练数据或进行元素替换
AI.method: 开发了评估工作流程，判断AI生成晶体是否为训练数据重复、元素替换产物或两者都不符合的新结构；应用于代表性生成模型进行分析
AI.result: 81-92%化学有效且亚稳态的生成晶体是训练数据重复或元素替换产物；高对称性晶体系统尤其明显；低对称性结构可解释为训练数据丰富区域的插值，而高对称性重复似乎是训练稀疏区域的记忆结果
AI.conclusion: 当前生成模型存在局限性，在高对称性区域偏向已知结构原型，但在低对称性结构空间能够实现更广泛探索

title: Scene-agnostic ALS boresight self-calibration
summary: ALS boresight calibration has relied for two decades on dedicated flight patterns over structured scenes containing planar surfaces of varied aspect and slope. While reliable, this approach imposes constraints on the scene content and operations, which limits its applicability to boresight recovery within routine mapping missions. We present a practical approach that substantially relaxes these requirements by replacing plane-based constraints with scene-agnostic point-to-point correspondences extracted automatically from overlapping ALS strips. Two complementary formulations are proposed to estimate boresight with laser vector observations: (i) a simpler parametric adjustment utilizing INS/GNSS trajectory; (ii) a rigorous formulation treating GNSS and raw inertial data within an existing factor-graph, i.e. a dynamic network, where boresight is added as an additional parameter. Both formulations are evaluated across four operational ALS flights equipped with five inertial systems, covering a wide range of flight altitudes, overlap geometries, terrain types and inertial sensor classes. The analysis draws a clear boundary between the legacy plane-based conditioning that falls short outside the calibration scenario and the proposed formulations, which either recover or absorb boresight effects under conventional mapping geometry. Among them, the lightweight formulation is sufficient for boresight recovery using tactical and navigation grade inertial sensors, while the general factor-graph approach is clearly superior when the inertial sensor errors are less observable within an optimal smoother. This supports the hypothesis that, for INS/GNSS trajectory of sufficient quality, the boresight calibration can be performed without particular scene prerequisites during routine mapping operations using a minimum of 3-4 overlapping strips, with either proposed formulation...

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新的机载激光扫描(ALS)视准轴校准方法，使用场景无关的点对点对应关系替代传统的平面约束，可在常规测绘任务中实现视准轴校准，无需特定场景条件。
AI.motivation: 传统ALS视准轴校准方法依赖于包含多种坡度和方向的平面结构的专用飞行模式，这种方法虽然可靠但对场景内容和操作有限制，难以在常规测绘任务中应用。
AI.method: 提出了两种互补的视准轴估计方法：(1) 基于INS/GNSS轨迹的简化参数调整方法；(2) 在现有因子图（动态网络）中处理GNSS和原始惯性数据的严格方法，将视准轴作为额外参数加入。两种方法都利用重叠ALS条带自动提取的场景无关点对点对应关系。
AI.result: 在配备五种惯性系统的四个实际ALS飞行任务中进行了评估，涵盖了广泛的飞行高度、重叠几何、地形类型和惯性传感器等级。分析表明，传统平面约束方法在校准场景外效果不佳，而提出的两种方法都能在常规测绘几何条件下恢复或吸收视准轴效应。
AI.conclusion: 对于质量足够的INS/GNSS轨迹，视准轴校准可以在常规测绘操作中无需特定场景前提条件下进行，仅需3-4个重叠条带。轻量级方法适用于战术级和导航级惯性传感器，而通用因子图方法在惯性传感器误差可观测性较低时表现更优。

title: Position: Correct Answer, Wrong Mechanism -- When AI Scientists Defend General Claims Their Own Data Contradicts
comment: 8 pages body plus 12 pages references and appendix, non-archival upload for ICML 2026 AI for Science workshop, selected as spotlight paper
summary: AI scientist systems are described as tools, coauthors, or founders, but we evaluate them as if only the final answer matters. This position paper argues that outcome-only evaluation is insufficient, and that task outcome, mechanism fidelity, and epistemic honesty must be measured separately. Our evidence comes from 28 episodes of a coding agent attempting to rediscover a known particle identification observable in a Geant4 simulation, including an 8-episode probe across two additional frontier models. In 4/20 primary-model and 3/8 cross-model episodes, agents reach right-looking results through incorrect reasoning that breaks when conditions change, which we call Correct Answer, Wrong Mechanism (CAWM). Honesty and mechanism fidelity dissociate within a single agent trajectory. When given a partially misleading prior, all five agents reject the false component on evidence, yet one defends its chosen observable with physics inconsistent with its own data. In the simulation-based discovery setting studied here, coding agents prove reliable tools but unreliable scientific co-authors for open-ended claim-making, where co-author trust requires mechanism-fidelity verification they do not reliably self-apply. The failure is detectable, and we propose a lightweight test. A one-step regime-shift check needs only the agent's claim and flags the over-generalized cases. A companion recomputation flags the remaining cases when the correct observable is known. Together, these checks flag every CAWM case in this study.

AI.tldr: 该立场论文批评了仅基于最终答案评估AI科学家系统的做法，提出了需要分别评估任务结果、机制保真度和认知诚实度的框架。通过28次编码代理在Geant4模拟中重新发现已知粒子识别可观测量的实验，发现AI在4/20次主要模型和3/8次跨模型实验中通过错误推理得到看似正确的结果，即"正确答案，错误机制"(CAWM)现象。
AI.motivation: 目前对AI科学家系统的评估过于关注最终答案的正确性，忽视了推理过程的可靠性。这种"仅结果评估"无法区分正确的科学发现与通过错误机制得到的偶然正确结果，可能导致对AI作为科学合作者能力的误判。
AI.method: 使用28次编码代理实验，让AI在Geant4模拟中重新发现已知的粒子识别可观测值。包括8次跨越两个前沿模型的交叉测试。通过分析代理的推理过程、机制保真度和认知诚实度，识别"正确答案，错误机制"(CAWM)现象。
AI.result: 在4/20次主要模型和3/8次跨模型实验中，AI通过错误推理得到看似正确的结果(CAWM)。当给定部分误导性先验时，所有五个代理都基于证据拒绝了错误部分，但有一个代理用与其自身数据不一致的物理学为其选择的可观测值辩护。机制保真度和认知诚实度在单个代理轨迹中发生分离。
AI.conclusion: 在模拟发现环境中，编码代理是可靠的工具，但作为开放声明科学合作者不可靠。需要机制保真度验证，而AI无法可靠地自我应用这种验证。作者提出了轻量级测试：一步制度转移检查仅需代理声明即可标记过度泛化案例，配套重新计算可标记剩余案例，这些检查成功标记了本研究中的所有CAWM案例。

title: Compression and Retrieval: Implicit Memory Retrieval for Video World Models
summary: Video world models hold promise for simulating interactive environments, yet maintaining consistent long-term memory across complex camera trajectories remains a critical challenge. Existing methods typically rely on computationally expensive context scaling or rigid heuristic retrieval mechanisms, which lacks generalization to varying camera trajectories and environments. In this paper, we propose Compression and Retrieval (CaR), an attention-driven implicit memory retrieval mechanism to overcome these limitations. By injecting viewpoint information via positional encoding, our method performs flexible memory retrieval through attention computation. To efficiently process extended contexts with minimal computational overhead, we further introduce a lightweight context compression network. Furthermore, we construct SceneFly, a large-scale synthetic dataset featuring realistic camera trajectories and frame-level annotations to train and evaluate long-horizon video world models. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art results on established benchmarks and exhibits strong generalization to open-domain scenes.

AI.tldr: CaR提出了一种基于注意力的隐式记忆检索机制，通过位置编码注入视角信息实现灵活记忆检索，并引入轻量级上下文压缩网络处理长序列，在SceneFly数据集上验证了其在视频世界模型中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有视频世界模型在处理复杂相机轨迹时，通常依赖计算成本高的上下文扩展或僵化的启发式检索机制，缺乏对不同相机轨迹和环境的泛化能力。需要一种更高效、灵活的长时记忆保持方法。
AI.method: 提出CaR：1) 基于注意力的隐式记忆检索机制，通过位置编码注入视角信息；2) 轻量级上下文压缩网络，高效处理扩展上下文；3) 构建SceneFly大规模合成数据集，包含真实相机轨迹和帧级标注。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在现有基准测试中达到最先进水平，并在开放域场景中表现出强大的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: CaR通过注意力驱动的隐式记忆检索和轻量级压缩，有效解决了视频世界模型中长时记忆保持的挑战，在复杂相机轨迹下表现出色。

title: EML Trees Are Universal Approximators
summary: The recently introduced EML (Exp-Minus-Log) function acts as continuous analogue of NAND gates, providing a compositional building block capable of representing elementary functions. In this work, we study the expressive power of tree-structured compositions of EML functions. We show that such trees enjoy a universal approximation property for functions in $W^{k, \infty}$ for $k \in \mathbb N$, drawing on classical neural network approximation arguments while exploiting the ability to explicitly construct EML trees that mimic polynomial representations. We further propose a learning algorithm for EML-type trees equipped with fitting parameters, and demonstrate its feasibility in practical optimization problems. Our results establish EML trees as a theoretically grounded framework for function approximation.

AI.tldr: EML树作为连续NAND门的模拟，通过树状组合结构，能够实现W^{k,∞}函数空间的通用逼近，并提出了带参数的学习算法。
AI.motivation: 研究EML函数的树状组合的表达能力，探索其作为函数逼近的理论基础框架。
AI.method: 利用EML函数作为构建块，研究树状结构的组合；借鉴经典神经网络逼近理论，构造模拟多项式表示的EML树；提出带参数的EML树学习算法。
AI.result: 证明了EML树对W^{k,∞}函数空间具有通用逼近性质；提出的学习算法在实际优化问题中可行。
AI.conclusion: EML树为函数逼近提供了一个理论上有依据的框架。

title: Technical Report for the ICRA 2026 GOOSE 2D Fine-Grained Semantic Segmentation Challenge: Pretraining-Diverse Ensemble of Foundation Vision Encoders for Robust Outdoor Scene Understanding
summary: This report presents our solution for the ICRA 2026 GOOSE 2D Fine-Grained Semantic Segmentation Challenge, which requires parsing unstructured outdoor scenes from four camera platforms into 56 fine-grained categories. Our approach pairs foundation vision encoders (including DINOv3, SigLIP2, and InternImage) with a Mask2Former decoder, and trains them with a strong recipe including long training schedules, exponential moving average, a larger crop size, and multi-scale plus flip test-time augmentation. The three encoders, chosen for their complementary pretraining objectives, are combined into a pretraining-diverse ensemble through per-class validation-IoU weighting. Evaluated on the official GOOSE test set, our submission achieves 75.40% composite mIoU and wins the second place of the challenge. Our study further shows that the encoder's pretraining recipe, rather than its parameter count or the decoder design, is the dominant factor for accuracy on this benchmark.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种用于GOOSE 2D细粒度语义分割挑战的解决方案，通过结合多个基础视觉编码器和Mask2Former解码器，采用长训练计划、指数移动平均等强训练配方，最终在官方测试集上获得75.40%的复合mIoU，获得挑战赛第二名。
AI.motivation: 解决ICRA 2026 GOOSE 2D细粒度语义分割挑战，该挑战要求从四个相机平台解析非结构化户外场景到56个细粒度类别，需要高精度的分割方法。
AI.method: 采用基础视觉编码器（DINOv3、SigLIP2、InternImage）与Mask2Former解码器配对，使用长训练计划、指数移动平均、大裁剪尺寸、多尺度+翻转测试时间增强等强训练配方。通过基于每类验证IoU的权重将三个编码器组合成预训练多样性集成。
AI.result: 在官方GOOSE测试集上获得75.40%的复合mIoU，赢得挑战赛第二名。研究还表明，编码器的预训练配方（而非参数数量或解码器设计）是影响该基准测试准确性的主导因素。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合多个预训练目标互补的基础视觉编码器，并采用强训练配方，可以有效解决细粒度语义分割挑战。编码器的预训练策略对性能影响最为关键。

title: Stage-dependent integer-binary encoding in factorization-machine black-box optimization
summary: Black-box optimization (BBO) deals with problems where objective functions lack explicit analytical forms and are expensive to evaluate. Factorization machine with quadratic-optimization annealing (FMQA) constructs a surrogate model using a factorization machine (FM) and optimizes it with an Ising machine. Conventional FMQA applies a single integer-binary encoding throughout the optimization process, although the encoding best suited to surrogate learning may differ from the one best suited to Ising-machine solution search. We propose a stage-dependent FMQA framework and derive conversion formulas between one-hot and domain-wall QUBO matrices that preserve the surrogate objective over feasible integer states up to an additive constant. We evaluate the OhDw variant, which employs one-hot encoding for learning and domain-wall encoding for search, on the Rastrigin function with input dimensions N = 2 and 5 and discretization levels q = 61 and 301. Across all conditions, the dominant factor governing optimization performance is the encoding used in the learning stage, with one-hot encoding consistently yielding lower residual errors than domain-wall or binary encoding. The additional benefit of switching to domain-wall encoding for solution search is condition-dependent. For N = 5 and q = 301, OhDw achieves a lower residual error and solutions closer to the global optimum than one-hot-only FMQA, whereas for N = 5 and q = 61 the latter achieves a lower residual error. These results indicate that one-hot encoding in the learning stage is the primary performance driver and that stage-dependent encoding can provide further improvement under finer discretization.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种阶段依赖的FMQA框架，在学习阶段使用one-hot编码，搜索阶段使用domain-wall编码，通过转换公式保持可行性，相比传统单一编码方法在细粒度离散化条件下能获得更好的优化性能。
AI.motivation: 传统FMQA在整个优化过程中使用单一整数-二进制编码，但适合代理模型学习的编码可能不同于适合Ising机器搜索的编码。需要研究不同编码在学习阶段和搜索阶段的差异及其对优化性能的影响。
AI.method: 提出阶段依赖FMQA框架，推导one-hot和domain-wall QUBO矩阵之间的转换公式，保持可行整数状态下的代理目标函数（仅差一个常数）。评估OhDw变体（学习阶段用one-hot，搜索阶段用domain-wall），在Rastrigin函数上测试不同输入维度和离散化水平。
AI.result: 在所有条件下，学习阶段使用的编码是影响优化性能的主导因素，one-hot编码始终比domain-wall或二进制编码产生更低的残差误差。在N=5和q=301时，OhDw比纯one-hot FMQA获得更低的残差误差和更接近全局最优的解；但在N=5和q=61时，纯one-hot方法残差误差更低。
AI.conclusion: 学习阶段使用one-hot编码是主要性能驱动因素，阶段依赖编码在更细的离散化条件下能提供进一步的改进。这为黑盒优化中编码策略的选择提供了指导。

title: LUMINA-26: Low-Light Understanding for Modeling and Interpreting Night-time Actions
summary: Low-light human action recognition remains a challenging problem due to poor illumination, amplified noise, motion ambiguity, and diverse real-world scenes. Existing low-light datasets often lack sufficient action diversity, capture realism, or balanced class distribution, limiting the development of robust models. To address this, we introduce LUMINA-26: Low-Light Understanding for Modeling and Interpreting Night-time Actions, comprising 6,784 clips across 26 action classes, recorded from 22 subjects across 20 indoor and outdoor locations under naturally occurring low-light conditions. We also propose Illumi-Net: An Illumination-Adaptive Mixture-of-Experts Network, which leverages video-level illumination cues to guide adaptive enhancement and transformer-based spatio-temporal feature extraction, with expert-conditioned decision fusion. Our method surpasses previous state-of-the-art performance on ELLAR (Top-1: 55.13%, Top-5: 78.87%) and establishes a strong baseline on LUMINA-26 (Top-1: 75.95%, Top-5: 93.58%), offering a practical benchmark for future low-light action recognition research.

AI.tldr: 提出LUMINA-26低光动作识别数据集和Illumi-Net网络，解决现有低光数据集多样性不足、真实性不够的问题，在低光动作识别任务上取得SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 低光环境下的人体动作识别面临光照不足、噪声放大、运动模糊和场景多样性等挑战，现有低光数据集缺乏足够的动作多样性、真实性和类别平衡，限制了鲁棒模型的发展。
AI.method: 提出LUMINA-26数据集（包含6,784个视频片段，26个动作类别，22名受试者在20个室内外自然低光场景录制），并设计Illumi-Net网络：利用视频级光照线索指导自适应增强和基于Transformer的时空特征提取，采用专家条件决策融合。
AI.result: 在ELLAR数据集上达到Top-1准确率55.13%、Top-5准确率78.87%的SOTA性能；在LUMINA-26数据集上建立强基线：Top-1准确率75.95%、Top-5准确率93.58%。
AI.conclusion: LUMINA-26数据集和Illumi-Net网络为低光动作识别研究提供了实用的基准，解决了现有数据集在多样性和真实性方面的不足，推动了低光环境下的鲁棒动作识别发展。

title: Memory Contagion: Cross-Temporal Propagation of Evaluator Bias via Agent Memory
summary: Large Language Model (LLM) agents increasingly rely on memory systems to maintain long-term coherence. Recent work shows that agent memories degrade during continuous consolidation. However, existing research assumes memories are derived from unbiased experiences. In this work, we identify and formalize a novel phenomenon: Memory Contagion -- the cross-temporal propagation of evaluator bias through agent memory. We show that when agents are trained or guided by biased evaluators, their experiences become biased; when these trajectories are stored and consolidated into memory, the bias propagates to future agents retrieving from the same memory store, even when consolidation is perfect (oracle). Across two bias types (length preference, authority bias) and four experimental phases, we demonstrate: (1) Memory Contagion occurs even with perfect consolidation (oracle condition), proving that biased input is a sufficient cause of contagion; (2) Consolidation has opposite effects depending on bias type -- robustly attenuating length bias while preliminarily amplifying authority bias (single-run estimate), suggesting a bias-type-dependent interaction; (3) No observed safe threshold: bias propagation is detected at contamination rates as low as p=0.2. Our findings expose a critical vulnerability in current agent memory designs and provide formal tools for measuring cross-temporal bias propagation.

AI.tldr: LLM智能体的记忆系统存在"记忆传染"现象：当智能体从有偏见的评估者那里获得经验时，这些偏见会通过记忆存储和整合传播给未来的智能体，即使记忆整合是完美的。
AI.motivation: 现有研究假设智能体记忆来自无偏见的经验，但实际中智能体常受有偏见的评估者指导。本研究旨在识别和形式化"记忆传染"现象，即评估者偏见通过智能体记忆系统在时间维度上的传播。
AI.method: 通过两种偏见类型（长度偏好、权威偏见）和四个实验阶段进行研究：1）证明即使在完美整合（预言机条件）下也会发生记忆传染；2）分析整合对不同偏见类型的影响；3）检测偏见传播的最低污染率阈值。
AI.result: 1）记忆传染在完美整合条件下仍然发生，证明偏见输入是传染的充分原因；2）整合对不同偏见类型有相反效果：显著减弱长度偏见，但初步放大了权威偏见；3）未观察到安全阈值：污染率低至p=0.2时仍能检测到偏见传播。
AI.conclusion: 当前智能体记忆设计存在关键漏洞，评估者偏见会通过记忆系统在时间维度上传播。研究提供了衡量跨时间偏见传播的形式化工具，揭示了记忆系统中偏见传播的机制和影响。

title: MambaADv2: Evolving Duality-enhanced State Space Model for Unsupervised Anomaly Detection
summary: While recent advancements in anomaly detection have demonstrated the efficacy of CNN- and Transformer-based approaches, these architectures face inherent limitations: CNNs struggle to capture long-range dependencies, whereas Transformers suffer from quadratic computational complexity. Consequently, Mamba-based architectures have attracted considerable attention, as they successfully combine superior long-range dependency modeling with linear computational complexity. By critically rethinking the structural evolution across the Mamba lineage 1-3 series, this paper proposes MambaADv2, a framework tailored for multi-class unsupervised anomaly detection. MambaADv2 comprises a pre-trained encoder and a Mamba-inspired decoder, equipped with Duality-enhanced State Space (DSS) modules across multiple scales. The proposed DSS module effectively models both global dependencies and local representations by integrating parallel-cascaded Hybrid State Space (HSS) blocks and frequency-enhanced convolution operations. The structure of the Hybrid State Space (HSS) block is tailored by following the SSD-based Mamba lineage and incorporating Mamba3-style position-aware state-space modeling, leveraging the dual computational paths of linear recurrence and parallel matrix formulation to model local continuity and global contextual comparison, thereby better serving the core anomaly detection objective of precisely reconstructing normal representations while magnifying anomalous deviations. Additionally, we propose a semantics-adaptive progressive scanning strategy that decays scanning complexity along the feature pyramid.

AI.tldr: MambaADv2：基于Mamba架构的多类无监督异常检测框架，通过Duality-enhanced State Space模块和语义自适应渐进扫描策略，在保持线性计算复杂度的同时提升长程依赖建模能力
AI.motivation: 现有CNN和Transformer异常检测方法存在局限：CNN难以捕捉长程依赖，Transformer有二次计算复杂度。Mamba架构结合了长程依赖建模和线性计算复杂度优势，但在异常检测任务中需要专门优化
AI.method: 提出MambaADv2框架，包含预训练编码器和Mamba启发式解码器，配备多尺度Duality-enhanced State Space模块，该模块整合并行级联Hybrid State Space块和频率增强卷积操作。采用语义自适应渐进扫描策略，沿特征金字塔降低扫描复杂度
AI.result: 通过SSD-based Mamba谱系和Mamba3风格的位置感知状态空间建模，利用线性递归和并行矩阵公式的双计算路径，更好地重建正常表示同时放大异常偏差
AI.conclusion: MambaADv2为多类无监督异常检测提供了有效框架，在保持线性计算复杂度的同时，通过改进的状态空间建模和扫描策略，提升了异常检测性能

title: Bridge the Gaps: Heterogeneous Attributed Graph Clustering via Quaternion Representation Learning
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Emerging Topics in Computational Intelligence. Author-accepted manuscript
summary: Attributed graph clustering partitions nodes by jointly exploiting node attributes and graph topology. It remains challenging due to attribute heterogeneity and representation degradation during graph learning. Real-world datasets often contain heterogeneous attributes, i.e., numerical and categorical attributes, complicating unified representation learning. This challenge becomes more complex in attributed graphs, where constructing a clustering-friendly graph structure from attributes and topology remains difficult. Under deep graph architectures, repeated graph propagation causes node embeddings to become overly similar, leading to the over-smoothing (OS) effect. Meanwhile, graph representation learning amplifies topological influence, making discriminative attribute information harder to exploit for clustering, an effect we refer to as over-dominating (OD). To bridge these gaps, an end-to-end framework, Any-type attributed Graph REpresentation lEarning (AGREE), is proposed. It unifies attributed graphs and any-type attributed data through multi-level alignment and similarity-based graph construction. Quaternion-based graph convolution strengthens attribute interaction to alleviate OD, while shallow graph architectures help relieve OS. The learned embeddings are jointly optimized for graph reconstruction and clustering, without requiring a predefined number of clusters during training. Experiments on diverse benchmarks show that AGREE achieves strong overall performance in accuracy, robustness, and adaptability.

AI.tldr: AGREE是一个端到端框架，用于处理任意类型属性的图聚类，通过多级对齐和基于相似性的图构建解决属性异质性和表示退化问题，使用四元数图卷积增强属性交互缓解过主导效应，浅层架构缓解过平滑效应。
AI.motivation: 属性图聚类面临两个关键挑战：1）属性异质性：现实数据集包含数值和分类等异质属性，难以统一表示学习；2）表示退化：深度图架构中重复图传播导致节点嵌入过度相似（过平滑效应），同时图表示学习放大了拓扑影响，使判别性属性信息难以利用（过主导效应）。
AI.method: 提出AGREE框架：1）通过多级对齐和基于相似性的图构建统一属性图和任意类型属性数据；2）使用四元数图卷积增强属性交互以缓解过主导效应；3）采用浅层图架构缓解过平滑效应；4）联合优化图重构和聚类学习嵌入，训练时无需预定义聚类数量。
AI.result: 在多样化基准测试上的实验表明，AGREE在准确性、鲁棒性和适应性方面实现了强大的整体性能。
AI.conclusion: AGREE通过统一任意类型属性图表示学习，有效解决了属性异质性和表示退化问题，为属性图聚类提供了一个有效的端到端解决方案。

title: Spectral Gating via Damped Oscillations for Adaptive Implicit Neural Representations
comment: Accepted at ECCV 2026. Project Page: https://alex-costanzino.github.io/fdho/
summary: Implicit Neural Representations (INRs) have been proven successful in encoding continuous signals through coordinate-based networks, yet facing a spectral dilemma: periodic activations capture fine details but act as all-pass filters that memorise noise, while spatially compact activations regularise effectively but suffer from low-frequency bias. Existing attempts to resolve this trade-off introduce computational overhead or tuning frailty. We propose to model each neuron's activation as the steady-state response of a sinusoidally-forced damped harmonic oscillator, whose amplitude naturally governs the network's spectral selectivity during training. By jointly optimising the oscillator parameters alongside the network weights, our method adapts to the target signal's spectral content without explicit regularisation. Initialised in the stopband, the network exhibits a coarse-to-fine learning curriculum that progressively expands its spectral gate, capturing low-frequency structures first and high-frequency details only when justified by the reconstruction objective. Comprehensive experiments show that our approach consistently achieves state-of-the-art or competitive results against established INRs, while requiring no task-specific tuning of any hyperparameters.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于阻尼谐振子模型的神经元激活函数，解决了隐式神经表示中的频谱困境，实现了无需任务特定调参的自适应频谱选择。
AI.motivation: 隐式神经表示面临频谱困境：周期性激活函数能捕捉细节但会记忆噪声，空间紧凑的激活函数能有效正则化但存在低频偏差。现有方法需要额外计算开销或调参脆弱性。
AI.method: 将每个神经元的激活建模为正弦激励阻尼谐振子的稳态响应，其振幅自然控制网络在训练期间的频谱选择性。通过联合优化谐振子参数和网络权重，方法能自适应目标信号的频谱内容而无需显式正则化。
AI.result: 该方法在初始化时处于阻带，表现出从粗到细的学习课程，逐步扩展其频谱门，先捕捉低频结构，仅在重建目标合理时才学习高频细节。实验表明该方法能持续达到或接近最先进的INR性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的基于谐振子的激活函数解决了INR的频谱困境，实现了自适应频谱控制，无需任务特定超参数调优，在多个任务中表现出竞争性结果。

title: Leveraging AutoML for Sustainable Deep Learning: A Multi-Objective HPO Approach on Deep Shift Neural Networks
summary: Deep Learning (DL) has advanced various fields by extracting complex patterns from large datasets. However, the computational demands of DL models pose environmental and resource challenges. Deep Shift Neural Networks (DSNNs) present a solution by leveraging shift operations to reduce computational complexity at inference. Compared to common DNNs, DSNNs are still less well understood and less well optimized. By leveraging AutoML techniques, we provide valuable insights into the potential of DSNNs and how to design them in a better way. We focus on image classification, a core task in computer vision, especially in low-resource environments. Since we consider complementary objectives such as accuracy and energy consumption, we combine state-of-the-art multi-fidelity (MF) hyperparameter optimization (HPO) with multi-objective optimization to find a set of Pareto optimal trade-offs on how to design DSNNs. Our approach led to significantly better configurations of DSNNs regarding loss and emissions compared to default DSNNs. This includes simultaneously increasing performance by about 20% and reducing emissions, in some cases by more than 60%. Investigating the behavior of quantized networks in terms of both emissions and accuracy, our experiments reveal surprising model-specific trade-offs, yielding the greatest energy savings. For example, in contrast to common expectations, quantizing smaller portions of the network with low precision can be optimal with respect to energy consumption while retaining or improving performance. We corroborated these findings across multiple backbone architectures, highlighting important nuances in quantization strategies and offering an automated approach to balancing energy efficiency and model performance.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出使用AutoML技术优化深度移位神经网络(DSNNs)，通过多保真度超参数优化和多目标优化找到帕累托最优配置，在图像分类任务中同时提升性能约20%并减少能耗达60%以上。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型计算需求大，带来环境和资源挑战。深度移位神经网络(DSNNs)通过移位操作降低推理计算复杂度，但相比普通DNNs，DSNNs的理解和优化程度较低，特别是在低资源环境下的图像分类任务中。
AI.method: 结合最先进的多保真度超参数优化(HPO)和多目标优化，寻找DSNNs设计的帕累托最优权衡。关注准确性和能耗等互补目标，通过自动化方法探索网络量化策略。
AI.result: 相比默认DSNNs，优化后的配置在损失和排放方面显著改善：性能提升约20%，能耗减少超过60%。实验揭示了模型特定的量化权衡，发现对小部分网络进行低精度量化可在保持或提升性能的同时实现最大能耗节省。
AI.conclusion: 研究证实了AutoML在优化DSNNs方面的潜力，提供了平衡能效和模型性能的自动化方法。量化策略存在重要细微差别，挑战了常见预期，为低资源环境下的高效深度学习提供了新见解。

title: Expert Consensus on Criteria for the Automated Assessment of Laparoscopic Camera Navigation
summary:
Background: Laparoscopic camera navigation (LCN) is a critical skill, yet its current assessment typically relies on manual rating systems which are time-consuming and difficult to scale. Automated feedback could significantly enhance surgical training by providing immediate, standardized metrics. This study aims to define, clinically evaluate the relevance, and establish the technical readiness of a set of approaches for LCN assessment.
  Methods: We developed a detailed taxonomy of 14 key aspects of camera navigation, categorized into Framing & Composition, Visibility & Clarity, Orientation & Stability, Motion & Dynamics, and Safety & Awareness. For each aspect, we assessed the technological readiness of automated measurement based on the current state of the art (SoTA) in computer vision (CV). To establish clinical relevance, we designed a survey for practicing laparoscopic surgeons to rate the importance of each aspect on a 5-point Likert scale and to select the five most critical skills.
  Results: 23 surgeons participated in the survey. Foundational aspects like Field of View, Focus and Centering were rated as most important by surgeons. We present a "Clinical Importance vs. CV Technological Readiness" matrix, identifying high-priority targets for development--aspects that are both clinically crucial and technologically ready to measure.
  Conclusion: This work establishes a foundational framework for quantifying LCN skills. By aligning surgeon priorities with CV capabilities, we provide a clear roadmap for automatic skill assessment. This foundation enables the development of AI-driven assistance tools that can accelerate the learning curve for surgical assistants and potentially improve surgical safety and efficiency.

AI.tldr: 该研究建立了腹腔镜摄像头导航(LCN)技能评估的框架，将临床重要性评估与计算机视觉技术成熟度结合，为自动技能评估提供路线图
AI.motivation: 腹腔镜摄像头导航是关键技术，但当前评估依赖耗时的人工评分系统，难以规模化。自动反馈能通过提供即时、标准化指标显著提升外科培训效果
AI.method: 开发了包含14个关键方面的LCN详细分类法，分为5个类别。评估了基于计算机视觉的自动测量技术成熟度，并通过外科医生调查评估临床重要性
AI.result: 23名外科医生参与调查，视野、对焦和居中被评为最重要方面。创建了"临床重要性vs.计算机视觉技术成熟度"矩阵，识别了高优先级开发目标
AI.conclusion: 建立了量化LCN技能的基础框架，通过将外科医生优先级与计算机视觉能力对齐，为自动技能评估提供清晰路线图，支持AI辅助工具开发

title: Efficient Network Inference via Hardware-Aware Architecture Search, Model Pruning & Quantization
summary: Embedded global navigation satellite system (GNSS) interference monitoring requires fast and memory-efficient inference to process large volumes of raw in-phase and quadrature (IQ) samples in real time. At the same time, increasingly expressive deep neural networks (DNNs) are needed for robust interference classification and characterization across diverse signal conditions. This creates a fundamental tension between predictive performance and deployability on resource-constrained hardware. In this paper, we investigate efficient network inference for GNSS interference characterization using iterative structured pruning, post-training static quantization, and hardware-aware zero-shot neural architecture search (NAS).
