Starting from MCUNet as a compact baseline, we analyze how model compression and automated architecture optimization affect model size, computational complexity, and memory usage while maintaining task performance. Experiments on a GNSS interference dataset, covering both classification and generalized characterization, show the benefits of combining compression and hardware-aware design for embedded deployment. Our results provide practical guidance for developing compact machine learning (ML) models for real-time GNSS interference monitoring on embedded platforms (iMXRT1062 MCU, Raspberry Pi Zero 2W, and Raspberry Pi 5).

AI.tldr: 该研究探讨了在嵌入式GNSS干扰监测中如何平衡DNN的表达能力与硬件资源限制，通过模型压缩和硬件感知的架构搜索实现高效实时推理
AI.motivation: 嵌入式GNSS干扰监测需要处理大量IQ样本，要求快速且内存高效的实时推理，同时需要表达能力强的DNN来保证干扰分类和表征的鲁棒性，这导致了预测性能与硬件部署可行性之间的根本矛盾
AI.method: 采用迭代结构化剪枝、后训练静态量化和硬件感知的零样本神经架构搜索(NAS)，以MCUNet为紧凑基线，分析模型压缩和自动化架构优化对模型大小、计算复杂度和内存使用的影响
AI.result: 在GNSS干扰数据集上的实验表明，压缩与硬件感知设计相结合对嵌入式部署有益，研究结果为在嵌入式平台(iMXRT1062 MCU、Raspberry Pi Zero 2W和Raspberry Pi 5)上开发实时GNSS干扰监测的紧凑ML模型提供了实用指导
AI.conclusion: 通过结合模型压缩技术和硬件感知的架构优化，可以在保持任务性能的同时显著降低模型的计算复杂度和内存需求，为嵌入式GNSS干扰监测系统的实际部署提供了有效的解决方案

title: T-VSS: Test-Time Visual Subspace Steering for Adversarial Robustness of Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) achieve strong zero-shot recognition, but they remain highly vulnerable to adversarial perturbations. Recent test-time adaptations improve robustness without retraining, but they do not directly adapt the corrupted visual representation itself. Prompt-based methods adapt the learnable text prompts, while input-space methods optimize pixels or padding at test time. These approaches can improve predictions, but they do so through an indirect and expensive optimization path. We propose Test-time Visual Subspace Steering (T-VSS), a lightweight defense that performs test-time adaptation directly in the visual feature space. T-VSS first builds a sample-specific low-rank subspace from multi-view feature residuals anchored at the attacked image. It then learns a shared feature correction within this subspace using reliability-weighted entropy minimization. By constraining adaptation to a compact visual geometry, T-VSS steers attacked features toward more stable and discriminative predictions while avoiding noisy full-space updates. Experiments on fine-grained, ImageNet, and ImageNet-OOD benchmarks show that T-VSS improves adversarial robustness while maintaining competitive clean accuracy and better efficiency than prior test-time adaptations.

AI.tldr: T-VSS：一种轻量级测试时视觉子空间引导方法，直接在视觉特征空间进行对抗防御，通过构建样本特定的低秩子空间并学习共享特征校正，提高对抗鲁棒性
AI.motivation: 当前视觉语言模型在零样本识别方面表现出色，但对对抗扰动高度脆弱。现有的测试时适应方法（基于提示或输入空间优化）通过间接且昂贵的优化路径改善预测，但未直接适应被破坏的视觉表示本身
AI.method: 提出测试时视觉子空间引导（T-VSS）：1）基于受攻击图像的多视角特征残差构建样本特定的低秩子空间；2）在该子空间内使用可靠性加权的熵最小化学习共享特征校正；3）将适应限制在紧凑的视觉几何结构中，引导受攻击特征向更稳定和可区分的预测方向移动
AI.result: 在细粒度数据集、ImageNet和ImageNet-OOD基准测试中，T-VSS提高了对抗鲁棒性，同时保持了竞争力的干净准确率，并且比先前的测试时适应方法具有更好的效率
AI.conclusion: T-VSS是一种有效的轻量级测试时防御方法，通过直接在视觉特征空间中进行适应，避免了噪声的全空间更新，在提高对抗鲁棒性的同时保持了效率和性能

title: Deep learning-based detection of cessation of breathing in pre-term infants
comment: 14 pages main text, 8 figures. Submitted to IEEE Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatics (JBHI)
summary:
Apnoea of prematurity is characterised by recurrent episodes of cessation of breathing and remains difficult to detect reliably using routinely monitored physiological signals in the Neonatal Intensive Care Unit (NICU). Existing bedside monitors rely primarily on respiratory rate and oxygen saturation thresholds, often generating high false-positive alarm rates and missing short or irregular events. Improving automated detection using routinely acquired clinical signals could enhance identification of clinically meaningful events without additional sensing hardware.
  We evaluated deep learning-based detection of apnoea-related Cessation Of BrEathing (COBE) events using impedance pneumography (IP), electrocardiography (ECG), and photoplethysmography (PPG) signals from approximately 430 hours of NICU recordings collected from 24 pre-term infants. Three independent reviewers annotated COBE events, producing a dataset of 346 COBE and 608 non-COBE events. We compared a shallow convolutional neural network (CNN), residual networks (ResNets), and a ConvNeXt architecture using an independent held-out test set.
  Across all architectures, detection performance was influenced more strongly by signal modality than by architectural complexity. Unimodal IP-based models achieved balanced accuracies of 86.8-88.0%, outperforming ECG-derived (62.6-69.7%) and PPG-derived (65.1-66.4%) respiratory surrogates. Multimodal fusion yielded modest improvements over IP alone. The best-performing model, a ConvNeXt architecture combining IP and PPG inputs, achieved 88.7% balanced accuracy and an F1 score of 0.75 on the independent test set.
  These findings demonstrate that deep learning models applied to routinely monitored NICU signals can reliably detect COBE events and highlight the importance of signal modality in data-constrained neonatal monitoring settings.

AI.tldr: 研究评估了深度学习模型在新生儿重症监护室中利用常规监测信号（阻抗呼吸描记、心电图、光电容积描记）检测呼吸暂停事件的能力，发现信号模态比模型架构复杂度对检测性能影响更大。
AI.motivation: 早产儿呼吸暂停难以通过常规生理信号可靠检测，现有床边监护仪主要依赖呼吸频率和血氧饱和度阈值，导致高假阳性报警率且容易漏检短或不规则事件。改进基于常规临床信号的自动检测方法可以在无需额外传感硬件的情况下增强对临床有意义事件的识别。
AI.method: 使用深度学习模型检测呼吸暂停相关呼吸停止事件，利用阻抗呼吸描记、心电图和光电容积描记信号，数据来自24名早产儿约430小时的NICU记录。三位独立评审员标注了346个呼吸停止事件和608个非呼吸停止事件。比较了浅层卷积神经网络、残差网络和ConvNeXt架构，使用独立测试集进行评估。
AI.result: 所有架构中，检测性能受信号模态影响比架构复杂度更大。基于单模态阻抗呼吸描记的模型达到86.8-88.0%的平衡准确率，优于心电图衍生（62.6-69.7%）和光电容积描记衍生（65.1-66.4%）的呼吸替代信号。多模态融合相比单独使用阻抗呼吸描记仅有适度改善。最佳模型是结合阻抗呼吸描记和光电容积描记输入的ConvNeXt架构，在独立测试集上达到88.7%平衡准确率和0.75的F1分数。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，应用于常规监测NICU信号的深度学习模型能够可靠检测呼吸停止事件，并强调了在数据受限的新生儿监护环境中信号模态的重要性。

title: Koshur Pixel: a large-scale synthetic ocr dataset for kashmiri
summary: Optical Character Recognition (OCR) for low-resource languages is often constrained by the lack of annotated training data and the complexity of script-specific rendering. Kashmiri, written primarily in the Perso-Arabic Nastaliq script, presents additional challenges due to contextual glyph shaping, dense ligatures, and orthographic variability. We introduce Koshur Pixel, the first large-scale synthetic OCR dataset for Kashmiri, comprising 613,078 image-text pairs generated from the KS-PRET-5M corpus using the SynthOCR-Gen framework. The dataset spans multiple fonts and textual granularities, ranging from individual words to full-page documents, and incorporates more than 25 augmentation strategies that emulate real-world document degradations. Koshur Pixel provides a scalable and cost-effective alternative to manual annotation, establishing a foundational resource for training OCR systems, digitizing Kashmiri textual heritage, and advancing language technologies for a severely under-resourced language.

AI.tldr: Koshur Pixel是首个克什米尔语大规模合成OCR数据集，包含61万图像-文本对，通过SynthOCR-Gen框架生成，提供成本效益的替代人工标注方案。
AI.motivation: 克什米尔语OCR面临缺乏标注训练数据和Nastaliq书写体复杂性的挑战，包括上下文字形塑造、密集连字和拼写变体，需要大规模数据集支持。
AI.method: 使用SynthOCR-Gen框架从KS-PRET-5M语料库生成613,078个图像-文本对，涵盖多种字体和文本粒度（从单词到整页），采用25+种模拟真实文档退化的增强策略。
AI.result: 创建了首个大规模克什米尔语合成OCR数据集Koshur Pixel，为训练OCR系统、数字化克什米尔文本遗产和推进低资源语言技术提供了基础资源。
AI.conclusion: Koshur Pixel为克什米尔语OCR提供了可扩展且经济高效的解决方案，填补了该低资源语言的数据空白，有助于保护和数字化其文本遗产。

title: Unlocking In-Context Learning in Audio-Language Models from Decentralized Medical Audio
summary: Clinical audio diagnosis in low-resource settings requires models that identify conditions from minimal examples without large annotated corpora. We propose Federated Self-Contextualization (FSC), a multimodal language model framework for in-context clinical audio diagnosis across federated hospital clients. FSC constructs pseudo-label episodes via unsupervised clustering of audio representations, bypassing scarce real diagnostic labels, and enables contextual reasoning from support-query pairs. Our progressive three-stage pipeline first aligns audio embeddings with the language model via caption-based pretraining, then adapts it for episodic in-context inference through federated optimization. At test time, given a small labeled support set, the model diagnoses an unseen query through multimodal reasoning. On held-out respiratory and cardiac conditions, FSC achieves 71.6% accuracy in 2-way 2-shot evaluation, outperforming audio-language baselines by over 9%.

AI.tldr: FSC是一个用于低资源环境下临床音频诊断的多模态语言模型框架，通过联邦学习和无监督聚类构建伪标签样本，在少量标注支持下实现上下文推理诊断，在呼吸和心脏疾病诊断中取得了71.6%的准确率。
AI.motivation: 低资源环境下的临床音频诊断面临标注数据稀缺的挑战，需要能够在少量样本下进行诊断的模型。传统方法依赖大量标注数据，这在医疗资源匮乏的环境中难以实现。
AI.method: 提出联邦自上下文化（FSC）框架：1）通过无监督聚类音频表征构建伪标签样本；2）三阶段渐进式训练：基于字幕预训练对齐音频嵌入和语言模型，通过联邦优化适应上下文推理；3）测试时使用少量标注支持集进行多模态推理诊断未见查询。
AI.result: 在呼吸和心脏疾病的2-way 2-shot评估中，FSC达到71.6%的准确率，比音频-语言基线方法高出9%以上。
AI.conclusion: FSC框架能够在低资源环境下有效进行临床音频诊断，通过联邦学习和无监督伪标签构建解决了标注数据稀缺的问题，为医疗资源匮乏地区的诊断提供了可行方案。

title: Interpretable Probabilistic Medical Image Segmentation via Gaussian Process with Explicit Modelling of Annotation Bias and Variability
summary: Deep learning-based medical image segmentation models are trained using annotations that exhibit systematic bias and variability across raters. While probabilistic multi-rater approaches can emulate annotator-specific delineations, annotator characteristics are typically encoded implicitly in deep latent feature space, making direct analysis of their influence on predictive distributions less straightforward. We propose a logit-space probabilistic segmentation framework based on stochastic variational Gaussian Process that explicitly decomposes predictions into an image-dependent reference logit distribution and annotator specific perturbations parameterised by bias and variance. This formulation enables more explicit analysis on how intra- and inter-rater variability propagate to predictive distributions. We evaluate the method on a multi-annotator medical image dataset, which shows that explicitly modelling annotator specific perturbations improves uncertainty calibration while maintaining comparable segmentation accuracy, compared with state-of-the-art multi-rater probabilistic segmentation method. The learned bias and variance parameters quantitatively reflect annotator-specific behaviour. Furthermore, controlled perturbation experiments over bias and variance demonstrate how changes in annotator parameters systematically influence predictive performance. The code used in this paper is made publicly available at https://github.com/QiLi111/GPS-Var.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于随机变分高斯过程的logit空间概率分割框架，显式分解预测为图像依赖的参考logit分布和标注者特定扰动，改善不确定性校准
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割中标注存在系统偏差和标注者间差异，现有概率多标注者方法将标注者特征隐式编码在深度潜在空间中，难以直接分析其对预测分布的影响
AI.method: 基于随机变分高斯过程的logit空间概率分割框架，将预测显式分解为图像依赖的参考logit分布和由偏差、方差参数化的标注者特定扰动
AI.result: 在多标注者医学图像数据集上，显式建模标注者特定扰动改善了不确定性校准，同时保持可比较的分割精度；学习的偏差和方差参数定量反映了标注者特定行为
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架能够更显式地分析标注者间和标注者内变异性如何传播到预测分布，通过控制扰动实验展示了标注者参数变化如何系统影响预测性能

title: Dynamic multi-agent deep reinforcement learning-based pricing and incentivization approach in multimodal transportation networks
summary: In multimodal transportation systems, shared mobility services (SMSs) are promoted for their potential to enhance flexibility and reduce congestion. However, SMS demand is often concentrated in high-density areas, which can limit the effectiveness and accessibility for various commuter groups. This uneven integration challenges transportation system efficiency, especially in terms of emissions and spatial equity. Addressing these issues requires coordination among multiple stakeholders whose objectives frequently conflict. Whereas authorities aim to ensure sustainable and equitable mobility, SMS providers focus on revenue maximization, and travelers seek to minimize personal travel costs. This paper proposes a multi-agent deep reinforcement learning framework that captures these interactions through dynamic pricing and incentivization strategies for SMSs and public transport. The framework integrates two reinforcement learning (RL) agents: (i) a public authority that allocates spatio-temporal public transport incentives to improve equity, emissions, and efficiency, and (ii) an SMS provider that dynamically adjusts fares to optimize revenue. The agents interact with the transportation system and adapt strategies in response to evolving demand, congestion, and network conditions. Numerical experiments conducted over a three-hour morning peak period show that dynamic incentivization effectively reduces congestion peaks, lowers commuters' costs by around 20% and emissions by approximately 10%, while nearly doubling public transport profit and supporting a more equitable distribution of benefits. When combined with dynamic SMS pricing, the two RL agents demonstrate the ability to balance conflicting objectives between private providers and public authorities. The proposed approach provides a decision-support tool for sustainable and equitable multimodal mobility planning.

AI.tldr: 提出多智能体深度強化學習框架，透過動態定價與激勵策略協調共享出行服務與公共交通，以平衡各方利益並提升交通系統效率。
AI.motivation: 共享出行服務需求集中於高密度區域，導致交通系統效率受限、排放問題與空間公平性挑戰。當局、服務提供商與旅客目標存在衝突，需要協調機制。
AI.method: 採用多智能體深度強化學習框架，包含兩個RL智能體：1)公共當局分配時空公共交通激勵以改善公平性、排放與效率；2)SMS提供商動態調整票價以優化收入。智能體根據需求、擁堵與網絡條件動態互動調整策略。
AI.result: 在三小時早高峰模擬中，動態激勵有效降低擁堵峰值，通勤者成本減少約20%，排放降低約10%，公共交通利潤幾乎翻倍，並實現更公平的利益分配。結合動態SMS定價，兩個RL智能體能平衡私營提供商與公共當局的衝突目標。
AI.conclusion: 該框架為可持續且公平的多模式交通規劃提供決策支持工具，能協調多方利益相關者，實現交通系統效率、環境與公平性的綜合優化。

title: StreamPPG: Low-Latency rPPG Estimation via Consistent Privileged Learning
summary: Remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) estimates the blood volume pulse (BVP) signal from facial videos, enabling contact-free health monitoring. Conventional clip-wise approaches, which use video clips as input, require capturing over one hundred frames before inference, thus introducing several seconds of delay and hindering real-time use. Meanwhile, frame-wise approaches struggle to capture long-range temporal and periodic features of physiological rhythms, and therefore lead to reduced estimation accuracy. To overcome these issues, we propose StreamPPG, a unified architecture that enables low-latency frame-wise physiological signal estimation while achieving competitive accuracy compared with clip-wise approaches. StreamPPG is trained under a consistent privileged learning (CPL) strategy, which leverages ground-truth rPPG signals as privileged information to enhance the model's representation capability. Extensive experiments demonstrate that StreamPPG achieves state-of-the-art accuracy across multiple datasets while maintaining real-time throughput on edge devices.

AI.tldr: StreamPPG：一种用于远程光电容积描记术（rPPG）的低延迟帧级生理信号估计统一架构，通过特权学习策略实现实时性能和高精度
AI.motivation: 传统基于视频片段的rPPG方法需要捕获上百帧才能推理，导致数秒延迟；而帧级方法难以捕捉生理节律的长程时序和周期性特征，精度受限。需要一种既能低延迟又能保持高精度的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出StreamPPG统一架构，采用一致特权学习（CPL）策略，利用地面真实rPPG信号作为特权信息增强模型表示能力，实现帧级生理信号估计。
AI.result: StreamPPG在多个数据集上达到最先进的精度，同时在边缘设备上保持实时吞吐量，实现了低延迟和高精度的平衡。
AI.conclusion: StreamPPG通过统一架构和特权学习策略，成功解决了rPPG系统中延迟与精度的权衡问题，为实时无接触健康监测提供了有效解决方案。

title: Exposing the Illusion of Erasure in Knowledge Editing for LLMs
summary: Knowledge Editing (KE) has emerged as a frontier for updating specific facts in LLMs without costly retraining, but its reliability and underlying mechanisms remain poorly understood. In this work, we examine KE from an adversarial elicitation perspective, revealing that edited knowledge is often not fully erased and continues to surface, with consistent failures observed across diverse model architectures. To explain this behavior, we conduct a mechanistic analysis of popular KE methods. We show that low-rank updates do not overwrite existing knowledge but instead redistribute it within the model's representation space. Furthermore, we find that these methods act as targeted suppression mechanisms that reduce the likelihood of expressing original facts, rather than removing them from the model. Analysis of the loss landscape reveals that edited knowledge lies in narrow, anisotropic regions that are highly sensitive to perturbations, making them highly vulnerable to indirect prompting and adversarial attacks. By exposing these profound architectural vulnerabilities, our work proves that KE algorithms are inherently bypassable and motivates a fundamental reevaluation of how we deploy post-hoc updates in several LLM applications.

AI.tldr: 该论文从对抗性诱导角度分析知识编辑技术，发现编辑后的知识并未完全擦除，仍会浮现，且存在跨模型架构的一致失败。机制分析表明低秩更新并非覆盖原有知识，而是在表示空间重新分配，这些方法实质是目标抑制机制而非知识移除。损失景观分析揭示编辑知识位于狭窄、各向异性区域，对扰动高度敏感，易受间接提示和对抗攻击影响。
AI.motivation: 知识编辑作为无需昂贵重新训练即可更新LLM中特定事实的前沿技术，但其可靠性和底层机制仍未被充分理解。本研究旨在从对抗性诱导角度审视知识编辑，揭示其根本性漏洞。
AI.method: 1. 从对抗性诱导角度分析知识编辑技术；2. 对流行知识编辑方法进行机制分析；3. 研究低秩更新的工作原理；4. 分析损失景观特性，特别是编辑知识所在区域的敏感性和各向异性特征。
AI.result: 1. 编辑后的知识并未完全擦除，仍会浮现；2. 观察到跨不同模型架构的一致失败模式；3. 低秩更新并非覆盖原有知识，而是在表示空间重新分配；4. 知识编辑方法实质是目标抑制机制，减少表达原始事实的可能性而非移除知识；5. 编辑知识位于狭窄、各向异性区域，对扰动高度敏感，易受间接提示和对抗攻击影响。
AI.conclusion: 知识编辑算法本质上存在可绕过性，暴露了深刻的架构漏洞。这一发现促使我们需要从根本上重新评估如何在多个LLM应用中部署事后更新，表明当前的知识编辑方法存在根本性缺陷。

title: Unmasking LAION-5B: Age, Gender, Race, and Emotion Biases in Large-Scale Image Datasets
comment: Published as a paper at 3rd DATA-FM workshop @ ICLR 2026, Brazil
summary: Large-scale image-text datasets, such as LAION-5B, are foundational to modern AI systems, yet their vast scale and uncurated nature raise significant concerns about demographic and stereotypical biases. This study presents a comprehensive analysis of the demographic composition and representational, stereotypical, and intersectional biases in LAION-2B-en and LAION-2B-multi, the two main components of the LAION-5B dataset. Using state-of-the-art models -- FairFace, DeepFace, and Emo-AffectNet -- we analyze faces detected in the dataset to identify biases across age, gender, race, and expressed emotion. Our findings reveal substantial overrepresentation of young adults (20--39), White individuals, and males, alongside consistent underrepresentation of minority racial groups and middle-aged or older women across both dataset components. We also observe stereotypical associations between demographic attributes and emotions, such as ``Anger'' being predominantly linked to males and ``Happiness'' to females, pointing to systemic imbalances in the data. The consistency of these patterns across two demographic models and both components of LAION-5B demonstrates that these biases are deeply embedded in one of the most widely-used training datasets. Given the scale at which LAION-5B is used to train generative models, these demographic imbalances could shape the behavior and outputs of numerous downstream AI systems.

AI.tldr: 该研究对LAION-5B数据集中的LAION-2B-en和LAION-2B-multi两个组件进行了全面的偏见分析，发现存在显著的年龄、性别、种族和情感表达偏见，这些偏见可能影响下游AI系统的行为。
AI.motivation: 大规模图像-文本数据集（如LAION-5B）是现代AI系统的基础，但其规模庞大且未经筛选，引发了关于人口统计和刻板印象偏见的严重担忧。
AI.method: 使用最先进的模型（FairFace、DeepFace和Emo-AffectNet）分析数据集中检测到的人脸，识别年龄、性别、种族和表达情感方面的偏见。
AI.result: 研究发现：年轻人（20-39岁）、白人和男性被过度代表；少数种族群体、中年或老年女性被持续低估；存在刻板的情感关联（如"愤怒"主要与男性相关，"快乐"主要与女性相关）。这些偏见在两个数据集组件中均表现一致。
AI.conclusion: LAION-5B作为最广泛使用的训练数据集之一，其内部偏见已深度嵌入。考虑到该数据集被用于训练生成模型的规模，这些人口统计不平衡可能塑造许多下游AI系统的行为和输出。

title: Non-asymptotic estimates of the minimal risk in statistical learning
summary: In this paper we prove some concentration inequalities for two types of error probabilities in the Empirical Risk Principle (ERP) in statistical learning, which provide a lower bound and an upper bound for the minimal risk (in terms of the minimal empirical risk) with non-asymptotic high confidence. The usual boundedness condition of the empirical risk function is relaxed to the Gaussian or exponential integrability condition. The confidence of the lower bound of the minimal risk is shown to be independent of the number of training parameters and the dimension of the input vectors, allowing one to detect the deficiency of a learning machine efficiently; and the confidence of the upper bound of the minimal risk is proved to be high provided that the sample size $n$ is much greater than the box dimension of the parameter set $Θ$ in the Orlicz metric $d_{ψ_1}$ associated with the risk functions. Our work is based on Talagrand's concentration inequalities (the sharp versions by Bousquet and Klein-Rio), transport-entropy inequalities and the recent progress in the theory of empirical processes and statistical learning.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过放宽经验风险函数的有界性条件，建立了经验风险原则中两种误差概率的集中不等式，为非渐近高置信度下的最小风险提供了上下界估计。
AI.motivation: 传统经验风险原则中通常需要经验风险函数的有界性条件，这限制了理论的应用范围。作者希望放宽这一条件，在更一般的Gaussian或指数可积性条件下建立集中不等式，从而为统计学习中最小风险的上下界提供非渐近高置信度估计。
AI.method: 基于Talagrand的集中不等式（Bousquet和Klein-Rio的锐化版本）、传输-熵不等式，以及经验过程和统计学习理论的最新进展，在Gaussian或指数可积性条件下建立集中不等式。
AI.result: 1. 最小风险下界的置信度独立于训练参数数量和输入向量维度，可有效检测学习机器的缺陷；2. 最小风险上界的置信度在样本量n远大于参数集Θ在Orlicz度量d_{ψ_1}中的box维度时保持较高；3. 放宽了传统的有界性条件，仅需Gaussian或指数可积性条件。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为统计学习中经验风险原则的误差分析提供了更一般化的理论框架，放宽了传统的有界性假设，建立了非渐近高置信度的风险上下界估计，对学习机器性能评估和缺陷检测具有理论指导意义。

title: CFPO: Counterfactual Policy Optimization for Multimodal Reasoning
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in multimodal reasoning. However, prevailing reinforcement learning (RL) paradigms lack explicit counterfactual enhancement and causal learning mechanisms. This fundamental deficiency results in severe grounding failures, manifesting as a tendency to ignore visual evidence in favor of language priors or exhibiting hallucination drift during long chain-of-thought reasoning. To address this root cause, we propose CounterFactual Policy Optimization (CFPO), a novel framework that enforces causal consistency between visual perception and textual reasoning. CFPO introduces a cross-modal counterfactual enhancement mechanism, which regularizes the policy by maximizing the discrepancy between the model's predictions and those from a counterfactual state where critical visual cues are suppressed. This approach seamlessly integrates with standard algorithms like GRPO and DAPO without requiring external reward models or additional supervision. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CFPO significantly improves reasoning fidelity, achieving consistent gains of 3.17%-6.25% over standard RL baselines and 1.32%-2.13% over the state-of-the-art perception-aware method (PAPO). Code is available at https://github.com/Raven-July/CFPO.

AI.tldr: CFPO提出了一种新的强化学习框架，通过跨模态反事实增强机制来强制视觉感知与文本推理之间的因果一致性，解决现有RL方法缺乏反事实增强和因果学习机制导致的视觉证据忽略和幻觉漂移问题。
AI.motivation: 当前大型视觉语言模型在多模态推理中表现出色，但现有强化学习范式缺乏明确的反事实增强和因果学习机制，导致严重的接地失败问题：模型倾向于忽略视觉证据而依赖语言先验，或在长链思维推理中出现幻觉漂移。
AI.method: 提出CounterFactual Policy Optimization (CFPO)框架，引入跨模态反事实增强机制，通过最大化模型预测与抑制关键视觉线索的反事实状态预测之间的差异来正则化策略。该方法无需外部奖励模型或额外监督，可与GRPO和DAPO等标准算法无缝集成。
AI.result: 实验表明CFPO显著提升了推理保真度，相比标准RL基线取得了3.17%-6.25%的稳定提升，相比最先进的感知感知方法(PAPO)提升了1.32%-2.13%。
AI.conclusion: CFPO通过强制视觉感知与文本推理之间的因果一致性，有效解决了现有RL方法在多模态推理中的接地失败问题，为大型视觉语言模型的强化学习提供了新的反事实增强框架。

title: GRIMIP: A General Framework for Instance-Specific Configuration of MIP Solvers Using LLMs
summary: Configuring the hyperparameters of Mixed-integer programming (MIP) solvers is a high-dimensional, instance-dependent optimization problem where suboptimal settings can degrade solving time by orders of magnitude. Default configurations are often suboptimal, while traditional tuning methods either suffer from the ``cold-start'' problem and inefficient search or heavily rely on expert experience. This paper introduces \textbf{GRIMIP} (\textbf{\underline{G}}eneral \textbf{\underline{R}}easoning for \textbf{\underline{I}}nstance-specific \textbf{\underline{MIP}} configuration), a novel hybrid intelligence framework that synergistically integrates the semantic reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs) with the sample-efficient search of Bayesian Optimization (BO). GRIMIP enables the LLM to function as a complete probabilistic surrogate within the BO loop, significantly improving performance and reducing sampling and evaluation costs. On seven benchmarks including MIPLIB, GRIMIP achieves over 40\% reduction in Primal-Dual Integral on hard instances, outperforming SMAC and other LLM-assisted BO methods. By granting LLMs sufficient autonomy, GRIMIP combines the expert-level reasoning of LLMs with the efficient search of BO, achieving state-of-the-art performance.

AI.tldr: GRIMIP是一个混合智能框架，将大语言模型的语义推理能力与贝叶斯优化的高效搜索相结合，用于混合整数规划求解器的超参数配置，在MIPLIB等基准测试中性能显著优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 混合整数规划求解器的超参数配置是一个高维、实例依赖的优化问题，默认配置通常不优，传统调参方法存在"冷启动"问题、搜索效率低或过度依赖专家经验的问题。
AI.method: 提出GRIMIP框架，将大语言模型作为贝叶斯优化循环中的完整概率代理模型，结合LLM的语义推理能力和BO的样本高效搜索，实现混合智能超参数配置。
AI.result: 在包括MIPLIB在内的七个基准测试中，GRIMIP在困难实例上实现了超过40%的原对偶积分减少，性能优于SMAC和其他LLM辅助的BO方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过给予LLM足够的自主权，GRIMIP将LLM的专家级推理能力与BO的高效搜索相结合，实现了最先进的性能，为混合整数规划求解器配置提供了有效解决方案。

title: Temporally Aware Densification for Dynamic 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary: Despite modeling temporal motion, dynamic 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) methods still inherit a static densification strategy that is ill-suited for dynamic scenes. This neglect of temporal behavior leads to under-reconstructed and blurry dynamic regions, as short-lived Gaussians receive sparse supervision and fail to densify effectively. We propose a Visibility-Aware Densification (VAD) framework that integrates temporal visibility into the densification process, ensuring that Gaussians are refined based on their actual temporal presence. A Temporally-Adaptive Thresholding (TAT) mechanism further adjusts each Gaussian's densification threshold according to its temporal lifespan, promoting balanced refinement of both static and dynamic regions. Finally, a Temporal Offset Warping (TOW) design enhances deformation capacity around temporal centers, extending the lifespan of highly dynamic Gaussians and facilitating more effective densification. Our approach achieves substantial improvements in the visual quality of dynamic regions, outperforming existing methods across three dynamic multi-view benchmark datasets. Moreover, the proposed VAD module generalizes across diverse dynamic 3DGS methods, consistently improving dynamic reconstruction as a plug-and-play component.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于动态3D高斯泼溅的可见性感知致密化框架，通过整合时间可见性来优化动态区域的致密化过程，显著提升动态区域的视觉质量。
AI.motivation: 现有的动态3D高斯泼溅方法继承了静态的致密化策略，不适合动态场景。这种策略忽略了时间行为，导致对短暂存在的高斯分布监督稀疏，无法有效致密化，从而产生欠重构和模糊的动态区域。
AI.method: 提出了可见性感知致密化（VAD）框架：1）整合时间可见性到致密化过程中，确保高斯分布根据其实际时间存在进行细化；2）时间自适应阈值（TAT）机制根据每个高斯分布的时间寿命调整其致密化阈值，促进静态和动态区域的平衡细化；3）时间偏移变形（TOW）设计增强了时间中心周围的变形能力，延长了高度动态高斯分布的寿命，促进更有效的致密化。
AI.result: 该方法在三个动态多视角基准数据集上显著提升了动态区域的视觉质量，优于现有方法。此外，提出的VAD模块可作为即插即用组件，在不同动态3DGS方法中都能一致地改善动态重构。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合时间可见性到致密化过程中，并采用时间自适应阈值和时间偏移变形设计，提出的VAD框架有效解决了动态3D高斯泼溅中的致密化问题，显著提升了动态场景的重构质量。

title: Superhuman AI for Generals.io Using Self-Play Reinforcement Learning
summary: We present a superhuman AI agent for Generals.io, a real-time strategy game that requires both long-horizon planning and short-term tactics under strong imperfect information. Trained for four days on 4x NVIDIA H200 GPUs, our agent reaches #1 on the public 1v1 leaderboard of over 5,000 human players, leading the second-ranked player by the same margin that separates second place from 25th, and beats the two top-ranked humans head-to-head with a combined 199-70 record across 269 ladder matches. A key enabler is a JAX-native simulator that reaches tens of millions of frames per second on a single GPU, roughly a 10,000x speedup over the prior simulator. On top of this, we train a vision transformer policy end-to-end by self-play with a policy-gradient loop and sparse win/loss reward, using top-advantage sample filtering and an exponential moving average of the policy parameters. Taken together, our findings highlight what matters, and what does not, once a fast simulator removes the data bottleneck.

AI.tldr: 开发了一个在Generals.io游戏中达到超人类水平的AI智能体，在公开1v1排行榜上击败5000多名人类玩家获得第一名，关键突破是JAX原生模拟器实现单GPU每秒数千万帧的极速运行。
AI.motivation: 研究如何在需要长程规划和短期策略的实时策略游戏中，在强不完全信息条件下开发超人类AI智能体，探索在快速模拟器消除数据瓶颈后，哪些因素真正重要。
AI.method: 使用JAX原生模拟器（比先前模拟器快约10000倍，单GPU达到数千万帧/秒），在此基础上通过自对弈和策略梯度循环训练视觉Transformer策略，采用端到端训练，使用稀疏赢/输奖励、优势样本过滤和策略参数指数移动平均。
AI.result: 在4块NVIDIA H200 GPU上训练4天后，智能体在超过5000名玩家的公开1v1排行榜上获得第一名，与第二名玩家的差距相当于第二名与第25名的差距，在与两名顶级人类玩家的269场天梯比赛中取得199-70的胜率。
AI.conclusion: 当快速模拟器消除数据瓶颈后，关键因素包括：极速模拟器、端到端视觉Transformer策略、自对弈训练和策略梯度循环，而其他传统组件可能变得不那么重要，这为实时策略游戏AI研究提供了重要启示。

title: RS-Gen: A Multi-Stage Agentic Framework for Reasoning and Search-Augmented Image Generation
summary: Recent years have witnessed remarkable progress in image generation and editing, particularly regarding instruction following and visual fidelity. However, when handling ambiguous intentions, logical reasoning, and Out-of-Distribution (OOD) knowledge, existing image models often yield sub-optimal results due to a lack of deep reasoning capabilities and real-time external information. Although emerging unified understanding-and-generation models attempt to bridge this gap, they remain constrained by their intrinsic parameter scales and static knowledge gaps. Inspired by agentic paradigms, we propose RS-Gen: a plug-and-play, training-free, multi-stage image agentic framework. RS-Gen innovatively introduces a "Questioning-and-Solving" closed-loop mechanism to accurately identify logical issues and knowledge gaps, autonomously planning actions to bridge information deficits and execute deep logical reasoning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RS-Gen significantly expands the capability boundaries of foundational image generation and editing models. Specifically, on the WISE Verified and RISEBench benchmarks, RS-Gen yields substantial absolute performance gains of 0.313 for Qwen-Image and 19.70 for Qwen-Image-Edit-2511, respectively, successfully elevating both to the state-of-the-art (SOTA) level among open-source models.

AI.tldr: RS-Gen是一个即插即用、无需训练的多阶段图像代理框架，通过"提问-解决"闭环机制提升图像生成和编辑模型在模糊意图、逻辑推理和OOD知识方面的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有图像模型在处理模糊意图、逻辑推理和分布外知识时表现不佳，缺乏深度推理能力和实时外部信息。虽然统一的理解-生成模型试图解决这个问题，但仍受限于内在参数规模和静态知识差距。
AI.method: 提出RS-Gen框架，采用"提问-解决"闭环机制，能够准确识别逻辑问题和知识差距，自主规划行动来填补信息缺口并执行深度逻辑推理。
AI.result: 在WISE Verified和RISEBench基准测试中，RS-Gen显著提升了基础模型的性能：Qwen-Image获得0.313的绝对性能提升，Qwen-Image-Edit-2511获得19.70的绝对性能提升，使两者都达到了开源模型中的SOTA水平。
AI.conclusion: RS-Gen通过代理范式成功扩展了基础图像生成和编辑模型的能力边界，为解决图像模型在逻辑推理和知识获取方面的局限性提供了有效方案。

title: SOAP-Bubbles: Structured Weight Uncertainty for Neural Networks
summary: Structured weight-uncertainty can improve many aspects of deep learning, but it remains costly to estimate and difficult to implement. Here, we show that these issues can be addressed by adapting the SOAP optimizer. Our key idea is to run IVON, an existing diagonal-covariance variational method, in the eigenspace of SOAP's preconditioner and then use the preconditioner to transform the diagonal estimate into a non-diagonal covariance. The resulting method has costs similar to those of SOAP and requires no drastic changes to training pipelines. We call the posteriors obtained in this way SOAP-Bubbles and our new optimizer Eigenspace-VON (EVON). We show that, for logistic regression, EVON recovers the exact Gaussian covariance and that, for language model pretraining, it yields significantly better results than existing diagonal-covariance methods. Our work makes it easier to estimate more expressive posterior distributions for deep learning at scale.

AI.tldr: SOAP-Bubbles方法：通过将IVON变分方法运行在SOAP预条件子的特征空间中，然后将对角协方差估计转换为非对角协方差，以较低成本获得更丰富的后验分布。
AI.motivation: 结构化权重不确定性虽然能改善深度学习的多个方面，但估计成本高且实现困难。本文旨在解决这些问题。
AI.method: 将现有的对角协方差变分方法IVON运行在SOAP优化器的预条件子特征空间中，然后利用预条件子将对角估计转换为非对角协方差，得到SOAP-Bubbles后验和EVON优化器。
AI.result: 对于逻辑回归，EVON能恢复精确的高斯协方差；对于语言模型预训练，相比现有对角协方差方法获得显著更好的结果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法使在大规模深度学习中获得更丰富的后验分布估计变得更加容易，且成本与SOAP相似，无需大幅改动训练流程。

title: PhysFlow: Frequency Decoupled with Dual-Field Rectified Flow for Remote Photoplethysmography
summary: Remote Photoplethysmography (rPPG) enables contactless pulse estimation from facial videos, serving as a vital tool for health monitoring. However, current deep learning methods often struggle under complex disturbances, particularly varying illumination, facial expressions, and unconstrained head movements. In such scenarios, subtle physiological signals are easily dominated by external interference, making the recovered rPPG waveform unstable and unreliable. One important reason is that most existing methods directly model the rPPG signal in a unified manner, where different signal components are coupled during reconstruction. This makes it difficult to preserve weak pulse-related variations when strong disturbance-induced changes are present. To address this challenge, we propose PhysFlow, a frequency-decoupled dual-field rectified flow framework tailored for robust rPPG estimation. Specifically, the ground-truth rPPG signal is decomposed into trend and amplitude components, which are used as separate supervisory targets. Based on the extracted facial features, PhysFlow learns two component-specific conditional velocity fields to model the two components separately. This design reduces mutual interference between different components and improves the robustness of rPPG reconstruction under complex disturbances. Moreover, the rectified flow formulation enables efficient waveform reconstruction with only a few ordinary differential equation (ODE) integration steps. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that PhysFlow outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both heart-rate estimation and rPPG waveform reconstruction across diverse challenging scenarios.

AI.tldr: PhysFlow提出了一种频率解耦的双场整流流框架，用于在复杂干扰下进行稳健的远程光电容积描记（rPPG）估计，通过分别建模趋势和振幅分量来提高信号恢复质量。
AI.motivation: 当前深度学习方法在复杂干扰（如变化光照、面部表情和头部运动）下难以稳定恢复rPPG信号，主要原因是现有方法统一建模rPPG信号，导致不同信号分量在重建过程中相互耦合，弱脉冲相关变化容易被强干扰变化掩盖。
AI.method: PhysFlow采用频率解耦的双场整流流框架：1）将真实rPPG信号分解为趋势和振幅分量作为独立监督目标；2）基于提取的面部特征，学习两个分量特定的条件速度场分别建模两个分量；3）整流流公式化实现高效波形重建，仅需少量ODE积分步骤。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的广泛实验表明，PhysFlow在心率估计和rPPG波形重建方面均优于现有最先进方法，特别是在各种挑战性场景下表现出色。
AI.conclusion: PhysFlow通过频率解耦和分量特定建模有效减少了不同分量间的相互干扰，提高了复杂干扰下rPPG重建的鲁棒性，同时整流流框架实现了高效的波形重建。

title: Adaptive Hard-Soft Physics-Informed Neural Networks for Robust Boundary-Constrained PDE Solving
summary: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) provide an effective way to solve partial differential equations (PDEs) by embedding physical principles into the learning process. However, the conventional PINN formulation, in which all constraints are imposed as soft penalty terms within a composite loss, often exhibits slow convergence, sensitivity to loss weight scaling, and inaccurate boundary enforcement due to poor conditioning of the optimization landscape. To address these limitations, this study proposes a unified hard--soft physics--informed neural network (HSPINN) with adaptive loss weighting. In this framework, Dirichlet and periodic boundary conditions are enforced exactly by construction through analytical or polynomial lifting, masking functions, and periodic feature mappings, while the governing PDE residuals, Neumann fluxes, and initial conditions are treated as soft constraints. An inverse-share softmax strategy dynamically balances the relative importance of individual loss components during training, eliminating manual penalty tuning and improving gradient stability. This formulation ensures boundary admissibility throughout optimization and enhances convergence efficiency and numerical robustness. Applications to representative elliptic (Poisson), parabolic (Burgers), and hyperbolic (convection with periodic boundaries) problems demonstrate that HSPINN consistently achieves faster convergence, higher accuracy, and greater stability than conventional PINNs, establishing a general and scalable foundation for physics-constrained deep learning across science and technology.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种统一硬-软物理信息神经网络（HSPINN），通过精确构造边界条件和使用自适应损失权重，解决了传统PINNs收敛慢、对权重缩放敏感、边界条件执行不准确的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统物理信息神经网络（PINNs）将所有约束作为软惩罚项处理，存在收敛缓慢、对损失权重缩放敏感、边界条件执行不准确等优化问题，需要改进。
AI.method: 提出HSPINN框架：1）通过解析/多项式提升、掩码函数和周期特征映射精确构造Dirichlet和周期边界条件；2）将控制方程残差、Neumann通量和初始条件作为软约束；3）采用逆共享softmax策略动态平衡各损失分量权重。
AI.result: 在椭圆（Poisson）、抛物线（Burgers）和双曲线（周期性边界对流）问题中，HSPINN相比传统PINNs表现出更快的收敛速度、更高的精度和更好的数值稳定性。
AI.conclusion: HSPINN通过硬约束和自适应损失权重，确保了边界条件的可容许性，提高了收敛效率和数值鲁棒性，为科学计算中的物理约束深度学习提供了通用且可扩展的基础。

title: Privacy-Preserving Person Re-Identification from Temporal Sequences with Transformer and Hungarian Optimization
comment: Published at 2025 19th International Conference on Automatic Face and Gesture Recognition (FG)
summary: Person re-identification (Re-ID) is a crucial task in surveillance and human behavior analysis, often used in public spaces such as transport hubs. Traditional RGB-based Re-ID methods raise privacy concerns and are highly sensitive to lighting variations and occlusion. In this paper, we propose a novel Re-ID approach that leverages depth images, which inherently obscures facial and other identifiable features, making it a privacy-preserving solution. Our method addresses the association problem between multiple views of individuals by applying the Hungarian algorithm, optimizing the matching process through minimization of the global cost across the distance matrix. We further enhance the approach by introducing temporal sequences of frames as input to a Transformer encoder architecture, which exploits both RGB and depth modalities. This architecture captures dynamic movement patterns, improving feature extraction and re-identification accuracy. Additionally, we employ batch hard triplet loss to enhance discriminative feature learning by focusing on the hardest samples. We evaluate both depth-only and RGB-D models on several top-view datasets, including TVPR2, GODPR, and BIWI RGBD-ID. Our results demonstrate that depth-only re-identification can achieve competitive performance compared to state-of-the-art methods, as measured by standard metrics such as Cumulative Matching Characteristics (CMC) and Mean Average Precision (mAP), while prioritizing privacy preservation.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于深度图像的隐私保护行人重识别方法，使用匈牙利算法解决多视角关联问题，结合Transformer编码器处理时序帧，并采用批量困难三元组损失提升特征学习。
AI.motivation: 传统RGB行人重识别存在隐私问题，对光照变化和遮挡敏感。深度图像能隐藏可识别特征，提供隐私保护解决方案。
AI.method: 1. 使用深度图像作为隐私保护输入；2. 应用匈牙利算法优化多视角关联；3. 引入时序帧输入Transformer编码器，融合RGB和深度模态；4. 采用批量困难三元组损失增强判别特征学习。
AI.result: 在TVPR2、GODPR、BIWI RGBD-ID等顶视数据集上评估，深度图像重识别达到与先进方法相当的性能，同时优先保护隐私。
AI.conclusion: 深度图像行人重识别是有效的隐私保护方案，能处理光照变化和遮挡问题，通过多模态融合和优化算法实现竞争性性能。

title: Rethinking Molecular Graph Backdoors under Chemistry-aware Admission
summary: Backdoor attacks on molecular graph neural networks (GNNs) are typically evaluated as abstract graph edits, but real molecular learning pipelines do not train on arbitrary graphs. Molecular records must first survive parsing, sanitization, canonicalization, and graph-string consistency checks. We formalize this overlooked admission stage as ChemGuard, an operational protocol for testing whether a submitted molecular record can enter a realistic learning pipeline, while complementing existing defenses. ChemGuard admits a record only when its molecular string is sanitizable and the graph reconstructed from that string matches the submitted molecular graph. Under this operational view, many existing graph-based backdoors lose much of their apparent efficacy because their poisons are chemically invalid or representation-inconsistent. We then show that admission checks alone are insufficient to rule out molecular backdoors. We propose ChemBack, an admission-aware molecular backdoor attack that constructs chemically feasible motif-anchor attachments and ranks admitted candidates by fingerprint-based Tanimoto similarity to clean target-class molecules. ChemBack is model-free during trigger selection, using molecular structures, target labels, fingerprints, and public validity checks, but no victim model, surrogate GNN, learned embedding, gradient, logit, or training-code access. Across molecular benchmarks, validators, architectures, and defenses, \textbf{ChemBack} achieves high attack success with fully admitted poisons while preserving clean accuracy. Our results reveal a two-sided lesson, chemistry-aware admission suppresses many graph-only backdoors, yet chemically valid and target-aligned molecular backdoors remain a practical threat.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了ChemGuard分子记录准入协议和ChemBack分子后门攻击，揭示了分子学习管道中化学有效性和一致性检查对后门攻击的双重影响。
AI.motivation: 现有分子图神经网络后门攻击通常基于抽象的图编辑进行评估，但忽略了真实分子学习管道中的解析、净化、规范化和图-字符串一致性检查等准入阶段。这些化学有效性检查可能影响后门攻击的实际效果。
AI.method: 1. 提出ChemGuard操作协议，要求分子记录必须通过化学净化且从字符串重建的图与提交的分子图匹配才能进入学习管道。2. 提出ChemBack后门攻击，构建化学可行的基序-锚点附件，并通过指纹Tanimoto相似度对候选毒物进行排名，确保攻击完全通过准入检查。
AI.result: 1. 化学感知的准入检查显著抑制了许多基于图的后门攻击。2. 然而，化学有效且目标对齐的分子后门（ChemBack）仍然构成实际威胁，在多个分子基准测试、验证器、架构和防御中实现了高攻击成功率，同时保持清洁准确率。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了双重教训：化学感知的准入检查可以抑制许多仅基于图的后门攻击，但化学有效且目标对齐的分子后门仍然是实际威胁。这强调了在分子机器学习中考虑化学有效性和操作现实的重要性。

title: SteerVTE: Seamless Video Text Editing with Style and Glyph Control
summary: Visual text editing aims to precisely modify text in images and videos while preserving stylistic consistency and visual realism. Despite significant advances in the image domain, video text editing remains largely unexplored: it is a localized task demanding stroke-level precision within small text regions, which compounds the challenges of cross-frame accuracy, temporal coherence, and stylistic fidelity. We introduce SteerVTE, a unified framework that \underline{\textbf{steer}}s a frozen video diffusion model to perform precise \underline{\textbf{V}}ideo \underline{\textbf{T}}ext \underline{\textbf{E}}diting through style and glyph control. Built on a frozen diffusion transformer, SteerVTE attaches a lightweight text context adapter with two complementary modules: a style encoder capturing the original text's visual attributes, and dual-granularity glyph encoders encoding the target text at both the line and character levels. To overcome the inherently weak text rendering priors of video foundation models, we further propose a glyph-aware spatial-focal loss and a three-stage progressive training curriculum that scales from image to video data. To support large-scale training, we also develop an automatic synthesis pipeline and construct SteerVTE-1M, a dataset of one million triplets spanning diverse scenes, fonts, and stylistic effects. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SteerVTE substantially outperforms existing video editing baselines across text accuracy, style consistency, and temporal coherence.

AI.tldr: SteerVTE是一个统一的视频文本编辑框架，通过风格和字形控制引导冻结的视频扩散模型，实现精确的视频文本编辑。它包含轻量级文本上下文适配器、风格编码器、双粒度字形编码器，并提出了字形感知空间焦点损失和渐进训练策略。
AI.motivation: 视觉文本编辑旨在精确修改图像和视频中的文本，同时保持样式一致性和视觉真实感。尽管图像领域的文本编辑已取得显著进展，但视频文本编辑仍面临巨大挑战：这是一个局部化任务，需要在小的文本区域内实现笔画级精度，同时还要解决跨帧准确性、时间一致性和样式保真度等复杂问题。
AI.method: SteerVTE基于冻结的视频扩散变换器构建，附加轻量级文本上下文适配器，包含两个互补模块：捕捉原始文本视觉属性的风格编码器，以及在行级和字符级编码目标文本的双粒度字形编码器。为克服视频基础模型固有的弱文本渲染先验，提出了字形感知空间焦点损失和三阶段渐进训练课程（从图像到视频数据）。还开发了自动合成流程并构建了SteerVTE-1M数据集（包含100万个涵盖多样化场景、字体和样式效果的三元组）。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，SteerVTE在文本准确性、样式一致性和时间一致性方面显著优于现有的视频编辑基线方法。
AI.conclusion: SteerVTE是一个有效的视频文本编辑框架，通过风格和字形控制实现了精确的视频文本编辑，在多个指标上优于现有方法，为解决视频文本编辑的挑战提供了有前景的方案。

title: Convergence of Gradient Descent for General Neural Network Architectures Beyond the NTK Regime
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2506.24120
summary: Training dynamics is central to understanding neural networks, yet its theoretical analysis remains difficult even for simple architectures and becomes substantially more challenging for general modern architectures. In this paper, we propose a convergence framework for analyzing gradient descent (GD) dynamics under a broad family of neural network architectures and datasets beyond the neural tangent kernel (NTK) regime. The framework is formulated at the level of network blocks and covers architectures including pre-normalized multi-layer transformers. More precisely, under mild assumptions, we prove that for almost all initializations, GD with regular learning rates converges to the neighbourhood of a stationary point. This is mainly proved by establishing an iterate-dependent PL-type inequality through analyticity and measure-zero arguments, and by proving Lipschitz smoothness along the GD trajectory through polynomial generalized smoothness and a local relaxed dissipative condition. We further interpret the theorem under Xavier initialization and practical architectural scaling, showing that the learning rate scale depends on the depth and effective bottleneck dimensions rather than the largest width. Finally, we derive structural nondegeneracy implications for residual connections and function composition, and provide a generic characterization of global minimizers within our framework.

AI.tldr: 提出一个分析梯度下降收敛性的通用框架，适用于超越NTK机制的各种神经网络架构，证明在温和假设下梯度下降几乎对所有初始化都能收敛到平稳点附近
AI.motivation: 神经网络训练动态的理论分析困难，特别是对于现代复杂架构，需要超越NTK机制的分析框架
AI.method: 提出基于网络块的收敛框架，通过解析性和测度零论证建立迭代相关的PL型不等式，利用多项式广义光滑性和局部松弛耗散条件证明GD轨迹的Lipschitz光滑性
AI.result: 证明在温和假设下，对于几乎所有的初始化，使用常规学习率的梯度下降都能收敛到平稳点邻域；学习率尺度取决于深度和有效瓶颈维度而非最大宽度
AI.conclusion: 该框架为分析现代神经网络架构的梯度下降动态提供了理论基础，揭示了架构缩放对收敛性的影响，并推导了残差连接和函数组合的结构非退化性

title: P-JEPA: Procedural Video Representation Learning via Joint Embedding Predictive Architecture
summary: The increasing maturity of embodied AI platforms has driven a growing interest in procedural video representation learning to support intelligent assistance systems for complex, multi-step tasks. Leveraging large-scale latent predictive training, video foundation models capture video dynamics, enabling downstream tasks such as activity understanding, spatiotemporal localization, and predictive control. However, procedural videos include actions with long-range dependencies that these models do not support, due to the quadratic complexity of self-attention. Distinct actions, for example, may be visually similar despite appearing at different points in the procedure, such as turning the stove on versus off. Here, we propose a backbone-agnostic approach that learns long-duration video representations by reducing the problem to a dense, frame-aligned action space and predicting pooled masked latent vectors. This approach allows our Procedural Joint Embedding Predictive Architecture (P-JEPA) to ingest videos over 30 minutes long, enabling effective long-form understanding of procedural steps. We evaluate P-JEPA using features extracted with VJEPA2.1, TSM, and I3D over the EgoExo4D, EgoProceL, and Assembly101 datasets, finding that it consistently improves linear separability, streaming inference, and temporal action segmentation performance, achieving state-of-the-art results on EgoExo4D fine-grained action classification while using an order of magnitude fewer parameters than LLM-based methods and running in real time.

AI.tldr: P-JEPA：一种用于长时程序性视频表示学习的骨干无关方法，通过将问题简化为密集帧对齐动作空间并预测池化掩码潜在向量，能够处理30分钟以上的视频，在多个数据集上实现SOTA结果。
AI.motivation: 现有视频基础模型由于自注意力的二次复杂度，无法处理程序性视频中具有长程依赖关系的动作。例如，在程序的不同阶段出现的视觉相似动作（如开火炉vs关火炉）需要长时理解能力。
AI.method: 提出P-JEPA（程序性联合嵌入预测架构），这是一种骨干无关的方法，将长时视频表示学习简化为密集帧对齐动作空间，通过预测池化掩码潜在向量来学习表示。该方法可以处理30分钟以上的长视频。
AI.result: 在EgoExo4D、EgoProceL和Assembly101数据集上使用VJEPA2.1、TSM和I3D特征进行评估，P-JEPA在多个指标上表现优异：提高线性可分性、流式推理和时序动作分割性能，在EgoExo4D细粒度动作分类上达到SOTA，同时参数量比基于LLM的方法少一个数量级，并能实时运行。
AI.conclusion: P-JEPA为长时程序性视频理解提供了一种高效、可扩展的解决方案，能够有效处理程序性视频中的长程依赖关系，在保持实时性的同时显著提升性能。

title: Distribution-Aware Diffusion-LLM for Robust Ultra-Long-Term Time Series Forecasting
comment: 18 pages, 6 figures, 8 tables. Accepted at 35th International Conference on Artificial Neural Networks (ICANN 2026)
summary: Time series forecasting is a fundamental machine learning task. Recent work has explored Large Language Models (LLMs) for this purpose due to their strong generalization, pattern recognition, and zero-shot or few-shot capabilities. Despite their suitability for long-context learning, LLMs face challenges in multimodal settings: they lack calibrated probabilistic modeling for non-text data and struggle to align heterogeneous representations. To address these issues, we propose a new framework Diffusion-LLM that integrates a conditional diffusion model into an LLM-based forecasting pipeline. This joint design enables learning the conditional distribution of future data while improving semantic alignment in a shared latent space. We evaluate Diffusion-LLM on six long-term forecasting benchmarks, including ETT, Weather, and ECL. Our method consistently outperforms existing LLM-based baseline, achieving notable gains in ultra-long-term and few-shot forecasting and demonstrating the value of distribution-aware regularization for enhancing robustness and generalization in time series LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Diffusion-LLM框架，将条件扩散模型集成到基于LLM的时间序列预测流程中，以解决LLM在多模态设置中的概率建模和表示对齐问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管LLM在时间序列预测中展现出强大的泛化能力和模式识别能力，但在多模态设置中面临两个主要挑战：1）缺乏对非文本数据的校准概率建模；2）难以对齐异构表示。需要解决这些问题以提升LLM在时间序列预测中的性能。
AI.method: 提出Diffusion-LLM框架，将条件扩散模型集成到基于LLM的预测流程中。通过联合设计，在共享潜在空间中学习未来数据的条件分布，同时改善语义对齐。该方法结合了扩散模型的概率建模能力和LLM的模式识别能力。
AI.result: 在六个长期预测基准测试中（包括ETT、Weather和ECL），Diffusion-LLM始终优于现有的LLM基线方法。在超长期预测和少样本预测方面取得了显著提升，证明了分布感知正则化在增强时间序列LLM的鲁棒性和泛化能力方面的价值。
AI.conclusion: Diffusion-LLM框架通过集成条件扩散模型，有效解决了LLM在时间序列预测中的概率建模和表示对齐问题，显著提升了预测性能，特别是在超长期和少样本场景下，为时间序列LLM的发展提供了新方向。

title: Safe Few-Step Generation via Velocity Editing
summary: Flow matching has recently emerged as a strong paradigm for state-of-the-art text-to-image (T2I) generation, enabling high-quality generation with a small number of sampling steps. As these models are increasingly integrated into real-world applications, ensuring safe and non-sensitive content generation has become a critical requirement. However, adapting safety and concept removal methods to this new generation framework remains an open challenge. Specifically, prior methods largely rely on iterative trajectory steering across a number of denoising steps or on CLIP-centric prompt embedding manipulation. These design assumptions pose fundamental bottlenecks for safety in flow matching-based T2I generation, where limited sampling steps constrain iterative correction and modern context-aware text encoders diminish the effectiveness of embedding-level interventions. In this paper, we propose VESFlow, a training-free safety method tailored to flow matching with extremely few sampling steps. Leveraging the fact that flow matching models learn the marginal velocity, we directly edit the velocity field via a safe-conditional posterior. VESFlow steers the trajectory toward safe outputs while leaving the conditioning prompt unchanged. Building on the observation that VESFlow leaves outputs unchanged under benign prompts, we further introduce a risk score-based filtering that bypasses velocity editing to reduce computational cost while preserving benign prompt generation. Based on this filtering, we propose VESFlow+, a stronger variant of VESFlow that not only edits the velocity toward the safe direction, but also pushes it away from the unsafe direction. Experimental results show that VESFlow+ removes the target concept, reducing the attack success rate by NudeNet to 6.3% on Ring-A-Bell and 6.8% on MMA-Diffusion on the 4-step MeanFlow model, while preserving fidelity on benign prompts.

AI.tldr: VESFlow/VESFlow+是专门为流匹配模型设计的免训练安全生成方法，能在极少数采样步数下有效去除敏感内容，同时保持良性提示的生成质量。
AI.motivation: 流匹配模型在文本到图像生成中表现出色，但现有安全方法主要针对扩散模型，依赖于多次去噪迭代或CLIP嵌入操作，不适用于流匹配模型有限的采样步数和现代上下文感知文本编码器。
AI.method: VESFlow通过安全条件后验直接编辑速度场，引导轨迹走向安全输出而不改变提示。VESFlow+进一步引入风险评分过滤，在良性提示下跳过速度编辑以减少计算成本，同时向安全方向推动并远离不安全方向。
AI.result: 在4步MeanFlow模型上，VESFlow+将NudeNet攻击成功率降至6.3%（Ring-A-Bell）和6.8%（MMA-Diffusion），同时保持良性提示的生成保真度。
AI.conclusion: VESFlow/VESFlow+是针对流匹配模型的有效安全生成方法，解决了传统方法在流匹配框架下的局限性，实现了在极少数采样步数下的安全内容生成。

title: Physics-Informed Modeling for Wood Thermal Analysis and Prediction
summary: Wood materials exhibit complex, spatially varying thermal properties that challenge traditional architectural assumptions of material homogeneity. Although data-driven approaches can directly map wood RGB images to their corresponding thermal responses, they operate as uninterpretable black boxes that prioritize statistical correlation and may absorb experimental noise rather than thermodynamic plausibility. To address these limitations, we present physics-informed deep learning frameworks that integrate partial differential equations (PDEs) to predict pixel-level thermal responses of spatially heterogeneous wood materials using wood RGB images and testbed temperature maps. Specifically, we investigate two distinct approaches to enforcing a normalized 2D steady-state heat transfer equation derived from the general heat transfer equation: Physics-Informed Convolutional Neural Networks (PICNNs), which embed physics as a soft penalty term in the loss function, and Physics-Integrated Convolutional Neural Networks (PInteCNNs), which hard-code an analytical approximator-predictor-corrector solver directly into convolutional neural networks. To validate our proposed approaches, we collect three real-world multimodal datasets of Poplar, Grandis Cross-Cut (Grandis-CC), and Grandis Radial-Cut (Grandis-RC) wood samples. We further demonstrate that embedding physical inductive biases successfully balances predictive accuracy, physical interpretability, and intra-species diversity, outperforming data-driven approaches in handling complex wood material heterogeneity and enabling the extraction of interpretable physical parameters. Project: https://zekifayes.github.io/pim

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了两种物理信息深度学习框架，通过整合偏微分方程来预测木材的像素级热响应，解决了传统数据驱动方法在木材热性能预测中缺乏物理可解释性的问题。
AI.motivation: 木材材料具有复杂的空间变化热性能，传统方法假设材料均匀性，而数据驱动方法虽然能直接映射木材RGB图像到热响应，但作为黑箱模型缺乏物理可解释性，可能吸收实验噪声而非反映热力学合理性。
AI.method: 提出了两种物理信息深度学习框架：1) 物理信息卷积神经网络(PICNNs)，将物理约束作为软惩罚项嵌入损失函数；2) 物理集成卷积神经网络(PInteCNNs)，将解析近似-预测-校正求解器硬编码到卷积神经网络中。两种方法都基于从一般热传递方程推导出的归一化二维稳态热传递方程。
AI.result: 在杨木、Grandis横切面和径向切面三种真实木材数据集上验证了所提方法。结果表明，嵌入物理归纳偏置能成功平衡预测准确性、物理可解释性和种内多样性，在处理复杂木材材料异质性方面优于纯数据驱动方法，并能提取可解释的物理参数。
AI.conclusion: 物理信息深度学习框架为木材热性能预测提供了更可靠、可解释的解决方案，通过整合物理约束实现了预测准确性、物理合理性和模型可解释性的平衡，为处理复杂异质材料的热响应预测开辟了新途径。

title: BoxCtrl: 3D-Aware Visual Prompting for Geometric Image Editing
summary: As instruction-based editing models and multimodal large language models advance, diverse image editing tasks have become feasible. However, achieving precise and consistent geometric image editing, such as translating, scaling, and rotating in 3D space, remains a major challenge. In this work, we introduce BoxCtrl, a 3D-aware visual prompting framework. Unlike text-only or coarse 2D-guided approaches, our method introduces informative RGB 3D bounding boxes projected onto 2D images as visual prompts. The three orthogonal faces of each box are painted with distinct RGB colors, simultaneously encoding position, size, and orientation to provide a compact, intuitive in-context visual example. The key to BoxCtrl's success lies in these well-designed bounding boxes, which decouple geometric control from appearance control. This enables the model to learn consistent correspondences between faces of the same color in the latent space, leading to a precise understanding of geometric intentions and accurate editing results. We introduce a two-stage training paradigm: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) followed by Reinforcement Learning (RL). To address paired data scarcity, we construct a large-scale synthetic dataset for SFT, equipping the model with fundamental editing capabilities. To bridge the synthetic-to-real domain gap, we incorporate an online RL stage leveraging unpaired real-world data. Guided by a reward function evaluating geometric accuracy and visual fidelity, our SFT-RL strategy significantly enhances geometric precision while maintaining photorealistic quality. Extensive experiments demonstrate that BoxCtrl achieves state-of-the-art performance across translation, rotation, scaling, and composite editing tasks.

AI.tldr: BoxCtrl是一个3D感知的视觉提示框架，通过RGB彩色3D边界框作为视觉提示，实现精确的几何图像编辑（平移、缩放、旋转等），采用两阶段训练（监督微调+强化学习）解决数据稀缺问题。
AI.motivation: 当前基于指令的编辑模型和多模态大语言模型虽然能处理多样化的图像编辑任务，但在精确和一致的几何图像编辑（如3D空间中的平移、缩放、旋转）方面仍面临重大挑战。
AI.method: 提出BoxCtrl框架，使用RGB彩色3D边界框投影到2D图像作为视觉提示，三个正交面涂不同颜色，同时编码位置、大小和方向。采用两阶段训练：监督微调（SFT）使用大规模合成数据集，强化学习（RL）使用未配对真实数据，通过奖励函数评估几何精度和视觉保真度。
AI.result: 在平移、旋转、缩放和复合编辑任务上实现了最先进的性能，显著提升了几何精确度，同时保持照片级真实感质量。
AI.conclusion: BoxCtrl通过精心设计的3D边界框视觉提示，将几何控制与外观控制解耦，使模型能够在潜在空间中学习一致的颜色面对应关系，从而实现精确的几何意图理解和准确的编辑结果。

title: HyperQuant: A Rate-Distortion-Optimal Quantization Pipeline for Large Language and Diffusion Models
summary:
We present HyperQuant (Hadamard, optimallY Packing, Entropy Rice-coding), a unified post-training quantization pipeline for the weights and the KV cache of large language and diffusion transformers. Across a suite of self-contained experiments (Table 1), HyperQuant outperforms the recent HIGGS scheme at every operating point from 3 to 5 bits per scalar (bps) on weights, and beats both TurboQuant and OCTOPUS on KV quantization down to 1.7 bps. Beyond the LLM setting, HyperQuant quantizes the 19B-parameter LTX-2 DiT video model with no observable per-frame artifacts. End-to-end on an H100 at 4 bps, HyperQuant compresses the linear weights ~3.9x and the KV cache ~3.79x at near-lossless quality.
  HyperQuant combines four known ideas into a single construction: (i) a per-tile Randomized Hadamard Transform that makes the per-coordinate distribution of weights and activations approximately Gaussian; (ii) quantization to a low-dimensional optimal lattice (E8, D4, A2, or Z); (iii) lossless bit-stripping and near-entropy-optimal variable-length Rice coding of the lattice indices; and (iv) bias-correction methods for the KV cache that keep the reconstruction unbiased under inner products, preserving attention semantics. We further integrate the pipeline with 8-bit and 4-bit Tensor-Core MMA paths (fp8-e4m3, int8, nvfp4, mxfp4), and find that int8 beats fp8 on the post-RHT lattice output. Project page: https://moonmath.ai/hyperquant/

AI.tldr: HyperQuant是一个统一的训练后量化管道，用于大语言和扩散Transformer的权重和KV缓存，在3-5位/标量的权重量化和低至1.7位/标量的KV量化上优于现有方法，并能在H100上实现约3.9倍的权重压缩和3.79倍的KV缓存压缩，同时保持近乎无损的质量。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型和扩散模型的量化方法在权重和KV缓存压缩方面存在性能瓶颈，需要一种统一的量化方案来同时优化这两个关键组件，在保持模型质量的同时实现更高的压缩比。
AI.method: 结合四种技术：1) 每块随机哈达玛变换使权重和激活分布近似高斯；2) 使用低维最优格点(如E8、D4等)进行量化；3) 无损位剥离和近熵最优的变长Rice编码；4) KV缓存的偏置校正方法以保持注意力语义。
AI.result: 在3-5位/标量的权重量化上优于HIGGS方案，在KV量化上优于TurboQuant和OCTOPUS，低至1.7位/标量；成功量化19B参数的LTX-2 DiT视频模型无可见伪影；在H100上实现约3.9倍权重压缩和3.79倍KV缓存压缩。
AI.conclusion: HyperQuant提供了一个有效的统一量化框架，能够同时优化大语言和扩散模型的权重与KV缓存，在保持模型质量的同时实现显著的压缩效果，并可与现代硬件加速器(如Tensor-Core)集成。

title: Transfer learning-based method for automated ewaste recycling in smart cities
comment: Published by the EAI Endorsed Transactions on Smart Cities, 2021 journal
summary: Sorting a huge stream of waste accurately within a short period can be done with the support of digitalization, particularly Artificial Intelligence, instead of traditional methods. The overlap of Artificial Intelligence and Circular Economy can flourish many services in the environmental technology domain, in particular smart ewaste recycling, resulting in enabling circular smart cities. We analyse the growing need for automated ewaste recycling as an essential requirement to cope with the fast growing ewaste stream and we shed the light on the impact of Artificial Intelligence in supporting the recycling process through smart classification of devices, where the smartphone is our case study. Our study applies transfer learning as a special technique of Artificial Intelligence by finetuning the output layers of AlexNet as a pretrained model and perform the implementation on a small size dataset that contains 12 classes from 6 smartphone brands. We evaluate the performance of our model by tuning the learning rate, choosing the best optimizer, and augmenting the original dataset to avoid overfitting. We found that the optimizer of Stochastic Gradient Descent with Momentum and 3e-4 as a learning rate brings almost 98% model accuracy with generalization. Our study supports automated ewaste recycling in decreasing the error rate of ewaste sorting and investigates the advantages of applying transfer learning as the best scenario to overcome the rising challenges.

AI.tldr: 该研究应用迁移学习技术，通过微调AlexNet预训练模型对12类智能手机品牌进行智能分类，以支持电子废物自动回收，实现98%的准确率。
AI.motivation: 应对快速增长的电子废物流，需要自动化回收系统。传统方法效率低下，而人工智能与循环经济的结合可以促进智能电子废物回收，支持循环智慧城市建设。
AI.method: 采用迁移学习方法，使用AlexNet作为预训练模型，在包含12个类别（来自6个智能手机品牌）的小型数据集上进行微调。通过调整学习率、选择最佳优化器（SGD with Momentum）和数据增强来避免过拟合。
AI.result: 使用动量为0.9的随机梯度下降优化器和3e-4的学习率，模型达到了约98%的准确率并具有良好的泛化能力。该方法有效降低了电子废物分类的错误率。
AI.conclusion: 迁移学习是应对电子废物回收挑战的最佳方案，能够支持自动化电子废物回收系统，减少分类错误，促进循环经济和智慧城市发展。

title: Differential Spectral Damping Gap Adaptive Regularization for Ill-Conditioned Kernel Methods
comment: 11 pages, 3 tables, 1 figure. Complete source code and experiments are available at https://github.com/Praveg432/dsd-regularization
summary: Kernel methods requiring matrix inversion -- particularly Least-Squares Twin Support Vector Machines (LSTSVM) -- suffer from exponential eigenvalue decay in their system matrices, producing severely ill-conditioned problems where standard Tikhonov regularization applies uniform damping regardless of eigenvector reliability. We propose Differential Spectral Damping (DSD), a regularization formula that adapts its penalty to localized eigengap structure: preserving eigenvectors with large spectral gaps (reliable per Davis-Kahan perturbation theory) while aggressively suppressing those with small gaps (directionally corrupted beyond recovery). We motivate DSD through a principled design procedure grounded in the Davis-Kahan $\sin(Θ)$ theorem, systematically deriving the requirements for a reliability-aware damping function and selecting the exponential form for its smoothness, differentiability, and natural saturation properties. Through rigorous paired testing with fairly optimized baselines (including gradient-optimized Tikhonov receiving equal optimization opportunity), we demonstrate that DSD improves LSTSVM classification accuracy by +4.8 percentage points on real-world GINA ($d=970$, Cohen's $d = 4.49$, $p < 0.0001$), +10.4 percentage points at $d=200$, and +2.6 percentage points on Madelon ($d=500$) -- all using only principled spectral initialization while Tikhonov receives grid search. For pre-image reconstruction on manifold data, DSD ties Tikhonov at high perturbation noise ($p=0.99$) but slightly underperforms at lower noise levels; both reduce naive inversion error by $66\times$. We characterize the precise operating regime ($d \geq 100$, condition number $> 10^3$) and document where simpler methods suffice, providing practitioners with clear deployment guidance.

AI.tldr: 提出Differential Spectral Damping (DSD)方法，针对LSTSVM等核方法中矩阵特征值指数衰减导致的严重病态问题，通过基于Davis-Kahan扰动理论的自适应惩罚机制，在保留可靠特征向量的同时抑制方向性损坏的特征向量，显著提升分类准确率。
AI.motivation: 传统核方法（特别是最小二乘孪生支持向量机LSTSVM）存在系统矩阵特征值指数衰减问题，导致严重病态问题。标准Tikhonov正则化对所有特征向量施加均匀阻尼，忽略了特征向量的可靠性差异。需要一种能够根据特征值间隙结构自适应调整惩罚的正则化方法。
AI.method: 提出微分谱阻尼(DSD)方法，基于Davis-Kahan sin(Θ)定理设计，通过分析局部特征间隙结构，对可靠特征向量（具有大特征间隙）保留，对方向性损坏的特征向量（具有小特征间隙）进行强抑制。选择指数函数形式，因其平滑性、可微性和自然饱和特性。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上，DSD显著提升LSTSVM分类准确率：GINA数据集(d=970)提升4.8个百分点（Cohen's d=4.49, p<0.0001），d=200时提升10.4个百分点，Madelon数据集(d=500)提升2.6个百分点。在流形数据的前像重建任务中，高扰动噪声下与Tikhonov相当，低噪声下略逊，但两者均将朴素逆误差降低66倍。
AI.conclusion: DSD为核方法中的病态问题提供了理论驱动的正则化解决方案，在d≥100、条件数>10^3的工况下效果显著。该方法基于特征向量可靠性进行自适应阻尼，优于均匀阻尼方法，为实际应用提供了明确的部署指导。

title: Leveraging Similarities in Multi-Armed Bandits
summary: In many online learning and bandit problems, the actions we consider possess inherent similarities--for instance because they share latent traits, tags, or hierarchical structure. We study online learning with a similarity-structured action set, encoded by a rooted tree whose leaves are the actions and whose levels quantify how closely two actions are related. The loss sequence is assumed tree-compatible: losses of similar actions are constrained to be close. We establish an impossibility result showing that usual one-point bandit feedback cannot, in general, leverage range or tree-induced similarity, even under very strong similarity constraints. We then provide a unified set of algorithms which adapt to a wide range of richer feedback models, from semi-bandit feedback down to multi-point bandit protocols, including the minimal two-point feedback setting. We show these algorithms exhibit best-of-both-worlds guarantees and provably exploit action similarities by replacing the number of actions $K$ by a similarity-aware effective number of actions $K_{\mathrm{eff}}$ in the regret bounds. As an application, we show that under two-point feedback, it is possible to achieve $\sqrt{T}$ regret in Lipschitz bandits when $d \leq 2$.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究具有相似性结构动作集的在线学习问题，通过树结构编码动作间的相似性，在损失序列满足树兼容约束下，提出能利用丰富反馈模型（从半赌博机到多点赌博机反馈）的算法，用相似性感知的有效动作数替代总动作数来改进遗憾界。
AI.motivation: 许多在线学习和赌博机问题中，动作之间存在内在相似性（如共享潜在特征、标签或层次结构）。传统单点赌博机反馈无法有效利用这种相似性结构，即使有很强的相似性约束。需要研究如何通过更丰富的反馈模型来利用动作间的相似性改进学习性能。
AI.method: 使用树结构编码动作间的相似性，其中叶节点是动作，树的层次量化动作间的相关程度。提出一套统一的算法框架，适应从半赌博机反馈到多点赌博机协议（包括最小两点反馈）的各种反馈模型。算法通过相似性感知的有效动作数K_eff替代总动作数K来改进遗憾界。
AI.result: 建立了不可能性结果：传统单点赌博机反馈通常无法利用树诱导的相似性。提出的算法在丰富反馈模型下能获得最佳两界保证，在两点反馈下，当d≤2时能在Lipschitz赌博机中实现√T遗憾。
AI.conclusion: 通过更丰富的反馈模型（如两点反馈）可以有效地利用动作间的相似性结构，显著改进在线学习性能。相似性感知的有效动作数K_eff是理解这种改进的关键概念，为结构化动作集的学习问题提供了新的理论框架。

title: Ocean4D: Generative Underwater 4D Reconstruction via Medium-Aware Video Diffusion
summary: Underwater 4D reconstruction remains challenging due to the coupling between degraded light transport in participating media and dynamic water variations. Most existing Methods are developed under in-air assumptions and do not explicitly account for underwater absorption and backscatter. Additionally, near-static assumptions make these approaches sensitive to drifting particles and dynamic distractors , leading to unstable geometry and inconsistent cross-view results. To address these issues, we propose a generative framework for underwater 4D reconstruction, named Ocean4D, which is built on two complementary components. Specifically, 4D-GCC constructs 4D geometrically consistent conditioning with improved cross-frame coverage, while the Medium-Aware Block performs implicit medium-aware denoising in the latent diffusion process to stabilize underwater appearance under absorption and scattering. Given a monocular video and target cameras, our method generates videos along the target trajectories while preserving global structure and cross-view consistency. Extensive experiments on both dynamic and static underwater benchmarks demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on underwater reconstruction.

AI.tldr: Ocean4D是一个用于水下4D重建的生成框架，通过4D几何一致条件构建和介质感知去噪块来解决水下吸收、散射和动态变化带来的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有方法大多基于空中假设，未明确考虑水下吸收和背散射效应，且对静态假设敏感，导致在漂移颗粒和动态干扰物下几何不稳定和跨视角结果不一致。
AI.method: 提出Ocean4D框架，包含两个互补组件：4D-GCC构建4D几何一致条件以改进跨帧覆盖，介质感知块在潜在扩散过程中执行隐式介质感知去噪以稳定水下外观。
AI.result: 在动态和静态水下基准测试中展示了最先进的性能，能够生成沿目标轨迹的视频同时保持全局结构和跨视角一致性。
AI.conclusion: Ocean4D通过结合几何一致条件和介质感知去噪，有效解决了水下4D重建中的介质退化和动态变化挑战，实现了稳定且一致的重建结果。

title: GRINQH: Graded Input-based Quantization Hierarchy for Efficient LLM Generation
summary: Autoregressive decoding with LLMs is primarily bottlenecked by GPU memory bandwidth, especially in edge-computing settings. While quantization is essential for mitigating this bottleneck, most existing methods treat inference as a uniform process and fail to account for the asymmetry between the compute-bound prefill stage and the memory-bound decoding stage. We propose GRINQH (GRaded INput-based Quantization Hierarchy), a weight-only post-training quantization framework that accelerates decoding by unifying quantization and sparsification. GRINQH leverages activation magnitudes as a proxy for computational importance to dynamically assign weight channels to different precision levels, enabling flexible average bit widths during decoding. Evaluated on Llama3 and Qwen3 models, GRINQH outperforms state-of-the-art fixed- and mixed-precision baselines at comparable 3- and 4-bit settings, even enabling effective 2-bit generation. We experimentally verify theoretical speedups by leveraging a hierarchical nested memory layout for multi-precision storage in a custom GPU kernel. Ultimately, GRINQH establishes a new state-of-the-art Pareto frontier for LLM generation, enabling a dynamic trade-off between generation quality and inference speed.

AI.tldr: GRINQH是一个基于梯度输入的分层量化框架，通过统一量化和稀疏化来加速LLM解码阶段，利用激活幅度动态分配权重通道到不同精度级别，在3-4位量化设置下超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 自回归解码在边缘计算场景中主要受GPU内存带宽限制，现有量化方法将推理视为均匀过程，忽略了预填充阶段（计算受限）和解码阶段（内存受限）之间的不对称性。
AI.method: 提出GRINQH（基于梯度输入的分层量化框架），这是一种仅权重的训练后量化方法，利用激活幅度作为计算重要性的代理，动态将权重通道分配到不同精度级别，实现解码期间灵活的平均比特宽度。
AI.result: 在Llama3和Qwen3模型上评估，GRINQH在可比较的3位和4位设置下优于最先进的固定和混合精度基线方法，甚至能够实现有效的2位生成。通过自定义GPU内核中的分层嵌套内存布局验证了理论加速效果。
AI.conclusion: GRINQH为LLM生成建立了新的最先进Pareto前沿，实现了生成质量和推理速度之间的动态权衡，为边缘计算中的LLM部署提供了有效的解决方案。

title: VideoAgent: All-in-One Framework for Video Understanding and Editing
summary: Video editing has become essential in digital media creation, yet existing automated systems are restricted to short segment processing and domain-specific tasks. They face two critical limitations: i) inability to handle diverse video comprehension and editing operations, and ii) lack of long-video understanding for coherent narrative creation. We propose VideoAgent, an all-in-one agentic framework addressing these challenges through two key innovations. First, we develop automated video shot creation with shot planning agents for coherent narratives and cross-modal retrieval for aligned visual content. Second, we design a multi-agent orchestration framework integrating over thirty specialized editing agents. Intent parsing filters relevant tools while textual-gradient graph optimization assembles complex editing pipelines. Extensive experiments on our newly-proposed VideoEdit benchmark and public datasets demonstrate VideoAgent's superiority over existing multimodal LLMs and agentic systems. VideoAgent achieves 87-95% orchestration success rates while reducing API costs by 60%. Human evaluation across six video categories shows VideoAgent produces professional-quality content approaching human-level performance, with ratings only 4% below human-created videos. We release our code at https://github.com/HKUDS/VideoAgent.

AI.tldr: VideoAgent是一个全能的视频编辑代理框架，通过自动镜头规划和多智能体编排解决现有系统无法处理多样化视频理解和长视频连贯叙事的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有自动化视频编辑系统存在两个关键限制：1) 无法处理多样化的视频理解和编辑操作；2) 缺乏对长视频的理解能力，难以创建连贯的叙事。需要开发一个能够同时解决这些问题的综合框架。
AI.method: 提出VideoAgent框架，包含两个关键创新：1) 通过镜头规划智能体实现自动视频镜头创建和跨模态检索；2) 设计多智能体编排框架，集成30多个专业编辑智能体，使用意图解析筛选相关工具，并通过文本梯度图优化组合复杂编辑流水线。
AI.result: 在新建的VideoEdit基准和公共数据集上，VideoAgent优于现有多模态LLM和代理系统。编排成功率87-95%，API成本降低60%。人类评估显示，在6个视频类别中，VideoAgent生成的内容接近人类水平，评分仅比人类创作视频低4%。
AI.conclusion: VideoAgent是一个有效的全功能视频编辑代理框架，能够处理多样化编辑任务和长视频叙事，在性能、成本和内容质量方面都表现出色，接近人类专业水平。

title: Interpretable Kolmogorov-Arnold Network with Feature-Isolated Temporal Attention Mechanism for Electricity Load Forecasting
summary: Accurate electricity load forecasting is a crucial prerequisite for stable power system operations. While prevalent deep learning models present competitive performance, they often operate as black boxes and lack interpretability. While the Kolmogorov-Arnold network (KAN) has emerged as a promising alternative because of its learnable activation function design, its direct application to time-series forecasting faces challenges in modeling complex temporal data patterns. Also, simple integration into existing architectures, such as serving as replacement of neural modules, cannot fully leverage KAN's interpretability strengths. To address these gaps, this study develops LoadKAN, a novel hybrid and interpretable framework for load forecasting that synergistically combines a specifically-designed feature-isolated temporal attention mechanism with a KAN module. The attention stage aims to extract temporal dynamics from each input feature independently, such as historical load and human mobility, providing distilled feature representations to the KAN module for interpretable predictions. When evaluated on datasets from three representative U.S. electricity markets, our LoadKAN remains highly competitive when compared to extensively-tuned, state-of-the-art, black-box deep learning benchmarks. More importantly, LoadKAN's interpretability enables a granular analysis of the learned non-linear relationships between six distinct mobility patterns and electricity load. Through KAN-learned activation functions, our quantitative sensitivity analyses on mobility features reveal complex and market-specific dependencies. These findings further demonstrate the ability of our LoadKAN to generate insights often obscured by opaque black-box neural forecasting models.

AI.tldr: LoadKAN：一种用于电力负荷预测的新型可解释混合框架，结合了特征隔离的时间注意力机制和KAN模块，在保持竞争力的同时提供可解释性。
AI.motivation: 当前深度学习模型在电力负荷预测中虽然性能优越，但缺乏可解释性，而KAN网络虽然具有可学习的激活函数，但直接应用于时间序列预测难以建模复杂的时间模式，且简单替换现有神经网络模块无法充分发挥KAN的可解释性优势。
AI.method: 提出LoadKAN框架，包含两个关键组件：1) 专门设计的特征隔离时间注意力机制，独立提取每个输入特征（如历史负荷、人类移动性）的时间动态；2) KAN模块，接收注意力阶段提取的特征表示进行可解释的预测。
AI.result: 在三个美国代表性电力市场数据集上评估，LoadKAN与经过充分调优的最先进黑盒深度学习基准相比保持高度竞争力，更重要的是其可解释性能够对六种不同移动模式与电力负荷之间的非线性关系进行细粒度分析。
AI.conclusion: LoadKAN通过KAN学习的激活函数，在移动性特征上的定量敏感性分析揭示了复杂且市场特定的依赖关系，证明了该框架能够生成通常被不透明黑盒神经网络预测模型所掩盖的洞察。

title: RT-DocLayout: Real-Time End-to-End Document Layout Analysis with Reading Order in the Wild
summary:
Accurate document layout analysis remains a critical bottleneck for document parsing systems, due to the intricate coupling among heterogeneous document layout elements, geometric distortions (\eg, paper warping and bending, perspective variations), and reading order within diverse layout structures. Existing approaches typically rely on fragmented multi-stage pipelines or computationally heavy generative Transformer architectures, leading to error propagation and limited efficiency.
  In this paper, we present RT-DocLayout, a highly efficient end-to-end framework for document layout analysis, designed as a front-end for document parsing tasks. The proposed model unifies classification, detection, pixel-level segmentation, and reading order prediction for layout elements within a single 33M-parameter architecture. Built upon the RT-DETR, our key contribution is a unified multi-task formulation within a single query-based decoder that simultaneously classifies, regresses bounding box, generates masks, and constructs relationship to reason reading order.
  By jointly learning geometric and structural representations, RT-DocLayout introduces multi-task optimization that substantially improves robustness under real-world document distortions. Extensive experiments on public benchmarks demonstrate state-of-the-art performance in document layout analysis while maintaining real-time inference speed(132.1 FPS). When coupled with downstream OCR engines, RT-DocLayout significantly improves full-document reconstruction quality, providing a scalable and practical foundation for real-world document intelligence systems.

AI.tldr: RT-DocLayout 是一个高效的单阶段端到端文档布局分析框架，统一了分类、检测、像素级分割和阅读顺序预测，在保持实时推理速度的同时实现了SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 当前文档布局分析面临异构文档元素耦合、几何失真（纸张扭曲、透视变化）和阅读顺序复杂等挑战。现有方法多采用碎片化的多阶段管道或计算量大的生成式Transformer架构，导致错误传播和效率低下。
AI.method: 基于RT-DETR构建，提出统一的多任务公式，在单个基于查询的解码器中同时进行分类、边界框回归、掩码生成和阅读顺序关系构建。通过联合学习几何和结构表示，实现多任务优化。
AI.result: 在公共基准测试中实现了最先进的文档布局分析性能，同时保持实时推理速度（132.1 FPS）。与下游OCR引擎结合时，显著提高了全文档重建质量。
AI.conclusion: RT-DocLayout为实际文档智能系统提供了可扩展和实用的基础，通过高效的单阶段架构解决了文档布局分析的关键瓶颈。

title: What Does a Chemical Language Model Know About Molecules?
summary: Chemical language models (cLMs) are widely assumed to learn surface-level syntactic patterns rather than learning meaningful molecular semantics. Here, we apply sparse autoencoders (SAEs) to MolFormer, an encoder-only cLM, to mechanistically examine how molecular representations are built across layers. We discover that early layers rely on position-tracking latents to parse molecular grammar, while later layers encode atom-in-substructure and pharmacologically relevant features. Additionally, we show that non-canonical SMILES produce more disruptive representation shifts than invalid SMILES, driven by position-latent disruption propagating across layers. To support further exploration, we develop InterMol, an interactive visualizer for SAE activations on molecular strings and structures.

AI.tldr: 该研究使用稀疏自编码器(SAEs)分析化学语言模型MolFormer，揭示了模型如何构建分子表征：早期层依赖位置追踪潜在变量解析分子语法，后期层编码原子-亚结构特征和药理学相关特征
AI.motivation: 化学语言模型(cLMs)通常被认为只学习表面语法模式而非有意义的分子语义，本研究旨在通过稀疏自编码器机制性地研究分子表征在模型各层中的构建过程
AI.method: 对编码器型化学语言模型MolFormer应用稀疏自编码器(SAEs)，分析各层表征构建机制；开发了交互式可视化工具InterMol用于SAE激活在分子字符串和结构上的可视化
AI.result: 发现早期层依赖位置追踪潜在变量解析分子语法，后期层编码原子-亚结构特征和药理学相关特征；非规范SMILES比无效SMILES产生更显著的表示偏移，由位置潜在变量的跨层传播驱动
AI.conclusion: 化学语言模型确实学习有意义的分子语义而不仅是表面语法，为理解模型内部机制提供了新视角；开发的InterMol工具支持进一步探索

title: Faithful Grounded Visual Reasoning via Learned Proxy-Tokens
comment: Accepted at ICIP 2026. Code, model and data available at: https://github.com/CEA-LIST/Composer
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable success in Visual Question Answering (VQA), yet their "black-box" nature hinders deployment in critical domains. Grounded Visual Reasoning (GVR) approaches attempt to improve interpretability by explicitly couple textual rationales with visual grounding information, which are typically textual coordinates. This mechanism lacks a learnable semantic link to the visual features, often resulting in a semantic-spatial gap where the model hallucinates coordinates that do not correspond to image evidences. In this work, we introduce Composer, a MLLM that leverages a novel visual grounding mechanism based on learned proxy-tokens to promote faithful interpretability. These discrete symbolic pointers explicitly index the image latent space, allowing the model to manipulate visual regions as addressable, semantically manipulable sets. To rigorously validate our novel grounding mechanism, we constructed ComposerGCoT, a dataset synthesized to enable holistic assessment of reasoning consistency and grounding accuracy. Experimental results indicate that Composer achieves performance parity with its coordinate-based counterpart in final answer accuracy, while improving visual grounding accuracy by +9.0 points. By demonstrating that discrete proxy-tokens capture spatial semantics more effectively than typical textual coordinates, we establish that visual grounding mechanisms with learnable semantic links represent a promising path toward trustworthy and reliable MLLMs.

AI.tldr: Composer是一种多模态大语言模型，采用基于可学习代理令牌的新型视觉定位机制，通过离散符号指针显式索引图像潜在空间，提高视觉定位准确性和可解释性，相比坐标基方法提升定位精度9.0分。
AI.motivation: 当前基于坐标的视觉定位方法存在语义-空间鸿沟问题，模型可能产生与图像证据不符的坐标幻觉，缺乏可学习的语义链接，限制了在关键领域的可信部署。
AI.method: 提出Composer模型，采用基于可学习代理令牌的视觉定位机制，使用离散符号指针显式索引图像潜在空间，使模型能够将视觉区域作为可寻址、语义可操作的集合进行操纵。
AI.result: Composer在最终答案准确率上与坐标基模型相当，同时视觉定位准确率提升9.0分。构建了ComposerGCoT数据集用于全面评估推理一致性和定位准确性。
AI.conclusion: 离散代理令牌比典型文本坐标更能有效捕捉空间语义，具有可学习语义链接的视觉定位机制是实现可信可靠多模态大语言模型的有前途路径。

title: Selective Time Series Forecasting via Metalearning
summary: Deep learning methods have achieved state-of-the-art in time series forecasting, yet their accuracy varies considerably across samples, as some instances remain inherently difficult to predict. Reject option mechanisms, which allow models to abstain from high-risk predictions, are well established in classification and regression but underexplored in forecasting. Existing abstention strategies typically rely on proxies, such as the width of the prediction interval or learned confidence scores derived from forecasts. However, these approaches are inherently tied to the training domain, limiting their ability to generalize. We propose a selective forecasting framework that addresses this limitation by modeling the empirical percentile of forecasting errors, that is, a scale-invariant statistic, based on structural characteristics extracted from recent lags via metalearning. By decoupling the rejection decision from the forecast itself and grounding it in domain-agnostic features, the framework enables effective abstention transfer across heterogeneous time series. Experiments in both in-domain and transfer learning settings show that rejecting samples predicted as challenging consistently improves forecasting accuracy across coverage levels.
