AI.tldr: 提出选择性预测框架，通过元学习从时间序列滞后特征中建模预测误差的百分位数，实现跨领域泛化的拒绝预测机制
AI.motivation: 深度学习在时间序列预测中表现优异，但不同样本的预测精度差异很大，现有拒绝预测机制主要依赖预测区间宽度或置信度分数等代理指标，这些方法受限于训练领域，难以泛化到新领域
AI.method: 提出选择性预测框架，从时间序列的近期滞后中提取结构特征，通过元学习建模预测误差的经验百分位数（尺度不变统计量），将拒绝决策与预测本身解耦，基于领域无关特征实现跨异构时间序列的拒绝预测
AI.result: 在领域内和迁移学习设置下的实验表明，拒绝预测为困难的样本能够持续提高不同覆盖水平下的预测精度
AI.conclusion: 通过建模预测误差的百分位数并基于结构特征进行元学习，提出的选择性预测框架能够有效实现跨领域泛化的拒绝预测，提高预测系统的整体准确性

title: Changing Modalities: Adapting Remote Sensing Models to New Satellites and Sensors
summary: Machine learning models for remote sensing are trained and deployed on a static set of modalities. However, as we equip newer satellites with novel sensors and retire old ones, practitioners may wish to deploy an existing model on a substitution, superset, or subset of modalities with minimal retraining given data availability or practical computational constraints. We study the setting of updating existing models to changing modalities and identify three main scenarios: Modality Transfer (substitution), Addition (superset), and Peeking (subset). We propose DeluluNet, an architecture with modular components for all three changing modality scenarios. DeluluNet is trained end-to-end, learning a multi-modal model from a unimodal teacher and unlabeled multimodal data via modality hallucination--predicting missing modality representations from those that are present. As a result, DeluluNet can keep predicting even when input modalities change, providing a practical alternative to re-labeling and re-training in a changing world.

AI.tldr: DeluluNet是一个用于处理遥感数据模态变化的架构，能够在模态替换、增加或减少时，通过模态幻觉预测缺失模态表示，避免重新标注和训练。
AI.motivation: 遥感卫星的传感器会更新换代，导致现有模型需要适应不同的模态组合（替换、增加或减少），但重新标注数据和训练模型成本高昂。
AI.method: 提出DeluluNet架构，通过端到端训练从单模态教师模型和无标签多模态数据中学习多模态模型，使用模态幻觉技术预测缺失模态的表示。
AI.result: DeluluNet能够在输入模态变化时继续预测，为模态变化场景提供了实用的替代方案，避免了重新标注和训练。
AI.conclusion: DeluluNet为遥感领域中的模态变化问题提供了有效的解决方案，通过模态幻觉技术实现了模型在不同模态组合下的适应性。

title: Do Location Encoders Capture Spatial Effects? A GeoShapley Benchmark Across Scales
comment: 4 pages, 2 figures, 2 tables, Submitted to SIGSPATIAL '26 short papers
summary: Location encoders transform geographic coordinates into high dimensional embeddings for downstream machine learning, but it is unclear how well these representations capture interpretable spatial effects. We benchmark whether GeoShapley, a game-theoretic explainer that treats all location features as a single joint player, can recover spatially varying coefficients from models built on location-encoder embeddings. Eleven encoders from the TorchSpatial framework are evaluated against a synthetic process with known coefficients, across three scales (grid, county, global), with and without raw coordinates alongside the embedding, and under untrained and contrastively trained conditions. Measuring recovery as the correlation between estimated and true coefficients, we report how it varies with scale and encoder architecture and compare the embeddings against a raw-coordinate baseline. Recovery of the primary coefficient is consistently high across encoders, whereas recovery of a secondary coefficient is more scale-dependent, differing most at the global scale; the raw-coordinate baseline remains competitive throughout.

AI.tldr: 该研究评估了11种位置编码器通过GeoShapley游戏理论解释器恢复空间变化系数的能力，发现在不同尺度下主要系数恢复效果一致较好，次要系数的恢复则更依赖尺度，特别是在全球尺度上差异最大，而原始坐标基线模型始终具有竞争力。
AI.motivation: 位置编码器将地理坐标转换为高维嵌入用于下游机器学习，但尚不清楚这些表示如何捕捉可解释的空间效应。研究旨在评估GeoShapley解释器能否从位置编码器嵌入构建的模型中恢复空间变化系数。
AI.method: 使用TorchSpatial框架中的11种编码器，在已知系数的合成过程上进行基准测试，涵盖三个尺度（网格、县、全球），在有/无原始坐标伴随嵌入的情况下，以及在未训练和对比训练条件下进行评估。通过估计系数与真实系数的相关性来衡量恢复效果。
AI.result: 主要系数的恢复在所有编码器中一致较高，而次要系数的恢复更依赖尺度，在全球尺度上差异最大。原始坐标基线模型在整个评估中保持竞争力，特别是在全球尺度上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 位置编码器在捕捉主要空间效应方面表现稳健，但次要效应的恢复能力受尺度影响较大。原始坐标作为基线模型仍然具有竞争力，特别是在全球尺度任务中，这为位置编码器的实际应用提供了重要参考。

title: Polynomial Dice Loss for Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Medical image segmentation is a fundamental task for medical image processing and computer-assisted intervention, yet data imbalance and small lesion detection pose significant challenges. Dice Loss, which measures the overlap between predicted and ground truth regions, is widely used to mitigate these issues. To further emphasize its properties, we propose Polynomial Dice Loss, a polynomial extension of Dice Loss. Specifically, by leveraging the geometric characteristics of Dice Loss and formulating the loss function as a polynomial representation via Taylor expansion, we enable the adjustment of the contribution of higher-order components to the loss function. In our experiments, we evaluate the proposed method against loss functions derived from conventional Dice and Tversky coefficients. Experimental results and further analysis show that the polynomial formulation provides a simple way to control the loss shape and achieves competitive performance across multiple segmentation settings.

AI.tldr: 提出多项式Dice损失函数，通过泰勒展开将Dice损失表示为多项式形式，可调整高阶分量对损失函数的贡献，在医学图像分割中实现竞争性性能。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割面临数据不平衡和小病灶检测的挑战。虽然Dice损失被广泛用于缓解这些问题，但需要进一步强调其特性以提升分割性能。
AI.method: 提出多项式Dice损失函数，利用Dice损失的几何特性，通过泰勒展开将损失函数表示为多项式形式，从而可以调整高阶分量对损失函数的贡献。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，多项式Dice损失在多种分割设置下均取得竞争性性能，且多项式形式为控制损失形状提供了简单方法。
AI.conclusion: 多项式Dice损失通过多项式表示提供了一种灵活控制损失函数形状的方法，在医学图像分割任务中表现出色，为解决数据不平衡和小病灶检测问题提供了有效方案。

title: TROPT: An Open Framework for Unifying and Advancing Discrete Text Optimization
summary: Discrete text-trigger optimization -- searching for text sequences that, when ingested by a model, steer it toward a specified objective -- underpins model red-teaming (e.g., LLM jailbreaks), as well as auditing and interpretability. However, the current state of discrete optimizers hinders their adoption and progress. First, existing optimizers, when open-sourced at all, are scattered across research codebases tied to specific models, objectives, and problem domains. Second, optimizer variants proliferate, each requiring engineering overhead to use or extend, and remaining hard to compare head-to-head. Together, these raise the bar for adopting optimizers in existing or new domains, and for advancing them via new strategies. We address these gaps with TROPT, the first open-source framework that unifies discrete optimizers' execution and standardizes their development under a single interface. TROPT makes it easy to customize end-to-end optimization recipes by swapping any component -- models, objectives, and optimizers -- extending its reach across domains and new applications. TROPT currently ships with 30+ optimization recipes -- covering applications such as jailbreaking and probing model internals -- built from 15+ optimizers (spanning white-box to black-box access) and 15+ losses, from foundational to state-of-the-art methods. Demonstrating its utility, we leverage TROPT in several studies: (i) controlled, large-scale experiments comparing and enhancing optimization strategies for LLM jailbreaks, revealing potent-yet-underadopted techniques; and (ii) porting optimizers from one domain (e.g., LLM jailbreak) to new domains (e.g., corpus-poisoning embedding model). In all, TROPT significantly lowers the barrier to adopting and advancing discrete text optimization.

AI.tldr: TROPT是一个开源的离散文本优化框架，统一了离散优化器的执行和开发标准，降低了采用和推进离散文本优化的门槛。
AI.motivation: 当前离散优化器存在两个主要问题：一是开源优化器分散在不同研究代码库中，与特定模型、目标和问题领域绑定；二是优化器变体繁多，使用、扩展和比较都很困难。这些问题阻碍了优化器在现有和新领域的采用，以及通过新策略推进其发展。
AI.method: TROPT是一个开源框架，通过单一接口统一离散优化器的执行和标准化开发。用户可以轻松定制端到端优化方案，通过交换任何组件（模型、目标和优化器）来扩展其应用范围。目前包含30多个优化方案，涵盖15多个优化器（从白盒到黑盒访问）和15多个损失函数。
AI.result: TROPT框架在多个研究中展示了其效用：1）通过大规模实验比较和增强LLM越狱优化策略，揭示了强大但未被充分利用的技术；2）将优化器从一个领域（如LLM越狱）移植到新领域（如语料库中毒嵌入模型）。
AI.conclusion: TROPT显著降低了采用和推进离散文本优化的门槛，为模型红队测试、审计和可解释性等应用提供了统一、可扩展的优化框架。

title: Rethinking Object-Centric Representations for Video Dynamics Modeling
summary: Unsupervised video object tracking aims to decompose dynamic scenes into persistent, object-centric entities without manual annotations. Many recent approaches rely on slot-based representations, where a fixed set of latent variables ("slots") represent individual objects across frames. To preserve object identity, these models enforce temporal consistency on slot embeddings. However, when appearance and pose are entangled, this consistency objective conflicts with object motion and viewpoint changes. As a result, slots tend to lock onto static regions (e.g., background) to satisfy the consistency objective, while foreground objects become fragmented across multiple slots or frequently swap identities. To address these limitations, we propose STAITUS, a unified framework that explicitly disentangles each slot into appearance and geometric pose (position/scale). Leveraging this disentanglement, STAITUS enforces within-frame spatial separation and applies temporal alignment only in appearance space, yielding sharper masks and more persistent identities under motion, occlusion, and object entry/exit. Furthermore, to mitigate over-segmentation, we introduce an adaptive gating mechanism that dynamically adjusts the number of active slots to match scene complexity. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world benchmarks demonstrate that STAITUS substantially outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in segmentation quality and tracking stability.

AI.tldr: STAITUS提出了一种将外观与几何姿态解耦的视频目标跟踪框架，通过空间分离和时间对齐改进分割质量和跟踪稳定性
AI.motivation: 现有基于槽位的无监督视频目标跟踪方法在强制槽位嵌入时间一致性时，当外观与姿态纠缠时会产生冲突，导致槽位锁定在静态背景区域，而前景目标被多个槽位分割或频繁交换身份
AI.method: 将每个槽位显式解耦为外观和几何姿态（位置/尺度）两部分；利用这种解耦，在帧内实施空间分离，仅在特征空间进行时间对齐；引入自适应门控机制动态调整活跃槽位数量以匹配场景复杂度
AI.result: 在合成和真实世界基准测试中，STAITUS在分割质量和跟踪稳定性方面显著优于现有最先进基线方法
AI.conclusion: 通过显式解耦外观和姿态，并在特征空间进行时间对齐，STAITUS能够更好地处理运动、遮挡和物体进出场景的情况，获得更清晰的分割掩码和更持久的身份跟踪

title: Collapsed Effective Operators for Higher-order Structures
summary: Higher-order structures are powerful relational modeling tools, yet existing spectral operators decompose the topology into separate ranks, leaving practitioners to fuse the information back to vertices through ad hoc choices. We introduce Collapsed Effective Operators, which condense higher-order degrees of freedom into a single vertex-level operator via Schur complementation of a graded Laplacian. This yields a (generally dense) operator that encodes long-range interactions mediated by topology and is applicable to arbitrary higher-order constructs. We show it preserves positive semi-definiteness with a spectral upper bound relative to the rank-0 Hodge Laplacian, effectively lowering system energy under higher-order connectivity. Empirically, our operator improves spectral clustering, signal smoothing, and enables the inclusion of topological features in neural network architectures via positional encoding. The project page can be found http://circle-group.github.io/research/CollapsedEffectiveOperators

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了"Collapsed Effective Operators"，通过Schur补将高阶结构的自由度压缩到顶点级算子中，从而编码拓扑介导的长程相互作用，并应用于谱聚类、信号平滑和神经网络架构。
AI.motivation: 现有谱算子将拓扑分解为不同秩的独立部分，需要研究者通过临时选择将信息融合回顶点，缺乏统一的方法来处理高阶结构的相互作用。
AI.method: 通过Schur补对分级Laplacian进行压缩，将高阶自由度凝聚为单个顶点级算子，生成一个（通常稠密的）算子来编码拓扑介导的长程相互作用。
AI.result: 该算子保持半正定性，相对于0秩Hodge Laplacian具有谱上界，能有效降低高阶连通性下的系统能量。实验表明，它改进了谱聚类和信号平滑，并可通过位置编码将拓扑特征纳入神经网络架构。
AI.conclusion: Collapsed Effective Operators提供了一种统一的方法来压缩高阶结构的自由度，编码长程拓扑相互作用，为图学习和拓扑数据分析提供了新的工具。

title: MeGAS: Thermomechanical Dynamic Gaussian Splatting for Thermophysical Scene Editing
comment: Accepted by ECCV 2026. Project page: http://zju3dv.github.io/MeGAS
summary: Recent advances integrate physically grounded Newtonian dynamics with neural rendering frameworks, narrowing the gap between photorealistic scene reconstruction and physics-based animation. However, existing approaches focus on mechanically driven dynamics while neglecting temperature, a fundamental yet invisible physical factor underlying phenomena such as melting, solidification, and other thermomechanical processes. In this paper, we propose MeGAS, a novel framework that incorporates thermomechanical phase-change dynamics into 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS). Specifically, we propose a new thermomechanical dynamic Gaussian Splatting representation that augments 3DGS with temperature attributes and employs a heat advection-diffusion solver with MPM dynamics incorporating phase transitions, enabling physically plausible and visually realistic synthesis of thermophysical phenomena. Furthermore, a new topology-adaptive Gaussian rendering strategy is proposed to mitigate cracking and floaters under extreme deformation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MeGAS produces physically consistent thermomechanical behavior while maintaining high-fidelity photorealistic rendering, advancing toward physics-integrated world models.

AI.tldr: MeGAS框架将热力学相变动力学融入3D高斯泼溅，通过温度属性和热对流-扩散求解器实现物理一致的热物理现象合成，同时保持高保真渲染质量。
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要关注机械驱动动力学，忽略了温度这一基础物理因素，而温度是熔化、凝固等热力学过程的关键。需要将热力学相变动力学整合到神经渲染框架中。
AI.method: 提出热力学动态高斯泼溅表示，为3DGS增加温度属性；采用热对流-扩散求解器结合MPM动力学和相变；提出拓扑自适应高斯渲染策略以减少极端变形下的裂缝和漂浮物。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，MeGAS能产生物理一致的热力学行为，同时保持高保真度的逼真渲染，推动了物理集成世界模型的发展。
AI.conclusion: MeGAS成功将热力学相变动力学融入3D高斯泼溅，实现了物理合理且视觉逼真的热物理现象合成，为物理集成世界模型提供了重要进展。

title: Simulation-Free Estimation of Traffic Flows from Sparse Count Data
summary:
We propose a method for estimating time-varying traffic flow patterns from sparse aggregated vehicle counts. The method partitions the study area into spatial regions, constructs a set of feasible region-to-region routes, and solves a weighted least-squares optimization problem to determine the number of vehicles to allocate on each route. A weighted contribution matrix encodes sensor coverage, steering the optimizer toward flow configurations that are directly observable by sensors. Edge-level trajectories are then derived by scoring candidate routes against the temporal and volumetric profiles of aggregated regional sensor counts.
  The method is evaluated on the Brussels road network using real and synthetic traffic data. Results show that the proposed approach reproduces the daily traffic profile in the input data and outperforms the baseline methods at a fraction of the computational cost.

AI.tldr: 提出一种从稀疏聚合车辆计数估计时变交通流模式的方法，通过区域划分、可行路径构建和加权最小二乘优化来分配车辆流量。
AI.motivation: 从稀疏的聚合车辆计数数据中准确估计时变交通流模式是一个具有挑战性的问题，需要有效的方法来利用有限的传感器数据重建完整的交通流分布。
AI.method: 将研究区域划分为空间区域，构建区域间可行路径集合，通过加权最小二乘优化确定每条路径的车辆分配，使用加权贡献矩阵编码传感器覆盖，最后根据区域传感器计数的时间-容量特征对候选路径进行评分来推导边级轨迹。
AI.result: 在布鲁塞尔道路网络上使用真实和合成交通数据进行评估，结果显示该方法能准确再现输入数据的日交通模式，且以较低的计算成本优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够有效利用稀疏的聚合车辆计数数据准确估计时变交通流模式，在计算效率和准确性方面都表现出色，为交通流分析提供了实用的解决方案。

title: C^2GR: Coupled Comprehensive Generative Replay for a Continually Learnable Universal Segmentation Model
comment: This paper has been submitted to a relevant journal
summary: Universal segmentation models exhibit significant potential for diverse tasks involving different imaging modalities and segmentation objectives. Task-Incremental Learning provides a privacy-preserving approach to continually evolve a universal model on tasks from sequentially-arriving medical departments. However, training the model solely on the incoming task induces forgetting on past tasks, since consecutive tasks exhibit concurrent shifts in image appearance and segmentation objective. To address this problem, we propose a novel Coupled Comprehensive Generative Replay (C^2GR) framework that simultaneously synthesizes image-mask pairs of previous tasks to mitigate forgetting under concurrent appearance and objective shifts. This requires preserving image-mask correspondence for structure-realistic generation and bridging asynchronous optimization of the generator and segmentor for segmentation-oriented generation. Specifically, we propose a Bayesian Joint Diffusion (BJD) method that formulates the correspondence as conditional distributions optimized via conditional denoising. Furthermore, we develop a Relation-aware Unified Prompt Synchronization (RUPS) scheme to simultaneously modulate the generator and segmentor via a shared task-relation-aware prompt for synchronizing their optimization. Experiments on 20 tasks spanning diverse modalities and objectives demonstrate that C^2GR exhibits only a 2.44% drop in overall performance compared to joint training with all task data, effectively alleviating forgetting from the concurrent shifts. Our code will be made publicly available at https://github.com/mar-cry/C2GR.

AI.tldr: 提出C^2GR框架解决医学影像通用分割模型在任务增量学习中的遗忘问题，通过耦合生成回放同时合成图像-掩码对来应对外观和目标的双重偏移。
AI.motivation: 任务增量学习为医疗部门提供隐私保护的方式持续更新通用分割模型，但仅在新任务上训练会导致对过去任务的遗忘，因为连续任务存在图像外观和分割目标的双重偏移。
AI.method: 提出耦合综合生成回放(C^2GR)框架：1)贝叶斯联合扩散(BJD)方法，将图像-掩码对应关系建模为条件分布；2)关系感知统一提示同步(RUPS)方案，通过共享任务关系感知提示同时调制生成器和分割器。
AI.result: 在涵盖多种模态和目标的20个任务上实验表明，C^2GR相比使用所有任务数据的联合训练仅下降2.44%，有效缓解了双重偏移带来的遗忘问题。
AI.conclusion: C^2GR框架通过同时合成图像-掩码对，在保持结构真实性的同时实现分割导向的生成，有效解决了任务增量学习中并发外观和目标偏移导致的遗忘问题。

title: The Energy Consumption of Transformer Fine-Tuning: A Roofline-Inspired Scaling Model
summary: Transformer-based models underpin modern natural language processing but incur rapidly growing computational and energy costs. As training scales in both model size and parallelism, accurately predicting energy consumption has become critical for sustainable and cost-aware system design. We present a framework for modeling the energy consumption of Transformer training on multiple GPUs. Using controlled architectural sweeps of BERT models, we relate measured energy to lightweight proxies for compute, memory traffic, and hardware efficiency. Inspired by roofline models, our approach incorporates a speedup-based hardware-efficiency factor that captures the effects of tensor parallelism and fully sharded data parallelism. We derive a scaling law model that accurately predicts training energy across heterogeneous configurations.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个用于预测Transformer模型在多GPU上训练能耗的框架，通过轻量级代理指标和硬件效率因子，能够准确预测不同配置下的训练能耗。
AI.motivation: Transformer模型在自然语言处理中广泛应用，但计算和能耗成本快速增长。随着模型规模和并行度的扩大，准确预测能耗对于可持续和成本感知的系统设计变得至关重要。
AI.method: 通过BERT模型的受控架构扫描，将实测能耗与计算、内存流量和硬件效率的轻量级代理指标相关联。受roofline模型启发，该方法引入了基于加速的硬件效率因子，捕捉张量并行和完全分片数据并行的效果，并推导出能够准确预测异构配置下训练能耗的缩放定律模型。
AI.result: 开发了一个能够准确预测Transformer训练能耗的框架，该框架能够适应不同的硬件配置和并行策略。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为Transformer模型训练提供了有效的能耗预测工具，有助于实现更可持续和成本效益的AI系统设计。

title: From Reconstruction to Decision: A Post-Encoder Plug-in Adapter for Curvilinear Segmentation
summary: Curvilinear object segmentation, including vessels and cracks, is challenging due to extreme spatial sparsity and topological fragility, where small local errors can cause severe structural disconnections. Meanwhile, modern segmentation pipelines increasingly rely on strong but hard-to-modify foundation encoders whose heavy downsampling limits fine structural recovery. Motivated by this, we focus on the post-encoder stage and study two recurring and actionable failure modes: a reconstruction bottleneck in high-resolution feature restoration and a decision bottleneck in binarization. We present PEPA, a lightweight Post-Encoder Plug-in Adapter for 2D curvilinear segmentation pipelines with accessible decoder/head features and target, query, or class descriptors. PEPA couples (i) Target-Conditioned Snake Upsampling (TCSU), which uses target-conditioned continuous snake-like sampling to better recover thin and tortuous structures during upsampling, and (ii) Target-Adaptive Differentiable Thresholding (TADT), which predicts target-specific thresholds and optimizes a soft-threshold surrogate with explicit safeguards against trivial bias shifting. Under this post-encoder interface, PEPA can be attached to both prompt-based decoders and conventional dense predictors. Experiments on five medical and industrial benchmarks show that adding PEPA to frozen-encoder baselines yields consistent improvements, with gains in topological connectivity (clDice) typically exceeding those in region overlap (IoU), indicating improved structural continuity. With only $\sim$0.26M additional parameters, PEPA offers a practical post-encoder enhancement for structure-centric segmentation.

AI.tldr: PEPA是一个轻量级的编码器后插件适配器，用于解决曲线对象分割中的重建瓶颈和决策瓶颈问题，通过目标条件蛇形上采样和目标自适应可微阈值化来提升细长结构的恢复能力。
AI.motivation: 曲线对象分割面临极端空间稀疏性和拓扑脆弱性挑战，现代分割流水线依赖难以修改的基础编码器，其重度下采样限制了精细结构恢复。因此需要关注编码器后阶段，解决两个可操作的问题：高分辨率特征恢复中的重建瓶颈和二值化中的决策瓶颈。
AI.method: PEPA包含两个核心组件：1) 目标条件蛇形上采样(TCSU)，使用目标条件连续蛇形采样在特征上采样过程中更好地恢复细长和弯曲结构；2) 目标自适应可微阈值化(TADT)，预测目标特定阈值并优化软阈值替代函数，具有防止平凡偏置移动的明确保护机制。
AI.result: 在五个医学和工业基准测试中，将PEPA添加到冻结编码器基线模型上获得了一致的改进，拓扑连通性(clDice)的提升通常超过区域重叠(IoU)的提升，表明结构连续性得到了改善，仅增加约0.26M参数。
AI.conclusion: PEPA为结构中心分割提供了一个实用的编码器后增强方案，能够在不修改基础编码器的情况下，通过轻量级适配器显著提升曲线对象分割的结构连续性恢复能力。

title: Scheduling Thoughts: Learning the Order of Thought in Diffusion Language Models
summary: Masked diffusion language models decode by iteratively unmasking tokens, where the unmasking order defines an "order of thought" that strongly influences generation quality yet is typically chosen heuristically. We derive a tractable upper bound on the sequential decoding mismatch, measured by the Kullback-Leibler divergence and expressed in terms of the model's pathwise log-likelihood, with tightness under sufficient model expressivity. This bound induces a dense self-aware reward over ordered trajectories, casting order selection as a principled policy optimization problem with a frozen denoiser. We instantiate this idea as Self-Aware Scheduling (SAS), which learns a lightweight order policy using Group Relative Policy Optimization and applies seamlessly to both any-order and semi-autoregressive decoding. On Sudoku with 1B MDM, SAS improves puzzle accuracy from 82.0% (best heuristic schedule) to 91.8%, and reaches 97.5% with second-stage fine-tuning along learned trajectories. On mathematical reasoning with LLaDA-8B, SAS improves pass@1 on GSM8K from 64% to 76% and on MBPP from 39.5% to 41%, consistently matching or exceeding heuristic schedules across generation lengths and block sizes. Project page: https://jimmyxu123.github.io/SAS

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了自感知调度（SAS）方法，通过优化掩码扩散语言模型的解码顺序来提高生成质量，在数独和数学推理任务上取得了显著效果提升。
AI.motivation: 掩码扩散语言模型的解码顺序（"思维顺序"）对生成质量有重要影响，但现有方法通常采用启发式调度策略，缺乏理论指导。需要一种更系统的方法来优化解码顺序。
AI.method: 推导了顺序解码不匹配的可处理上界，将其表示为模型路径对数似然的函数。基于此构建密集的自感知奖励函数，将顺序选择转化为策略优化问题，提出自感知调度（SAS）方法，使用组相对策略优化学习轻量级顺序策略。
AI.result: 在1B MDM数独任务中，SAS将谜题准确率从82.0%（最佳启发式调度）提升到91.8%，经过第二阶段微调后达到97.5%。在LLaDA-8B数学推理任务中，SAS将GSM8K的pass@1从64%提升到76%，MBPP从39.5%提升到41%，在各种生成长度和块大小下均匹配或超越启发式调度。
AI.conclusion: SAS为掩码扩散语言模型提供了一种理论驱动的解码顺序优化方法，通过自感知奖励函数和策略优化，显著提升了模型在复杂推理任务上的性能，证明了优化解码顺序的重要性。

title: Brain-Adapter: A Dual-Stream Vision-Language MIL Framework for Comprehensive 3D CT Diagnosis of Acute Intracranial Pathologies
summary: Automated diagnosis of 3D brain CT scans is essential for critical care, yet it remains challenging due to the heavy reliance on manual annotations and the limited semantic understanding of conventional models. While 2D foundation vision-language models (VLMs) have shown remarkable generalization, effectively transferring their representational power to 3D volumes remains an open problem. In this paper, we propose Brain-Adapter, a novel dual-stream multiple instance learning (MIL) framework that leverages pre-trained 2D biomedical VLMs and raw diagnostic reports for robust scan-level multi-label classification. Specifically, we introduce a Text-Conditioned Attention (TCA) mechanism, utilizing raw diagnostic sentences as semantic queries to dynamically align visual cues with specific disease concepts. Concurrently, a parallel visual MIL stream captures global scan characteristics, supervised by structured labels extracted via a Large Language Model (LLM). To ensure representation coherence, a consistency constraint enforces synergy between the two streams. During inference, an Uncertainty-Aware Refinement (UAR) module dynamically calibrates and fuses these dual-stream predictions to resolve ambiguous cases. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art 3D models and standard MIL approaches. By eliminating the reliance on dense annotations, Brain-Adapter provides a highly scalable and clinically viable solution for 3D acute intracranial pathology analysis.

AI.tldr: Brain-Adapter：一种利用预训练2D生物医学VLM和原始诊断报告进行3D脑CT扫描多标签分类的双流多示例学习框架，无需密集标注
AI.motivation: 3D脑CT扫描的自动诊断对重症监护至关重要，但面临两大挑战：1) 严重依赖人工标注；2) 传统模型语义理解有限。虽然2D基础视觉语言模型表现出色，但如何将其表征能力有效迁移到3D体积数据仍是一个开放问题。
AI.method: 提出Brain-Adapter双流MIL框架：1) 文本条件注意力(TCA)流，使用原始诊断句子作为语义查询，动态对齐视觉特征与特定疾病概念；2) 并行视觉MIL流，通过LLM提取的结构化标签监督，捕捉全局扫描特征；3) 一致性约束确保两流表征协同；4) 推理时使用不确定性感知细化(UAR)模块动态校准和融合双流预测。
AI.result: 在广泛实验中，该方法显著优于最先进的3D模型和标准MIL方法。通过消除对密集标注的依赖，为3D急性颅内病理分析提供了高度可扩展且临床可行的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: Brain-Adapter成功将预训练2D生物医学VLM的表征能力迁移到3D脑CT分析，利用原始诊断报告作为弱监督信号，实现了无需密集标注的鲁棒扫描级多标签分类，为临床3D医学影像分析提供了新范式。

title: SVD-Surgeon: Optimal Singular-Value Surgery for Large Language Model Compression
summary: Large language models (LLMs) achieve remarkable performance across a wide range of tasks, but their deployment is constrained by substantial memory and compute requirements. Low-rank compression via singular value decomposition (SVD) is an effective remedy, but existing methods focus on how to factorize and which components to keep. We introduce SVD-Surgeon, a training-free method that brings the Optimal Brain Surgeon (OBS) framework to the singular-value basis. Treating each singular value as a parameter, it computes a closed-form update of the retained singular values that compensates, to second order in the model loss, for those removed by truncation. The same analysis yields a saliency for choosing which values to prune. As it operates directly on the singular-value factorization, SVD-Surgeon can be layered on top of existing SVD compressors. Applied to SVD-LLM, a leading SVD-based method, it improves the perplexity-compression trade-off on the OPT family and LLaMA 2-7B without any retraining.

AI.tldr: SVD-Surgeon是一种无需训练的低秩压缩方法，将最优脑外科医生（OBS）框架应用于奇异值分解，通过闭式更新保留的奇异值来补偿被截断的值，从而提升模型压缩性能。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型（LLMs）部署受到内存和计算需求的限制，低秩压缩是有效解决方案。现有SVD方法关注如何分解和保留哪些组件，但缺乏对截断损失的补偿机制。
AI.method: 将每个奇异值视为参数，在奇异值基上应用OBS框架，计算保留奇异值的闭式更新以二阶补偿截断损失。同时提供选择剪枝奇异值的显著性度量，可叠加在现有SVD压缩器之上。
AI.result: 应用于SVD-LLM方法时，在OPT系列和LLaMA 2-7B模型上无需重新训练即可改善困惑度-压缩权衡。
AI.conclusion: SVD-Surgeon是一种训练自由的方法，通过二阶补偿截断损失，显著提升现有SVD压缩器的性能，为LLM部署提供更优的内存-精度权衡。

title: UniverSat: Resolution- and Modality-Agnostic Transformers for Earth Observation
summary: Vision Transformers (ViT) dominate computer vision. However, their reliance on rigid patch projectors hinders transfer to Earth Observation (EO), where input modalities, scales, and resolutions vary widely. We introduce UniverSat, a ViT-style backbone built around a Universal Patch Encoder that maps patches from arbitrary spatial, spectral, and temporal resolutions, and from both optical and non-optical sensors, into a shared embedding space with a shared set of weights. This enables training a single model on heterogeneous multimodal corpora via self-supervision, yielding robust, sensor-agnostic spatial features. We validate this approach with strong results across classification and segmentation on standard EO benchmarks from GeoBench, PANGEABench, and SpectralEarth. Our code and models are available at https://github.com/gastruc/UniverSat.

AI.tldr: UniverSat提出了一种通用的ViT风格骨干网络，通过Universal Patch Encoder将不同空间、光谱、时间分辨率以及光学/非光学传感器的图像块映射到共享嵌入空间，实现跨模态、跨传感器的统一表示学习。
AI.motivation: 传统Vision Transformers依赖固定的图像块投影器，难以适应地球观测领域输入模态、尺度、分辨率变化大的特点，需要一种能处理异构多模态数据的统一架构。
AI.method: 设计Universal Patch Encoder，将任意空间、光谱、时间分辨率的光学/非光学传感器图像块映射到共享权重空间的统一嵌入表示，通过自监督在异构多模态语料库上训练单一模型。
AI.result: 在GeoBench、PANGEABench、SpectralEarth等标准地球观测基准测试的分类和分割任务上取得优异结果，证明了方法的鲁棒性和传感器无关性。
AI.conclusion: UniverSat通过统一的图像块编码器解决了地球观测中多模态、多分辨率数据处理的挑战，为构建通用的地球观测视觉基础模型提供了有效方案。

title: Patient-Aware Contrastive Learning Preserves Per-Patient Structure in RR-Interval Representations
summary: Contrastive representation learning struggles on physiological signals when each subject contributes a distinct baseline pattern. If class differences overlap with subject differences,class-level objectives such as supervised contrastive learning tend to merge per-subject structure into a single per-class cluster,removing the individual variation that a model needs to generalize to unseen patients. We study this problem in the setting of Paroxysmal Atrial Fibrillation(PAF) detection from RR-interval(RRI) sequences and propose a patient-aware contrastive objective that forms positive pairs only from same-patient, same-class segments, preserving each patient's own sinus rhythm(SR) baseline while still pushing the two classes apart. Examining the learned embeddings directly, our objective achieves the most consistent per-patient SR structure (cohesion $0.850$ vs. $0.800$ for supervised contrastive loss (SupCon) and $0.772$ for binary cross-entropy (BCE)). We also identify that BCE produces the cleanest global class separation yet the most disordered per-patient structure. This is precisely why a linear probe trained on its features breaks down on unseen patients. On the IRIDIA-AF dataset, the resulting representation reaches a patient-independent Area Under the Receiver Operating Characteristic Curve (AUROC) of $0.989 \pm 0.003$ with $2.6\times$ lower seed variance than supervised contrastive baselines.These results highlight that per-subject geometric consistency, rather than global class separability, is key to robust cross-patient generalization.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种患者感知对比学习方法，用于解决生理信号分析中患者个体差异干扰分类的问题。通过仅从同一患者、同一类别的片段构建正样本对，该方法在保持患者自身窦性心律基线的同时，有效分离不同类别，从而提高了模型对未见患者的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 在生理信号分析中，每个患者都有独特的基线模式，当类别差异与患者差异重叠时，传统的监督对比学习等类别级目标会将每个患者的结构合并为单个类别簇，从而消除了模型泛化到未见患者所需的个体变异。这在阵发性房颤(PAF)检测中尤为明显。
AI.method: 提出患者感知对比目标，仅从同一患者、同一类别的RR间期(RRI)序列片段形成正样本对。这种方法在保持每个患者自身窦性心律(SR)基线的同时，仍能将两个类别分开。通过分析学习到的嵌入空间，验证了该方法在保持每患者结构一致性方面的优势。
AI.result: 患者感知对比方法在IRIDIA-AF数据集上实现了患者独立的AUROC为0.989±0.003，比监督对比基线的种子方差降低了2.6倍。该方法实现了最一致的每患者SR结构（内聚性0.850，而监督对比损失为0.800，二元交叉熵为0.772）。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果表明，每患者几何一致性而非全局类别可分性，是实现稳健跨患者泛化的关键。患者感知对比学习通过保留个体变异同时分离类别，为生理信号分析中的泛化问题提供了有效解决方案。

title: Arbor: Explicit Geometric Conditioning for Controllable 3D Asset Generation
summary:
Text and image conditioned 3D models now generate convincing assets, but they still offer little direct control over the space an object should occupy or avoid. In authoring, this spatial intent is often known before generation starts. A chair should fit a seating envelope, a prop should leave clearance for motion, or a part should expose a contact surface. Prompts and image views are poor carriers for such constraints, requiring the need for an explicit control interface.
  We present Arbor, a trainable attachment for text conditioned latent 3D generation. Arbor introduces constraint meshes as a native 3D control interface. The interface uses hull regions where geometry should exist, avoidance regions that should remain empty, and touch regions the object should contact. Unlike completion or whole object scaffold control, these meshes are not target evidence. They are local typed requirements and can include regions where no surface should appear. Arbor keeps this signal as geometry by converting constraint meshes into tokens and learning a routed attachment inside a frozen denoiser. Each latent region can therefore receive the part of the constraint that matters for its spatial location.
  We evaluate Arbor on automatic and artist curated control benchmarks with hull, avoidance, and touch constraints, and compare the metric trends to a user preference study. Even without dedicated compliance losses, Arbor improves constraint obedience while preserving object quality and variation under fixed constraints.

AI.tldr: Arbor是一个可训练的附加模块，用于文本条件化的潜在3D生成，通过约束网格作为原生3D控制界面来提供对生成对象空间占用的精确控制。
AI.motivation: 当前基于文本和图像的3D生成模型虽然能生成逼真资产，但缺乏对对象空间占用（应占据或避免的区域）的直接控制。在创作中，这种空间意图通常在生成前就已知（如椅子需要适合座位区域、道具需要为运动留出间隙、部件需要暴露接触面等），而提示词和图像视图难以传达此类约束。
AI.method: Arbor引入约束网格作为原生3D控制界面，包括：外壳区域（几何体应存在处）、避让区域（应保持空置处）和接触区域（对象应接触处）。这些网格不是目标几何体证据，而是局部类型化要求。Arbor通过将约束网格转换为token，并在冻结的去噪器内部学习路由附加机制，使每个潜在区域能接收与其空间位置相关的约束信息。
AI.result: 在自动和艺术家策划的控制基准测试中，Arbor在外壳、避让和接触约束方面都表现出色。即使没有专门的合规性损失函数，Arbor在保持对象质量和变化的同时，显著提高了约束遵循能力，用户偏好研究也证实了这些指标趋势。
AI.conclusion: Arbor为文本条件化的潜在3D生成提供了有效的空间控制接口，通过约束网格实现了对生成对象空间占用的精确控制，在保持生成质量的同时显著提升了约束遵循能力。

title: A Spectral Theory of Normalized Corrected GNN Propagation
summary: We develop a spectral theory for \emph{normalized corrected GNN propagation}. The object of study is the symmetric normalized adjacency with its degree-stationary component removed, matching the normalization used by standard GCN-style models while isolating the stationary direction most directly tied to oversmoothing. The central theoretical question is whether this corrected normalized operator preserves class-discriminative signal after many propagation layers. Our main result is a high-probability exact-recovery theorem for the binary Contextual Stochastic Block Model after \(k=O(\log n)\) propagation steps in the dense polylogarithmic regime \(p\ge C\log^B n/n\), for any fixed \(B>4\), under explicit graph-signal and feature-SNR conditions. We also establish a multi-class partial recovery theorem showing contraction toward class centers for most nodes. Synthetic and real node-classification experiments are included as empirical checks of the theory's predicted dependence on depth, graph signal, and feature noise.

AI.tldr: 该论文为归一化修正GNN传播建立了谱理论，在密集多对数机制下证明了经过O(log n)传播步后能精确恢复二元上下文随机块模型，并建立了多类部分恢复定理。
AI.motivation: 研究归一化修正GNN传播的谱理论，解决核心理论问题：经过多层传播后，修正的归一化算子是否能保持类别判别信号，特别是针对过平滑问题。
AI.method: 使用对称归一化邻接矩阵，去除度平稳分量，匹配标准GCN风格模型的归一化方式，同时隔离与过平滑直接相关的平稳方向。在密集多对数机制下进行理论分析。
AI.result: 主要结果：在密集多对数机制p≥C log^B n/n（B>4）下，经过k=O(log n)传播步后，二元上下文随机块模型能高概率精确恢复。还建立了多类部分恢复定理，显示大多数节点向类中心收缩。
AI.conclusion: 该理论为归一化修正GNN传播提供了谱理论基础，证明了在适当条件下经过多层传播后能保持类别判别信号，并通过合成和真实节点分类实验验证了理论预测对深度、图信号和特征噪声的依赖关系。

title: Scaling State-Space Models from Lines to Paragraphs: An Ablation of Mamba-based OCR
comment: Accepted at ICDAR 2026 Workshop on Machine Learning (WML)
summary: End-to-end OCR increasingly relies on autoregressive sequence models, where the quadratic cost of Transformer attention limits efficient transcription of long, paragraph-level text. State-Space Models (SSMs) such as Mamba offer linear-time decoding and have recently been shown to match Transformer accuracy on printed historical lines, but their behavior as sequences grow from short lines to full paragraphs, and their generalization to handwriting, remain poorly understood. We study how a Mamba-based OCR recognizer scales from lines to paragraphs. We first conduct a systematic exploration of its four core hyperparameters (decoder depth, state dimension, expansion factor, and connector depth) on synthetic paragraphs from 100 to 1,000 characters, identifying the recurrent state dimension and the expansion factor as the dominant levers for long-sequence accuracy. We then compare the recognizer against a Transformer baseline trained under an identical protocol. On clean synthetic paragraphs, both models stay below 1% CER at every length while the SSM runs 1.4 to 4.5 times faster, the speedup growing with sequence length. On real handwriting, however, the SSM lags clearly behind: it reaches 8.2% CER on IAM lines and 10.0% on IAM paragraphs, against 4.2% and 3.5% for the Transformer baseline. Through controlled experiments we show that a substantial part of this gap stems from data scarcity rather than from an intrinsic architectural limit: the autoregressive SSM decoder is markedly data-hungry on long sequences. Our study clarifies when SSMs are a practical choice for large-scale document transcription and when they are not.

AI.tldr: Mamba-based OCR识别器在线条到段落扩展中，长序列精度受状态维度和扩展因子主导，在干净文本上表现与Transformer相当但更快，但在真实手写体上因数据稀缺而落后。
AI.motivation: 研究基于状态空间模型（SSM）的OCR识别器如何从短行扩展到完整段落，并探索其在手写体识别中的泛化能力，以确定何时SSM是文档转录的实用选择。
AI.method: 系统研究Mamba OCR识别器的四个核心超参数（解码器深度、状态维度、扩展因子和连接器深度）在100-1000字符合成段落上的表现，并与Transformer基线在相同训练协议下比较。
AI.result: 在干净合成段落上，两种模型CER均低于1%，SSM运行速度快1.4-4.5倍且随序列长度增长；但在真实手写体上，SSM CER为8.2%（IAM行）和10.0%（IAM段落），明显落后于Transformer的4.2%和3.5%。
AI.conclusion: SSM在长序列解码中具有速度优势，但在真实手写体识别中因自回归解码器的数据饥饿问题而表现不佳，数据稀缺是主要限制因素而非架构本身限制。

title: Solve for the Hyperparameter, Skip the Search: Kolmogorov-Optimal Scaling Laws for Spline Regression
summary: Hyperparameter tuning almost always means search: fit the model at every value on a grid, score each by cross-validation, and keep the winner. For spline regression that search is unnecessary. The optimal resolution can be solved for in closed form, to the accuracy an exhaustive search reaches, at a fraction of the compute. Three ingredients make this possible: classical approximation theory pins the squared bias to a known power of the resolution G, exactly the Kolmogorov n-width of the smoothness class; the basis dimension is an explicit polynomial in G; and leave-one-out error follows from a single fit via the PRESS identity. Balancing the two known curves gives the minimizer analytically. We extend this calculus to many coordinates by replacing ambient input dimension with interaction order, the number of active low-order components in an ANOVA decomposition, yielding a scaling law in which the optimal resolution and error are power functions of the effective density (sample size per active component), with input dimension absent from the exponent. The law becomes an algorithm. KORE (Kolmogorov-optimal Order-aware Resolution Estimation) fits two pilot resolutions, solves a leverage-calibrated 2x2 system for the bias and noise scales, and evaluates the closed-form plug-in resolution with a tiny leave-one-out certificate: about a dozen fits instead of a full grid sweep, with a consistency guarantee as the sample grows. Across additive and sparse pairwise targets up to 80 input dimensions, KORE matches exhaustive 3-fold cross-validation and the full classical ladder (GCV, Mallows' Cp, AIC, BIC) while fitting roughly 8x fewer models; on 36 real tabular datasets it ranks first among 21 methods in accuracy per unit of compute, ahead of tuned boosters and kernel machines. When complexity lives in low interaction order, solving for the resolution beats searching for it.

AI.tldr: 提出了KORE方法，通过解析公式直接求解样条回归的最优分辨率，避免了传统网格搜索的高计算成本。该方法基于近似理论、维度公式和PRESS恒等式，通过拟合两个试点分辨率即可计算最优解。
AI.motivation: 传统超参数调优（如网格搜索）计算成本高昂，特别是在高维设置中。作者认为对于样条回归，可以通过解析方法直接找到最优分辨率，避免昂贵的搜索过程。
AI.method: 结合三个关键要素：1) 经典近似理论将平方偏差与分辨率G的已知幂次关联；2) 基维度是G的显式多项式；3) 通过PRESS恒等式从单次拟合计算留一误差。通过平衡已知的偏差和方差曲线，解析得到最小化器。扩展到多坐标时，用交互阶数代替输入维度，得到缩放定律。KORE算法通过拟合两个试点分辨率，求解2x2系统估计偏差和噪声尺度，然后计算解析的最优分辨率。
AI.result: 在高达80维的加性和稀疏成对目标上，KORE与穷举3折交叉验证及经典方法（GCV、Mallows' Cp、AIC、BIC）表现相当，但拟合的模型数量减少约8倍。在36个真实表格数据集上，KORE在计算效率方面排名第一，优于调优的boosting和核方法。
AI.conclusion: 当复杂性集中在低交互阶数时，通过解析求解分辨率优于传统搜索方法。KORE提供了一种高效、可证明一致的方法，显著减少了样条回归超参数调优的计算成本。

title: LightSTAR: Efficient Visual Document Retrieval via Lightweight Selection with Vision-Adaptive Refinement
summary: Visual document retrieval requires rapidly locating relevant pages from large multi-modal corpora in response to user queries. While recent methods powered by Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) show competitive accuracy, they suffer from prohibitive computational costs by applying intensive MLLM encoding to every single page. Meanwhile, we observe that user queries are typically keyword-anchored, containing semantically rich words that are expected to appear directly in the visible text of relevant pages, offering an efficient cue for quickly narrowing down candidate pages. Building on this insight, we propose LightSTAR, an efficient framework that decomposes visual document retrieval into: 1) LLM-free Visual Selection, which utilizes content-grounded query encoding to focus on informative words and employs LLM-free visual embeddings to produce a high-recall candidate set; and 2) Vision-adaptive Semantic Refinement, which further performs fine-grained semantic matching exclusively on these top candidates via adaptive region-wise feature fusion to effectively combine textual and layout cues, optimized through a hardness-aware contrastive objective. Experimental results demonstrate that LightSTAR achieves state-of-the-art retrieval accuracy while reducing end-to-end latency by several-fold, offering a highly practical solution to the accuracy-efficiency trade-off in visual document retrieval. Code is available at https://github.com/bokufa/LightSTAR.

AI.tldr: LightSTAR是一个高效的视觉文档检索框架，通过LLM-free视觉选择和视觉自适应语义精炼两阶段方法，在保持高精度的同时大幅降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有基于多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）的视觉文档检索方法虽然准确，但计算成本过高，需要对每个页面进行密集的MLLM编码。同时观察到用户查询通常包含语义丰富的关键词，这些关键词预期会直接出现在相关页面的可见文本中，这为快速筛选候选页面提供了高效线索。
AI.method: LightSTAR采用两阶段框架：1) LLM-free视觉选择：利用内容基础的查询编码专注于信息丰富的词汇，使用LLM-free视觉嵌入生成高召回率的候选集；2) 视觉自适应语义精炼：对顶级候选页面进行细粒度语义匹配，通过自适应区域特征融合有效结合文本和布局线索，并通过难度感知对比目标进行优化。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，LightSTAR在实现最先进检索精度的同时，将端到端延迟降低了数倍，为视觉文档检索中的精度-效率权衡提供了高度实用的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: LightSTAR通过利用用户查询中的关键词线索和高效的两阶段检索框架，成功解决了视觉文档检索中的精度与效率矛盾，为大规模多模态语料库检索提供了实用高效的解决方案。

title: It's Much Easier for Neural Networks to learn Game of Life Dynamics with the Right Activation Function: Polynomial Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks
comment: To be published in Proceedings of the 2026 Artificial Life Conference
summary: Previous work has found a gap between the scale of neural networks that reliably learn Conway's Game of Life, and minimal networks capable of representing the classic cellular automaton with hard-coded parameter values. Viewing neural network learning as a search process suggests a dependence on networks large enough to contain sub-networks with lucky initializations (sometimes known as 'winning tickets') that actually learn the task. In this work, we reorient our perspective from discovering Life rules as a search problem back to a learning problem, and reason that with fitting inductive biases, the problem should be much more amenable to minimal networks. We find that network variants with several alternative activation functions meaningfully outperform the default choice of Rectified Linear Units, and in particular, that a 2nd degree polynomial activation function consistently learns Life dynamics with or without the benefit of learning neural weights. Our results provide an informative demonstration of the benefits of matching learning to the task at hand and challenge the easy default choice of scale for all problems. In particular, we advocate for the use of cellular automata as simple test domains for developing strategies that can benefit machine learning for science, physics-based deep learning, and interpretable machine learning.

AI.tldr: 研究發現傳統ReLU激活函數在學習Conway's Game of Life時表現不佳，而二階多項式激活函數能讓最小化網絡成功學習該細胞自動機規則，挑戰了"更大網絡更好"的默認假設。
AI.motivation: 先前研究發現神經網絡學習Conway's Game of Life存在規模差距：可靠學習的網絡規模遠大於硬編碼參數的最小網絡。這表明傳統學習方法依賴於大型網絡中包含幸運初始化的子網絡。本研究旨在重新將此問題視為學習問題而非搜索問題，探索如何通過合適的歸納偏置讓最小網絡成功學習。
AI.method: 研究採用不同激活函數的網絡變體進行實驗，比較它們在學習Conway's Game of Life時的表現。特別關注二階多項式激活函數與傳統ReLU激活函數的對比，並測試在有或無神經權重學習的情況下的效果。
AI.result: 多種替代激活函數在性能上顯著優於默認的ReLU激活函數。特別地，二階多項式激活函數能夠一致地學習Life動態，無論是否有神經權重學習的幫助。這表明合適的激活函數選擇比單純增加網絡規模更有效。
AI.conclusion: 研究展示了針對特定任務匹配適當學習方法的重要性，挑戰了"規模越大越好"的默認選擇。特別倡導將細胞自動機作為簡單測試域，用於發展有益於科學機器學習、物理基礎深度學習和可解釋機器學習的策略。激活函數的選擇是實現最小網絡成功學習的關鍵。

title: AwakeForest: An Interactive Geospatial Platform for Large-Scale Forest Imagery
summary: Forest imagery analysis often involves multiple tightly coupled vision tasks, which must be performed under substantial variation in geographic regions, sensors, and acquisition conditions. However, practitioners often lack a unified tool that is geospatial-native, cloud-optimized, and ML-integrated for end-to-end workflows spanning annotation, prediction, visualization, and downstream analysis at scale. We present AwakeForest, an interactive end-to-end platform designed for large-scale forest imagery that integrates model-assisted inference, automatic annotation, and human-in-the-loop refinement within a single workflow. Our platform supports plug-and-play integration of pretrained models and enables scalable interaction with forest imagery ranging from standard aerial scenes to large orthomosaics that can span several gigabytes to hundreds of gigabytes. AwakeForest produces analysis-ready outputs that can be directly used for downstream analysis and to support iterative model and annotation updates on new scenes. We demonstrate the system on the PALMS dataset and illustrate how AwakeForest supports an end-to-end workflow for practical forest management and analysis.

AI.tldr: AwakeForest是一个交互式端到端平台，专为大规模森林图像分析设计，集成了模型辅助推理、自动标注和人机协同细化功能，支持从标准航拍场景到数百GB大型正射影像的可扩展交互。
AI.motivation: 森林图像分析通常涉及多个紧密耦合的视觉任务，需要在不同地理区域、传感器和采集条件下进行。然而，从业者往往缺乏一个统一的工具，该工具应具备地理空间原生、云优化和ML集成特性，能够支持从标注、预测、可视化到下游分析的全流程端到端工作流。
AI.method: AwakeForest平台采用交互式端到端设计，集成了模型辅助推理、自动标注和人机协同细化功能。平台支持预训练模型的即插即用集成，并能与从标准航拍场景到数百GB大型正射影像的森林图像进行可扩展交互。
AI.result: AwakeForest能够生成可直接用于下游分析的分析就绪输出，并支持在新场景上进行迭代模型和标注更新。在PALMS数据集上的演示表明，该平台能够支持实际森林管理和分析的端到端工作流。
AI.conclusion: AwakeForest为大规模森林图像分析提供了一个统一的端到端平台，解决了现有工具在集成性、可扩展性和工作流支持方面的不足，为实际森林管理和分析提供了实用解决方案。

title: Quantifying the Agreement Between Data-Influence and Data-Similarity to Understand LLM Behavior
summary: One way to understand LLM behavior is to trace its output back to the training data. Two types of measures are commonly used for output tracing: data-similarity and data-influence. The former is cheaper while the latter is believed to be more accurate. Even though many works have compared them for ground-truth tasks, no such comparisons exist for output tracing. Here, we fill this gap and precisely quantify the commonalities and differences between the two measures. We do this by first ranking the training documents according to each measure and then computing the overlap between the two rankings. Our main finding is that the two rankings agree significantly, but there is an asymmetry between them: The top documents of data-similarity are assigned more consistent ranks by data-influence than the other way around. This result is valid across a range of experiments involving OLMo2-1B, Qwen3-1.7B, LlaMa3.2-1B, Gemma3-1B, and GPT2. We exploit the asymmetry to obtain a favorable cost-accuracy trade-off by using the costly data-influence to refine the results of data-similarity.

AI.tldr: 该研究比较了LLM输出溯源中数据相似性和数据影响力两种方法的优劣，发现两者在文档排序上高度一致但存在不对称性，并利用这种不对称性实现了成本与精度的优化平衡。
AI.motivation: 理解LLM行为通常需要追溯其输出到训练数据。虽然数据相似性和数据影响力两种方法常用于输出溯源，且前者成本低而后者被认为更准确，但缺乏对这两种方法在输出溯源任务上的系统比较。
AI.method: 通过两种方法分别对训练文档进行排序，然后计算两种排序之间的重叠程度，精确量化两者的共性和差异。研究使用了OLMo2-1B、Qwen3-1.7B、LlaMa3.2-1B、Gemma3-1B和GPT2等多种模型进行实验验证。
AI.result: 发现两种排序方法显著一致，但存在不对称性：数据相似性排名靠前的文档在数据影响力排序中具有更一致的排名，反之则不然。这种结果在多个实验中都得到验证。
AI.conclusion: 利用这种不对称性，可以通过昂贵的数据影响力方法来优化数据相似性的结果，从而获得更有利的成本-精度权衡，为LLM输出溯源提供了实用的方法改进。

title: Dense Reward for Multi-View 3D Reasoning with Global Maps and Local Views
summary: Multi-view 3D Visual Question Answering (MV3D-VQA) requires integrating partial observations into a coherent 3D scene representation and selecting informative viewpoints for multi-step spatial reasoning. However, current multimodal LLMs are typically trained with sparse, answer-level supervision, which often yields inconsistent cross-view reasoning and brittle view selection. We present DR-MV3D (Dense Reward for MV3D-VQA), a map-grounded learning framework that provides dense, verifiable rewards to supervise the reasoning process. Our approach decomposes MV3D-VQA into (i) allocentric global map construction, (ii) question-conditioned view-trajectory planning, and (iii) egocentric grounding for answer prediction. To make intermediate steps learnable without manual annotations, we introduce two rewards: a global consistency reward that aligns the predicted map with geometry-consistent pseudo targets from frozen 3D vision foundation models (e.g., VGGT + SAM3), and a local trajectory reward that supervises ordered viewpoint selection. We optimize the full pipeline with trajectory-level policy optimization (GRPO). Experiments on MindCube, VSI-Bench, and BLINK (MV) show that DR-MV3D consistently improves over strong multi-image baselines, supporting the effectiveness of process-level dense supervision for multi-view 3D reasoning.

AI.tldr: DR-MV3D是一个用于多视角3D视觉问答的密集奖励学习框架，通过分解问题为全局地图构建、视角轨迹规划和答案预测，并使用几何一致性奖励和轨迹奖励来监督推理过程，显著提升了多视角3D推理性能。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型在MV3D-VQA任务中通常使用稀疏的答案级监督训练，导致跨视角推理不一致和视角选择脆弱。需要一种能够监督中间推理过程的密集奖励机制来改善多视角3D空间推理。
AI.method: 将MV3D-VQA分解为三个步骤：1) 以自我为中心构建全局地图；2) 基于问题的视角轨迹规划；3) 以自我为中心进行答案预测。引入两种奖励：全局一致性奖励（对齐预测地图与几何一致伪目标）和局部轨迹奖励（监督有序视角选择）。使用轨迹级策略优化（GRPO）优化整个流程。
AI.result: 在MindCube、VSI-Bench和BLINK (MV)数据集上的实验表明，DR-MV3D相比强大的多图像基线方法有持续改进，验证了过程级密集监督对多视角3D推理的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DR-MV3D通过密集、可验证的奖励机制监督推理过程，解决了MV3D-VQA中的跨视角推理一致性和视角选择问题，为多视角3D推理提供了有效的学习框架。

title: MORL-A2C: Multi-Objective Reinforcement Learning Reranker for Optimizing Healthiness in MOPI-HFRS
comment: Accepted at the International Workshop on Resource-Efficient Learning for Knowledge Discovery (RelKD) at ACM SIGKDD 2026
summary: Unhealthy dietary behavior continues to be a persistent public health issue in the United States, exacerbated by recommendation systems that prioritize user preference without considering nutritional health. The Multi-Objective Personalized Interpretable Health-aware Food Recommendation System (MOPI-HFRS), from which this work extends, addresses this by jointly optimizing preference, health, and diversity through Pareto-based optimization. However, this approach relies on static, per-step tradeoff solutions that fail to capture the sequential nature of dietary decision-making. We introduce MORL-A2C, a sequential decision-making extension to MOPI-HFRS targeting the health-preference axis. Leveraging frozen GNN embeddings, MORL-A2C formulates recommendation as a K-step reranking problem using an Advantage Actor-Critic algorithm with a scalarized relevance/health reward. The policy is warm-started via behavior cloning against a dot-product ranker derived from frozen embeddings. We also identify and correct a non-trivial bug in the MOPI-HFRS evaluation pipeline that understated baseline performance; all results are reported against the corrected baseline. On the macro-nutrient benchmark, MORL-A2C achieves a modest reduction in ranking quality (Recall@20: 25.64% to 23.61%, NDCG@20: 23.52% to 20.64%) in exchange for a substantial improvement in health alignment (H-Score@20: 46.05% to 69.57%), with consistent trends on the full-nutrient benchmark. These findings validate that policy-driven sequential optimization can effectively navigate the health-preference trade-off in multi-objective food recommendation.

AI.tldr: MORL-A2C是一个基于强化学习的序列决策食物推荐系统，通过Advantage Actor-Critic算法在用户偏好和营养健康之间进行权衡，相比之前的静态优化方法能更好地处理饮食决策的序列性。
AI.motivation: 当前食物推荐系统过度关注用户偏好而忽视营养健康，导致不健康的饮食习惯持续成为公共卫生问题。现有的多目标优化方法（如MOPI-HFRS）使用静态权衡方案，无法捕捉饮食决策的序列性特征。
AI.method: MORL-A2C将推荐问题转化为K步重排序问题，使用Advantage Actor-Critic算法，通过标量化相关度/健康度奖励进行优化。策略通过行为克隆使用冻结GNN嵌入的dot-product排序器进行热启动。
AI.result: 在宏营养素基准测试中，MORL-A2C在排名质量上略有下降（Recall@20: 25.64%到23.61%，NDCG@20: 23.52%到20.64%），但在健康对齐度上显著提升（H-Score@20: 46.05%到69.57%），在全营养素基准测试中也呈现一致趋势。
AI.conclusion: 基于策略的序列优化能够有效处理多目标食物推荐中的健康-偏好权衡问题，验证了序列决策方法在平衡用户偏好和营养健康方面的有效性。

title: Polycepta: Object-Centric Appearance Estimation for Multi-Object Tracking
summary: The tracking-by-detection paradigm in multi-object tracking (MOT) typically relies on static appearance descriptors to complement motion estimation. However, these descriptors are frame-independent, limiting their robustness as visual cues. Since such descriptors are often obtained from computationally intensive pretrained backbones, real-time MOT systems frequently abandon appearance cues altogether and rely solely on motion prediction and geometric association. In this work, we introduce Polycepta, an object-centric appearance state estimation framework that reformulates appearance modeling as a recursive estimation problem rather than a frame-wise matching task. Polycepta constructs and continuously updates an independent appearance state for each tracked object, enabling future appearance representations to be estimated from accumulated observations. Polycepta is encouraged to learn the appearance-state construction of object-specific representations rather than memorize them through a proposed learning strategy, enabling appearance estimation for unseen classes. A key property of Polycepta is that the quality of appearance estimation improves as object states evolve during inference. While conventional appearance descriptors remain static or degrade over time, Polycepta progressively refines appearance estimates as additional observations are accumulated. Extensive experiments on KITTI, the Waymo Open Dataset, and MOT17 demonstrate consistent reductions in identity switches and improvements in tracking performance when integrated into the tracking-by-detection pipelines. Polycepta operates at 90.57 Hz and delivers state-of-the-art performance on the KITTI benchmark when integrated into the RobMOT framework, achieving a MOTA of 92.27\%.

AI.tldr: Polycepta 是一个用于多目标跟踪的物体中心外观状态估计框架，它将外观建模重新定义为递归估计问题，而非逐帧匹配任务。该框架通过构建和持续更新每个跟踪物体的独立外观状态，能够从累积观测中估计未来外观表示，并在推理过程中随着物体状态演化而不断改进外观估计质量。
AI.motivation: 传统多目标跟踪中的外观描述符通常是帧独立的静态描述，限制了其作为视觉线索的鲁棒性。由于这些描述符通常来自计算密集的预训练骨干网络，实时跟踪系统常常完全放弃外观线索，仅依赖运动预测和几何关联。这导致跟踪性能受限，特别是在处理遮挡、相似物体等复杂场景时。
AI.method: Polycepta 将外观建模重新构建为递归估计问题，为每个跟踪物体构建并持续更新独立的外观状态。通过提出的学习策略，鼓励模型学习物体特定表示的构建方式而非记忆它们，从而能够对未见类别进行外观估计。关键特性是外观估计质量会随着推理过程中物体状态的演化而不断改进。
AI.result: 在 KITTI、Waymo Open Dataset 和 MOT17 上的广泛实验表明，当集成到跟踪-检测流程中时，Polycepta 能够持续减少身份切换并改善跟踪性能。Polycepta 运行速度为 90.57 Hz，当集成到 RobMOT 框架中时，在 KITTI 基准测试中达到了 92.27% 的 MOTA，实现了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: Polycepta 通过将外观建模重新定义为递归估计问题，解决了传统静态外观描述符的局限性。该方法不仅能够实时运行，还能随着时间推移改进外观估计质量，显著提升了多目标跟踪的性能，特别是在减少身份切换方面表现出色。

title: Scaling Linear Mode Connectivity and Merging to Billion Parameter Pretrained Transformers
summary: Linear mode connectivity (LMC) provides a promising foundation for understanding and merging independently trained neural networks, but existing methods typically optimize the interpolation path from only one model endpoint, limiting their scalability and effectiveness for large pretrained transformers. We propose a novel and scalable framework for enabling LMC-based model merging to {\em billion-parameter pretrained transformers}. Our method applies properly parameterized functionality-preserving weight transformations to align functionally equivalent solutions, and introduces a dual learning procedure in which both models jointly learn their corresponding transformations toward a shared linear interpolation path. This bidirectional optimization substantially reduces interpolation barriers and enables more reliable merging across large-scale architectures. Empirically, we show that our approach achieves near-zero loss barriers on WikiText for language models with medium-sized parameters, representing, to our knowledge, the first demonstration of near-barrier-free linear connectivity at this scale. In the vision domain, ViT-L maintains above 69\% ImageNet top-1 accuracy throughout the interpolation path, while modern billion-parameter LLMs exhibit only small loss barriers. These results suggest that properly resolving parameter symmetries enables large pretrained Transformers to be connected and merged through simple linear paths with substantially improved interpolation performance. Code: https://github.com/VILA-Lab/Dual-Learned-Matching .

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新颖的双向学习框架，用于实现大规模预训练Transformer的线性模式连接和模型合并，显著降低了插值障碍，并在语言和视觉模型上取得了优异效果。
AI.motivation: 现有线性模式连接方法通常只从一个模型端点优化插值路径，限制了其在大规模预训练Transformer中的可扩展性和有效性。需要一种能够有效对齐功能等效解、降低插值障碍的新方法。
AI.method: 提出双向学习框架，应用参数化的功能保持权重变换来对齐功能等效解，让两个模型共同学习相应的变换，以达成共享的线性插值路径。这种双向优化显著降低了插值障碍。
AI.result: 在中等规模语言模型上实现接近零损失障碍的线性连接，ViT-L在ImageNet上保持69%以上的top-1准确率，现代十亿参数LLM仅显示小损失障碍。这是首次在如此规模上展示接近无障碍的线性连接。
AI.conclusion: 通过适当解决参数对称性问题，大型预训练Transformer可以通过简单线性路径进行连接和合并，显著提升插值性能。该框架为大规模模型合并提供了实用解决方案。

title: Vera: A Layered Diffusion Model for Content-Preserving Video Editing
summary: Video diffusion models have enabled remarkable progress in video generation and editing. However, content preservation remains a core challenge: existing methods regenerate every pixel and often alter elements that should remain unchanged, such as characters or background scenes. We introduce Vera, a layered diffusion framework for content-preserving video editing. Instead of regenerating the entire video, Vera generates an edit layer along with an alpha matte for compositing with the source video, separating creative editing from content preservation by design. To encourage coherent composition with the source video, we extend the text-to-video DiT into a Mixture-of-Transformers (MoT) architecture, with separate DiTs for each layer that interact through joint self-attention. To support the training of Vera, we further construct a high-quality layered dataset with accurate alpha mattes, diverse scenes and dynamics, and visual effects. Across our quantitative benchmark and human preference study, Vera outperforms leading open-source video editing models in content preservation while remaining competitive in edit quality, using 486K frames of layered training data.

AI.tldr: Vera是一个分层扩散框架，通过生成编辑层和alpha遮罩与源视频合成，实现内容保留的视频编辑，解决了现有方法会改变不应变化元素的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视频扩散模型在视频生成和编辑方面取得了显著进展，但内容保留仍然是一个核心挑战。现有方法会重新生成每个像素，经常改变应该保持不变的元素，如角色或背景场景。
AI.method: 提出Vera分层扩散框架，通过生成编辑层和alpha遮罩与源视频合成，将创意编辑与内容保留分离。采用混合变换器架构，为每个层配备单独的DiT，通过联合自注意力交互。构建高质量分层数据集支持训练。
AI.result: 在定量基准和人类偏好研究中，Vera在内容保留方面优于领先的开源视频编辑模型，同时在编辑质量方面保持竞争力，使用了48.6万帧的分层训练数据。
AI.conclusion: Vera通过分层扩散框架有效解决了视频编辑中的内容保留问题，通过分离编辑层和源内容，在保持编辑质量的同时显著提升了内容保留能力。

title: Discovering Latent Groups for Robust Classification
summary: Machine learning models exploit spurious correlations, achieving high average accuracy but failing disproportionately on underrepresented subgroups. Existing methods address this by adjusting network parameters, guided either by subgroup annotations or inferred pseudo-group labels. Yet at inference, these methods produce only a class prediction, with no insight into a sample's latent subgroup. We propose neural classification trees (NCT), a framework that achieves robustness by encoding subgroup structure in its tree-shaped architecture. By routing each sample to an "easy" or "hard" node of this tree -- based on prediction correctness -- and reusing these routes as pseudo-labels for the next iteration, NCT disentangles conflicting subgroups, without requiring subgroup supervision. We evaluate NCT on five benchmarks spanning binary and multi-class spurious correlations. Our experiments show that the learned tree topology provides strong interpretability by consistently isolating minority subgroups, which provides a transparent mapping between the model architecture and the data's latent group structure, while yielding competitive robustness with state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: NCT（神经分类树）通过树形架构编码子组结构，无需子组标注即可实现鲁棒性，同时提供可解释性
AI.motivation: 机器学习模型利用虚假相关性，在平均准确率高的同时，在代表性不足的子组上表现不佳。现有方法需要子组标注或推断伪标签，且在推理时仅提供类别预测，无法揭示样本的潜在子组信息。
AI.method: 提出神经分类树（NCT）框架，通过树形架构编码子组结构。基于预测正确性将样本路由到树的"简单"或"困难"节点，并将这些路由作为伪标签用于下一轮迭代，从而分离冲突的子组。
AI.result: 在五个涵盖二元和多类虚假相关性的基准测试上评估NCT。实验表明，学习的树拓扑结构通过一致地隔离少数子组提供了强大的可解释性，同时实现了与最先进方法相当的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: NCT在无需子组监督的情况下，通过树形架构编码数据潜在子组结构，既提供了模型架构与数据潜在组结构之间的透明映射，又实现了竞争性的鲁棒性。

title: Data Selection Through Iterative Self-Filtering for Vision-Language Settings
summary: The availability of large amounts of clean data is paramount to training neural networks. However, at large scales, manual oversight is impractical, resulting in sizeable datasets that can be very noisy. Attempts to mitigate this obstacle to producing performant vision-language models have so far involved heuristics, curated reference datasets, and using pre-trained models. Here we propose a novel, bootstrapped method in which a CLIP model is trained on an evolving, self-selected dataset. This evolving dataset constitutes a balance of filtered, highly probable clean samples as well as diverse samples from the entire distribution. Our proposed Self-Filtering method iterates between training the model and selecting a subsequently improved data mixture. Training on vision-language datasets filtered by the proposed approach improves downstream performance without the need for additional data or pre-trained models.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种自过滤方法，通过迭代训练CLIP模型并选择改进的数据混合来提升视觉-语言模型的性能，无需额外数据或预训练模型。
AI.motivation: 大规模数据集通常存在噪声问题，手动清理不切实际，现有方法依赖启发式规则、精心策划的参考数据集或预训练模型，需要一种更有效的数据清洗方法。
AI.method: 提出自过滤方法：1) 在演化的自选数据集上训练CLIP模型；2) 数据集包含经过过滤的高概率干净样本和整个分布中的多样样本；3) 迭代训练模型并选择改进的数据混合。
AI.result: 使用自过滤方法筛选的视觉-语言数据集进行训练，能够提升下游任务性能，且不需要额外数据或预训练模型。
AI.conclusion: 自过滤方法通过迭代训练和数据选择，有效解决了大规模数据集的噪声问题，提升了视觉-语言模型的性能，为数据清洗提供了新思路。

title: DiT-Reward: Generative Representations for Text-to-Image Reward Modeling
summary: Can representations learned for image generation also support the evaluation of generated images? We study text-to-image reward prediction as a downstream task of generative representation learning. To this end, we introduce DiT-Reward, which converts a pretrained text-to-image Diffusion Transformer into a reward model by processing near-clean image latents and aggregating text-conditioned image representations across transformer layers. Under the same training data mixture as HPSv3, DiT-Reward outperforms HPSv3 on all four evaluated preference benchmarks, reaching 85.6% on HPDv2 and 77.6% on HPDv3. When the generative backbone is frozen, a lightweight learned head can still extract meaningful preference predictions from its representations. Probing across depth further reveals that downstream reward performance is strongest in the middle-to-late layers and benefits from combining representations across different stages. We also observe consistent positive scaling with generative backbone capacity. Finally, when used to optimize Stable Diffusion 3.5 Large with Flow-GRPO, DiT-Reward outperforms HPSv3 along the matched training trajectory, with particularly clear gains in realism. Direct latent scoring also achieves a 1.65x inference speedup over HPSv3 with comparable peak memory. These results show that pretrained generative DiTs provide transferable representations for reward modeling and policy optimization.

AI.tldr: DiT-Reward：将预训练的文本到图像扩散Transformer转换为奖励模型，通过处理近干净图像潜在表示并聚合跨Transformer层的文本条件图像表示，在图像生成质量评估任务上优于现有方法
AI.motivation: 研究图像生成学习到的表示是否也能支持生成图像的评估，探索生成表示学习在下游任务中的应用
AI.method: 将预训练的文本到图像扩散Transformer转换为奖励模型，处理近干净图像潜在表示，聚合跨Transformer层的文本条件图像表示，使用轻量级学习头部
AI.result: 在HPSv3相同训练数据下，DiT-Reward在四个偏好基准测试中均优于HPSv3，HPDv2达到85.6%，HPDv3达到77.6%。推理速度提升1.65倍，内存使用相当
AI.conclusion: 预训练的生成DiT为奖励建模和策略优化提供了可迁移的表示，展示了生成表示学习在下游任务中的有效性

title: Hedgementation = Hedgerow Segmentation: A Remote Sensing Benchmark
summary: We propose Hedgementation: a new benchmark to evaluate machine learning models for hedgerow mapping from remote sensing data at country scale and 10m$^2$ spatial resolution. We combine and harmonize multiple remote sensing data products and ground truth labels sourced from a hedgerow inventory in France. We measure the ability of three baseline models to generalize across spatial distance, and across climatic zones, a more explicitly challenging task. Our benchmark tests both supervised and self-supervised learning approaches for remote sensing, applied to tracking fine-scale features of high agricultural importance. The code to reproduce the benchmark and baselines results is available at https://github.com/hedgementation/hedgementation.

AI.tldr: Hedgementation是一个用于评估机器学习模型在国家级尺度、10m²空间分辨率下从遥感数据绘制树篱地图的新基准，结合了多源遥感数据和法国树篱清单的真实标签。
AI.motivation: 需要评估机器学习模型在遥感数据中识别和绘制树篱的能力，特别是在国家级尺度和高空间分辨率下，以支持农业环境监测和保护。
AI.method: 结合和协调多个遥感数据产品和地面真实标签（来自法国树篱清单），创建基准数据集。评估三个基线模型在空间距离和气候区域上的泛化能力，测试监督和自监督学习方法。
AI.result: 建立了Hedgementation基准，提供了可复现的代码，并测量了基线模型在跨空间距离和气候区域的泛化性能，为树篱制图提供了评估标准。
AI.conclusion: Hedgementation为树篱制图提供了一个具有挑战性的基准，有助于推动遥感领域对高农业重要性细尺度特征的机器学习研究。

title: Muown Implicitly Performs Angular Step-size Decay
summary: Matrix-aware optimizers such as Muon and Muown have recently shown strong empirical performance for pre-training Transformers. In particular, Muown separates each weight matrix into row magnitudes and an un-normalized direction variable, updating the former with Adam and the latter with Muon. We show that the directional update of Muown is equivalent to a Riemannian step on the normalized directions, while the magnitude of the un-normalized parameterization only modulates the angular step size. This explains the step-size stability of Muown and suggests making the angular step size explicit. The resulting method, AngularMuown, optimizes directly over the normalized directions and uses a schedulable angular multiplier decoupled from the radial magnitude update. AngularMuown improves over Muown and, at the time of writing, a preliminary version is leading the per-optimizer category of the modded nanoGPT speedrunning competition. Further experiments on Qwen2-0.5B, and 1.1B parameter mixture-of-experts models confirm the algorithm scales beyond small models. An implementation of the algorithm is available at https://github.com/fhueb/angular-muown

AI.tldr: AngularMuown 是一种改进的矩阵感知优化器，它将权重矩阵分解为行幅度和归一化方向变量，通过显式的角度步长调度来优化归一化方向，从而提高了训练稳定性和性能。
AI.motivation: 现有矩阵感知优化器如 Muown 将权重矩阵分解为幅度和方向变量，分别用 Adam 和 Muon 更新。研究发现 Muown 的方向更新等价于归一化方向上的黎曼步，而幅度仅调节角度步长大小。这解释了 Muown 的步长稳定性，并建议将角度步长显式化以改进优化过程。
AI.method: AngularMuown 直接在归一化方向上优化，使用可调度的角度乘子与径向幅度更新解耦。该方法将权重矩阵分解为行幅度和归一化方向变量，幅度更新使用 Adam，方向更新采用显式角度步长调度，从而更稳定地优化模型参数。
AI.result: AngularMuown 在 modded nanoGPT 速度竞赛中领先于其他优化器。在 Qwen2-0.5B 和 1.1B 参数的混合专家模型上的进一步实验证实了该方法可扩展到大型模型，性能优于原始的 Muown 方法。
AI.conclusion: AngularMuown 通过显式角度步长调度和归一化方向优化，改进了矩阵感知优化器的性能，提供了更好的训练稳定性和可扩展性，适用于大规模 Transformer 模型的预训练。

title: Pose Anything Anywhere:Model-free Object Poses from Arbitrary References
summary: Estimating the 6D pose of unseen objects is a fundamental yet challenging problem for open-world robotics and embodied perception. Model-based methods are accurate but depend on CAD assets or heavy onboarding, while most model-free approaches are still limited to pairwise single-anchor matching and thus fail under occlusion and large viewpoint changes with low query-reference overlap. Therefore, we present PANY, a unified model-free framework that seamlessly supports both RGB and RGB-D inputs, operates on one or sparse pose-free reference views, and generalizes effectively to novel objects. Built on a multi-view transformer geometry backbone, PANY moves beyond pairwise matching by learning view-consistent geometry and cross-view alignment cues that remain stable under wide baselines and limited overlap. When additional unposed assist views are available, PANY aggregates them via pose-graph canonical registration to increase geometric coverage and reinforce the final pose. Extensive experiments show that PANY achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple benchmarks, substantially outperforming existing model-free methods, improving pose accuracy by +12% on YCB-V and over +20% on LM-O. Furthermore, PANY consistently performs well under both single-reference and sparse-reference settings, demonstrating strong robustness in real-world environments.

AI.tldr: PANY是一个统一的免模型6D姿态估计框架，支持RGB和RGB-D输入，能在单个或稀疏无姿态参考视图下工作，并能泛化到新物体。它通过多视角transformer几何骨干学习视角一致的几何和跨视角对齐线索，在宽基线和有限重叠下保持稳定，并通过姿态图规范配准聚合辅助视图提升性能。
AI.motivation: 解决开放世界机器人和具身感知中未见物体6D姿态估计的挑战。基于模型的方法依赖CAD资产或繁重配置，而大多数免模型方法局限于成对单锚点匹配，在遮挡和大视角变化导致查询-参考重叠度低时容易失败。
AI.method: 基于多视角transformer几何骨干，学习视角一致的几何和跨视角对齐线索，这些线索在宽基线和有限重叠下保持稳定。当有额外无姿态辅助视图时，通过姿态图规范配准进行聚合以增加几何覆盖并强化最终姿态。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中达到最先进性能，显著优于现有免模型方法，在YCB-V上提升姿态精度+12%，在LM-O上提升超过+20%。在单参考和稀疏参考设置下均表现良好，在真实环境中展示强大鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: PANY是一个统一的免模型框架，通过超越成对匹配的多视角几何学习，在6D姿态估计任务上实现了显著性能提升，为开放世界机器人和具身感知提供了有效的解决方案。

title: Lightweight Neural Framework for Robust 3D Volume and Surface Estimation from Multi-View Images
summary: Accurate volume and surface area estimation is critical for diverse applications, from marine ecology to medical diagnostics. However, existing methods often suffer from high computational costs and poor performance with sparse and noisy data. We propose a fully feed-forward framework that regresses scale-normalized volume and surface area and their associated uncertainties directly from multi-view images. By fusing 3D point cloud reconstructions with view-aligned 2D features through a graph-based decoder, our model bypasses iterative optimization, ensuring exceptional scalability and rapid inference. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods, particularly when operating with a low number of input images. Validated across coral monitoring, dietary analysis, and anthropometry, our proposed framework provides a robust, adaptable solution for quantitative shape analysis. This architecture provides a high-speed, scalable alternative for precise geometric estimation from visual data, maintaining high performance even in resource-constrained or sparse-view scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出一个全前馈框架，直接从多视角图像回归尺度归一化的体积和表面积及其不确定性，无需迭代优化，在稀疏视角下表现优异。
AI.motivation: 准确的体积和表面积估计对于海洋生态学和医学诊断等应用至关重要，但现有方法存在计算成本高、对稀疏噪声数据性能差的问题。
AI.method: 通过图基解码器将3D点云重建与视角对齐的2D特征融合，直接回归尺度归一化的体积和表面积及其不确定性，实现完全前馈处理。
AI.result: 实验结果表明该方法优于现有技术，特别是在输入图像数量较少时。在珊瑚监测、饮食分析和人体测量等多个领域验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为从视觉数据进行精确几何估计提供了高速、可扩展的替代方案，即使在资源受限或稀疏视角场景下也能保持高性能。

title: Dynamic estimation of slowly varying sequences
summary: We consider the problem of sequentially approximating functions of each element in a slowly-varying sequence, i.e. one where the magnitude $α_i$ of the difference between the elements at positions $i$ and $i-1$ is small. Recent work on implicit trace estimation shows that when $α_t$ is small, reusing queries to past sequence elements can reduce the overall cost [Dharangutte \& Musco, NeurIPS~2021; Woodruff et al., NeurIPS~2022]. We introduce a framework generalizing this to a variety of linear and nonlinear functions on diverse vector spaces, obtaining novel sequential estimation results for matrix powers, spectral densities, Monte Carlo integration, and a boundary value problem from partial differential equations~(PDEs). Furthermore, we develop a novel algorithm for use with this framework that locally scales the estimation budget with $α_t$, obtaining sharper path-length-style variation bounds of form $\mathcal O(\sum_{i=1}^mα_i)$ on the cost of estimating a sequence of length $m$. This improves upon the previous implicit trace estimation bound of $\mathcal O(m\cdot\max_iα_i)$ [Dharangutte \& Musco, NeurIPS~2021], which is achieved by fixing the query budget using the worst-case $α_i$ and is thus inefficient for stable sequences with rare bursts. Lastly, while all past work assumes a known bound on $α_i$, we show in certain cases how the changes can be estimated on-the-fly with (nearly) no added cost. In summary, our framework makes the sequential approximation toolkit general-purpose and adaptive while improving upon state-of-the-art-guarantees for dynamic trace estimation.

AI.tldr: 提出一个通用框架，用于序列化近似缓慢变化序列中元素的函数，改进动态迹估计的现有边界，并引入自适应算法根据局部变化调整估计预算。
AI.motivation: 现有隐式迹估计方法在序列元素变化较小时可以重用过去查询来降低总成本，但存在两个主要限制：1) 仅适用于特定函数（迹估计），缺乏通用性；2) 使用最坏情况变化边界，对稳定序列效率低下。
AI.method: 提出一个通用框架，将隐式迹估计推广到各种线性/非线性函数和向量空间。开发自适应算法，根据局部变化幅度α_t动态调整估计预算，并探索在未知α_i边界时在线估计变化的方法。
AI.result: 获得了矩阵幂、谱密度、蒙特卡洛积分和PDE边值问题的新序列估计结果。改进边界为O(∑α_i)，优于之前的O(m·max α_i)。在某些情况下，可以几乎无额外成本地在线估计变化。
AI.conclusion: 该框架使序列近似工具包更加通用和自适应，同时改进了动态迹估计的最先进保证，为处理缓慢变化序列的函数近似提供了更高效、更灵活的解决方案。

title: GeoFidelity-Bench: Evaluating Segment-Level Geographic Fidelity in Text-to-Image Street-View Generation
summary: Text-to-image models can generate visually plausible city streets, but whether their outputs correspond to a requested road segment rather than a generic city prior remains unclear. We introduce GeoFidelity-Bench, a reference-panel benchmark for segment-conditioned geographic fidelity in street-view generation. It contains 7,117 curated Mapillary images covering 109 named OpenStreetMap road segments in 25 cities across six continents. For each generated panel, the benchmark ranks the target reference panel against panels from the nearest segment in the same city, other segments in the same city, and segments from other cities, making local discrimination rather than absolute target similarity the primary test. We evaluate six open-weight text-to-image generators under city-only, street-and-neighborhood, and GPS-augmented prompts. Adding street and neighborhood names is associated with an increase of 5.5 percentage points in top-1 retrieval accuracy over city-only prompts, with a 95% confidence interval from 3.4 to 7.7 percentage points. However, the similarity margin between the target and the nearest segment in the same city remains near zero, indicating that local names improve broad local plausibility more than exact segment identity. Prompts that keep the city fixed but use incorrect street or neighborhood names further show that only part of the gain depends on the correct local names, while appending raw GPS coordinates as ordinary text yields no statistically clear additional benefit. Held-out real-image queries successfully recover segment identity, showing that the curated references contain usable segment-level signal. GeoFidelity-Bench thus reveals a persistent gap between city- or neighborhood-plausible street-view generation and faithful generation for a specific road segment.

AI.tldr: GeoFidelity-Bench是一个用于评估街景生成模型地理保真度的基准测试，通过7,117张精心挑选的真实街景图像，测试模型是否能生成特定道路段而非泛化的城市街景。研究发现，添加街道和社区名称能提高5.5个百分点的检索准确率，但模型仍难以区分同一城市内的相邻路段。
AI.motivation: 现有的文本到图像模型能够生成看似合理的城市街景，但无法确定这些输出是否真正对应于用户请求的特定道路段，还是仅仅基于通用的城市先验知识。需要建立评估街景生成地理保真度的基准。
AI.method: 构建了GeoFidelity-Bench基准测试，包含7,117张Mapillary图像，覆盖六大洲25个城市的109个OpenStreetMap道路段。通过生成参考面板，将目标参考面板与同一城市最近路段、同一城市其他路段、其他城市路段的参考面板进行排名比较，以局部区分而非绝对相似性为主要测试标准。评估了六种开源文本到图像生成器在三种提示条件下的表现：仅城市、街道+社区、GPS增强提示。
AI.result: 添加街道和社区名称相比仅城市提示，能将top-1检索准确率提高5.5个百分点（95%置信区间3.4-7.7）。然而，目标路段与同一城市最近路段之间的相似性差异接近零，表明本地名称主要提高广义本地合理性而非精确路段识别。使用错误街道/社区名称的提示显示，只有部分增益依赖于正确的本地名称。添加原始GPS坐标作为普通文本没有明显额外收益。保留的真实图像查询能成功恢复路段身份，证明参考数据包含可用的路段级信号。
AI.conclusion: GeoFidelity-Bench揭示了城市或社区合理街景生成与特定道路段忠实生成之间的持续差距。当前模型能够生成看起来合理的本地街景，但无法精确区分同一城市内的相邻路段，表明在特定地理位置的精确生成方面仍有改进空间。

title: MAS-PromptBench: When Does Prompt Optimization Improve Multi-Agent LLM Systems?
summary: Multi-agent systems (MAS) offer a scalable path forward for agentic AI, comprising multiple LLM-based agents, each assigned a system prompt and a position within a workflow that governs inter-agent coordination and output aggregation. System prompts thus form a critical and accessible optimization surface: they specify agents' roles and behaviors, enabling system-level improvements without model finetuning. Although prompt optimization has shown substantial potential for single LLMs, extending it to MAS poses distinct challenges, notably an exponentially growing search space. It remains unclear whether, when, and by how much prompt optimization improves MAS performance, and how sensitive such gains are to system configuration. In this work, we systematically study system-prompt optimization across a broad range of MAS setups varying in task, workflow, communication protocol, and team size, benchmarking two prompt optimizers that naturally extend state-of-the-art single-agent methods. The results reveal its potential to unlock significant gains while exposing open challenges, characterizing when and how much prompt optimization helps across diverse MAS settings.

AI.tldr: 该研究系统性地探索了多智能体系统中系统提示优化的效果，揭示了其在多种配置下能显著提升性能，但也指出了搜索空间指数级增长等挑战。
AI.motivation: 多智能体系统（MAS）为智能AI提供了可扩展路径，系统提示作为关键且易于优化的表面，能够在不进行模型微调的情况下实现系统级改进。然而，将单智能体提示优化扩展到MAS面临搜索空间指数级增长等独特挑战，目前尚不清楚提示优化何时、在何种程度上能提升MAS性能。
AI.method: 研究在广泛的多智能体系统设置下（包括不同任务、工作流、通信协议和团队规模）系统性地研究系统提示优化，基准测试了两种自然扩展自最先进单智能体方法的提示优化器。
AI.result: 结果显示提示优化能够解锁显著的性能提升，同时揭示了开放挑战，并描述了在不同MAS设置下提示优化何时、在何种程度上有所帮助。
AI.conclusion: 系统提示优化是多智能体系统性能提升的重要途径，但需要解决搜索空间爆炸等挑战。研究为理解提示优化在MAS中的效果提供了系统性的实证基础。

title: IMAGIN-4D: Image-Guided Controllable Interaction Generation
summary: Generating human-object interactions (HOI) is central to character animation, robotics, AR/VR, and embodied AI. Recent HOI generation methods synthesize motion from text, object geometry, and sparse waypoints, controlling action semantics and object trajectories. However, these signals underspecify interaction: the same prompt and trajectory can produce different grasps, approach directions, body poses, object poses, contacts, and body-object layouts. We address this ambiguity with a reference image as a visual specification of the desired interaction snapshot. However, a single global image representation conflates distinct cues and conditions all frames on identical visual evidence. We therefore introduce IMAGIN-4D, a diffusion-based HOI generator that decomposes image conditioning spatio-temporally. For spatial conditioning, IMAGIN-4D extracts supervised interaction-state tokens for body pose, object pose, body-object contact, and spatial relationships at the depicted frame. For temporal conditioning, it computes frame-aware tokens by querying image patches per generated frame, allowing sequence segments to attend to different visual cues from the same image. To balance image, text, and waypoint cues, IMAGIN-4D uses role-aware conditioning: text, waypoints, and interaction-state tokens use separate AdaLN streams, while frame-aware visual tokens cross-attend with motion tokens. Since HOI motion datasets lack paired images, we build a synthetic motion-to-image rendering pipeline from FullBodyManipulation (FBM) and introduce an image-adherence metric to evaluate whether generated motions match the reference snapshot. Experiments on FBM and BEHAVE show that IMAGIN-4D improves fine-grained interaction control over single-token and uniformly image-conditioned baselines while preserving waypoint-following and motion quality. Code and models will be released at https://imagin4d.github.io.

AI.tldr: IMAGIN-4D是一个基于扩散模型的人-物交互生成方法，通过时空分解的图像条件来更精确地控制交互细节，解决了现有方法在交互细节上的模糊性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的人-物交互生成方法虽然能通过文本、物体几何和路径点控制动作语义和物体轨迹，但这些信号无法充分指定交互细节，如抓握方式、接近方向、身体姿态、物体姿态、接触关系和空间布局等。为了解决这种模糊性，需要引入参考图像作为视觉规范，但传统的全局图像表示会混淆不同线索，且所有帧都基于相同的视觉证据。
AI.method: IMAGIN-4D采用时空分解的图像条件策略：1) 空间条件：从参考图像中提取监督的交互状态标记，包括身体姿态、物体姿态、身体-物体接触和空间关系；2) 时间条件：通过每帧查询图像块计算帧感知标记，允许序列片段关注同一图像的不同视觉线索；3) 角色感知条件：使用独立的AdaLN流处理文本、路径点和交互状态标记，而帧感知视觉标记与运动标记进行交叉注意力。
AI.result: 在FullBodyManipulation和BEHAVE数据集上的实验表明，IMAGIN-4D相比单标记和均匀图像条件的基线方法，在保持路径点跟随和运动质量的同时，显著提高了细粒度交互控制能力。研究还引入了一个图像一致性指标来评估生成运动与参考快照的匹配程度。
AI.conclusion: IMAGIN-4D通过时空分解的图像条件方法有效解决了人-物交互生成中的模糊性问题，实现了更精确的交互细节控制，为人机交互、动画制作等应用提供了更强大的生成工具。

title: On the Limits of Prompt-Conditioned Language Models as General-Purpose Learners
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are frequently portrayed as general-purpose solvers capable of solving arbitrary tasks. We argue that this view overlooks a fundamental constraint: language is a compressed and capacity-limited interface for conveying task information. Modelling User--System interaction as a bilevel \emph{cheap-talk} game, we analyse how latent tasks are encoded into prompts and reinterpreted under alignment and safety constraints. We introduce a conceptual decomposition separating task inference from execution and derive PAC-Bayes bounds that distinguish finite-sample estimation error from irreducible structural limitations. Our first main result establishes an \emph{expressivity floor}: language acts as a capacity-limited communication channel, and whenever the informational complexity of a task family exceeds the capacity of that channel, distinct tasks become unavoidably indistinguishable to the Solver, inducing a strictly positive error floor that cannot be eliminated by additional data, optimisation, or model scaling alone. We then establish an \emph{objective-misalignment floor}: when alignment constraints restrict the admissible output set, the User-ideal distribution may lie outside the feasible class, inducing an irreducible distortion. Together, these results yield a formal negative conclusion: prompt-conditioned LLMs are not universal problem solvers through prompting alone, as there exist task families for which correct behaviour is provably unattainable even in the infinite-data regime.
